name: Grilled Steak Farro Bowl
description: Steak lovers, listen up‚Äîthis loaded bowl is a must-try. The ideal weeknight dinner, it features juicy slices of grilled flank steak, chickpeas, roasted Brussels sprouts, saut√©ed mushrooms, and caramelized onions, all on a bed of baby kale and farro. An exquisite chermoula sauce made from cilantro, lemon juice, garlic and spices ties the whole bowl together. Not only is this dish nutritious and satisfying, but every bite promises a unique combination of flavors and textures.

name: Pork al Pastor Ancient Grain Bowl
description: Nobody puts together a bowl full of flavor-packed goodness like Chef Ivy. This one draws inspiration from Mexico with tender, chile-roasted pork, cooked in the style of Al Pastor. Served atop a nutty ancient grain pilaf and seasoned black beans, the bowl is finished with a simple salad of little gem lettuce, watermelon radish, red onion, cucumber and sliced avocado. Drizzle or toss everything in Chef Ivy's pleasantly tangy agave-lime vinaigrette, and dig in!

name: Soy Braised Chicken Thighs
description: The deep rich flavors of China over a light and fresh scallion quinoa.

name: Creole Spiced Grilled Lamb Loin Chop
description: Chef Angelia pulls influence from around the globe for this boldly flavored dish. Super tender lamb loin chop is seasoned with classic Creole spices, then grilled to perfection to get that perfect spice crust. On the side, enjoy a satisfying side of traditional Cajun-style dirty rice, infused with a medley of spices and herbs, plus smoky bacon and rich ground pork. Topped with a tangy pineapple chutney, this dish strikes the perfect balance of sweet and salty flavors to keep you coming back for bite after bite.

name: Mediterranean Salmon Quinoa Bowl
description: Always eager to offer more balanced and nutritious yet delicious options, Chef Ruben cooked up this Mediterranean-inspired quinoa bowl with salmon. A perfectly seared filet of buttery salmon sits alongside crisp green beans atop a fresh quinoa salad. The salmon and quinoa are complemented by a bright, herbaceous chermoula sauce that's bursting with flavor thanks to garlic, fresh cilantro, and high-quality olive oil. Each of the elements brings distinct flavor and texture resulting in a truly balanced bowl when they come together.

name: Roasted Mahi Mahi
description: Transform any ordinary weeknight into a sunny Mediterranean vacation with Chef Michael‚Äôs vibrant, meticulously crafted meal. Savory pesto sauce adds herbal, nutty depth to the mild, delicate mahi mahi, seared to lock in moistness then finished in the oven. Alongside, enjoy classic French ratatouille‚Äîa robust blend of slow-simmered tomatoes, eggplant, zucchini, and bell peppers‚Äîand tender orzo pasta tossed with briny black olives. All that, and this meal clocks in at a healthy 610 calories, too. What‚Äôs not to love?

name: Rosemary Chicken Dinner
description: It's not hard to fall in love with seasonal flavors, and this meal puts the best of them on display. Rosemary and garlic infused chicken is roasted to juicy perfection, then sliced and served alongside seasonal sides. Crispy roasted Brussels sprouts and a creamy, dreamy pumpkin pur√©e that's sweetened with a hint of maple syrup are the perfect match for herby chicken, especially when topped with toasted pumpkin seeds for crunch!

name: Classic Spaghetti Meatballs
description: Craving comfort food? This timeless Italian classic marries robust flavors and soothing simplicity. Strands of al dente spaghetti and tender, handcrafted beef and Italian sausage meatballs are generously coated in Chef Sylvia Arevalo‚Äôs authentic Napoli sauce, a robust, slow-simmered blend of vine-ripened tomatoes, garlic, and aromatic herbs, including basil, oregano, and thyme. The Parmesan garnish adds a pop of salty, umami richness. Break out a bottle of your favorite red, toss together a simple green salad, and you‚Äôve got a hearty dinner to enjoy anytime.

name: Jerk Chicken Anguillan Slaw
description: This dish is an homage to the food from one of Chef Marc Forgione's favorite places on earth - Anguilla. This jerk chicken is packed with spicy flavor but is paired with a refreshing, cooling slaw and coconut-infused rice & beans...you'll be instantly transported to the island of Anguilla!

name: Flap Steak with Creamed Spinach
description: Bring the steakhouse experience into your home! This meal features the steakhouse classics we all love - beautiful seared steaks topped with a grilled onion steak sauce and served with creamed spinach and baked potato sides.

name: Spicy Lamb Vindaloo
description: Tender lamb is slow-cooked to perfection in a rich and spicy traditional Indian vindaloo curry that's infused with bold flavors of cumin, coriander, ginger, and chili peppers. This fragrant, fiery lamb curry is served alongside aromatic Jasmine rice, fluffy naan bread, and a refreshing raita yogurt sauce to cool down your palate. Perfect for a cozy night in or to make any night feel like a special occasion, this satisfying and memorable meal will transport your taste buds straight to the vibrant streets of India.

name: Hoisin Glazed Short Ribs
description: Chef Chris tweaked a traditional braise to yield these sweet and savory hoisin-glazed short ribs that are the definition of melt-in-your-mouth tender. The succulent beef is paired with noodles and cabbage in an addictive peanut sauce for a decadent dish that's sure to be a new favorite. Leftovers are yummy hot or cold.

name: Grilled Bbq Pork Chop
description: Indulge in this classic BBQ dish featuring saucy grilled pork chops, tender braised greens, and creamy mashed potatoes. The grilled pork chops are seasoned to perfection, infused with the rich and smoky flavors of Bubb's signature BBQ seasoning, then grilled until juicy and moist. Paired with extra comforting sides‚Äîflavorful braised greens, and silky smooth creamy mashed potatoes‚Äîeach bite is guaranteed to pack a perfect blend of savory, smoky, and comforting flavors that will leave you feeling satisfied and content. This is Bubb's take on the ultimate plate of comfort cooking.

name: Spicy Peruvian Seafood Paella
description: You may have had paella before, but never like this! Chef Walther‚Äôs secret weapon? Peruvian aji panca chiles. By adding them to the rich seafood stock he uses to slowly cook the rice and aromatic vegetables, he infuses their heat and almost berry-like flavor with a hint of smoke into every bite. Then, just before the rice is done, he stirs in plump, juicy shrimp, mussels, and clams, along with tender fresh carrots and peas. A garnish of cilantro adds the final flourish to this awesome flavor explosion.

name: Grilled Chicken Shawarma Bowl
description: Savor your favorite flavors from the Middle East with Chef Dustin's Chicken Shawarma Bowl. Filling and delicious, the bowl features delicately spiced, succulent chicken, paired with fluffy couscous, chickpeas, grilled zucchini, cabbage, and tomatoes. Finished with a zesty yogurt tzatziki, it's a perfect blend of taste and tradition in every bite.

name: Truffled Ramen Stir Fry
description: Calling all truffle lovers! Turn any ordinary weeknight into an indulgent feast with this flavor- and veggie-packed meal. Every element is positively bursting with luxurious black truffle goodness, from the tender tangle of ramen noodles to the umami-rich cremini and shiitake mushrooms to the sweet onions, peppers, and caramelized Brussels sprouts.

name: Roast Beef Rainbow Carrots
description: Craving a unique take on a classic comfort-food combination? This meal will hit the spot. Chef Walther rubs ultra-flavorful chuck roast in his secret spice blend, then roasts it low and slow with beef stock, red wine, and aromatic vegetables until it‚Äôs meltingly fork tender. He serves a hearty portion with a reduction sauce atop luscious, creamy risotto made the traditional Italian way with arborio rice, but enriched with evaporated milk and a combination of Latin-American cheeses. On the side: Naturally sweet roasted rainbow carrots. Add a fresh green salad, if you like, for refreshingly crisp contrast.

name: Masala Lamb Kebabs
description: Chef Aarthi transforms one of her favorite street foods into a complete and balanced meal with these kebabs. Succulent, lightly spicy ground lamb is flavored with mint, ginger, and house-made garam masala, then the roasted kebabs are paired with a luscious mint-cucumber yogurt dip to cool things down. On the side, you'll enjoy a side of Indian-style rice, flavored with lime and spices.

name: Garlic Mozzarella Bread
description: Give into your guilty pleasure with Chef Chris‚Äôs garlic cheese bread, made with fluffy ciabatta, generously buttered and topped with garlic and shredded mozzarella before going in the oven. Enjoy it with a side of creamy sundried tomato sauce for an even richer flavor!

name: Grilled Flat Iron Steak
description: Craving a hearty steak-and-potatoes dinner, elevated with chef expertise? Look no further. Chef Ahktar marinates tender, flavorful bistro-style flat-iron steak with spicy Calabrian chilis and lots of garlic, grills it to a perfect medium-rare, and serves it with a rich veal demi-glace and red wine reduction that turns the volume up to 11. It comes with two equally delicious sides: crispy rosemary-roasted marble potatoes and wilted Swiss chard enlivened with garlic, vinegar, and just a touch of honey. This is a meal you‚Äôll come back to again and again.

name: Pesto Caprese Orecchiette
description: Craving sunshine on a fork? Look no further. Al dente orecchiette is tossed in an irresistible homemade basil pesto. The vibrant pasta is studded with cherry tomatoes and fresh mozzarella pearls for delightful pops of color and texture, making this an easy, breezy dish to turn to any night of the week.

name: Tofu Parmigiana
description: Chef Michelle takes all the best parts of Chicken Parm‚Äîthe crispy coating, rich tomato sauce, and gooey cheese‚Äîand transforms them into a vegetarian-friendly masterpiece. Crispy tofu, Chef's grandma's recipe for tomato sauce, parmesan and melty mozzarella; what could be better? A side of simply steamed broccoli completes the dish.

name: Spicy Korean Bbq Chicken
description: Indulge in a fiery feast with Chef Esther's Spicy Korean BBQ Chicken! Tender chicken gets marinated in a blend of spicy gochujang sauce, soy, and garlic, grilled to perfection, and served with steamed rice and saut√©ed bok choy. Prepare your taste buds for a mouthwatering adventure!

name: Chicken Fricassee with Mushrooms
description: This French interpretation of a chicken stew is creamy and ultra comforting. Boneless chicken thighs are seasoned and seared, then a pan sauce is cooked down with butter and finished with cream. Chef Ludo's adaptation includes mushrooms and tarragon and is served with a classic rice pilaf.

name: Grilled Chicken Inasal
description: Indulge in a plate full of classic Filipino BBQ flavors. The perfectly grilled chicken is first marinated in a unique blend of spices so it's flavorful and juicy throughout. Served over a bed of delectable garlic fried rice and alongside lightly spicy papaya salad, this meal has an ideal balance of flavors and textures that will keep you coming back for more.

name: Stuffed Bell Pepper
description: This meatless, dairy-free dish screams, springtime! A seasonal take on my squash dish, this also features complete proteins, an array of vitamins and minerals and endless flavor and texture! Grounding spices and creamy basil dressing tops off this light and bright spring meal.

name: Curry Powder Crab Stir Fry
description: In this traditional Thai dish, lump crab meat gets stir fried with fragrant curry powder and turmeric, along with white and green onions, Chinese celery, and red bell peppers in a sweet and savory flavor sauce. Served up with a side of fluffy jasmine rice, this unique Thai dish doesn't disappoint.

name: Ginger Prawn Salad Sesame Ginger Dressing
description: Succulent prawns are flash saut√©ed with minced ginger and fish sauce, then served atop a fresh salad of baby spinach, crunchy cabbage, carrots, and a little bit of sweet corn. Dried cherries add a little tartness and roasted cashews bring the crunch, along with a zingy sesame-ginger dressing to tie the whole salad together. This dish will delight your senses without weighing you down!

name: Classic Bistro Meatloaf
description: Don‚Äôt worry, your secret‚Äôs safe with us‚Äîmom doesn‚Äôt need to know you‚Äôve found a new favorite meatloaf. Chef Kevin‚Äôs perfectly seasoned take on this American comfort-food classic combines premium ground beef with a medley of Italian herbs and garlic, then amps up the traditional ketchup-based glaze with the caramel sweetness of brown sugar, smoky paprika, and umami-rich soy sauce. He serves slices atop a generous helping of fluffy, buttery whipped Yukon Gold potatoes and a side of tender-crisp green beans for refreshing crunch, all garnished with a sprinkling of fresh chives. Hearty and refined, this dish will become one of your new go-to‚Äôs.

name: Classic Italian Meatballs
description: This dish is rustic Italian cooking at its best. Beef meatballs are slow-cooked until juicy and tender and served with Chef Dustin‚Äôs signature tomato sauce. Buttered fettuccine round out this comforting, classic meal.

name: Radiant Revival Shot
description: Recharge in a single shot with a zesty, fiery fusion of orange, pineapple, turmeric, and cayenne.

name: Romanesco Steak with Green Goddess Sauce
description: Vegetable lovers‚Äî sharpen up your steak knives! This oven-roasted romanesco 'steak' is as meaty as any vegetable can be. Romanesco is a vegetable in the same family as broccoli and cauliflower, and here it's cut in thick slabs and treated like a steak! Served with caramelized braised leeks and a summery salad of sweet peas, fava beans, and mint, this elegant dish will impress plant-based folks and meat-eaters, too.

name: Braised Pork with Butternut Squash Puree
description: Full of fall flavors, yet delicious enough to enjoy year round, this hearty, satisfying dish is made with tender braised pork and roasted, pur√©ed butternut squash. Fennel brings a zippy bite and apples add a hint of sweetness.

name: Nikkei Shrimp Soba Noodles
description: East meets West in this dish where a century of Japanese immigrants' influence on Peruvian cuisine is highlighted. Tender shrimp are stir-fried with ginger, garlic, and the aromatic, mild Peruvian pepper Aji Amarillo. The shrimp are paired with tender, nutty soba noodles and served alongside stir-fried peppers and cabbage. Pour an umami-rich shiitake mushroom broth over the noodles and shrimp to transform the whole dish into a delectable, slurp-able soup.

name: Rocoto Chili Lobster Enchiladas
description: Enjoy a taste of the sea with Chef Maribel's lobster enchiladas covered in her signature rocoto chili cream sauce, served with black beans and fluffy jasmine rice infused with carrots and peas.

name: Spicy Crying Tiger Grilled Beef
description: For her version of the popular Thai-cuisine staple, Chef Stacy marinates flank steak, char-grills it to medium rare, then slices it against the grain, leaving each bite extremely tender and flavorful. She plates a generous portion on a bed of fluffy steamed Jasmine rice with tangy, smoky char-grilled plum tomato and crisp, garlicky saut√©ed green beans. Drizzle the Crying Tiger sauce‚Äîa spicy-sweet-sour blend of chile peppers, shallots, tamarind, fish sauce, and fresh cilantro‚Äîover everything, and dig into a meal that satisfies every flavor desire.

name: Stuffed Beef Roll
description: Crispy on the outside and gooey on the inside stuffed beef rolls. Rolls are wrapped in prosciutto and stuffed with mushrooms, onions, spinach, cream cheese and other cheeses.

name: Spicy Peanut Ginger Baked Tofu
description: You don't have to be plant-based to love Chef Lena's nutty baked tofu. The secret is her creamy peanut sauce, which has the perfect balance of savory and sweet with a little kick from ginger and chili pepper. It's poured over the baked high-protein tofu, with even more peanut sauce on the side to drizzle or dunk as much as you like. Serve atop your favorite salad or go-to rice bowl for an easy, high-protein meal in minutes.

name: Aarthis Special Chicken Tikka Masala
description: Chef Aarthi took perhaps the most well known Indian restaurant dish and made it more accessible and wholesome, so you can indulge regularly. In her version, juicy chicken thighs are marinated and roasted then placed in a creamy, fragrant tomato-based curry infused with fenugreek and other warming spices. The chicken is paired with roasted broccoli with tons of garlic and a side of cumin-scented steamed basmati rice to soak up every last drop of the curry. Sweet, mildly spicy, and decadent, this dish is a universal favorite for a reason.

name: Flank Steak with Brussels Sprouts
description: Grilled flank steak with roasted brussels sprout, sweet and sour tamarind sauce and cashews.

name: Vegan Pasta Alla Vodka
description: All the cozy, saucy, just-one-more-bite appeal of the original‚Äîminus the dairy and meat. A lush vodka sauce, built on slow-cooked tomatoes and roasted red peppers, turns glossy with cashew cream, while a touch of nutritional yeast brings the cheesy element. Draped over rigatoni, it‚Äôs finished with eggplant ‚Äúmeatballs,‚Äù packed with pumpkin and lentils for a hearty bite (and a little extra nourishment).

name: Seared Chicken
description: Boneless chicken breast seared to perfection over a bed of massaged kale to soften, darken and make the texture of the kale silkier. Enjoy this meal with a drizzle of coconut-lime dressing with a combination of peppers, and avocado.

name: Haitian Roasted Pork Bao Buns
description: Arguably one of the most popular Haitian dishes, Griot is twice-cooked pork flavored with a bright citrus and habanero marinade. Braised until tender, then fried for maximum crispiness, Chef Vanessa tucks the melt-in-your-mouth pork into fluffy bao buns for a fusion twist. The buns are served with Haitian pickled slaw, pikliz, for a pop of acidic balance, as well as a side of rice and red beans.

name: Puerto Rican Sazon Shrimp Stew
description: Chef Anthony's Puerto Rican heritage influenced this bright and hearty seafood stew. The combination of sweet shrimp and tender orzo is married together in a deeply flavorful stew with a host of Latin flavors including sofrito, roasted garlic, and a little kick from some hot sauce. A squeeze of lime on top is the perfect finishing touch.

name: Lemony Cactus Salad
description: Nopal‚Äîor cactus‚Äîis the star of this healthy green salad. With its meaty texture and slight citrusy taste it pairs beautifully with my charred lemon vinaigrette. Tossed with shaved green cabbage, cherry tomatoes, queso fresco and chopped cilantro, it's a lighter salad that's perfect for lunch.

name: Chicken Pork Belly Chow Mein
description: Chef Stacy is leveling up a takeout favorite with double the protein and double the flavor. Chinese-inspired chow mein noodles are stir-fried with chicken, tender pork belly, and a medley of vegetables in an umami-rich sauce. Garnished with toasty sesame seeds, this dish is a must-try for anyone who loves the comforts of Chinese-American cuisine.

name: Chipotle Short Ribs
description: This is a savory, hearty short ribs meal completed with zucchini and corn on the cob and a delicious chipotle sauce!

name: Chicken Wrap with Tahini and Olives
description: Healthy chicken wrap for spring with amazing rosemary potatoes and a healthy side of veggies.

name: Sriracha Honey Chicken
description: Chicken thighs seasoned with olive oil, salt & pepper gently grilled, to keep the chicken juicy. A drizzle of honey caramelized and sriracha for the spicy kick.

name: Duck Carnitas Fettuccine Pasta
description: Indulge in the exquisite blend of flavors in this decadent dish. It features tender carnitas-style duck leg confit served over fettuccine pasta in a rich cream sauce. Oyster mushrooms and sun-dried tomatoes add earthiness, while a sprinkling of fresh herbs on top helps cut through all the richness, creating a truly balanced, harmonious dining experience.

name: Panang Curry with Beef
description: Chef Pimnapat's Thai Panang curry strikes the perfect balance of comforting and fresh. Panang curry is a popular variation on Thai red curry, known for being a slightly thicker curry with a sweet and savory, slightly tangy flavor. It gets its signature flavor from familiar ingredients like coconut milk and fish sauce, but with the addition of aromatics like dried red chilies, shallot, garlic, lemongrass, galangal, cumin seed, coriander seed and kaffir lime leaves. This satisfying curry pairs perfectly with tender sliced beef and sweet bell peppers. Try this nuanced curry, and we guarantee your tastebuds will thank you!

name: Parrillada Latina Mixed Grill
description: Barbecues are one of the most deeply rooted traditions in the gastronomy of many countries, especially in Latin America. This feast (Parrillada Latina translates to ‚ÄúLatin grill or barbecue‚Äù) combines juicy, tender chicken breast, flavorful hanger steak, and spicy chorizo, all kissed with smoky grill char. The bounty continues with the sides‚Äîtender grilled baby potatoes and esquites, which combines sweet corn kernels with creamy mayonnaise and Cotija cheese. Pour on the Caribbean-style Jerk sauce for fiery Scotch Bonnet pepper kick, and prepare to indulge.

name: Calabrian Pepper Shrimp Scampi
description: How can something this healthy taste this good? Chef know-how, that‚Äôs how. Chef Marc marinates plump, succulent shrimp with fiery Calabrian chili, saut√©s them in flavor-packed sauce built from butter, white wine, garlic, lemon, fresh herbs, and more chili, then ladles a hearty portion atop a bed of creamy pur√©ed potatoes. (There‚Äôs extra sauce on the side for drizzling.) A refreshing side of lemony broccoli completes this super-satisfying, perfectly balanced meal.

name: Hummus Quesadillas
description: Made from chickpeas and tahini, making this quesadillas rich in protein, vegan and dairy free. Wrapped in whole grain tortilla with a kick of sundried tomato and kalamata olives.

name: Lentil Salad with Dates
description: Chef Emily is known for her nutritious, delicious plant-based cooking, and this bright lentil salad is no exception. Plump French green lentils are mixed with cucumber and red onion, along with the perfect balance of sweet and salty from some dried Medjool dates and vegan feta. Tossed in an herby lemon dressing, this side salad is the perfect light lunch or pairing for your plant-based protein of choice.

name: Apricot Dijon Glazed Salmon
description: The apricot preserves are a perfect match with salmon. Love that it's sweet without being too sweet! A new favorite for my salmon dish.

name: Chicken Satay
description: This is an easy chicken meal served with a Thai inspired peanut sauce known as satay chicken. The chicken is soaked in a coconut milk marinade before baking in the oven or grilling added with some drizzle of pepper and scallions.

name: Blackened Shrimp and Creamy Grits
description: Chef Fabio's Italian-inspired take on a Southern dining classic. Succulent, cajun-spiced shrimp are plated alongside zesty, creamy lemon grits and fresh cut chives. A smoky bacon-infused gravy ties the whole dish together for a refined taste of Southern comfort.

name: Miso Cod with Carrot Ginger Sauce
description: Chef Chase serves up a delectable Japanese-inspired dish of cod that's been marinated in a sweet and savory miso blend then broiled to perfection. The delicate fish is served with nutty brown rice, meaty shiitake mushrooms, wilted baby spinach, and a mouthwatering carrot-ginger sauce that you'll want to put on everything. Every bite promises a delightful blend of flavors and textures.

name: Ratatouille Rigatoni
description: Ratatouille is a classic French dish that features summery vegetables like squash and eggplant, stewed or braised together in a flavorful tomato sauce. Chef Kristy pairs her version of ratatouille with al dente rigatoni for a hearty yet light meal! Finely chopped eggplant, zucchini, and summer squash are simmered in a fresh tomato and herb sauce, then the whole dish is topped with whipped ricotta for a creamy finish.

name: Pork Barbacoa Tacos
description: Chef Akhtar's tacos are one of his specialties, and after one taste of these Tex Mex-style pork tacos, you'll understand why. The star of these tacos is the spicy braised pork, cooked in the style of barbacoa until it's pull-apart tender. Tuck the tender pork into soft corn tortillas and top with queso fresco, Mexican crema, and Chef's homemade salsa roja. A side of comforting red rice completes the dish.

name: Patty Melt
description: Chef Michelle's favorite burger has always been the patty melt. For CookUnity, she's lovingly crafted her ideal version for you to enjoy at home. With beef patty, melted Swiss cheese, sweet caramelized onions, and Chef's thousand island dressing, all griddled between toasted rye bread, you can't go wrong with this dish.

name: Fettuccine Chipotle Alfredo
description: What happens when you bring Latin influences to an Italian classic? Something seriously delicious. This dish centers on Chef Roberto's signature smoky chipotle-infused Alfredo sauce, which pairs perfectly with al dente fettuccine. A mix of saut√©ed mushrooms, spinach, and cherry tomatoes helps bulk out the dish. The smoky, lightly spicy kick of chipotle peppers in the rich, cheesy sauce takes this dish to the next level, and will have you coming back for bite after bite.

name: Vegetable Sushi Bowl
description: This Vegetable Sushi Bowl by Raymundo Agrazal features a delightful combination of fresh ingredients, perfect for a nutritious meal. With avocado, cremini mushrooms, and a hint of wasabi, it's a tasty and healthy option.

name: Jerk Hanger Steak Bowl
description: This bowl full of Caribbean-inspired favorites will delight your tastebuds and satisfy your hunger. Chef's Nahika's Jerk Steak Bowl features succulent grilled hanger steak seasoned to perfection with Jamaican jerk spices, plated on a base of bulgur and pigeon peas. To take the bowl from good to great, Chef adds a sweet-and-savory grilled pineapple and corn salad, saut√©ed onions and peppers, and a jerk dressing to tie it all together. A delightful harmony of spicy, tangy, and savory, this bowl promises a taste of the Caribbean in every bite.

name: Soy Ginger Tofu with Noodles
description: This dish was inspired by a noodle cart at the Yaowarat night market in Bangkok's Chinatown. Soft, silken tofu is braised to perfection in a sweet and savory ginger-soy sauce and served alongside with noodles and baby bok choy. More ginger, scallions, and a Thai chili vinaigrette packed the dish with bold, balanced flavors. This dish is guaranteed to make any ordinary day feel a bit more vibrant.

name: Satay Peanut Noodles with Marinated Chicken
description: This dish hits all the nostalgic flavors of takeout peanut noodles, but elevated with a Southeast Asian twist. Inspired by Chicken Satay, this noodle dish features springy wheat noodles tossed in a creamy, lightly spicy peanut sauce with tender marinated chicken thigh. Topped with sliced Persian cucumbers for a pop of freshness and garnished with green onions, this bowl hits every flavor and texture note you want.

name: Martini Style Chicken
description: Chef Pino first discovered ‚ÄúPollo all Martini‚Äù in Rome, where he lived as a young actor and worked at a local restaurant on the side. Created in the 1950s by Roman chefs eager to woo American tourists, the dish‚Äôs charm was undeniable. One bite, and Chef Pino was hooked, adding it to his menu at Centolire years later. Pounded chicken breasts are coated with parmesan, pan-fried, then baked until golden. A splash of white wine and lemon juice adds brightness, while green beans and carrots bring fresh flavor to this throwback favorite.

name: Garlic Shrimp Roasted Tomatoes
description: Think shrimp scampi, but with the added sweetness and acidity of tomatoes. Inspired by a recipe learned from her dad, Chef Vanessa saut√©s plump, succulent shrimp in a buttery sauce rich with garlic, shallots, white wine, tomato paste, and spices. Then she spoons a hearty portion over creamy mashed potatoes, enriched with butter, heavy cream, and tangy grated Pecorino cheese, and adds juicy roasted cherry tomatoes and a shower of fresh parsley for an extra pop of flavor and color. Best of all: This indulgent combination clocks in at a sensible 530 calories.

name: Shrimp and Sausage Jambalaya
description: We love Chef Ahktar's eclectic spin on Jambalaya with layer-upon-layer of flavor. Made with juicy shrimp, andouille sausage, charred zucchini, and a rich mushroom gravy, this is his gluten-and-dairy-free take on a classic Cajun dish.
ingredients: Natural Extractives Of Turmeric And Annatto

name: Chicken Katsudon
description: Get your katsudon fix with Chef Andres‚Äôs tender breaded chicken cutlets taken to the next level with a sweet and savory shiitake sauce. Enjoy with a bed of fluffy white rice, plus shredded carrots and scallions for garnish.

name: Mussels Brussels and Grains
description: Chef Chris best ever mussels with brussels and grains. Did you know that mussels are high in protein and heart-healthy omega-3 fatty acids? They are also known to have low calories and fat and have exceptional nutritional value.

name: Herb and Wine Roasted Chicken
description: There's nothing better than a simply prepared, well-marinated and roasted chicken thigh with gravy. The ultra-savory chicken sits alongside farro with melted leeks and saut√©ed green beans with slivered almonds for a filling, balanced meal. But the real star of the dish ‚Äî according to Chef Anthony ‚Äî is the herb and wine-infused gravy, bringing a strong chicken flavor and richness to the entire meal.

name: Pot Roast with Horseradish Sauce
description: Based on the classic home cooked meal, only leveled up with a peppery horseradish cream sauce. Chef Akhtar's version of this traditional meat and potatoes stew features chuck roast, lots of herbs and veggies, and a flavorful red wine base. Paired with brown butter saut√©ed green beans, this is elevated comfort food at its best.

name: Slow Roasted Pork Carnitas Quesadillas
description: Chef Santiago brings you a satisfying quesadilla filled with pork carnitas mingling with chewy sliced plantains, melted Chihuahua and Oaxaca cheeses, and tomatillo. On the side, a shredded grilled cabbage and pico de gallo on the side add a refreshing crunch.

name: Baked Chicken Napolitana Mini Milanese
description: Chef Maia‚Äôs chicken-beast bites are perfectly sized for little hands with big appetites. They‚Äôre coated with crunchy Panko breadcrumbs, then baked instead of fried, and topped with tangy, saucy roasted cherry tomatoes and melty Mozzarella. On the side: Smooth, creamy mashed potatoes combined with hidden cauliflower pur√©e to up the fiber content. Simple enough to please even the pickiest eaters, this dish makes mealtime enjoyable for everyone.

name: Baby Back Ribs
description: Satisfy your cravings for finger-licking delicious barbecue all year round with Chef Fabiola‚Äôs Baby Back Ribs. If you love smoky-sweet flavors, these saucy, savory pork ribs are a must-try. A fluffy baked potato with sour cream and chives and side of corn on the cob complete this steakhouse-style dish.

name: Pulled Pork Vindaloo
description: In this flavor-packed dish, succulent pork shoulder is slow-cooked in a fiery vindaloo curry, accompanied by fragrant lime rice and roasted zucchini seasoned with cumin. The combination of bold flavors and tender textures creates a true meal to remember.

name: Banana Nutella Bread Pudding
description: What happens when you let a professional chef take a classic comforting dessert to the next level with over-the-top delicious ingredients? This Nutella bread pudding. Chunks of fluffy brioche are soaked in a rich, cinnamon-infused custard made of eggs, milk, sugar, and vanilla, with pieces of banana and generous dollops of Nutella mixed in. The pudding is baked until the top is golden and crispy, while the inside remains soft and creamy with pockets of melted Nutella. A scoop of mascarpone vanilla cream is the perfect cool contrast to the warm pudding.

name: Tom Kha Gai Coconut Soup with Chicken
description: Tom Kha is a traditional Thai soup made with fragrant herbs, spices, and coconut milk. It's one of the most popular Thai soups and bears similarities to hot and sour soup, with just a hint of acid from lime juice. Chef Pimnapat packs the aromatic broth full of tender mushrooms and juicy sliced chicken breast, then pairs it with a side of steamed jasmine rice to soak up the soup. A sprinkle of fresh cilantro completes the dish.

name: Japanese Karaage Chicken
description: Chef Akhtar's Japanese-style fried chicken is a dish you'll find yourself craving it week after week‚Äîdon't say we didn't warn you. Just like traditional Japanese karaage, each bite-sized piece is unbelievably crispy on the outside but tender and juicy on the inside. Paired with fluffy vegetable fried rice, and Chef's Yum Yum dipping sauce‚Äîa spicy Kewpie-mayo aioli‚Äîthis dish is an easy crowd-pleaser.

name: Uncle Ts Beef Asada
description: Chef Maribel shares her Uncle Tony's Sunday cookout meal. The smell of grilled steak, charred tomatoes, serranos, and onions will transport you to good times around the grill. The achiote marinated flatiron steak is served alongside charro beans, red rice, hot salsa, and flour tortillas.

name: Oyakodon
description: Discover a taste of classic Japanese home cooking with Chef Esther‚Äôs Oyakodon‚Äîchicken, egg, and rice. First, she simmers juicy, tender strips of skinless chicken thigh, egg, napa cabbage, onion, and carrots in a rich, flavorful broth made with dried kelp, soy, and shiitake mushrooms. Then, she spoons it over rice seasoned with Furikake, a sweet and savory blend of sesame seeds, dried seaweed, garlic, sugar, and salt. Drizzle on the accompanying Mentsuyu sauce for a blast of umami richness, and curl up with a flavor-packed bowl of comfort.

name: Peruvian Style Chicken Thighs
description: This dish is a celebration of Peruvian flavors. Tender chicken thighs are seasoned and cooked in a blend of aromatic spices like garlic, cumin, and oregano, then served alongside zesty cilantro rice with peas and carrots. The meal is rounded out by nutty brown butter sweet plantains and a creamy cilantro-lime-jalape√±o sauce that adds a zing to every bite. The combination of the juicy chicken, fresh, herbaceous rice, and buttery plantains is a match made in culinary heaven!

name: Creamy Poblano Mahi Mahi
description: Chef Roberto's creamy poblano mahi-mahi pairs the mild, flaky fish with a rich, bold sauce made with roasted poblano and jalape√±o peppers, Monterey Jack cheese, and savory spices. Served alongside jasmine rice and a simple arugula, tomato, and cucumber salad, this bright seafood dish doesn't go light on flavor.

name: Sate Ayam Indonesian Grilled Chicken Skewers
description: Enjoy the mouthwatering taste of Indonesia with this refreshing dish. Tender chicken thighs are marinated with Bumbu Samawa‚Äîa zesty, slightly spicy Indonesian spice blend made with garlic and coriander‚Äîthen grilled to perfection. The sate skewers are served with a spicy chilli sauce, jasmine rice, and pickled cucumbers.

name: White Truffle Mushroom Penne Pasta
description: Earthy, woodsy, and rustic, this comforting pasta dish draws inspiration from the forest. Al dente penne rigate gets umami from shiitake mushrooms, bright acidity from sun-dried tomatoes, creamy richness from silky goat cheese, and a pop of freshness from crunchy kale. A perfectly balanced combination of different flavors and textures, the dish is finished with an extra special touch; a drizzle of white truffle oil. The ultimate luxury, it's the ideal way to tie the whole dish together and a perfect ending for this memorable meal.

name: Chili Mac N Cheese
description: Imagine tender elbow macaroni with a rich, savory chili with ground beef, simmered to perfection. Each bite bursts with flavor thanks to a blend of warming spices like chili powder, with a healthy dose of fiber from the beans.

name: Cod Cake
description: Comfort food that is guilt-free, light, nutritious vegetables of zucchini and herbs served with broccoli on the side.

name: Indonesian Spiced Salmon
description: The star of this scrumptious dish is a perfectly baked salmon fillet, seasoned with a blend of Indonesian savory spices. The salmon is accompanied by crispy garlic green beans and baked red bell peppers to add a touch of crunch. The dish is garnished with sprigs of fresh dill and a creamy Thai basil compound butter to melt atop the fish. This Keto-friendly meal is a feast for the eyes as well as the taste buds.

name: Fabios Braised Short Ribs with Parmesan Grits
description: Beef short ribs are slow cooked in red wine, topped with a bright, herbaceous salsa verde creamy polenta and charred broccoli.

name: Chile Verde Street Tacos
description: There‚Äôs nothing better than making your own tacos. Here, Chef Dustin takes care of the heavy lifting, slowly stewing pork in a deeply spiced New Mexican-style sauce, bolstered with jalape√±o and tomatillo. He also serves up zesty cilantro-lime rice next to a fresh mix of radish and onion. All that‚Äôs left for you? Piling it into fresh corn tortillas and digging in.

name: Shrimp Veracruz
description: Shrimp cooked to tender with tangy and savory flavors in this Mexican inspired seafood dish. Topped with crisp radish, zucchini noodles on the side, and with freshly made guacamole for that rich, creamy notes.

name: Pumpkin Pancakes with Scrambled Eggs Bacon
description: Inspired by D√≠a de los Muertos ‚Äî the Mexican equivalent of Halloween ‚Äî Chef Santiago created these delicious, nutritious whole wheat pumpkin pancakes and warm, spiced maple syrup with pepitas. To make it a complete breakfast, Chef pairs the pancakes with some soft scrambled eggs and crispy bacon. We can't think of a better way to start the day!

name: Grilled Moroccan Spiced Beef
description: Flavorful and vibrant, this dish marries tender grilled beef medallions infused with Moroccan spices with a bright chermoula sauce (the Middle Eastern equivalent of chimichurri). Mashed carrots, earthy saut√©ed kale and a sprinkle of smoked almonds complete the dish with bold textures and even bolder flavors.

name: Roasted Rosemary Potatoes
description: With subtle hints of garlic and salt, these crispy rosemary roasted potatoes add a touch of aromatic elegance to any occasion ‚Äî whether it's a casual weeknight dinner or a festive gathering.

name: Fiery Turkey Stuffed Poblano Pepper
description: This dish looks as good as it tastes! A colorful version of the classic stuffed pepper but made with sweet, spicy poblanos. Stuffed with seasoned ground turkey, plus black and kidney beans, and topped with Mexican shredded cheese and a drizzle of avocado crema, this dish is packed with protein and flavor.

name: Cannery Row White Blend
description: Cannery Row White Blend by Scheid Vineyards is a refreshing and versatile wine, perfect for pairing with a variety of dishes or enjoying on its own.

name: Grilled Pork with Spinach
description: Pork rubbed with olive oil, salt and pepper. Get grains by adding barley. Together by adding spinach, radishes, beets, scallions and carrots then top with walnuts drizzled with smoky paprika vinaigrette.

name: Seafood Pot Pie
description: Bubbly, warm goodness under a crispy crust. Love this new dish by Chef Chris Ratel. Pot pie made healthier with fresh seafoods.

name: Mediterranean Blackened Salmon with Tapenade
description: Salmon is coated in a seasoning for a quick sear on the plancha and garnished with a deeply savory kalamata Olive and tomato tapenade. A Charred lemon is added at the end for extra citrusy brightness.

name: Hoisin Glazed Short Ribs Over Noodles
description: Sweet and savory hoisin-glazed short ribs are paired with tender, twisty noodles in a decadent dish that's a can be savored on its own or shared as a side.

name: Asian Grilled Shrimp
description: A classic flavorful Thai Salad with grilled shrimp. Loving the noodles and the Asian dressing.

name: Honey Garlic Noodles
description: Sticky teriyaki shrimp are cooked to perfection, sliced, and served alongside noodles that have been tossed in a sweet-and-spicy, umami-filled garlic sauce. Each element of this dish is more delicious than the last. Finished with saut√©ed bell peppers and a sprinkle of sesame seeds and green onions, it doesn't get better, and more flavorful than this.

name: Korean Spiced Carnitas Tacos
description: Juicy, slow-cooked pork shoulder meets Chom Sun‚Äôs signature Korean BBQ sauce, crisping up into carnitas with just enough chili heat. Three soft corn tortillas hold the caramelized meat, brightened by a sweet-and-sour radish slaw. On the side, cooling cucumber kimchi and a silky cilantro-gochujang crema let you dial up (or down) the heat as you please.

name: Dijon Chicken
description: It's delicious and light. Chicken in dairy-free mustard sauce with sweet potatoes and broccoli on the side.

name: Beef Bulgogi Pilaf
description: Chef Esther‚Äôs delightful fusion meal combines a hearty serving of tender Korean beef bulgogi strips, infused with savory flavors of garlic, soy sauce, and toasted sesame oil, and a fragrant turmeric rice pilaf, made with fluffy Basmati rice and studded with a colorful medley of vegetables, including carrots, green beans, onions, and peas. Drizzle on the tangy, refreshing sour cream and lemon sauce, and dig into this harmonious blend of flavors and cuisines.

name: Award Winning Braised Short Ribs
description: Enjoy a taste of one of Chef Vanessa's signature dishes. Boneless beef short ribs are braised in a rich and spicy sauce until super rich and tender, then served with Haitian-style stewed vegetables‚Äîknown as legumes‚Äîas well as black beans and rice. One bite and you'll see why this dish earned Chef Vanessa top spot on Rocco's Dinner Party on Bravo.

name: Shrimp Cobb Salad
description: A refreshing salad toss with shrimp, arugula and other veggies, drizzled with balsamic sauce.

name: Seared Branzino Chimichurri
description: You‚Äôre sure to savor this meal‚Äôs harmonious balance of flavors. Chef Michael spreads a blend of Dijon mustard and mayonnaise on mild branzino fillets to lock in flavor and moistness as they‚Äôre seared on the grill. Then, he drizzles the finished fish with bright, vibrant chimichurri and pairs it with deep-fried Brussels sprouts and sweet potato tossed in a zesty lime, garlic, and serrano chile dressing. You get sweetness from the vegetables, a touch of heat in the dressing, plus tangy freshness from the sauce enveloping the delicate fish.

name: Ropa Vieja Cubana
description: A favorite of Latin American cuisine, ropa vieja or carne desmechada has a simply unmatched flavor and texture. Chef Ruben's take on this delicious Cuban dish features beef braised in a rich sofrito-infused tomato sauce until pull apart-tender. The roja vieja is served alongside a couscous salad featuring riced cauliflower, roasted broccoli, and a hint of orange zest to provide bright balance to the hearty beef. Together, they create a comforting meal that will make you feel like you're sitting in Chef Ruben's very own kitchen. It's not to be missed.

name: New Orleans Style Fried Fish
description: It doesn't get more comforting than these two Southern powerhouses. Crispy New Orleans-style fried catfish is seasoned to perfection, and served alongside tender, slow-cooked collard greens. This is a soulful and satisfying Southern meal packed with bold flavors and comforting textures.

name: Korean Fire Chicken
description: Buldak Chicken, or Fire Chicken, is a spicy Korean dish featuring juicy chicken thighs marinated in an aromatic gochujang sauce. Stir-fried until tender, they‚Äôre layered with a blanket of super-melty mozzarella cheese, and served with a side of sweet potato fries and broccoli.

name: Grilled Raspberry Balsamic
description: Delicious meal, one of my favorites!

name: Pancit Bihon Rice Noodle Bowl
description: This hearty traditional Filipino dish will satisfy your every flavor craving. Chef Stacy builds a savory base with a tender tangle of rice vermicelli stir-fried with fresh cabbage, carrot, bell pepper, sugar snap peas, onion, and garlic in a lightly sweet, umami-rich blend of oyster and soy sauces. Then she piles on tender shredded chicken and luscious, ultra-rich pork belly. A garnish of fresh green onions and lime adds a pop of color to a meal that will brighten up any weeknight.

name: Swedish Meatballs
description: A classic comfort food, these juicy and flavorful Swedish meatballs are smothered in a savory gravy cream sauce that takes them over the top. Served over tender egg noodles, this is a perfect dish to cozy up to any night of the week.

name: Turkey Vegetable
description: A healthy packed way to lighten up your usual bolognese. It has all the rich, meaty flavor you crave for that will make you feel good. Served with ground turkey, zucchini and mushroom.

name: Middle Eastern Vegetable Chickpea Tagine
description: Bring one of Chef Einat's signature dishes to the table‚Äîyou won't regret it. Cauliflower, sweet potatoes and chickpeas are cooked in a hearty tagine broth perfumed with Persian lime and preserved lemon. Accompanied by the traditional fluffy couscous and chirchi, a spiced butternut squash pur√©e, and topped with toasted almonds, this is a truly unforgettable dish.

name: Spicy Chipotle Mango Tacos
description: Combine the tofu with mango, onion and peppers for your perfect mango tacos drizzled with smoked paprika and chipotle powder to add a little spicy kick.
ingredients: Vermont Pure Grade A Dark Amber Pure Maple Syrup

name: Spiced Pumpkin Pancakes
description: Go ahead and try to imagine a more perfect fall breakfast. Can‚Äôt do it? Neither could we. Chef Ivy‚Äôs luscious stack of whole-wheat pancakes are infused with sweet pumpkin, warm cinnamon, and the creamy tang of real buttermilk. She tops them with luscious drunken bananas, saut√©ed in butter, rich dark brown sugar, and Kahlua, with its signature buttery, nutty, coffee flavor. And if that wasn‚Äôt enough, there‚Äôs molasses-infused whipped cream for a flawless finishing touch. This indulgent breakfast is a real treat.

name: Curried Tofu Satay Veggie Bowl
description: This dish proves that vegan eating doesn't have to mean sacrificing on flavor! A bowl full of plant-based goodness, starting with curried tofu spin on asparagus, peppers, and roasted shiitake mushrooms on a bed of tri-color quinoa. Drizzle the whole dish in Chef Anne's signature peanut sauce and top your Pad Thai with crunchy cabbage, green onion, cilantro, and roasted peanuts for that perfect textural contrast.

name: Seared Shrimp with Mango Ginger Relish
description: There are so many things to love about this meal; the Pan-Asian influence, that it‚Äôs gluten-free and low-carb, or just how flavorful, filling, and fresh it tastes! Chef Chris marinates shrimp in ginger, garlic, green onion, cilantro and lime juice for maximum flavor, then sears them quickly on the plancha. The shrimp are paired with hand-chopped cauliflower ‚Äòcouscous‚Äô that‚Äôs roasted with coconut, green onion, and lime, as well as roasted zucchini, squash and peppers. The whole meal is complimented by a fresh mango-ginger relish that‚Äôs zippy and tangy and shredded coconut flakes to complete the nod to tropical climates.

name: Ginger Shakin Beef
description: Hanger steak, with miso paste for a tastier meat paired with bok choy.

name: Jerk Spiced Chicken
description: Savor the vibrant flavors of the Caribbean with this dish. Succulent boneless chicken thigh, marinated and grilled to perfection with jerk spices, is complemented by the savory goodness of Caribbean-style johnny cakes and tender braised collard greens. A truly satisfying island feast.

name: Detox Wave Shot
description: Featuring blue spirulina, coconut water, lime, and ginger, this refreshing shot will flush out toxins while re-energizing your body.

name: Indo Pasta Salad with Chicken
description: A tantalizing Indonesian fusion dish, this colorful and flavor-packed pasta salad is unlike any you've ever tasted before. Al dente pasta is tossed with chunks of tender baked chicken that has been marinated in an Indonesian spice blend, as well as pitted Kalamata olives, feta cheese, and fresh cherry tomatoes. A sambal-infused mayo dressing ties the whole dish together.

name: Tortellini Primavera
description: Used chopped vegetables instead of meat, enjoy healthy creamy tortellini and vegetable pasta that is a real crowd pleaser.

name: Beef Shawarma Poutine
description: Composed of freshly made potato wedges bathed in rich gravy and dotted with squeaky pieces of cheese, poutine is a Canadian culinary icon. Here, Chef Einat levels it up with juicy, spiced beef shawarma, bringing big Middle-Eastern energy to this comfort classic. A side of tangy sumac onion salad cuts through the richness.

name: Indonesian Fried Chicken
description: Indulge in Chef Abe's crispy fried chicken, seasoned with an herby, aromatic Indonesian spice blend that includes lemongrass, kaffir lime leaf, and turmeric. The satisfying meal is completed with golden roasted fingerling potatoes, egg-fried broccoli florets, plus a sambal mayo and sweet soy sauce on the side to drizzle as desired.

name: Boneless Bbq Spare Ribs
description: By popular demand, Chef Chris is bringing his signature BBQ ribs. Juicy boneless pork ribs are cooked low and slow until falling-apart tender in Chef's sweet, tart, smoky BBQ sauce. Served with Chris' creamy backyard-style coleslaw, this dish will be transport to your own personal barbecue joint.

name: Double Cheese Smash Burger
description: Chef Chris builds his double smash burger with two beef patties‚Äîsmashed on the griddle to get perfectly crispy, lacy edges‚Äî American cheese, lettuce, pickles, and caramelized onions all piled high on a potato bun. A creamy gochujang aioli that Chef Chris has coined his 'Bang Bang Sauce' adds the perfect kick of heat to keep you coming back for bite after juicy bite.

name: Adobo Flat Iron Steak with Zaatar Rainbow Fingerling Potatoes
description: One of Balaboosta's signature dishes, this special showcases how Chef Einat excels at balancing flavors and textures. Smoky adobo-rubbed flat iron steak is grilled until tender and perfectly done, then sliced and served on a bed of silky-smooth, luscious leek pur√©e. To pair, Chef adds her Mashwi salad, a Middle Eastern side dish, featuring char-grilled vegetables like bell peppers, tomatoes, onions, and eggplant, all diced and seasoned with fresh lemon juice, parsley, and a hint of salt. Finally, to add richness, enjoy roasted fingerling potatoes seasoned with good quality olive oil and earthy za'atar seasoning. You've never tasted steak and potatoes quite like this!

name: Salmon with Pineapple Salsa
description: A grilled beautiful piece of salmon, with a pineapple salsa on top. The pineapple salsa makes the dish burst with flavor.

name: Farro Beets Greens Salad
description: Here's a fresh grain and greens salad to keep you satisfied and energized throughout the day. This bowl of goodness starts with a bed of arugula and nutty farro, then Chef Dustin adds in oven-roasted beets and Brussels sprouts. Topped with crumbled feta, walnuts, and fresh herbs like mint, chives, and parsley, this salad is sure to brighten your day!

name: Vegan Casserole with Zucchini and Tomato
description: Vegan Casserole with Zucchini and Tomato Casserole. It has no cheese, no cream, no meat or eggs in this vegan casserole, but it is pack with flavors everyone will enjoy!

name: Grilled Flank Steak Superfood Bowl
description: Chef Silvio's Flank Steak Bowl is packed with protein & an abundant array of nutritious ingredients. A quinoa salad laced with roasted corn and kale - an amazing source of Vitamin C, K, A to name a few. Roasted Sweet Potatoes are high in antioxidants, fiber as well as many other health benefits. Cucumbers provide hydration and support digestion. Briny feta, a vibrant citrus dressing, and toasted sunflower seeds finish this dish.

name: Chimichurri Hanger Steak
description: Argentinian inspired steak dish with a kick of chimichurri. A combination of mint, cilantro and parsley top with lime and chili flakes for a delicious blend that will compliment the meat. Served with Swiss Chard on the side.

name: Indo Pulled Chicken Pita Sandwich
description: East meets West with this scrumptious Indonesian pulled chicken pita sandwich. The succulent chicken is generously drizzled with a sweet and savory Indonesian soy sauce, which is perfectly complemented by crunchy coleslaw and tangy pickled red onions. All tucked into a soft pita wrap with crisp butter lettuce, the colors and flavors of this dish come together in harmonious fusion, promising an adventure for your taste buds.

name: Poblano Butternut Squash Frittata
description: Chef Garces' flavorful frittata is ideal for any time of day, whether craving a hearty breakfast, a satisfying lunch, or a light dinner. The frittata features butternut squash, charred corn, poblano rajas, caramelized onions, and queso mixto all in a base featuring Vital Farms¬Æ pasture-raised eggs, which are laid by hens on family farms with plenty of fresh air and sunshine. Chef Garces serves up a tangy green goddess dressing to complement the frittata and dip or drizzle on either. One of the highlights of this dish is its versatility; no matter how you serve it, it's guaranteed to delight.

name: Garlic Pork Chops In Mushroom Sauce
description: Tender pork chops are seared with garlic and herbs, then smothered in creamy mushroom sauce to add luxurious richness. Paired with jasmine rice, steamed broccoli, and sweet glazed carrots, this like just like your favorite childhood meal, but majorly elevated.

name: Tandoori Mahi Mahi
description: Tender mahi mahi gets seasoned with tandoori-inspired spices and broiled to flaky perfection. The fish is served with mushrooms and spinach in a creamy coconut sauce flavored with a mild, aromatic curry powder that is out of this world. It also happens to be a gluten-free, soy-free, and nut-free curry that's even keto-friendly, making this an easy pick for anyone with dietary restrictions. This is sure to become a dinner staple!

name: Pulled Pork Bbq Platter
description: Chef Fabiola‚Äôs hearty, satisfying Pulled Pork BBQ Platter is great for gameday‚Äîor any day! She soaks pork shoulder in beer, brown sugar, zesty mustard (and several more secret ingredients), then slow-cooks it for hours until the pork is truly melt-in-your-mouth tender and positively packed with savory-sweet flavor. She serves a generous portion with her signature mac & cheese‚Äîa creamy blend of Cheddar and Monterey Jack, topped with toasted Panko breadcrumbs for a crunchy textural contrast.

name: Just Beyond Breakfast Burrito
description: All the traditional ingredients of a southwest breakfast burrito ..... but, Vegan!

name: Ham Egg Cheese Burrito
description: Bursting with fluffy scrambled eggs, smoky ham, melty American cheese, sweet bell peppers, and zesty onions, all rolled into a soft flour tortilla, Chef Santos‚Äôs hearty, satisfying breakfast burrito will keep you fueled for the day ahead. It‚Äôs served with spiced curly fries and ketchup for dipping.

name: Brie Blueberry Quinoa Salad
description: A colorful and healthy salad for brie lovers! The creamy, mild cheese is the highlight of this meal, especially when paired with sweet blueberries and crunchy cashews, then plated atop a bed of fresh greens, red and white cabbage, and tricolor quinoa. A tangy berry-balsamic dressing finishes the dish, making it the perfect option for a satisfying midday meal or light dinner.

name: Pecan Crusted Chicken
description: Pecan Crusted Chicken breasts that is packed and bursting with flavor and texture and makes a delicious dinner.

name: Burrito Bean
description: This recipe is a winner. Chef added avocado and corn and upped the ante on the cilantro and chili sauce. Delicious. With all of the flavors, you will be unaware that there was no meat included in the recipe. This is a winner.

name: Smothered Pork Chop with Bacon
description: Smothered pork chop coated in a smokey bacon pepperdew cream sauce served along broccoli and spinach.

name: Tandoori Roasted Tofu Cauliflower
description: An Indian-inspired dish that lingers in the best way. Tender tofu and fiber-rich cauliflower are coated in a smoky and spiced tandoori marinade, alongside caramelized red onions. A side of lemon-kissed farro adds just enough chew, while cool green chutney‚Äîa blend of cilantro, mint, poblano peppers, and a swirl of coconut yogurt‚Äîbrings everything into balance.

name: Pulled Pork Pretzel Bun Sandwich
description: With its irresistible blend of flavors, Chef Roberto‚Äôs BBQ sandwich is a win for gameday or any day. He smothers succulent, slow-cooked pulled pork shoulder‚Äîrichly spiced with garlic, cumin, and paprika‚Äîwith tangy-sweet barbecue sauce and piles it high on a toasty pretzel bun. The smoky kick of chipotle mayo balances with the crisp freshness of coleslaw, while ghost-pepper pickles bring the fiery heat. Perfect for an indulgent lunch or dinner.

name: Passion Fruit Creamsicle Cake Jar
description: Chef Miriam Milord's Passionfruit Creamsicle Cake Jar features layers of fluffy vanilla cake crumbles intertwined with tangy passionfruit cream cheese icing and smooth vanilla frosting. Indulge in this decadent dessert that perfectly balances tropical zest with creamy sweetness, creating a treat that's as delightful as it is memorable.

name: Trout Almondine with Rice Pilaf
description: Flaky, mild ocean trout is seared until crispy and paired with a sauce made with brown butter, lemon and mustard. The fish is topped with toasted, slivered almonds and served over classic rice pilaf for a fresh take on a classic French dish.

name: Smoky Bbq Chicken Blt Wrap
description: Indulge in Chef Dustin‚Äôs hearty Smoky BBQ BLT Wrap, a savory blend of tender pulled chicken glazed in tangy-sweet BBQ sauce and crispy bacon, complemented by a hint of garlic-avocado aioli, yukon potatoes and fresh romaine lettuces. Plus, there‚Äôs zesty pico de gallo and creamy garden ranch for finishing. Enveloped in a soft flour tortilla, this wrap offers a mouthwatering harmony of flavors and textures. It‚Äôs perfect for a satisfying lunch that will power you through the day or a comfy, casual dinner.

name: Honey Mustard Grilled Salmon
description: With this balanced plate, Chef Roberto's taking salmon to new levels of flavor. His honey mustard sauce is an unexpectedly perfect combination for the tenderly roasted fish. He serves it alongside roasted sweet potatoes and green beans ‚Äî a healthy, satisfying meal that works great for any lunch or dinner.

name: Kale Salad with Chili Roasted Shrimp
description: We love a hearty kale salad and this is one of our favorites. Obviously, the fresh blackened Cajun shrimp are the star of this meal, but it‚Äôs the jalape√±o, honey, and cumin dressing that gets tossed into the kale that steals the meal for us. The salad is topped with toasty pepitas for a nutty crunch, crumbled feta for salty creaminess, and cherry tomatoes for a little pop of freshness. This dish is meant to be eaten as a salad with the shrimp served cold or warm‚Äî totally up to you. If you like them warm, Chef recommends microwaving them for 45 seconds, no more than one minute‚Äî the little guys heat up quick!

name: Spicy Pork Bowl
description: Give in to your bulgogi cravings with his spicy pork bowl. Flavorful, tasty and healthy with greens and carrots on the side.

name: Crunchy Fish Tacos
description: Chef Raymundo's best ever fish tacos, achieving the same addictive crunch, deep fry with a panko breadcrumb crust. All piled up into a warm flour tortillas with avocado sauce, cabbage slaw, and smoky charred jalapeno.

name: Blueberry Morning Mini Loaves
description: Start your day with these delightful mini loaves, which are best enjoyed with a robust cup of coffee, making them the perfect morning treat. The burst of blueberries adds a delightful touch of sweetness, and for an extra layer of indulgence, drizzle them with luxurious whipped maple butter.

name: Broccoli Cheddar Soup
description: Chef Nora's broccoli, cheddar, and potato soup is as rich and comforting as they come. The soup features tender pieces of broccoli and Yukon potato, with melted cheddar cheese infused throughout. It's perfect for a quick and satisfying lunch or paired with a salad or sandwich for a heartier meal.

name: Gluten Free Lamb Meatballs
description: Slow Roasted lamb meatballs with a creamy polenta showcasing a mild to spicy Arribiatta sauce to wake the palette.

name: Crusted Pollock
description: This is a perfect dish with a crust of potatoes, a fresh piece of pollock and on top of seasonal veggies perfectly seasoned.

name: Chinese Red Braised Pork Ribs
description: Chef Yong shares the dish he always craved as a hungry teenager: juicy, fall-off-the-bone tender spare ribs cooked with the Chinese ‚Äúred braised‚Äù technique of simmering meat in soy sauce, sugar, and sweet aromatics like star anise and cinnamon. Perfect over a bed of blanched yu choy and jasmine rice!

name: Chicken Ropa Vieja
description: Experience the authentic flavors of Cuba with Chef Jose Garces' exclusive creation, Chicken Ropa Vieja, available only at CookUnity. Inspired by Chef Garces' journeys to Cuba, this traditional dish features tender, shredded chicken braised in a richly spiced tomato sauce. Served alongside the classic arroz moros and sweet maduros, this dish showcases the true essence of Cuban cuisine.

name: Fresh Guacamole Azteca
description: The simple ingredients list for Chef Santiago‚Äôs luscious guacamole says it all‚Äîperfectly ripe, creamy avocados, zingy diced red onion, jalape√±o peppers for kick, lime juice for acidity, cilantro for herbal freshness, and a pinch of kosher salt to enhance all those flavors. That‚Äôs it‚Äîno preservatives, no strange secret ingredients... just prime produce in skilled hands. Add tortilla chips and you‚Äôre party-ready.

name: Bacon Egg Cheese Quiche
description: This dish has all the flavors you know and love from a classic breakfast sandwich, served up in a new and sophisticated way. The star of this quiche is the bacon, which brings a smoky and salty element to every bite. The egg base is light and fluffy, with sweet caramelized onions and a layer of melty white cheddar cheese to add indulgence to the quiche. All of that goodness is surrounded by a flaky crust and served with lightly dressed mixed green salad to cut through all that richness. Indulge in a taste of a classic French bistro at your very own kitchen table.

name: Creamy Indian Chicken Curry
description: Chicken thighs simmer until tender in a rich korma-kadai sauce, thick with coconut milk and cashews, and layered with warm spices like turmeric, cumin, and garam masala. Slow-cooked onions, garlic, and ginger bring deep, savory sweetness, with a final flourish of herbs keeping things bright. A side of zesty lemon rice and roasted broccoli offers a fresh, fragrant contrast.

name: Gochujang Baby Back Ribs
description: These succulent, fall-off-the-bone, ribs are slow roasted and finished with a tangy, spicy Gochujang glaze. The sweetness of the ribs pairs perfectly with garlic fried rice and Korean corn cheese-- a cheesy Korean twist on classic American creamed corn. You will love this decadent and completely delicious dish!

name: Beef and Potato Enchiladas
description: With Mexican-style stewed beef, Cuban spices, and potatoes, these enchiladas are made bursting with flavor. The tasty filling is rolled into fresh corn tortillas and bathed in a smoky red salsa with a drizzle of dairy-free almond crema. These enchiladas are guaranteed to spice up any night!
ingredients: Natural Extractives Of Turmeric And Annatto

name: Roast Chicken Tikka
description: Roasted chicken rubbed over tikka curry paste getting into all the nooks and crannies. Chicken is drained with coriander over bed of cauliflower and potatoes.

name: Peruvian Chicken Cilantro Soup
description: Hearty Peruvian chicken soup, or Aguadito de Pollo, is so flavorful, it may just replace chicken noodle soup in your comfort food repertoire. With tender pieces of chicken, rice, and vegetables in a cilantro-infused chicken broth, it‚Äôs a comforting and aromatic dish perfect for cold nights.

name: Roasted Garlic Salmon
description: This Salmon recipe is the best source of protein, Omega3 and carbs. Special for a dinner with family and friends. Perfect fit for athletes.

name: Coriander Grilled Shrimp Roasted Fingerling Potatoes
description: The secret weapon in this dish? Chef Abe's Indonesian sauce. It's creamy and bright ‚Äî featuring coriander and turmeric, the perfect complements for tender grilled shrimp. The meal is finished off with roasted fingerling potatoes, vibrant green onions, and cherry tomatoes.

name: Hearty Lentil Mushroom Bolognese
description: A creative modern twist on the Italian classic, this rich, savory vegetarian entr√©e is crafted with tender lentils, umami-rich mushrooms, and crunchy toasted walnuts simmered in a robust tomato sauce seasoned with aromatic herbs. Served over a bed of nutty whole-wheat penne and garnished with fresh basil, each forkful offers a perfectly balanced combination of flavors and textures. It‚Äôs perfect as-is, and even better with a fresh green salad or crusty bread.

name: Mama Isas Tomatillo Pork Stew
description: One of Chef Maribel's favorite weekday meals, this dish is comfort on a plate featuring lean pork stewed with a bright tomatillo sauce and a small kick of serrano spice, and served with rice. If you love Chef Maribel's tomatillo enchiladas, this version of her tomatillo sauce is enhanced with the pork and paired with calabacitas, or Mexican squash, and corn.

name: Shrimp Creamy White Wine Sauce
description: Chef Tracey puts an elevated spin on the classic Lowcountry shrimp-and-grits combination. She saut√©s a generous portion of plump, succulent shrimp in a flavorful white wine reduction, enriched with the smoky essence of bacon, the tangy sweetness of sun-dried tomatoes, and just a touch of heavy cream. The savory shrimp take center stage, but the golden-fried grits cake‚Äîgarnished with curls of fresh green onion‚Äîmight just upstage them. It‚Äôs crisp on the outside, creamy inside, and lush with corn flavor. This indulgent meal will quickly become a regular favorite.

name: Pancakes Maple Syrup
description: Looking for a breakfast option that‚Äôs both nourishing and indulgent? Here it is! Chef Cami crafts her vanilla-scented pancakes with the utmost care‚Äîthey‚Äôre tender, fluffy, piled high, and topped with a pat of vegan butter for extra richness. Accompanied by a side of fresh blueberries and maple syrup for balancing sweetness, this delectable dish offers a plant-powered alternative to the classic breakfast favorite. It‚Äôll brighten up any morning and keep you fueled for the day to come.

name: Persian Jujeh Kebab with Saffron Rice
description: In this traditional Persian dish, saffron steals the spotlight. Steeped in hot water to draw out its fragrant flavor and golden hue, it‚Äôs blended with yogurt, onions, and zesty lime, forming a luxe marinade for juicy chicken thighs. They‚Äôre skewered and grilled, then served with smoky charred tomatoes and saffron-spiked rice.

name: Jambalaya Pasta Creamy Creole Sauce
description: Chef Chris took everything that he loved about that old Creole classic Jambalaya and combined it with his love for pasta. This dish has that same juicy diced chicken, spicy Andouille sausage, plump shrimp, peppers, and Creole spice, but mixed into tricolor rotini instead of the traditional rice. Finished with a creamy Creole ros√© sauce, this is Cajun flavor meets Italian techniques. In Chef‚Äôs world, the busier the pasta the better and this is as busy and flavorful as you can get! Chef highly recommends heating this meal in the microwave.

name: Classic Banana Bread Mini Loaves
description: Treat yourself anytime with Chef Akhtar‚Äôs adorable banana bread mini loaves. They‚Äôre everything you love about the home-cooked classic‚Äîa moist, tender crumb studded with toasty chopped walnuts‚Äîin miniature form. And the accompanying salted honey whipped butter takes the flavor to the next level, adding a touch of savory to complement the sweet. Enjoy as breakfast, an indulgent afternoon snack, or even dessert.

name: Chocolate Dipped Holiday Cookie
description: The holiday walnut chocolate chip-dipped cookie is a rich and chewy delight. It features a classic cookie recipe, crunchy walnuts, and is dipped in premium white and milk chocolate for added decadence. Sprinkled with candy cane sprinkles, it offers the perfect blend of flavors and textures in every bite.

name: Korean Baked Wings
description: A twist a on the popular Korean fried chicken, our baked wings starts with a marination in soy glaze, and slow baked in the oven. Served with a side of the classic spicy sauce, pickled radish and roasted potato.

name: Limena Shrimp Causa
description: Causa is a cornerstone of Peruvian cooking. Here, Chef Silvio brings us a Lima-style variation, featuring plump roasted shrimp folded into a cooling mix of sour cream and mayo. They‚Äôre layered over mashed potatoes blended with aj√≠ amarillo‚Äîa Peruvian chile prized for its gentle heat and fruity flavor. On the side: creamy avocado pur√©e, a hard-boiled egg, and pickled red onions, ready to be mixed in as you go.

name: Roasted Salmon Teriyaki
description: Chef Nelson's teriyaki-marinated, then roasted salmon is savory-sweet and succulent. The salmon is served over tricolor quinoa with fresh bean sprouts, as well as a side of roasted romanesco (a delicious veggie in the same family as broccoli and cauliflower). The perfectly umami-packed dish proves that eating healthy can taste incredible!

name: Grilled Halloumi Vegetable Souvlaki Platter
description: Chef Jona‚Äôs vegetarian version of the world famous souvlaki platter aka ‚Äúlittle skewers‚Äù is endlessly crave-able. Halloumi cheese and assorted marinated veggies are skewered then grilled, which gives the cheese an irresistibly delicious char. Served on a bed of herbed farro salad with a side of spiced Greek tomato sauce, this unique dish will satisfy vegetarians and omnivores alike.

name: Paneer Tikka Masala
description: Tender cubes of paneer meet a lush, spice-laden tomato sauce infused with ginger, garlic, and garam masala. Cashews and cream work their magic, adding richness without weight. Beneath it all, a bed of fragrant basmati, layered with wilted spinach and chickpeas, soaks in the warming sauce.

name: Frutti Di Mare Salad
description: Can a salad be luxurious? If it‚Äôs this one, the answer is ‚Äúabsolutely!‚Äù To the base of delicate mixed greens, Chef Roberto adds lots of good stuff‚Äîtangy cherry tomatoes, refreshing cucumber, crisp red bell pepper, and zesty red onion. Then comes the even-better stuff: Succulent scallops, plump shrimp, and tender calamari. It‚Äôs all swaddled in a luscious sweet-onion vinaigrette that perfectly highlights the seafood‚Äôs mouthwatering flavor. Whether you‚Äôre enjoying it as a pick-me-up lunch or an indulgent dinner, this salad will leave you satisfied in every way.

name: Mushroom Gravy Meatloaf
description: Versatile cozy meatloaf loaded with mushroom and broccoli in tasty flavorful rich gravy. Enjoy it with caramelized onion on top taking this classic meatloaf to another level.

name: Greek Beef Souvlaki
description: Delight in Chef Miguel‚Äôs Greek Beef Souvlaki, featuring tender marinated beef grilled to perfection. Paired with a colorful array of fresh grilled vegetables, this dish is a feast for the senses. A side of refreshing mint-yogurt tzatziki sauce adds a cool, creamy touch that enhances every bite. Ideal for lunch or dinner, it‚Äôs a flavorful journey to Greece on your plate. Experience this satisfying and vibrant meal today!

name: Creamy Thai Chicken Curry
description: Rich and saucy, this delicious Thai-inspired chicken curry gives any weeknight dinner a major excitement upgrade. Let‚Äôs start with the chicken‚Äîsucculent boneless skinless thighs get infused with the flavors of sweet ginger and earthy turmeric, then seared to lock in flavor and juiciness. Next comes the sauce‚Äîa creamy blend of coconut milk, mildly spicy red curry paste, fragrant fresh herbs, aromatic vegetables, and a burst of tangy lime juice. Then there‚Äôs the tender tangle of rice noodles and a side of crisp-tender saut√©ed baby bok choy. Generously portioned, it makes for a hearty dinner with a hard-to-beat combination of flavors and textures.

name: Mexican Braised Beef
description: There are many versions of this Mexican classic, known as Carne Guisada, but Chef Maribel stays true to her grandmother‚Äôs style of cooking with tender, flavorful beef chuck braised in rich beef stock with onions, garlic, tomatoes, serrano chiles, herbs, and spices. It‚Äôs served with creamy roasted Yukon Gold potatoes and refreshing green bean salad, brightened with zesty jalape√±o escabeche, fresh cilantro, and crumbled Queso Fresco. Use the white corn tortillas to scoop up delicious bites or make tacos, and dig into a hearty, satisfying, and flavor-packed meal.

name: Ancho Chile Roasted Chicken Thighs
description: Enjoy the rich and deep flavors of this nutty pumpkin seed mole balanced by the smoky, ancho chile-roasted chicken thighs and wholesome yellow rice. You can taste the layers of flavors and hours of cooking in this complex dish, but it arrives to your table in minutes.

name: Grilled Flank Steak Chow Mein
description: Fresh, flavorful, and fast‚ÄîChef Esther‚Äôs take on this Chinese take-out favorite stars with thick wonton noodles and lots of veggies, including baby corn, shiitake mushrooms, onions, and sweet bell pepper, all stir-fried with rich, super-savory soy and sesame sauce until perfectly tender. (There‚Äôs extra sauce on the side, too, so you can tailor the meal to your taste.) And speaking of tender... she tops that tantalizing combination with a hearty portion of sliced flank steak, grilled for deliciously smoky char. Meet your new go-to meal.

name: Cavatappi In Spicy Turkey Ragu
description: This pasta dish features one of Chef Jonny's aunt's incredible sauces. Her spicy turkey ragu is a light, tomato-based sauce slow-cooked with ground turkey sauce and a hint of mild spice. Paired with curly cavatappi and salty parmesan cheese, Chef recommends enjoying this dish alongside a glass of Pinot Grigio.

name: Greek Quinoa Bowl and Grilled Chicken
description: You'll find this dish at the intersection of tasty and nutritious. Nutty tricolor quinoa forms the base of this bowl, which features grilled chicken, chickpeas, a colorful Greek tomato-cucumber salad, and a creamy, herby Greek vinaigrette. Olives, feta cheese, and sweet and spicy pepperoncini peppers make the dish, which is designed to keep you feeling light and energized.

name: Basil Crusted Cod
description: Roasted cod infused with the summery flavor of fresh basil tastes like sunshine on a plate. The tender fish is served with a tangy spinach and eggplant caponata and a drizzle of creamy basil aioli.

name: Mission Style Carnitas Burrito
description: Mission style burritos are a classic California style of burrito known for their big size and even bigger flavors. This one is absolutely jam packed with slow cooked pork in the style of carnitas, brined and braised with spices and citrus. The pork is paired with seasoned black beans, white rice, and a three cheese blend with pepper jack, white cheddar, and Oaxacan cheeses. All of this goodness is rolled up in a soft flour tortilla, pressed until crispy on the edges and served up with salsa verde and Mexican crema. Consider your cravings crushed!

name: Cranberry Orange Mini Loaves
description: Treat yourself anytime with Chef Akhtar‚Äôs adorable dried cranberry & orange mini loaves. They‚Äôre everything you love about the homestyle sweet‚Äîa moist, tender loaf studded with dried cranberries & orange zest and a hint of allspice‚Äîjust in downsized form. And the accompanying orange marmalade butter takes the flavor to the next level, adding a touch of zesty richness to complement the sweet. Enjoy as breakfast, an indulgent afternoon snack, or even dessert.

name: Grilled Chimichurri Steak with Fingerling Potatoes
description: Grilled flank steak, rich in iron and protein, meets a vibrant and garlicky chimichurri sauce that‚Äôs packed with fresh herbs. Paired with crisp fingerling potatoes, lightly kissed with a zesty lemon marinade, and roasted cherry tomatoes that bring a burst of sweetness, this dish is a balanced blend of South American flavors and feel-good ingredients. Simple, nourishing, and satisfying.

name: Seared Steak with Horseradish Cream
description: If you are searching for a low-carb and gluten-free steak lover‚Äôs dream, then look no further. This is one of Chef Chris‚Äô simpler meals‚Äî just steak, veg, and a sauce‚Äî but when things are simple that means each component has to be perfect, so we take time with each one. The flank steak is marinated overnight then grilled and sliced. It‚Äôs served with Chef‚Äôs steakhouse-inspired horseradish creme sauce and with Brussels sprouts that have been marinated with garlic, shallots, and thyme and oven-roasted.

name: Balsamic Peach Chicken
description: With its sweet-savory chicken dish, this meal will let you enjoy the fresh peaches that are in season.

name: Herbed Salmon with Spaghetti Squash
description: This fresh and mouthwatering dish tastes great and makes you feel even better! Sustainably-caught salmon pan seared to a perfect medium, then served with spaghetti squash 'noodles' and roasted summer squash. The buttery salmon filet is topped with a fresh tomato salsa plus a zesty pan sauce that's sweetened with orange juice and just a touch of honey. This sunny dinner is sure to delight!

name: Filet Mignon Surf Turf
description: Chef Abe tops perfectly grilled filet mignon steak with coriander butter, a delicious touch of spice on an indulgent surf and turf completed with saut√©ed shrimp, creamy mushrooms, and fresh bell peppers and onions.

name: Roasted Vegetable Tofu Tikka Masala
description: In this creamy curry, cauliflower, sweet potato, and tofu are roasted separately, allowing each to reach peak texture. They‚Äôre tucked into a fragrant tomato-based sauce, spiced with garam masala, fenugreek, and harissa, and served over soft jasmine rice studded with sweet green peas. A side of cooling coconut raita tempers the heat.

name: Roasted Herbs De Provence Chicken
description: Chef Ludo's roasted chicken is seasoned with a special touch of herbs de Provence, creating a unique twist on this classic dish. It's served with a delightful white wine vinaigrette, making it the perfect accompaniment to a simple salad, your favorite veggies, or your choice of starch. A go-to recipe for every chef!

name: Orecchiette Napolitana Italian Sausage
