description: A classic Italian combination, this pasta dish pairs rich spicy Italian sausage with fresh broccoli rabe, all in a light tomato-basil sauce. Orecchiette is the perfect pasta shape to scoop up all that tangy, luscious sauce and a sprinkling of Grana Padano cheese on top seals the deal!

name: Vegetarian Japanese Curry with Tofu
description: A vegetarian version of a classic Japanese comfort food, this dish is composed of tender tofu and vegetables married with a rich Japanese-style curry sauce.

name: Creamy Tikka Masala with Tofu
description: Delight in Chef Aarthi's vegan twist on her best-selling dish. Whole canned tomatoes, coconut yogurt, and savory tofu get blended to create a luscious, dairy-free tikka masala. The dish is paired with aromatic basmati rice, peas, and vegan butter ‚Äî a flavorful journey for plant-based enthusiasts.

name: Cheesy Corn Cachapas with Roast Pork
description: Cachapas are a type of stuffed sweet corn pancake commonly eaten in Venezuela. Here, the sweet-and-savory pancakes are stuffed with fresh mozzarella and rich roasted pork shoulder, then served up with a side of guasacaca, a zesty Venezuelan avocado salsa.

name: Grilled Spicy Salmon Bowl
description: Grilled spicy salmon with sushi rice, mixed vegetables with a tangy sriracha and ponzu aioli.

name: Michys Bread Pudding
description: Chef Michelle‚Äôs serving up her signature dessert: a decadent bread pudding that will ruin you for all other bread puddings. Toasted brioche is the perfect, buttery base, especially when soaked in the rich, vanilla bean-speckled cr√®me br√ªl√©e custard. Hints of chocolate, orange zest, and brandy-soaked golden raisins add little pops of texture and flavor that will keep you coming back for bite after warm, gooey bite.

name: Braised Brisket Bowl
description: Indulge in the sumptuousness of tender braised beef brisket, artfully plated on a bed of creamy garlic mashed potatoes with velvety beef au jus gravy. Add in a side of lemon-garlic broccoli and you've got a comforting dish that promises culinary bliss with each and every bite.

name: Caprese Stuffed Chicken Breast
description: Chef Maia's caprese chicken is a chicken breast stuffed with sun-dried tomatoes, mozzarella cheese, garlic salt and fresh basil. To pair with the flavor-packed chicken, enjoy a baby spinach salad with salty feta cheese, dried pears, roasted pecans, and a tangy balsamic dressing. Together they make for a power pairing, and you'll savor every bite of this flavorful, creative spin on the classic combo of chicken and salad.

name: Slowly Cooked Spring Salmon
description: Slow Cooking the Salmon gives amazing texture and flavor to this healthy and delicious fish. The salmon is served with fresh spring vegetables on a bed of quinoa. Finishing the dish is a vibrant coriander vinaigrette that brings everything together and really makes this dish pop.

name: Beet Goat Cheese Over Risotto
description: Enjoy a creamy risotto topped with pistachios for a crunchy, nutritious touch. Served with roasted beets, goat cheese crumbles, and a sprinkle of baby arugula, this well-balanced meal is tangy, earthy, and sweet all at once with delicious texture in every bite.

name: Bbq Heritage Pork Loin
description: The main attraction here is a stunning bone-in heritage pork loin. The pork loin is grilled to seal in all its natural juices, then basted in a sweet and smoky barbecue sauce. Balancing out this satisfying meal are a classic Yukon Gold potato salad with a Dijon mustard-based dressing and garlicky saut√©ed green beans.

name: Pork Belly Bao Buns
description: Braised pork belly in a soft bao bun, dressed with hoisin BBQ sauce, and garnished with scallions and homemade pickles.

name: Garlic Pepper Beef Stir Fry
description: This is one of Chef Pimnapat's favorite recipes because it reminds her of a dish her mom cooked when she was young. Super tender slow-cooked beef is stir-fried in an aromatic and savory garlic- and pepper-infused sauce. Served alongside fluffy jasmine rice as well as blanched broccoli, cabbage, and carrots, savor a delicious little taste of Chef's childhood.

name: Mediterranean Spiced Lamb Cavatelli
description: Spring pasta dish with boneless Vadouvan spiced lamb.

name: Three Mushroom Quesadilla
description: Three kinds of mushrooms ‚Äî oyster, shiitake, white ‚Äî are combined with saut√©ed bell peppers, herbs, spices, and a gooey blend of melted mozzarella and cheddar to create one rich and satisfying quesadilla for any day of the week. Sour cream is of course included on the side!

name: Grilled Flat Iron Steak Anticuchado
description: Tender flat iron steak is marinated in Chef's signature anticucho sauce, then grilled to perfection, sliced, and served alongside pasta tossed in Chef's creamy, cheesy Huancaina sauce. A side of chimichurri adds bright, herbaceous balance to this elegant Peruvian plate.

name: Grilled Ny Steak In Lemon Soy Gravy
description: Chef Armando's take on traditional steakhouse fare is just the dish to make any weeknight feel like a special occasion. Drizzle a perfectly grilled New York strip steak with a savory Filipino-style bistek gravy crafted from soy sauce, butter, and lemon. Accompanied by grilled onions, fragrant jasmine rice, and saut√©ed string beans, this dish has everything you could want and more.

name: Grilled Salmon Over Kale Salad
description: There's not much better than a buttery fillet of perfectly grilled salmon, and it's certainly the star of this dish. Paired with a simple salad of shredded kale, wedges of ripe tomato, and a tangy lemon-garlic dressing, this dish is as delicious as it is nourishing! It's the ideal grab-and-go lunch or light dinner.

name: Lemon Pesto Cod
description: We just love the pairing of fresh cod with zesty pesto‚Äî it just screams summer! Chef Chris‚Äô lemony pesto brings the whole dish together alongside the sweetness from the roasted red peppers. Roasted lemon cauliflower and red potatoes soak up every last drop of the delicious pan sauce and a sprinkle of parsley freshens everything up. This is a perfectly balanced, light yet totally satisfying meal! Chef highly recommends heating this meal in the microwave.

name: Kale Caesar Salad
description: A simple but delicious salad with thinly sliced, tender kale, homemade Italian croutons and creamy caesar dressing. This salad is a family favorite and crowd pleaser, especially when served alongside grilled meat or poultry, salmon and other buttery fish, or saucy pastas.

name: Pesto Quinoa Bowl with Fresh Burrata
description: Healthy, refreshing, and loaded with texture, this bowl features a base of nutty quinoa topped with blistered cherry tomatoes, chopped cucumbers, Castelvetrano olives, and pickled red onions. Fresh burrata cheese adds creamy richness, while crispy chickpeas and chopped pistachios add crunch. To finish the bowl, Chef Fabio provides two options for dressing: basil pesto and a citrus vinaigrette. Use one or the other, or try mixing both ‚Äî the choice is yours!

name: Farro Risotto with Spring Legumes
description: Farro is a nutty, hearty ancient grain, and in this dish, Chef Dustin treats it like rice and cooks it in the style of Italian risotto. Creamy and bright green from some fresh pea pur√©e, the risotto is bolstered with even more fresh veggies with a mix of legumes like fava beans, sweet snap peas, and fresh peas. A shaved fennel salad with fresh dill cuts through all that decadent richness in the risotto, allowing for the perfect balance that you'd expect in a high-end restaurant.

name: Skirt Steak Fajita Tacos
description: Raised in San Antonio, fajitas were a weekend staple for Chef Maribel, with fresh-off-the-grill steak, flour tortillas, and all the accouterments. Chef Maribel's version lets you build your own fajita-inspired tacos with flour tortillas, char-grilled marinated skirt steak, and traditional rajas (grilled portobello mushrooms and poblano peppers). Top your tacos with pepperjack cheese and Chef's handmade fire-roasted tomato salsa, and enjoy with a side of red rice for a super satisfying Taco Tuesday, any day of the week.

name: Cajun Salmon Nicoise Grain Bowl
description: This protein-rich salad takes everything you love about a Ni√ßoise preparation, and turns the flavor up to 11. Quinoa provides a wholesome base that‚Äôs packed with rich, nuttiness. Next comes a blend of crisp blanched green beans, briny olives, and tangy-sweet pepperonata, plus a creamy hard-boiled egg. Then there‚Äôs the hearty portion of salmon‚Äîcoated in zesty Cajun spices and roasted to tender, buttery perfection. And instead of any ordinary vinaigrette, Chef Michael includes bright, herbaceous Chimichurri. Whether you enjoy it for lunch or dinner, this is a salad that‚Äôs guaranteed to satisfy.

name: Grilled Chicken Suya with Haricot Vert
description: Chef Pierre cooks up a classic West African dish of Chicken Suya, marinated and grilled chicken that has been seasoned with a dry spice rub bursting with North African flavors like cumin and herbs. The grilled Chicken is served alongside green beans, marinated red onion, and crispy spiced sweet plantains.

name: Yassa Grilled Chicken
description: Sweet and tangy grilled chicken flavored with caramelized onion and lime confit sauce is served over jollof rice, a staple of West African cuisine, featuring jasmine rice cooked in a tomato-based broth. Served with a side of roasted sweet and mildly spicy plantains, this meal will surprise and delight your tastebuds!

name: Seared Salmon Artichoke Salad
description: Protein- and fiber-packed, Chef Maribel‚Äôs light, refreshing meal will keep you energized without weighing you down. She plates simple and succulent seared salmon atop a hearty salad that combines tri-color quinoa, lemony artichoke hearts, and tender, creamy Cannellini beans, all tossed together with fresh herbs and a sweet pea vinaigrette that‚Äôs positively bursting with spring flavor. On the side: Perfectly crisp-tender saut√©ed asparagus. Lunch or dinner, your call. Either way, you‚Äôll savor every bite.

name: Roasted Vegetables Medley
description: All the best vegetables of the fall harvest‚ÄîBrussels sprouts, sweet potato, fingerling potatoes, butternut squash, parsnips, and peppers‚Äîget lightly tossed in balsamic and roasted to perfection. The nicely caramelized veggies are paired with Chef Chris' blue cheese compound butter, which adds complexity and richness. Pair these alongside your favorite protein to instantly elevate any meal.

name: Keto Roasted Salmon
description: Chef Anne's latest keto-friendly creation showcases perfectly roasted salmon, enveloped in a luxurious lemon herb cream sauce that strikes the perfect balance of richness and tang. Complemented by tender, lightly seasoned broccoli, each element harmonizes beautifully, offering a wholesome meal that delights with every bite.

name: Chicken Shoyu Miso Bowl
description: Savor rich, Japanese-inspired flavors in Chef Brandon's Chicken Shoyu Miso bowl. The star of the dish is tender chicken that's been marinated in a super savory combination of soy sauce, mirin, and miso paste. The chicken is paired with crispy roasted, smashed fingerling potatoes and saut√©ed patty pan squash. Each bite is elevated with a side of smoky aioli to dip or drizzle on top, creating a perfect harmony of umami-rich flavors and fresh, seasonal ingredients.

name: Vegetable Curry with Paneer
description: Dive into the rich tapestry of flavors of Chef Vincent's vegetable curry with paneer. This hearty and vibrant dish marries the robustness of mixed vegetables and the goodness of creamy paneer with aromatic warming spices. Served alongside fluffy basmati rice and cooling cucumber raita, this meal celebrates texture and taste, offering a comforting and satisfying dining experience that just so happens to be vegetarian, too.

name: Mushroom Escargot Over Polenta
description: Chef Anne whips up a gourmet ‚Äúescargot‚Äù dish made of meaty crimini mushrooms seasoned with capers, shallots, and tarragon. Enjoy it over a bed of velvety polenta and paired with a mix of garlicky saut√©ed supergreens, including kale and arugula.

name: Kale Caesar Salmon Bowl
description: Chef perfectly roasted this salmon and paired it with a bowl of Kale with his homemade Caesar dressing. Kale is low in calorie, high in fiber and has zero fat. What a perfect pair!

name: Chicken and Cheese Empanadas
description: Looking for a quick snack or meal addition that will satisfy your cravings? Look no further than Chef Garces' famous empanadas with braised chicken ropa vieja and cheese. The crispy flaky empanada shell is filled with tender, juicy chicken that has been braised in a spicy and smoky tomato sauce and three kinds of cheese. The filling is perfectly balanced, with just the right amount of heat to make your taste buds dance with joy. Paired with a creamy Mojo Verde made with crema, lime, and poblano peppers, the dipping sauce adds a refreshing, tangy quality that will make these truly mouth-watering and endlessly crave-able.

name: Spicy Pork with Caramelized Kimchi
description: A plate full of Korean BBQ-inspired goodness! Chef Esther pairs her signature spicy Gochujang-marinated pork shoulder with sweet-and-savory caramelized cabbage kimchi. A side of fluffy steamed rice topped with nutty Nori Komi Furikake seasoning rounds out the dish.

name: Cajun Blackened Redfish
description: This meal showcases the best the Gulf has to offer! Redfish is a Gulf specialty, and a delicate white fish similar to Red Snapper. Here it's crusted in blackening spices, seared to perfection, and paired with a rich, Cajun cream sauce. Plated on a bed of traditional dirty rice, this dish is Chef Chase's ode to all things New Orleans.

name: Salmon with Potatoes Au Gratin
description: Indulge in a truly amazing culinary experience with this exquisite dish. Cooked to perfection, the salmon takes center stage, showcasing its tender and flaky texture. Accompanying the fish is a side of classically prepared French potato gratin, featuring layers of thinly sliced potatoes baked to perfection with a golden and crunchy crust on top. The creamy and cheesy interior of the gratin adds a luscious and comforting element to the dish. To elevate the flavors even further, a drizzle of herbed lemon butter sauce adds a tangy and zesty note that perfectly complements the salmon and brings the entire dish to life.

name: Chicken Pesto Penne with Ricotta
description: Your whole family will love this colorful pasta dish with bold flavors. Pesto pasta is a comforting classic, and in this iteration it's transformed into a filling meal thanks to juicy chicken breast, tender asparagus, and roasted red peppers. The pesto itself is delightfully creamy and full of flavor!

name: Bubbs Filet Mignon
description: Indulge in Chef Dustin's carefully crafted steakhouse dish for Bubb's BBQ, which is worthy of a fancy restaurant but served to you in the comfort of your very own kitchen. It features a perfectly cooked petite filet mignon, tender and juicy, paired with silky truffled mashed potatoes and delicately creamed leeks. This dish is a testament to refined simplicity, offering a symphony of flavors that elevate the dining experience.

name: Rosemary Dijon Pork Chops and Cassoulet
description: Cassoulet is a classic comfort food from the South of France, and here Chef David reimagines it with his own spin. Dive in and indulge with this rich and delicious ragout of cannellini beans, Andouille sausage, and herbs, seasoned to absolute perfection. Paired with juicy Dijon-rosemary pork chops, this is the perfect dish to enjoy as a cheat meal or a reward after a long day.

name: Ghanaian Chicken Peanut Stew
description: Chef Miriam's Ghanaian Peanut Chicken Stew is a hearty dish with flavors you won't soon forget. This stew is a harmonious blend of flavors and textures, with tender chicken pieces simmered in a thick and creamy peanut sauce that is infused with aromatic spices like ginger, garlic, and chili peppers. The addition of sweet potatoes brings a delightful sweetness and a velvety texture to the stew, while the white rice serves as the perfect base to soak up all the delicious flavor. Each spoonful is like a warm hug.

name: Spice Crusted Roast Organic Chicken
description: This marinated roasted chicken breast has a brilliant secret to ensure a crispy spice crust: crushed tortilla chips. Chef Ivy's genius technique takes an organic chicken breast and coats it in masa harina, a warming spice blend, and crunchy tortilla chips, creating a spiced corn chip crust. The chicken is served with ancient grain pilaf, roasted plantains, and an herbed chicken jus to complete the dish.

name: Cashew Chicken Yucca
description: Considered a national dish of Haiti, this dish perfectly marries the sweet, nutty flavors of cashews with tender braised chicken and perfectly cooked, crispy fried yucca. A side of pikliz, a Haitian pickled slaw, is the perfect acidic component to balance out the rich dish.

name: Vegetarian Black Bean Lasagna
description: Layered with rich tomato sauce and wholesome black beans, this hearty vegetarian lasagna is a delicious and satisfying twist on a classic. Chef Kendra‚Äôs secret: She hand-crafts her own vegan substitute for the traditional ricotta filling with a blend of creamy tofu, cashews, and nutritional yeast, then packs it with extra flavor courtesy of fresh basil. The result is the kind of hearty, comforting home-style meal you‚Äôll crave again and again.

name: Fusilli Cauliflower Capers
description: If an Italian meal is what you are looking for, you have found it! Roasted Cauliflowers with sundried-tomatoes.

name: Japanese Beef Patty Curry
description: In this classic Japanese comfort dish, luscious Japanese-style beef curry pairs perfectly with creamy fingerling potatoes and carrots. A well-seasoned burger patty gets topped with furikake and rich, yet mild Japanese curry sauce, then served atop a bed of fluffy rice. Delight in one of Chef Aarthi's favorite comfort foods at a Japanese izakaya.

name: Chicken Lababdar
description: In this creamy, mildly spicy and tangy dish, Chef Raj showcases his Lababdar gravy which is a tomato-based sauce with cashews, spices and herbs, and saut√©ed onions. Chicken is simmered in the rich, creamy tomato gravy until super tender, then served up alongside aromatic saffron-scented rice for a comforting dinner any night of the week.

name: Grilled Asparagus with Lemon Shallot Sauce
description: This fresh side dish is simple yet elegant and the perfect addition to grilled meats, fish, or any springtime meal. Lightly grilled to bring out its natural sweetness, the asparagus is served with a tangy and zesty lemon shallot dressing. The bright green of the asparagus and the yellow of the dressing combine beautifully on the plate to showcase the flavors of the season and is sure to impress!

name: Pesto Chicken Farro Bowl
description: Chef Miguel‚Äôs chicken grain bowl makes eating healthy easy‚Äîand delicious. It features a vibrant combo of lemon chicken on a bed of nutty farro alongside fresh saut√©ed zucchini and grilled red peppers. But the true star of this dish is a homemade spinach and walnut pesto that elevates every bite. Packed with nutrients and made with wholesome ingredients, it's a perfect choice for a healthy lunch or dinner.

name: Chef Cedrics Breakfast Plate
description: Kick off your day in the most delicious possible way with Chef Cedric's fully loaded breakfast plate. Indulge in creamy herbed scrambled eggs, perfectly complemented by crispy bacon and savory turkey sausages. Chef completes his ideal breakfast experience with all the fixings: a side of golden tater tots, juicy cherry tomatoes, and saut√©ed cremini mushrooms.

name: Parisienne Gnocchi with Butternut Squash
description: When you think of gnocchi you may think of the small Italian dumplings made of potato or ricotta, but the French version is made with a savory dough called p√¢te √† choux. Chef Ludo's Parisian gnocchi are flavored with fresh herbs and parmesan cheese, then served in a simple sauce of brown butter and lemon. Roasted squash and fresh sage, parsley, and chives take the dish over the top.

name: Tangy Parmesan Crusted Tilapia
description: This dish is made with a fillet of light tilapia coated with butter and parmesan. On the side, you'll find roasted romanesco, a close relative of cauliflower, that's simply delicious and a creamy basil aioli to tie the whole dish together. It's refined yet delectable, and also just so happens to be gluten-free!

name: Bbq Rubbed Flat Iron Steak
description: This classic dish pairs a beautiful flat iron steak flavored with barbecue spices and Dijon mustard with crispy potato wedges infused with parmesan butter. A side of black truffle garlic aioli takes everything up a notch!

name: Grilled Thai Chicken
description: Grilled chicken thigh and drumstick with corn, longbean and tomato salad.

name: Tuna Poke Bowl
description: Not your ordinary Hawaiian appetizer leveled up into entree status. Marinated Tuna seared to a tender finish. Tuna is served over sushi rice, topped with tamari-orange dressing tossed with cabbage slaw, bell pepper for a fresh, lightly sweet crunch on the side.

name: Lemony Chicken Piccata
description: A delightful Italian classic. Succulent marinated chicken breast is pan seared to perfection and finished in a zesty, buttery lemon-caper sauce. Paired with garlicky saut√©ed green beans and silky potato pur√©e, this dish is simple yet endlessly satisfying.

name: Vegan Spicy Black Bean Quinoa Burger
description: Guilt-free burger that spicy and smoky with special vegan sauce plus the goodness of quinoa and black bean. Best of all, they hold together beautifully on the grill. Soy-free and dairy-free.

name: Ciabatta Stuffing
description: Chef DeLucie's ciabatta stuffing is a flavorful and hearty side dish for Thanksgiving. It features cubes of crusty ciabatta bread, which are toasted for extra texture, then combined with saut√©ed onions, garlic, celery, and wintry herbs like rosemary, sage, and thyme. The bread soaks up a rich vegetarian broth, creating a perfect balance of crisp edges and soft, flavorful bites. The ciabatta's olive oil- and herb-infused base adds a Mediterranean twist to the traditional stuffing, making it a delicious complement to turkey, as well as your other Thanksgiving dishes.

name: Beef Bibimbap
description: A nutrient-rich combination of rice, veggies and Korean bbq beef that come together for a savory, earthy and toasty experience with hints of spice and tang. Great texture and even better flavors coming together in a convenient and healthy one-bowl meal.

name: Cajun Spiced Roasted Salmon
description: Heat-seekers, this is the meal for you! Chef Michael slathers each fillet of buttery salmon in Cajun spices‚Äîhot cayenne, smoky paprika, sweet garlic, and more‚Äîthen roasts to a perfectly tender medium-rare. The refreshing slaw‚Äôs crisp cabbage and tangy, zesty, spicy dressing‚Äîa lightly sweetened blend of lime juice, fish sauce, rice wine vinegar, garlic, and serrano chile‚Äîmakes for an ideal counterpoint to the salmon‚Äôs richness. It‚Äôs a flavor-packed combination that will quickly become a new favorite.

name: Chicken Tikka with Organic Chicken
description: Heat seekers, this dish is for you! Chicken tikka infused with the smoky flavor of chipotle chile. The juicy chicken is served alongside a creamy cauliflower mash and cherry tomato salad to cool things off, plus a side of sweet, tangy tamarind chutney to cut through the heat.

name: Spiced Cauliflower Biryani
description: This is homestyle, good-for-you cooking with an elevated twist. Chef Chase's vegetarian-friendly twist on a classic Indian dish, Biryani, features basmati rice infused with lots of warming, aromatic spices, fresh herbs like cilantro and mint, and sweet dried currants. Earthy spiced and roasted cauliflower subs in for the traditional meat, and a cooling herbed yogurt sauce ties the whole balanced dish together.

name: Shrimp Fra Diavolo E Fettuccine
description: Light up any weeknight with Chef Jonny's Shrimp Fra Diavolo. This exquisite dish features al dente fettuccine pasta tossed in a spicy, robust tomato sauce infused with garlic, chili flakes, and a hint of white wine. Succulent, perfectly cooked shrimp add a touch of elegance, making every bite a tantalizing experience. Ideal for those who crave just a bit of heat, this dish honors the richness of Italian tradition with a zesty kick to keep you coming back for bite after bite.

name: Fresh Cavatelli with Spicy Sausage
description: Cavatelli translates to 'little hollows' in Italian and this pasta provides the perfect textural balance. With caramelized ground Italian sausage and charred broccoli (a classic pairing from Puglia) plus some added sweetness from blistered tomatoes and roasted garlic, this pasta is instantly crave-able with a taste you won't soon forget.

name: Grilled Chicken Yakitori
description: Chef Sergio‚Äôs take on this traditional Japanese street food includes juicy, tender chicken thighs, zesty green onion, and sweet red bell pepper, grilled and basted in a sweet and salty blend of umami-rich soy sauce, mirin, and sugar to give each component deliciously flavorful char. He serves a hearty portion atop a bed of steamed Jasmine rice garnished with sesame seeds for nutty crunch. This is the kind of meal that‚Äôs perfect anytime‚Äîas a hearty, one-bowl lunch or served with steamed edamame for a filling dinner.

name: Tuscan Kale Harvest Stew with Beans
description: Hearty and satiating, this cozy stew is a perfect lunch or light dinner with a hunk of crusty bread on the side. Creamy Cannellini beans, Tuscan kale, and harvest vegetables like carrots, potatoes, and Shiitake mushrooms are all gently simmered in a rich tomato and herb broth to make a filling meal that‚Äôs pure plant-based comfort food!

name: Falafel and Tabbouleh Salad
description: Tabbouleh and falafel are two Middle Eastern mezze staples and here they come together to make the perfect plate of vegetarian goodness. The chilled grain and parsley salad is the perfect accompaniment for crispy chickpea falafel. With a traditional creamy tzatziki sauce on the side to complement both, this is vegetarian fare at its finest.

name: Roasted Salmon Pistachio Mole
description: To create this delightful and healthy fusion of flavors, Chef Andres starts with buttery, perfectly roasted salmon, then pairs it with vibrant, zesty Mexican-style couscous, bursting with fresh tomatoes, onion, jalape√±o, cilantro, and lime. But the crowning touch is his mole sauce‚Äîa rich, complex blend of roasted pistachios, tangy tomatillos, serrano chiles, garlic, cinnamon, clove, and cumin slowly simmered and reduced in chicken stock. A side of tender-crisp garlicky green beans rounds out this unforgettable meal.

name: Adobo Chicken Quinoa Kale Enchiladas
description: Chef Jose has been serving enchiladas in his restaurants for almost 20 years, and now you can taste them at your very own dinner table! This is his take on a chicken enchilada, featuring slow braised chicken breast cooked with chipotle in adobo and spices. The tender chicken is joined by quinoa and kale, with Oaxaca and Monterey jack cheeses, rolled up into soft corn tortillas, and drizzled with a spicy, creamy chipotle sauce for a touch of smoky spice and additional richness. Served up with arroz moro, Cuban black beans and rice, salsa roja, and Cotija cheese, this dish is the whole package.

name: Chilled Peanut Soba Noodles with Tofu
description: Light and easy-going yet totally satisfying for vegetarians and omnivores. Japanese buckwheat soba noodles' natural nuttiness is complemented by a savory peanut sauce, along with simply prepared tofu and mixed vegetables including red cabbage, and carrots. This Japanese-inspired dish is ideal for an energizing lunch or light dinner.

name: Spicy Indonesian Red Chili Tofu
description: Tender tofu is stir-fried alongside onions and bell peppers in a spicy red chili sauce infused with Bumbu Merah, a traditional Indonesian spice paste made with red chili, kaffir lime leaves, shallots, garlic, and tomatoes. Served alongside aromatic jasmine rice with crispy shallots and tangy pickled cucumbers, this dish is guaranteed to spice up any weeknight.

name: Carolina Gold Pulled Pork Plate
description: BBQ doesn't get more classic and comforting than this. Bubb's pulled pork is slow-cooked to perfection, infused with the rich and smoky flavors of their signature BBQ sauce, then pulled into succulent shreds. The Carolina Gold BBQ sauce is a true Southern delight, with a tangy and sweet flavor that perfectly balances the rich and smoky flavors of the pulled pork. Made with a vinegar base, this sauce has a unique kick that sets it apart from other BBQ sauces. Paired with a rich and buttery corn pudding and decadent mac and cheese, this plate of BBQ excellence is comfort food to the max.

name: Asado Negro
description: Asado negro is one of the most popular dishes in Venezuela, and after one taste, you'll see why. Chef Carlos and Bladimir's homestyle recipe features marinated eye of round roast slow cooked in a lightly sweet and super savory sauce until beautifully tender. Served alongside silky potato pur√©e, this dish is at the intersection of comfort and elegance.

name: Aromatic Thai Basil Chicken
description: A nourishing and punchy Thai favorite. Here, ground chicken is stir-fried in an aromatic mix of garlic, chili, and Thai basil, alongside snappy green beans and red bell peppers. Combined with a sweet, spicy, and savory sauce that‚Äôs packed with more basil, it‚Äôs served over soft jasmine rice to soak up the flavor.

name: Korean Bbq Skirt Steak
description: Savor the melt-in-your-mouth goodness of teriyaki skirt steak, marinated and glazed with Chef Chomsun's signature teriyaki sauce, then grilled to juicy perfection. Complemented by fluffy Korean white rice and tender sesame-roasted broccoli, which boasts a nutty crunch, this dish promises a symphony of flavors and textures.

name: Apple Cider Salmon
description: This Cider-Glazed Salmon dish features a side of Red cabbage and mashed sweet potato. I love this simple salmon recipe because it's easy, versatile and delicious!

name: Opas Coconut Cream Soup
description: The Creamy Coconut Shrimp & Veggie Soup is a perfect choice for anyone looking for a flavorful and satisfying soup. It brings together the creaminess of coconut cream, the succulence of shrimp, and the vibrant freshness of vegetables, cauliflower & mushrooms, resulting in a soup that is both comforting and full of delightful flavors.

name: Quinoa and Roast Veggie Energy Bowl
description: Packed with vibrant flavors and nourishing ingredients, this bowl will fuel your day the right way. Tri-color quinoa, roasted sweet potatoes, and crisp haricot verts form a hearty base, with baby kale adding a fresh, leafy bite. Studded with spiced almonds, bringing a warm bite, it's finished with a tangy pomegranate-ginger vinaigrette.

name: Red Tuna with Tomato Jam
description: This dish is healthy and beautifully balanced. You will love everything about this dish, and it will leave you feeling nourished!

name: Spicy Shrimp Bowl with Soba Noodles
description: Fresh seared shrimp and spring vegetables are piled atop sesame soba noodles to be tossed with a tasty sesame ginger soy vinaigrette that gives this bowl a major flavor boost. The vinaigrette is prepared using fresh ginger, sesame oil and a hint of heat from sombal oelek, a thai chili paste.

name: Acapulco Red Snapper
description: Savor the rich flavors of Mexico with Chef Roberto's Acapulco Red Snapper, a traditional recipe that elevates red snapper to new heights. The star of the dish is red snapper fillet marinated in a tantalizing blend of dried guajillo chile, garlic, cumin, and oregano. The fish is served with a creamy smoky aioli, aromatic jasmine rice, and fresh cherry tomatoes, creating the perfect harmony of smoky spice and fresh flavor.

name: Chickpea Corn Bowl
description: As perfect for a hearty lunch as it is for a healthy dinner, this bowl is brimming with bold, vibrant flavors. Chef Vincent saut√©s creamy chickpeas and sweet corn kernels with garlic and za‚Äôatar, then plates them on a bed of crisp, refreshing Little Gem lettuce. But the real star is his Miso-Jalape√±o Tahini, a creamy, zesty dressing made with ginger, jalape√±os, lime, and cilantro. It adds a spicy kick to every bite. Finished with crumbled Feta and a squeeze of lime, this delicious, wholesome meal is sure to satisfy.

name: Plant Based Massaman Curry
description: This hearty and warming dish is made with a medley of vegetables, including kabocha squash, onions, carrots, potatoes, and garbanzo beans, all cooked in a rich peanut curry sauce. The sweetness of the squash complements the savory flavors of the curry, while the garbanzo beans add a protein boost. Served with brown rice and peanuts, this meal makes great comfort food for a chilly evening or whenever you need it.

name: Chicken In White Wine Sauce
description: Succulent chicken breast is seared to golden, juicy perfection and smothered in a rich white wine pan sauce infused with fragrant herbs and shallots. Served on a bed of buttery garlic mashed potatoes with a side of simply steamed broccolini, this dish is a comforting combination that promises bistro-quality flavors.

name: Spiced Yellow Chicken
description: Bold flavored chicken breast dashed with turmeric over cauliflower rice and collard greens. Enjoy with green cilantro coconut chutney.

name: Grilled Chicken with Puttanesca Sauce
description: A classic, a full hormone-free grilled chicken breast with broccoli on the side and some puttanesca sauce to pair with it. Delicious, every part of it and the amazing texture.

name: Lemon Garlic Shrimp
description: Lemon, garlic, and shrimp just belong together. Here, Chef Raymundo cooks succulent shrimp simply with freshly squeezed lemon and lots of garlic. These garlicky shrimp are crazy versatile; they work just as well atop a salad at lunchtime as they do with spaghetti for dinner. These may just be your new favorite back pocket protein to make weekday meal planning a cinch.

name: Turkey Bolognese Lasagna
description: A traditional-style Italian lasagna bolognese with Chef Dustin's twist. Layers of tender lasagna noodles, mozzarella and ricotta cheese, and baby spinach perfectly complement Chef's signature turkey bolognese sauce that's just as comforting as the traditional beef version, yet a little healthier and lighter. It's hearty, homey, and perfect for a cozy stay-in dinner.

name: White Vegetable Lasagna
description: A white lasagna loaded with kale, sweet potato, and zucchini is a flavorful and vegetarian-friendly variation on traditional lasagna. It features layers of lasagna noodles with saut√©ed kale, zucchini, and thinly sliced sweet potatoes, all smothered in a creamy b√©chamel sauce along with ricotta and Parmesan cheeses. The lasagna is baked until bubbly and golden then served with extra Parmesan and a side of Chef John's marinara to drizzle on top.

name: Slow Braised Beef Bourguignon
description: Tender, fall-apart chunks of beef are slowly simmered in a hearty red wine marinade, along with carrots, mushrooms, and bacon. Layered over roasted fingerling potatoes and finished with a touch of parsley, this timeless French stew is both comforting and quietly indulgent.

name: Haitian Vegetable Stew Legume
description: Chef Vanessa channels her Haitian heritage with this hearty and flavorful vegan dish, packed with a variety of vegetables including tomatoes, chayote squash, Japanese eggplant, cabbage, carrots, spinach, and red bell pepper. As they slowly simmer in vegetable stock, they‚Äôre infused with the rich flavors of classic Haitian epis (herb and garlic paste). She serves a hearty portion over a bed of Jasmine rice cooked with black beans and creamy coconut milk. The side of sweet fried plantains complete this island-inspired feast.

name: Mushroom Veggie Burger
description: Delicious and healthy! Packed with flavour, this mushroom burger is healthy and seriously satisfying.

name: Nutella Hazelnut Crunch Cake Jar
description: Our Nutella hazelnut crunch cake jar is a delightful treat that combines the rich flavors of Chocolate and Nutella with just the right amount of Hazelnut Crunch. It features layers of moist chocolate cake and luscious Nutella mousse, which are perfectly complemented by the irresistible crunch of hazelnut. With each spoonful, you'll experience a harmonious blend of textures and flavors that will satisfy your sweet tooth and leave you craving for more. It's a decadent dessert that is sure to please any dessert lover.

name: Fattoush Salad with Pita Crisps
description: Chef Daniel's fresh and flavorful riff on a Mediterranean salad. Mixed greens, plump cherry tomatoes, crisp cucumbers, radishes and bell peppers are all tossed in a sweet and tangy pomegranate vinaigrette with fresh parsley and a sprinkle of sumac, a floral Middle Eastern spice. The salad is crowned with crunchy pita crisps and briny feta cheese for the perfect finishing touches.

name: Swedish Turkey Meatballs
description: These turkey meatballs offer a lean spin on the Swedish classic, blending ground turkey with panko breadcrumbs, garlic, and fragrant spices like nutmeg and black pepper. Baked until tender, they‚Äôre coated in a rich cream sauce and served over buttery mashed potatoes with sweet peas. A sprinkle of fresh Italian parsley brightens each bite.

name: Roasted Salmon Cherry Tomatoes
description: White tender Atlantic salmon fillet, sweet cherry tomatoes, a hint of chili, sweet basil with an addition of briny capers and imported olives.

name: Spinach and Cheese Enchiladas Suizas
description: Chef Ivy takes on a classic: Enchiladas Suizas. Soft corn tortillas are packed with a simple, satisfying filling made with baby spinach and rich, melty Mexican cheeses. The enchiladas are rolled and smothered in a creamy salsa verde, then baked until gooey, cheesy, and irresistible. Served with a side of Mexican red rice, this dish delivers serious flavor everyone will enjoy.

name: Auntie Lenas Macaroni Peas
description: Chef Lena's (a.k.a. Auntie Lena) is serving up sneaky veggies and protein in a delicious dish your kids will never suspect is good for them. Carrots, celery, onion, and pumpkin are cooked with tomatoes then pur√©ed with silken tofu and nutritional yeast to create a shockingly creamy tomato sauce. Macaroni and peas are tossed in the sauce and served alongside a small side of steamed broccoli for a comforting, surprisingly veggie-forward dish your kids will love!

name: Slowly Roasted Barbecue Salmon with Corn Salad
description: Perfect Dish for summer. Slowly cooking the salmon gives it an amazing texture and glazing it with Chef Dan‚Äôs barbecue sauce puts it over the top. Its served atop a corn salad that is outstanding on its own and all together will make this a favorite.
ingredients: Vermont Pure Grade A Dark Amber Pure Maple Syrup

name: Sesame Almond Kelp Noodles with Tofu
description: This Asian-inspired 'noodle' bowl features a delightful fusion of fresh flavors and crunchy textures. Perfectly cooked kelp noodles are tossed in a luscious sesame sauce infused with aromatic spices and almonds, which make it creamy and nutty (and add an extra bit of protein!) The noodles are paired with crispy roasted tofu and plated on a bed of fresh spinach with carrot ribbons, toasted almonds, and a sprinkle of toasted sesame seeds. This plant-based dish tastes as good as it looks‚Äîand it looks amazing.

name: Crispy Parmesan Arancini
description: Who can resist creamy, cheesy risotto balls rolled in toasty breadcrumbs and deep-fried to gorgeous golden brown? And don‚Äôt worry‚Äîthe only thing that could possibly make these exquisite Italian snacks better is tangy marinara to dip them in. Arancini are traditionally an appetizer or snack‚Äîand you‚Äôll be the hit of any party with these. But if you want to keep them all to yourself, we‚Äôll never tell. Add a fresh green salad and you‚Äôve got a totally delectable treat meal.

name: Seasonal Grilled Vegetables with Chicken Breast
description: This enticing salad boasts a medley of perfectly grilled vegetables like asparagus, zucchini, and onions, all on a bed of mixed greens. The vibrant colors and smoky flavors of the vegetables are perfectly complemented by a luscious, creamy avocado dressing. Topped with tender, chili-rubbed grilled chicken breast, this salad offers a satisfying combination of textures and flavors that will leave you feeling nourished and refreshed.

name: Mediterranean Salad
description: The vinaigrette is bright and lemon-y. The veggies are crisp as can be. And the unexpected salad additions? (Think: salty green olives, apples, pearl barley, and feta cheese.) Repeat-worthy. You might want to put Chef Dustin's Mediterranean Salad on your weekly rotation.

name: Salsa Tagliatelle
description: This dish has Mediterranean flavors with a Latin American spin and although the ingredients may seem super simple, when they are together something amazingly delicious happens.

name: Moms Shrimp Stew
description: Prepare to be transported to Chef Andres' childhood with one of his most beloved family dishes. The rich shrimp stew is a cherished recipe from Chef's mom that features succulent shrimp in a spiced tomato broth with Yukon potatoes and a hint of smoke from chipotle peppers in adobo. Served alongside fragrant yellow rice cooked with saffron, you can taste the love in every bite of this dish.

name: Pulled Pork Sliders
description: A slider Pulled pork version of a classic southern American recipe for slow-cooked pork so meltingly tender that you can pull it apart perfectly paired with Corn Salad.

name: Yogurt Marinated Chicken
description: The yogurt marinade in this Middle Eastern-style dish is filled with warm spices, giving great flavor and even better texture to the chicken. Enjoy it over a bed of spiced basmati rice infused with dried apricots, raisins, and slices of toasted almond.

name: Annatto Rubbed Beef Brisket
description: Spectacular beef brisket is the heart of this comforting meal. Tender and juicy, the brisket is seasoned with annatto seed, which brings great color and a slightly sweet, peppery flavor. Served with roasted poblano peppers and onions in a decadent cheese sauce, this special dish from Chef Andres is unlike anything you've ever tasted.

name: Tinga Chicken Tacos
description: A classic, made authentically by one of the best Mexican chefs we know!

name: Cauliflower and Quinoa
description: Chef Meena's choice Indian dish for this week is a sure hit known as aloo gobi‚Äîan aromatic mix of cauliflower and quinoa with sweet potatoes and cauliflower florets. Vegetables were roasted finished tender and crisp, tossed in shallots, ghee and other herbs and spices to make it tasty.

name: Vadouvan Curry Spiced Shrimp
description: Fresh, plump shrimp are seasoned with a flavorful Vadouvan curry powder then saut√©ed to perfection. The shrimp are plated atop a silky kabocha squash pur√©e alongside a bright lentil salad that's been dressed in a simple citrus-Dijon vinaigrette. This elegant, composed meal from Chef Forgione is a true restaurant-quality dish, served up in minutes from the comfort of your very own kitchen.

name: Kale Pesto Spaghetti Squash
description: For this meal, strands of spaghetti squash are tossed in olive oil with beans and carrots, tomatoes, basil, and a good squeeze of lemon. We added cabbage, pumpkin seeds, garlic and a bunch of kale to make a full meal and toasted some almonds for crunch.

name: Seared Salmon Over Farro White Bean Salad
description: Looking for a healthy option that still promises bright, bold flavors? You can stop searching. Chef Andres sears and roasts a gorgeous, skin-on salmon fillet so the outside is crispy but the inside is flaky, tender perfection. The salmon is served atop a herby, hearty farro and cannellini bean salad that adds a delightful nuttiness and brightness. For even more zest, Chef adds a Mexican-inspired jicama and corn salsa, plus a creamy, refreshing cucumber-cilantro-lime sauce to tie the whole dish together in harmony. This colorful meal is just as delicious as it is nutritious, making it a perfect choice for any season.

name: Fettuccine with Salmon
description: A perfect dinner for a cool autumn night. Salmon is gently baked until flaky and tender, and served atop a bed of fettuccine saut√©ed with fresh spinach and mushrooms, in a creamy mushroom sauce. A comforting meal packed with protein, with a healthy dose of vitamins and minerals.

name: Ammas Chicken Thighs
description: Chef Aarthi's mom, or 'Amma,' made this chicken for their family every Sunday, and it was Chef's absolute favorite meal as a kid. We can see why. The chicken is flavored with rich, warming spices like coriander and cumin, with a very mild level of heat. Chef pairs the comforting chicken with steamed jasmine rice and spinach dal, a spiced spinach and lentil stew. Enjoy a taste of Chef Aarti's home cooking in your very own kitchen!

name: Cochinita Pibil Pork Quesadilla
description: The flavors of the Yucatan shine in Chef Maribel's marinade, which is made with sour orange blended with achiote and herbs to create the most succulent braised pork ever. That super tender pork is tucked into corn tortillas alongside grilled pineapple, caramelized onions, and Oaxaca and pepper jack cheeses to create the most divine quesadillas you've ever tasted. Served with a refreshing cabbage slaw with a garlic-cilantro vinaigrette dressing and tomatillo sauce on the side, this dish has everything you want and more.

name: Chicken Stir Fry
description: Chicken soaked in garlic sauce to make it even more flavorful. Chef hand-picked the freshest broccoli, bell pepper and snow peas. The sauce is slightly sweetened with a touch medjool date and coconut aminos replacing the soy sauce.

name: Slow Cooked Oxtail Stew
description: Once a humble cut of meat, oxtail has become a sought-after ingredient and a hero on restaurant menus around the globe. Now, Chef Pierre is bringing it to your table, slowly simmered until meltingly tender in a deeply flavored, herby braise. Loaded with red beans, this rich stew is served with soft jasmine rice to soak up every last drop.

name: Beef Lo Mein
description: Chef Chase's Beef Lo Mein tastes like what you‚Äôd get at a your go-to Chinese restaurant, only better, because it features more vegetables than your typical takeout. Mushrooms, peppers, carrots, cabbage, and bamboo shoots are stir-fried alongside tender egg noodles and flank steak in a savory-sweet sauce that makes this dish totally irresistible!

name: Orange Bbq Chicken Thighs and Pimento Mac N Cheese
description: This meal is an explosion of next level comfort food flavor! Bone-in chicken thighs are marinated in an orange marmalade-infused BBQ marinade and paired with creamy mac and cheese inspired by pimento cheese, a Southern staple. Brown sugar baked beans complete the comfort food trifecta in this delicious dish!

name: Seared Tuna with Vegetable Ratatouille
description: Chef Michael‚Äôs seared tuna fillet is served atop a rustic ratatouille, where eggplant, zucchini, and peppers simmer in a rich tomato sauce until meltingly tender. A drizzle of vibrant chimichurri‚Äîpacked with fresh herbs, garlic, and a touch of vinegar‚Äîadds a pop of brightness, bringing balance to this hearty yet elegant dish.

name: Moroccan Spiced Roasted Cod
description: Discover how expert techniques elevate a meal with this beautiful blend of North African and Mediterranean cuisines. Chef Michael takes the extra step of brining each cod fillet, ensuring that it stays extra-moist and tender when it‚Äôs rubbed with warm, Moroccan spices and roasted. He serves the fish over a hearty ragout of smoked eggplant, sweet roasted peppers, and creamy chickpeas. It‚Äôs all drizzled with a smooth, savory-and-sweet red pepper and preserved lemon coulis, which adds flavor and sophistication.

name: Grilled Sea Bass with Lobster Sauce
description: Decadent, opulent, and totally delicious, this dish is made for seafood lovers. Light and fresh, perfectly grilled sea bass is paired with a rich, creamy lobster-tomato sauce; together they achieve lovely balance. Topped with a sprinkle of Italian parsley and served with buttery, truffle-infused mashed potatoes and roasted cherry tomatoes for a pop of sweetness, this dish is sure satisfy your seafood cravings.

name: Grilled Salmon with Roasted Brussels Sprouts
description: Salmon contains a specific type of unsaturated fat called omega-3 fatty acids. Season salmon with a little salt and pepper then grilled on medium fire. Paired with healthy brussels sprouts and avocado sauce.

name: Tandoori Skirt Steak
description: Tandoori-spiced, skirt steak is the star of this nourishing, flavor-packed meal. The steak is paired with Chef Aarthi's take on rice and beans‚Äîfeaturing cumin-scented rice and red beans cooked with warming spices‚Äîplus a bright mint-cilantro chutney. Chef recommends enjoying this alongside a fresh salad of tomatoes and onions with a squeeze of lime.

name: Grilled Chicken with Sauteed Spinach
description: Grilled chicken breast, seasoned with thyme and shallots, is rounded out with jalape√±o mashed potatoes and saut√©ed spinach. Layer on the tomatillo sauce for a refreshing kick.

name: Grilled Pork Fajita Bowl
description: Chef Chase marinates lean pork tenderloin in fajita spices (chili powder, smoked paprika, earthy cumin, and garlic) and extra-virgin olive oil, then grills it to tender perfection and piles it high on a bed of fluffy Mexican rice mixed with creamy pinto beans. On the side: Julienned charred sweet bell peppers and onions. It‚Äôs garnished with fresh pico de gallo (juicy chopped plum tomatoes, onions, jalape√±o, and cilantro) and a lime wedge for a burst of acidity that brings to life all the incredible flavors in this hearty meal. Getting nearly three-quarters of your daily protein for less than 500 calories never tasted so good!

name: Pumpkin Pancakes
description: These healthy, comforting pancakes are like a little taste of autumn on your plate. The fluffy pancakes feature pumpkin, vanilla, and warming spices like cinnamon, cardamom, and nutmeg, and come with a side of real maple syrup to drizzle on top. It's a simple, nourishing breakfast for the fall season and beyond.

name: Penne with Beyond Bolognese
description: Beyond Meat with a play on a classic Italian dish.

name: Chipotle Short Ribs Tacos with Spring Salsa
description: This is a delicious meal you can enjoy. Chipotle short ribs taco with a side of spring chunky salsa poured with chipotle aioli wrapped in a taco.

name: Korean Bbq Chicken Bowl
description: Juicy, brined chicken thighs are grilled until lightly charred, then finished with a caramelized glaze of Korean BBQ sauce. Beneath it, coconut-infused sushi rice is oven-baked, creating a moist yet sticky base. A crisp cucumber kimchi‚Äîtossed with garlic, ginger, and a touch of spice‚Äîmakes a bright, cooling side.

name: Cold Soba Noodle Salad with Shrimp
description: Craving a light, satisfying lunch or dinner that‚Äôs perfectly suited for warm weather? This salad features succulent grilled shrimp served atop a bed of soba noodles with crisp snow peas and earthy roasted mushrooms, garnished with fresh cilantro. But it‚Äôs the dressing that will have you ordering this meal again and again. Creamy and savory, it‚Äôs an irresistible blend of umami-rich white miso, nutty tahini, and citrus juices, lightly sweetened with ginger and maple syrup.

name: Quinoa Quinotto with Tofu
description: In this dish, Chef Maribel takes quinoa ‚Äîa staple grain used in Peruvian cuisine‚Äîand treats it like rice to create a healthier version of risotto. Slow-roasted tomatoes add an acidic punch to pair with a delightfully creamy sauce using another stand-out ingredient from Peru: Aji Amarillo peppers. Baby spinach adds a pop of color and spiced tofu rounds out the dish to make it even more hearty and nutritious.

name: Lasagna
description: This version of saucy lasagna that is rocking our kitchen now to your tummy. Mashing up the cheese, hearty tomato sauce, and seasoned ground beef is now here to entice your dinner.

name: Kreyol Braised Vegetables Over Haitian Black Rice
description: Enjoy a bowl full of vegetarian-friendly Caribbean comfort cooking! A delectable mix of vegetables including squash, eggplant, cabbage, and peppers, all braised until tender in a flavorful broth with Haitian spices and seasoning. Served with a side of sweet plantains, saut√©ed bell peppers, and Haitian black rice.

name: Mushroom Quinoa Pilaf
description: All you really need is a healthy hearty salad made with silvered almond, sun-dried tomato, peas and quinoa. It's a great dish to complete your day.

name: Jerk Salmon Quinoa Bowl
description: Chef Fabiola's jerk salmon and quinoa bowl is a delicious and healthy option for lunch or dinner, no matter what mood you're in. The jerk seasoned salmon is cooked to perfection and served on a bed of nutty quinoa with grilled eggplant, chili butter-infused corn and onions for a nutritious meal that packs a flavor punch in every bite.

name: Chipotle Maple Glazed Salmon
description: Smoky, sweet, and savory, the chipotle-maple glaze on this tender salmon filet is the real star of this dish. It takes the buttery fish from good to great, especially when paired with Chef Ruben's mango pico de gallo and a side of fresh, lemony green beans. The bold, tangy flavors in this dish make it much more fun and exciting to eat than your average "health food", yet it's still full of nutrition. This meal is ideal for a light lunch or a protein-packed dinner after an intense workout.

name: Middle Eastern Eggplant Parmesan
description: A Middle Eastern version of an Italian-American classic. Thin slices of tender-cooked eggplant are layered with a slightly spicy tomato sauce, and a combination of creamy mozzarella, flavorful parmesan and briny crumbled feta.

name: Japanese Salmon Poke Bowl
description: If you're craving sushi, this restaurant-quality poke bowl will certainly hit the spot. The star of the dish is Chef Santiago's beautifully seasoned, spiced salmon fillet, which sits on a bed of sushi rice accompanied by a variety of fresh and colorful ingredients. The bowl also features carrots, cabbage, edamame, pickled ginger, and seaweed salad. A drizzle of avocado crema and sriracha aioli on top complete the dish, which makes for the ideal lunch or dinner any day of the week.

name: Buffalo Chicken Mac Cheese
description: Two comfort foods in one. Mac and cheese with a creamy ranch cheese sauce, zesty buffalo chicken breasts, and blue cheese crumbles.

name: Turkey and Poblano Tacos
description: Chef Andres spices up ground turkey with poblano peppers, then simmers them both with diced tomato, chili powder, ground cumin, and dried oregano. Red onions add a tangy sweet taste, and sliced avocado, lime crema and queso fresco add creamy freshness. This hearty filling is all wrapped up in toasted corn tortillas for an extra special Taco Tuesday (or really any day!)

name: Sprouted Lentil Shepherds Pie
description: Chef Lena's delicious and satisfying plant-based take on a classic Shepherd's Pie. Loaded sprouted lentils, organic veggies, fresh chopped herbs, and topped with garlicky vegan mashed potatoes, this meal will leave you feeling full and happy. A side salad of arugula with a tangy lemon vinaigrette compliments the rich flavors of the Shepherd's Pie perfectly.

name: Seafood Japchae
description: A very popular Korean dish made with chewy, glass noodles made with sweet potatoes- completely gluten-free! It is stir-fried with assorted charred vegetables, with the addition of large shrimp and squid- this bowl is a savory, sweet & nutty flavor-bomb.

name: Chicken Thigh Salad
description: Chicken thighs crunchy on the outside, juicy inside over a bed of quinoa with cranberries, alfalfa sprouts and caraway seed. Rich and hearty salad is bursting with almond and lemon.

name: Fettucine Broccoli Alfredo
description: Chef Silvia Arevalo‚Äôs Fettuccine & Broccoli Alfredo combines the allure of velvety Alfredo sauce‚Äîthe classic Italian blend of cream, butter, and Parmesan cheese‚Äîwith the vibrant freshness of tender-crisp steamed broccoli. It‚Äôs a perfect marriage of textures and flavors‚Äîthe richness of the sauce melds beautifully with the earthy undertones of broccoli. Enjoy this luxurious journey into the heart of Italian culinary tradition on any weeknight. Or dress the dish up for a special occasion by pairing it with a fresh green salad and a nice Chardonnay.

name: Grilled Salmon with Black Eye Peas Salad
description: Enjoy a delicate grilled salmon filet that's bursting with the flavors of North Africa, with aromatic cumin and herbs. Served with a fresh salad of black eyed peas, cherry tomatoes, red bell peppers, green onions and a refreshing ginger dressing, this meal is light enough to leave you feeling fresh and energized, but hearty enough to satisfy for hours.

name: Poached Salmon In Ravigote Sauce
description: Ravigote means 'to invigorate' in French, and what's more invigorating than deliciously simple, classic ingredients fused together. Of course, capers give it a little extra pop. Enjoy!

name: Yemenite Responsibly Farmed Shrimp Curry
description: Chef Einat brings you this Clean Meal, crafted with simple, wholesome ingredients, free from additives and prepared with nutrient-rich superfoods. Sit down to a bowl of this flavor-packed shrimp curry. Chef Einat‚Äôs coconut milk-based curry is flavored with spicy chilis, tangy lemon confit, and Hawaij, a Yemenite spice blend. Succulent shrimp, fresh snap peas and blistered jalape√±os adorn the curry, which sits atop a bed of fluffy Jasmine rice.

name: Chipotle Mango Shrimp Bowl
description: This hearty meal brings the heat‚Äîand the sweet. Chef Miguel piles a generous portion of succulent, smoky chipotle-mango roasted shrimp atop of a blend of expertly seasoned rice and tender black beans. Then he showers it with savory Cotija cheese and pairs it with a juicy salsa that combines sweet chopped mango, zesty red onion, and herbaceous cilantro with chipotles in adobo for even more of that signature smoky spice. At just 530 calories, it‚Äôs perfect for a hearty lunch or a light dinner.

name: Vegetable Tofu Tikka Masala
description: In this creamy curry, cauliflower, sweet potato, and tofu are roasted separately, allowing each to reach peak texture. They‚Äôre tucked into a fragrant tomato-based sauce, spiced with garam masala, fenugreek, and harissa, and served over soft jasmine rice studded with sweet green peas. A side of cooling coconut raita tempers the heat.

name: Pad Kra Pao with Beef
description: This Thai-inspired Pad Kra Pao features flavorful ground beef stir-fried with aromatic garlic and basil, served over a bed of tender udon noodles. Accompanied by fresh baby spinach, zucchini, and yellow squash, this dish offers a perfect blend of savory, spicy, and refreshing flavors for a satisfying meal.

name: Beyond Meatballs Arrabiata
description: Slow Roasted Beyond Meatballs with a creamy polenta showcasing a mild to spicy Arrabiatta sauce to wake the palette.

name: Mighty Greens Chicken Bowl
description: Mighty flavorful and mighty nutritious, too! Tender grilled chicken mingles with tender saut√©ed baby spinach and kale and a nutrient-packed blend of grains, including fonio, millet, quinoa, and Basmati rice‚Äîall drizzled with super-savory pumpkin seed and Castelvetrano olive pesto. This vibrant dish offers a deliciously healthy twist that‚Äôs perfect for lunch or dinner. Dive into wholesome flavors and feel great with every bite!

name: Orecchiette Alla Norma
description: Chef Cami is serving up Italian homestyle cooking, the plant-based way. Her take on Orecchiette alla Norma, a traditional Sicilian dish, pairs al dente orecchiette pasta with a rich tomato sauce studded with tender pieces of eggplant, garlic, and fresh basil. Topped with a generous dollop of Chef's signature macadamia ricotta cheese and more fresh basil, and immerse yourself in this endlessly comforting meal.

name: Salmon with Spring Peas
description: Spring peas makes this recipe pleasing and has a wonderful texture and flavor. Salmon goes so well with this freshly tasting peas filled with smoked almond sauce.

name: Gingery Salmon Cakes
description: Chef Chris was a big fan of fish cakes as a kid and guess what? He still loves them, and we can see why! Here Chef uses fresh salmon, hand-chopped and mixed with a minimal amount of Panko for binding, then flavored with fresh ginger, garlic, green onion and herbs. The cakes are seared to perfection and sit on top of a lightly seasoned trio of chopped cabbage, cilantro and green onion with a side of sushi rice. And let‚Äôs not forget the killer miso-sriracha sauce you can dip or drizzle your cakes with...major deliciousness alert! Chef highly recommends heating this meal in the microwave.

name: Pizza Spiced Braised Chicken Thighs
description: Savor a taste of Chef Michelle's childhood with this dish! Chef recreates her Mom‚Äôs recipe for braised chicken thighs with all the flavors you'd expect in a classic pizza: tomatoes, oregano, garlic, and pepperoncini peppers. The tender chicken pairs beautifully with a side of potato gnocchi tossed in a rich cream sauce infused with herbs, white wine, garlic, and parmesan. Get a little of each component in each forkful for the perfect bite.

name: Tinga Tacos De Pollo Shredded Chicken Tacos
description: Tinga de Pollo or Chicken Tinga comes from the city of Puebla in Mexico. Chef's Fabiola's take is a pretty typical Mexican recipe made with only a few, flavor-packed ingredients like tomato, garlic, cilantro, and chipotle in adobo. The marinated chicken thighs are cooked until pull-apart tender, then plated with all the fixings to build your own tacos: soft flour tortillas, queso fresco cheese, fresh cilantro, and Chef's handmade guacamole. These satisfying, family-friendly tacos make for the perfect everyday meal!

name: Teriyaki Cod
description: Teriyaki cod is a perfect meal for a fancy dinner with friends and family reunions. Special for a lean diet and energy booster for busy entrepreneurs, chefs, artists and amateur athletes.

name: Mushroom Stroganoff
description: We offer to you another guiltless comfort food haven, mushroom stroganoff. Made with tender juicy mushroom, hot pasta and belly warming creamy sauce.

name: Bbq Chopped Chicken Salad
description: Bubb's signature chopped salad features all the comforting smoky flavors of BBQ, just a little lighter and fresher. Grilled chicken is cooked to perfection, infused with smoky char from the grill, then chopped into bite-sized pieces and smothered in Bubb's mouthwatering BBQ sauce. Tossed into the salad is romaine, black beans, sweet corn, and chickpeas roasted in a truffle oil-infused buffalo sauce. Topped with pepperjack, and pico de gallo, a house-made buttermilk ranch dressing completes the salad. Each forkful promises the perfect balance of sweet, tangy, smoky, and spicy flavors that will have you coming back for more.

name: Wild Mushroom Carbonara Bucatini
description: Chef Adriana enlivens this beloved Roman classic with a beautiful medley of earthy wild mushrooms, peppery pan-fried pancetta, and fresh basil‚Äîbut everything else about the dish is pure tradition. The glossy, velvety sauce is rich with egg yolk and savory Parmesan cheese, with perfectly al dente bucatini noodles to soak up every last drop of it. Luxuriously creamy and bursting with rich umami flavor, this hearty, memorable meal elevates any ordinary weeknight.

name: Grilled Lamb Ribs
description: Chef Santos elevates simply seasoned, perfectly grilled lamb ribs with a Mexican tamarind sauce that‚Äôs both sweet and savory, complemented by a side of crunchy green beans with just a hint of garlic.

name: Crispy Chicken Katsu
description: An exciting new take on fried chicken with hot honey. Buttermilk-brined chicken is coated in a panko crust and fried until super crisp, then served with crushed olive oil potatoes and broccolini. Chef Akhtar's spicy guajillo chile and honey sauce takes this dish to another level.

name: Pierre Poivre Brisket
description: This seven pepper-spiced slow cooked brisket is comfort food for any day of the week. The brisket is resting on top of a side of slow-cooked white beans with garlic kale. Heat and enjoy but before you dig in don‚Äôt forget the grated parmesan!

name: Gochujang Pork Tenderloin
description: Tender pork tenderloin gets dry-rubbed in Chef Chom's signature kimchi seasoning and slow cooked before getting caramelized in a spicy gochujang sauce. Once it's finished, the resulting pork is absolutely irresistible, especially when accompanied by teriyaki-glazed sweet potatoes and edamame-studded rice. Altogether it's a comforting and satisfying dish that showcases the bold, balanced sweet-and-savory flavors of Korean cuisine.

name: Cajun Shrimp with Zucchini Noodles
description: This dish will remind you of the Cajun kitchen and cuisine in New Orleans. Bringing in heat and warmth to shrimp drizzled with lemon juice over a bed of zoodles with fresh cilantro and other spices.

name: Egg White Turkey Sausage Sandwich
description: The most flavorful way to start to the day! This hearty, healthy breakfast sandwich features an egg white omelet with crumbled sweet Italian turkey sausage, Gruy√®re cheese, and fresh herbs. The omelet is topped with a thick slice of roasted sweet potato and spicy red pepper sauce on a toasted potato bun, making for a perfectly portable breakfast option you won't want to miss.

name: Falafel Pita Sandwich
description: Chef Lena's healthy twist on the classic falafel sandwich, baked with olive oil (not deep fried), pita bread, anti-inflammatory turmeric tahini sauce, pickled red onions and carrots, fresh sliced tomato, cucumber, and arugula.

name: Shakshuka with Tofu Scrambled Eggs
description: A little spicy and super savory, Chef Cami takes on a favorite in the Middle Eastern and makes it vegan without compromising on flavor. Soft scrambled tofu "eggs" are uncannily similar to the real thing, especially when served atop a rich tomato sauce spiced with cumin, paprika and harissa. The Shakshuka is served with toasted naan pieces for dipping in and scooping up the sauce, as well as Chef Cami's signature pine nut Parmesan to sprinkle on top. Whether enjoyed for breakfast, brunch, lunch, or anytime of day, this dish is sure to spice up your routine.

name: Guajillo Beef and Cheese Enchiladas
description: Beef picadillo style enchiladas with pepper, potatoes and raisins.

name: Crawfish Etouffee
description: Chef Cedric serves up his take on a classic and comforting Cajun dish famous in New Orleans. √âtouff√©e is a French word meaning 'smothered' and here it describes the technique of smothering seafood in rich tomato-based stew. Chef Cedric resulting swaps crawfish tails (a New Orleans delicacy) for the typical shrimp, adding them to the gravy base that's made with the traditional roux and 'Holy Trinity' of onions, celery, and green bell peppers. It's a complex blend of Cajun, Creole, and French cuisine and you'll savor every last bite of it.

name: Beer Braised Pot Roast
description: Chef Chris has been carrying this recipe in his back pocket for over 30 years; it‚Äôs his go-to to pull together a great, crown-pleasing meal for guests. This is a classic comfort meal at its best‚Äî a showcase dinner and an even better leftover lunch. It starts with a half-pound of delicious marbled beef chuck, seared and then slowly braised with Guinness Stout, Chef‚Äôs secret sauce and hand-cut veggies. Served with sweet and spicy harissa carrots and creamy buttermilk mashed potatoes, it really doesn‚Äôt get much better than this! Chef highly recommends heating this meal in the microwave.

name: Vegan Truffle Mac N Cheese
description: The ultimate gourmet comfort food, and it's vegan (though you'd never know it). Elbow pasta is doused in rich and creamy cashew b√©chamel and mixed with black truffle-scented mushrooms for a burst of umami flavor. To take it over the top, it's topped with toasted panko breadcrumbs to bring the crunch you love from baked mac and cheese.

name: Cheesy Brisket Quesadillas
description: In this homage to his Mexican heritage, Chef Santiago lovingly seasons rich brisket and braises it for hours in a flavorful broth, spiked with ancho and guajillo chiles, earthy cumin and oregano, and aromatic vegetables. Then he stuffs the fork-tender beef into soft flour tortillas with deliciously melty Oaxacan and Mozzarella cheeses and griddles to them to a crisp, golden brown. They‚Äôre served with simple quick-pickled veggies to cut through all that richness. Use the accompanying dipping sauces to cool things down (tangy, refreshing crema) or heat things up (smoky charred tomatoes and chiles). This is a truly spectacular dish that you‚Äôll order again and again.

name: Homestyle Four Cheese Mac Cheese
description: Everything you want in a Mac & Cheese, rich, creamy, cheese pull, satisfying & delicious.

name: Stout Braised Chuck Roast
description: Savor the robust flavors of tender chuck roast braised with savory herbs and stout beer for extra depth of flavor. The super tender beef is complemented by sweet caramelized onion-infused mashed potatoes. This hearty dish is perfect for cozy Sunday dinner‚Äîor really any night of the week. It delivers comfort and satisfaction in every bite.

name: Zucchini Cauliflower Fritters
description: Your meat-free, veggie and healthy meal comes with only few ingredients but packed with nutrients. A combination of Zucchini and cauliflower to complete your fritter.

name: Shrimp Sausage Gumbo
description: Shrimp and Sausage Gumbo, a savory one-pot stew with a rich roux-based sauce, brings the aromatic and meaty flavors of Louisiana to your table. Enjoy it over rice for a taste of deep, rustic cuisine.

name: Grass Fed Meatballs with Noodles
description: This is the perfect meal: simple and delicious with a kick of spice without being spicy at all.

name: Braised Short Rib Breakfast Hash
description: Here‚Äôs a super savory and hearty option for breakfast, brunch, or any time of day (who doesn't love breakfast for dinner?!). Diced roasted potatoes are saut√©ed with onions and bell peppers as well as chunks of tender, smoky braised beef short ribs. The hash is served with a side of fluffy scrambled eggs. Together, they offer an endlessly satisfying start to any morning or midday meal.

name: Asparagus and Spring Pea Risotto
description: Asparagus and peas‚Äîthe epitome of seasonal spring vegetables‚Äîpair beautifully with this risotto, made the traditional Italian way, with Arborio rice cooked low and slow until creamy. The risotto is finished with a gorgeous herb-and-lemon compound butter and a healthy sprinkling of Grada Padano cheese, of course.

name: Pakistani Braised Short Ribs
description: Indulge in a double portion of Chef's special Short Rib Nihari, a traditional Pakistani slow-braised curry bursting with mouth-watering flavors and tender beef. Mellow, warm spices like cardamom, coriander, ginger and fennel are a perfect match for rich short ribs, especially when they're topped with crispy fried shallots for a delightful crunch. Pair with a side of rice, warm naan, or your favorite veggies for a comforting meal in minutes.

name: Pan Seared Steak with Caramelized Shallots
description: A smart mix of tasty ingredients now on your doorstep. Get this incredible flavor a simple seared steak with grilled asparagus.

name: Fried Pork Shrimp Dumplings
description: Bring some fun‚Äîand flavor‚Äîto your weekday meal routine. Stuffed with succulent spiced shrimp and pork then deep fried to a perfect golden brown, Chef Nora‚Äôs handmade dumplings make for an irresistible treat. She pairs them with sweet and sour garlic-soy sauce for dipping, plus sides of fiery kimchi fried rice and crisp-tender steamed bok choy.

name: Roasted Tofu Harvest Salad
description: Summer is all about fresh, bright flavors. With its inventive combination of flavorful ingredients, so is this salad. The sweetness and acidity of the vibrant strawberry, tomato, and lime vinaigrette pairs perfectly with the spiciness of the jalape√±os, the crunchy adobo spiced-pepitas, the crisp blanched green beans, the tangy goat cheese, and the herbaceous kick from tender Spring Mix lettuces. Roasted tofu ties everything together with a tangy kick from the Mojo Verde marinade while providing a healthy source of protein. Trust us, this salad will be a hit in your summer meal rotation!

name: Truffle Mac and Cheese with Butter Poached Lobster
description: Luxurious, rich, and astonishingly delicious, meet your new favorite comfort food. Creamy, stretchy white truffle-infused cheese sauce is folded into curly cavatappi pasta with big chunks of tender, butter-poached lobster. The whole dish is finished with a crunchy panko breadcrumb topping for that perfect pop of textural contrast that will keep you coming back for bite after decadent bite.

name: Beef Curry Bunny Chow
description: Inspired by bunny chow, the popular Indian South African street food typically made with curry in a loaf of white bread, Chef Aarthi‚Äôs take is a bit more like a sloppy joe filled with richly spiced chunks of beef. Featuring pillowy soft buns, pickled cucumbers, and sweet potatoes tots, this is beef curry with a few delicious twists.

name: Barbecue Pork Ribs
description: The smoky-sweet flavor of barbecue sauce pairs perfectly with rich pork ribs cooked low and slow in the oven, with a blanket of melted mozzarella to take it over the top. The result is a mouthwatering masterpiece, especially when accompanied by creamy pur√©ed potatoes. It's a dish you'll find yourself craving week after week.

name: Pork Tenderloin with Caramelized Onions
description: We love everything about this meal, but especially how everything plays so well with each other, making every bite a little different but equally delicious. The pork tenderloin is marinated with loads of herbs, grilled, then finished in the oven before being hand-sliced by a real carving chef. The sliced pork sits on top of a bed of caramelized onions and a rich sweet potato gratin with just a little hint of Gorgonzola cheese in it. A white wine-mustard cream sauce finishes off the dish, making it one of our forever favorites. Chef highly recommends heating this meal in the microwave.

name: Caribbean Pork
description: In this Caribbean-inspired dish, pork loin is marinated with traditional herbs, spices, and aromatics then caramelized with brown sugar and slow-cooked until super tender. The irresistibly rich pork is served with a side of comforting vegetable fried rice that's perfect to accompany the richness of the pork. Garnished with chopped parsley, it's a sweet and savory triumph.

name: Cheesy Creamy Potato Gratin
description: Decadent, comforting, and deeply savory this creamy potato gratin can make any weeknight feel like a special occasion. Thin slices of potato are layered with a creamy sauce that's infused with thyme, Parmesan cheese, and just a hint of nutmeg for depth of flavor. The gratin is baked until super soft and creamy, then broiled for a lovely golden top. Serve with a simply seared steak or filet of your favorite fish for an elegant, easy weeknight dinner.

name: Chickpea Wraps
description: Perfect for any season, impressive doughy chickpea wraps that will give you your heart's content. Chili-spiced walnut spread layered with an edgy version of avocado salsa, charred, sultry and smoky flavored.

name: Creamed Spinach
description: Creamed spinach is a classic steakhouse favorite, crafted with care and precision by Chef Chris Ratel. This sumptuous dish features tender baby spinach combined with Chef Ratel's signature b√©chamel sauce. To elevate the flavors, he adds grated parmesan cheese for savory depth. This add-on is ideal alongside steak or any simply grilled protein‚Äîit's sure to make any weeknight dinner feel infinitely more elegant.

name: Organic Chicken Breast
description: Embrace Chef Chris' sun-dried tomato and chicken bowl. Tender chicken breast shines atop nutty farro and baby spinach thanks to a bright, deeply savory sun-dried tomato, garlic, and parmesan sauce. Good for you and good for the planet, this is feel-good food at its finest.

name: Kielbasa Egg Fried Rice Bento
description: Chef Nora Nolasco brings her signature cross-cultural culinary skills to breakfast! Get a high-energy start to your day with this protein-packed bento, featuring egg fried rice, smoky grilled Polish kielbasa sausage with Japanese BBQ dipping sauce. What makes it truly magic? Furikake‚Äîthe sweet-salty Japanese rice seasoning blend of nori (AKA dried seaweed) and sesame seeds. Think of this dish as just like a traditional American breakfast‚Äîeggs, meat, and a starchy side‚Äîexcept even more flavorful.

name: Chermoula Spiced Chicken
description: Chef Angelia‚Äôs chermoula takes center stage in this spice-kissed dish. Aromatic herbs, zesty lemon, warming saffron, and the gentle heat of harissa form a vibrant coating for juicy roasted chicken thighs. They‚Äôre served next to Jamaican-style cabbage, saut√©ed in a richly spiced butter with carrots, onions, bell pepper, and fiery habanero, then quickly steamed to retain the veggies‚Äô crisp-tender texture.

name: Bacon Egg Cheese Sandwich
description: This simple, all-American breakfast sandwich hits the spot any day of the week! Inspired by New York bodegas, Chef Pat's breakfast sandwich features creamy baked eggs, crispy bacon, and melted yellow American cheese, all on a fluffy potato bun. And if you need an extra kick, just dip it in a little Sriracha hot sauce ‚Äî Chef Pat's favorite!

name: Butter Chicken Naanza
description: This ‚Äònaanza‚Äô fuses two comfort food icons: Indian butter chicken and cheesy Italian pizza. Chewy naan bread is coated in a velvety tomato curry sauce, packed with juicy spiced chicken, then topped with melty fontina cheese and baked until golden. A drizzle of tangy yogurt, crisp shallots, and fresh cilantro tie it all together. Your slice just got served.

name: Cheesy Chicken Enchiladas Suizas
description: Enchiladas are among the most well-known and beloved dishes from Mexico, and although there are different ways to make them, this is one of Chefs Santiago & Ruben's favorites. Soft corn tortillas are stuffed with mole tender chicken and gooey mozzarella cheese, and topped with a beautifully rich creamy salsa, made tomatillos and a hint of cream cheese. The enchiladas are baked until perfectly melty and delicious, then served alongside a side of rice and refried white beans, plus some pickled red onions to cut through all the richness.

name: Aleppo Spiced Cod
description: Simple ingredients and techniques can yield complex-tasting food, and this dish is the perfect example of that. Fruity, smoky Aleppo pepper spice the Cod and is simply baked and served with roasted Brussels sprouts and served with a seared lemon wedge that adds brightness to this dish.

name: Zucchini Carbonara
