description: Zucchinara, or Carbonara made with zucchini is a classic pasta sauce made with coco cream, bacon and Parmesan and is absolutely delicious. Chef used coconut cream, added bacon on tops, with garlic and eggs for extra cream.

name: Plant Based Breakfast Burrito
description: Who doesn't love breakfast all day? Full of herbs and spices, this breakfast burrito is packed with Beyond sausage and Just eggs to keep you going.

name: Grilled Mojo De Ajo Flank Steak
description: Chef Akhtar has perfected his flank steak on the grill, and the secret is a zesty, garlicky mojo de ajo marinade that really makes the dish. It's served with perfectly charred grilled zucchini and buttery roasted corn. A classic chimichurri sauce ties all the elements together, making for an exciting new dish you'll want to add to your regular rotation.

name: Creamy Vegetable Risotto
description: Chef's special spring vegetable risotto is a creamy and flavorful dish featuring a mix of the season's best vegetables. Made with Arborio rice, vegetable stock, white wine, and parmesan cheese, the creamy risotto is filled with a verdant variety of vegetables including broccoli, peas, fava beans, asparagus, corn, plus fresh herbs like green onions and dill. A topping of whipped ricotta takes the dish over the top. The combination of textures and flavors is sure to delight the taste buds and make for one satisfying meal.

name: Cashew Organic Chicken with Bok Choy
description: A classic Chinese-American favorite, this dish is made with tender chicken and bok choy in soy sauce, ginger, and aromatic garlic oil, and topped with roasted cashews. It is served with basmati rice infused with fragrant garlic and red chili.

name: Vegan Spicy Quinoa Burger
description: Guilt-free burger that is spicy and smoky with special vegan sauce plus the goodness of quinoa and black bean. Best of all, they hold together beautifully on the grill. Soy-free and dairy-free.

name: Classic Quebecois Poutine
description: This is a classic dish from Quebec and pure comfort food! Chef Cedric's version pairs crispy French fries with squeaky white cheddar cheese curds and Chef's handmade, deeply savory brown gravy. It's then topped with crunchy pieces of Applewood smoked bacon, crispy fried onions, and sliced green onions for a pop of color and freshness! What's not to love?!

name: Chicken Asado Quesadilla
description: This grilled chicken quesadilla uses quality ingredients for an all-time favorite snack or meal. Chef Maribel puts all the love in the details, using her signature achiote marinade on the chicken, which is complemented by caramelized onion, poblanos, and tomato in the filling. Melty Oaxaca and pepper jack cheeses add richness, and a lightly toasted flour tortilla envelops all these tasty ingredients. Served with a side of roasted tomato salsa and Mexican red rice with corn, carrots, and peas, this is everything you want and more.

name: Spicy Baked Chicken In Indonesian Chili Sauce
description: Tender chicken thighs are marinated and baked in a spicy red chili sauce infused with Bumbu Merah, a traditional Indonesian spice paste made with red chili, shallots, garlic, and tomatoes. Served on a bed of aromatic jasmine rice alongside tangy pickled carrots, and a side of creamy chili sauce, this dish is guaranteed to spice up any weeknight.

name: Broiled Trout with Lemon Oil
description: An excellent source of Omega 3 fatty acids. One of the healthiest fish you can have on your diet prepared by Chef Irvin. Slathered in lemon, herbs and balsamic vinegar, perfect with a broiled trout.

name: Caribbean Jerk Baby Back Ribs
description: This Caribbean-inspired meal will transport your tastebuds and have you coming back for seconds and thirds! Chef Angelia roasts tender baby back ribs low and slow with jerk spice until they're practically falling off the bone. The finger-licking good ribs are paired with a classic side of rice and beans, as well as irresistible fried plantains tossed in a nutty brown butter sauce.

name: Harvest Lentil Shepherds Pie
description: Chef Lena's delicious and satisfying whole food plant based take on a classic Shepherd's Pie... Loaded with tasty fresh organic vegetables and sprouted lentils and served with a hearty side of garlicky green beans, this meal will leave you feeling satiated and healthy.

name: Spicy Beyond Meat Tacos
description: Packed with all the flavors and textures you love in traditional tacos, these have one modern, smart swap. These tasty tacos are made with organic Beyond Meat that cooks and satisfies just like ground beef, especially when saut√©ed with all the signature spices you'd expect in a taco. Delicious and healthy, they're served a zesty lime crema and colorful pico de gallo bursting with peppers, cherry tomatoes, and cilantro.

name: Loaded Baked Potato with Cajun Crawfish Shrimp
description: A perfected baked Idaho potato is the vessel for this incredible meal. The potato is absolutely loaded with a rich and indulgent Cajun-inspired creamy gravy that's chock full of real crawfish meat and saut√©ed shrimp. Topped with melted cheddar cheese and fresh green onions, the creamy, cheesy gravy perfectly complements the tender and juicy seafood creating a truly decadent and satisfying meal.

name: Herb Roasted Salmon
description: Chef Jose Garces' herb-roasted salmon is a revelation‚Äîthe combination of fresh salmon, zesty chimichurri, crispy potatoes, and charred green onions is simply irresistible. The star of this dish is the sustainably-sourced Secret Island salmon that is roasted to perfection with an herb crust and paired with an equally bright and zesty basil chimichurri sauce. Herbs and salmon are a match made in culinary heaven. The papas a la chapa are crispy on the outside, soft and fluffy on the inside, and seasoned with just the right amount of salt and spices. Finally, let's not forget about the charred green onions that add a smoky, earthy flavor to the dish and are the perfect finishing touch.

name: Lobster Ravioli In Pink Sauce
description: Ready to transport yourself to a five-star restaurant? Chef DeLucie's lobster ravioli feature tender pasta filled with a creamy mixture of ricotta cheese and real pieces of lobster. The ravioli are coated in a pink sauce made with fresh marinara, cream, and a touch of spice from red pepper flakes. Garlic, white wine and a hint of basil enhance the sauce, which lends a tangy sweetness and rich, silky texture to the dish. Garnished with grated Parmesan cheese, it's an easy, elegant dish you'll crave time and time again.

name: Keto Chicken Carnitas Bowl
description: Protein-packed and keto-friendly, yet light and fresh, this bowl is undeniably delicious regardless of your diet! Full of carnitas-style chicken thighs, cilantro-cauliflower rice, and fajita-style saut√©ed peppers and onions, this bowl is ready to satisfy even the most ravenous appetites. Topped with spicy serrano pepper crema for a tangy heat, white cheddar cheese, sliced radishes, and toasty pepitas for the perfect finish!

name: Peruvian Beef Fried Rice
description: This dish perfectly illustrates Peruvian cuisine‚Äôs fusion of Chinese techniques and flavor influences with South American ingredients. It combines tender, flavorful flank steak marinated in Aji Amarillo chile for gentle heat; a medley of green cabbage, sugar snap peas, and sweet red bell pepper; and fluffy Jasmine rice‚Äîall wok-fired together and deeply flavored, thanks to a savory sauce made with a blend of umami-rich soy, sweet hoisin, and zesty garlic and ginger. A fresh cilantro garnish provides the perfect finishing touch.

name: Peruvian Shrimp Tacos
description: You‚Äôre in for a real treat with this meal. First, there‚Äôs the generous portion... Chef Walther serves up four warm corn tortillas cradling plump, crispy, golden fried shrimp. Next, there are the taco toppings... refreshing Salsa Criola, the popular Peruvian condiment of red onion, tomato, and cilantro marinated in tangy lime juice, and Aji Amarillo sauce, a creamy blend of mayo and spicy golden Amarillo chiles, which have a subtle fruitiness. And finally, on the side, you have vibrant Cilantro Rice, bursting with fresh flavor. Go ahead‚Äîgive your taco night a seriously delicious upgrade.

name: Garlic Herb Grilled Chicken with Carrot Thyme Puree
description: This dish proves that simplicity can be elegant. Tender and garlicky grilled chicken breast takes center stage, accompanied by a velvety carrot pur√©e infused with thyme to add a touch of refinement. Saut√©ed mushrooms and shallots bring earthy undertones to round out the dish. Light and fresh, yet satisfying and comforting, this elegant dish is an easy weeknight winner.

name: Teriyaki Meatballs
description: Chef Esther delights with a classic Japanese comfort food, featuring meatballs glazed in teriyaki sauce. These meatballs burst with bold, savory, and sweet flavors, enhanced by rich umami undertones. Served alongside white rice and steamed broccoli, this dish is the complete package. Garnished with toasted sesame seeds, it's a culinary treat to savor.

name: Fresh Caprese Pasta Salad
description: This is just a deliciously simple pasta salad loaded with bold, fresh flavors. Marinated tomatoes, fresh mozzarella, olives, basil, roasted red peppers, and prosciutto are tossed with al dente rotini pasta and a tangy red wine vinaigrette. What more could you want?

name: Keto Chia Crusted Salmon Chermoula
description: This salmon is cooked to perfection with a tender, buttery center and crispy, chia seed crust. The fish is served alongside cauliflower-carrot 'rice', saut√©ed broccoli, and an herbaceous chermoula sauce. This delicious dish is low in carbs yet packs a serious flavor punch!

name: Creamy Chicken Prosciutto Fettuccine
description: Golden, spice-rubbed chicken breast meets al dente ribbons of fettuccine, all coated in a velvety b√©chamel‚Äîbuilt from buttery white cheddar and a sharp hit of Parmesan. To finish, crisp shards of prosciutto are scattered like confetti for a pop of salt and crunch, with a sprinkle of fresh parsley adding a herby touch.

name: Chili Lime Chicken Tacos
description: Juicy, marinated chicken thighs grilled to perfection delivering a mouthwatering combination of smoky and tangy flavors topped with a crisp, tangy, colorful purple cabbage slaw and drizzled with a smoky chipotle crema.

name: Mexican Chicken Shrimp Chorizo Paella
description: Chef Santiago's take on Mexican-style paella honors the roots of the seafood-filled rice that was created in the ports of Mexico. His version features plump shrimp, Mexican chorizo, and chicken, along with a special seasoning of dried chilies and spices. Even though it is very similar to Spanish paella, the smoky chilies give it a unique and delicious touch.

name: Miso Glazed Salmon Rice Bowl
description: This Asian-inspired rice bowl is packed with protein, fiber, healthy fats, and antioxidants, but all you'll notice is how good it tastes. The star of the show is a super savory and perfectly cooked miso-glazed salmon fillet, plated alongside edamame and loads of fresh veggies on a bed of jasmine rice. Finished with slices of fresh mango and avocado, sesame seeds, and a drizzle of spicy mayo, this is an ideal choice for lunch or dinner.

name: Red Bean Oat Burger
description: This hearty, plant-based burger combines the earthy creaminess of red beans with the wholesome texture and subtle, nutty flavor of oats, all in one perfectly spiced patty. Chef Nahika serves it with juicy Beefsteak tomato slices, onions, a pillow-soft bun, and a zesty sauce that blends vegan mayo, ketchup, and garlic. But wait... what burger would be complete without a side of fries? These garlic- and thyme-seasoned beauties are gorgeously golden outside, creamy and tender inside. Getting one-third of your daily fiber and protein never tasted so good!

name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Cake Jar
description: Choose this delectable Peanut Butter Mousse Cake Jar and indulge in the perfect blend of peanut butter and creamy mousse layered between rich chocolate cake. Each bite bursts with flavors, creating a dessert experience like no other.

name: Rigatoni with Kale Pesto
description: Chef Andres Mendez brings you this option of a Climate Friendly meal that combines low carbon impact, whole foods, and high sustainability ingredients. Indulge in this rich, rustic vegan dish. Al dente rigatoni is tossed in a vibrant kale pesto alongside grilled portobello mushrooms and plump cherry tomatoes. Simple yet comforting, this symphony of flavors will delight the senses.

name: Middle Eastern Pulled Chicken Chili
description: Chef Einat brings you her spicy, complex and totally crave-able take on an American classic: chili. A mix of legumes are stewed with Mediterranean and Middle Eastern spices to create a comforting yet new take on everyone‚Äôs favorite chili. Adobo-braised pulled chicken adds more protein and another level of flavor while a drizzle of creamy tahini on top is the perfect finishing touch. A side green herby sabzi rice is the ideal complement to round out the meal.

name: Coconut Poached Salmon
description: This super-satisfying meal is a perfect pick-me-up anytime you‚Äôre craving something light and tropical. ‚ÄúIt‚Äôs one of my favorite dishes,‚Äù Chef Bernstein says. First, she makes the rich coconut broth, infused with aromatic vegetables and the delicate flavor of lemongrass. Then, she uses it to finish tender, buttery seared salmon. On the side: Creamy coconut rice topped with toasted shaved coconut for crunch and crisp-tender bok choi lightly saut√©ed with umami-rich soy sauce. It‚Äôs an irresistible combination of tastes and textures.

name: Signature Chicken Burger
description: Light and heart-healthy, but so tasty you won't even miss the beef, Chef Ruben's chicken burger packs a serious flavor punch. With his signature blend of spices and spinach to secretly add even more nutrition, the burger is grilled to perfection. Served on a classic pillowy potato bun with Chef's tangy take on thousand island sauce, a side of baked sweet potato 'fries' completes this better-for-you take on an American staple.

name: Pork Katsu with Japanese Curry
description: Chef Sergio‚Äôs take on one of the most popular dishes in Japanese restaurants is the ultimate crowd-pleasing comfort food. Crispy-on-the-outside, juicy-on-the-inside fried pork cutlet Katsu sits on a bed of rich, Japanese-style curry. The absolutely delicious dish is accompanied by a side of white rice and pickled daikon. We can‚Äôt think of a better meal to warm you up on chilly nights.

name: Pesto Pasta Salad with Vegan Chicken
description: Chef Cami's loaded pesto pasta salad will change everything you think you know about plant-based food. This vibrant dish is a celebration of freshness, combining al dente fusilli pasta with an aromatic basil pesto that dances on your taste buds. The pesto-coated pasta marries well with a side of tender, protein-packed vegan chicken, and a bed of baby spinach sneaks in even more nutrition. The dish is beautifully garnished with cherry tomatoes and a dusting of vegan Parmesan cheese, adding a touch of indulgence and depth to each mouthwatering forkful.

name: Peruvian Lomo Saltado Steak Spaghetti
description: Chef Walther brings us his signature Lomo Saltado‚Äîa beloved Peruvian stir-fry featuring marinated beef, juicy tomatoes, and sweet peppers. Here, it‚Äôs served over al dente strings of spaghetti tossed in a creamy, cheesy sauce known as huanca√≠na, and finished with grated parmesan.

name: Jalapeno Bacon Cheddar Egg White Bites
description: Take a classic bacon, egg, and cheese, but make it spicy. And a little more nutritious. Chef Garces‚Äôs egg white bites are made with crispy bacon, spicy roasted jalape√±o, and cheddar. High in protein, low in carbs, and packed with flavor, this is a power breakfast with a gourmet touch.

name: Coffee Crusted Skirt Steak
description: A delicious, savory mix of coffee and spices crusts this tender steak, a butcher's secret and one of the most tender cuts of beef. The steak pairs beautifully with sweet potatoes that have been rubbed with complementary smoky spices and a simple side of roasted broccoli.

name: Berry Brioche French Toast
description: Chef Kristy is taking your favorite breakfast up several notches. Her fluffy French toast is made with rich brioche bread and paired with whipped berry compound butter and lavender-infused maple syrup. Garnished with fresh blueberries and mint, you may never go back to standard French toast again.

name: Aji Panca Adobo Skirt Steak
description: Trying to add extra some extra protein to your diet? Look no further than this double serving of Chef Maribel's Peruvian-inspired skirt steak. She marinates her skirt steak in a flavorful adobo with aji panca, a uniquely smoky, mild chile unlike any other. Grilled then paired with her famous chimichurri, it's simply perfect. Note: Shake the chimichurri until spices and herbs come together into one sauce.

name: Handmade French Pork Sausage
description: This is a comforting, hearty dish inspired by homestyle French cooking. With a bright and satisfying green lentil stew and handmade pork sausage, this dish is √ºber satisfying and satiating.

name: Sweet Savory Korean Chicken Bowl
description: Craving a one-bowl meal that‚Äôs hearty and satisfying, yet still light and balanced? This is the one for you. Thin slices of tender, lean chicken breast bulgogi are marinated in sweet and savory Korean teriyaki sauce, then wok-fired for flavorful caramelization and a hint of smoky char. On the side: Tender-crisp steamed garlic bok choy and a mound of sticky rice. A garnish of green onions and sesame seeds provides freshness, crunch, and the perfect finishing touch. Mix it up and enjoy!

name: Granite Ridge Red Blend
description: Hand-harvested from old bush vines in South Africa‚Äôs Swartland, this blend offers rich dark fruit, warm spice, and fresh acidity. It brings a smooth, refined texture, while earlier picking results in a bright, fresh expression.

name: Turmeric Spiced Chicken
description: Bold flavored chicken breast coated with turmeric spice blend then braised with radishes and onions. Fresh cilantro completes the meal.

name: Roasted Pepper Corn Egg Bites
description: Bursting with smoky-sweet roasted red bell peppers, fresh corn kernels, and savory Cheddar cheese, these delightful bites are an irresistibly tasty and veggie-packed way to start the day. The generous portion is paired with a side of zesty Venezuelan Guasacaca Sauce‚Äîa combination of creamy avocado and mayonnaise, herbal cilantro, and fresh lime. There‚Äôs vibrant, wholesome goodness in every bite.

name: Chicken Souvlaki Platter
description: Behold: Chef Jona's take on the world-famous Souvlaki, also known as ‚Äúlittle skewers". Tender chicken breast is marinated in traditional ladolemono (Greek lemon dressing) and then grilled, creating those extra-delicious, perfectly charred bits. Served with grilled veggies on a bed of saffron rice pilaf, a side of creamy tzatziki sauce ties the entire dish together.

name: Grilled Coconut Sugar and Cinnamon Shrimp
description: Chef Abe's coconut sugar shrimp are enhanced with a hint of cardamom and cinnamon, and paired with tender roasted potatoes, juicy corn kernels, and a few cherry tomatoes for a colorful garnish.

name: Grilled Shrimp Fajita Farro Bowl
description: Layered to the max with flavor, this is truly a super bowl. Let‚Äôs start with the base: Fiber-rich, nutty farro grains, simmered until tender. Next come hearty sofrito-infused black beans and saut√©ed poblano, yellow and red sweet bell peppers, and zesty red onion. Then, the succulent shrimp: They‚Äôre tossed with a chipotle, cumin, and paprika rub and grilled for a light smoky char. On top: A drizzle of crema, melty shredded Monterey Jack cheese, and a bright avocado and corn salsa made with fresh, herbal cilantro, zesty red onion, and tangy lime juice.

name: Pork Chop with Grilled Apples
description: Sweet and salty dish, the potatoes have a mild sweet flavor, the apples a bitter sweet flavor, and pork with sage has a very aromatic and earthy flavor.
ingredients: Vermont Pure Grade A Dark Amber Pure Maple Syrup

name: Traditional Chicken Pot Pie
description: Chef DeLucie's Brown Derby Chicken Pot Pie features a creamy filling of tender chicken, carrots, peas, and mushrooms, all encased in a flaky, buttery puff pastry crust. This version is inspired by the one served at The Brown Derby, a classic Los Angeles dining institution from a bygone era of Hollywood. For many, this pot pie will bring back nostalgic memories, but even if it's new to you, it's just as comforting as anything.

name: Adzuki Chipotle Bean Chile
description: Hearty satiating chili with smoky flavors, nourishing veggies and warming herbs, paired with cornbread, offers a complete protein for vegans and carnivores alike. Topped with healthy fats, this is a balanced nutritious meal perfect for these cozy indoor days!
ingredients: Vermont Pure Grade A Dark Amber Pure Maple Syrup

name: Coconut Crusted Chicken Salad
description: Crispy crusted chicken over a bed of broccolini and mixed greens. It's the perfect combination of salty and sweet, warm and cold. This salad has plenty of protein to keep you satisfied.

name: Blue Doors Shrimp Chicken Jambalaya
description: This jambalaya brings together the best of both land and sea. Roasted chicken breast and tender shrimp are marinated in fragrant spices, then cooked in a vegetable-loaded tomato sauce and richly seasoned, savory rice base.

name: Mini Cheesy Potato Burrito
description: This veggie burrito was designed for kids. With a slightly smaller portion that's perfect for little ones, it's stuffed with seasoned, smashed sweet potatoes, black beans, and two kinds of cheese. Served with crispy roasted potatoes and Chef Ivy's homemade ketchup, it tastes great and is great for your kids, too.

name: Herby Greek Meatballs
description: These are meatballs with the flavor turned up to 11. Chef Fabiola perfectly seasons her ground beef mix, folds in crumbles of creamy Feta cheese, then packs it with fresh dill, mint, parsley, and zesty lemon. But wait, there‚Äôs more! These meatballs have a secret, too‚Äîgrated zucchini, which helps keep them extra moist and tender. She serves a hearty portion with tangy tzatziki sauce for dipping and a refreshing cucumber, cherry tomato, and red onion salad tossed with lemon vinaigrette and more Feta. Put this one on repeat.

name: Indo Fish Tacos
description: A tantalizing dish where Indonesian ingredients meet Mexican inspiration. Chef Abe's culinary creation features crispy, golden coriander-battered cod fillets, which you can nestle into soft flour tortillas and top with spicy fresh carrot sambal, tangy pickled red onions, crunchy pickled green cabbage, and vibrant green lettuce. A truly mouthwatering feast, this dish will keep you coming back for more.

name: Marinara Meatballs
description: A classic Italian recipe from a Nona that will warm your heart. Protein-rich, pork and beef meatballs and marinara sauce over spaghetti‚Äîthe perfect comforting dish, and a big hit with kids.

name: The Greek Salad with Feta
description: Crispy, zesty, tangy greek salad with loads of texture from the fresh vegetables, sweet and pungent flavors from the green olives, and a zippy olive oil dressing. Topped off with crumbled feta and fresh dill and parsley, this is the perfect light and tangy accompaniment for your favorite protein!

name: Pappardelle with Pork Ragu
description: Indulge in the hearty, homestyle flavor and upscale presentation of Chef John's pappardelle with pork ragu. This classic Italian dish features rich pork shoulder, slow-cooked until falling apart-tender with tomatoes, carrots, onions, and celery, creating a rich and robust sauce. The addition of white wine adds depth and complexity to the flavors. Served over wide and silky pappardelle noodles, this comforting meal is sure to satisfy your cravings for a warm and comforting dinner.

name: Spicy Korean Chicken
description: Chef Brandon's Spicy Korean Chicken paired with stir-fried cauliflower rice is a delicious, low-carb dish that combines bold Korean flavors with a healthy twist. The dish starts with tender chicken, marinated in a fiery gochujang sauce made from Korean red chili paste, soy sauce, garlic, ginger, sesame oil, and a touch of honey for balance. The chicken is cooked to perfection, with a caramelized crust and juicy interior, bringing smoky heat and savory depth which gets balanced by the light kimchi cauliflower 'fried rice' and garlicky green beans.

name: Beefy Baked Mac and Cheese
description: This dish is an ode to Chef Chris‚Äô childhood favorite. Hamburger Helper, but made with fresh ingredients, from scratch with a lot of love. Chef slowly renders seasoned ground beef with garlic and onions, then pairs it up with his classic ooey, gooey mac and cheese. Topped off with some Pepper Jack cheese and seasoned bread crumbs and baked off for that perfectly crisp top, and creamy center. This meal will do well in both the microwave or the oven, it just depends on if you prefer the cheese topping more on the crispier side. A tip from Chef Chris: if you go the oven-route, microwaving it for two minutes first cuts down baking time significantly.

name: Tonkotsu Ramen with Chashu Pork Belly
description: Chef Esther's take on a classic Japanese noodle soup. Her version pairs a long-simmered, rich and creamy broth with fresh ramen noodles and sliced tender braised pork belly. Spinach and corn are the finishing touches on this show-stopping, deeply flavorful soup.

name: Malaysian Nasi Lemak Fish
description: Indulge in a classic Malaysian meal of nasi lemak, or coconut milk rice, served with fish marinated in spices, lemongrass, and chili. Anchovy sambal, pickled cucumbers, and a boiled egg complete this extra flavorful meal.

name: Adobo Flank Steak
description: Einat‚Äôs special adobo spice blend is spicy, sweet, and a little smoky. It makes this tender flank steak absolutely irresistible. A cherry tomato vinaigrette with hints of fresh thyme is the perfect tangy accompaniment to cut through rich steak. Paprika-roasted potatoes and broccoli complete this Middle Eastern take on steak and potatoes.

name: Mama Ranas Stuffed Eggplant
description: Chef Ahmet offers a peek into his home kitchen by cooking up one of his signature dishes. Japanese eggplants are smaller and more tender than regular one, and perfect for delicately stuffing with seasoned ground beef. They're then slow-cooked in a tantalizing blend of tomatoes, butter, and aromatic spices and served alongside a fragrant Turkish rice and orzo pilaf. This dish offers a true taste of Turkish home cooking that's sure to satisfy any palate.

name: Grilled Shrimp Bowl
description: Savor the flavors of the land of a thousand smiles with our very own version of the Grilled Shrimp Bowl.

name: Ranchera Style Grilled Skirt Steak
description: Chef Santos takes succulent, tender skirt steak, seasons it 'Ranchera' style with smoky spices, then char-grills it to perfection. Served over a bed of authentic Mexican rice and paired with a simple green salad of nopales (cactus), romaine lettuce, and sliced tomato, this meal is wholesome and well-balanced. On the side, delight in two tasty sauces, each one more delicious than the last: a smoky chile de arbol sauce for the steak and a citrusy lemon vinaigrette for the salad.

name: Berbere Spiced Salmon
description: Combining traditional French ratatouille with a North African twist, this dish is infused with the fragrant blend of herbs de Provence and berbere spice. Complementing the ratatouille is a grilled salmon seasoned with olive oil and berbere spice. The result is a light and flavorful meal that's perfect for an easy weeknight dinner.

name: Tex Mex Salad with Grilled Chicken
description: This salad is packed with delicious ingredients that complement each other! Grilled chicken, black beans, corn, cherry tomatoes, radishes, and grated mozzarella cheese, all on a bed of crisp romaine lettuce. Served with fresh pico de gallo and a creamy cilantro buttermilk ranch dressing to tie this hearty, healthy salad together.

name: Lemon Tilapia
description: The tilapia has a nut flour crust, and comes with some saut√©ed cauliflower and mashed potatoes. The sauce? Lemon butter. It doesn't get any better than this!

name: Guava Bbq Glazed Spare Ribs
description: Craving an indulgent meal that‚Äôs positively packed with flavor? These succulent spare ribs are first rubbed with traditional Jerk spices, generously glazed with tangy-sweet-savory homemade Caribbean guava BBQ sauce, then roasted low and slow until the meat nearly falls off the bone. And with their vinegar and cayenne kick, the braised collard greens that accompany them have so much flavor that you‚Äôd never know they were vegetarian. ‚ÄúI love them not only with our ribs, but pretty much with everything,‚Äù says Chef Bernstein. You‚Äôll love everything about this hearty, satisfying meal, too.

name: Smoky Dill Grilled Shrimp Salad
description: Shrimp salad made healthier with avocado, bacon, and tomatoes. This salad is savory, smoky dill sauce made with ghee.

name: Tomato Basil Cod
description: One of chef Tony's favorite dishes recently. It feels fancy but is very simple and light, making it perfect for warmer weather. The cod is flaky and rich, balanced by aromatic basil and slightly sweet cherry tomatoes. Asparagus round out the dish for a satisfying meal.

name: Cheesy Bolognese Sauced Ravioli
description: Looking for a hearty, satisfying pasta dish that will please almost any palate? Here it is! Let‚Äôs start with those ravioli: Delicate handmade pasta envelops a sumptuous filling of Ricotta, Romano, and Parmesan cheeses, flawlessly balanced to achieve a harmonious blend of creaminess and richness. Next, the robust Bolognese sauce: Chef Sylvia Arevalo pays homage to the heart of Italian cuisine with this savory, meaty blend of ground beef and pork, aromatic vegetables, herbs, tomato, and cream. A sprinkle of Parmesan cheese provides the finishing touch. Each bite is perfect blend of indulgence and culinary craftsmanship. Add a fresh green salad and you‚Äôve got a super-satisfying meal any night of the week.

name: Beet Falafel
description: Served with white warm pita and tahini sauce on the side. This Beetroot falafel is a hit in every home with added chickpea garbazos spiced with different herbs such as coriander, turmeric and onion.

name: Duck and Pork Cassoulet
description: Cassoulet is the ultimate comfort food in the South of France. Chef Cedric prepares his in a traditional style with pork sausage braised with cannellini beans, fresh thyme, white wine, and the piece de resistance‚Äî a confit duck leg. With crispy skin and tender, fall-of-the-bone meat, the duck is just the cherry on top of this delectable dish.

name: Korma Stuffed Sweet Potatoes
description: This Korma Stuffed Sweet Potatoes with a Garlic Tahini Dressing are like heaven! Enjoy your meal with this heavenly dish crafted by Chef Andres using sweet potatoes, with broccoli, zucchini and mushroom.

name: Bbq Spiced Salmon
description: A beautiful filet of salmon that's been seasoned with a smoky BBQ spice rub is roasted to perfection and served alongside potato salad with egg for added protein. The kicked-up potato salad is seasoned with Dijon mustard, dill, lime juice, and piquillo peppers for a tangy twist. Enjoy this flavor-boosted take on summer staple meal.

name: Grilled Ny Strip
description: Grilled all-natural NY strip steak grilled to perfection. Balanced by the distinctive spicy kick of arugula, enhanced by good olive oil and the umami of parmesan-Reggiano.

name: Parmesan Hummus with Veggie Dippers
description: Getting kids excited about healthy snacks isn‚Äôt always easy, but this hummus does the heavy lifting. Chickpeas are blitzed silky smooth with tahini, roasted garlic, lemon, and a cheesy hit of Parmesan. Crisp carrots, celery, and bell peppers act as colorful veggie dippers, turning snack time into a dip, dunk, and devour situation.

name: Chipotle Chicken Tikka
description: Chef Ruben invites you to enjoy two favorite dishes in one with his fusion of chicken tikka masala and smoky chipotle flavors. A bed of rice white rice generously infused with vegetables like zucchini, yellow squash, and Brussels sprouts make a satisfying, healthy complement.

name: Bulgogi Marinated Chicken Baos
description: Chef Fabiola's famous baos are a delicious culinary mashup of Korean BBQ flavors and a Chinese dim sum staple! The steamed buns themselves are soft and plush, and ready to be stuffed to the brim with tender, sweet-and-savory bulgogi marinated chicken. Finish building your baos by topping them off with Chef's Korean-inspired coleslaw and garlicky roasted peanuts for a pop of freshness and crunch. These fun, fusion buns prove you don't need to go an expensive restaurant to try restaurant quality dishes!

name: Soy and Cashew Chicken Lo Mein
description: Sweet and tangy braised chicken meets umami soy-garlic sauce in these flavor-packed Lo Mein noodles. The crunch of the cashews and bites of broccolini give texture to this light yet satisfying dish.

name: Mixed Green Salad
description: This vibrant and refreshing salad offers a delightful blend of textures, from the crisp mixed greens to the crunchy almonds and red bell peppers. Mozzarella pearls add a creamy touch, while a balsamic basil vinaigrette with a hint of honey ties it all together.

name: Chorizo Potato Burrito
description: Burrito Chorizo with Potatoes combines the bold and spicy notes of chorizo with perfectly seasoned potatoes, creating a flavor-packed sensation in a soft flour tortilla. It's a celebration of vibrant Mexican flavors, offering a culinary journey into the heart of traditional Mexican cuisine.

name: Slow Braised Beef Short Rib
description: Experience culinary perfection with Chef Walther's signature braised short ribs, tender and flavorful from hours of slow simmering. The falling apart-tender beef is paired with savory Peruvian beans and fluffy white rice, offering a delightful blend of comfort and sophistication. Each bite promises a rich, melt-in-the-mouth experience. Treat yourself to this exquisite dish!

name: Beef Patty Japanese Curry
description: In this classic Japanese comfort dishes, luscious Japanese-style beef curry pairs perfectly with creamy fingerling potatoes and carrots. A well-seasoned burger patty gets topped with furikake and rich, yet mild Japanese curry sauce, then served atop a bed of fluffy rice. Delight in one of Chef Aarthi's favorite comfort foods at a Japanese izakaya.

name: Mushroom Feta Egg Bites
description: These portable, protein-packed egg bites are a fresh take on a breakfast standby. Made with fresh eggs, they feature fresh kale, tangy feta cheese, and saut√©ed mushrooms, all baked to fluffy perfection. They‚Äôre a wholesome, nutritious way to kick-start your day!

name: Spicy Drunken Noodle Style Linguine with Shrimp
description: Did you know that you don‚Äôt have to use rice noodles for Pad Kee Mao a.k.a. Drunken Noodles? Here, Chef Hong brilliant substitutes in linguine pasta to the same effect. The scent of garlic and Thai chili will hit your nose immediately, accompanied by a sweet aroma from Thai basil and Chef‚Äôs signature Thaimee Love Pad Kee Mao sauce. This modern version of Pad Kee Mao will transport you, and have you ditching takeout for good.

name: Creole Crawfish Etouffee
description: With a name derived from the French word for 'to smother,' √©touff√©e features a rich and hearty crawfish stew, expertly seasoned with authentic Creole spices. Served over a bed of fluffy rice and garnished with chopped parsley, this soul-warming meal is perfect for chilly weather or anytime you need some comfort food.

name: Malbec Braised Short Ribs
description: Short ribs are one of the most luxurious cuts of beef, and here Chef Maia slow-cooks them until fall-apart tender with Malbec red wine and a hint of pur√©ed beets to get that perfect bright color. To complete this rich meal, you'll get a side of garlicky roasted broccoli and rustic, thyme-infused mashed potatoes. Malbec is a flagship wine variety of Argentina and meat is a staple of the country's culinary tradition, making this dish Argentinian through and through.

name: Parm Crusted Chicken Tenders
description: Your ultimate favorite comfort food from childhood, but all grown up. Chicken breast is cut into strips and coated with panko breadcrumbs and parmesan for a crunchy, salty crust. To make it all the more crowd-pleasing, Chef Andres pairs them with roasted green beans, grape tomatoes, and honey‚ÄìDijon mustard for dipping or drizzling.

name: Grilled Hanger Steak with Roasted
description: Perfectly grilled and slightly charred steak. Brushed with olive oil, salt and pepper. This is your new favorite meal with added roasted veggies on the side.

name: Shredded Beef Burrito
description: Chef Santagio serves up an authentic take on one of the most popular Mexican dishes: the beef burrito. Beef is marinated with three types of chiles as well as aromatic Mexican spices, then cooked until pull-apart tender. It's then tucked into a soft flour tortilla alongside spiced Mexican rice, black beans, and queso fresco. Served with a side of classic guacamole, this is the ideal comfort dish, stepped up on a notch.

name: Korean Braised Short Ribs with Rice
description: A labor of love, these Korean-braised beef ribs are slowly cooked in a garlic, soy sauce, and apple marinade. Rich and tender, they‚Äôre served with carrot and daikon atop a bed of fluffy rice, bringing bold yet balanced flavors to this comforting, melt-in-your-mouth dish.

name: Caribbean Chicken Curry Rice
description: This creamy coconutty chicken curry also features onions, carrots, and green bell peppers. Saut√©ed napa cabbage and jasmine rice on the side complete the meal.

name: Creamy Lemon Garlic Chicken
description: A lemony garlic and cream sauce brightens up the entire dish. Simple yet packed with flavor, the chicken really shines in this dish.

name: Branzino Pepes Bakar Bumbu Kuning
description: Tender, mild Branzino fillet is marinated in flavors of kaffir lime and turmeric, then perfectly grilled to lock in all of the flavors. The fish is paired with Chef Abe's delicious coconut and galangal (a cousin of ginger) rice to savor the delicate sauce. This dish is reminiscent of the flavors Chef enjoyed as a child in Indonesia and will surely transport you.

name: Grilled Skirt Steak Creamy Celery Root Puree
description: The title says it all. Simple yet totally delicious, this dish features perfectly seasoned and grilled skirt steak, sliced and served on a bed of a silky pur√©ed celery root. Accompanied by a medley of roasted winter vegetables and topped with an amazing blue cheese compound butter, pour a glass of pinot noir and enjoy a decadent night in.

name: Parmesan Herb Flat Iron Steak
description: This parmesan and herb crusted flat iron steak comes served with a creamy artichoke and spinach gratin and topped with a lemon persillade for a burst of freshness in every bite.

name: Gongju Princess Chicken
description: This regal dish features tender chicken breast stir-fried with fragrant ginger, scallions, onions, garlic, bell peppers, and crisp snap peas, all in a deliciously sweet and savory Korean-style teriyaki sauce. Served with Korean white rice, this is a culinary delight fit for royalty.

name: Ramen Noodles
description: Ramen noodles, spinach, cilantro, put together to make a beautiful bowl of famous Japanese noodles using a tasty flavor of miso pesto.

name: Roasted Salmon Romesco Sauce
description: Meet your next go-to meal. Chef Vanessa gives buttery roasted salmon a super-savory roasted garlic marinade, then sears and finishes it in the oven for maximum moistness. But the fire-roasted red pepper Romesco sauce might just steal the show with a perfect balance of smokiness, heat, and rich nuttiness from its cashew base. On the side: Lemony steamed broccoli and fluffy herbed couscous. Seriously‚Äîthis is kind of flavor-packed meal you‚Äôll want to put on repeat.

name: Japanese Eggplant In Spicy Bean Sauce
description: In this vibrant and flavorful dish, tender seared Japanese eggplant is paired with sweet bell peppers, crunchy baby corn, and aromatic onions and garlic, all tossed in a spicy bean sauce. The dish is served with a side of fragrant Thai fried rice and a lime wedge for garnish.

name: Lemongrass Pork Bun Cha
description: The star of Chef Phet‚Äôs vibrant, Vietnamese-inspired noodle bowl is a tender, succulent ground-pork patty, flavored with umami-rich oyster and fish sauces, garlic, and fragrant fresh lemongrass. But don‚Äôt overlook the supporting players: tangy pickled carrots and cucumbers, shredded kale, fresh cilantro and Thai basil, and crispy fried shallots‚Äîall served atop a swirl of rice vermicelli noodles. Pour on the Nuc Mam (sweet-sour carrot sauce) and dig in to a satisfying meal full of unforgettable flavors.

name: Mexican Style Chorizo Breakfast Burrito
description: Start your day off right with this CookUnity favorite. A classic-style breakfast burrito, it's chock full of soft scrambled eggs, spiced saut√©ed peppers, tender potatoes, and spicy, smoky Mexican chorizo. The whole burrito is griddled to get that perfectly crisped, flaky flour tortilla and served with a side of salsa verde for early morning excellence!

name: Lemon Butter Roasted Salmon
description: A healthy yet satisfying dish of lemon butter salmon, broccoli served atop a bed of short grain rice.

name: Roasted Branzino with Fingerling Potatoes
description: Delight in the flavors of simply roasted branzino accompanied by roasted fingerling potatoes, braised fennel, and green olives. The dish is elevated with the addition of hydrated golden raisins, imparting a subtle touch of sweetness. A perfectly balanced caper sauce enhances the natural flavors of the branzino, while a charred lemon wedge adds a refreshing citrusy zest when squeezed over the top. This harmonious combination of ingredients creates a mouthwatering and well-rounded dining experience.

name: Savory Garlic Mashed Potatoes
description: The velvety richness of Chef John DeLucie's creamy, garlicky mashed potatoes makes them the ideal companion for any meal. Crafted from Yukon Gold potatoes, whole milk, heavy cream, butter, and garlic, they are meticulously prepared then finished with a drizzle of olive oil for a fresh finish. Elevate any dining experience with this delectable side.

name: Slow Roasted Chicken
description: Keep an eye on its glazed vegetable. Have a taste of this fine roasted chicken with its tasty and powerful sauce that you will love.

name: Heart Healthy Prana Shrimp Bowl
description: Treat yourself to a nourishing feast for your body and taste buds with Chef Aarthi's heart-healthy 'Prana' bowl! It features succulent shrimp resting on a bed of vibrant rainbow slaw and a wholesome blend of grains including quinoa, fonio, basmati rice, and millet. Crunchy walnuts add a delightful pop of texture, while Chef's zesty turmeric orange vinaigrette brings a refreshing twist. Inspired by Ayurvedic principles, this dish is simply bursting with color and nutrients.

name: Brazilian Fish Stew
description: Indulge in a South American culinary delight with Chef's special fish stew, a symphony of flavors featuring cumin, coriander, and creamy coconut milk. Served elegantly on a bed of fragrant coconut basmati rice, this dish promises a journey of exotic tastes that will transport you to the heart of South America.

name: Caramelized Onion Goat Cheese Quiche
description: Indulge in a taste of a classic French bistro at your very own kitchen table with this delightful quiche. Chef Miriam's caramelized onion and goat cheese quiche is a flavor-packed delight, featuring a buttery and flaky crust that perfectly complements the fluffy egg filling. Caramelized onions add sweetness and tangy goat cheese adds velvety richness to every bite. All of that goodness is served with lightly dressed mixed green salad to balance out the dish. This quiche is a perfect choice for brunch, lunch, or even a light dinner.

name: Italian Sausage Zoodle Lasagna
description: This is Chef Kristy's take on lasagna, minus the lasagna! Zucchini 'noodles' substitute for pasta here, but make no mistake- this dish is loaded with Italian sausage and all the mozzarella cheese you'd expect in a lasagna. Paired with a side of spinach and cherry tomatoes, this fresh take on a classic is a low-carb lasagna lover's dream!

name: Grilled Tagliata Steak
description: There are few things better in this world than a good piece of meat, cooked simply. Here, it's an all-natural flank steak grilled to perfection, the Italian way. Balanced by the distinctive spicy kick of arugula, enhanced by good olive oil, and the umami of parmesan cheese, this dish proves that sometimes simple is best.

name: Sage Infused Gravy
description: Chef Forgione's gravy is the easiest way to elevate your holiday meal! Deeply savory, he makes his rich gravy with demi-glace and hardy herbs like sage, rosemary, and thyme. Take one less stress out of Turkey day with this side.

name: Cashew Chicken Noir
description: This national dish of Haiti perfectly marries the toasted, nutty flavors of cashews with tender braised chicken. Served with a side of fluffy white rice and sweet plantains, Chef Nahika's version features braised chicken thighs that have been marinated in epis, a Haitian seasoning blend made of fresh herbs, onions, garlic, and sweet and spicy peppers.

name: Steak Tampiquena
description: Tampique√±a meat a well-seasoned grilled steak a cheese enchilada rolled up with some poblano peppers and exquisite rice without a doubt one of my favorite dishes.

name: Red Tuna with Roasted Vegetable
description: Red tuna with Roasted vegetable is a delicious meal crafted by chef Andres Mendez. This dish features a combination of high-quality red tuna paired with a medley of roasted vegetables, providing a nutritious and satisfying meal option.

name: Shio Koji Chicken Bowl
description: These grilled chicken thighs are tender and savory with a subtle sweetness. They come served with a medley of steamed vegetables, rice, furikake, and soy sauce.

name: Classic Shepherds Pie
description: This hearty English classic is a crowd-pleaser for a reason! A hearty, seasoned ground beef filling loaded with vegetables gets topped with buttery whipped potatoes and cheddar cheese for the perfect finishing touch. This is comfort food excellence, elevated with high-quality ingredients and restaurant-level techniques.

name: Southwestern Chicken Salad
description: Chicken breast on a bed of avocado, tomatoes and black beans. It also has crisp radishes and peppery arugula.

name: Chicken Thighs with Scallion Cream
description: These roasted chicken thighs are delicious all on their own, but taken over the top when paired up with Chef Maia's luscious, tangy scallion cream sauce. Plus, the chicken comes with two of the most comforting side dishes: classic peas and carrots, and rosemary-infused roasted baby potatoes. A filling, family-friendly meal to enjoy any time of the year.

name: Avocado Chicken Tacos
description: Mojo chicken with zesty sauce for tacos. The fragrant mix of orange, lime, and other herbs and spices to make an excellent match for pulled and shredded chicken. Roll it over crunchy corn tortillas with black beans.

name: Iskender Style Strip Steak
description: A modern take on Iskender kebabs, here Chef Ahmet pairs a perfectly grilled New York strip steak with the traditional toppings: a flavorful tomato sauce, garlic-infused brown butter, and a dollop of yogurt. Served alongside creamy mashed red jacket potatoes and blistered shishito peppers, this is a unique dish that will keep you coming back for more.

name: Zesty Greek Pasta Salad
description: Bursting with bold Mediterranean flavors, Chef Vincent‚Äôs summery, veggie-packed pasta salad makes a hearty meal in and of itself or a perfect side for grilled meats. He combines al dente farfalle pasta with refreshing cucumbers, tangy cherry tomatoes, sweet bell peppers, creamy Feta cheese, and briny capers and olives in a zesty oregano-infused vinaigrette.

name: Sweet Spicy Pork
description: Tenderly roasted pork with a sweet and spicy sauce, paired with fluffy Basmati rice. A high-protein, gluten-free dish that's packed with flavor.

name: Soy Ginger Salmon with Noodles
description: This dish was inspired by a noodle cart at the Yaowarat night market in Bangkok's Chinatown. Tender salmon is braised to perfection in a sweet and savory ginger-soy sauce and served with noodles and baby bok choy. More ginger, scallions, and a Thai chili vinaigrette packed the dish with bold, balanced flavors. This dish is guaranteed to make any ordinary day feel a bit more vibrant.

name: Greek Rice Bowl with Lemon Shrimp
description: Savor a fully loaded bowl that brings all the flavors of the Mediterranean to your table, and in minutes. Cherry tomatoes, cucumbers, kalamata olives, pickled red onions, feta cheese, and fresh dill sit on a bed of aromatic basmati rice alongside perfectly seared shrimp. To finish, Chef Dustin adds his take on a tzatziki yogurt sauce as well as a Greek vinaigrette to dress the bowl. Easy, delicious, and nutritious, this bowl is an easy crowd-pleaser and ideal for lunch or dinner.

name: Roasted Red Pepper Frittata
description: Tender and delicious slow-cooked potatoes. Light and simple meal.

name: Vietnamese Grilled Chicken
description: Chef Chase starts with juicy, tender chicken thighs marinated in zesty lime and tangy, umami-rich fish sauce, then grills them for smoky flavor and serves them over steamed jasmine rice, garnished with fresh cilantro leaves and diced red peppers. On the side: A pile of spicy pickled cucumber, carrot, daikon radish, and jalape√±o, delivering an irresistible combination of refreshing crispness and kick. Super-satisfying and bursting with bright flavors, this meal will be a regular on your summer rotation.

name: Ny Strip Steak Au Poivre
description: Indulge in the seductive flavors of steak au poivre, a classic French dish featuring a succulent New York strip. The perfectly seared steak is served with creamy, brandy-laced peppercorn pan sauce, offering a bold and rich complement to the tender, juicy beef. Served atop silky, garlic mashed potatoes, this elegant dish is sure to elevate any weeknight.

name: Spicy Ground Pork Noodles
description: Let Chef's Nora's spicy pork noodles be your new food addiction! A garlicky, buttery, and spicy ground pork sauce carries the perfect balance of umami and heat that will keep you coming back bite after bite. Tossed with perfectly cooked noodles and garnished with fresh green onions & toasted white sesame seeds, this dish is endlessly craveable!

name: Classic Salad Nicoise
description: A classic French salad originating from the city of Nice. Chef Ludo's version stays true to tradition, with lots of fresh veggies and high-quality tuna that has been cured in olive oil. A bed of mixed greens is topped with carefully arranged green beans, cherry tomatoes, Kalamata olives, radishes, and hard-boiled eggs. A classic vinaigrette brings the whole salad together, making it the ideal hearty lunch or light dinner.

name: Grilled Chicken Kale Caesar
description: A grilled, marinated chicken breast is a simple but delicious comfort, especially when served over a crowd-pleasing Caesar salad. This one is made with thinly sliced, tender kale, homemade Italian croutons, and creamy Caesar dressing. This pairing is a family favorite and will quickly become your easy go-to lunch or dinner any day of the week.

name: Soba Maitake
description: This is a healthy version of a ramen. Featuring maitake mushrooms, japanese style noodles in a tasty soy broth.

name: Pea Pancetta Tortellini En Brodo
description: A light and refreshing Italian dish! Pea and pancetta tortellini with cannellini beans and wood-roasted Italian plum tomatoes.

name: Kerala Beef Stew
description: The braised Kerala beef dish is a fragrant coconut milk-based curry. It is truly a complete one-dish meal, a traditional Jewish brisket recipe that you will surely love.

name: Cajun Seared Shrimp and Orzo Salad
description: Cajun-style seared shrimp are here to spice up your weeknight! Served with a tangy, creamy remoulade sauce, a bright orzo salad, and thinly sliced fennel salad, the flavors of this dish will truly awaken your palate. This delicious dish is best enjoyed cold, though if you prefer it warm, Chef Dustin recommends just heating the shrimp; the other elements are best served chilled.

name: Kale Caesar Salad with Grilled Chicken
description: Chef Tracey gives the classic Caesar salad a leafy refresh, swapping romaine for baby kale to bring a heartier bite. It‚Äôs coated in a creamy dressing, tossed with golden croutons, and topped with grilled chicken breast for a protein-packed kick. A sprinkle of shaved parmesan ties everything together.

name: Green Zhug Curry with Tofu
description: Zhug is a spicy Yemenite condiment made with jalape√±o, coriander, cumin, garlic and tons of fresh cilantro, which makes it the perfect addition to spice up fragrant green curry. This vegetarian silky curry is infused with cardamom and kaffir lime and served over snow peas, snap peas, and tofu, and served alongside coconut-scented Basmati rice. Topped with more fresh jalape√±o slices and a sprinkle of umami-filled furikake, this is the perfect dish for plant-based heat seekers!

name: Juicy Scallion Chicken with Fresh Spring Noodles
description: Juicy poached chicken thighs are gently flavored with fragrant scallion-infused oil, then served up with spring noodles and fresh yu choy, a variety of Chinese broccoli. Light and fresh, and perfect for warmer weather!

name: Ginger Scallion Chicken Bowl
description: Chef Hong‚Äôs Ginger Scallion Chicken Bowl features tender roasted chicken paired with an irresistible, aromatic ginger-scallion sauce. Served over a hearty blend of quinoa and rice with a side of saut√©ed bok choy, this bowl is both nourishing and delicious. It's a crowd-pleasing bowl you'll turn to week after week.

name: Rigatoni with Pesto
description: Chef Tracey's rigatoni with peas and pesto is a vibrant dish full with comforting and familiar flavors. It features al dente rigatoni pasta tossed with sweet peas and a flavorful pesto sauce made from basil, garlic, pine nuts, and parmesan cheese. It's an Italian springtime classic that's sure to satisfy any time of day, all year round.

name: Chickpea Feta Power Bowl
description: Dive into a wholesome bowl full of Middle Eastern-inspired goodness. Roasted chickpeas, tahini-roasted cauliflower, roasted tomatoes, and tender saut√©ed zucchini are plated on a bed of baby kale and pearl couscous. Finished with creamy feta cheese and bright zhoug, a spicy cilantro sauce, this nutritious meal proves eating healthy can taste incredible.

name: Thai Red Curry with Shrimp Crab
description: Panang curry is a popular variation of Thai red curry and is known for being a rich curry with a lightly sweet and tangy flavor. It gets its signature flavor from familiar ingredients like coconut milk and fish sauce, but with the addition of aromatics like dried red chilies, shallot, garlic, lemongrass, galangal, cumin seed, coriander seed and kaffir lime leaves. Chef Stacy pairs this satisfying curry with rich seafood like tender shrimp and lump crab, as well as sweet bell peppers. It's served with a side of steamed rice so you can savor every spoonful of the flavorful curry.

name: Grilled Miso Flat Iron Steak
description: Flat iron steak is marinated in an umami-filled miso sauce, then grilled to perfection. The steak is accompanied by a medley of roasted veggies including asparagus, carrots, potatoes, and cauliflower, plus a side of steamed rice to round out the meal. Bright and herbaceous chimichurri sauce ties the whole dish together in perfect harmony!

name: Chinoise Salad Chinese Chicken Salad
description: Chef Ludo's French version of a Chinese-American chicken salad is a special that has been off and on the menu at Petit Trois for many years. His take on the classic salad marries shredded chicken, carrots, romaine lettuce, napa cabbage, and fresh lettuce with a creamy Asian vinaigrette. Toasted peanuts provide the perfect crunch, keeping you coming back for bite after bite!

name: Chicken Asado Burrito
description: Tasty, juicy, grilled chicken marinated in achiote-lime is the heart of this satisfying burrito, which also has black beans, jasmine rice with peas and carrots, and shredded cheese. A side of charred tomato-serrano salsa adds an extra kick.

name: Chicken Mozzarella Katsu
description: Crispy Panko-coated fried chicken, melty Mozzarella cheese, sweet and savory Tonkatsu sauce...what‚Äôs not to love about Chef Sergio‚Äôs version of this modern Japanese favorite? But wait, there‚Äôs more! On the side: Steamed rice and a salad of raw cabbage and carrot with sweet chili sauce, offering a refreshing crunch and a burst of color to balance out the richness of the chicken and cheese. Enjoy each individual component, or stir it all together for a rice bowl packed with textures and flavors.

name: Harissa Grilled Shrimp Bowl
description: Plump shrimp, kissed by the grill and coated in a harissa-honey glaze, land on a vibrant mix of saffron-hued rice, crisp kale, tangy pickled onions, and creamy feta. Two bold sauces‚Äîherby tzatziki-style yogurt and a fiery harissa vinaigrette‚Äîtie it all together.

name: Tomato Strawberry Gazpacho
description: Even if you‚Äôve had gazpacho before, you‚Äôve never had it quite like this. Fresh strawberries add distinctive sweetness to Chef Einat‚Äôs take on the beloved staple of Spanish cuisine. She blends them with raw and roasted tomatoes, zesty garlic, a touch of jalape√±o, fresh thyme, extra-virgin olive oil, and balsamic vinegar, which adds a different kind of tangy sweetness, topped with crisp cucumber and red onion. The cool, refreshing result is perfect for a hot summer day. And you don‚Äôt even have to turn on the oven or microwave to enjoy this meal‚Äîjust sip straight from the fridge.

name: Jerked Blackened Chicken Rasta Pasta
description: This rich and spicy penne pasta is a delicious combination of Italian-American and Jamaican cuisines. The creamy pasta is tossed with Jamaican-style jerk chicken and sauteed bell peppers. This dish is both comforting and full of flavor!

name: Pomegranate Glazed Carrots with Pistachio Dukkah
description: Lemon zest and pepper roasted carrots are tossed in sweet-tart pomegranate molasses and served with a side of pistachio dukkah, an Egyptian topping made from toasted coriander and cumin seeds crushed with roasted pistachios and sesame seeds. This great springtime side also comes with a tangy lemon herb vegan yogurt sauce.

name: Mongolian Salmon
description: The Mongolian Salmon is a simple but well-balanced dish with salmon, bok choy, and rice. A delicious sweet-savory sauce coats the tender salmon.

name: Fish Tacos
description: Enjoy this classic Mexican meal with a twist! It's healthier with tilapia.

name: Curry Madras Salmon
description: Savor the succulent roasted salmon marinated with salt and turmeric and served in a delicious curry sauce. Roasted garlicky broccoli and steamed Jasmine rice complete the meal.

name: Middle Eastern Mezze Platter
description: Dig into a Middle Eastern mezze platter with some of Chef Einat's best bites. Her curated mezze includes dolmas (stuffed grape leaves) topped with spiced tomato sauce, creamy homemade hummus sprinkled with sumac, marinated Kalamata and Castelvetrano olives, chirchi pickled veggies, and a side of fluffy pita bread to dip. It's the ideal snacking plate or light meal.

name: Cheese Enchiladas In Beef Ancho Chile Sauce
description: Savor one of Chef Maribel's specialties: her decadent, comforting enchiladas. This Tex-Mex take on the classic dish pairs corn tortillas‚Äî hand dipped in sizzling oil and filled with melty pepper jack cheese‚Äîwith a rich beef and Ancho chile sauce to smother atop the enchiladas. On the side, traditional red rice and creamy charro beans complete the dish. Top with crema fresca to a light, refreshing note to each rich bite.

name: Hibiscus Sorrel Wings
description: Chef Miriam's hibiscus sorrel chicken wings are unlike any other wings you've had before. The wings are marinated in a spiced hibiscus (sorrel) sauce, which gives them a striking red hue and a uniquely tangy sweet-tart flavor with just a hint of heat from sweet Thai chili sauce. Baked to perfection, the wings are juicy and fall-off-the-bone tender. Served with a extra side of hibiscus sauce to dip, it's a refreshing twist on a comforting classic.

name: Penne with Turkey Bolognese
description: A healthier take on classic Italian cooking bolognese. Ground turkey is simmered in a robust tomato sauce with Chef Dustin's secret ingredient, chile de arbol, which adds a slight hint of smokiness. The hearty bolognese sauce is served over al dente penne pasta with a sprinkling of parmesan for the perfect finish!

name: Gingerbread Cake Jar
description: Our holiday gingerbread cake jar is filled with layers of our gingerbread cake filled with fresh ginger, cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves- all your favorite holiday flavors, and is paired with our whipped cream cheese frosting- adding another level of texture and flavor. The frosting is adorned with a cute gingerbread figure for an added touch of seasonal fun!

name: Grilled Skirt Steak Celery Root Puree
description: The title says it all. Simple yet totally delicious, this dish features perfectly seasoned and grilled skirt steak, sliced and served on a bed of a silky pur√©ed celery root. Accompanied by a medley of roasted winter vegetables and topped with an amazing blue cheese compound butter, pour a glass of pinot noir and enjoy a decadent night in.

name: Chicken Madras Curry
description: This dish was inspired by Chef Aarthi's grandma's chicken curry. Delicious and fragrant, the traditional Tamil South Indian curry features a rich coconut base and tender chicken thighs. Served with a side of aromatic jasmine rice and garlicky broccoli, this curry brings a little taste of Chef Aarthi's home to your table.

name: Chicken and Veggie Patties
description: If you‚Äôre a fan of turkey burgers, then you‚Äôll love these chicken patties‚Äîa lighter, healthier approach. Chef Tony mixes ground chicken, sun-dried tomatoes, goat cheese, and basil to make these delicious patties. Garlicky-rosemary potatoes on the side round out this crowd-pleasing meal.

name: Grass Fed Southwest Burger
description: Southwestern flare on the American classic with roasted sweet potatoes, very fresh. You'll love it!

name: Portobello Veggie Burrito
description: Savor a jam-packed burrito with poblano peppers, portobello mushrooms, red bell peppers, onions, black beans, and jasmine rice infused with peas and carrots ‚Äî all in a buttered spinach tortilla. Even better with a side of tomatillo salsa!

name: Salisbury Steak Mushroom Gravy
description: Homey and comforting, Chef Kevin‚Äôs upgraded take on this American classic evokes nostalgia in every bite. He seasons and sears tender beef patties then smothers them with a rich Crimini mushroom gravy, which gets extra savory depth from veal demi-glace. Paired with creamy Yukon Gold mashed potatoes and garnished with fresh chives, this is more than a meal‚Äîit‚Äôs a hearty embrace of home cooked classics, elevated with chef know-how.

name: Lemongrass Pork
description: Vietnamese lemongrass pork loin with rice noodles, peanuts, pickled carrot and daikon and nuoc cham.

name: Tlacuallis Fajita Steak Cheese Tacos
description: These tacos take Chef Santiago back to Mexico City, where his favorite street food was always steak alambres tacos. Lucky for us, he's recreated this beloved dish alongside Chef Ruben for CookUnity. These comforting tacos feature marinated and grilled steak with fajita-style saut√©ed veggies, all topped with melted mozzarella cheese and a creamy habanero salsa on top and a good spicy sauce. Paired with rice and beans, it has just enough spice and heat to keep you coming back for bite after flavorful bite.

name: Falafel Crusted Baked Salmon
description: Chef Michael‚Äôs delightful fusion of Middle Eastern flavors features a succulent, buttery baked salmon fillet coated in a crispy, herbaceous falafel crust. On the side: A colorful array of roasted vegetables, all perfectly caramelized and tender. Drizzle on the rich, creamy tahini sauce for delicious depth of savory, nutty flavor. (If you have some pita chips handy, it makes a great dip, too.) This is the kind of creative, well-crafted meal you‚Äôll remember‚Äîand repeat.

name: Ethic Drinks Sustainable Malbec
description: A bold red varietal known for its rich, full-bodied flavor. Expect notes of black cherry and a hint of spice, balanced by well-structured tannins. Committed to sustainability, Ethic Drinks keeps it clean‚Äîsustainably made, bottled in lightweight glass, and packed with recycled materials.

name: Jerk Lamb Chops with Sweet Potato Grits
description: Chef April brings serious island heat to these jerk-spiced lamb chops, coating them in a fiery blend of Scotch bonnet peppers, allspice, and fragrant spices before charring them on the grill. The spice is tamed by tangy-sweet kale, while creamy sweet potato grits round out the plate with a rich, buttery finish.

name: Old Bay Crab Mac Cheese
description: Fresh crab meat is the perfect way to add a little luxury to a simple meal like macaroni and cheese. Even better topped with crunchy, lemony breadcrumbs!

name: Roasted Eggplant with Parmesan
description: Chef Chris wanted to come up with a healthier alternative to the deep-fried eggplant you typically see on Italian menus, but without sacrificing any of the flavor. He decided on simply roasted thin slices of seasoned eggplant, layered Napoleon-style with hand-sliced fresh mozzarella, and served with fresh roasted tomato sauce.

name: Middle Eastern Marinated Chicken Shawarma
description: Shawarma spices are a classic Middle Eastern mix and perfect with grilled chicken. Accompanied with Israeli couscous, caramelized onions, sweet and sour pickled cabbage, and a bright and tangy aioli flavored with Amba, a spicy pickled mango condiment popular in the Middle East.

name: Sole Croquettes
description: Baked sole covered with coconut flour formed into patties then seared. Sweet potato salad mixed with roasted red pepper is served with croquettes. Add a fresh element of tossed collard greens, dates, red cabbage with lemon chive vinaigrette.

name: Chicken with Fennel Gremolata
description: Thin slices of chicken breast wrapped and pounded until its tender. Seasoned with salt and pepper and grilled in a pan. Top it off with flavorful rosemary, arugula, bell peppers, cherry tomatoes, cucumber and a drizzle of extra virgin olive oil and homemade balsamic dressing.

name: Chicken In Mole Poblano
description: One of Chef Jose's most-loved meals! It features tender chicken breast slathered in a richly spiced mole poblano sauce. Served over a bed of textured rice with sweet corn kernels and agave-glazed Brussels sprouts, this dish is bursting with nuanced flavors.

name: Coconut Chia Breakfast Bowl
description: A heavenly‚Äîand healthy‚Äîway to start the day! Wholesome, nutrient-packed chia seeds are swirled with rich, creamy coconut milk, delicately sweetened with honey, then adorned with fresh blueberries, toasted pepitas, shredded coconut, and a light dusting of fennel pollen for an earthy, herbaceous flavor note. This hearty bowl not only keeps you feeling full and satisfied, but it also offers sustained energy that will keep you powered all the way to‚Äîor even through‚Äîlunch.

name: Spicy Kung Pao Sesame Chicken
description: A modern take on American Chinese food, Chef Mike combines crispy sesame chicken with flavorful Kung Pao sauce. This dish is savory, sweet, fragrant, sour, spicy, and numbing, with a burst of traditional Chinese flavors. The irresistibly crispy chicken is served on a bed of Calrose rice and paired with tender yu choy.

name: Salmon Burger
description: Chef John presents a perfectly cooked salmon patty flavored with red and yellow peppers, dill, and garlic on a plush potato bun with fresh gem lettuce, tomato, and red onion. Simply irresistible with some Sriracha aioli and crispy curly fries on the side!

name: Thai Green Curry with Eggplant
description: Thai green curry is ready to satisfy any and all cravings for spicy food! You'll savor every spoonful of coconut milk-based green curry infused with lots of aromatic herbs and even more fresh Thai Basil. This nourishing curry is the perfect blank canvas for any protein, but this version features a medley of vegetables including sauteed eggplant, bell peppers, onions, and bamboo shoots. Served with a side of steamed jasmine rice, this dish is sure to spice up your routine!

name: German Kielbasa Sausage Plate
description: Treat yourself to rich, authentic old-world flavors with Chef Jason and Corey‚Äôs hearty German Kielbasa Sausage Plate. Savor every bite of juicy roasted pork kielbasa, bursting with smoky, garlicky goodness. It‚Äôs perfectly paired with two sides: tangy Warm Potato Salad, made the traditional German way with vinegar and bacon; and tender Braised Red Cabbage, naturally sweetened with Granny Smith apples. Super-satisfying and totally transporting, the only thing this meal will leave you wanting is more. Prost!

name: Strawberry Shortcake Jar
description: Layers of moist vanilla cake, fresh strawberries, whipped cream, and strawberry cream cheese buttercream topped with cute decorative heart sprinkles. Celebrate Valentine‚Äôs Day with this delicious treat.

name: Indian Butter Shrimp Curry
description: Chef Meena‚Äôs luxurious twist on classic butter chicken offers the same rich, creamy, and mildly spiced tomato-based sauce, but with succulent, juicy shrimp. They‚Äôre marinated in yogurt, garlic, ginger, and aromatic spices, then grilled and simmered in a luscious sauce made from butter, cream, and tomatoes infused with the deep flavors of garam masala, cumin, and fenugreek leaves. Perfectly balanced between creamy and tangy, this dish pairs beautifully with the accompanying pea and carrot Basmati rice pilaf.

name: Rainbow Power Salad
description: So colorful, so good. Enjoy this beautiful textured colorful food in a bowl. There's so much good going on in here. Indulge!

name: Greek Herbed Meatballs
description: Chef Einat's meatballs will ruin all other meatballs for you. The beef meatballs are tender and packed with herbs like mint, oregano and parsley, and pair perfectly with a creamy tzatziki sauce on the side. Blistered cherry tomatoes add sweetness to the plate, which is made complete with a side of fried shallot-topped spiced pearl couscous. Enjoy a comforting, well-rounded taste of the Mediterranean.

name: Morning Glory Muffins
description: Chef Akhtar‚Äôs delectable Morning Glory muffins are a perfect on-the-go breakfast fuel or power-through-the-afternoon snack. These lightly sweet treats are packed with nutrients, fiber, and flavor, thanks to the combination of Honeycrisp apples, carrots, and golden raisins. Warm them up and savor the fragrant aroma of cinnamon and vanilla that fills your kitchen.

name: Baked Swai In Cajun Pan Sauce
description: Chef Andres is serving up a little taste of Louisiana! Perfectly baked Swai fish‚Äîa type of catfish‚Äîis tender and flaky in the center, but has a nice crisp finish thanks to a crust of Cajun spices. Served with a buttery Cajun pan sauce that adds richness, the dish is made complete by garlicky kale (standing in for the traditional collard greens), as well as saut√©ed zucchini and bell peppers. This dish proves you can have nutritious, well-balanced meals without sacrificing on flavor.

name: Tuscan Shrimp with Creamy Basil Sauce
description: Warning‚Äîthese shrimp may have your family wondering if you hired an Italian chef. Inspired by the hills of Tuscany, tender shrimp are smothered in a rich, buttery, and basil-infused cream sauce. Pair them with pasta, risotto, or simply grilled veggies for the easiest dinner ever and mangia!

name: Grilled Tofu Barley Sunshine Bowl
description: Indulge in a vibrant symphony of flavors with our exquisite bowl of vegetarian goodness. It features a base of nutty, tender barley, plus marinated cherry tomatoes and zesty, spicy marinated cucumbers. Elevating this culinary masterpiece is Hungry House's signature backyard BBQ-spiced grilled tofu, perfectly infused with smoky, savory goodness. Drizzle on basil-mint vinaigrette to add a burst of herbaceous freshness to every bite‚Äîthis dish just tastes like sunshine.

name: Pats Beef Short Ribs Bourguignon
description: Pat likes to use short ribs to amplify this classic, French beef stew. The tender, beefy short ribs are slow cooked in red wine and served over a bed of creamy mashed potatoes.

name: Grilled Asian Hanger Steak with Charred Broccolini
description: Tender hanger steak is marinated with sweet-and-savory Asian flavors then grilled to perfection, allowing the sugars in the marinade to caramelize and slightly char. The steak is served on a bed of steamed coconut rice made with a blend of Jasmine rice and Korean black rice, plus a side of charred broccolini for balance. The dish is finished with a bright and robust green onion relish that brings together all the flavors in perfect harmony.

name: Valdemacuco Blanco Rioja
description: A fresh and vibrant Rioja white blend of Viura, Malvas√≠a, and Tempranillo Blanco. Crisp pear, stone fruit, and citrus meet delicate floral and herbal notes. Bright and smooth on the palate, with balanced acidity and a lingering finish. A lively, elegant sip.

name: Shrimp Moilee Coconut Curry Curry Leaf Rice
description: Wholesome, creamy, fresh and flavorful, this coconut based shrimp curry is a crowd-pleasing South Indian dish. Plump shrimp are marinated in turmeric and spices, then gently cooked in a mild coconut milk broth flavored with curry leaves, ginger, mustard seeds, tamarind and more. The shrimp are served with a side of sweet-tart chutney made of tomato and peppers that provides acidic balance for the rich curry, plus fragrant curry leaf rice to soak up all that delicious broth.

name: Spinach Sweet Potato Farro Salad
description: This colorful and hearty salad from Chef Pierre combines a bounty of fresh flavors. Tender roasted sweet potatoes sit atop a bed of baby spinach and nutty farro alongside crumbled feta cheese, cherry tomatoes, fresh dill, and roasted cashews sprinkled with Suya seasoning. A bright lemon vinaigrette ties it all together in tangy harmony.

name: Vegan Sausage Peppers
description: Chef John's vegan take on a classic sausage and peppers packs all the same comfort as the original. Plant-based sausages are paired with saut√©ed peppers and onions and a side of marinara sauce, then served alongside couscous and broccoli rabe. The delicious and hearty plant-based dish captures the essence of classic Italian comfort cooking.

name: Fish Taco and Pistachio Mole
description: 3 Fish tacos with garlic mojo marinade, pistachio salsa and smoky chipotle mayo.

name: Four Cheese Ravioli with Cherry Tomatoes Spinach
description: Craving a big bowl of cheesy pasta? Then you‚Äôll love Chef Nelson‚Äôs homemade four cheese raviolis. They‚Äôre topped with delicious everything: saut√©ed spinach, cherry tomatoes, lots of garlic and herbs ‚Äî plus butter and freshly grated parmesan for a luxurious, creamy finish.

name: Maple Miso Roasted Cod
description: A perfect balance of umami from miso and sweetness from maple syrup flavor a tender, flaky filet of roasted cod. Served with fluffy, garlic-infused steamed rice, saut√©ed shiitake mushrooms, and grilled asparagus, this meal is wholesome and nutritious without sacrificing on flavor.

name: Caribbean Baked Chicken Breast
description: Coated with different spices and sweet breading, topped with pineapple and lime juice. This paleo baked chicken will give you the Caribbean feels right at your doorstep.

name: Beef Burgundy Whipped Potatoes
description: Chef Kevin‚Äôs take on this hearty French bistro classic provides a perfect lesson in culinary craftsmanship, illustrating how simple ingredients cooked with care become greater than the sum of their parts. First, the beef: Chef Kevin carefully sears each cube of chuck to lock in flavor, then braises them low and slow with onions, carrots, and aromatic herbs in a rich red wine and beef stock sauce until they‚Äôre fork-tender. He ladles that succulent combination over a bed of fluffy, buttery whipped Yukon Gold potatoes and serves it alongside crispy roasted Brussels sprouts, all garnished with a sprinkling of fresh chives. The combination manages to be comforting, indulgent, and elegant all at the same time. Add a warm, crusty baguette and your kitchen table just got transported to Paris for the night.

name: Spiced Winter Squash Chestnut Soup
description: This velvety non-dairy soup features a base of acorn and butternut squash for a silky smooth texture and lightly sweet flavor that's perfectly complemented by warm, aromatic spices like allspice and nutmeg. Roasted chestnuts, rich crispy shallots, and roasted garlic round out the soup, adding layers of flavor. Each spoonful promises a symphony of flavors that's sure to warm the soul.

name: Spice Roasted Nuts
description: Chef Akhtar takes snacking up a notch with this trio of walnuts, almonds, and peanuts, golden-roasted in maple syrup, fragrant rosemary, and a flicker of cayenne heat. Whether enjoyed straight from the jar, tossed into a salad, or adding crunch to a charcuterie board, this sweet-savory mix is endlessly versatile.

name: Jackfruit Tinga Empanadas
description: Slow simmered onions and jackfruit in a chipotle and garlic sauce, enveloped in a tasty carrot dough.

name: Chilled Soba Noodles Poached Shrimp
description: In Japan, cold soba noodles with dipping sauce are a refreshing and quintessential summer dish. Here, Chef Mike adds tender poached shrimp alongside a traditional, marinated cucumber salad, known as sunomono. His tsuyu, or dipping sauce, is infused with yuzu and lemon, bringing a citrusy contrast to the earthy buckwheat soba.

name: Chicken Mole Enchiladas
description: Mole is the star of this dish and it's not hard to see why! A festival of flavors and textures, Chef Santiago's mole sauce strikes the perfect balance of sweet, spicy, smoky, and nutty. Chef's handmade mole sauce is paired with juicy chicken thighs and soft corn tortillas to form savory enchiladas. Served with a mix of rice, corn, peas & carrots, plus a small side dessert of chocolate flan, this meal is a taste of traditional Mexican home cooking.

name: Coastal Slow Baked Chicken with Garlic Spinach Potatoes
description: Packed with flavors of paprika and lime juice for a zesty kick. Baking it on top of a bed of spinach drizzled with dill sauce.

name: Chicken Korma Wrap
description: Enjoy the bold flavors of one of your go-to Indian dishes, in a convenient on-the-go package. Chef Miguel's Chicken Korma wrap features tender chicken enveloped in a creamy, coconut Korma sauce, as well as spinach, cashews, and raisins all in a griddled flour tortilla.
