Paired with masala-seasoned, roasted veggies that offer a perfect blend of warmth and spice, and finished with a cooling drizzle of mint raita sauce, this wrap delivers a delightful fusion flavors in every bite.

name: Souvlaki Style Pork
description: Dive into Chef Jona's take on the world-famous Souvlaki, also known as 'little skewers'. Tender pork shoulder is marinated in yogurt and fresh herbs and then grilled, creating those extra-delicious, perfectly charred bits. Served alongside grilled veggies and Greek-seasoned smashed potatoes with greens, plus a side of tomato sauce to dip, this is the ultimate Greek feast.

name: Egg Chorizo Quesadilla
description: Savor the perfection of pork chorizo saut√©ed with onions, combined with creamy scrambled eggs, and a generous topping of Monterey Jack cheese. On the side a smoky red pepper crema, made from roasted red peppers, sour cream, lime juice, garlic, and a blend of smoked and sweet paprika, it's a flavor explosion in every bite.

name: Cheesy Beef Pepper Bowl
description: A deconstructed version of stuffed peppers converted into a hearty, protein-fueled bowl that doesn‚Äôt hold back on flavor. Sizzling fajita-style peppers and onions, spiced ground beef with chili, cumin, and oregano, and fiber-rich black beans come together over flavorful basmati rice. A tangy tomato sauce adds richness, while melted mozzarella delivers the ultimate comfort factor.

name: Miso Marinated Cod
description: Delicate cod marinated for 24 hours with the rich umami-forward flavor of miso, then roasted to perfection. Served alongside a side of garlicky, spicy saut√©ed bok choy and accompanied by classic steamed white rice, it's a harmonious blend of textures and tastes that will have you coming back for bite after bite.

name: Mango Chicken
description: This mango chicken is served over coconut cauliflower. It‚Äôs whole 30 approved and paleo friendly too!

name: Sliced Bistro Steak with Glazed Peas and Carrots
description: Is there anything more American than a prime piece of beef served with steak sauce and a side of peas and carrots? We didn't think so either! Bistro Steak is a tender cut of beef that comes from the front shoulder. With many similar qualities to a New York strip steak it's no wonder this cut has been an industry secret for years! Chef Pat always serves his sliced, and here it pairs perfectly with glazed carrots and sweet peas. This simple dinner hits the spot any night of the week!

name: Chive Butter Salmon
description: Enjoy this herbaceous and light salmon dressed with creamy chive compound butter, and a bright medley of roasted vegetables.

name: Caesar Salad with Salmon
description: For snappy salad that draws a crowd, here's a classic fave caesar salads with salmon on the side.

name: Plant Based Chickn Milanese Piccata
description: The Gardein Chick'n cutlet is expertly breaded with crispy panko, creating a delightful crunch. It is then smothered in a zesty piccata sauce infused with lemon, herbs, and capers, adding a burst of tangy goodness. Served alongside fluffy smashed potatoes and vibrant green beans almondine, this plant-based dish offers a satisfying combination of textures and flavors. Indulge in this guilt-free meal that showcases the versatility and deliciousness of plant-based cuisine.

name: Falafel Burger
description: This veggie version of burger hits the spot loaded with fiber and protein. Pulled together in a flash with canned chickpeas and spices. Top with tahini dressing.

name: Spicy Peruvian Shrimp Chowder
description: Peruvian aji panca and Amarillo chiles bring gentle warmth and gorgeous golden-red color to Chef Walther‚Äôs spin on classic New England seafood chowder. The soup starts, naturally, with aromatic vegetables and potatoes saut√©ed in butter. From there, Chef Walther adds unexpected touches, like yellow squash, fresh corn, peas, and red bell pepper, along with plump, succulent shrimp. But it‚Äôs the peppers, infused in full-bodied shrimp stock, that give this dish its truly memorable flavor‚Äîsweet, berry-like, and lightly smoky, with a mild heat level that only adds to the comforting quality. Break out of a lunch or dinner rut with this one‚Äîit‚Äôs unforgettable.

name: Creamy Spinach
description: Creamed spinach is a classic steakhouse favorite, crafted with care and precision by Chef Chris Ratel. This sumptuous dish features tender baby spinach combined with Chef Ratel's signature b√©chamel sauce. To elevate the flavors, he adds grated parmesan cheese for savory depth. This add-on is ideal alongside steak or any simply grilled protein‚Äîit's sure to make any weeknight dinner feel infinitely more elegant.

name: Grilled Skirt Steak Tampiquena
description: This is Chef Ivy's take on carne a la tampique√±a, a Mexican dish which pairs delectable carne asada (grilled steak) with an enchilada and refried beans. Here, tender skirt steak is marinated for 24 hours in a chili spice rub then grilled to perfection. For her own spin, Chef Ivy serves it with a goat cheese-stuffed enchilada, refried pinto beans, and mashed avocado. This meal offers a modern yet authentic taste on Mexican cuisine that's perfectly balanced and endlessly comforting.

name: Chicken Parmigiana with Spaghetti
description: This beloved Italian classic begins with tender chicken cutlets, coated in crispy breadcrumbs and golden-fried to perfection. Topped generously with melted mozzarella cheese and rich marinara sauce, each bite is a symphony of flavors. Served alongside perfectly cooked spaghetti tossed in a tangy marinara sauce, this dish is a comforting and satisfying homage to Italian cuisine, sure to delight diners with its irresistible taste and comforting aroma.

name: Chicken Shawarma Salad
description: Who can resist this middle eastern special flavors of shawarma? Out from the pita, tossed in a green, crunchy salad of lettuce, cucumber and onions. Chicken is marinated with lemon, paprika and other spices drizzled with tasty nutty tahini sauce.

name: Autumn Apple Brandy Pork Loin Feast
description: Savor the rich flavors of fall with Chef Angelia's succulent pork loin glazed in a spiced Dijon mustard and apple sauce finished with a splash of apple brandy. The pork is perfectly paired with cheese tortellini that have been tossed in a creamy, herbed three-cheese sauce with hints of sage and rosemary and topped with crispy bacon. This dish embodies the essence of autumn, bringing warmth to your table with each delightful bite.

name: Quinoa Plant Bowl
description: Quinoa tossed with sweet potatoes, kale and avocado just to name a few, to complete this vibrant healthy bowl drizzled with special almond sauce.

name: Stir Fried Bulgogi Beef Egg Noodles
description: Chef Esther's world-famous bulgogi‚Äîsmoky, tender beef marinated in sweet and savory Korean BBQ sauce‚Äîmeets irresistible stir-fried noodles. The dish is served with two kinds of kimchi: spicy, tangy Napa cabbage kimchi and mild cucumber kimchi. The kimchi is the perfect tangy, acidic element to balance out the rich beef and tasty Spaghetti, so be sure to get a little kimchi in each bite. This dish is Korean BBQ with a wholesome twist!

name: Char Siu Bbq Pork Rice Bowl
description: Char Siu is an iconic Cantonese-style barbecued pork dish originating in Guangdong. Marbled slabs of pork shoulder are marinated overnight, roasted to tender perfection, and glazed with a sweet and savory red soy-based sauce. Here, Chef Mike pairs it with fluffy rice, crisp-tender blanched yu choy, sesame seeds for crunch, and fresh green onions for a pop of flavor and color. And don‚Äôt worry‚Äìthere‚Äôs an extra helping of that delicious sauce to drizzle over everything.

name: Texas Short Ribs
description: Unctuous braised short ribs with velvety smooth potato puree, bitter sweet charred carrots and savory demi sauce.

name: Vanilla Chia Pudding
description: You don't have to be plant-based to appreciate this creamy vegan vanilla chia pudding. Made with rich coconut milk and topped with a vibrant assortment of fresh strawberries and blueberries, it's decadent enough to enjoy as a snack or dessert, yet wholesome enough to start your day off on the right foot, too.

name: Middle Eastern Grilled Vegetable and Lentil Bowl
description: Low in calories and high in nutrition, lentils are the perfect legume to eat in summer in salads and bowls... perfect for a vegetarian dish. First, Chef Luciana grill the vegetables. After, she cooks the lentils and toss it with garlic, olive oil, lemon, cumin, mint, cayenne, salt and pepper. Finally she makes the yogurt tahini sauce and roasts the chickpeas with the onion powder, garlic powder, cayenne pepper, chilli powder, paprika, coriander, cumin, allspice, olive oil and salt and cook it in the oven for 30 minutes.

name: Bacon Mozzarella Egg Bites
description: Looking to switch up your breakfast routine? Look no further than Livy‚Äôs Florentine omelette-inspired egg bites. These protein-packed bites feature smoky bacon, mozzarella, and baby spinach, all served with a tangy green goddess sauce on the side for dipping. The smokiness of the bacon pairs perfectly with the gooey melted mozzarella, while the green goddess adds just the right amount of zesty punch. Leave the boring for another morning!

name: Oui Lasagna with Impossible Beef
description: Chef Cami has masterfully crafted a symphony of textures and tastes in this plant-based lasagna. Savor layer upon layer of tender pasta, savory tomato sauce, a hearty meat sauce made with Impossible Beef, and Chef Cami's signature creamy macadamia nut ricotta. The crowning touch on the lasagna is a toasty, golden brown layer of vegan pine nut parmesan that adds a delightful richness. Whether you're vegan or omnivore, or even a cheese lover, you'll delight in every heavenly bite of this comforting and satisfying dish.

name: Harvest Kale Salad
description: Enjoy a mix of julienned kale with pine nuts, tangy goat cheese, and sweet dried cranberries, all dressed in a luscious honey-mustard vinaigrette. This is the perfect side salad alongside any entr√©e, or add your favorite protein and call it a meal.

name: Mediterranean Smash Pita Burger
description: For this fusion of Mediterranean and American favorites, Chef Einat combines juicy ground beef with herbs and spices (and a touch of jalape√±o for heat), then smashes the patties flat on a griddle for those irresistibly crisp, lacy edges. She sandwiches each one into pita bread filled with blistered tomatoes and thin-sliced red onions seasoned with tangy sumac. On the side: flavorful za‚Äôatar roasted fingerling potatoes. The accompanying sauce‚Äîa bright, zesty blend of peperoncino, lemon, and garlic‚Äîenlivens every bite of this balanced, nourishing meal.

name: Greek Yogurt Parfait Guava Puree
description: Start your day off on the right foot with this parfait and savor the layers of flavor and texture! Creamy honey Greek yogurt is layered with Chef Jose's signature pineapple and kiwi compote, a sweet and tart mix of fresh pineapple and kiwi, with just a hint of lemon. A layer of guava pur√©e and a sprinkling of crunchy coconut-almond nut granola on top provides the perfect textural contrast to this very satisfying, tropically inspired parfait.

name: Citrus Marinated Salmon
description: Zesty and fresh, Chef Ivy's citrus marinated salmon is a thing of beauty. A buttery salmon filet is marinated in an orange and lemon citrus sauce, then seared to perfection and served over Mexican-inspired corn salad and baby arugula with a squeeze of lime.

name: Orange Braised Pork Loin
description: Pork loin braised in milk is a northern Italian classic, but here, Chef Pino takes a different route (and one that might just be better). Freshly squeezed orange juice and white wine work their magic, melding with the meat‚Äôs juices to create a sauce that‚Äôs unexpectedly creamy, deeply savory, and softly smoky. Roasted apple and pear round this dish out, sprinkled with scallions for a final touch.

name: Buffalo Cauliflower Grain Bowl
description: Chef Chris oven roasts fresh cauliflower florets, tosses them in a homemade buffalo sauce, then roasts them again for richer flavor. The rest of this healthy and delicious bowl includes farro, tri-color quinoa, sugar snap peas, and more roasted veggies. All this is finished with a zesty cilantro-lime ranch dressing.

name: Salmon Salad with Beets
description: Try this lavishly green, gorgeous magenta root watermelon radish. This crisp vegetable is less peppery than its other variants and is perfectly paired with earthy beets and sweet carrots over a bed of seared salmon fillets. To make it more delish and picture perfect, chef toasted it with cashews and feta.

name: Panko Crusted Salmon Tacos
description: Chef Ruben gives classic Baja fish tacos a fuller-flavored update with Panko-crusted salmon‚Äîgolden-crisp on the outside, buttery-soft inside. Place the salmon into soft flour tortillas, pile them high with refreshing pico de gallo and creamy-crunchy cole slaw, then drizzle on Chef Ruben‚Äôs signature habanero-passionfruit sauce, an irresistible blend of sweet and heat. This meal hits on every flavor and texture‚Äîthat‚Äôs what will make it a favorite in your weekly meal rotation.

name: Herb Crusted Cod
description: Another seafood dish mediterranean inspired by Chef Francesco. Drizzled cod fillets in balsamic vinaigrette coated in breadcrumbs after. Cod is then seared and finished in the oven alongside crisp and crunchy endive, fennel and orange salad.

name: Plant Bowl
description: Your kind of bowl! Nutritious, green, full of textures and flavors.

name: Jerk Shrimp Tacos
description: Inspired by Chef Kristy's travels to Jamaica, this dish is poised to spice up your routine. Jerk-spiced shrimp are the star of the show, and here they're tucked into soft flour tortillas, drizzled with a creamy jerk aioli, and served alongside a Caribbean-inspired cabbage slaw. Enjoy this fresh and flavorful fusion of Mexican tacos and tropical flavors.

name: Baked Ziti with Garlic Broccoli
description: Baked Ziti with Garlic Broccoli is a hearty and delicious dish featuring ziti pasta baked with a creamy blend of cheeses and a side of garlic broccoli, offering a satisfying vegetarian option.

name: Sichuan Grilled Pork
description: This dish is so special to Chef Yong & Wanting because it showcases the versatility and depth of Sichuan's regional flavors. Most people know Sichuan cuisine for being spicy, but the numbing spice of Sichuan peppercorn is just one of the many significant ingredients of the region. Our pork highlights another important regional specialty called doubanjiang, a sauce made from fermented soybeans, broad beans, and chilis. It adds a deep umami flavor and a touch of spice that pairs beautifully with tender grilled pork.

name: Spinach Ricotta Stuffed Shells
description: Get cozy for this comforting meal of perfectly cooked pasta shells stuffed with a creamy spinach and ricotta filling. Covered in a delicious marinara sauce, the shells are also topped with mozzarella and Parmesan for an even richer depth of flavor.

name: Tuscan Ribollita Soup
description: Ribollita was originally a way to use up leftover vegetables and day-old bread. Now, this stew-like soup is crafted with much more intention. The hero here is curly Tuscan kale, which adds a smoky flavor to sauteed celery, carrots, and onions. Combined with beans, and pancetta for a salty kick, this nourishing bowl is topped with slices of rustic baguette that melt into the soup as it simmers.

name: Chickpea Buddha Chicken Bowl
description: Simple yet ridiculously healthy, this buddha bowl from Chef Andres highlights chicken breast cooked with garlic and shallots as well as protein-rich chickpeas. The meal also comes loaded with sweet potatoes, kale, onion, and quinoa, along with an addictive maple and lemon tahini dressing to drizzle on everything.

name: Roasted Cod White Bean Stew
description: This elegant dish is light and flavorful, yet filling enough to satisfy any night of the week. The combination of the flaky cod, creamy white beans, and hearty vegetables creates a delicious, Italian-inspired fish stew with hints of tomato and rosemary. Pair with a piece of good, crusty bread to soak up the delectable broth.

name: Hickory Smoked Turkey with Sweet Potato Mash
description: Smoking meats over hickory wood infuses them with a deep, slightly sweet flavor. Here, Chef Maribel uses this technique for a comforting southern staple, letting the smoke work its magic on turkey breast. Cooked until tender, it‚Äôs served with buttery sweet potato mash, garlicky green beans for a bit of snap, and a rich, savory gravy.

name: Cod In Spicy Moroccan Tomato Sauce
description: Light, buttery cod is the ideal fish to soak up all the flavors of Chef Einat's spicy Moroccan tomato sauce. The delicate fish sits on a bed of bright, turmeric-infused couscous with spiced, marinated chickpeas to add the perfect pop of warm spices and hearty texture. A squeeze of lemon and sprinkle of scallions brighten up the entire dish, which will delight your palate!

name: Lemon Chicken and Potatoes
description: Mediterranean food is elegant, easy, and uncomplicated, and this dish is the perfect example of that. It's just good-quality chicken thighs, Yukon gold potatoes, and braised greens, seasoned simply with flavors like lemon, oregano, and olive oil. This dish makes eating healthy so easy‚Äîand so delicious.

name: Cuban Style Crispy Shredded Beef
description: Chef Silvio's Cuban-style braised and Crispy Beef is a thing of beauty. Beef Flank Steak is carefully marinated, braised & crisped on the flat top, and served with yucca fries & a cabbage-jicama slow with Peruvian green dressing. Garnished with fresh lime and cilantro.

name: Greek Chicken Couscous Bowl
description: This all-in-one meal from Chef Fabiola is practically overflowing with fresh summery flavor. Tender baby spinach leaves provide the base layer. Next comes fluffy couscous and moist, juicy shredded chicken breast marinated in a flavor-packed lemon and herb vinaigrette. On top: juicy, acidic cherry tomatoes, zesty red onions, and crisp cucumber. Sprinkle on the accompanying crumbled Feta cheese for a hit of savoriness, then stir in the cool, creamy tzatziki, made with Greek yogurt, garlic, lemon, and refreshing mint, and dig into a protein-packed meal of perfectly balanced flavors.

name: Tandoori Grass Fed Skirt Steak
description: This delicious dish consists of a double portion of the highest quality grass-fed skirt steak seasoned with warming tandoori spices. The steak is cooked to a perfect medium, sliced, and served with a side of cilantro-mint chutney, which adds a zesty punch of freshness that perfectly complements the steak. Pair this steak with a side of rice, potatoes, or grilled veggies or serve atop a green salad for a satisfying meal in minutes.

name: Grilled Chicken with Carrot Thyme Puree
description: This dish is proof that sometimes simple is best! Juicy grilled chicken served atop a creamy, thyme-infused pur√©e of carrots with a side of saut√©ed button mushrooms. Sophistication, simplified.

name: Tempura Battered Lobster Tacos
description: These delicious, unique tacos have the perfect contrast of crispy and juicy textures, along with a symphony of flavors. Buttery pieces of lobster meat are battered in a light tempura coating that adds a satisfying crunch to each bite. The crispy lobster is topped with a creamy avocado-chipotle crema that adds a smoky, lightly spicy kick, plus a refreshing roasted corn salsa that complements all the richness. After one bite of these, you may never go back to plain old fish tacos again!

name: Mediterranean Quinoa Bowl with Shrimp
description: This dish has everything you want in a grain bowl: hearty grains, perfectly cooked protein, veggies, and LOTS of flavor. The delicious Mediterranean-inspired bowl from Chef Ruben builds on a base of nutty quinoa and baby kale with shrimp that have been seasoned with oregano, lime leaf, and garlic. Topped with guacamole, cherry tomatoes, roasted asparagus, and hard boiled eggs, a tasty Greek yogurt dressing inspired by tzatziki ties the entire bowl together, hitting every note you'd want in texture and flavor.

name: Trout Almondine
description: Flaky, mild ocean trout is perfectly seared until crispy and paired with a delicious sauce made from brown butter, lemon, and mustard. The fish is then topped with toasted, slivered almonds for a fresh take on a classic French dish.

name: Chicken Milanesa with Mushrooms
description: German inspired classic schnitzel. Instead of breading and deep-frying the meat, Chef Irvin gives it a light dusting of almond meal, then serves it with mushrooms and parsnips.

name: Vegan Burrito
description: This recipe is a winner. Chef added avocado and corn and upped the ante on the cilantro and chili sauce. Delicious. With all of the flavors, you will be unaware that there was no meat included in the recipe. This is a winner.

name: Shrimp Scampi Over Spaghetti
description: Shrimp Scampi is a crowd-pleaser for a reason. With succulent shrimp, lemon, garlic, al dente spaghetti, and, of course, butter, what's not to love?! To boost the dish's nutrition and texture, Chef Ruben mixes in tangles of spiralized zucchini 'zoodles' with the spaghetti. They blend in seamlessly, and add a pop of color to the bright and tangy dish; even the pickiest eaters will love this one!

name: Yia Yias Cumin Spiced Turkey Meatballs
description: Chef Cora takes inspiration from her grandmother, transporting you to Greece with one of those hug-in-a-bowl dishes. Her tender, cumin-spiced turkey meatballs are coated in an aromatic harissa tomato sauce bursting with flavor from tons of fresh herbs and warming spices. Al dente orzo pasta tossed with creamy Feta is a perfect complement for this magical dish, while grilled mini peppers add a smoky-sweet finishing touch. Comforting and delicious, you‚Äôll want to put this one on repeat!

name: Rigatoni Pesto
description: Chef Cami Sepulveda brings you this option of a Climate Friendly meal, that combines low carbon impact, whole foods, and high sustainability ingredients. Her vegan pesto is beloved for a reason. This delectable dish boasts al dente rigatoni pasta, generously tossed in Chef's aromatic pesto made from fresh basil, pine nuts, garlic and vegan parmesan. The vibrant pasta is finished with a sprinkle of sun-dried tomatoes to add an extra savory touch of umami to each bite. Experience the essence of simple, wholesome Italian cuisine in this vegan twist on a classic.

name: Spanish Style Shrimp with Chorizo
description: Nothing reminds Chef Anthony of Spain more than chorizo and shrimp‚Äîthe combination is a match made in culinary heaven. In this dish, soft flavorful shrimp are cooked in a flavor-packed sauce with tomato, roasted red peppers, capers, and loads of spices, then topped with crispy chorizo. The shrimp and chorizo are finished with a paprika and garlic cream sauce and plated alongside roasted red peppers and a fregola grain salad topped with orange slices for a pop of citrusy freshness. This comforting meal is full of spice, texture, and flavor, so be sure to get a little of each component in every bite.

name: Gambas al Ajillo Garlic Shrimp
description: Elevate any weeknight with Chef Jose Garces‚Äôs Gambas al Ajillo (Spanish garlic shrimp) and fideos (toasted pasta). A hearty serving of plump shrimp are cooked to tender, succulent perfection in a mix of butter, garlic, and red pepper flakes for a mild heat, showered with parsley for a pop of freshness and color, then spooned atop a bed of tender, slightly nutty pasta to soak up the rich sauce. On the side: tender-crisp steamed broccoli and a delectable harissa aioli for an irresistible mix of creamy and kick. Savor authentic Spanish flavors anytime you want‚Äîwithout leaving home.

name: Chocolate Trail Energy Bites
description: These delectable treats offer a raw, vegan delight that's as wholesome as it is delicious. Bursting with protein, fiber, and healthy fats, they eschew refined sugar and gluten, making them an ideal choice for health-conscious snackers. Whether you need a quick pick-me-up, a boost during a hike, a sweet treat, or a nutritious breakfast addition, these bites have you covered. With a perfect balance of sweetness, saltiness, and nuttiness, they're a guilt-free indulgence that proves healthy can be downright scrumptious.

name: Grilled Skirt Steak and Herbed Frites
description: Tender skirt steak gets lightly seasoned with smoked paprika, perfectly grilled and sliced to order, then topped with an herb compound butter. Chef Chris pairs this picture perfect steak with oven-roasted herbed frites, whole roasted tomatoes, and, of course, a tarragon-infused aioli for dipping. Bring the French steakhouse home with this delicious dish.

name: Paella Basquaise
description: Traditional Spanish seafood dishes full of flavor.

name: Spicy Indonesian Chicken Bumbu Merah
description: A Chef Abe favorite. A mouthwatering dish featuring succulent sliced chicken thigh meat, cooked to perfection in a rich and flavorful sauce. The sauce is composed of coconut milk, which adds a creamy and luxurious texture, combined with the sweet and savory notes of red onions and bell peppers and spicy red chilies. The aromatic flavors of lemongrass and kaffir lime leaves are infused throughout. Chef Abe adds his perfectly golden colored turmeric rice topped with fresh chopped green onions.

name: Yucatan Style Bbq Ribs
description: Mexican flavors meet American BBQ traditions in this delectable dish. Chef Ivy makes a Yucat√°n-inspired citrus and chile rub for tender pork ribs, then grills them with a chipotle BBQ glaze that gets beautifully caramelized on the grill. To complete the meal, Chef serves the ribs with a side of borracho beans‚Äîblack beans cooked down with bacon, spices, chiles, and beer‚Äîand a spicy, fresh cabbage and cucumber slaw. What more could you want?!

name: Mexican Chicken Lasagna
description: Combining flavors of traditional Mexican cuisine with the comforting layers of lasagna, this beloved dish features tender chicken breast, Monterrey Jack cheese, and a bright poblano sauce for rich layers of flavors in every bite.

name: Shrimp Herbed Cauliflower Rice
description: This delicious shrimp herbed cauliflower rice you can enjoy. Sun-dried tomato sauce on top of shrimp complement with cauliflower herbed rice bowl with fresh basil and grated cheese.

name: Mediterranean Chicken Couscous
description: Chef Fabio's vibrant couscous salad captures the essence of Mediterranean flavors in every bite. It's bursting with flavorful veggies like Kalamata olives, pepperoncini, roasted red peppers, artichoke hearts, and spinach, as well as aromatic fresh basil. Paired with herb-roasted chicken breast and tangy pickled red onions, this dish is perfect as a light dinner or a satisfying midday meal.

name: Chardonnay Braised Salmon
description: This is one of Chef Anthony's favorite ways to cook salmon. The fish stays tender while braised in a marinade of Chardonnay, fresh herbs, and stock. It then comes served with crispy, roasted carrots and potatoes, and topped with Chef‚Äôs own tomato and fennel jam. Crisp, refreshing, and hearty!

name: Beyond Bolognese with Gluten Free Pasta
description: Made with nutrient-rich, vegan Beyond Meat, this hearty bolognese is a fresh take on a classic. It is served over gluten-free pasta for that perfect balance of chewy and tender.

name: Thai Tofu Curry with Brown Rice
description: Sweet and spicy tofu red curry. Lots of vegetables with firm tofu.

name: Harissa Maple Roasted Carrots
description: These carrots are a little spicy, a little sweet, and totally delicious! Harissa is a Tunisian pepper paste made with roasted red peppers, chile peppers, and spices; it's a little spicy (of course), but also smoky, slightly sweet, and tangy. Chef Chris mixes the harissa with maple syrup for balance, then uses this marinade on roasted carrots for even more sweetness. The perfect side to accompany roasted turkey, beef, or chicken, these carrots will spice up any holiday menu!

name: Scallion Butter Grilled Branzino
description: Marinated and grilled Branzino is topped with a charred scallion pesto butter and finished in oven. Charring scallions softens them up and brings out their natural sweetness, which adds depth to the rich, allium-forward compound butter. Chef Chris loves creamy French lentils cooked with garlic, thyme and mirepoix, and finds they pair exceptionally well with a delicate protein like Branzino. This is a high protein meal that's still on the lighter side while promising elegance and balanced, satisfying flavors.

name: Singaporean Laksa Noodles with Seared Shrimp
description: Singaporean Laksa is a vibrant and aromatic noodle dish that encapsulates the essence of Southeast Asian cuisine. Freshly seared shrimp, rice noodles, bean sprouts, and scallions are served in a slow-cooked, aromatic, and creamy coconut and shrimp curry sauce. Chef Amy's take on Singapore's signature noodle dish a must try for seafood lovers.

name: Chicken Portabella Mushroom Fajitas
description: A smart, fresh, and nutrient-packed take on Tex-Mex, combining lean chicken breast with earthy portabella mushrooms. Colorful bell peppers and vibrant red onions bring fiber, antioxidants, and a natural sweetness, all tied together with a blend of spices adding just the right amount of heat. Served with gluten-free corn tortillas and a side of tangy sour cream, this balanced meal will leave you feeling invigorated.

name: Avocado Salad
description: Introduced by the farmers who planted avocado trees in coastal plain in the 1920s. This is now one of the healthiest and most enjoyed salad in our time tossed together with kale, apples, and sprouts. Add some almonds for more tasty crunchy treat.

name: Chicken al Pastor with Curried Spinach
description: Indian meets Mexican in a flavor explosion! Juicy chicken is marinated in a smoky Al Pastor-style marinade and slow cooked until unbelievably tender. The sauce is smoky and a little spicy, with layers of flavor from a variety of dried Mexican chiles and spices. The chicken is then smothered in Chef Daniel's take on saag, a curried spinach pur√©e, and served over fragrant Jasmine rice. Meet the culinary mashup you never knew you needed!

name: Hibachi Shrimp Fried Rice Bowl
description: Chef Tracey combines three beloved Japanese classics in one delightful, family-favorite meal. First, the base: Savory fried rice studded with tender-crisp broccoli, carrot, onion, and zucchini. Next, the topping: Smoky, succulent grilled shrimp glazed in a garlicky, umami-rich soy sauce. And finally: The Yum Yum Sauce that brings the dish together with its signature creamy, tangy, and sweet notes. Go ahead and put this one on repeat.

name: Singaporean Shrimp Rendang
description: Chef Amy‚Äôs rendang, which is a ‚Äúdryer‚Äù curry with concentrated flavors, is formed from an aromatic spice blend that had been simmered for hours. This version features fresh shrimp and lightly charred cauliflower, served with a comforting side of coconut rice.

name: Grilled Peruvian Chicken
description: A vibrant play on a Peruvian classic, this hearty, satisfying, flavorful meal features spice-rubbed chicken breast grilled to perfection. It‚Äôs a little bit spicy, and little bit smoky, and all tender and succulent. Chef Michael plates a hearty portion of the chicken atop a bed of nutritious rainbow quinoa and roasted zucchini. On the side: Pickled red onion brings a tangy contrast, and the bold Aj√≠ Verde Sauce adds a spicy kick to each bite.

name: Broiled Salmon
description: Salmon marinated in scallions with garlic and lime juice. This paleo broiled salmon is best paired with boy choy drizzled with sesame seeds.

name: Garlic Chicken In Coconut Turmeric Sauce
description: Rich garlicky marinated chicken thighs pair perfectly with a rich coconut curry sauce infused with Bumbu Kuning, a traditional Indonesian spice paste rich in turmeric. Served on a bed of aromatic jasmine rice alongside tangy, slightly sweet pickled cucumbers, this dish offers a balanced, authentic taste of Indonesian comfort cooking.

name: Shrimp and Chorizo Paella
description: I've been cooking paellas for most of my career, starting back in my stage days in Spain and learned my technique from some of the best Spanish Chefs. This particular dish combines all those years of practice and techniques as well as a perfect blend of ingredients.

name: Herb Roasted Salmon with Truffle Mash
description: This oven-roasted salmon, topped with elegant herb butter is a wonderful comforting French meal. It is served with a side of creamy truffle mash potatoes, and roasted garlic brussels sprouts.

name: Chipotle Chicken Enchiladas
description: Whole roasted chicken is pulled and tossed in a delicious yet not-too-spicy chipotle sauce, then tucked into soft corn tortillas. The enchiladas are topped with even more sauce and Monterey Jack cheese, then baked until bubbly and perfect. Served with a side of piquant, spiced green rice, this dish is pure Mexican comfort cooking.

name: Mushroom Lentil Bolognese
description: This comforting pasta dish is so full of umami, you won't even miss the meat. Chef Emily makes a rich, plant-based bolognese sauce with a mixture of wild mushroom and red lentils, then serves it over a bed of fresh spinach and Italian Sfoglini organic pasta. To take it to the next level, Chef tops the bolognese with crispy roasted mushrooms and a crunchy walnut-and-herb breadcrumb topping. This dish is so delicious and hearty, it's sure to satisfy vegans and omnivores alike.

name: Squash Ravioli Cavolero Nero
description: If an Italian meal is what you are looking for, you have found it! A toss of squash ravioli, with hazelnuts and emulsion of squash.

name: The Bear Italian Beef Sandwich
description: Chef Einat brings us an Italian beef sandwich inspired by the hit TV show, The Bear. Here, pulled beef is braised in a mix of Italian spices, like oregano, basil, celery seeds, and chili. It‚Äôs served atop a crusty baguette, and topped with house-made pickles and provolone cheese.

name: Chimichurri Kimchi Skirt Steak
description: Indulge in a vibrant fusion of flavors with Chef Esther‚Äôs tantalizing Chimichurri Kimchi Skirt Steak and fragrant tomato risotto. She pairs a hearty portion of perfectly grilled skirt steak with a flavor-packed sauce that combines zesty, herbal Argentinian chimichurri and the spicy kick of Korean kimchi. It‚Äôs accompanied by aromatic tomato-infused risotto, rich tangy and umami flavors. This meal is a true culinary adventure‚ÄîAsia, South America, and Europe, all in one unforgettable meal.

name: Slowly Cooked Salmon with Quinoa
description: Slow Cooking the Salmon gives amazing texture and flavor to this healthy and delicious fish. The salmon is served on a bed of quinoa with Tuscan kale, roasted shiitake mushrooms, butternut squash and chilies. Finishing the dish is a vibrant coriander vinaigrette that brings everything together and really makes this dish pop.

name: Harvest Farro Side Salad
description: This side portion of Chef Emily's signature harvest bowl is the ideal light lunch or side salad for your favorite protein. A base of nutty farro is accompanied by baby arugula and roasted butternut squash, while pistachios and vegan feta add textural contrast. This salad is inspired by fall flavors, but it's also a delicious way to treat yourself to a healthy, hearty salad any time of year. A sweet and savory pomegranate vinaigrette ties this bowl of autumnal goodness together!

name: Grilled Chicken Tampiquena
description: La Tampique√±a is one of the most quintessential dishes in Tamaulipas, and Mexican cuisine in general. Chef Santiago put his own delicious spin on the dish with perfectly grilled chicken that's been marinated with typical Mexican seasonings, chiles, and achiote. The chicken is served alongside a decadent cheese enchilada along with sides of smoky chipotle-infused rice, rajas (creamy, cheesy saut√©ed corn and poblano peppers), and fresh, tangy guacamole. This is without a doubt one of Santiago's favorite dishes he's prepared for CookUnity (and ours too!).

name: Chicken Quesadillas
description: Folded and layered tortilla with zesty chicken, mix of vegetable. Enjoy this succulent delight with sprinkled cheddar cheese and tasty salsa.

name: Filipino Style Bbq Chicken
description: Classic American cooking meets Filipino flavor in this comforting summer dish. It starts with chicken thighs marinated in a sweet and savory marinade, then the chicken is grilled and smothered with even more of Chef Armando's Filipino-style BBQ sauce resulting in the most juicy, flavor-packed chicken. Served alongside nutty sesame noodles that can be enjoyed chilled or hot, this is a new CookUnity favorite.

name: Classic Cuban Sandwich
description: Transport your taste buds to the vibrant streets of Havana with Chef Fabiola's iconic Cuban sandwich. It features tender, melt-in-your-mouth roast pork, smoked ham, Swiss cheese, pickles, and a tangy mustard aioli, all layered between two slices of traditional Cuban bread and griddled until crunchy on the outside, and gooey and melted on the inside. A tribute to culinary tradition, this mouthwatering creation captures the essence of Cuban flavor in every bite.

name: Grilled Chicken Wraps
description: Inspired by a Palestinian specialty involving layers of sumac-spiced chicken, caramelized onion, and pine nuts. All piled-up in a middle eastern flat bread. It's all traditionally piled atop taboon, a type of Middle Eastern flatbread topped with zatar spiced hummus, chicken, onion and pine nuts all rolled up in complex smokey texture.

name: Baked Potato Chicken Thighs
description: Chef's special loaded baked potato is a savory delight, featuring succulent grilled chicken thighs, marinated to perfection with epis, topped with jalapeno. Everything is generously piled on top of melted mild yellow cheddar cheese. A scrumptious and hearty dish for any occasion.

name: Crispy Chicken Strips
description: Vegan cooking doesn't get more crave-worthy than this. Chef Cami's crispy breaded vegan chicken strips are accompanied by two equally satisfying sides: roasted potatoes and garlicky broccolini. Paired with Chef's signature creamy vegan ranch, this dish has everything you need to satisfy your comfort food cravings while keeping it plant-based.

name: Chicken Pesto Lasagna
description: Chef Tracey‚Äôs take on lasagna has all the ooey gooey, cheesy deliciousness you love, but with bold, fresh flavors that showcase this beloved classic in a whole new light. Instead of the traditional tangy tomato sauce, she crafts a bright herbal pesto sauce redolent with fresh basil flavor, and lightens things up with shredded, roasted, lemon-pepper chicken breast in place of the typical ground beef. Don‚Äôt worry, there‚Äôs still plenty of creamy ricotta and melty mozzarella cheeses in between the sheets of al dente pasta. The resulting dish is deliciously indulgent, all without being heavy.

name: Grilled Strip Steak Compound Butter
description: Indulge in our succulent marinated strip steak, grilled to perfection, paired with creamy, buttery mashed potatoes. This classic combination offers a comforting, satisfying meal, perfect for any occasion.

name: Bacon Wrapped Chicken Breast
description: Tender chicken breast is wrapped in bacon and seared until crispy on the outside and juicy on the inside. Paired with a buttery cauliflower pur√©e, fresh spinach, a creamy garlic sauce, this dish is elevated comfort food at its best.

name: Salmon Garlic Parmesan
description: Buttery salmon is the perfect match for the savory flavors of garlic and parmesan, and this dish is proof. Here, a filet of salmon is expertly roasted with a delicate crust of garlic, herbs, and parmesan cheese. Paired with tender asparagus and crispy herb-roasted potatoes, each bite is a celebration of balance and freshness. Treat yourself to a gourmet experience that‚Äôs both nutritious and delicious!

name: Thai Red Curry with Chicken
description: Chef Pimnapat's Thai red curry strikes the perfect balance of comforting and fresh. The coconut milk-based curry is full of aromatics like garlic, galangal, shallots, lemongrass, kaffir lime leaves and chilies. This fragrant curry is the perfect vessel for any protein, but this version features juicy chicken breast, green beans, sweet bell peppers, and bamboo shoots. With the perfect medium level of spice, this dish will warm your belly but won't leave you in tears.

name: Mint Chocolate Cake Jar
description: A delectable seasonal dessert that combines the refreshing taste of mint, the indulgence of chocolate, and the satisfying texture of cookie crumbles, all layered in a convenient jar, ready for a cozy evening on the couch.

name: Shrimp Tacos
description: Spicy, creamy, sweet and delicious, these tacos are perfect for that light dinner or get together with friends. The only way this dish works is of course to use only the freshest ingredients. Served best with a salt rimmed margarita!

name: Shrimp Scampi Over Linguine
description: This shrimp scampi linguine is more than a meal‚Äîit's a sensory symphony that combines the richness of seafood, the warmth of garlic, the brightness of sweet peas, and the earthiness of asparagus into a crescendo of culinary delight. Garlicky shrimp scampi is served atop al dente linguine with peas, asparagus, and sweet roasted tomatoes, with a sprinkle of parmesan cheese on top to complete the dish. Immerse yourself in a melody of flavors that dance on your taste buds.

name: Beef Massaman Curry
description: A little denser than your typical Thai curry, Massaman leans into coconut milk for creaminess, layered with warm spices and the tang of tamarind. Chef Miguel lets potatoes and carrots drink up the fragrant broth before folding in lemongrass-braised beef that‚Äôs cooked until meltingly tender. Ladled over soft jasmine rice, this bowl is built for lingering.

name: Aegean Lamb Stew
description: Savor Chef Ahmet's succulent slow-cooked lamb, simmered to perfection in a medley of tomatoes, peppers, and onions. Accompanied by blistered shishito peppers and a generous portion of creamy mashed red jacket potatoes, this dish promises a symphony of flavors and textures for a truly unforgettable dining experience.

name: Indonesian Beef Rendang Stew
description: Indulge in tender beef short ribs marinated and simmered in a mildly spiced curry seasoned with shredded coconut, lemongrass, ginger, and other aromatics. The beef curry is complemented by chunky boiled carrots and coconut rice, plus a sprinkle of shredded kaffir lime leaves on top for a refreshing fragrance.

name: New Orleans Grillades Creole Beef Stew
description: Chef Chase prepares a classic New Orleans dish‚ÄîGrillades and Grits‚Äîthat is sure to satisfy even the heartiest appetite. Tender and succulent cubes of flank steak are stewed in a savory broth flavored with classic Creole spices, then lovingly nestled atop a bed of creamy, cheesy grits. This is the ultimate Creole comfort food!

name: Lamb Barbacoa In Adobo Enchiladas
description: We promise you have never had enchiladas quite like these. Chef Akhtar applies a deeply flavorful adobo marinade to lamb and uses a low and slow 'barbacoa' method to achieve tender juicy results. The lamb is then wrapped up in fresh corn tortillas, topped with a bit more of the sauce the lamb was braised in, covered with Oaxaca & Chihuahua cheeses and baked until bubbly. The enchiladas are served with herby green rice and pickled red onions to add a pop of acidity for balance.

name: Steak with Cheddar Grits
description: Homemade sauce made with spiced tomato sauce, smoky, cheesy and creamy. Peppered Steak grilled and topped with roasted peppers and onions.

name: Rigatoni Bolognese
description: This is Chef Forgione's take on an Italian classic, made with a combination of ground turkey and sweet Italian pork sausage. The rich sauce clings to and perfectly coats al dente rigatoni pasta. A crispy Panko bread crumb topping with fresh parsley and parmesan cheese is the crowning touch on this comforting dish!

name: Grilled Tenderloin Steak
description: Craving a hearty, healthy meat-and-potatoes meal? Tender, succulent, and juicy, this grilled tenderloin steak is pure carnivore perfection. It‚Äôs extra flavorful, too, thanks to the savory marinade of soy sauce, apple cider and balsamic vinegars, and fresh rosemary and thyme. On the side, there‚Äôs a hearty portion of grilled vegetables‚Äîred onion, bell peppers, and sweet potatoes‚Äîfor more of that irresistible smoky char, plus golden roasted potatoes tossed with garlic and fresh herbs.

name: Creamy Marry Me Chicken
description: When she tried the marry-me chicken that‚Äôs gone viral on social media, Chef Aarthi fell in love with the modern classic‚Äîand you will, too. She browns juicy, perfectly seasoned chicken breasts then builds a luscious pan sauce with heavy cream, umami-rich Parmesan cheese, tangy sundried tomatoes, garlic, and‚Äîher personal touch‚Äîjust a hint of gochujang, the fiery Korean red chili paste. She pairs the chicken with tender-crisp roasted asparagus and fluffy, buttered Basmati rice (perfect for soaking up all that tasty sauce). Packed with flavor, this meal is a weeknight wonder‚Äîregardless of whether you‚Äôre planning a proposal.

name: Southern Fried Chicken with Spicy Honey
description: Chef Chris has spent years perfecting his Southern-Style Fried Chicken and now you get to enjoy it. His signature spice rub packs flavor into the crust, while pan frying to perfection allows the inside to stay juicy and tender. Served with some buttermilk spuds and it doesn't get better than that. He even provides a hot honey drizzle to take it over the top.

name: Crispy Chicken Schnitzel Cutlets
description: Chef Chris Ratel‚Äôs take on classic chicken schnitzel features chicken breasts, pounded super thin and coated in flavorful seasoned breadcrumbs and savory Parmesan cheese, then fried until perfectly golden outside and juicy inside. Slice into strips and add your favorite salads at lunchtime or serve whole alongside your favorite pasta or roasted veggies for dinner.

name: Chicken Thai Red Curry
description: Experience a taste of Thailand with Chef Miguel's red curry with chicken, featuring tender chicken simmered in a rich, aromatic red curry sauce. Paired with fragrant jasmine rice, this dish offers a perfect balance of spicy, sweet, and savory flavors. Each bite promises a burst of fresh, vibrant ingredients that transport you straight to the heart of Thailand.

name: Grilled Chicken Penne Rigate
description: This comforting and indulgent meal features tender, perfectly seasoned grilled chicken breast and al dente pasta enveloped in a savory scallion and Parmesan sauce. Why penne rigate? The pasta‚Äôs ridged surface is designed to catch and hold the sauce, so every bite offers luscious, creamy goodness. Enjoy as a quick, fulfilling lunch or pair with a fresh green salad and savor a slowed-down dinner. Either way, this is a choice you won‚Äôt regret.

name: Deli Style Bacon Egg Cheese Quiche
description: The comfort of a New York deli sandwich, wrapped in golden, buttery pastry. Inside, a rich filling of eggs and cream bakes around smoky bacon, sharp white cheddar, and deeply caramelized onions, with a warming hint of nutmeg. It‚Äôs as good for a celebratory brunch as it is for a quick weekday slice straight from the fridge.

name: Cantonese Bbq Chicken with Scallion Noodles
description: In this dish, juicy chicken thighs are marinated in a Chinese-style BBQ sauce reminiscent of your favorite Char Siu, making them irresistibly tender and saucy. Served up with spring noodles and fresh yu choy (a variety of Chinese broccoli), this dish is a little sweet, a little smoky, and totally delicious!

name: Shrimp Fra Diavolo
description: Imported Italian spaghetti cooked 'al dente' in a seafood infused tomato sauce with plump and crispy seared shrimp.

name: Cashew Chicken
description: Chef Chase's cashew chicken is an instant classic. Stir-fried chicken with roasted cashews and a savory garlic sauce, this tastes just like the take-out from your favorite Chinese restaurant. A side of fluffy jasmine rice seals the deal.

name: al Pastor Pork
description: Authentic Al Pastor marinated pork shoulder thinly sliced is slow cooked and caramelized to perfection. Served with grilled pineapple and robust, slow-cooked Mexican onion.

name: Chicken Cacciatore with Braised Tomato Olive Sauce
description: This is a traditional Italian 'hunter-style' dish that's hearty and deeply flavored. Marinated chicken is slow-cooked in a deeply savory tomato sauce made with olives, mushrooms, and lots of herbs until super tender. Served over silky mashed potatoes, this dish will bring a taste of the trattoria to your table.

name: Broccoli Rabe Ravioli with Sausage and Pepper Ragu
description: The traditional Italian combination of broccoli rabe, sausage, peppers and onions gets reimagined in this elegant pasta dish. Tender ravioli filled with broccoli rabe and cheese are tossed in a flavorful play on ragu made with tomato sauce, saut√©ed Italian sausage, peppers, and onions. This dish has all the familiar flavors you love but in a way you've never seen them!

name: Cheesy Chipotle Tomato Enchiladas
description: Everyone has their ideal enchilada and for Chef Maribel, it's the union of chipotle, tomato, and corn tortillas‚Äî hand dipped in sizzling oil and filled with melty cheese‚Äîthat makes the perfect one. Stacked corn tortillas are filled with fiery pepper jack cheese and smothered in Chef's smoky chipotle-tomato sauce, then baked to perfection. Topped with a cooling crema fresca and served alongside jasmine rice and black beans, this dish delivers comfort in each bite.

name: Napoli Polpette Meatballs
description: Chef Arevalo‚Äôs savory handmade polpette (meatballs) are a tender, succulent, perfectly spiced combination of ground beef and flavorful Italian sausage browned and baked, then draped in her signature Napoli sauce, a robust, slow-simmered blend of vine-ripened tomatoes, garlic, and aromatic herbs, including basil, oregano, and thyme. Chef Arevalo garnishes them with fresh basil leaves and a sprinkling of grated Parmesan cheese for salty, umami richness. Pair them with a fresh green salad or steamed green beans and enjoy as-is for a hearty main or get creative‚Äîspoon them on a toasted bun and melt a slice of Mozzarella on top for a custom-made meatball sub sandwich.

name: Italian Meatballs with Homemade Tomato Sauce
description: This dish is rustic Italian cooking at its best. Seasoned beef meatballs are slow-roasted until juicy and tender and served with Chef Dustin‚Äôs signature tomato sauce. You could easily enjoy these with a side of pasta or creamy polenta, but truthfully they shine all on their own!

name: Creamy Lobster Green Curry
description: Comfort meets luxury in Chef Hong Thaimee‚Äôs delectable Creamy Lobster Green Curry. Tender, sweet lobster meat and Japanese eggplant is gently braised in traditional Thai green curry, a spicy, fragrant mixture of coconut milk, chile, garlic, lemongrass, Kaffir lime, coriander, and cumin. It‚Äôs poured over a bed of wild black Forbidden Rice, which adds a rich, nutty flavor and texture contrast, and garnished with fresh Thai basil leaves. Enjoy it as-is or with flatbread.

name: Grandads Bbq Pulled Pork Sandwich
description: Get ready to sink your teeth into Bubb's mouth-watering pulled pork sandwich, served with the traditional sides you know and love. Bubb's pulled pork starts with slow-cooked pork butt, infused with the rich and smoky flavors of Grandad's signature recipe for BBQ sauce. The meat is then pulled into succulent shreds, piled high on a fresh, fluffy bun, and topped with a generous helping of our tangy and refreshing traditional coleslaw. The cool and crisp flavors of the coleslaw perfectly balance the richness of the pork, making each bite a delight to the senses. Crispy roasted potatoes, infused with the rich flavors of garlic and herbs, are the perfect side dish to complement the sandwich, providing a delicious and satisfying addition to the meal.

name: Turkey Meatballs with Sweet and Spicy Tomato Sauce
description: An interesting take on the Italian-American classic. Chef Kluger uses turkey and chicken with a sweet and spicy tomato sauce. Served with broccoli and parmesan breadcrumbs. Not your grandma‚Äôs meatballs.

name: Chupe De Camarones
description: Chef Michelle‚Äôs Peruvian-style chowder is a meal for the soul. Featuring sweet, succulent shrimp and vibrant yellow chiles, it‚Äôs delicately spicy with flavors that highlight the freshness of the ingredients. She serves a generous portion over yellow rice with a garnish of queso fresco, fresh cilantro, and a lime wedge for a burst of refreshing acidity. Enjoy with a fork or spoon.

name: Rigatoni Alla Vodka Grilled Chicken
description: One of your go-to comfort meals just got even more convenient‚Äîand delicious. Rigatoni pasta with spicy vodka sauce is a classic Italian pasta dish, with just a touch of heat that perfectly balances the sweetness of the creamy tomato sauce. Served with simply grilled chicken and a sprinkle of parmesan cheese, it becomes an exceptional, hearty meal that will keep you satisfied.

name: Creamy Rigatoni Vodka
description: Creamy and delicious, this plant-based version of the beloved Italian dish is made with a rich-yet-vegan tomato cream sauce, kicked up a notch with a splash of vodka and fresh herbs. Served over perfectly cooked rigatoni pasta and topped with Chef Cami's signature pine nut parmesan 'cheese', this dish is an instant classic.

name: Tercius White Blend
description: A crisp and refreshing regional Tejo white blend with a bright tinted hue. It brings vibrant tropical aromas of pineapple and mango, balanced by delicate floral notes. The palate is soft, fresh, and elegantly perfumed, leading to a long, lingering finish.
ingredients: White grapes from the Tejo region

name: Fried Coconut Shrimp
description: Tantalize your taste buds with Chef Nahika's garlic noodles and coconut shrimp combo. Expertly cooked noodles bathed in a velvety garlic sauce, crowned with shrimp dipped in coconut batter. A symphony of flavors awaits for your lunch or dinner delight.

name: Argentinian Grilled Skirt Steak
description: Give your regular steak-and-potatoes combination a premium upgrade, Argentina-style. Chef Jose Garces serves a hearty portion of his perfectly seasoned, medium-rare grilled grass-fed skirt steak with papas a la chapa (aka smashed potatoes) and charred green onions. Pour on the accompanying chimichurri sauce to add even more Argentinian flair. For a twist on tradition, Chef Jose adds sweet basil in addition to oregano and parsley to his version of the South American staple condiment. Pour it on and dig in!

name: Four Cheese Manicotti
description: An Italian favorite, manicotti is stuffed with a four-cheese blend and baked on top of tomato-braised hearty greens, and simmered in a slightly spicy arrabbiata sauce. Topped with mozzarella and parmesan cheese and broiled until bubbling, this classic dish is as comforting as it is delicious.

name: Pomegranate Oregano Roasted Chicken
description: Meet Chef Akhtar‚Äôs definition of the ideal winter meal: a perfectly roasted chicken with classic sides to boot. Chef puts his own spin on the traditional roast chicken with a fresh oregano and tart pomegranate marinade, which infuses the chicken with flavor throughout. The juicy chicken served atop a buttery garlic-chive potato pur√©e and paired with saut√©ed spinach to complete the comfort food trifecta for a meal that will satisfy night after night.

name: Peanut Bbq Shrimp
description: For a little taste of that summer time grilling season this Peanut Butter BBQ Shrimp hits on all levels. The shrimp are accompanied with a refreshing chayote slaw in a tangy honey lime dressing and an Ararat-spiced cornbread.

name: Chicken and Pearl Couscous
description: Irresistibly good, hearty and nutritious, this is one of Chef Andres' signature dishes. Boneless chicken breast and tender Israeli couscous is paired with creamy mozzarella, basil, juicy tomatoes and peppery arugula for a well-rounded satisfying meal.

name: Caribbean Chicken Stew
description: Chef Chris shares a staple of Caribbean cuisine ‚Äî a rich stew of boneless chicken thighs and potatoes infused with dark brown sugar, coconut milk, and plenty of aromatics. A side of basmati rice with black beans completes this comforting classic.

name: Indo Spicy Baked Chicken Wrap
description: Chef Abe brings you an amazing twist on the regular old chicken wrap. His chicken is baked in a spicy long pepper sauce and drizzled with Indonesian sweet soy sauce, then paired with cheese, pickled cucumber, tomato, baby spinach, and red onion. On the side you'll get an incredible sambal mayo for dipping. The chicken is tender and juicy, while the long pepper sauce adds a unique, vibrant flavor you won't be able to resist. Say goodbye to boring lunches for good with this dish!

name: Seared Salmon Grits
description: Enjoy a taste of home with Chef Chris's everyday favorite: seared salmon. He takes the fish up a notch with cheesy grits, a bright veggie mirepoix. This balanced blend of sides and protein is the perfect plate for a quick lunch or dinner.

name: Sheet Pan Chili Glazed Chicken Breast
description: Madjool dates substitute for sugar in the sweet, sticky, and spicy glaze for this sheet pan-roasted chicken breast. Served with tender roasted sweet potatoes and garlicky kale, this is the perfect no-fuss paleo-friendly meal.

name: Pulled Bbq Chicken Sandwich
description: Summer in a sandwich! Chef James slathers juicy chicken thighs in tangy-sweet BBQ sauce, then grills them low and slow until the meat is fork tender. He piles a hearty portion of it on a soft potato bun along with pickled red onions for zing and refreshing, crunchy Asian slaw‚ÄîNapa cabbage, carrot, and red onion tossed in a toasted-sesame vinaigrette. It‚Äôs the perfect balance of sweet and savory, soft and crisp. Pair it with grilled corn, a slice of juicy watermelon, or a bag of your favorite potato chips.

name: Amber Roasted Chicken
description: Everyone loves roasted chicken, and this one will take top spot. This dish is inspired by a Peruvian rotisserie chicken that Chef Anthony often ate when he lived in Queens, NY. It‚Äôs absolutely one of the simplest ways to prepare chicken but full of flavor and super moist. Have fun dipping bites of boneless chicken in the zippy green chili sauce, then enjoy sides of red beans, mashed yucca, and spicy cucumber salad.

name: Meatballs with Parmesan Polenta
description: Chef Ludo's take on classic Italian meatballs. His are hearty yet soft and fluffy meatballs that use a combination of lamb and pork, complemented by pine nuts and sweet currants. They are cooked in a rich tomato sauce and served with cheesy polenta for a warm and cozy, comforting dish.

name: On The Go Protein Pack
description: Chef Santiago has expertly assembled a bundle of protein-packed snacks that‚Äôs perfect for on-the-go energizing or sharing with loved ones. The platter features pearl balls of mini mozzarella, sharp cheddar cheese, savory salami, thinly sliced pepperoni, hard boiled eggs, and buttery Castelvetrano olives. Whether enjoyed as an appetizer, in between meals as a snack, or as part of a picnic spread, this snack pack promises to elevate any occasion.

name: Cauliflower and Chickpea Curry
description: Vegetarians go nuts for this curry, my best friend's mom is Indian and have been teaching me recipes for a year now!

name: Classic Cornbread Whipped Hot Honey Butter
description: This cornbread is extra moist thanks to the addition of buttermilk, and a drizzle of Chef's signature hot honey & honey-whipped butter with a touch of truffle salt takes it from average to amazing. You'll savor every last crumb of this thick slice of cornbread!

name: Tandoori Roast Chicken
description: For the centerpiece of this nutritious meal, Chef Einat marinates tender chicken thighs in a rich blend of aromatic spices, then roasts them to lock in flavor and juiciness. They‚Äôre served on a bed of hearty brown lentils, nutty quinoa, and green peas, topped with fried shallots for crunch, and paired with a creamy raita to balance the heat with cooling freshness. Elevate any ordinary weeknight with this delicious fusion of flavors and textures.

name: Chicken Milanese Piccata Sauce
description: Two classic Italian dishes come together to create something even more delicious than the sum of their parts. Chef Anne crafts a timeless Chicken Milanese, delicately breaded and pan-seared to golden perfection, then crowns it with a tangy Piccata sauce that dances on the palate with bright notes of lemon and capers. Perfect with pasta, a fresh salad, or bread from your favorite bakery.

name: Vegan Penne Pasta Casserole
description: Healthy mouth watering dish made from whole grain penne. Cozy and guilt-free casserole filled with basil, spinach in cashew cream.

name: Pan Fried Crab Cakes
description: Get set to indulge! Gorgeously golden on the outside and tender on the inside, these pan-fried crab cakes are loaded with flavor‚Äîand sweet, succulent lump crabmeat, not filler. They‚Äôre thoughtfully paired with a refreshing salad of peppery baby arugula and sweet roasted red peppers and onions. The lemon wedge and spicy sriracha aioli are yours to spritz and drizzle as desired.

name: Leek Chorizo Sweet Potato Frittata
description: Indulge in a protein-packed, harvest-inspired breakfast to start your day off on a fresh foot. This frittata features buttery leeks and tender baked sweet potatoes, all set in a seasoned base of eggs. The frittata is paired with a chorizo and butternut squash hash for an extra punch of protein and flavor.

name: Braised Beets with Indian Spiced Yogurt
description: Packed with vitamins, potassium, and anti-inflammatory benefits, these red beets will nourish you from the inside out. Naturally sweet, they‚Äôre slowly braised until just tender and served with an Indian-spiced yogurt that‚Äôs tangy and creamy. Whether paired with a main or added to a salad, this side is a wholesome way to brighten your day.

name: Beef and Broccoli Stir Fry
description: Think of thinly sliced flank steak marinated in sesame sauce with garlic with crunchy crispy tender green broccoli for the refreshing side. and yes, its gluten free, paleo and whole30!

name: Blackened Shrimp Cheesy Grits
description: A modern take on a Southern comfort classic, these shrimp and grits might just ruin you for all others. Chef Meena's stone-ground grits are infused with sharp cheddar and roasted jalape√±os for even more richness and a little kick. The creamy are topped with grilled blackened shrimp and a rich gravy made with onions and bell peppers. A drizzle of hot honey is the perfect finishing touch.

name: Peruvian Grilled Chicken Veggies
description: Grilled chicken featuring the Peruvian pepper, aji panca. This smokey marinade achieves a depth of flavor complemented by grilling the chicken. The chicken is served with grilled vegetables over a light, lemony eggplant pur√©e and topped with zippy chimichurri. You can't go wrong with grilled chicken and veggies!

name: Chicken Fajitas with Tricolor Bell Peppers
description: A protein-rich, Tex-Mex dish filled with flavor. Chicken paired with tricolor bell peppers and paired with Mexican rice.

name: Steak Suya West African Kale Salad
description: Thinly sliced hanger steak is seasoned with a West African dry spice rub, then grilled to perfection. The delectable steak, seasoned in the style of suya beef, is served on a bed of kale with cherry tomatoes and dates all dressed in a zesty ginger dressing. Perfect for a light dinner or satisfying midday meal, enjoy another nutritious, delicious dish from Chef Pierre.

name: Cuban Roasted Portobellos
description: Chef Adriana puts a vegan spin on traditional Cuban lechon asado‚Äîin place of pork, she substitutes hearty, meaty, mojo-marinated Portobello mushroom caps, slow-roasted to concentrate their umami-rich flavor and garnished with zesty red onion and Fresno peppers for extra kick. On the side: Savory crisp-fried lentil croquettas with a bright, herbal, and citrusy mojo dipping sauce. This dish is fun, vibrant, and full of Latin flavor‚Äîjust like a night in Miami.

name: Tomato Chili Poached Cod
description: This dish from Chef Maribel is light, bright, and bold. Here, cod is poached in a fragrant, chili-kissed tomato broth, and paired with golden-roasted sweet potatoes, carrots, and butternut squash. A side of lemony cabbage slaw adds a fresh, tangy kick, filling you up and leaving you energized.

name: Cannellini Kalamata Calabrian Pasta
description: Italian inspired pasta tossed with Kalamata olives, cannellini beans, calabrian chili, olive oil, parsley and garlic, with a generous portion of char roasted cauliflower and a lemon caper olive oil sauce and seasoned bread crumbs.

name: Quinoa and Veggie Enchiladas
description: The most special ingredient is the quinoa and kale mixture. Enchiladas are traditionally served with a meat-based filling. Chef Jose has been serving enchiladas in his restaurants for almost 20 years. This is his take on a meatless version, featuring quinoa, kale, oaxaca and monterey jack cheese, served with a spicy chipotle cream, black beans and rice. The creamy chipotle sauce adds a touch of smoky spice and additional richness.

name: Seared Halloumi Bowl
description: Satisfying and savory, yet light and refreshing, you'll love every bite of this Mediterranean-inspired bowl. Full of chickpeas, seasoned lemon and herb potatoes, sweet roasted red peppers, and pickled red onions, the bowl is crowned with pieces of seared, caramelized Halloumi cheese.

name: Asian Inspired Chef Salad
description: Chef Anne's Asian-inspired salad is loaded with nutritious, delicious elements to keep you satiated and energized. Marinated tofu, tricolor quinoa, carrots, pickled shallots, edamame, and toasted almonds are piled on a bed of arugula and crunchy red cabbage and a tangy miso-ginger-sesame vinaigrette is the finish touch on this refreshing, protein-packed salad.

name: Rocoto Pepper Shrimp Enchiladas
description: Peru and Mexico are represented in this dish which showcases Peru's rocoto chile peppers, plus a traditional Mexican sauce technique. Spicy rocoto peppers are mellowed out when cooked into a creamy Mexican-style tomato sauce, which is then poured over enchiladas and baked. The base of the enchiladas is soft corn tortillas that are filled with garlic-butter saut√©d shrimp with spinach. The super savory enchiladas are served sides of fluffy Jasmine rice and saut√©ed haricots verts green beans for a fresh and satisfying meal unlike anything you've ever tasted!

name: Thyme Grilled Chicken
description: You'll love the chargrilled taste of these juicy thyme chicken. A classic Argentinian way to enjoy meat, the skewers are made with chicken thighs that have been marinated with garlic, herbs, and lemon, and paired with skewers of bell peppers and onions on the side. Rounding out the meal are smoked paprika potatoes and broccoli florets roasted with garlic and olive oil.

name: Coconut Vegetable Grain Bowl
description: This hearty stew features tender cabbage, carrots, broccoli and onions, all slow cooked in a flavorful broth with coconut milk and turmeric. The comforting mix is served over quinoa and topped with crispy shallots and soy egg for a little extra protein. Known as Sayur Lodeh in Indonesia and Singapore, this stew is super antioxidant rich and healthy, yet comforting and satisfying.

name: Coconut Thai Curry Chicken
description: A flavorful and mild spicy chicken and vegetable Thai curry recipe. Ready in under 30 minutes, and healthy too! Made with zucchini and red peppers for a healthy crunch. Coconut milk brings a good amount of sweetness to mellow down the heat from the red curry paste.

name: Purple Sweet Potato Cheesecake Flan
description: Cheesecake meets flan in this silky, custard-like creation, but the real star is the Okinawa sweet potato. Prized in Japan for its deep purple hue and naturally sweet, slightly earthy flavor, it adds richness and depth to every bite. Topped with a drizzle of caramel syrup, this dessert is one you‚Äôll want to eat on repeat.

name: Pumpkin Pie Tart
description: A delightful twist on the classic favorite, Chef Miriam‚Äôs tart features a scrumptious, silky-smooth pumpkin filling that beautifully melds the rich flavors of fall with a hint of refreshing orange zest. Nestled in a buttery shell and infused with seasonal spices like cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves, it‚Äôs a perfect balance of sweetness and warmth.

name: Mission Style Breakfast Chorizo Egg Burrito
description: Livy's All Day Cafe's Mission-Style Breakfast Chorizo & Egg Burrito is the perfect choice if you want to spice up your meal prep routine. Stuffed with black beans, a savory queso mix, and fluffy scrambled eggs, this burrito is a flavor powerhouse. The adobo-spiced potatoes and Mexican chorizo create a delightful medley of textures while you savor the warming spices and chiles. Served with a vibrant salsa verde made from tomatillos and jalape√±os and a creamy crema, this burrito promises a delicious and satisfying meal any time of day.

name: Moroccan Chickpea Tagine
description: This hearty organic vegan stew features a vibrant, warming North African 8-spice blend. The chickpeas are cooked with kombu seaweed for easy digestion, and a generous serving of fresh wilted spinach is stirred into the tagine to add a sneaky serving of greens and fiber. Served with basmati rice cooked with turmeric and pepper for anti-inflammatory benefits, and a tangy side of cilantro jalapeno sauce to brighten the whole dish.

name: Grilled Persian Koobideh Kabobs
description: Juicy beef and lamb mingle in these grilled koobideh kabobs, a beloved dish in Persian cuisine. In Chef Chase's version, the succulent skewers are perfectly char-grilled and served alongside fragrant saffron-infused rice and smoky charred tomatoes. This meal embodies the essence of Persian culinary excellence.

name: Chow Mein Grilled Flank Steak
description: Fresh, flavorful, and fast‚ÄîChef Esther‚Äôs take on this Chinese take-out favorite stars with thick wonton noodles and lots of veggies, including baby corn, shiitake mushrooms, onions, and sweet bell pepper, all stir-fried with rich, super-savory soy and sesame sauce until perfectly tender. (There‚Äôs extra sauce on the side, too, so you can tailor the meal to your taste.) And speaking of tender... she tops that tantalizing combination with a hearty portion of sliced flank steak, grilled for deliciously smoky char. Meet your new go-to meal.

name: Jackfruit Stuffed Poblano Peppers
description: This dish looks as good as it tastes! A colorful, vegetarian version of the classic stuffed pepper but made with sweet, spicy poblanos. Stuffed with tender jackfruit that mimics the texture of pulled meat, plus black and kidney beans, and topped with Mexican shredded cheese and a drizzle of avocado crema, this dish is packed with protein and flavor.

name: Redland Ranch Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon
description: Redland Ranch Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon by Oneill is a premium wine that showcases the rich flavors and aromas typical of California Cabernet Sauvignon. Perfect for any occasion, this wine is crafted with a commitment to quality and is suitable for various dietary preferences.

name: Mini Margherita Pizza
description: Prepare to be fighting your little ones for a bite of this cheesy pizza. For his single-serve pizza, Chef DeLucie starts with a base of naan bread‚Äîit‚Äôs softer than traditional pizza dough, with a slightly chewier texture. Plus, it has a subtle buttery garlic flavor that‚Äôs a natural pairing with the zesty tomato sauce, creamy mozzarella cheese, salty grana padano cheese, and fresh basil that have made the Margherita Pizza a beloved classic. And at under 400 calories, this pizza is perfectly portioned for those young (or young-at-heart) ones.

name: Fiesta Jerk Hanger Steak
description: Have a 'fiesta' in your mouth with these flavor-packed skewers! Tender hanger steak marinated in a spicy jerk sauce with bell peppers, onions, and pineapple for a touch of sweetness. The kabobs sit on a bed of mixed green salad dressed in a refreshing lemon and shallot vinaigrette with a little crumbled feta for that perfect salty balance. This dish tastes fresh and fiery, any time of year.

name: Pork Dumplings with Junzi Dipping Sauce
description: Who doesn't love traditional Chinese-style boiled dumplings, especially when they're packed full of tender pork and chives, then wrapped in chewy, thin dough? Chef Wanting & Yong serve their dumplings with Junzi Kitchen's homemade dumpling sauce for dipping and scallions for garnish. Enjoy this classic Chinese appetizer made with traditional ingredients as a satisfying snack or light meal, especially when paired with your favorite veggies.

name: Bengali Shrimp Curry
description: Chef Aarthi's Bengali Curry gets its delicious flavor from cardamom, bay leaf, cinnamon, and mustard, along with many other warming spices. Plump shrimp add a succulent sweetness to the aromatic, mild coconut curry. She serves it alongside jasmine rice and roasted eggplant, the perfect sides for this classic dish from Eastern India.

name: Grilled Naan Pizza Margherita
description: Chef John turns the classic Margherita pizza on its head by replacing the typical crust with grilled Indian naan. The slightly charred flavor of the fluffy bread replicates the flavors you'd get in a traditional pizza oven. He layers on marinara sauce, Mozzarella and Grana Padano cheese, fresh basil, and a drizzle of good olive oil for the perfect pizza night, any night!

name: Pumpkin Brownie
description: Experience the perfect fusion of fall flavors with this delicious pumpkin brownie that features a luscious base of classic fudgy brownie. Topped with a velvety layer of spiced pumpkin brownie, it brings a seasonal warmth and moistness that enhances every bite. Finish with candied maple pepitas on top which add a delightful crunch and a hint of sweetness, nicely balancing the chocolate and pumpkin flavors.

name: Sticky Asian Ribs
description: These sticky Asian-inspired ribs are the perfect meal or late-night snack. The ribs are cooked until they‚Äôre fall-off-the-bone tender then coated in a sweet and sticky sauce that makes them finger-licking good. Miso-roasted carrots and broccoli are the perfect savory complements for the ribs.

name: All American Bacon Cheeseburger Deluxe
description: Chef Chris presents his quintessential All-American bacon cheeseburger. A hearty 7-ounce beef patty is flame broiled then piled high with American cheese and crispy bacon, plus all the fixings‚Äîlettuce, tomato, onion, and bread & butter pickles‚Äîall on a plush brioche bun. A creamy gochujang aioli that Chef Chris has coined his 'Bang Bang Sauce' adds the perfect kick of heat to keep you coming back for bite after juicy bite.

name: Jollof Pasta Primavera Vegetables
description: Jollof is one of the most popular dishes in West Africa, and while it's typically made with rice, in this dish Chef Pierre takes the sauce and flavors of jollof and mixes them into al dente pasta instead. This vegetable-filled version features carrots, zucchini, red bell peppers and cherry tomatoes all in the sweet, slightly smoky, umami-filled sauce. Garnished with fresh Italian parsley, this dish is sophisticated yet ultra comforting.

name: Chicken Ragu
description: Pulling together hormone free chicken legs infused with thyme and sage that just perfect for tossing in tubes of rigatoni. If you are on the hunt for new flavors, this one hits the mark.

name: Baja Style Fish Tacos
description: Flakey and moist white fish is paired with crunchy cabbage to provide texture, and a creamy, mild chipotle mayo brings a hint of heat to your palette. Wrapped up in flavorful corn tortillas, these tacos are sure to be a new favorite for seafood lovers.

name: Vegan Meatballs
description: Tasty and healthy. Your favorite comfort food now made guilt-free with vegan meatballs made from kidney beans and oats.

name: Detox Green Glow
description: Revitalize your body with a crisp, green fusion of watermelon, apple, spinach, and lemon, plus dandelion for a powerful, natural detox.

name: Curried Vegetable Fritters Coconut Lime Sauce
description: Made from whole food ingredients and loads of spices, these fritters are full of flavor and nutrition. Jam-packed with yam, potato, carrot, and onion, the crispy fritters are served with a creamy coconut-lime-cilantro sauce to cool your palate and complement the spices. Served alongside coconut rice and garlicky roasted broccoli, this is a plant-based meal that doesn't skimp on flavor or texture!

name: Auntie Mels Maple Pecan Cookies
description: With crisp, golden-brown edges and soft, chewy centers, these cookies will melt in your mouth! They‚Äôre infused with rich, nutty brown butter, a hint of natural sweetness from pure maple syrup, and crunchy toasted pecans for texture and depth. Indulge in a treat that perfectly captures the essence of autumn.

name: Buttery Hawaiian Garlic Shrimp
description: Garlic lovers, this one‚Äôs for you! Inspired by the traditional Hawaiian dish, Chef Esther saut√©s plump, succulent shrimp in a luscious sauce of butter, paprika, and lots of garlic, which becomes irresistibly sweet as it cooks. She spoons it on a bed of fluffy white rice with a side of another island favorite, Creamy Macaroni Salad‚Äîal dente elbow pasta and grated carrots swaddled in umami-rich Japanese Kewpie mayonnaise. Sweet grilled pineapple and fresh parsley are the perfect garnishes to complement all the incredible flavors, textures, and colors of this indulgent, flavor-packed meal.

name: Everything Bagel Crusted Chicken
description: Everything you love about an everything bagel, but reimagined for dinner time! Panko breadcrumb and everything bagel spice mix form the crispy crust for chicken, served with a smooth scallion crema that mimics your favorite scallion cream cheese. Roasted fingerling potatoes, Brussels sprouts, and sweet cherry tomatoes make for a filling and familiar side for this comforting chicken dish.

name: Teriyaki Chicken Breast
description: Meet your new weeknight favorite meal! This dish is composed of crispy seared chicken breast and a beautiful, bright rainbow medley of broccoli, asparagus, and bell peppers, all cooked together in a one-pan wonder. A tangy teriyaki sauce ties the entire dish together in sweet-and-savory harmony. Eating well has never been so simple or tasted so good!

name: Nikkei Style Shrimp Fajita Tacos
description: A Japanese-American riff on classic fajitas! Shrimp are spiced and seared, then served over a bed of Japanese rice with fajita-style peppers and onions. The tacos are paired with a creamy cilantro sauce to add another layer of bright flavor and tie the whole dish together. Build your tacos and dig in!

name: Cheese Enchiladas Tomatillo Sauce
description: Charred tomatillos, garlic, and serranos are the stars of the enchilada sauce in this dish.
