The acidity from these Mexican green tomatoes makes for a garden fresh flavor, balanced by some heat from serrano peppers. The enchiladas are made by rolling corn tortillas around a flavorful filling of pepperjack cheese, then dousing them in that tasty tomatillo sauce. Sides of white rice and spiced black beans make the meal complete alongside crema fresh to cool down any heat from the enchiladas.

name: Creamy Truffle Parmesan Pasta
description: This dish is a taste of fine dining in your very own kitchen. It features a rich, creamy Parmesan sauce scented with white truffle and tossed with perfectly al dente Tagliatelle pasta. A little fresh parsley on top adds brightness and color.

name: Smoked Brisket
description: Chef Bubb‚Äôs signature brisket is special for a reason. First, it‚Äôs slow-smoked until the meat gets mouthwateringly tender. Then it's topped off with Granddad‚Äôs Root Beer BBQ Sauce before being served alongside buttery mashed potatoes.

name: Crispy Shrimp Tacos
description: Seared shrimp chopped and folded into a spicy chipotle mayo. To bring instant crunch, Ched Francesco added panko breadcrumb on this recipe. A lime-spiked slaw piled on top adds even more incredible texture. Serve with a crisp, smooth Mexican-style lager and you‚Äôll be ready to hit the cabana in no time.

name: Rigatoni Alla Vodka Fresh Burrata
description: Burrata, a fresh cow's milk cheese originating in southern Italy, is the star of this stellar pasta dish with creamy vodka sauce and fresh basil.

name: Grilled Organic Chicken Inasal
description: Chef Armando's serving up a taste of some of his favorite Filipino dishes, all in one plate of goodness. Succulent organic chicken is marinated in a zesty blend of lemongrass, ginger, and shallots then grilled to perfection and basted with luxuriously rich annatto butter. Served on a bed of tasty pancit bihon‚Äîa seasoned glass noodle and veggie stir fry‚Äîthis dish is pure comfort in every bite.

name: Jgs Adobo Chicken Mac N Cheese
description: Enjoy your childhood comfort food, but kicked up a few notches. Chef Jose's signature macaroni and cheese is totally irresistible with al dente cavatappi pasta and a decadent four-cheese sauce. Adding in slices of Adobo-spiced, seared chicken breast makes the dish a bit heartier and more balanced, with the heat from the Adobo breaking up all that richness. To take it over the top, Chef tops it with a buttery Panko breadcrumb topping infused with fresh herbs, plus some Gruyere and Parmesan cheeses for extra nuttiness, then bakes the entire dish. This is a guaranteed crowd-pleaser that will have everyone fighting over the last bite!

name: Flat Iron Steak Au Poivre with Peppercorn Sauce
description: A classic French bistro steak that will elevate any weekday. Peppercorn-crusted beef flat iron steak is grilled to perfection, then paired with a mild yet flavorful peppercorn-laced creamy pan sauce, garnished with fresh Italian parsley. Rich and delicious, this steak will take any meal up a notch. Pair with your favorite potatoes, grilled veggies, or a light salad for an easy, elegant dinner in minutes.

name: Baked Lemon Garlic Salmon
description: Fresh salmon seasoned with lemon, garlic and butter on both sides. You can't go wrong with this incredible meal with only a handful of ingredients but maximum taste.

name: Chinese Style Shepherds Pie
description: Another riff on the classic shepherds pie by chef Isaac! A savory filling of lean ground turkey, bok choy and celery is seasoned with honey and soy, and topped with mashed sweet potatoes spiced with chinese five spice powder. Bok choy and sweet potatoes provide nourishing vitamins and minerals as well as antioxidants, so this pie is as nutricious as it is delicious!

name: Tourlouk Greek Ratatouille with Chicken
description: Considered the Ratatouille of Greece, Tourlouk (meaning all mixed up) is a delicious way of cooking fresh-from-the-garden vegetables in an herbed tomato sauce. Chef Jona pairs his version of Tourlouk with rosemary and black pepper-marinated then seared chicken breast. The accompanying lentils and rice make this an extra satisfying meal, which can be enjoyed either hot or at room temperature.

name: La Petite Merlotte Rouge
description: Soft, silky, and clean, this juicy drop is made with the best Merlot grapes, harvested and individually selected for quality. Sips are smooth and velvety, with bursts of black cherries and a hint of cassis.

name: Mango Habanero Chicken
description: This dish takes a classic pairing‚Äîfried chicken and mashed potatoes‚Äîand puts a totally new spin on it. Crispy bites of breaded chicken thighs are tossed in a mango-habanero sauce that's sweet, sticky, and spicy. The chicken is accompanied by mashed red potatoes and roasted broccoli that's been tossed with sambal chili paste and lime. Together, all of the elements create a symphony of flavors and textures in each bite.

name: Curried Carrot and Coconut Soup
description: This creamy and healthy curried carrot soup is the perfect balance of sweet, savory, and spiced. It's vegan, low in calories, but not lacking in any depth of flavor. Perfect for lunch or a light dinner!

name: Blackened Steak Quesadilla
description: Enjoy Chef Santos‚Äôs spice-marinated hanger steak seared over high heat then wrapped up in a golden tortilla with shredded mozzarella and cheddar along with saut√©ed bell peppers and onions. Sour cream is of course included on the side!

name: Stewed Moroccan Lamb Meatballs
description: This dish perfectly blends the sweet and savory. It's Chef Dustin's take on Moroccan flavors with tender lamb meatballs braised in sweet tomato sauce, nutty brown rice, and a cooling yogurt sauce. Raisins and dates bring sweetness and lots of fresh herbs cut through all the richness. Each bite is full of balanced flavor!

name: Spicy Buldak Ramen with Chicken
description: In Korean, the word buldak translates to 'fire chicken' and this dish brings the heat! Fresh, bouncy ramen noodles and juicy chargrilled chicken thighs are tossed in a spicy gochujang sauce with little pockets of creamy melted mozzarella cheese. You'll savor every bite of this pure Korean comfort food!

name: Chicken Agrodolce
description: If a recipe has been around since ancient Roman times, you know it must be a good one. Chef Marc‚Äôs take on Italian Chicken Agrodolce starts with succulent, perfectly seasoned boneless chicken thighs, roasted with extra virgin olive oil and earthy oregano. Then, he crafts a richly layered pan sauce with red wine, honey, orange, balsamic vinegar, garlic, almonds, raisins, and dried cherries. The resulting dish is bursting with savory-tangy-sweet flavor. Served with a side of refreshing lemony broccoli, this is the kind of beautifully balanced meal you‚Äôll want to put on regular rotation.

name: Chicken Lemon with Roasted Asparagus
description: A well-balanced meal that‚Äôs light, bright, and filling. Here, chicken breast is baked until tender in a zesty marinade, then served with a nourishing side of roasted asparagus and caramelized Brussels sprouts. It‚Äôs finished with a squeeze of fresh lemon for an extra burst of citrusy freshness.

name: Lomo Saltado
description: Here's a traditional Peruvian dish with unbelievable depth of flavor you may just find yourself craving for weeks to come. A fusion of many different influences, Chef Andres' Lomo Saltado features tender strips of beef stir-fried with garlic, red onion, and plum tomato. Accompanied by crisp roasted potatoes in place of the tradition fries as well as fluffy rice, the beef is served with a side of Chef's special Lomo Salsa, a tangy sauce made with oyster sauce, soy, and ginger.

name: Aarthis Special Chicken Thigh Tikka Masala
description: Chef Aarthi took perhaps the most well known Indian restaurant dish and made it more accessible and wholesome, so you can indulge regularly. In her version, juicy chicken thighs are marinated and roasted then placed in a creamy, fragrant tomato-based curry infused with fenugreek and other warming spices. The chicken is paired with roasted broccoli and a side of cumin-scented steamed basmati rice to soak up every last drop of the curry. Sweet, mildly spicy, and decadent, this dish is a universal favorite for a reason.

name: Bang Bang Chicken Thighs
description: Spicy, sweet, and creamy all at the same time, Chef Jason and Corey‚Äôs Bang Bang Chicken Thighs are an incredible explosion of flavors. First, they marinate and stir-fry juicy, tender chicken thighs in toasted sesame oil and ginger to infuse them with warm, nutty flavor, then toss them with that irresistible signature sauce and pile a hearty serving high on a bed of fluffy Jasmine rice. On the side: tender-crisp perfectly steamed broccoli florets. Take your tastebuds on an unforgettable culinary journey any night of the week.

name: Spinach Ravioli with Wild Mushrooms
description: Spinach ravioli in creamy Parmesan sauce. It‚Äôs smooth, rich, and delicious. This vegetarian dish topped with mixed sauteed mushrooms and finished with seasoned toasted breadcrumbs for crunch.

name: Crispy Sesame Peanut Panko Shrimp
description: To Chef Maia, shrimp are perfect as is, but coating them with panko, sesame, peanuts, and frying them until crispy just takes shrimp to another level! Paired with sweet chili sauce to dip plus a side of a zesty corn and basmati rice salad flavored with cilantro, ginger, and garlic, this meal is a must-try for shrimp lovers!

name: Rich Beef Mushroom Rigatoni
description: For her version of pasta with meat sauce, Chef Tracey starts with flavorful beef chuck roast. It‚Äôs browned then slowly braised to fall-apart tenderness in a mixture of red wine, beef stock, tangy crushed tomatoes, aromatic vegetables, and herbs and spices. The addition of Porcini mushrooms brings even more flavor and umami richness to the sauce. She serves a hearty portion over al dente rigatoni, then finishes it with shaved Parmesan and fresh parsley for an elevated take on a comfort-food classic.

name: Carne Asada Rice Bowl
description: Everything you want in a bowl! Enjoy a deliciously balanced meal of perfectly char-grilled skirt steak, paired with a fresh salad of corn, tomatoes, red onions, and nopales (or prickly pear cactus, which brings a citrusy, tart kick). It‚Äôs all served with authentic Mexican rice infused with diced tomatoes and peas, along with black beans and a spicy Chile de Arbol salsa.

name: Beef Samosa with Mango Chutney
description: These golden brown, crispy parcels are filled with spiced and herbed ground beef. Served alongside with a fresh arugula and cherry tomatoes salad, mango chutney and creamy masala yogurt sauce, this meal brings a burst of flavors that will leave your taste buds craving for more.

name: Grilled Sirloin
description: All about the juiciest grilled sirloin with a rich smoky creamy leaks and spinach on the side. A rich and creamy cheddar sauce, swimming with sweet leeks and tender spinach, makes a perfect accompaniment for grilled steak.

name: Penne Chicken Green Curry
description: This Thai-Italian fusion meal brings together influences you never thought to combine but once you try it, you'll never go back. Chicken thighs and tender Japanese eggplants are roasted to perfection then served with an authentic Thai green curry sauce. To pair, Chef Hong swaps out the typical rice in favor of perfectly cooked penne, then adds crispy Thai basil chips and a sprinkling of parmesan cheese on top to finish off the dish.

name: Mexican Grain Bowl with Spiced Shrimp
description: Experience the vibrant flavors of Mexico with this fresh and balanced bowl. Delight in the wholesome combination of succulent, spice-crusted shrimp, nutty brown rice, tri-color quinoa, and baby spinach. Drizzled with a rich and flavorful red salsa made with dried chiles, tomatillo, pumpkin seeds, tomatoes, and spices, the bowl is finished with a colorful mix of cherry tomatoes, peas, carrots, and fresh cilantro, this healthy and delicious dish is a true culinary delight.

name: Cider Braised Pork Belly
description: If you have never tried pork belly before, then beware because your head may explode. This will be a salty, melt-in-your-mouth, unbelievable-with-each-bite adventure. I cook the pork belly slowly to get that crackling, delicious skin.

name: Vegetarian Lasagna
description: This is an Italian classic made right. It has the four basic components of perfect lasagna: creamy fresh mozzarella cheese, a garlicky pesto and ricotta filling, slow oven-roasted tomatoes, and fresh lasagne noodles. No meat, no problem!

name: Tacos Checa Rib Eye Steak Tacos
description: Meet Chef Andres' Tacos Checa: where Mexican and Japanese cuisines meet in a culinary mash-up that will leave you craving more. These tacos features Japanese-style rib-eye steak, thinly sliced and nestled in soft flour tortillas then generously drizzled with a special Mexican-style chile-infused ponzu sauce. A side of sushi rice completes the fusion dish.

name: Smoked Brisket Burrito Bowl
description: Spiced, smoked, and slowly cooked, beef brisket shines in this one-bowl wonder, stacked with cilantro rice, refried beans, and baby spinach. Served with salsa verde cruda‚Äîa fresh blend of tomatillo and jalapeno‚Äîand topped with pepperjack cheese, this dish brings Texas and Mexico in flavor form.

name: Lafrieda Signature Cheeseburger
description: The world‚Äôs most renowned butcher, Pat LaFrieda, delivers his famous Original Beef Blend cheeseburger, on a potato bun, topped with Pat‚Äôs signature steak sauce. We serve our build-your-own burger with a side of toasted tater tots.

name: Deglazed Grilled Salmon
description: Deglazed Grilled Salmon by Irvin Paredez is a delicious meal featuring grilled salmon deglazed with a flavorful sauce, accompanied by fregola and bok choy.

name: Thai Green Curry
description: Green curry is a comforting Thai classic. Here, Chef Hong braises chicken thighs in a coconut milk base, boosted with soft Japanese eggplant and aromatic Thai basil leaves. It‚Äôs served with a nutty mix of quinoa and rice, with a touch of chili adding heat.

name: Hibachi Chicken Bowl
description: Bring the flavors of a Japanese hibachi experience home with Chef Nelson's Hibachi Chicken Bowl. It features seasoned, hibachi-style chicken and mixed veggies, served up on a bed of steamed basmati rice. Topped with spicy mayo and garnished with toasted sesame seeds, this bowl is a lunch or dinner option that you'll crave week after week.

name: Aji De Gallina Chicken In Creamy Aji Amarillo Sauce
description: Chef Andres is ready to take your tastebuds on a trip to Peru. Tender chicken breast is cooked in a flavorful sauce made with Aji Amarillo, a quintessential Peruvian pepper that's mild and a little sweet. The sauce is creamy, sweet, and savory, and instantly craveable with the traditional pecans and kalamata olives for a little pop of acidity and crunch. Served alongside fragrant basmati rice infused with fresh cilantro, as well as the traditional accompaniments: potatoes and a hard-boiled egg, this dish offers a satisfying and comforting experience. This classic Peruvian dish is sure to delight!

name: Thai Glass Noodles with Shrimp
description: Chef Esther crafts a harmonious blend of succulent roasted shrimp, vibrant veggies, and delicate mung bean noodles, all bathed in a savory-sweet blend of nutty sesame-seed oil, sugar, and umami-rich oyster and dark soy sauces. They‚Äôre called glass noodles because they become transparent when cooked. And it‚Äôs easy to see just how irresistibly flavor-packed this one-bowl meal is, whether you enjoy it as a hearty lunch or a lighter dinner.

name: Greek Yogurt Cinnamon Braised Peaches
description: This refreshing, summery breakfast dish will keep you fueled throughout the day. Protein-packed Greek yogurt is layered with braised peaches that are gently spiced with cinnamon. Toasted granola, filled with nutrients from rolled oats, walnuts, almonds, and flaxseeds, brings a satisfying crunch to finish it all off.

name: Bulgogi Japchae Stir Fried Glass Noodles with Marinated Beef
description: This is a very popular Korean dish made with chewy, glass noodles made of sweet potatoes. They're stir-fried with assorted charred vegetables and marinated Korean BBQ-style bulgogi beef. This bowl is a savory, sweet and nutty flavor bomb!

name: Crispy Tilapia Over Greek Salad
description: Tender tilapia fillets are expertly seasoned and cooked, then served alongside a refreshing Greek salad made with cucumber, tomato, red onions, and a drizzle of olive oil. Accompanied by simply roasted broccolini and fluffy brown rice, this dish offers a balanced and nutritious meal. The creamy and tangy tzatziki sauce adds a richness to complement to the crispy seared fish and bright salad, creating a symphony of flavors and textures that will leave you satisfied.

name: Tri Color Quinoa Bowl with Grilled Shrimp
description: This enticing bowl is made with grilled shrimp and healthy tri-color quinoa, plus the best local spinach we could find. Adding red and yellow bell peppers, cucumber, and cherry tomato bump up the fresh factor, while a zesty cilantro-lime sauce ties the whole dish together!

name: Sweet Savory Stir Fry Noodles
description: Springy egg noodles twist around a rainbow of crisp veggies‚Äîshredded cabbage, bell peppers, zucchini, carrots, and earthy shiitake mushrooms‚Äîall slicked in an umami-packed sauce that‚Äôs equal parts sweet and savory. Blanched broccoli brings a burst of green, while a flurry of scallions and toasted sesame seeds add crunch and freshness.

name: Stir Fried Shrimp Vegetables
description: In this dish, plump, juicy shrimp are lightly coated in a savory marinade and stir-fried alongside a nutrient-rich medley of mushrooms, carrots, celery, and cabbage. This flavorful mix is partnered with chewy lo-mein-style noodles tossed in a silky garlic sauce.

name: Sri Lankan Lobster Curry
description: Fresh lobster has found a match made in heaven in this silky, fragrant coconut curry! Inspired by a dish she fell in love with at a Sri Lankan restaurant, Chef Aarthi poaches rich chunks of lobster meat in a coconut curry infused with flavors of ginger, curry leaves, and tamarind. To soak up all that luscious curry, Chef pairs it with a side of sticky sushi rice, plus a side of one of her favorite vegetable preparations: asparagus 'poriyal' stir-fried with coconut, mustard seeds, and curry leaves. With each bite, this dish will transport you to the islands of South Asia.

name: Beef Mac and Cheese
description: Your favorite classic mac and cheese combined with ground beef! What a combination! Go ahead and dig in!

name: Masala Lamb Kebab
description: Chef Aarthi transforms one of her favorite street foods into a complete and balanced meal with these kebabs. Succulent, lightly spicy ground lamb is flavored with mint, ginger, and house-made garam masala, then the roasted kebabs are paired with a luscious mint-cucumber yogurt dip to cool things down. On the side, you'll enjoy a side of Indian-style rice, flavored with lime and spices.

name: Grilled La Criolla Burger
description: In this delightful fusion of flavors, Chef Andres takes a classic burger‚Äîrich beef patty; smoky bacon; melty Cheddar cheese; crisp Romaine; and bright, acidic tomato on a soft potato bun‚Äîin a whole new direction with the addition of sweet, creamy Venezuelan Corn Sauce. It‚Äôs as simple and delicious as it sounds‚Äînaturally sweet corn kernels pureed with a touch of mayonnaise and mustard. Slather some on that juicy burger and save the rest as a dip for the roasted and perfectly seasoned Potato Spears. Ketchup? Been there, done that. Discover a taste of South America anytime you like.

name: Red Curry Braised Duck Leg
description: What's better than a flavorful, spiced Thai curry? That Thai curry, but paired with succulent duck legs. Chef Phet sears duck legs then braises them in a red coconut curry infused a medium spiced red curry paste, fish sauce, and an aromatic mix of lemongrass, ginger, garlic, Thai basil and cilantro. This way, the tender meat gets deeply imbued with all the flavors of the curry, and a side of ginger-scallion jasmine rice ensures you can soak up every bit of the creamy coconut sauce. A simple side of blanched broccoli adds a pop of color and nutrition.

name: Chicken Tikka Masala
description: Chef Andres' take on classic Indian chicken tikka masala. With a mix of Indian spices and herbs, the buttery chicken is imbued with the complex flavors of a sweet masala sauce. Basmati rice rounds out the dish for a taste of Indian comfort cooking.

name: Grilled Skirt Steak Herbed Frites
description: Tender skirt steak gets lightly seasoned with smoked paprika, perfectly grilled and sliced to order, then topped with an herb compound butter. Chef Chris pairs this picture perfect steak with oven-roasted herbed frites, whole roasted tomatoes, and, of course, a tarragon-infused aioli for dipping. Bring the French steakhouse home with this delicious dish.

name: Chicken Bacon Philly Cheesesteak
description: Everything you love about Philly‚Äôs signature sandwich‚Äîwith a tasty twist. Chef Tracey stuffs a toasted hoagie roll with the traditional sweet grilled onions and peppers, but instead of shaved beef, she subs in juicy, well-seasoned chopped chicken thighs and smoky bacon for a super-flavorful filling. Then she smothers it in melted Pepper Jack cheese for ooey-gooey deliciousness and a touch of jalape√±o heat. It‚Äôs served with creamy, tangy buttermilk Ranch dressing for a cooling flavor contrast. Get set to indulge... just make sure you‚Äôve got some extra napkins handy.

name: Vitality Boost
description: Jumpstart your senses! This powerhouse blend awakens your taste buds while delivering a burst of vitamins and antioxidants for lasting energy.

name: Truffle and Herb Mashed Potatoes
description: Quintessential turkey day dish with an elegant twist.

name: Bbq Mushroom Sliders
description: Savory and tender juicy barbequed mushroom slider. This hearty vegetarian comfort food gives you the feeling of munching your favorite weekend slider without the guilt. Sweet potato fries, cabbage on the side gives texture and adds brightness to this meal.

name: Chickpea Tomato Masala
description: A flavor-packed, plant-based delight, this comforting Chickpea Tomato Masala from Chef Vincent is perfect for any meal. Tender chickpeas are simmered in a rich, spiced tomato sauce infused with garlic, cumin, and garam masala, creating a bold satisfying, wholesome, and delicious stew. Paired with fluffy cilantro lime rice, the fresh citrusy notes of the lime and the aromatic cilantro beautifully complement the warm, savory masala. Each bite offers a balance of bold spices and refreshing rice, making this dish a must-try for anyone craving a meal that‚Äôs as satisfying as it is nourishing.

name: Tarragon Roasted Chicken Salad
description: With its subtly sweet anise flavor, fresh tarragon is a perfect match for moist, tender roasted chicken thighs. Chef Anthony serves a hearty portion over a grain salad composed of nutty farro, melted leeks, crisp-tender green beans, zesty radishes, and charred red onions‚Äîall drizzled with luscious buttermilk dressing for a perfectly creamy, tangy contrast. Perfect for lunch or dinner, this satisfying, flavor-packed salad will keep you energized without weighing you down.

name: Adobo Flank Steak Onions
description: Take steak and potatoes, but turn the flavor dial up to 11. Bistec Encebollado is a classic in many Spanish-speaking countries. Flavorful adobo-marinated flank steak and a pile of sliced onions cook together in the same pan, each infusing the other with rich flavor. The onions soften and sweeten as they caramelize in the beef juices, and the beef absorbs the onions‚Äô zest. Sweet and smoky grilled bell peppers and tender potatoes in creamy and slightly spicy Huancaina sauce (a combination of queso fresco and yellow Amarillo chiles) make deliciously contrasting sides for this hearty, satisfying meal.

name: White Wine Braised Short Ribs
description: Chef Chris reimagines the classic short ribs with a combination of white bean puree and buttered mushroom for a fun and family-friendly meal that‚Äôs so perfect.

name: Bubbs Signature Bbq Burger
description: Get ready for a mouthwatering BBQ experience with Bubb's signature BBQ burger. The burger features one handmade beef patty, seasoned with a special blend of smoky BBQ spices and then cooked to perfection, with a crispy exterior and a juicy, tender interior that will make your taste buds dance with joy. Topped with crispy bacon, and homemade pickles, and paired with a side of crispy tater tots, this burger is guaranteed to satisfy your comfort food cravings.

name: Lemon Rosemary Chicken
description: Say hello to your new favorite weeknight dinner. Tender chicken breast is marinated with an aromatic blend of shallots and rosemary and cooked to juicy, never dry, perfection. The chicken is served atop a bed of Parmesan-laced mashed potatoes that boast a rich and velvety texture and bright yellow hue thanks to a hint of turmeric. Accompanied by perfectly grilled asparagus, this dish highlights a harmonious blend of savory and comforting flavors that will leave you craving more with each bite.

name: Grass Fed Mini Burgers
description: A very tasty and simple recipe, this mini-burger is also magnificently versatile item. The fresh tomatoes, american cheese and other spices really makes this delicious and multilayered.

name: Shrimp with Kale Salad
description: Kale is low in calorie, high in fiber and has zero fat. Chef Andres paired it with tasty cooked shrimp then drizzled with honey garlic dressing. This is a perfect meal to remember.

name: Fabios Caesar Salad with Blackened Salmon
description: We can't imagine a more ideal meal than a classic Caesar salad with Chef Fabio's famous dressing. Sweet roasted tomatoes, crispy seasoned croutons, and Grana Padano parmesan cheese take this salad from good to great. Served with a crispy seared filet of salmon that's been coated in Cajun seasonings, this dish is the epitome of lightened up comfort cooking.

name: Cheesy Alfredo Sauced Ravioli
description: Hungry for an indulgent meal that's packed with umami richness? Look no further. Let‚Äôs start with those ravioli: Delicate handmade pasta envelops a sumptuous filling of Ricotta, Romano, and Parmesan cheeses, flawlessly balanced to achieve a harmonious blend of creaminess and richness. Next, the silky smooth Alfredo sauce: It‚Äôs a decadent blend of cream, butter, and Parmesan cheese. This dish is a celebration of Italian craftsmanship and culinary finesse, and when you pair it with a simple green salad, it makes for an easy, elegant dinner.

name: Feliz Bowl
description: Nobody does a flavor-packed bowl full of plant-based goodness like Chef Ivy. This one draws inspiration from Latin America with sweet roasted plantains, a nutty red quinoa pilaf, shredded red cabbage, cherry tomatoes, and smashed avocado. Top your bowl with Chef Ivy's black bean and papaya pico de gallo, toss in the pleasantly tangy agave-lime vinaigrette, and dig in!

name: Classic Egg Cheddar Bites
description: Livy‚Äôs Classic Egg Bites are a great choice for parents looking to offer their kids a nutritious and delightful morning meal (or anytime protein snack). The ingredients are simple and wholesome: eggs rich in essential nutrients and a just-right amount of savory Cheddar cheese. The best part? They come with a side of creamy yogurt-based ranch sauce for dipping. Perfect for picky eaters‚Äîadults included!

name: Roasted Salmon with Cherry Tomatoes
description: White tender Atlantic salmon fillet, sweet cherry tomatoes, a hint of chili, sweet basil with an addition of briny capers and imported olives.

name: Grilled Chimichurri Steak
description: Grilled Flank Steak marinated in fresh zesty Chimichurri, refried black beans, and sweet plantains. A perfect combination of flavors.

name: Mediterranean Beef and Tomato Stew
description: Chef Jona is serving up a little taste of homestyle Greek comfort food. His rich beef stew features a tomato base with a hint of red wine that's balanced out by sweet spices and honey. The hearty stew is served over potatoes to soak up all the delicious broth, as well as a side of olive oil tossed green beans.

name: Cheese Tortellini
description: Crafted from a cherished family recipe, Chef Jonny‚Äôs hand-rolled tortellini are a labor of love. Tender pasta parcels are filled with a velvety cheese blend, then coated in a glossy, cream-based sauce with ham and bursts of sweet green peas. A rich, nostalgic dish that brings Italian comfort to the table.

name: Spaghetti al Pomodoro
description: Indulge in our delectable Spaghetti al Pomodoro, a classic Italian dish with a vegan twist. Savor perfectly cooked spaghetti noodles coated in a rich tomato sauce, garnished with vegan parm for a delightful burst of flavor. Experience the best of both worlds: traditional Italian cuisine and vegan goodness.

name: Thai Green Curry with Chicken
description: Chef Pimnapat's flavor-packed Thai green curry is ready to satisfy any and all cravings for spicy food! You'll savor every spoonful of coconut milk-based green curry infused with lots of aromatic herbs and even more fresh Thai Basil. This nourishing curry is the perfect blank canvas for any protein, featuring tender chicken breast, eggplant, green beans, bell pepper, and bamboo shoots. This dish is sure to spice up your routine!

name: Chicken Tinga Tacos Red Rice
description: Made with classic Mexican spices and the freshest ingredients, these zesty chicken tinga tacos are off the charts delicious. Tuck the tender braised chicken into soft corn tortillas and top with fresh guacamole, onions, and cilantro for a perfect bite in every bite. They're saucy, spicy perfection.

name: Twisted Mac N Cheese with Grilled Chicken
description: Chef Dustin's take on a kicked up classic! Saucy mac 'n' cheese gets a twist thanks to curly cavatappi pasta and crunchy breadcrumbs with crushed red pepper flakes for a little spice. Grilled chicken breast and broccolini bulk out the meal, which is sure to be a new family favorite!

name: Tender Braised Beef Daikon Radish
description: This is Cantonese comfort food at its best! Rich beef brisket is braised with daikon radish and Chinese spices until super tender and deeply flavored. The beef and all its delicious juices are served over a bed fluffy white Kokuho rice with simply steamed Broccoli and carrots.

name: Crab Cakes
description: Golden brown savory crabmeat cakes melt in your mouth. Creamy and a little hint of sweetness and bursting with flavor. The more you put in your mouth, the more you wanna get.

name: Hanger Steak with Chimichurri
description: Steak in Chimichurri thick herb sauce that is from Argentina. Served with mashed potatoes and chives.

name: Stuffed Branzino
description: Stuffed branzino with fresh herbs and crabmeat, roasted in the oven and with a side of mushrooms, sweet peas and asparagus and shallots, sauteed with a delicious sauce on top.

name: Pistachio Pesto Penne with Grilled Chicken
description: Chef Roberto's signature Genovese-style pistachio-basil pesto is the star of this dish. It's just like the pesto you know and love but with the added richness of pistachios, and works so well with al dente penne. The pesto pasta is tossed with perfectly grilled chicken, cherry tomatoes, spinach, and finished with freshly grated Parmesan. It's an Italian-inspired delight that's sure to hit the spot, no matter your mood.

name: Roasted Salmon with Basil Sauce
description: Enjoy this meal full of superfoods, including saut√©ed spinach and broccoli.

name: Buttery Lobster Risotto
description: There aren't many words to describe this elegant lobster risotto‚Äîthe unbelievable taste speaks for itself! The flavor of the creamy risotto is amplified by sweet onions, lobster stock, and fresh herbs; lobster & tarragon are a match made in flavor heaven. But the crowning touch is fresh lobster meat, with big chunks of garlic butter-poached lobster sitting atop of a bed of rich risotto. This is Italian comfort food meets high-end restaurant-level cooking and ingredients. Who's hungry?

name: Spicy Peanut Noodles Baked Tofu
description: These Thai-inspired peanut noodles are not only delicious, but also vegan and gluten-free using organic, whole-food ingredients. The creamy peanut sauce is perfect balance of tangy and sweet with a little kick from ginger and chili pepper. The sauce is tossed with gluten free sweet potato noodles, baked high protein organic tofu, and seasoned roasted broccoli, then the whole dish is topped with fresh cilantro, a squeeze of lime, and an addictive peanut-chili crunch for a little extra kick. Turn up the heat on any weeknight with this good and good-for-you dish!

name: Creamy Green Goddess Detox Soup
description: This creamy soup is made with organic ingredients, including chickpeas, broccoli, celery, and spinach. It‚Äôs packed with essential vitamins, minerals, and nutrients to support the body's natural detox process and promote overall wellness. Treat yourself well with a nourishing meal that‚Äôs both nutritious and delicious!

name: Crispy Chicken Cutlet with Zaatar Rainbow Potatoes
description: Meet Chef Einat's definition of comfort food. Crispy on the outside, juicy on the inside, the panko breadcrumb-coated chicken cutlet is everything you want it to be. The chicken is complemented by a little kick in the form of some spiced roasted fingerling potatoes and a drizzle of harissa aioli. The perfect mix of sweetness, spice, and texture, this dish is the perfect example of refined, balanced comfort cooking.

name: Chicken Parmesan Marinara
description: What's not to love about this Italian-American classic?! Chef John takes crispy breaded chicken breast and tops them with his homemade marinara sauce, rich with the flavors of basil and garlic. Topped with two kinds of cheese‚Äîgrana padano and creamy mozzarella‚Äîthen broiled to perfection, these chicken parm cutlets build the foundation for an ultra-comforting meal in minutes.

name: Cajun Shrimp Kielbasa Pasta
description: Chef Nora's Cajun-inspired shrimp and sausage pasta is ridiculously creamy and packed with just enough warm, spicy flavor to keep you coming back for bite after bite. The combination of seared shrimp and smoky kielbasa sausage is a match made in culinary heaven, and tossing the pair with al dente penne pasta just makes it all the more delicious. Take your taste buds on a trip to Cajun country without leaving the comfort of your kitchen.

name: Sweet Potato Egg Chorizo Hash
description: Chef Ivy's Mexican-inspired hash is everything you need to stay satisfied and energized all day long. This flavor-packed hash features spicy chorizo, spiced sweet potatoes, roasted red peppers, black beans, and spinach and gets paired with fluffy scrambled eggs. A drizzle of smoky roasted tomato and chipotle salsa is the perfect finishing touch.

name: Mamas Meatloaf
description: Chef Kendra's Mama‚Äôs Meatloaf tastes just like your favorite childhood comfort food‚Äîbut leveled up a notch. The tender, seasoned beef meatloaf is glazed in a sweet and smoky glaze, then sliced and served with roasted red potatoes coated in garlic and parmesan for a savory, homestyle flavor. We can't think of a better dish to keep you warm on chilly nights.

name: African Chicken
description: Chef Isaac's take on some classic West African comfort food. Chicken thighs get braised in a creamy nutty and spicy sauce with sweet potatoes and tomatoes. A warming nourishing meal that's packed with protein and plenty of vitamins from the sweet potatoes and tomatoes.

name: Shrimp Peperonata
description: For this vibrant meal, Chef Marc saut√©s succulent shrimp in a zesty peperonata sauce, made by slow-cooking sweet bell peppers in a seasoned tomato sauce with a little Calabrian chili for kick. Paired with a refreshing couscous salad studded with crisp cucumber and creamy chickpeas, it‚Äôs light and refreshing, but a heavy hitter in the flavor department.

name: Steak Lobster Enchilada
description: Are you hungry like a pirate coming home from a long voyage at sea? Chef Maribel has you covered with this Mexican-inspired surf and turf meal, featuring a lobster enchilada topped with rocoto chile sauce and achiote-marinated steak, served with jasmine rice and black beans.

name: Crispy Pan Seared Salmon
description: It‚Äôs just what you want in a salmon dish: a skin-on fillet pan-seared until crispy and golden. Chef Andres completes the meal with crunchy, garlicky green beans and basmati rice cooked in coconut milk. Top it all off with a passionfruit white wine sauce for an extra memorable meal.

name: Tandoori Chicken Namaste Bowl
description: This healthy bowl marries the perfect blend of flavors and textures. The tandoori chicken is marinated in a blend of spices and yogurt, giving it a tangy, mildly spicy flavor. Quinoa provides a perfect base for the bowl, alongside crisp veggies like cabbage, carrots, and tomatoes. A creamy cilantro-mint dressing is the perfect finishing touch, adding a pop of acidity and freshness to the dish. Packed with protein, fiber, and nutrients, this bowl is a great option for lunch or dinner.

name: Pulled Bbq Chicken Plate
description: BBQ doesn't get more classic and comforting than this. Tender chicken is grilled to perfection, pulled into succulent shreds, then tossed in Bubb's signature BBQ sauce. With a tangy and sweet flavor that perfectly balances the rich and smoky flavors of the chicken, they‚Äôre a match made in BBQ heaven. To complete the plate, the chicken is paired with a rich and buttery corn pudding and smoky baked beans, and a crisp and creamy coleslaw. Get a little bit of everything in one bite and prepare for your tastebuds to sing! This plate of BBQ excellence is comfort food to the max.

name: Handmade Chicken Artichoke and Spinach Stuffed Shells
description: In this dish, handmade fresh pasta shells are filled with chicken breast, artichokes, spinach, and creamy cheese then topped with a light Alfredo sauce on a bed of wilted baby spinach. Super comforting, yet light and fresh, Chef Marc lands the perfect balance in this summery Italian dish! You can taste the love in every bite.
ingredients: Chicken Artichoke and Spinach Stuffed Shells

name: Chicken Shawarma Fusion Bowl
description: Chef Dustin marries Middle Eastern, Mediterranean, and Indian influences in this delicious fusion dish. His take on a chicken shawarma bowl, juicy, spiced chicken pairs perfectly with aromatic cumin-scented basmati rice and a creamy, refreshing tzatziki sauce. Curry-spiced cauliflower and fresh veggies complete the dish, a culinary journey around the world in a bowl.

name: Wild Mushroom Buns Wraps
description: A mixture of honshimeji, cremini, oyster, and shiitake mushrooms roasted in garlic oil. Served with fluffy steamed buns, baby gem lettuce, cucumber kimchi and a special housemade gochujang hoisin sauce. Build your own buns, lettuce wraps or mix and match for a delightful, delicious and fun meal.

name: Chimichurri Flank Steak
description: This is Chef Chris's Argentinean Classic! Flank steak is known for being one of the most receptive to marinades, and this chimichurri marinade is known for being one of the most delicious. The vibrant freshness of the parsley and garlic are balanced out by the mellow, smoky flavor of roasted red pepper. Couscous brings a satisfying texture to the plate with its soft, pasta bite. We love how this dish recalls vivid memories of grilling meat with family and friends!

name: Asian Shrimp with Bokchoy
description: Healthy and simple bok choy meal stir fried with garlic, shrimp. This is a Chinese inspired veggie shrimp, simple is best.

name: Indo Sweet Soy Chicken Couscous Bowl
description: In Chef Abe's delectable and vibrant chicken couscous bowl, each element is more delicious than the last. With tender pieces of chicken generously coated in a rich Indonesian sweet soy sauce, couscous with crispy fried shallots, and garlicky stir-fried green beans, it's impossible to have a boring bite. Pickled cucumbers and red cabbage garnish the bowl, providing freshness and crunch. Chef drizzles a good amount of that same sweet soy sauce over the whole bowl, marrying all the elements and ensuring the dish is flavor packed from beginning to end.

name: Spicy Laksa Wonton Soup
description: Chef Nora's bringing together elements from two iconic soups‚ÄîMalaysian laksa and Chinese wonton soup‚Äîto create one unforgettable dish. Her Laksa Wonton Soup starts with a spicy, creamy base made with coconut milk and red curry paste, and features Chef Nora's signature shrimp and pork dumplings. Chili crisp, steamed bok choy, lime juice, and fish sauce round out the dish with that perfect hint of umami and spice to keep you coming back for more.

name: Steak Au Poivre
description: Chef John combines his love of two classic French bistro dishes: steak au poivre and steak frites. A gorgeous, marbled New York strip steak is crusted with black peppercorns, then pan seared for the ideal cook. The steak is paired with spiced, baked Idaho potato wedge 'frites' that are perfectly fluffy on the inside and crisp on the outside. Treat yourself to a luxurious steak dinner!

name: Shrimp and Andouille Sausage Boil
description: This dish is delicious, hearty, and rich, with just a little kick of heat. Behold, one of Chef David‚Äôs favorite Southern dishes, a low country shrimp and Andouille sausage boil, served alongside caramelized garlic butter that's scented with Cajun-inspired aromatics. As is tradition, the seafood boil is accompanied by potatoes and steamed rice to soak up every last drop of the flavorful broth. Squeeze on some lemon and dig in!

name: Crispy Tilapia Tacos
description: These fish tacos are absolutely full of flavor and texture. Crispy tilapia filets are tucked into soft corn tortillas and topped with a floral Jamaica (hibiscus) sauce and creamy cabbage slaw with a little kick from habanero, plus a dollop of fresh guacamole to cool things down. Enjoy the festival of flavors that surrounds this delicious dish!

name: Beef Empanadas with Herb Chimichurri Sauce
description: Enjoy a taste of Chef Santiago's specialty with these absolutely delicious ground beef empanadas paired with Chef Ruben's signature, spectacular chimichurri sauce. Bright and spicy, the chimichurri is an acidic and herbaceous complement to the rich empanadas and cheesy jalape√±o-tinged mashed potatoes. A favorite of our Chefs, we just know you'll love this dish as much as we do.

name: Rustic Pork Sweet Potato Stew
description: For this hearty, soul-satisfying stew, Chef Dustin braises tender, succulent pork shoulder with smoky bacon, caramelized sweet potatoes, hearty collard greens and kale, fresh corn kernels, red bell pepper, and fragrant Basmati rice in a rich, savory, perfectly seasoned stock of aromatic vegetables, fresh thyme, and spices like sweet paprika. It‚Äôs a generously portioned, vegetable- and protein-packed meal‚Äîthat still clocks in under 500 calories per serving. Pair it with a fresh green salad or your favorite bread (cornbread would be ideal), and dig in anytime you‚Äôre craving something homey and comforting.

name: Bun Less Mushroom Swiss Burger
description: For this bun-less take on a classic mushroom-Swiss burger, Chef Tracey caps (pun intended) a juicy Montreal Steak-seasoned grilled beef patty with a hearty portion of grilled baby Portobellos and melty Swiss cheese. It‚Äôs already an explosion of rich umami flavor, but then she adds even more‚Äîa sauce of creamy mayonnaise blended with concentrated beef stock for powerfully rich flavor. On the side: garlicky grilled broccoli. Grab a knife and fork and prepare to satisfy your low-carb cravings!

name: Pan Seared Duck
description: Having pan seared duck breast on our menu is always a treat to our customers, Chef Irvin prepared this meal with spinach puree that's just equally tasty.

name: Lemon Pepper Chicken Orzo Bowl
description: You‚Äôll be bowled over by the robust combination of flavors in this super-satisfying meal. Lemon-pepper spice adds zing to the cubes of juicy chicken breast, while the tender orzo pasta is infused with garlicky goodness, then tossed with hearty, nutrient-rich spinach. Stir in the creamy dill sauce to heighten the flavor factor even more. How you serve the meal is up to you. ‚ÄúI love this dish because it‚Äôs wonderful warm, but if you‚Äôre in a hurry, it‚Äôs a great cold as well,‚Äù Chef Tracey says.

name: Greek Roasted Salmon Bowl
description: Nutritious, flavor-packed, and less than 500 calories, Chef Ruben‚Äôs Greek Roasted Salmon Bowl is a real weeknight winner. He marinates and roasts a succulent salmon fillet in cumin, paprika, garlic, and other spices, then tops it with a creamy dollop of Garlicky Yogurt Sauce. Stir the fluffy couscous together with the tangy, refreshing combination of chopped plum tomatoes, red onions, crisp cucumber, green olives, and Italian parsley, all tossed in a lemony vinaigrette, and dig in to a hearty, wholesome, feel-good meal.

name: Seared Mahi Mahi with Couscous
description: This fish dish is light and fresh, with lots of flavors and textures to keep you coming back for bite after bite. Perfectly seared mahi mahi is served atop a bed of couscous with veggies like peas, zucchini, and corn all topped with a sprinkling of crispy shallots. A silky cilantro-corn sauce ties it all together with hints of citrus and herbs, just the way Chef James likes it!

name: Chicken Burrito Guajillo Sauce
description: Tender chicken marinated in a rich Guajillo Sauce takes center stage in our Chicken Guajillo Fiesta Burrito, a Mexican culinary delight. Wrapped in a warm flour tortilla, this flavorful burrito is a fusion of authentic ingredients, promising a delightful journey for your taste buds.

name: Mapo Tofu with Ground Pork
description: In her take on Mapo Tofu, Chef Nora takes the beloved Chinese classic to new heights. Firm tofu is paired with ground pork in a spicy, delightfully tingly Szechuan peppercorn-infused black bean and chili sauce. Served alongside steamed white rice, this flavorful meal is perfect for a quick lunch or a comforting dinner.

name: Lemongrass Hanger Steak
description: French-inspired Vietnamese dish with organic vegetables. A very tangent dish using lots of seasonal vegetables!

name: Hamburg Steak with Mushroom Gravy
description: A twist on a classic Hawaiian dish, loco moco! Savory seasoned ground beef 'steaks' are doused in a super savory mushroom gravy and served with white rice, button mushrooms, and roasted asparagus. This is comfort food, Chef Esther's way!

name: Mushroom Spinach Enchiladas
description: Mushrooms full of umami paired with spinach fill these enchiladas, topped with a poblano cream sauce. Even meat eaters will feel satisfied with this meal complete with rice and black beans.

name: Panko Crusted Salmon and Remoulade
description: This dish is Chef Ruben's modern take on fish and chips, featuring panko-crusted salmon that is crunchy on the outside and juicy on the inside. It is served with roasted potatoes and classic American coleslaw, complemented by a creamy Cajun remoulade sauce.

name: Big Beyond Burger
description: Beyond burger with a playful journey on a Big Mac.

name: Gnocchi Bolognese
description: This recipe is one of Chef Jonny's cherished family traditions. His father made the best gnocchi with bolognese sauce, slow-cooked to perfection. The smell of the meat sauce filling the house, the hours of preparation, and watching cartoons on fall Sundays are memories of celebration. Sharing these memories and his father's secret recipe is an honor for Chef Jonny, and we know you'll taste the love in this dish.

name: Fried Japanese Karaage Chicken
description: Tender, juicy Japanese Karaage Chicken, marinated in savory soy sauce, ginger, and garlic, gets coated in a light batter and fried to golden perfection. Chef Sergio serves it with a creamy mayo-based tartar sauce, infused with the citrusy tartness of yuzu. Accompanied by steamed rice and a salad of raw cabbage and carrot with sweet chili sauce, this meal offers a refreshing crunch and a burst of color to balance out the richness of the chicken. Enjoy each individual component, or stir it all together for a rice bowl packed with the textures and flavors of Japan.

name: Roasted Chicken Thighs with Mole
description: Slow-roasted chicken thighs are topped with Chef Akhtar's fresh take on a Mexican black mole sauce. This mole is rich and complex, with layers of flavor from dried chilis, spices, onions, garlic and dark chocolate. The mole-topped chicken is served alongside a light and fresh quinoa salad full of peppers, zucchini, and corn.

name: Spicy Braised Beef with Glass Noodles
description: Whole Chuck roast of beef is braised for hours in a spicy, Korean BBQ-inspired marinade until succulent and falling off the bone. The tender beef is served on a bed of glass noodles with a side of roasted vegetables‚Äîfingerling potatoes, carrots, Cippolini onions, and shishito peppers. It's Chef Esther's take on kalbi-jjim, a popular Korean dish usually reserved for special occasions.

name: Soy Glazed Salmon
description: Salmon is marinated in Japanese-inspired sauce finished glaze. It's served over potato mash with wasabi. A hearty dish indeed brought to you by Chef Ruben.

name: Cali Carne Asada Breakfast Burrito
description: This thick, Cali-inspired breakfast burrito is made with all the things you love: flavorful carne asada, fluffy eggs, melty cheese, and crispy potatoes. Chef Akhtar builds his dream breakfast burrito with marinated steak, Mexican-spiced scrambled eggs, crunchy tater tots, and Cheddar cheese, all wrapped up in a flour tortilla and griddled to perfection. Served with fresh guacamole, it's a must-try for any burrito lover.

name: Indonesian Spicy Lamb Bumbu Merah
description: Saut√©ed sliced lamb and vegetables in a spicy Indonesian sauce, served over boiled potatoes.

name: Turkish Guvec Vegetable Stew
description: Guvec is a traditional slow-simmered Turkish stew, featuring tender eggplant, zucchini, and potatoes, bathed in rich flavors and topped with a luscious layer of melted Parmesan and Gouda cheese. Accompanied by a side of classic Turkish rice and orzo pilaf, omnivores and vegetarians alike will delight in this warm and comforting dish.

name: Grilled Shrimp Marinara Risotto
description: Take a trip to Italy without even leaving your kitchen. Chef Santiago pairs a deliciously creamy tomato risotto with perfectly seasoned and seared shrimp. For a pop of color, texture, and nutrition, Chef adds in freshly saut√©ed zucchini and peas, plus a sprinkle of Parmesan cheese to complete the dish!

name: Ny Beef Brisket
description: A New York classic to enjoy all year round. Chris says: "As if you were at my family table".
ingredients: and other ingredients typical for a brisket preparation.

name: Mexican Chocolate Energy Bars
description: Are you looking for a delicious and healthy snack to energize you throughout the day? Look no further than Livy‚Äôs Mexican Chocolate Oatmeal Bars! Made with real Mexican chocolate, oats, coconut, agave, almonds, espresso, and bananas, they are egg-free, sugar-free, and dairy-free. Whether on-the-go or just in need of a little energy boost, these bars are the perfect choice. Indulge in the rich taste of Mexican chocolate while enjoying the benefits of a wholesome snack.

name: Tandoori Chicken Turmeric Coconut Rice
description: Tender grilled tandoori chicken is served on top of fluffy turmeric-coconut rice, with creamy yogurt raita and a tangy tomato salad. All the same flavors from your favorite Indian restaurant, but way more convenient.

name: Lemon Caper Chicken Over Fettuccine
description: Chef Kevin's culinary masterpiece pairs succulent roasted chicken in a zesty lemon-caper pan sauce with a bed of tender fettuccine pasta. A generous garnish of grated Parmesan cheese and freshly chopped chives adds layers of flavor and visual appeal. Prepare to indulge in a symphony of savory and citrusy notes with every forkful of this delightful dish.

name: Lovely Baked Ziti
description: Lovely Baked Ziti by Isaac Friedman features a delightful blend of flavors and textures, perfect for a comforting meal. This dish includes a rich tomato sauce and creamy cheese, complemented by perfectly baked ziti pasta.

name: Grilled Salmon Shrimp Salad
description: Chef Roberto grills buttery salmon and sweet, succulent shrimp for light, smoky char, then piles them high with tender, peppery arugula, crisp English cucumber, juicy cherry tomatoes, and zesty red onion to create a healthy meal that‚Äôs bursting with freshness and flavor. The bright, tangy lemon vinaigrette dressing provides even more of both. It‚Äôs a perfect choice for a nutritious and satisfying meal any time of day.

name: Spookies N Cream Cake Jar
description: Introducing our wickedly delicious Cookies and Cream Cake Jar! Dive into a spooky haven of creamy vanilla cake layered with hauntingly irresistible Oreo crumble buttercream. Indulge in the chillingly delightful combination of rich chocolate, velvety frosting, and ghostly cookie goodness. Hurry, before the ghouls snatch them all!

name: Tropical Organic Chicken Thighs
description: Organic chicken thighs are seared to perfection with butter and a touch of maple syrup for extra richness and sweetness, then served with a tangy tropical pineapple-garlic sauce that is simply irresistible. Paired with brown rice and roasted haricots verts, this is the ideal dinner to light up any weeknight.

name: Lions Head Meatballs
description: Now these are not the kind of meatballs you'll find on top of spaghetti. Chef Yong & Wanting's Chinese-style pork meatballs have been slow-braised to maximize flavor and tenderness in every bite, then are topped with fresh scallions for a pop of freshness. Pair with steamed rice, lo mein noodles, or your favorite veggies for an easy dinner that tastes like you were cooking all day!

name: Charred Shrimp Quinoa Bowl
description: With two separate side sauces, you can customize Chef Angelia‚Äôs wholesome grain bowl any way you like. Stir both the creamy Avocado Mash and rich Walnut Pesto together with the tri-color quinoa, tender, perfectly seasoned char-grilled shrimp, tangy cherry tomatoes, and peppery arugula for a one-bowl meal that packs serious flavor. Or use either as a savory spread for a side of whole-grain toast. No matter what you choose, you win!

name: Mexican Inspired Flat Iron Steak
description: Flat iron steak is one of Chef's favorite cuts because it offers tender meat with great flavor. Here it's seasoned with a Mexican-inspired smoky, zesty rub and grilled to perfection. Served with Mexican rice and rajas con queso‚Äîroasted poblano peppers saut√©ed with onions and corn, and topped with crema and two types of Mexican cheese‚Äîthis is sure to be a new favorite.

name: Sichuan Kung Pao Shrimp
description: All the same flavors you'd come to expect from Sichuan-style kung pao shrimp, but better and better for you. Tender shrimp are marinated then stir-fried in a spicy, savory sauce alongside zucchini, bell pepper, and toasted peanuts. Served with a side of steamed jasmine rice, this fiery, fresh take on a take-out favorite makes for a substantial, satisfying meal any night of the week.

name: Cheesy Rosa Sauced Ravioli
description: Are you ready for a comforting bowl of pure pasta perfection? This is it! Let‚Äôs start with those ravioli: Delicate handmade pasta envelops a sumptuous filling of Ricotta, Romano, and Parmesan cheeses, flawlessly balanced to achieve a harmonious blend of creaminess and richness. Next, the Rosa sauce: Chef Sylvia Arevalo‚Äôs blend of tangy tomatoes and sweet, anise-flavored basil gets its enchanting blush from a touch of cream. The velvety smooth result clings to each luscious cheese-stuffed pillow, adding a layer of complexity. A garnish of grated Parmesan cheese adds the finishing touch. With its universal appeal, this dish is going to become one of your new go-tos.

name: Caribbean Pork Stew
description: This plate of pure Caribbean comfort cooking features tender pork stewed in a tomato-based sauce with spices and an assortment of bell peppers and onions. The rich pork is paired with the classic Caribbean sides‚Äîred beans and rice and sweet plantains‚Äîplus pikliz, a spicy Haitian pickled slaw and the traditional tangy accompaniment to rich stews.

name: Kale Matar Tofu Paneer
description: This thermogenic dish is a veganized California version of the Indian classic saag paneer. Made with tofu instead of cheese, and kale instead of spinach, coconut milk instead of cream and served on a bed of heirloom brown rice, but maintains all the layers of flavor and texture of this favorite dish.

name: Chicken Poblano Empanadas
description: Deliciously comforting, these empanadas feature a flavorful filling of tender chicken combined with roasted poblano peppers and creamy Chihuahua cheese, offering a mild heat and smoky depth of flavor. Encased in a flaky, golden-brown pastry crust, each bite delivers satisfying crunch and savory goodness. The tangy tomatillo salsa‚Äôs gentle kick makes for a perfect accompaniment. Enjoy as snacks or a pair with a salad or steamed veggies for a hearty meal.

name: Rigatoni with Beef Bolognese
description: Perfectly cooked rigatoni pasta is tossed in Chef Fabio's famous bolognese sauce and topped with a parmigiano cream.

name: Rosemary Flank Steak
description: Experience a classic Argentinian Sunday barbecue in this rosemary steak meal with a refreshing chimichurri sauce. The dish also comes with garlicky roasted broccoli and thyme baked potatoes.

name: Miso Roasted Salmon with Cilantro Sauce
description: In this summery dish, savory miso-roasted salmon fillets are dressed with a tangy cilantro sauce and served alongside thyme-roasted pattypan squash and baby carrots. Full of fresh herbs and umami, this dish is satisfying yet light.

name: Spicy Cumin Lamb Meatballs
description: Inspired by Middle-Eastern-spiced meal, ground lamb pairs with harissa carrot puree over rice. Can't get enough of this flavour-packed lamb meatball meal to complete your dinner.

name: Filet Mignon Red Wine Reduction
description: Chef John's seared beef tenderloin and elegant red wine reduction is textbook perfection. Paired with savory white truffle-infused mashed potatoes and garlicky saut√©ed string beans, this dish brings the fancy bistro right to your table. Here's a meal guaranteed to make any night feel like a special occasion.

name: Street Style Steak Burrito
description: Just like how it‚Äôs done in Mexico, Chef Maribel cooks rib eye a la plancha. The sliced steak is then mixed with a mild guajillo sauce as well as pinto beans, Mexican red rice, crema, and shredded cheese for a flavor-packed burrito. Enjoy it with a side of tomatillo salsa!

name: Rigatoni Kale Pesto
description: This dish is my dairy-free, vegetable-forward twist on pesto pasta. Each serving contains a whole serving of roasted kale blended into a tangy, garlicky pesto with almonds, lemon, and basil, which is tossed with rigatoni pasta and topped with juicy roasted organic cherry tomatoes and mushrooms. A delicious way to sneak in some extra fiber and nutrients!

name: Katsu Curry Udon with Pork Cutlet
description: A delicious and modern take on Japanese curry rice. Chef Mike's rich Kanagawa-style curry is paired with bouncy udon noodles and crispy pork loin cutlet. The curry udon is paired with thinly shaved cabbage and Fukujinzuke, Japanese-style pickled veggies, for a pop of freshness. All the elements play equal parts to create a balanced dish that is a delight in both taste and texture.

name: Buffalo Cauliflower Bowl
description: This bowl is satiating, delicious, and full of the same comforting flavors you love, but lightened up and adapted to be plant-based. Who doesn't love spicy buffalo sauce, especially when it's paired with crispy cauliflower?! The tender roasted cauliflower is plated on a bed of mixed greens and brown rice, then garnished with fresh cilantro, sliced radishes, and shredded cabbage for crunch. Dress the whole bowl in Chef Emily's cooling tahini-herb sauce for a familiar-yet-refreshing take on nostalgic comfort food.

name: Herbed Grilled Chicken Salad
description: This hearty, healthy meal combines Italian-herbed grilled chicken breast, tangy lemon-marinated tomatoes, crisp cucumbers, pickled red onions, and creamy crumbled Feta cheese‚Äîall paired with warm, soft pita bread. The creamy Red Pepper Ranch‚Äîmade with Spanish piquillo peppers‚Äîadds a zesty kick. Use it as a dip for the bread or as a dressing for the chicken and veggies. Delicious, light, balanced, and satisfying... what more could you want in a quick lunch or flavorful dinner?

name: Mole Braised Chicken
description: Chef Kevin's mole braised chicken is a super savory, with tender chicken thighs that have braised in a rich, smoky mole sauce, resulting in a deliciously complex and satisfying dish. Paired with Spanish rice and fresh cilantro, it's a perfectly balanced plate of Mexican-inspired goodness.

name: Grilled Chicken with Fregola
description: This grilled chicken breast with fresh herbs on top is served with a delicious unpretentious fregola with some brussel sprouts mixed in and served with a caramelized onion sauce. Simply amazing.

name: Filipino Beef Stew Mechado
description: Craving a warm bowl of comfort? Mechado is a hearty, traditional Filipino braised beef stew, known for its rich and savory flavor profile. For his version, Chef Vincent browns cubes of flavorful beef chuck then gently simmers them to tender perfection with carrots, onions, and potatoes in beef stock and tomato puree accented with soy sauce and lemon juice, which imbues the dish with a deep umami character and subtle tanginess. He ladles a generous serving atop a bed of vibrant Cilantro Lime Rice and garnishes it all with fresh cilantro for an extra pop of color.

name: Chicken Parmesan with Provolone Cheese
description: Is there a more perfect combination than fried chicken and melty cheese? Chef Silvia breads juicy, tender boneless skinless chicken breasts in a mixture of Panko breadcrumbs, umami-rich Parmesan cheese, and herbs like oregano and basil, then pan-fries them to a perfect golden brown and tops them with the smoky Provolone cheese and a shower of chopped parsley for fresh contrast. She serves the chicken with marinara sauce that‚Äôs bursting with tangy-sweet tomato flavor. Pair with a fresh green salad or steamed green beans and enjoy a home-cooked Italian-American classic... without the cooking.

name: Pork Asado Bao Buns
description: This meal is a version of a traditional Filipino snack called 'Siopao.' Siopao is normally a steamed bun and inside is filled with sweet pork asado. I created a meal with bao buns and for it to be assembled with the sweet flavorful pork, fresh pickled atchara, pickled cucumbers and little gem for crunch.

name: Lamb Rack with Herbed Potatoes
description: Lamb rack with a crust of panko and fresh herbs and a side of mashed potatoes with rosemary, thyme and parsley. Delicious, you will love every piece of this dish.

name: Singaporean Chili Prawns
description: Dive into Chef Hesyan's take on one of the most popular Singaporean dishes: Chili Prawns. Succulent prawns are smothered in a sweet and spicy chili sauce with just enough kick to keep you coming back for more, then served over steamed white rice and garnished with fresh green onions for a burst of fresh flavor.

name: Housemade Corned Beef
description: Chef Chris makes his corned beef the traditional way: house brined, slow cooked, and hand sliced. The result is incredibly tender and delicious, especially when paired with stout-braised cabbage and carrots, buttered mashed potatoes, and a piquant whole grain mustard sauce.

name: Thai Red Beef Curry
description: Flavorful, delicious Thai inspired butternut squash red curry that is creamy, spicy, rich, and comforting. The sweet butternut squash pairs beautifully with all the red curry spices.

name: Sweet and Sour Chili Shrimp Bowl
description: These sweet and sour shrimp are based on kkanpung saewu, a popular Korean-Chinese dish that is a crowd favorite. Large shrimp are stir-fried with charred bell peppers, onions, and baby corn in a slightly tangy, savory, and sweet sauce with just the right amount of heat. The stir fry is served on a bed of fluffy white rice for a bowl full of deliciousness!

name: Chicken Chow Mein
description: Tender chicken thighs and savory Chinese sausage are the perfect complement to chewy Chow Mein noodles seasoned with oyster sauce, Shaoxing wine, and sesame oil. Each element is stir-fried to perfection alongside peppers and onions, ensuring layers of flavor in every perfect bite.

name: Korean Spiced Loco Moco Beef Patty
description: Chef Paul adds Korean flair to a Hawaiian contemporary classic, Loco Moco. The dish‚Äôs signature elements are all there‚Äîa juicy beef patty and sunny-side-up egg‚Äîbut with a bold twist. The patty is infused with Korean spices, and the egg is soft-boiled to bring a jammy texture. Served over fluffy steamed rice and draped in soy-spiked gravy, it‚Äôs balanced with a refreshing side of marinated cucumbers.

name: Turmeric Roasted Chicken Thighs
description: You won't believe how tender and flavor-packed these boneless chicken thighs are. Marinated with turmeric and lime juice, the chicken thighs are roasted on high heat to crispy-on-the-outside, juicy-on-the-inside perfection. Served with saffron-infused basmati rice and za'atar roasted vegetables, it's everything you want in a balanced meal and more.

name: Macho Mexican Cheeseburger
description: Chef Anthony's version of a Mexican hamburger is packed with so many layers of flavor, it'll blow your usual burger away. A juicy beef patty sneaks a bit of heat thanks to three types of chili peppers‚Äîsome smoky, some hot‚Äîthen gets finished with melty pepperjack cheese for a little extra kick. To take it over the top, it's topped with roasted jalape√±os and caramelized onions and plated on a plush potato bun. The cheeseburger is paired with crispy-on-the-outside, fluffy-on-the-inside yucca fries, plus a smoky mole aioli to dip, dunk, and smear on everything. Indulge in this seriously delicious dish!

name: Peruvian Chicken Thigh In Chili Sauce
description: Take a trip to Lima with Chef Maribel as she cooks her favorite Peruvian dish, aj√≠ de gallina. This beloved dish features chicken cooked in a curry-like sauce highlighting the quintessential Peruvian chili, aji amarillo, which is sweet and floral with mild spice. The aji amarillo peppers are cooked with nuts and spices, making for a creamy, aromatic sauce for the tender chicken, which gets topped with crunchy pecan-parsley breadcrumbs and Kalamata olives for a pop of texture and brightness. The comforting meal is completed with green beans and a bed of Jasmine rice infused with butter, garlic, carrots, and peas.

name: Black Pepper Steak
description: This delectable dish features tender strips of steak stir-fried in a warming black pepper sauce with red and green peppers and onions. Complete with a side of steamed white rice, this meal is a real treat for anyone looking for a kick of flavor.

name: Pistachio Pesto Fettuccine
description: Chef Roberto's signature Genovese-style pistachio-basil pesto is the star of this dish. It's just like the pesto you know and love but with the added richness of pistachios, and works so well with al dente fettuccine. The pesto pasta is tossed with saut√©ed mushrooms, spinach, and cherry tomatoes and finished with freshly grated Parmesan. It's an Italian-inspired delight that's sure to hit the spot, no matter your mood. Buon appetito!

name: Rack of Lamb Red Wine Sauce
description: Want to wow at your next special occasion? Chef DeLucie‚Äôs beautifully seared rack of lamb, adorned with fresh rosemary and paired with a rich red wine reduction, makes an unforgettable centerpiece to any holiday meal. Add your favorite side dishes and prepare to feast.

name: Sole Taco Salad
description: Sole seasoned with herbs of oregano, cilantro with fennel and cumin spices then roasted for a flaky finish. Topped with avocado and pickled radish over a bed of kale and cabbage.

name: Gnocchi In Truffle Cream Sauce
description: When you‚Äôre craving something saucy and comforting, this creamy gnocchi dish really hits the spot. Tender gnocchi are mixed with cremini mushrooms and fresh spinach, then tossed in a deeply savory cream sauce infused with the flavor of black truffle. The whole dish is finished with parmesan cheese and fresh parsley for that little bite of freshness at the end.

name: Chipotle Meatballs
description: Chef Santos serves up an authentic Mexican dish that's just as comforting as it is delicious! Juicy beef meatballs are stewed in a smoky, mildly spicy chipotle sauce with tender chunks of potatoes, then served with a side of fluffy jasmine rice to soak up every last drop of the flavorful sauce. Topped with a sprinkle of fresh cilantro, this meal is sure to become a family favorite fast.

name: Tuscan Baked Chicken Pappardelle
description: Chef Miriam transforms two simple ingredients, chicken and pasta, into a dynamic Italian duo. Juicy chicken thighs are rubbed in herbs and baked in a velvety Tuscan-style sauce that pops with sun-dried tomatoes. A generous handful of spinach adds a fresh burst before it‚Äôs poured over thick, sauce-catching ribbons of pappardelle.

name: Chilled Ramen Noodle Salad with Shrimp Crab
description: A nutrient-rich rainbow bowl of curly ramen noodles, crunchy seasonable vegetables, savory shrimp, and real jumbo lump crab! Served chilled, this dish screams summer, especially once topped with the creamy Gochujang dressing that ties the whole dish together with just a touch of spice.

name: al Pastor Pork Burrito Bowl
description: This modern reimagining of a Mexican classic features succulent pork shoulder marinated in pineapple juice and adobo, cooked to perfection then served up in the form of a burrito bowl. The pork sits atop a bed of hearty black beans, fragrant basmati rice, topped with a medley of fresh ingredients like onions, lime, cilantro, and homemade tomatillo salsa. A touch of Guajillo chile in the pork brings that perfect hint of smoky heat to keep you coming back for more.

name: Petite Filet Mignon
description: Indulge in the simple elegance of Chef Dustin's petite filet mignon, perfectly seared to its peak juicy tenderness. Paired with the earthy comfort of roasted potatoes and glazed carrots, this dish is masterfully crafted to satisfy any craving.

name: Chicken Breast with Peppery Pesto
description: Simply coat the chicken breast with salt and pepper finish roasted. For a paleo friend 'pasta', Chef uses zucchini combined with arugula and Italian parsley for your peppery pesto.

name: Blackened Salmon with Creamed Leeks
description: This slow cooked Salmon with creamed Leeks and Spinach is simple, healthy, and absolutely delicious!

name: Parmesan Crusted Chicken Schnitzel
description: Chef Andres' latest, greatest dish sits at the intersection of comfort and elegance. The star of the dish is the thin and crispy chicken cutlet, coated in crunchy breadcrumbs with herbs and Parmesan cheese for extra savory flavor. The schnitzel is served with the traditional accompaniment, creamy mashed potatoes, only Chef's mashed potatoes are kicked up a notch with garlic and vibrant green herbs like chives, parsley, mint, and thyme. A tangy lemon-and-parsley tomato salad adds a refreshing burst of acid to cut through all the richness and provide balance. Be sure to get a little of each crispy, creamy, and zesty element in every bite for pure culinary bliss.

name: Cider Braised Chicken
description: Chicken breast dusted and braised with flavors in Hudson Valley, this is a very delicious meal and we want you to have it at your dinner table :)

name: Seared Shrimp Quinoa Bowl
description: This irresistibe good and good-for-you dish features plump seared shrimp that have been marinated with Mexican spices and lime. The lightly spicy shrimp pair beautifully with nutty quinoa, oven-roasted Brussels sprouts, and a creamy avocado sauce drizzled on top.

name: Shredded Pibil Style Chicken
description: Feel like taking a dinnertime vacation to the Mayan Riviera? Chef Miguel has your ticket with tender, juicy, shredded chicken, spice-rubbed and slow-roasted pibil-style with earthy, peppery achiote, orange juice, and garlic. It‚Äôs topped with crumbled queso fresco and served with two hearty sides: rice and black beans, seasoned with cumin and paprika, and simmered with tangy tomatoes and aromatic vegetables; and zucchini saut√©ed with sweet onions. Each element of this Yucatan-inspired meal is positively bursting with flavor and freshness.

name: Miso Brown Butter Chocolate Chip Cookies
description: We bet you've never had a chocolate chip cookie taste this good. Chef Aarthi adds a unique and delicious twist to the quintessential American dessert with the addition of umami-rich miso and nutty classic brown butter. These elements aren't overwhelming or noticeable, but just add depth of flavor and balance that makes these cookies extra irresistible. Every bite is filled with melty, gooey chocolate chips and buttery, nutty undertones in the dough. They're perfect for satisfying any sweet tooth or sharing with friends and family, though we doubt you'll actually want to share.

name: Tenderloin Nikkei
description: This is one of the most popular dishes in Peruvian cuisine, and after one taste, you'll see why. With a mix of Italian, Chinese, and Japanese influences, the dish has a unique fusion of flavors. Al dente fettuccine pasta is tossed in a creamy Huancaina sauce and topped with parmesan cheese. Paired with a side of Nikkei-style stir-fried steak and vegetables, it's a perfectly balanced and satisfying meal.

name: Grilled Jumbo Shrimp
description: This grilled shrimp is so perfect! Chef Chris combines shrimp with bok choy and broccoli. In a sauce of coconut milk, lemongrass, peanut oil, and honey, this creamy dish will spice up your day!

name: Greens Juice
description: Proudly serving Pressed Juicery's Greens Juice, packs a health punch without sacrificing on flavor. It's perfect, on-the-go nutrition.

name: Chicken Fried Steak
description: This is good old Southern-style cooking done right. Tender and crispy, the chicken fried steak is served with a hearty portion of slow braised collard greens, rich, peppery gravy, and some hot sauce on the side to spice it up! What more could you want?!

name: Creamy Butternut Squash and Lentil Soup
description: Delicious and comforting, this soup starts with butternut squash, roasted with warm spices like cinnamon and ginger to bring out its natural sweetness. The roasted butternut squash is simmered with red lentils, sweet potatoes, and even more herbs, then pur√©ed with cashew cream until silky smooth. Decadent and filling, Chef Lena's vegan soup is perfect for lunch or a light dinner, or split between two people as a starter.

name: Classic Shrimp Cocktail
description: Chef Nelson ups the ante on a crowd-pleasing appetizer! Beautifully poached and chilled jumbo shrimp are accompanied by Chef's take on classic cocktail sauce, kicked up with a little hot sauce. Served with a simple cucumber-avocado-cucumber salad and saltine crackers, this is the perfect snack or power lunch!

name: Limena Chicken Peruvian Causa
description: Enjoy this Peruvian staple. Chicken is poached until tender and mixed with a creamy blend of sour cream, mayo and a blend of seasonings and spices. Mashed potatoes get a hint of Aji Amarillo for the quintessential fruity and spicy notes. Served with hard-boiled egg, and a velvety Peruvian Green Sauce & briny olives.

name: Mexican Hot Chocolate Chia Pudding
description: Whether you enjoy this chocolatey treat for breakfast, as a sweet snack, or an after-dinner delight, it delivers big flavor in a small package. The creamy chia seed pudding is flavored with cocoa, cinnamon, vanilla, and a hint of chili for a kick of warming spice that will have you coming for bite after bite. The pudding is paired with fresh raspberries for the perfect pop of tart freshness.

name: Parmesan Crusted Filet
description: Enjoy an elevated take on a classic combo: meat and potatoes. Chef Kristy's parmesan-crusted beef tenderloin brings the steakhouse home to your very own kitchen. The perfectly cooked filet is paired with two decadent sides: sour cream and chive-infused mashed potatoes and roasted asparagus. What more could you want?

name: Thai Style Chicken In Lettuce Cups
description: This dish was inspired by one of Chef Michelle's favorite Thai dishes called Nam Sod. Her version is a little more delicate, composed of sticky rice and savory, lightly spiced ground chicken in tender Bibb lettuce cups. The fresh and flavorful dish is finished with plenty of fresh herbs for a fully satisfying and tasty experience.

name: Saucy Bbq Chicken Thighs
description: Chef Nahika's secret recipe for saucy BBQ chicken gets a kick thanks to Haitian epis and a secret sauce blend. To pair, Chef cooks up a classic BBQ side with a twist: adding beets and green peas elevate this potato salad to new levels, and some fresh jalape√±o adds the perfect a kick.

name: Chicken with Prunes
description: Enjoy a taste of centuries of cooking history in one dish: Poyo con Prunes as it‚Äôs called in Ladino, the language of the Sephardic Jews of Thessaloniki. Chef Jona's interpretation pairs juicy marinated chicken thighs with a deeply flavorful tomato sauce infused with warming spices and sweet prunes. A side of creamy, garlicky mashed potatoes is the ideal finishing touch to complete this comforting, Mediterranean-inspired meal.

name: Grilled Salmon with Kale Salad
description: There's not much better than a buttery fillet of perfectly grilled salmon, and it's certainly the star of this dish. Paired with a simple salad of shredded kale, wedges of ripe tomato, and a tangy lemon-garlic dressing, this dish is as delicious as it is nourishing! It's the ideal grab-and-go lunch or light dinner.

name: Chicken and Asparagus
description: This is such a perfect dish for late spring and early summer. Enjoy it with fresh, crisp asparagus spears, tossed with the bright flavors of fresh lemon. It is well balanced with lemon citrus and ginger scent, so you body will feel nourished after this delicious meal!

name: Grilled Chicken Koftas
description: Savor the exquisite flavors of the Middle East with Chef Vincent‚Äôs Grilled Chicken Koftas. Made with finely ground chicken, enriched with a melody of spices, and accented with fresh parsley, these koftas are grilled to achieve a perfect sear outside and a tender, flavorful interior. He pairs them with toasted pita triangles and a hearty chopped Greek Salad of tangy cherry tomatoes, cool cucumber, crisp green bell pepper, briny Kalamata olives, and savory Feta cheese. Use the accompanying tzatziki‚Äîa refreshing mix of Greek yogurt, extra-virgin olive oil, and fresh mint‚Äîas a dip. Feast mode‚Äîactivate!

name: Sesame Ahi Tuna
description: Fresh ahi tuna, perfectly seasoned with the coconut rice. Don't miss out on this amazing dish!

name: Orange Flank Steak and Broccoli
