description: Perfect meal for weeknights. Savor this Asian inspired flank steak with a healthy side of spicy broccoli and brown rice. The flank steak is matched perfectly with an orange and ginger sauce.

name: Cheesy Keto Chicken Parm
description: This 'breaded' chicken cutlet is coated with almond meal for a nice crispy gluten-free crust and topped with tomato sauce, smoked ham and cheese for a Keto-friendly twist on classic chicken parmesan. It's served over a creamy cauliflower mash.

name: Curried Grilled Chicken with Spiced Cauliflower
description: Talk about flavor packed! This chicken dish is an exciting, heavily spiced departure for your usual. Juicy chicken breast are rubbed with curry powder and grilled to perfection. Served with Vadouvan-spiced cauliflower and sweet potatoes, this dish is finished with poached golden raisins and a creamy cooling yogurt sauce.

name: Pork Dumpling Soup
description: Chef Esther is constantly raising the bar for Korean-American comfort cooking, and here she takes a classic‚Äîdumpling soup‚Äîto a whole other level. This soup has a thick, Tonkatsu-style broth that gets loaded with Korean pork-filled dumplings and chewy Korean rice cakes. The soup is topped with shredded carrots, zucchini and fresh scallions for a pop of freshness. Comforting and cozy, this dish is sure to warm you up on chilly nights.

name: Miso Black Rice Ramen
description: Cooked black rice ramen with red beets, topped with roasted carrots and edamame. It also has a refreshing combination of cucumber, mango and mint salad tossed with peanuts and a creamy miso dressing with a touch of sriracha for a kick of heat.

name: Crispy Salmon Tacos
description: Take your Taco Tuesday up a serious notch with this delicious dish. Crispy panko-crusted salmon fillets are crunchy on the outside, yet soft and juicy on the inside and full of flavor in every bite. The salmon is tucked into flour tortillas and topped with pico de gallo and Chef Ruben's signature habanero-passionfruit sauce for a fruit kick of heat. Paired with a light coleslaw, these fish tacos will transport you to a beach, so matter where you enjoy them.

name: Lemon Pepper Tofu
description: This seasonal salad is a refreshing meal for hot summer days. It showcases delightfully sweet cherry tomatoes accented by the aroma of fresh basil and accompanied by Israeli couscous. The salad is seasoned with the zest and juice of fresh lemon to lighten the dish and add a bit of acidity, making it a lovely pairing with the firm and tasty lemon pepper tofu. Enjoy this dish cold or warm!

name: Bacon and Spam Breakfast Fried Rice
description: At Livy's All Day Cafe, the Bacon and Spam Fried Rice is a delightful dish that perfectly balances savory and smoky flavors. Each bite reveals seasoned fried rice, complemented by the smoky bacon and Spam's distinctly salty and tangy taste, further enhanced by an aromatic blend of ginger and garlic. The dish is enriched with crunchy green onions, making it a flavorful experience for any meal. Topped with soft egg ribbons and served with a side of spicy sriracha aioli, this dish is not only a flavor sensation but also a hearty option for breakfast or dinner. It's an excellent choice for meal preppers seeking a versatile option to satisfy you, whether you're fueling up for the day or enjoying a flavor-bombed lunch or dinner.

name: Sesame Soba Noodle Salad
description: You don't have to be a vegetarian to fall in love with this delicious, umami-packed meal. Nutty soba noodles are paired with an array of colorful veggies including cabbage, carrots, shiitake mushrooms, and edamame. Drizzle on Chef Emily's irresistibly creamy almond dressing‚Äîwhich gets a bright kick from ginger and cayenne‚Äîthen toss to combine and dig in.

name: Tonkatsu Japanese Pork Cutlet
description: Savor a taste of Japanese culinary tradition with this tonkatsu‚Äîa breaded and deep-fried pork loin chop drizzled with sweet and tangy sauce. It‚Äôs served with shredded cabbage and thin-sliced onion for a different kind of crunch. And on the side, there‚Äôs a refreshing salad of tender-crisp blanched green beans, sweet bell pepper, and edamame, all tossed in a flavorful sesame and soy vinaigrette. With its irresistible combination of flavors and textures, this meal will become a tradition at your place, too.

name: Asian Wrap with Hoisin Braised Beef
description: Inspired by the flavors in a classic Vietnamese banh mi, this wrap features tender braised beef, tangy pickled carrots and daikon radish, crisp sliced jalape√±os, and fresh cilantro, all wrapped up with a kick of spicy Thai chili-infused garlic aioli. Each bite delivers a perfect balance of savory, tangy, and spicy flavors in a convenient wrap form.

name: Rigatoni Pasta with White Beans and Kale
description: This dish is Chef Michelle's favorite way to eat pasta! The beans add creaminess and richness while the greens provide great color and textural contrast, and a sprinkle of parmesan cheese on top is the perfect finishing touch. This lightly spicy dish packs a punch of flavor and is totally satisfying.

name: Classic Lasagna Bolognese
description: As a chef, Chris really loves making lasagnas. He says, ‚ÄúThey truly are an expression of love‚Äù, and this one is will make meat lovers rejoice. He makes his bolognese in the classic style by slow cooking beef, sausage, and ground pork along with onion, carrots, celery, garlic, tomato, white wine and stock. Once simmered to perfection, the bolognese is layered up with fresh pasta, house-made roasted tomato sauce, b√©chamel, and fresh basil to complete this masterpiece of chef love. This meal does well in both the microwave or the oven, just depends on if you prefer the cheese on top more on the crispy side. A tip from Chef Chris: if you go the oven-route, microwaving it for two minutes first cuts down baking time significantly.

name: Grilled Chicken with Roasted Beets
description: Grilled hormone-free chicken breast with a side of roasted beets and goat cheese over delicious tuscan kale with a great thyme sauce on top of the chicken breast. Every part is just delicious.

name: Market Vegetable Moussaka
description: This is Greek-inspired comfort food at its best. Chef Jona's Moussaka features layers of tender potato, zucchini, and eggplant, with an allspice-infused tomato sauce layered in between and a creamy white b√©chamel on top. The comforting casserole is topped with a mixture of crunchy panko bread crumbs and parmesan cheese and baked until golden brown and irresistible.

name: Guajillo Pork Birria Bowl
description: Experience the bold flavors of guajillo pepper pork birria, slowly braised until super tender then generously served atop fluffy yellow rice alongside hearty baked black beans. Topped with fresh pico de gallo, this mouthwatering dish takes you on a culinary journey through the vibrant streets of Mexico.

name: Curry Spiced Turkey Salad Wrap
description: Chef Miguel‚Äôs creative turkey wrap will change the way you think about turkey. It features tender curry-spiced turkey breast roasted to perfection, then chopped and tossed with a savory-sweet curry sauce, plump golden raisins, crisp celery, red onions, and Granny Smith apples. Baby kale, shredded carrots, and roasted cauliflower and chickpeas add even more flavor and texture to the wrap. All that goodness is rolled into a soft flour tortilla and served with sweet mango chutney for dipping. Delicious, nutritious, and ideal for a hearty lunch or light on-the-go dinner!

name: Buffalo Cauliflower
description: Buffalo cauliflower may look simple but it is powerful with and pack with boatload of tang, crunchy breading, spicy buffalo sauce for a fiery flavor, and hearty avocado crema.

name: Baked Lime Mustard Chicken
description: A great chicken recipe I have made for years for Paleo lovers. Served with healthy side of cabbage slaw and grapefruit.

name: Honey Sriracha Chicken
description: This easy chicken breast recipe served with honey sriracha sauce gets a pop of fresh flavor. Make it a complete healthy dinner with zucchini and yellow squash noodle.

name: Pork Kielbasa Burrito
description: Indulge in a savory twist with our Pork Kielbasa Burrito, packed with flavorful, smoky kielbasa sausage for a bold taste. Wrapped in a soft tortilla, it‚Äôs complemented by fresh, crisp veggies for added crunch. Drizzled with Chef's house-made Ranch dressing that adds a subtle, earthy flavor to every bite. A fusion of savory and fresh, creating the perfect balance. Perfect for a hearty yet innovative meal on the go!

name: Gingered Balsamic Date Glazed
description: My simple glaze will leave you wondering what just hit your lips and I pair this dish up with my Brussel sprout roast beet salad. I slow roast them together with some bacon fat and finish them with the pistachios, you are going to love it.

name: Sweet Chili Glazed Shrimp
description: Sweet, sticky, and just a little spicy, these plump shrimp are glazed in Chef Hong's signature tamarind-infused sweet chili sauce and are absolutely irresistible. Paired with deliciously fragrant Thai-style coconut rice as well as pineapple and roasted red peppers, this dish is an instant weeknight winner.

name: Chocolate Bat Ter Cake Jar
description: This bewitching treat is perfectly portioned in a jar, making it the ultimate grab-and-go delight for all your Halloween adventures. Indulge in the chillingly delightful combination of moist chocolate cake with creamy whipped chocolate & Vanilla frosting. Get ready to trick your taste buds and treat yourself to a spine-tingling dessert experience.

name: Grilled Herb Marinated Hanger Steak
description: Indulge in the tantalizing flavors of the herb-marinated, grilled steak with chimichurri! This dish features succulent hanger steak, marinated in extra virgin olive oil, red wine vinegar, and a blend of fresh herbs. The steak is then grilled to caramelized perfection and topped with a vibrant and tangy chimichurri sauce made from Italian parsley, cilantro, and garlic. The steak is paired with Chef Andres' version of classic steakhouse sides, lightened up: cauliflower 'rice' and grilled mushrooms, prepared simply and deliciously.

name: Spicy Moroccan Turkey Meatballs
description: Chef Michael smothers these tender and delicately seasoned turkey meatballs in a rich and spicy tomato harissa sauce, delivering a delightful kick. A dollop of creamy yogurt sauce provides a cool contrast, while mint adds a burst of aromatic freshness. Fried onions lend a satisfying crunch, and warm pita bread rounds out this flavorful and well-balanced meal.

name: Mediterranean Cauliflower Shawarma Bowl with Tahini Dressing
description: This is a vegan, gluten-free, yet hearty and delicious meal that showcases Chef Einat‚Äôs acclaimed cauliflower shawarma. A healthy bowl featuring all the street food shawarma toppings you love; marinated chickpeas, pickled cauliflower and red onions, tahini sauce, and crunchy fresh vegetables.

name: Bbq Pulled Pork
description: What's not to love about Chef Chris's classic pulled pork? His recipe for slow-cooked pork is so meltingly tender that you can pull it apart perfectly and drench it in delicious, tangy BBQ sauce. Pure Southern comfort, served √† la carte to amp up for your salads, dinners, and everything in between.

name: Grilled Scallops
description: Do you know what goes well with creamed corn? Grilled scallops! Chow down with this scallop meal with beautifully joined flavors of fresh herbs and spices.

name: Grilled Sirloin and Vegetables
description: Get ready to indulge in Bubb's' sizzling sirloin with Grand Dad's BBQ sauce‚Äîa dish that will tantalize your taste buds and leave you wanting more. This dish starts with the finest cuts of sirloin, which get marinated in a secret blend of herbs and spices, with fresh vegetables, and grilled to juicy perfection. The skewers' smoky flavor pairs beautifully with the silky smooth, buttery mashed potatoes, as well as a side of Bubb's signature creamy street corn. Together, the savory meat and rich sides create a symphony of flavors and textures in each bite. Come and experience the ultimate BBQ feast!

name: Salmon Bowl
description: Sweet and fresh salmon bowl mixed with quinoa that is high in protein, combined with baby bok choy, cucumber, and cherry tomatoes. The bowl is not only bursting with nutrients but also downright delicious.

name: Chana Masala with Coconut Rice
description: This plant-based powerhouse is bursting with bold flavors and nutritious ingredients. Chef Lena seasons and slowly simmers organic chickpeas with tomatoes, ginger, and aromatic Indian spices and serves them with rich, coconut-infused Basmati rice. A hearty portion of saut√©ed cabbage and kale adds extra fiber and vitamins, while the accompanying cilantro-lime sauce provides a tart contrast that brings the whole meal together.

name: Spicy Tangy Asian Chicken Wings
description: These incredible chicken wings are baked to crispy perfection, then tossed in an addictive honey lime sauce that is sweet, spicy, tangy, and sticky. Perfect for enjoying with sticky fingers!
ingredients: 2% Or Less Of Butter (cream And Salt)

name: Roasted Chicken Thighs with Honey Butter
description: Meet your new go-to weeknight meal! Chef Nelson simply roasts chicken thighs until they're perfect on the outside and juicy on the inside. They're served with steamed rice, pickled veggies like cucumbers and cauliflower, and a sweet and savory honey-balsamic butter. This is a surefire winner, winner, chicken dinner!

name: Fried Tilapia with Remoulade
description: Think of this dish like fish and chips but Southern style. Crispy, golden-fried tilapia fillets are seasoned with a perfect blend of Southern spices that will keep you coming back for more. The fish is paired with zesty Cajun-seasoned potato wedges and a side of creamy, tangy remoulade sauce for dipping. It's a hearty, flavorful dish that brings a taste of the South to your table.

name: Thai Red Lobster Curry
description: Chunks of tender, buttery lobster pair perfectly with this lightly spicy and aromatic Thai-style red curry. The rich curry also features zucchini, red peppers, scallions and sweet onions, all cooked in the coconut-based curry until infused with its tangy and herbaceous flavor. Served over a bed of fluffy basmati rice and garnished with cilantro and lime, you'll love this fresh, elevated take on a familiar favorite.

name: Chinese Style Cucumber Salad
description: This Chinese-style cucumber salad is light, refreshing, and perfect for the summer. It‚Äôs also packed with flavor thanks to a zingy dressing featuring garlic, sesame oil, rice wine vinegar, and chili flakes. This is the ideal side dish to accompany fish, noodles, or rich grilled meats like steak or pork, but it also makes for the perfect little snack any time of day.

name: Turkey Bacon Breakfast Tacos
description: A healthier twist on a familiar favorite, these breakfast tacos are the ideal way to start your day off on the right foot. Turkey bacon is leaner than pork and packs the protein in conjunction with scrambled eggs and potatoes. Shredded cheddar cheese and bright tomato salsa are the perfect accompaniments to these breakfast tacos.

name: Slow Cooked Beef In Spicy Makrut Lime Sauce
description: Dive into this aromatic and flavorful dish featuring perfectly slow-cooked beef chunks smothered in a rich, spicy sauce made from fiery chilies, creamy coconut milk, colorful bell peppers, fragrant lemongrass, and delicate kaffir lime leaves. Served with amazing coconut rice.

name: Thinly Sliced Ribeye Yaki Udon
description: This quick and satisfying meal is a sleeper hit, and it's no surprise why. The springy udon noodles get tossed in a deeply savory sauce and stir-fried alongside delicious marinated beef ribeye. Green cabbage and shishito peppers add some fresh and crunchy goodness to the mix. It's a burst of umami flavor in every bite!

name: Classic Tiramisu
description: Tiramisu is a delectable Italian dessert that consists of layers of ladyfingers soaked in coffee and liqueur, then topped with a light and creamy mascarpone cheese mixture. The top layer is dusted with cocoa powder, giving it a hint of bitterness and depth of flavour. As you take a bite, the soft and spongy ladyfingers blend into the creamy and velvety mascarpone, creating a perfect balance of textures. The coffee and liqueur add a subtle depth of flavour, while the cocoa powder adds a hint of bitterness and rounds off the sweetness of the dessert. Tiramisu is served chilled and makes for a perfect after-dinner treat or a special occasion dessert.

name: Pumpkin Butternut Ravioli
description: As the weather gets cooler, there's nothing more satisfying than a warm plate of Chef Marc's fresh ravioli. Each one is hand-stuffed with roasted pumpkin and butternut ‚Äî and served in a homemade vodka sauce. The dish is topped off with hazelnut breadcrumbs and saut√©ed Tuscan kale on the side.

name: Spaghetti al Limone with Lemon Garlic Shrimp
description: Spaghetti al Limone, or spaghetti with lemon, is a simple yet elegant dish fuelled by a bright, zesty, and creamy sauce blended with parmesan cheese. Here, Chef Pino adds shrimp roasted in a lemon-garlic marinade, and tender-cooked asparagus for a fresh green hit.

name: Sweet Heat Honey Chipotle Shrimp
description: Chef Tony marinates and roasts plump, succulent shrimp in a delectable blend of floral honey and fiery, smoky chipotle chiles for a perfect blend of sweet and heat. (Don‚Äôt worry, there‚Äôs plenty more of that delicious marinade on the side to use as a sauce.) He piles them high on a bed of fluffy, fragrant Basmati rice with a hearty side of tender, lightly charred Roasted Broccoli. A garnish of fresh green onion tops off a meal that‚Äôs guaranteed to satisfy all your flavor cravings.

name: Chicken and Sweet Potato Baked
description: Good old fashion chicken breast with sweet potato. Simple, clean and good food. This is such a comforting dish that will make you warm and cozy inside.

name: Superfood Bowl
description: Packed with both nutrients and flavor, this dish is called a 'Superfood Bowl' for a reason. Sweet potatoes are one of the most versatile and healthful vegetables one can eat. When combined with fluffy quinoa, black beans, herbs and a zesty special sauce drizzled all over, they create a bowl that will fuel your body and satisfy your taste buds.

name: Thanksgiving Herbed Stuffing
description: Chef Nelson's herbed stuffing is a step above the stuff from the bag, and may just ruin you for all other stuffing. Packed full of cubed sourdough bread, it's infused with hardy herbs like sage and thyme, along with the typical mirepoix and garlic. All together they encapsulate those rich traditional Thanksgiving flavors you know and love in a stuffing.

name: Jerk Shrimp Stew
description: Using coconut milk, pineapples, cinnamon and other spices to make this Creamy jerk shrimp. It is paleo and whole-30 compliant adding cauliflower rice on the side.

name: Seared Steak with Greek Feta Yogurt Sauce
description: You've never had steak like this! Salty feta and Greek yogurt come together into a creamy sauce you'll want to put on everything, especially this juicy seared steak, crispy russet potatoes wedges, and a fresh cucumber salad.

name: Creamy Spaghetti Alla Carbonara
description: Spaghetti alla Carbonara is a classic Roman dish known for its simplicity and rich, savory flavors. As you stir it together, each strand of perfectly al dente spaghetti gets coated in the velvet-smooth sauce made with heavy cream and nutty Parmesan cheese. (There‚Äôs extra cheese served on the side for you to garnish as much as you‚Äôd like.) Crispy pan-fried pancetta adds even more savory flavor. Add a fresh green salad or crusty bread (or both!) and indulge in authentic taste of Italy.

name: Golden Fried Tilapia
description: Chef Raymundo‚Äôs tender golden-fried tilapia fillet is served with a zesty sauce made with a blend of fiery South American Rocoto chiles and cool, creamy mayonnaise. On the side: A hearty Peruvian classic, Tacu Tacu. It‚Äôs a savory blend of rice and black beans that gets pan-fried for an added textural dimension. This isn‚Äôt any ordinary weeknight meal‚Äîit‚Äôs a delightful fusion of flavors celebrating the rich culinary traditions of Peru.

name: Pad Thai with Stir Fried Shrimp
description: Chef Stacy's fresh take on a Thai street food favorite will have you tossing the takeout menus for good. Tender rice noodles are stir-fried with bean sprouts, egg, veggies, in an irresistible tangy, sweet and savory sauce of tamarind, garlic, Thai chili and fish sauce. The crave-worthy noodles are topped with crispy baked tofu and perfectly stir-fried shrimp, then finished with fresh bean sprouts, chopped peanuts, and a lime wedge to squeeze on top.

name: Adobo Chicken and Chorizo Paella
description: Chef Jose has been cooking paellas for most of his career, starting way back when he learned his technique from some of the best chefs in Spain. This particular dish combines all those years of practice and techniques, along with traditional flavor combinations. Tender adobo-spiced chicken, sliced Bilbao chorizo, sweet piquillo peppers, olives, peas, and rice infused with saffron and spices. A drizzle of savory saffron aioli on top completes the dish; now prepare to be transported to a high-end Spanish restaurant in minutes!

name: Creamy Cannellini Beans
description: Swimming in an umami-rich, velvety smooth Parmesan-, garlic- and rosemary-infused broth, Chef John DeLucie‚Äôs Creamy Cannellini Beans offer a delightful burst of flavor and nourishment. (There‚Äôs 6 grams of fiber and 7 grams of protein per serving.) Each perfectly seasoned bean retains its tender texture, ready to melt in your mouth. They make a fantastic accompaniment to almost anything you can think of‚Äîgrilled steak, roast chicken, pulled pork, a hearty salad... the pairing possibilities are endless.

name: Oven Baked Chicken Parmesan
description: This healthier version of Chicken Parmesan is perfect for a cozy weeknight dinner. Chicken Cutlets are seasoned to perfection and coated with italian panko bread crumbs and baked off in the oven instead of fried. Served with a homemade rustic marinara sauce tossed with spaghetti and parmesan cheese.

name: Mango Chia Pudding Yogurt
description: The delicious mango chia pudding is a refreshing and nutritious breakfast option. This delightful treat features layers of creamy chia pudding, velvety yogurt, fresh mango, and pistachio crumbles on top. The chia pudding is made with a combination of chia seeds and coconut milk, creating a smooth and creamy texture with a hint of tropical flavor. Each layer is carefully crafted to create a harmonious balance of tastes and textures. This plant-based mango chia pudding is not only a feast for the eyes but also a guilt-free indulgence that will leave you feeling satisfied and nourished. Enjoy it as a healthy and satisfying breakfast or a refreshing snack during the day.

name: Herb Marinated Top Sirloin Steak
description: It doesn't get much better than top sirloin, one of the most tender cuts of beef, especially when it's marinated with fine herbs and grilled to perfection. The steak is accompanied by a classic rice pilaf and French ratatouille, made with thinly-sliced veggies, layered in a light tomato sauce and served with pesto. This is sure to be a new favorite!

name: Chicken Thighs In Scallion Cream
description: These roasted chicken thighs are delicious all on their own, but taken over the top when paired up with Chef Maia's luscious, tangy scallion cream sauce. Plus, the chicken comes with two of the most comforting side dishes: classic peas and carrots, and rosemary-infused roasted baby potatoes. A filling, family-friendly meal to enjoy any time of the year.

name: Blackened Shrimp Cheddar Pancetta Risotto
description: Chef Chris came up with this spin on shrimp and grits by just experimenting and having a little fun with some delicious classic combinations. Chef's creamy white cheddar-infused risotto makes a perfect base for juicy, buttery Cajun-style blackened shrimps, especially when it's finished off with house-rendered crispy pancetta lardons, white cheddar, and green onions. A drizzle of bright tomato, garlic, and herb sauce rounds out the dish. This is a meal where the title really says it all.

name: Four Cheese Roasted Chicken
description: This version of roasted chicken features a velvety four-cheese cream sauce that awakens the senses in every bite. Savor it even more with rosemary baked potatoes and garlicky roasted broccoli on the side.

name: Skirt Steak with Butternut Squash
description: Chef Andres paired skirt steak with butternut squash and created instantly something versatile and earthy flavor. For an even bigger kick, enjoy it with chopped of onions, jalapenos and carrot puree.

name: Butternut Squash Black Bean Chili
description: Hearty satiating chili with smoky flavors, nourishing seasonal veggies and warming herbs, paired with creamy polenta and avocado butter. This meal offers balanced nutrition of healthy fats, complex carbs, fiber and protein.

name: Herb Roasted Turkey Breast
description: Guarantee a winner winner festive dinner with Chef Stacy's version of the ultimate holiday staple: turkey. Chef's take on turkey showcases a perfectly roasted, juicy turkey breast that infused with sage, thyme, rosemary, and parsley thanks to a rich herb compound butter. An equally herby gravy is the only way to take this turkey over the top!

name: Grilled Bbq Spare Ribs
description: Who doesn‚Äôt love some messy, saucy spare ribs every once in a while? Chef Chris slow cooks these bad boys, lathers them up with his house BBQ sauce, and then bakes ‚Äòem off. On the side, you‚Äôll find another comfort staple from Chef Chris‚Äô childhood: canned corn. Here, Chef takes his childhood food crush and makes a fresh and creamy, un-canned version using only fresh hand-shaved corn. Chef highly recommends heating this meal in the microwave.

name: Tofu Chow Mein
description: This dish has that comforting Chinese takeout flavor you know and love, but taken up a notch. Chow mein noodles are stir-fried with firm tofu until the tofu is golden and crispy, then served alongside a colorful mix of vegetables including sugar snap peas, carrots, button mushrooms, and onions. It's all tossed in a savory soy, garlic, and ginger sauce with a touch of sesame oil to add nutty umami flavor.

name: Thai Grilled Pork with Pickled Cucumbers
description: These grilled pork bites, or ‚ÄúMu Ping,‚Äù are a street food essential in Thailand. Pork shoulder is marinated in coconut cream, soy and oyster sauces, garlic, and cilantro, before hitting the grill for a smoky, caramelized finish. Served over soft jasmine rice with pickled cucumbers, they‚Äôre paired with a sweet and tangy dipping sauce of tamarind, lime, and chili.

name: Spicy Chicken Tinga Quesadilla
description: Chef Ruben‚Äôs irresistibly savory quesadilla is stuffed with melty Oaxaca and Gouda cheeses and the softest and juiciest shredded chicken you‚Äôve ever had. It's slowly cooked in an authentic Tinga sauce made of fresh tomatoes, caramelized onion, and a secret blend of chilies and spices. On the side: Lightly seasoned green cabbage for refreshing crunch and a deliciously creamy avocado sauce for dipping. Perfect as a hearty lunch or an easy, indulgent dinner.

name: Chicken Andouille Gumbo
description: Gumbo is perhaps the most literal melting pot of all dishes. Its influences range from African (okra) to French (roux) to Choctaw Indian (fil√© powder) to German, Spanish, Italian, and more. Packed with tender chicken and spicy Andouille sausage, as well as veggies, rice, and spices, this is a hearty dish packed with flavors and textures that's sure to warm you up on a chilly night!

name: Stir Fried Teriyaki Rice Noodles
description: This hearty, balanced one-bowl meal will make a tasty addition to your weekly meal rotation. Thin slices of tender ribeye bulgogi are marinated in sweet and savory Korean teriyaki sauce, then wok-fired for flavorful caramelization and hint of smoky char. It‚Äôs plated atop a bed of stir-fried rice-flour vermicelli noodles and a vibrant veggie mix, including sweet red bell pepper, carrots, onion, baby spinach leaves, and umami-rich shiitake mushrooms. A garnish of fresh green onions and sesame seeds provides the perfect finishing touch.

name: Salmon with Israeli Couscous
description: Salmon is drizzled with deep green sauce with an impressive balance of fresh parsley, scallions and tangy capers. It is served over a bed of israely couscous, almonds and sauteed vegetables.

name: Pomodoro Rotelle with Fresh Burrata
description: Enjoy the slow-simmered simplicity of a homestyle tomato sauce and perfectly al dente pasta. Rotelle a.k.a. 'wagon wheel' pasta are actually the ideal shape to capture all of this delicious pomodoro sauce topped off with a creamy ball of fresh burrata cheese.

name: Lasagna Primavera
description: Delight in the vibrant flavors of spring with Chef Jonny's Lasagna Primavera. This lasagna features layers of fresh seasonal vegetables like broccoli, asparagus, and zucchini nestled between delicate pasta sheets with a light b√©chamel sauce, all baked to perfection with parmesan and mozzarella cheeses. Perfect for any occasion, this lasagna is a testament to the beauty of simple, wholesome ingredients coming together in one elegant and delicious package. Buon appetito!

name: Asparagus Stuffed Chicken
description: A healthy dinner prepared by Chef Ruben, so tasty and healthy, a combination of our two favorites. Chicken is topped with marinara sauce and stuffed with cream cheese and asparagus, it‚Äôs keto friendly, low carb, gluten free.

name: Creamy Chicken Rice
description: Craving a country-style meal that delivers home-cooked nostalgia? Here it is! This dish combines perfectly seasoned, roasted and shredded chicken breast with saut√©ed aromatic vegetables and Jasmine rice in a velvety heavy-cream sauce brightened with fresh thyme and parsley. It‚Äôs rich, hearty, and satisfying in every way‚Äîthe kind of meal you‚Äôll put on regular rotation.

name: Roasted Garlic Salmon Fillets
description: This simple roasted salmon is anything but basic thanks to the super-savory marinade, a blend of sweet roasted garlic and zesty Sazon and Old Bay seasonings. The accompanying lemon butter takes it to the next level with extra richness. Heart-healthy omega-3s never tasted so good! Enjoy as-is with steamed green beans or power up a homemade salad or scrambled eggs‚Äîthe versatility of this go-to protein knows no bounds.

name: Grilled Fajita Chicken Quinoa Burrito Bowl
description: Healthy, filling, and excellent for any time of day, this burrito bowl is sure to be your new go-to. Marinated fajita-style chicken breast gets grilled to picture perfection, then chopped and served up on a bed of nutty quinoa, black beans, and corn. Topped with mixed cherry tomatoes and fresh cilantro and finished with zesty cilantro-lime vinaigrette, this bowl is just like your favorite fast casual chains, but way better-tasting and better for you!

name: Mascarpone and Spinach Ravioli
description: Mascarpone and spinach ravioli tossed with an earthy blend of mixed mushrooms cooked in a wood-burning oven, fresh basil pesto and garlic-sauteed spinach.

name: Rosemary Garlic Chicken Thighs
description: This crazy good chicken is marinated with lemon, rosemary, and garlic before getting pan-fried until crisp, then finished in the oven. It's served with linguine‚Äîthe perfect pasta to twirl up that garlicky herb sauce‚Äîfor a decadent, fuss-free dinner.

name: Panko Crusted Chicken Breakfast Sandwich
description: A breakfast sandwich you‚Äôll be thinking about long before morning. Here, golden, panko-crusted chicken breast meets a Southwestern-style omelet, packed with saut√©ed red bell pepper, onion, cheddar cheese, and a touch of smoky paprika. It‚Äôs served on a soft potato bun, with a side of Chef Vanessa‚Äôs fire-roasted pepper sauce adding a drizzle of heat.

name: Shrimp Herbed Cauliflower Rice Bowl
description: This delicious shrimp herbed cauliflower rice bowl you can enjoy. Sun-dried tomato sauce on top of shrimp complement with cauliflower herbed rice bowl with fresh basil and grated cheese.

name: Grilled Ratatouille Cassoulet
description: A vegetable paradise! Chef Chris combines zucchini, squash, and eggplant, with cannellini beans and goat cheese. Finished with parsley, sage, rosemary, and thyme, this herb packed stew is a rich and creamy delight.

name: Adobo Grilled Salmon
description: A Garces family favorite for weeknight meals. Adobo is a wet marinade that Chef has been using as my secret ingredient for many of his cooking styles. This provides a depth of flavor for the dish that makes the salmon sing. Accompanying it with some healthy sides such as the glazed sweet potatoes and broccoli really makes this meal complete.

name: Mediterranean Zucchini Fritters
description: Designed to take your tastebuds on a trip to the Mediterranean, these zucchini cakes are a delight. Aromatic, moist and tender, they're packed with sweet zucchini on the inside, with crispy edges on the outside. Served on a bed of nutrient-dense herbed rice pilaf with spinach, tomato, and olives, a side of creamy yogurt-cilantro sauce to drizzle on top marries all the bold flavors in culinary harmony.

name: Vegan Kale Matar with Tofu Paneer
description: This warming dish is a veganized California version of the Indian classic saag paneer. Made with tofu instead of cheese and kale instead of spinach, and coconut milk instead of cream, it still brings the spices and heat you've come to expect from saag. Served on a bed of heirloom brown rice, this dish maintains all the layers of flavor and texture of the Indian restaurant favorite.

name: Mexican Shrimp Chorizo Paella
description: This seafood rice was created in the ports of Mexico accompanied with shrimp and Mexican chorizo with a special seasoning of dried chilies when making the rice, even though it is very similar to paella, the dried and hydrated chilies give it a unique and delicious touch.

name: Laotian Braised Pork Belly
description: Tender braised pork belly infused with ginger, sweet vidalia onions slow cooked in a flavorful liquid of oyster sauce, fish sauce & black soy sauce with thai basil over a bed of jasmine rice, served with tender baby bok choy and a side of sweet chili tamari. I always recommend to customers to try a little bit of the sweet chili tamari sauce before digging into the meal to see how much of the sauce you want to enjoy!

name: Adobo Flat Iron Steak with Mashwi Salad
description: One of Balaboosta's signature dishes, this special showcases how Chef Einat excels at balancing flavors and textures. Smoky adobo-rubbed flat iron steak is grilled until tender and perfectly done, then sliced and serve on a bed of silky-smooth, luscious leek pur√©e. To pair, Chef adds her Mashwi salad, a Middle Eastern side dish, featuring char-grilled vegetables like bell peppers, tomatoes, onions, and eggplant, all diced and seasoned with fresh lemon juice, parsley and a hint of salt. Finally, to add richness, enjoy roasted fingerling potatoes seasoned with good quality olive oil and earthy za'atar seasoning. You've never tasted steak and potatoes quite like this!

name: Peruvian Shrimp Fried Rice
description: You‚Äôre sure to savor Chef Walther‚Äôs incredible blend of Chinese and Peruvian culinary traditions. This dish combines succulent, delicately seasoned shrimp with jasmine rice, fresh peas, carrots, bell pepper, onion, and corn‚Äîall stir-fried in a savory blend of soy sauce, toasted sesame oil, and ginger. What really makes this version pop is the green sauce‚Äîa vibrant blend of fresh herbs, garlic, jalape√±o, and a touch of mayo for creaminess‚Äîthat adds a burst of herbal brightness and a touch of heat. It‚Äôs a simple, flavorful meal that shows how two cultures can come together to create something new and exciting.

name: Beef Tinga Tacos
description: Made with classic Mexican spices and the freshest ingredients possible, Chef Akhtar's zesty beef tinga tacos are simply irresistible. Beef is braised in a smoky, flavorful sauce until it's pull-apart tender, then tucked into soft corn tortillas. Top your tacos with a creamy avocado sauce with hints of cilantro, lime and tomatillo, plus a classic pico de gallo and lettuce to bring freshness. Altogether, they're saucy, spicy perfection.

name: Coconut Shrimp
description: A delightful Coconut Shrimp dish crafted by Chef Andres Mendez, featuring a blend of coconut milk, spices, and fresh vegetables.

name: Caramelized Onion Tart
description: Pure pastry-arts perfection! This beautiful and buttery tart‚Äîpacked with luscious, sweet caramelized onions‚Äîwill be your new favorite breakfast, brunch, or party treat. It‚Äôs somehow light and rich and crisp and creamy all at the same time. And the fresh spinach salad, dressed with a lightly sweet Champagne vinaigrette and topped with umami-rich shaved Parmesan, makes for a perfect pairing.

name: Lemongrass Marinated Flank Steak
description: Lemongrass-marinated flank steak is seared then drizzled with Chef Phet's signature sweet-and-savory fish sauce 'caramel' sauce. The steak is served with pickled cucumbers, scallion-ginger Jasmine rice, and a side of addictive sweet chili-peanut sauce. Each component in this dish is delicious on its own, but together they create an explosion of Thai-inspired flavor for a perfect bite in every bite.

name: Roots with Ginger Juice
description: Bring on the spice. Proudly serving Pressed Juicery's Roots with Ginger, is wildly popular roots juice made with the goodness of beets, sweetness of apples and all the spice from ginger.

name: Fabiolas Lasagna Bolognese
description: There's truly nothing more comforting than a hot, bubbling baked lasagna, and this one is made with homemade beef ragu, ricotta mix, silky fresh pasta, and topped with melted mozzarella cheese! This traditional Italian recipe is a staple of Chef Fabiola's, and is sure to be your new go-to comfort food. A side of green beans completes this warm, homestyle meal!

name: Glazed Meatloaf In Mushroom Gravy
description: This dish brings Chef Chase Evans right back to his childhood. Chef makes a delicious meatloaf just like his mama used to, smothers it in a savory mushroom gravy, then pairs it with buttery green beans and silky smooth potato pur√©e. This is Southern comfort food at its finest.

name: Hibachi Chicken Fried Rice Bowl
description: Chef Tracey combines three beloved Japanese classics in one delightful, family-favorite meal. First, the base: Savory fried rice studded with tender-crisp broccoli, carrot, onion, and zucchini. Next, the topping: Smoky, tender grilled chicken glazed in a garlicky, umami-rich soy sauce. And finally: The Yum Yum Sauce that brings the dish together with its signature creamy, tangy, and sweet notes. Go ahead and put this one on repeat.

name: Salmon Florentine
description: You'll be hooked on the delicious version of salmon meal. This is one spectacular salmon dish baked to perfection with a topping of quinoa pilaf and pine nuts.

name: Mediterranean Pita Smash Burger
description: For this fusion of Mediterranean and American favorites, Chef Einat combines juicy ground beef with herbs and spices (and a touch of jalape√±o for heat), then smashes the patties flat on a griddle for those irresistibly crisp, lacy edges. She sandwiches each one into whole wheat pita bread filled with blistered tomatoes and thin-sliced red onions seasoned with tangy sumac. On the side: flavorful za‚Äôatar roasted fingerling potatoes. The accompanying sauce‚Äîa bright, zesty blend of peperoncino, lemon, and garlic‚Äîenlivens every bite of this balanced, nourishing meal.

name: Cuban Style Pork Pernil with Garlicky Mojo
description: Chef Akhtar takes on pork pernil, a traditional Cuban-style roasted pork, and pairs it with all the fixings and sauces of the Caribbean island. Succulent on the inside with that perfectly crisp skin on the outside, the pork is undeniably the star of this meal, especially when served with mojo, a garlicky citrus sauce that provides a tangy, acidic contrast to the rich meat. Accompanied by crunchy yucca fries and moro rice‚Äîspiced rice and saucy black beans‚ÄîChef's zesty Cuban cooking is perfect for those who love bold flavors and hearty meals.

name: Tex Mex Beef Picadillo Tacos
description: Taco night just got 100% more delicious with Chef Maribel's beef picadillo tacos. Soft flour tortillas are filled with ground beef, tomatoes, potatoes, garlic, and onions, all seasoned with Chef's special seasoning mix. Topped with shredded cheddar cheese and served with a side of Mexican rice and a roasted tomato-serrano salsa, this dish is packed with flavor from start to finish. Note: Chef Maribel recommends heating the tortillas on a cast iron skillet or a very hot skillet before building your tacos.

name: Steak Lobster Tail Surf Turf
description: Savor the best of both worlds with this decadent, upscale take on surf and turf. Indulge in succulent lobster tail and juicy beef tenderloin, expertly prepared and served alongside herb-butter and chimichurri. Paired with saut√©ed green beans and creamy mashed, this dish promises a can't-miss culinary experience.

name: Seared Steak Horseradish Cream
description: If you are searching for a low-carb and gluten-free steak lover‚Äôs dream, then look no further. This is one of Chef Chris‚Äô simpler meals‚Äî just steak, veg, and a sauce‚Äî but when things are simple that means each component has to be perfect, so we take time with each one. The flank steak is marinated overnight then grilled and sliced. It‚Äôs served with Chef‚Äôs steakhouse-inspired horseradish creme sauce and with Brussels sprouts that have been marinated with garlic, shallots, and thyme and oven-roasted.

name: Rigatoni Alla Norma with Whipped Basil Ricotta
description: Chef Meena works her magic on a Sicilian staple, pasta alla norma. Elegant tubes of rigatoni are tossed in a garlicky tomato-based sauce with chunks of roasted eggplant. A fragrant basil-infused ricotta, brightened with lemon and garlic, crowns this dish with a delicate dollop, while a hint of crushed red pepper adds a little heat.

name: Black Bean Burrito Bowl
description: A delicious, deconstructed burrito bowl full of Chef Emily's favorite things! Stewed black beans, Mexican street corn salad, kale, and cilantro-lime basmati rice offer familiar fresh flavors. A drizzle of jalape√±o cashew cream and crunchy pepitas add the finishing touches on this perfect plant-based, flavor-forward meal.

name: Blackened Mahi Mahi with Mango Habanero Salsa
description: Inspired by a myriad of Latin and Caribbean influences, Chef Garces' take on blackened fish will transport you to the tropics. Served with sides of coconut rice and broccoli, plus a mango-habanero salsa that packs sweet heat, this dish is a party in your mouth!

name: Mediterranean Baked Cod
description: Flaky, tender cod bakes gently alongside juicy cherry tomatoes and briny olives, absorbing their rich, savory juices. A drizzle of olive oil and a medley of herbs enhance the Mediterranean flavors, making for a light yet deeply satisfying dish.

name: Turkish Garlicky Shrimp Bowl
description: Succulent shrimp are the star of this dish, poached in a spicy, lemony, garlic-infused brown butter sauce. The delectable shrimp are served on a bed of fragrant jasmine rice alongside crispy fried cauliflower drizzled with tantalizing tahini and pomegranate syrup. Enjoy a burst of sweet flavor from blistered cherry tomatoes and seasoned chickpeas, while savoring the heat of blistered long peppers. Complete the feast with a drizzle of creamy cacik, a Turkish dill yogurt sauce similar to tzatziki, which adds a refreshing touch to this harmonious ensemble of flavors and textures.

name: Miso Silan Glazed Cod
description: The cod is glazed with Silan, a rich date syrup, and white miso for a sweet and savory umami flavor. Served with creamy polenta and charred asparagus.

name: Bubbs Memphis Style Ribs
description: Treat yourself to a flavorful and hearty BBQ meal with Bubb's' signature Memphis-style pork ribs, slow-cooked baked beans, braised greens, and coleslaw. The star of the dish are the ribs, high-quality baby back ribs, rubbed in a traditional Memphis-style dry rub that gives them a tangy and spicy flavor. The ribs are then slow-cooked in a smoker until they are fall-off-the-bone, melt-in-your-mouth tender and delicious. Paired with bacon-laden braised greens and smoky baked beans, plus sides of coleslaw for a pop of acidic freshness, this dish has everything you'd expect in an authentic BBQ plate. If you're looking for a mouth-watering, finger-licking dish, these ribs are the perfect choice.

name: Mustard Crusted Beef Filet
description: A succulent beef tenderloin is made even more irresistible when coated with tangy Dijon mustard and parmesan crust and seared to perfection. The mustard crust adds a zesty kick, enhancing the overall richness of this premium cut of beef. Paired with truffle-infused mashed potatoes, garlicky green beans, and a red wine reduction, this is the perfect choice for anyone looking to bring a sophisticated dining experience to their very own home kitchen.

name: Perfect Spring Salad
description: Chef LaFrieda's refreshing spring salad is a celebration of the best produce the season has to offer. It features a delightful blend of mixed greens, tender asparagus, sweet peas, vibrant watermelon radish, toasted pistachios, and a medley of fresh soft herbs including mint, basil, and chives. All tossed in a zesty grapefruit vinaigrette for a burst of citrusy goodness, this salad is the perfect complement for any pasta dish, grilled meat or fish.

name: Braised Lamb with Chickpea Salad
description: This hearty meal features lamb shoulder slow roasted with hints of garlic, mint, and sun-dried tomato, then topped with a spiced tomato butter. Savor it over a bed of Israeli couscous with roasted pine nuts, kale, and parsley, along with a side of carrot-chickpea salad.

name: Chicken Chorizo Ragu
description: Hearty and comforting, Chef Daniel imbues a dish with Brazilian inspiration and roots with some Spanish influence. Galinhada is a typical stew in part of Brazil that consists of stewed chicken and rice with spices, and Chef Daniel adds spiced pork chorizo to give it a Spanish flair in the style of paella.

name: Rigatoni Cacio E Pepe
description: Want to feel like you're eating at a Roman trattoria? Then this dish from Chef John Delucie's Ambra is for you. It's Italian simplicity at its best: al dente rigatoni, Parmesan cheese, and freshly ground black peppercorns. That's all that goes in, and what comes out is creamy, cheesy pasta perfection.

name: Hoisin Glazed Chicken Thigh
description: Chef Phet serves up tender slices of chicken thigh glazed with a sweet and tangy hoisin sauce, accompanied by crispy roasted Brussels sprouts drizzled in caramel fish sauce, all over a bed of ginger-scallion jasmine rice. Mix in the Lao-style chili sauce on the side for some extra heat!

name: Grilled Hanger Steak
description: Grilled Hanger Steak is seasoned and grilled to a perfect rare, served atop a swirl of al dente Peruvian pesto linguine. The dish combines rich flavors with a drizzle of Chimichurri for brightness and acidity, making it an elevated weeknight meal.

name: Vegan Impossible Meat Tacos
description: Inspired by an authentic Mexican taqueria, this vegetarian taco recipe features soy meat protein, onion, bell pepper, and avocado slice.

name: Pumpkin Spice Chocolate Chip Cookie
description: This cookie combines rich brown butter with the warm spices of pumpkin and a generous serving of semi-sweet chocolate pistoles. They are soft, decadent, and utterly chocolatey‚Äîa true treat for the senses. Perfect for satisfying your sweet cravings.

name: Grilled Chicken and Pistachio Mole
description: For Chef Andres, mole is a taste of home. Raised in Puebla, where this iconic dish was born, his take features a blend of smoky serrano peppers, warm spices, and the buttery richness of roasted pistachios, all simmered into a velvety sauce. Paired with grilled chicken, refried beans, and fragrant basmati rice gently cooked with plum tomatoes, it‚Äôs finished with extra mole on the side, just as it should be.

name: Cheesy Butternut Squash Lasagna
description: As a chef, Chris really loves making lasagnas. He says, ‚ÄúThey truly are an expression of love.‚Äù And you can certainly taste the love in every bite of this butternut squash lasagna. Everything here is made fresh, with hand-cut vegetables and hand-peeled, slow cooked fresh butternut squash. We love a good white lasagna, with b√©chamel instead of tomatoes, and this one is loaded up with butternut squash, roasted vegetables, creamy b√©chamel, herbs, fresh pasta, and ricotta cheese. Delicate, nutty, creamy and hearty, with a good heaping of veggies to make it healthy-ish; you will just feel good from the inside out eating it. A tip from Chef Chris: if you go the oven-route, microwaving it for two minutes first cuts down baking time significantly.

name: Lamb Burger with Tzatziki
description: Tender and flavorful, Chef Akhtar's lamb burger is seasoned to perfection, then roasted until crisp on the outside and juicy on the inside. The lamb burger is served on a plush brioche bun with mozzarella cheese, creamy tzatziki sauce, and pickled red onions, plus a side of crispy roasted sweet potato wedges.

name: Gochujang Pulled Pork Baos
description: Chef Fabiola's Pulled Pork Baos are so creative and so delicious, they may just blow your mind! The steamed buns themselves are soft and plush, and stuffed to the brim with tender, Gochujang-marinated pulled pork, then finished with a fresh banh mi-style pickled slaw for a pop of acidic freshness. These fun, fusion pork buns prove you don't need to go to an expensive restaurant to try restaurant-quality dishes!

name: Indonesian Braised Beef In Coconut Sauce
Inca Chicken Quinoa Bowl
description: Reap the benefits of Peru's indigenous Incan heritage and all of its best superfoods in one delicious bowl. It starts with a base of baby spinach and red and white quinoa, along with Peru's other gifts to the Americas like purple potatoes, green lima beans, and Peruvian yellow peppers (aji amarillo), pickled with bell peppers. Topped with turmeric- and aji amarillo-marinated grilled chicken breast and finished with a garlic-lemon vinaigrette, this bowl is as great-tasting and it is for you.

name: Orange Zest Salmon
description: A beautiful French-inspired salmon fillet dressed with an orange zest rub and honey-soy glaze. Served over a bed of pearl couscous with tender zucchini, this fish will transport you to a European summer vacation!

name: Flank Steak Garlic Chili Oil
description: Herb-marinated flank steak is grilled then hand-sliced by a carving chef. The slices of tender, juicy steak are paired with Chef Chris‚Äô steakhouse-style creamy three-cheese cauliflower gratin made with creamy blue cheese, nutty Swiss, and cheddar. A zippy sauce of slow-roasted garlic and crisped up chili flakes is the perfect accompaniment for this modern take on steakhouse fare. Chef highly recommends heating this meal in the microwave.

name: Grilled Chicken Tampiquena Plate
description: La Tampique√±a is one of the most quintessential dishes in Tamaulipas, and Mexican cuisine in general. Chef Santiago put his own delicious spin on the dish with perfectly grilled chicken that's been marinated with typical Mexican seasonings, chiles, and achiote. The chicken is served alongside a decadent cheese enchilada along with sides of smoky chipotle-infused rice, rajas (creamy, cheesy saut√©ed corn and poblano peppers), and fresh, tangy guacamole. This is without a doubt one of Santiago's favorite dishes he's prepared for CookUnity (and ours too!)

name: Meatball Supreme Bake
description: Where to start with this ultimate comfort meal? The savory beef meatballs, of course! They‚Äôre handmade, seasoned with garlic, onion, and Italian herbs, and browned to juicy perfection. Chef Tracey bakes them in rich, tangy marinara sauce with onions and green peppers and tops them with sliced pepperoni and Mozzarella cheese for next-level flavor and ooey-gooey goodness. A fresh green salad or some crusty bread (or both!) make perfect partners for this indulgent treat that combines everything you love about hearty, home-style Italian cooking.

name: Entrecote with Cafe De Paris Butter
description: Transport your tastebuds to a Parisian bistro with this famous French steak preparation. Entrec√¥te (also known as rib eye steak) is cooked to absolute perfection and paired with Caf√© de Paris butter, a butter-based sauce that's deeply savory with loads of umami and fresh herbs. The decadent steak is served alongside potato pav√©, a layered potato gratin with garlic, thyme, and cream. Together, the pairing is just plain irresistible.

name: Rigatoni with Pork Sausage Bolognese
description: Italian pork sausage is the base of this super savory twist on bolognese sauce, adding richness and spice to the tomato-based sauce. The rich rag√π is paired with al dente rigatoni and topped with a generous sprinkle of grated romano cheese, creating a perfectly cozy and satisfying meal.

name: Grandmas Tuna Noodle Casserole
description: Oh man, what's more comforting and delicious than old school tuna noodle casserole? Tuna and cavatappi pasta are tossed in a creamy, homemade mushroom gravy that's complimented by fresh sweet peas and a crunchy, cheesy herbed breadcrumb topping. This is Chef Chris' grandma's recipe, and you'll savor every last bite of it.

name: Wild Rice Pilaf with Mushrooms and Peas
description: This wild rice pilaf just tastes like fall. With the earthy tones of cremini mushroom, and nutty flavor and toothsome texture of perfectly cooked wild rice, plus garlic, chives, and a hint of sweetness from fresh peas. Perfectly balanced and wonderfully satisfying, this is the perfect side to complement any holiday meal (or any meal, really!).

name: Peruvian Chicken with Aji Verde
description: Introducing Chef Carlos & Chef Bladimir's signature Peruvian chicken and creamy green sauce. The delectable chicken is marinated with a special blend of herbs and spices, roasted, and served with a vibrant aji verde sauce, ensuring that every bite is bursting with fresh flavor. Paired with a tangy red cabbage slaw, this bold and satisfying dish will leave you craving more!

name: Tuna Burger
description: Tuna whizzed with celery, cilantro, lime juice and scallions. Chef crafted this burger and took it to another level to make your burger cravings healthy and nutritous using tuna fish.

name: Dal Makhani Cumin Basmati Rice
description: Dal is one thing, but Chef Meena‚Äôs dal makhani is quite another. Black lentils and red kidney beans bubble away until irresistibly soft, thickened into a rich, creamy sauce with ripe tomatoes. This lush mix is layered with spices, like garam masala, along with ginger, garlic, and a flicker of heat from kashimiri chili. It‚Äôs served with cumin-scented basmati rice, and a refreshing mango salad to cut through the creaminess.

name: Pomegranate Chicken Over Almond Couscous
description: Pomegranate seeds are the star of this dish, bringing bright pops of floral acidity and sweetness to this Middle Eastern-inspired stewed chicken thighs. The chicken is paired with an almond-studded couscous, saut√©ed green beans with blanched almonds, a sweet and savory date and herb salsa, and pickled red onions. Perfectly balanced and bright, this dish will brighten up any weekday!

name: Mexican Flank Steak
description: Chef Roberto's recipe features tender flank steak marinated with jalape√±o peppers, served alongside fragrant cilantro rice. This dish pays homage to his grandmother's recipes, offering a delicious journey into traditional Mexican flavors.

name: Herbed Turkey Meatballs
description: Perfectly seasoned and bursting with fresh herbal flavor, these turkey meatballs are seared to lock in flavor and juiciness, then gently simmered with onions, garlic, and sweet bell peppers in a savory, basil-accented tomato sauce. Chef Art Smith serves a hearty portion on a bed of creamy polenta, made with fresh-grated Parmesan cheese for extra umami richness. A shower of parsley provides the perfect finishing touch to this comforting meal.

name: Spiced Chicken Mediterranean Bowl
description: Chef Michelle presents a warm bowl of chicken marinated in a shawarma spice blend, accompanied by curried chickpea rice, and roasted squash. Top it all off with flavorful crispy shallots and a harissa tahini drizzle.

name: Grilled Bbq Chicken
description: Enjoy all the summery grilled goodness‚Äîwithout all the work. Chef Tracey brines boneless, skinless chicken thighs for 24 hours to make them extra moist and juicy, then slathers them with tangy-sweet BBQ sauce and grills them over an open flame for that signature smoky char. (Don‚Äôt worry‚Äîthere‚Äôs extra BBQ sauce for dipping, too.) She pairs the chicken with luscious, buttery creamed corn kicked up with a little jalape√±o heat. It‚Äôs the ultimate nostalgic combination that‚Äôll leave you remembering backyard get-togethers of days gone by‚Äîand begging for a second helping.

name: Miso Style Ramen with Tofu
description: Fresh, bouncy ramen noodles are paired with a rich, umami-filled miso broth and mixed with fresh tofu, sweet corn, shiitake mushrooms, and bok choy. Not only is Chef Esther's miso ramen satisfying and delicious, but it also happens to be vegetarian.

name: Mission Style Chicken Burrito
description: Mission-style burritos are a classic California style of burrito known for their big size and even bigger flavors. This one is absolutely jam packed with shredded chicken that's been slow cooked with chipotle in adobo and Guajillo peppers. The chicken is paired with seasoned black beans, white rice, and a three cheese blend with pepper jack, white cheddar, and Oaxacan cheeses. All of this goodness is rolled up in a soft flour tortilla, pressed until crispy on the edges and served up with salsa verde and Mexican crema. Consider your cravings crushed!

name: Creamy Cajun Pasta with Andouille Sausage
description: Perfectly al dente gemelli pasta with creamy cajun and andouille sausage and seasoning. Garnished with fresh parmesan cheese.

name: Yuzu Jalapeno Roasted Arctic Char
description: Chef Anthony absolutely adores jalape√±os for their flavor, not just heat. Chef especially loves pairing them with a complex flavor such as yuzu, a low-acid citrus fruit similar to lemon and popular in Japanese cuisine. The two flavors are combined into a bright, tangy marinade for Arctic char, which is then roasted and drizzled with an umami-rich miso sauce. On the side, you'll enjoy simply saut√©ed baby bok choy and a lime-infused sweet potato mash, making this dish a match made in flavor heaven.

name: Cookie Decorating Kit
description: The holiday sugar cookie decorating kit is the perfect way to embrace the festive spirit and unleash your creativity. It includes freshly baked vanilla sugar cookies ready to be transformed into edible works of art. Vibrant icing colors and an assortment of seasonal sprinkles allow you to personalize designs for each cookie.

name: Japanese Chicken Curry
description: Chef Brandon‚Äôs take on this beloved dish features sweet kabocha squash and juicy chunks of saut√©ed chicken thigh. It‚Äôs all served over fluffy steamed white rice and topped with fresh chopped chives.

name: Ny Steak with Butternut Squash
description: Grilled NY steak with sauteed seasonal squash and a butternut squash and carrot puree.

name: Chicken Veggies Quesadilla
description: With Chef Maia's clever meal, there are the veggies you can see‚Äîcrisp-tender steamed broccoli and cherry tomatoes‚Äîbut there are also the ones you can‚Äôt see‚Äîgrated carrots and zucchini hidden in the quesadilla. She combines them with mild cream cheese, spreads the mixture on each flour tortilla, then tops with juicy, tender chicken and melty Mozzarella. The tangy sour cream and chive dip goes great with everything. If you‚Äôre looking for a meal that doesn‚Äôt compromise on kid-friendly flavor or parent-approved nutrition, this is it.

name: Salmon with Roasted Vegetables
description: Roasted salmon is served on a bed of oven roasted vegetables with a mild and flavor-filled chorizo sauce.

name: Veggie Dumplings with Junzi Dipping Sauce
description: It's a classic Chinese veggie dumpling with a variety of mixed vegetables to give a great texture and rich flavor. The main ingredient is Ji Cai which is also called shepherd's purse, coupling with bamboo shoots, sweet potato noodle and tofu, seasoned with soy sauce and scallion oil. We also add spinach to the dumpling dough to give a fresh taste and color.

name: Mole Chicken Enchiladas
description: Chef Santiago‚Äôs mole (sauce) is a labor of love‚Äîhe roasts and grinds a combination of chiles, raisins, nuts, and cinnamon (plus a few secret ingredients) into a thick, velvety sauce that strikes the perfect balance of sweet, spicy, smoky, and nutty flavors. It provides a flavor-packed base for fresh corn tortillas stuffed with juicy pulled chicken thigh and melty cheese, topped with a drizzle of tangy sour cream. Served with Veggie Rice, this meal is a true taste of traditional Mexican home cooking.

name: Martins Ecuadorian Chicken
description: Chef Aarthi got this recipe from her head chef Martin; He made it for a team lunch once and it was so good that Chef Aarthi knew she wanted to share it with her CookUnity family. The chicken is juicy marinated with coriander, cumin, and cilantro, in a tomato-based sauce with tons of umami. It's the perfect complement to sweet plantains and aromatic steamed jasmine rice.

name: Mexican Chicken Bowl
description: Ditch the fast food burrito for this bowl packed with flavor, freshness, and satisfaction! Chock full of marinated chicken breast, cilantro rice, baby spinach and black beans, and topped with loads of freshness of guacamole with a tomatillo-based salsa macha. This bowl will keep you feelin' good, and eatin' good all season!

name: Spiced Honey Glazed Ham
description: Chef Nora is serving up a leveled-up version of the quintessential holiday dinner, without any of the work. Baked ham is roasted until tender and juicy, drizzled with a caramelized buttery, spiced honey glaze, and served with a side of grilled pineapple. Paired with plush potato dinner rolls and a side of saut√©ed haricots verts, it‚Äôs everything you want in a holiday dinner and more‚Äîall that‚Äôs missing is a festive table setting.

name: Prosciutto Cheese Crepe
description: Chef Miriam is serving up French bistro fare at its finest. Here, a thin and delicate crepe is filled with thinly sliced prosciutto, which adds a rich and salty taste, perfectly complemented by the melty white cheddar cheese. The super savory crepe is accompanied by a silky b√©chamel sauce, adding even more richness to each bite. Whether enjoyed for brunch, lunch, or a light dinner, this French-inspired meal is a must-try.

name: al Pastor Shrimp
description: Succulent shrimp get the Al Pastor treatment in this tasty dish. Sweet, spicy, and smoky, the Al Pastor-style marinade deeply imbues the shrimp with flavor before they get grilled alongside pineapple and sweet onions, all caramelized to perfection. Served with a side of steamed jasmine rice and spicy pickled onions, peppers, and radish, this dish is a standout and a surefire soon-to-be favorite in your weekly routine.

name: Simply Grilled Sea Bass
description: According to Chef Fabio, the best (and healthiest!) way to eat branzino is grilled simply with high quality extra virgin olive oil, salt, and pepper. Lots of flavor-packed veggie sides add intrigue to the dish; from roasted Brussels sprouts to blistered cherry tomatoes and a saut√©ed corn and pea salad, this dish will bring color, spice, and freshness to your dinner table.

name: Japanese Chicken Katsu Curry
description: Chef Esther's take on a classic chicken katsu with curry is every bit as comforting as what you'd get in Japan. Enjoy a crispy fried chicken cutlet with the rich, Japanese-style vegetable curry and a side of steamed Calrose rice. Don't be surprised if you find yourself craving this dish week after week.

name: Classic Aguachile De Camaron
description: This vibrant coastal Mexican classic will brighten up any day. Sweet, succulent (and, in this case, cooked) shrimp are soaked in fiery ‚Äúchile water‚Äù‚Äîa potent blend of serranos, jalape√±os, cucumber, cilantro, and lime juice‚Äîthen topped with zesty red onions and served chilled for contrast to the fiery flavor. Spoon the shrimp and sauce onto one of the crispy tostadas, top with seasoned chickpeas, and savor a taste of Sinaloa.

name: Thai Burger
description: Thai-inspired vegan burgers are made with a base of shredded sweet potato, purple cabbage, chickpeas, with root fries on the side. Flavoured with tahini, sesame oil, ginger and flaxseed meal.

name: French Onion Chicken
description: Your favorite French onion soup, but like you never seen it before. Chicken breasts get saut√©ed in a decadent French onion sauce, then topped with Gruy√®re cheese and baked until the cheese is gooey and delicious. The rich chicken is served alongside creamy potato pur√©e and buttered peas for a French bistro-inspired dinner that's sure to be your new go-to comfort food.

name: Asian Quinoa Salad
description: Filled with vibrant colorful veggies drizzled with asian dressing, this asian quinoa salad is light, hearty and fulfilling great for your dinner. Quinoa is a great source of protein and makes a great hearty, healthy, and delicious salad!

name: Asian Quinoa Power Bowl
description: Inspired by Asian cuisines, this salad packs loads of flavor and protein while still leaving you feeling healthy and happy.

name: Mexican Style Vegetarian Meatballs
description: Chef Ivy's Mexican-style vegetarian meatballs feature Beyond meat, plant-based chorizo, and lots of spices to kick things up on a notch from the typical meatball. Topped with a roasted tomato and chipotle chile sauce and vegan Parmesan, the meatballs are paired with a side of Mexican-inspired cauliflower rice with corn, peppers, and irresistible seasonings.

name: Cashew Chicken with Brown Rice
description: A stir-fry that delivers on flavor and texture. Juicy chicken thighs are marinated in a sweet-savory sauce, then wok-tossed with onions, garlic, and bell peppers. Loaded with roasted cashews for a crunchy, nutty contrast, it‚Äôs served with steamed brown rice, keeping things simple, yet utterly satisfying.

name: Beyond Meat and Rice Empanadas
description: Made with Beyond plant-based 'meat', fluffy rice, and plenty of traditional spices, these Andean-style empanadas are wrapped in a yummy beet dough.

name: Crustless Spinach Pepper Mushroom Quiche
description: This filling, low-carb quiche skips the crust but keeps all the flavor. Here, Chef Fabiola folds a nutrient-rich mix of spinach, peppers, and mushrooms into fluffy egg whites and melty cheese, baking everything together until golden. Served with fresh grapes and sliced almonds, this dish is a simple, wholesome way to start the day.

name: Enchilada Power Bowl
description: Filling, full of textures, loaded with protein, kick of spiciness, that's your kind of bowl. Black beans, green lentils and rice in a luxurious chili-cheese sauce, let's call it your enchilada bowl with a power twist.

name: Cheesy Beef Picadillo
description: Nothing is more satisfying than sizzling cheese over Chef Anthony‚Äôs homemade beef picadillo. He layers all the goodness on top of fluffy, fresh yellow rice ‚Äî plus a sprinkle of tortilla shell crumbles and some lime to bring the taco-dish all together.

name: Loaded Breakfast Bowl with Scrambled Egg Whites
description: Start your day with a breakfast that works as hard as you do. Crisp turkey bacon, seasoned turkey sausage, and fluffy scrambled egg whites power this bowl with lean protein. They‚Äôre bolstered by roasted sweet potatoes, saut√©ed peppers, and melty cheese, with a side of tomatillo salsa for extra zest. Consider your morning, and your metabolism, officially kicked into gear.

name: Spanish Chicken Chorizo
description: Every Latin household has their version of Arroz con Pollo (Chicken with Rice). Chef Maribel's version is inspired by her Mom's recipe, seasoned with Spanish seasonings found in a paella like paprika, saffron, red bell peppers, piquillo peppers, and Spanish chorizo. A quick pickled red onion salad with cherry tomatoes adds just the right amount of acidity to this dish.

name: Chicken Cutlet Sandwich
description: A buttery, grilled brioche bun sets the stage for this sandwich, where Chef Pimnapat coats and fries a juicy chicken thigh in panko breadcrumbs. It‚Äôs layered with tangy pickled cucumbers, crunchy cabbage slaw, and a slice of American cheese, with a drizzle of Tonkatsu sauce hitting the savory-sweet notes.

name: Ancho Chile Butter Red Fish
description: Your new favorite weeknight dinner or lunch is served up in seconds thanks to this light and tasty meal. Local red fish pairs perfectly with a smoky ancho chile compound butter and a hearty side of saut√©ed spinach, caramelized onions, and mushrooms. A gluten-free corn pudding adds a little richness to round out the meal.

name: Ambra Seared Ny Strip Steak
description: What's better than an all-natural, high quality 12-ounce New York strip steak cooked to perfection? Not much. Chef John seasons the steak simply, letting its rich beefy flavor shine, then sears it on high heat to lock in all its natural juices. A red wine reduction sauce brings a hint of acidic sweetness, perfectly complementing the steak. Enjoy this gorgeous steak for a date night, weeknight, or really any night‚Äîit's guaranteed to make any meal feel like a special occasion.

name: Abbazia Prosecco Rose
description: Fresh, vibrant, and elegantly balanced. Made from a blend of Glera and Pinot Noir, this fizz presents a pale cherry-pink hue, accompanied by persistent bubbles that dance on the palate. The fruity, aromatic profile opens with bright notes of wild strawberries, leading to a crisp, zesty finish.

name: Mission Style Soyrizo Burrito
description: Mission-style burritos are a classic California style of burrito known for their big size and even bigger flavors. This one is absolutely jam packed with veggies, black beans, rice, and spices. Soyrizo, butternut squash, mushrooms and kale are seasoned with Chef Jose's white adobo spice blend and roasted. They're paired with sofrito, seasoned black beans, white rice, sour cream and a three-cheese blend with pepper jack, white cheddar and Oaxacan cheeses. All of this goodness is rolled up in a soft flour tortilla, pressed until crispy on the edges and served up with salsa verde. Consider your cravings crushed!

name: Caribbean Jerk Chicken with Pineapple Salsa
description: This Caribbean jerk chicken will transport you to somewhere tropical, even if you can‚Äôt quite yet get there in real life. Starting with Chef Fabiola's sweet, spicy, and tangy jerk marinade and ending with a delicious, slightly spicy pineapple salsa, this dish is delish start to finish! A bed of quinoa and black beans, a dollop of sour cream, and a squeeze of lime tie the whole dish together.

name: Braised Chicken Calderata
description: Chicken Caldereta is a type of flavorful chicken stew that's a favorite in the Philippines. Chef Stacy's version starts with chicken thighs and legs that are braised low and slow in a spiced tomato sauce. Chef's adds a good amount of liver spread, a typical Filipino ingredient, to make the sauce more flavorful and rich in umami. This ingredient makes this dish unique in a good way, and you'll want to soak up all of its delicious sauce with some steamed Jasmine rice.

name: Slow Roasted Spice Crusted Pork
description: Brined for 24 hours to ensure moistness and rubbed with a flavorful mix of black and red pepper, fennel and coriander seeds, garlic, and rosemary, Chef Michael‚Äôs pork tenderloin becomes meltingly tender when slow-roasted‚Äîfar more so than you might expect from this lean cut. It‚Äôs truly sensational. And the accompaniments‚Äîsweet-and-sour apple gastrique and a salad of maple-glazed green peas (ask petit pois), spinach leaves, shaved onion, and bacon lardons‚Äîtake it deliciously over the top.

name: Gluten Free Thanksgiving Turkey
description: Our hormone-free turkey is brined and carefully carved. We include all the delicious parts of the turkey so you get a complete feast, served with cranberry relish, and a gluten-free cornbread stuffing.

name: Bbq Chicken
description: This meal presents a delicious dilemma: what‚Äôs better ‚Äî the side or the protein? Luckily you don‚Äôt have to choose! Chef Chris' sweet and smoky BBQ sauce adds some subtle heat to the pulled chicken, while a Pepper Jack-Cheddar cheese crumb crust takes the mac n cheese to an even gooier level.

name: Kids Blueberry Pancake
description: Whether it‚Äôs enjoyed at breakfast or as breakfast-for-dinner, this delicious, kid-friendly meal will tantalize young (or young-at-heart) tastebuds. Let‚Äôs start with the sweet side: The pancake is packed with whole-wheat nutrition and bursts of fresh antioxidant-rich blueberries. On the savory side: The egg bite provides high quality, filling protein and melty Cheddar cheese goodness. There‚Äôs a serving of fresh fruit, too ‚Äî juicy pineapple, mild cantaloupe, and more blueberries. No matter which side you start with, there‚Äôs comfort and joy in each bite.

name: Savory Sweet Spiced Beef Stew
description: You‚Äôve had ordinary beef stew; now get ready for an extraordinary version. Chef Jona adds a touch of cinnamon and cloves to the tomato sauce and aromatic vegetable mixture he braises flavorful beef chuck in, adding rich complexity to the dish. When ladled over a hearty serving of al dente pasta and topped with shredded Parmesan cheese, it makes for an unforgettable blend of savory and sweet flavors. (And one that pairs perfectly with a glass of red wine.) Lightly saut√©ed snow peas provide a refreshing contrast on the side.

name: Roasted Vegetable Medley
description: All the best vegetables of the fall harvest‚ÄîBrussels sprouts, sweet potato, fingerling potatoes, butternut squash, parsnips, and peppers‚Äîget lightly tossed in balsamic and roasted to perfection. The nicely caramelized veggies are paired with Chef Chris' blue cheese compound butter, which adds complexity and richness. Pair these alongside your favorite protein to instantly elevate any meal.

name: Shrimp and Zucchini Linguine
description: This delicious pasta is inspired by summer, but tastes just as good any time of year! Succulent saut√©ed shrimp are mixed with linguine and tossed in a bright, creamy roasted red pepper sauce. Topped with zucchini and summer squash, sweet snow peas, cherry tomatoes and parmesan cheese, this dish is wonderfully balanced and bursting with flavors that taste fresh from the garden.

name: Potato Chorizo Tortilla Espanola
description: Whether served hot, room temperature, or cold, this take on a Spanish tortilla is irresistible. A seasoned egg base is filled with tender potatoes and spicy chorizo, then baked to perfection. The tortilla is paired with a fresh, simple salad of radicchio, kale, arugula with parmesan, cherry tomatoes, and kalamata olives, all dressed in a honey-balsamic vinaigrette. Enjoy this meal for breakfast, brunch, lunch, or even dinner...no matter what time of day, we know you'll love it!

name: Chicken Breast Glazed Carrots
description: One of Dan Kluger's classic dishes. A beautifully roasted antibiotic and hormone free brined chicken breast with sweet and sour glazed carrots and a smokey carrot hazelnut romesco sauce. It is like having the Loring Place at your home.

name: Beef Pad Krapow Minced Beef with Holy Basil
description: Pad Kaprow is one of the most popular Thai street foods, with its crowd-pleasing balance of sweet, savory, and herbaceous flavor, with just a kick of heat. Stir-fried minced beef is infused with fresh ginger, caramelized sugar, fish sauce, and oyster sauce until caramelized and crisped, creating that classic street fare flavor. Served with a side of kimchi on top of jasmine rice, Chef Phet serves his Kaprow with a side of extra spicy chili sauce that can be added to your liking.

name: Rainbow Vegetable Pad Thai
description: Eat the rainbow with this vegan, flavor and nutrient-packed dish. Chef Anne's spin on Pad Thai features gluten-free noodles tossed in a tasty peanut sauce with tons of colorful veggies including asparagus, peppers, roasted squash, zucchini and crimini mushrooms. Top your Pad Thai with crunchy cabbage, green onion, cilantro, and roasted peanuts for that perfect textural contrast.

name: Sunday Sauce Rigatoni
description: Traditional Sunday sauce, just like grandma used to make. Chef Dustin's 'Sunday Sauce' features tender homemade meatballs and spicy Italian pork sausage, all cooked low and slow in a tangy marinara sauce. Served with al dente rigatoni and a sprinkle of parmesan cheese, this Italian meal is comfort to the max.

name: Stout Braised Short Ribs
description: You‚Äôll want to get cozy for these fall-off-the-bone tender short ribs, braised for three hours in stout beer and beef stock infused with aromas of rosemary and thyme, then topped with chives and crispy onions. Roasted heirloom carrots and a garlicky potato-kale mash complete this satisfying, richly textured meal.

name: Malabar Responsibly Farmed Shrimp Biryani
description: Chef Meena brings you this Clean Meal, crafted with simple, wholesome ingredients, free from additives and prepared with nutrient-rich superfoods. A layered rice dish with jumbo shrimp is flavored with saffron, turmeric and an array of Indian spices. This dish is for those who loves the exotic spices of India. To tone down the heat a side of cool tomato raita will be provided.

name: Three Cheese Cauliflower Mash
description: Creamy, cheesy, and totally decadent, you'll love Chef Kristy's inventive take on mashed potatoes. Made with tender cauliflower combined with cream cheese for richness, mozzarella for stretchy texture, and parmesan for funky, salty flavor, this mash is the perfect side for your protein of choice. Try it alongside grilled chicken, crispy pan-seared fish, a nice steak, or thick-cut pork chop for the easiest, elegant weeknight dinner ever.

name: Mango Coconut Overnight Oats
description: Looking for a breakfast option that‚Äôs as tasty as it is healthy? Hearty old-fashioned oats are swirled with fresh mango puree and rich coconut milk lightly sweetened with honey then soaked overnight until deliciously creamy. They‚Äôre topped with juicy fresh blackberries and a blend of toasted shredded coconut and sliced almonds for satisfying crunch. This nutrient-packed tropical delight will kick-start your morning and keep you feeling energized for hours.

name: Mediterranean Spiced Shrimp with Saffron Farro
description: Dig into the Spanish Mediterranean flavors of this Shrimp dish. The nutty depth of flavor in the Farro salad balances beautifully with the crisp, fresh summer vegetable slaw. A textured hazelnut romesco sauce brings all the components of this dish together perfectly.
