name: Slow Roast Turkey with Cornbread Apple Stuffing
description: Slow roasted boneless hand carved turkey breast served with sweet and savory apple, mushroom, cornbread stuffing for two.

name: Mac N Cheese
description: This dish from Chef Ivy is all about adding nutritious veggies into a comforting food without the kids even having to know. All they'll taste are the pasta shells they know and love in a creamy cheddar cheese sauce that sneakily has cauliflower blended in to add vitamins and minerals without compromising the flavor. Served with sweet roasted carrots on the side, this is a well-rounded meal they'll ask for week after week.

name: al Pastor Pork Fajita Bowl
description: Discover the irresistible flavors of Chef Jose's Al Pastor Pork Fajita Bowl, exclusively crafted for CookUnity customers. This delectable dish boasts a 24-hour marinated pork shoulder, slow-roasted to perfection and delicately sliced. Served over fluffy rice with charred peppers, onions, and pineapple, all drenched in an irresistible Al Pastor sauce. The secret blend of herbs and spices, combined with orange juice, charred pineapple, onion, garlic, and achiote reflects Chef Garces' unwavering dedication to delivering an authentic, unparalleled dining experience.

name: Gaucho Ribeye Steak Chorizo
description: If you're hungry like an Argentinian cowboy, or a gaucho, this extra hearty meal is just for you! Chef Maribel prepares a juicy rib eye steak on the grill along with Argentinian style sausage. Filling out the plate are crispy Yukon Gold potatoes and roasted bell peppers marinated in olive oil and garlic. Don‚Äôt forget to shake the chimichurri well and pour it over the steak!

name: Spicy Korean Style Pulled Pork
description: This Korean classic features a hearty portion of slow roasted and marinated pulled pork shoulder, stir-fried, and braised in a mixture of spicy gochujang and lots of garlic and ginger‚Äîa perfect contrast to the rich meat. It's served on a bed of fluffy white rice and paired with another Korean favorite‚Äîa tangy sweet and sour salad made with crunchy, peppery daikon radishes and carrots. (Think of it as kimchi with less kick.) It all adds up to a super-satisfying, flavor-packed meal that will quickly find a place on your regular rotation.

name: Risotto Alla Pescatora with Fish
description: Take a trip to Italy without even leaving your kitchen. Chef Santiago pairs a deliciously creamy, luxurious tomato-and-saffron risotto with perfectly cooked seafood including pan-seared tilapia and tender calamari. For a pop of color, texture, and nutrition, Chef adds in freshly saut√©ed zucchini and peas. A sprinkle of Parmesan cheese on top completes the dish!

name: Backyard Bbq Chicken
description: Saucy, smoky chicken thighs are served up with the classic backyard BBQ sides of creamy American-style potato salad and coleslaw. This is real down home cooking; no frills, just tasty.

name: Blue Cheese and Date Salad with Chicken
description: This bold combination of sweet and savory flavors will shake up any recipe rut. Rosemary and citrus-marinated roasted chicken is served atop a bed of mixed greens with blue cheese, walnuts and dried pears. Dress the salad in a tangy honey and Dijon mustard vinaigrette for a balanced lunch or dinner that's sure to satisfy.

name: Herb Roasted Chicken Breast
description: Here‚Äôs a healthy chicken dinner that‚Äôs a real winner‚Äîwell balanced, full of flavor, and perfectly satisfying after a workout or a long day. Protein-packed lean chicken breast gets a coating of fresh herbs, including thyme, oregano, and basil, then is slow roasted to tender, juicy, golden-brown perfection, and finished with even more fresh herbs. Chef Kevin pairs it with delightful Mediterranean Orzo Pasta, brimming with tangy Feta cheese and sundried tomatoes, sweet roasted red bell peppers, briny Kalamata olives, and broccoli, all tossed in a refreshing lemony vinaigrette. Eating Mediterranean style never tasted so good!

name: Golden Fried Pork Milanesa
description: This meal is perfect for anyone who appreciates a blend of savory, tangy, and fresh elements in every bite. Chef Michael‚Äôs Pork Milanesa features a golden-brown coating while the pork remains perfectly tender and juicy. Arugula adds a vibrant, peppery freshness, elevated with savings of rich, nutty Manchego cheese. Then comes the creative twist: Drizzled with a luscious, creamy Green Goddess sauce, the meal gains a layer of tangy, herbaceous complexity. It‚Äôs a wonderfully flavorful spin on the Italian classic.

name: Salmon with Minted Pea Risotto
description: This salmon dish is both bright and creamy! Chef Isaac paired a lemony salmon with a risotto of mint, peas and creme fraiche. You‚Äôll be satisfied without being weighed down, and we‚Äôre sure you‚Äôll be a fan of this dish.

name: Creamy Tuscan Salmon
description: You‚Äôll love this perfectly cooked salmon fillet in a cheesy, creamy sauce, seasoned with garlic, fresh basil, parsley, and sun-dried tomatoes, and mixed with juicy baby spinach leaves and cherry tomatoes. A side of mushroom and pea rice makes for a thoroughly satisfying and well-balanced meal.

name: Cajun Shrimp and Dirty Rice
description: Get a true taste of the South with Dirty Rice and Cajun Shrimp! Fluffy rice is seasoned with bold Cajun spices and tossed with ground beef and veggies for that signature ‚Äúdirty‚Äù color, while succulent shrimp add a burst of fresh flavor. This one-pot dish is packed with Southern charm and just the right kick to keep you coming back for more. It's perfect for those craving a little heat!

name: Hunters Style Chicken with Creamy Mashed Potatoes
description: Chef John‚Äôs take on a rustic Italian classic. Golden-seared chicken thighs are slowly simmered in a fragrant tomato and white wine sauce, alongside smoky pancetta and sweet bell peppers. Brimming with herbs, spices, and briny green olives, it‚Äôs served with creamy mashed potatoes and softly steamed spinach.

name: Asian Inspired Cabbage Salad with Shrimp
description: Ginger and sesame-marinated shrimp are the star of this dish, and pair perfectly with a fresh Asian-inspired salad composed of Napa cabbage, savoy cabbage, celery, carrots, and fresh cilantro. The salad is adorned with mandarin oranges, sliced almonds, and toasted sesame seeds and dressed in a tangy sesame dressing. This is a restaurant-quality salad that tastes so much better in the comfort of your own home.

name: Mediterranean Chicken Souvlaki
description: For her take on this Greek street food classic, Chef Einat marinates tender, juicy chicken thighs in a savory blend of herbs and spices then grills them for slightly smoky char. She serves a hearty portion with pita bread, smoky cumin- and paprika-marinated chickpeas, blistered tomatoes, and thin-sliced red onions seasoned with tangy sumac. The side of Greek Toum sauce‚Äîa bold blend of garlic, lemon juice, and olive oil‚Äîenlivens every bite of this balanced, nourishing meal.

name: Mongolian Mushroom Bowl
description: Chef Nahika gives oyster mushrooms the star treatment. Here, they take on a bold Mongolian-style marinade before hitting the pan, where they crisp up and caramelize alongside slow-cooked onions, garlic, and ginger. It all lands atop a heap of fluffy white rice, where sweet and savory do a little dance.

name: Pats Power Breakfast Wrap
description: This power breakfast wrap is sure to get your day started off on the right foot, with you feeling fully charged! Full of lean proteins like zesty chicken sausage and eggs baked with spinach, plus melty mozzarella cheese and a zippy, slightly spicy pesto, this a really tasty, healthy way to start your day!

name: Cacio E Pepe Con Pollo
description: Cacio e Pepe, a Roman classic, is one of the simplest yet most delicious pasta dishes. The saltiness of Pecorino Romano and the spice of freshly cracked black pepper create a perfect marriage for your palate. Served atop the cavatappi cacio e pepe is a marinated chicken breast, grilled to perfection and sliced. Think of it like the cherry on top, elevating this timeless favorite to new heights.

name: Pork al Pastor Burrito
description: Chef Maribel's al pastor marinade highlights Mexico's flavorful ingredients with a just-right combination of chiles and spices, notably achiote, creating a super tasty pork filling. Add in black beans, jasmine rice infused with peas and carrots, and juicy grilled pineapple, and this could just be your new favorite burrito.

name: Japanese Beef Yakisoba
description: Yakisoba is a beloved Japanese stir-fried noodle dish, featuring a rich, savory sauce spiked with Worcestershire. Here, it‚Äôs packed with tender strips of marinated beef and a vibrant mix of shiitake mushrooms, carrots, and cabbage.

name: Portuguese Chicken Shrimp Stew
description: A Portuguese comfort food similar to Spanish Paella this stew features tender chicken and succulent shrimp with spices and a touch of white wine. Saut√©ed kale and baked yams make the dish even more hearty and delicious. This meal is savory, satisfying, and just a tad spicy so you'll want to come back for bite after bite.

name: Grilled Teriyaki Shrimp
description: Chef Esther‚Äôs take on teriyaki grilled shrimp is a perfect contrast of flavors and packs an umami punch ‚Äî thanks to the traditional Japanese sauce‚Äôs blend of soy and mirin. The shrimp is served with veggie fried rice, plus crispy fried onions as a topping.

name: Jumbo Shrimp
description: Combined jumbo shrimps, spices over vegetable bed made with squash, zucchini drizzled with special sauce.

name: Turkey Burger Sliders
description: Experience the essence of Thanksgiving in slider form! These delightful turkey burger sliders are paired with a luscious cranberry aioli, caramelized onions, and sharp cheddar cheese, all served alongside candied sweet potatoes. The turkey burgers are infused with the aromatic flavors of rosemary, thyme, and sage, making each bite a true holiday celebration.

name: Thai Chicken Cashew Stir Fry
description: A beloved restaurant take out favorite gets taken up a notch in flavor, but with all the same convenience. Pieces of juicy chicken thigh are saut√©ed with crunchy cashews, onions, colorful bell pepper, scallions all in the Thaimee Love house sauce before getting served up on a bed of fluffy jasmine rice.

name: Roasted Mediterranean Salmon
description: Looking for lean, nutrient-packed protein? Chef Chase marinates salmon with extra-virgin olive oil, garlic, and herbs, then roasts it to tender, flaky perfection, and finishes with fresh lemon juice and parsley. It‚Äôs paired with a creamy and light lemon, shallot, and thyme sauce that perfectly complements the rich, buttery fish.

name: Rotini with Capers Olives Sun Dried Tomatoes
description: A delightful and nutritious dish centered on perfectly cooked rotini pasta and lots of gorgeous vegetables. Chef Forgione combines the earthy flavors of a creamy pur√©ed cauliflower sauce with the tanginess of capers, the brininess of olives, and the sweetness of sun-dried tomato, plus fresh tarragon and parsley for a pop of bright freshness. Topped with roasted cauliflower and broccoli, this pasta is perfect for a quick and satisfying weeknight dinner.

name: Lamb Burger with Harissa Aioli
description: A mash of Middle Eastern Street food and American comfort. Flavorful ground lamb is mixed with lots of spices and herbs, then formed into patties and seared to mimic the flavors of traditional Turkish 'kofte'. The lamb burger is served alongside spiced potato wedges and garnished with pickled sumac onions and harissa mayo.

name: Buttery Lobster Spaghetti
description: Chef Abe‚Äôs lobster spaghetti is extra creamy and flavorful thanks to his turmeric and coriander sauce, along with toppings of turmeric butter and freshly grated parmesan cheese.

name: Kimchi Fried Rice
description: Chef Chase introduces a Korean home-style fried-rice masterpiece. A symphony of flavors unfolds as she combines a robust kimchi sauce with the richness of butter, tossing saut√©ed leftover rice into the mix. Scrambled eggs weave through, creating a delightful harmony. Garnished with Nori and Sesame Seeds, this dish is a quick, flavorful delight‚Äîideal for a snack or a simple, satisfying meal.

name: Garlic Shrimp
description: Stay warm and healthy this summer with Chef Raymundo's savory Spanish inspired shrimp dish. Infused with rich spices it's gluten free and good for weight watchers.

name: Creamy Mushroom Cavatelli
description: A decadent pasta dish full of umami flavor! Made with tender cavatelli tossed in a creamy white wine-mushroom sauce that's amped up by velvety mascarpone cheese. The dish is sprinkled with fresh chives and parmesan for the perfect finish.

name: Kreyol Braised Salmon
description: Savor salmon braised in a Haitian tomato-based sauce made with red and green bell peppers and adobo seasoning. The flavorful fish is complemented by a spinach-tomato polenta and garnished with fresh green onions.

name: Pineapple Fried Rice with Shrimp
description: Thai jasmine rice is spiced up with the beautiful golden yellow color and flavor of aromatic curry powder. It's then stir-fried with shrimp, crunchy cashews and crispy bacon, with pops of sweetness from pineapple and raisins. This fried rice will be your new favorite go-to dish, any night of the week. Don‚Äôt forget to add a squeeze of lime for an extra tang!

name: Parmesan Crusted Roasted Salmon
description: If you‚Äôre looking for a meal that balances flavor and nutrition beautifully, here it is! Chef Andres coats each buttery salmon fillet with umami-rich Parmesan cheese and crisp Panko breadcrumbs, then roasts to golden perfection. He serves it with garlicky roasted broccoli and fluffy tricolor quinoa, chickpeas, and juicy cherry tomatoes tossed with a lemon vinaigrette. Drizzle on the accompanying honey mustard for a deliciously tangy and sweet flavor contrast. Healthy and hearty, this is the kind of meal you‚Äôll put on repeat.

name: Cornbread with Whipped Hot Honey Butter
description: This cornbread is extra moist thanks to the addition of buttermilk, and a drizzle of Chef's signature hot honey & honey-whipped butter (with a touch of truffle salt that will leave you craving for more!) on the top takes it from average to amazing. You'll savor every last crumb of this thick slice of cornbread!

name: Soy Ginger Roasted Chicken
description: This dish was inspired by a noodle cart at the Yaowarat night market in Bangkok's Chinatown. Tender chicken thigh is braised to perfection in a sweet and savory ginger-soy sauce and served with noodles and baby bok choy. A Thai chili vinaigrette with more ginger and scallions pack the dish with even more bold, balanced, irresistible flavor.

name: Pan Seared Chicken Breast with Shallot Vinaigrette
Lemon Chicken Orzo Soup
description: Light and zesty yet deeply comforting, Chef Pat brings a taste of home cooking with his lemony chicken and orzo soup. Rich, homemade chicken soup, al dente orzo pasta, and a hint of lemon juice and zest make this perfect for warming the belly and pleasing the whole family.

name: Low Carb Teriyaki Salmon
description: You‚Äôll go nuts for this healthy creation from Chef Chase. He glazes succulent, omega-3-rich salmon fillets in an umami-rich teriyaki sauce, then grills them to a perfect medium-rare and garnishes with sesame seeds. But the refreshingly crisp slaw might just be the star of the show‚Äîshredded green and Nappa cabbage, carrots, celery, and fresh cilantro leaves are tossed with crunchy toasted cashews and sliced almonds, then tossed in a sesame vinaigrette lightly sweetened with all-natural monk fruit. With its balance of protein, fiber, and good-for-you fats, this is an ideal post-workout meal.

name: Chicken Breast In Mole Sauce
description: Chef Maribel's most memorable Sunday dinners always began with chicken simmering in this rich mole sauce. It hails from Puebla, Mexico and includes over 20 ingredients ‚Äî like chiles, spices, nuts, plantains, apples, and dark chocolate. Fluffy red rice mixed with carrots and fresh corn complete the meal.

name: Spicy Jerk Grilled Chicken Callaloo
description: This mouthwatering Caribbean-inspired dish features juicy chicken coated in Chef Chris' flavorful jerk seasoning and grilled to perfection. It's served with creamy mashed sweet potatoes and callaloo, a traditional Caribbean side of leafy greens saut√©ed with garlic and onion. Bursting with flavor and heat, this meal will satisfy any cravings for bold and spicy cuisine.

name: Creamy Fettucine Alfredo
description: Enjoy a luxurious journey into the heart of Italian culinary tradition with Chef Silvia Arevalo‚Äôs Creamy Fettuccine Alfredo, a timeless classic that embodies the art of simplicity and flavor. Ribbons of fettuccine are perfectly coated in a velvet-smooth Alfredo sauce, a decadent blend of cream, butter, and Parmesan cheese. Balance all that richness with a fresh, crisp green salad. Or just go ahead and keep on indulging with an extra carb‚Äîthe crunch of toasted baguette is a perfect counterpoint to this silky pasta dish. Or do both!

name: Japanese Beef Bowl
description: Chef Brandon's Japanese-inspired beef bowl has everything you could want and more. The star of the dish is tender flank steak, marinated then grilled to perfection. Paired with garlicky baby bok choy, Japanese eggplant, and topped with a zesty chimichurri sauce, this vibrant bowl delivers bold flavors and a satisfying kick that will keep you coming back for more.

name: Southern Style Pork Adobo
description: Enjoy a heavenly taste of Filipino comfort cooking with this braised pork dish. Pork shoulder is braised low and slow in a spicy, sweet, and tangy coconut adobo sauce until super tender, then served alongside rice adorned with crispy fried garlic and a drizzle of soy sauce. A side of saut√©ed green beans completes the dish.

name: Grilled Anticuchado Chicken
description: For this classic Peruvian dish, Chef Walther marinates boneless skinless chicken breasts in herbal chimichurri, then ups the flavor ante with spicy, flavor-packed Aji Panca chile sauce, blended with umami-rich soy sauce, earthy cumin and oregano, and sweet orange juice, and grills them until perfectly tender and juicy. He serves a hearty portion of sliced chicken atop a bed of creamy, buttery spinach mashed potatoes with a side of garlicky saut√©ed green beans.

name: Tofu Milanese
description: Chef Adrianna taps influences from all over the world to create this flavor-packed vegetarian dish. Crispy breaded tofu 'Milanese' pairs perfectly with a vibrant, crunchy jicama-radish slaw which brings a fresh pop of flavor and texture. To round out the dish, Chef adds in a crispy, savory empanada-inspired pastry filled with sweet potato, leeks, and feta.

name: Seared Steak with Brussels Sprouts
description: Seared steak cooked to perfection and topped with flavorful horseradish cream sauce. We've added savory shallots and crisped Brussels sprouts, sprinkled with toasted buttery walnuts.

name: Loaded Brisket Redskin Potato Hash
description: Get ready for a hearty and flavorful dish, absolutely loaded with Bubb's famous smoked beef brisket. The juicy, tender brisket is smoked to perfection, then chopped up and mixed with a delicious blend of saut√©ed redskin potatoes, tomato, onions, and spices. To top it off, Chef Dustin's team adds a generous helping of homemade cheese sauce, fresh pico de gallo, and a dollop of sour cream. The result is a mouthwatering and satisfying meal that will warm your soul and satisfy your cravings, whether it's for breakfast, lunch, or dinner.

name: Japanese Style Ribeye Curry
description: This Japanese-style rib eye curry is as hearty and satisfying as dishes come. Tender ribeye, chickpeas, and Brussels sprouts are bathed in a thick, mild curry, all served over a bed of rice to soak up all that delicious sauce. This flavorful fusion meal is elevated comfort food at its best.

name: Porcetta Spiced Chicken
description: Oven roasted chicken thigh marinated with the flavors of classic Italian Porcetta, grilled Romano beans bathed in lemon zest and extra virgin olive oil, roasted potatoes and fresh radish.

name: Herbed Ny Strip Steak
description: Indulge in a culinary masterpiece thoughtfully crafted by Chef Santiago. A succulent, perfectly cooked New York strip steak takes center stage, accompanied by a decadent side of luscious potato souffl√© studded with crispy bacon. The dish is made complete with some tender grilled asparagus, creating a well-rounded plate of elevated comfort food that will leave you craving more.

name: Jerk Braised Short Ribs
description: This new take on a classic comfort pairing turns the flavor turned up to an eleven. Rich beef short rib are slowly roasted in jerk spices until practically calling off the bone, then the melt-in-your-mouth meat and savory gravy are served up on a bed of creamy polenta to seal the deal. One bite and you'll be hooked.

name: Adobo Short Ribs
description: Savor one of Chef Andres' signature dishes! Succulent short ribs are meticulously marinated with stout beer and slow-cooked in a medley of garlic, vinegar, and spices until they achieve melt-in-your-mouth perfection. Accompanied by Mexican rice, velvety black bean pur√©e, and a luscious avocado-tomatillo salsa, this dish represents a sophisticated twist on the classic Adobo.

name: Chinese Style Drunken Chicken
description: Originating in Eastern China, this dish involves marinating chicken in Shaoxing wine, high-proof Chinese rice wine, until super tender. Usually served chilled, Chef James' version is served hot with a side of wok-charred string beans and blistered cherry tomatoes to add crunch and a touch of sweetness to this low-carb dish. A flavor explosion awaits!

name: Bulgogi Bibimbap
description: A nutrient-rich combination of rice, veggies, and Korean BBQ beef that come together for a savory, earthy and toasty experience with hints of spice and tang. Great texture and even better flavors in a convenient and healthy one-bowl meal.

name: Greek Chicken Meatballs
description: Chef Miguel's delicious, Greek-inspired chicken meatballs are packed with bold ingredients like feta, caramelized onion, and fresh herbs. The meatballs are served atop a bed of nutty farro with apricots, dates, and almonds, as well as tender grilled asparagus. A mint and lemon yogurt sauce adds creamy richness to tie all the elements together. This dish proves eating healthy doesn't have to mean sacrificing on flavor.

name: Classic Spaghetti Napoli
description: Chef Sylvia Arevalo‚Äôs Spaghetti Napoli captures the essence of Southern Italian cuisine‚Äôs sun-soaked flavor. Strands of spaghetti, cooked to al dente perfection, are generously coated in her authentic Napoli sauce, a robust, slow-simmered blend of vine-ripened tomatoes, garlic, and aromatic herbs, including basil, oregano, and thyme. The Parmesan garnish adds a pop of salty, umami richness. Enjoy this dish with a fresh green salad for a calorie-conscious anytime meal that celebrates culinary craftsmanship without any flavor compromises.

name: Pulpo A La Gallega
description: This classic Spanish octopus dish gets the Chef Cedric culinary treatment. He whips up a vibrant chimichurri sauce and earthy fingerling potatoes to balance the fresh-from-the-sea flavors. With every bite of this tender octopus, you'll get transported to the coasts of Galicia, Spain.

name: Truffle Jus Glazed Meatloaf
description: This ain't your mother's meatloaf! Rich and hearty Angus beef meets its meaty match in porcini mushrooms and truffles. This meatloaf is tender, juicy, and comforting, yet tastes sophisticated and refined thanks to the truffle-infused glaze. The dish comes to life with the balance of sweet potatoes and the earthiness of the Brussels sprouts; it's truly a match made in heaven.

name: Buffalo Chicken Rigatoni
description: A fusion of comforting flavors and textures, featuring elegant tubes of rigatoni swirled in a rich, spicy garlic tabasco sauce. Both cheesy and creamy, this hearty dish is topped with a golden-crumbed chicken cutlet, and sprinkled with parmesan and scallions, creating a bold flavor-packed bite.

name: Mediterranean Falafel Crusted Artichokes
description: An Italian classic gets a Middle Eastern twist: tender artichoke hearts are coated in a crispy spiced falafel crust. Dipped in a creamy tahini-marinara sauce and paired with tangy Italian-style three bean salad, they make a great balanced meal or afternoon (or a late night, no judging!) snack.

name: Korean Spiced Chicken Sandwich
description: Chef Paul‚Äôs Korean-Spiced Chicken Sandwich rules the roost. Chicken thighs are given the spicy-sweet treatment, coated and fried in a gochujang-infused marinade. Served on a pillow-soft bun, they‚Äôre topped with tangy kimchi jam, crunchy cabbage slaw, and mozzarella cheese. A side of sweet potato fries rounds out this playful dish.

name: Chicken Tikka Pizza
description: It‚Äôs pizza! It‚Äôs naan! It‚Äôs Chef Aarthi‚Äôs naanza, featuring a naan bread base topped with a blend of mozzarella and white cheddar. Diced boneless chicken thighs marinated in tikka masala are scattered over the cheesy goodness, complemented by red onions, pickled jalape√±o peppers, and black olives. Chef highly recommends heating this one in the oven.

name: Buttery Banana Bread
description: Ripe bananas lend natural sweetness and a dense, tender crumb to these loaves, while butter and toasted walnuts add richness and a subtle crunch. The real showstopper is a crisp topping of maple-candied bacon, bringing a smoky-sweet contrast. Pair with a hot coffee, a pat of butter, or simply on their own.

name: Thai Shrimp Green Curry
description: A flavorful and mild spicy shrimp and vegetable Thai curry recipe. Ready in under 30 minutes, and healthy too! Paleo, Whole30, gluten free and low carb (when eaten without rice). Made with baby eggplants and red peppers for a healthy crunch. Coconut milk brings a good amount of sweetness to mellow down the heat from the green curry paste.

name: Spicy Jerk Pork
description: A playful mix of Caribbean spices and techniques will bring this dish to life.

name: Balsamic Chicken
description: Seasoned chicken with salt and pepper then marinated in balsamic vinegar. This is served with cauliflower as rice with carrots.

name: Ricotta Cavatelli with Basil Pesto
description: A perfect Italian dish for spring and summer! Pillowy ricotta-based cavatelli pasta is tossed with fresh basil pesto and plated on a bed of whipped ricotta impastata. Vegetarian, yet rich and satisfying, this dish is Italian food at its best; simple cooking that allows the ingredients to shine!

name: Vegan al Pastor Tacos with Beyond Meat
description: Chef Mendez puts a plant-based twist on the beloved Al Pastor, a popular taco style in Mexico. Savory Beyond Meat is cooked with smoky ancho and guajillo peppers, orange juice, and spices, then stuffed into fresh corn tortillas. Top your tacos with sweet pineapple, a spicy, tangy salsa, and creamy avocado sauce for the perfect finish!

name: Banana Cardamon Oatmeal
description: This banana, walnut, and cardamom-infused oatmeal is a comforting and flavorful breakfast option that will warm your soul. Rolled oats are cooked to perfection with blended bananas, coconut milk and infused with aromatic cardamom, creating a fragrant and delightful base. The creamy texture of the oatmeal pairs perfectly with crunchy cardamom-candied walnuts, offering a delightful contrast. Each spoonful of this hearty vegan oatmeal will ensure you start your day off on the right foot.

name: Spicy Firecracker Chicken
description: Chef Wanting & Yong's Firecracker Chicken was a hit from the first day they started serving it in their restaurants. The firecracker sauce they developed combines garlicky spice with a touch of sweetness and acidity that excites with every bite. A side of fluffy Kokuho rice is there to soothe the palate alongside some fresh broccoli. This dish brings the heat!

name: Slow Cooked Chicken Thighs
description: One of the best ways to prepare your chicken is through slow cooking to get the tenderness, palatability, and juiciest of a chicken thigh. With minimal work and nothing but the juiciest chicken, herbs, and spices you will taste, with meat that practically falls off the bone.

name: Pan Fried Chicken Patty
description: Craving a meal that provides comfort and freshness in every bite? Succulent, savory pan-fried patty of all-white-meat chicken, Parmesan cheese, fresh herbs, and crisp Panko breadcrumbs are the perfect canvas for Chef Esther‚Äôs tangy, lightly sweet, umami-rich oyster sauce (enhanced with a few secret ingredients). She pairs them with fluffy steamed rice and refreshing coleslaw that combines crunchy green cabbage, carrot, celery, and sweet dried cranberries with a tangy Dijon mustard vinaigrette. This is the kind of simple but flavorful meal you‚Äôll want to add to every week‚Äôs order.

name: Beyond Meat Burrito Bowl
description: Packed with all the flavor of the fast-casual burrito bowls you know and love, minus the (real) meat. The star of the bowl is Beyond Meat, that cooks and satisfies just like ground beef, especially when saut√©ed with all the signature spices you'd expect in a taco. The flavorful Beyond Meat is served up on a bed of fluffy basmati rice with a corn-and-bean pico de gallo for acidity and zesty lime crema for richness. The perfectly balanced bowl is sure to become an instant favorite for vegetarians and meat-eaters alike.

name: Prosciutto Wrapped Cod In Brown Butter Tomato Sauce
description: This is a dish that chef Anthony used to cook in his New York City restaurant days, now brought to your very own kitchen. Originally inspired by the Italian dish saltimbocca, which is typically made with veal wrapped in prosciutto. The cod is flaky and tender on the inside with crispy, salty prosciutto on the outside, and paired with a nutty brown butter-laced tomato-basil sauce to provide richness. With sides of roasted parmesan zucchini and buttery orzo, each bite promises a beautiful balance of flavor and texture.

name: Lemon Baked Tilapia with Cajun Cream Sauce
description: Inspired by Cajun coastal cooking, enjoy a gorgeous filet of tilapia, baked with fresh lemon, garlic, and dill and paired with a rich, Cajun-seasoned cream sauce. This uniquely delicious fish is accompanied by fresh baby arugula and a delicate grain salad of nutty farro and saut√©ed vegetables. This is yet another wholesome, well-rounded meal from Chef Ruben that packs a ton of unique, crave-worthy flavor while still being nutritious.

name: Jgs Short Rib Mac N Cheese
description: Enjoy your childhood comfort food, but leveled up. Chef Jose's signature macaroni and cheese is totally irresistible on its own, with al dente cavatappi pasta and a decadent four-cheese sauce. But, to take it over the top and make it even heartier, Chef adds in tender pieces of braised short rib. And, for even more deliciousness, he adds a buttery Panko breadcrumb topping infused with fresh herbs, Gruyere, and Parmesan, then bakes the entire dish. This is a guaranteed crowd-pleaser that will have everyone fighting over the last bite!

name: Maine Style Lobster Roll
description: This chilled lobster roll makes the ideal summertime meal, and will instantly transport you to the coast of Maine. Luscious, succulent chunks of perfectly cooked lobster meat are tossed in a creamy, zesty dressing and piled high on a buttered and grilled Hawaiian roll. Paired with creamy tricolor coleslaw, this is a seasonal meal you don't want to miss!

name: Curry Roasted Salmon
description: Tender salmon rubbed with sweet and savory spices, paired with a curried sweet potato mash, all brought together with a creamy coconut sauce. A delightful autumn meal that's sure to please on a cool evening.

name: Hoisin Glazed Hanger Steak
description: Chef Phet serves up juicy slices of grilled hanger steak glazed with a sweet and tangy hoisin sauce, accompanied by crispy roasted Brussels sprouts drizzled in caramel fish sauce, all over a bed of ginger-scallion jasmine rice. Mix in the Lao-style chili sauce on the side for some extra heat!

name: Wild Mushroom and Corn Tacos
description: It's vegan, but made creamy by blending cashews with lime juice! A combination of wild mushroom with herbs and wild rice in this creamy taco version. It's healthy, satisfying, and oh so comforting!

name: Slow Soy Braised Pork Shoulder with Rice
description: Juicy pork shoulder is braised in a savory blend of Chinese spices and two varieties of soy sauce until falling apart levels of tenderness. The pork is served over fluffy white rice with fresh yu choy (a variety of Chinese broccoli), and a soy-marinated boiled egg.

name: Harissa Chicken Barley Bowl
description: This is a bowl full of flavorful components that, while delicious on their own, come together to create something extraordinary. Smoky and spicy harissa-rubbed chicken breast is served on a bed of barley and baby kale, paired with green apples for sweetness, pickled onions for acidity, and a nutty roasted cashew dressing to round out this hearty and healthy dish.

name: Chinese Chicken Dumplings
description: Who doesn't love traditional, Chinese-style dumplings, packed full of juicy chicken and flavored with lemongrass, all wrapped up in thin, chewy dough? Chefs Wanting Zhang and Yong Zhao serve their dumplings with Junzi Kitchen's homemade dumpling sauce for dipping and scallions for garnish and plus a side of Chinese broccoli. These delectable dumplings will have you ditching takeout for good.

name: Pan Fried Gochujang Tofu
description: Gochujang is a sweet, spicy, salty sauce, and a Korean cooking essential. Here, it‚Äôs used as the marinade for slices of extra-firm tofu, which are pan-fried until golden. Paired with a tender broccoli salad, fluffy white rice, and fresh scallions, this dish perfectly balances heat and freshness.

name: Turkish Beef Kofta
description: Enjoy one of Chef Ahmet's signature dishes, tantalizing baked kefta, or Turkish meatballs, generously smothered in a rich tomato sauce and accompanied by creamy cacik, a dill yogurt sauce. The dish is elegantly served alongside Turkish rice infused with the delightful sweetness of preserved cherries, as well as a side of saut√©ed green beans.

name: Braised Korean Galbi Jjim Short Ribs
description: Galbi-jjim (braised beef short ribs) is one of the most popular Korean dishes. It‚Äôs made with beef short ribs and is often prepared for special occasions. Served with roasted brussel sprouts & sweet potatoes.

name: Spicy Kimchi Ramen
description: Chef Esther mashes up Korean and Japanese staples in this spicy, savory noodle dish. The soup still features a classic long-simmered, rich and creamy pork broth and fresh ramen noodles, but, instead of topping with the traditional Japanese chashu pork belly, she puts her spin on it. Ground pork and smoky bacon are stir-fried with Korean kimchi and green onions for a funky, meaty twist. When mixed all together, you get rich broth, bouncy noodles, and crispy pork stir-fry in every perfect bite.

name: Spaghetti Carbonara Pancetta
description: This beloved Italian classic features al dente pasta tossed in a rich, creamy sauce made from eggs, savory Grana Padano cheese (there‚Äôs extra for garnishing, too), and freshly cracked black pepper‚Äîall elevated with the salty crunch of pancetta, which adds texture and savory depth to every bite. Simple yet indulgent, it‚Äôs comfort food at its finest.

name: Roasted Anticucho Style Salmon
description: Luscious, buttery salmon gets the fusion treatment in Chef Walther‚Äôs tantalizing blend of Peruvian and Japanese cuisines. Traditionally, anticuchos are marinated, skewered, and grilled meats, with roots dating back to ancient Andean cultures. Here, Chef Walther starts with salmon, and bathes each fillet in a marinade of spicy/smoky aji panca chiles and red miso paste for extra depth of savory flavor, then roasts to perfection and tops with a spoonful of bright, acidic chimichurri sauce. He plates it with nutty, protein-packed quinoa tossed in a tangy red-wine vinaigrette, along with diced red onion, sweet roasted red bell pepper and corn, fresh herbs, and toasted walnuts. On the side: tender-crisp roasted Brussels sprouts. Pour the citrusy/salty ponzu sauce over everything, and dig in to a meal that‚Äôs as healthy as it is hearty.

name: Junzi Kitchen Chili Oil
description: Crunchy, spicy, and a little sweet, you‚Äôll be hard pressed to find a condiment more versatile than chili oil, and this one from Chef Yong & Wanting is a staple at their restaurant, Junzi Kitchen. Perfect for drizzling over anything from fried rice to avocado toast, frying your eggs in, and adding to soups for added heat, this chili oil goes with everything! Chef Wanting & Yong love to amp up delivery meals like fried chicken, pizza, and even cheeseburgers with a drizzle for some spice and smokiness. Or, for the easiest, tastiest dinner ever, add a drizzle of chili oil to a sheet pan roast of mushrooms, sweet potato, and kale right when it comes out of the oven.

name: Seared Chicken with Thai Basil Coconut Sauce
description: Tender chicken breast, mushrooms, spinach and green beans come together with fresh Thai basil, ginger, and coconut in this dish full of classic, tangy Thai flavor.

name: Orange Balsamic Glazed Salmon
description: This salmon dish is both bright and creamy! Chef Isaac paired a lemony salmon with a risotto of mint, peas and creme fraiche. You‚Äôll be satisfied without being weighed down, and we‚Äôre sure you‚Äôll be a fan of this dish.

name: Peruvian Surf Turf
description: Get set to savor surf and turf, Peruvian style. Let‚Äôs start with the flat-iron steak‚ÄîChef Walther marinates it in a zesty blend of aji panca chile, garlic, citrus, and spices, then grills to a perfect medium rare. Next, the succulent shrimp‚Äîthey‚Äôre tossed with zesty chimichurri sauce. On the side, you‚Äôve got creamy, buttery spinach mashed potatoes and garlicky saut√©ed green beans. Drizzle on the green sauce‚Äîa vibrant blend of fresh herbs, garlic, jalape√±o, and a touch of mayo for creaminess‚Äîand dig into a super-satisfying meal that‚Äôll satisfy your every flavor craving.

name: Grilled Mahi Mahi
description: Grilled Mahi mahi on top of your winter green salad compose of Kale, dates, and red wine vinegar dressing. Did you know that Mahi-mahi is a source of complete protein, which means it contains all the essential amino acids you need to survive. Enjoy it this season.

name: Hawaiian Style Shrimp Fried Rice
description: Get your favorite Hawaiian inspired fried rice with tender seared shrimp, crispy spam, peas, carrots, scrambled eggs, and sweet pineapple chunks. Garnish it with a zesty lime wedge to add a refreshing kick to each bite.

name: Moroccan Spiced Impossible Meat Kefta
description: Warm up with this richly spiced, Moroccan-inspired dish! Plant-based kefta, a.k.a. Middle Eastern meatballs are made with Impossible Meat and lots of herbs and Moroccan spices. They pair perfectly with hearty couscous and harissa-seasoned stewed vegetables. Eating vegan never tasted so good!

name: Spiced Chicken with Pork Chorizo
description: Piri-piri Spiced chicken quarter with chorizo pan seared bell peppers.

name: Japanese Shrimp Tempura Bowl
description: If you're craving Japanese, this restaurant-inspired bowl will certainly hit the spot. The star of the dish is Chef Santiago's light and crispy shrimp tempura, which sit on a bed of sushi rice accompanied by carrots, cabbage, edamame, pickled ginger, and seaweed salad. A drizzle of avocado crema and tobiko aioli on top complete the dish, which makes for the ideal lunch or dinner any day of the week.

name: Roasted Salmon with Sauteed Kale
description: This is a healthy and filling salmon, the kale feels amazing on a sweet potato mash bed. The salmon is AMAZING!

name: Grilled Chicken Souvlaki
description: Souvlaki is a Greek term for meat grilled on a stick. In modern Greece, Souvlaki is usually made with pork. We've lightened this up by marinating pieces of Chicken Breast in a tangy mixture of olive oil, lemon juice, honey, garlic, and herbs before grilling to perfection. Served with tzatziki and flat bread, this is a perfect summertime treat.

name: Mexican Inspired Beef Chili
description: Enjoy Chef Chase's signature chili con carne recipe! This meaty chili is full of Tex-Mex and traditional Mexican flavors, packed with ground beef and smoky, aromatic spices. Garnished with cilantro, sour cream, and cheddar cheese, this is sure to become a weekly staple.

name: Herbed Tofu Chopped Salad
description: Introducing Chef Anne's special Herbed Tofu Chopped Salad‚Äîa vegan rendition of America's favorite chopped salad. Featuring Chef's signature marinated tofu, chickpeas and roasted red peppers on a bed of cabbage and arugula, the salad is topped with pickled shallots, vegan feta, and Marcona almonds. A tangy vegan ranch dressing is the perfect finishing touch. Bursting with flavor and wholesome nutrients, this salad is a plant-based feast for the senses.

name: Seared Salmon with Farro Salad
description: Chef Isaac marinates the salmon in Za'atar, an ancient Mediterranean spice mix. Then the salmon is roasted on a bed of olive oil and herbs to get infused with flavor. We also love the contrast of textures and temperatures between the warm vegetables and the farro (a chewy, nutty whole grain available in Italian markets).

name: Pescado A La Veracruzana
description: Chef Ivy's take on a classic Mexican dish features mild flaky cod, cooked in a zesty tomato sauce with onions, peppers, olives, and capers. The flavorful fish is served alongside steamed green beans and yellow rice for a well-rounded meal with coastal Mexican roots.

name: Grilled Skirt Steak Grain Bowl
description: Chef Chris goes big and bold with fresh flavors in this hearty Mediterranean grain bowl. Skirt steak that's been marinated in garlic and fresh herbs is grilled to perfection then sliced and served atop a zesty Greek salad with feta, kalamata olives, and baby spinach, as well as farro and tricolor quinoa. A fresh and creamy avocado herb green goddess dressing brings it all together.

name: Mission Style Pernil Burrito
description: Ditch the fast-casual chain in favor of this absolutely flavor-packed burrito from Chef Akhtar. This Mission-style burrito is chock full of tender Cuban pork pernil, black beans, red rice, queso fresco cheese, and pico de gallo. All of this goodness is piled into a soft flour tortilla, griddled to golden brown perfection, and served up with a side of guacamole. What more could you want?

name: Vegetarian Kofta Korma
description: Kofta Korma, a traditional Mughlai dish, gets a vegetarian-friendly spin thanks to Chef's tender plant-based kofta made with soya "meat" and mashed potatoes. The savory koftas are simmered in a luxuriously creamy gravy made with saut√©ed onions, warm aromatics and spices, and cashews for nutty undertones. The rich entr√©e is paired with buttery naan bread to savor every last bit of the irresistible korma sauce.

name: Moms Meatballs In Marinara with Italian Sausage
description: You can practically taste the love and generations of tradition in this dish from Chef John. An authentic taste of Italian home cooking, this dish pairs incredibly tender, juicy meatballs with a handmade marinara sauce dotted with spicy Italian sausage. The secret of this dish is to let simmer everything together, so the flavors mingle and the meatballs get infused with rich tomato sauce. Whether you call it Sunday Sauce, Sunday Gravy, or something else, this is classic Italian comfort food, just like grandma used to make.

name: Coconut Sweet Potato Stew
description: Leave it to Chef Armando to put together a dish with none of the meat but all of the satisfaction. His vegan stew features sweet potatoes simmered in a fragrant, slightly spicy coconut broth until tender and rich. Served alongside fragrant garlic rice and a side of roasted okra and green beans, this dish is a feast for the senses.

name: Creamy Butternut Squash Lentil Soup
description: Delicious and comforting, this soup starts with butternut squash, roasted with warm spices like cinnamon and ginger to bring out its natural sweetness. The roasted butternut squash is simmered with red lentils, sweet potatoes, and even more herbs, then pur√©ed with cashew cream until silky smooth. Decadent and filling, Chef Lena's vegan soup is perfect for lunch or a light dinner, or split between two people as a starter.

name: Classic Mongolian Beef
description: A classic Chinese dish, Chef Hesyan's Mongolian Beef features tender beef slices stir-fried to perfection in a rich, sweet soy glaze, paired with crisp broccoli florets and aromatic spring onions. Served over steamed rice, this dish balances savory, sweet, and umami flavors for a satisfying meal you'll be craving week after week.

name: Low Country Shrimp Boil
description: For Chef April, a low-country boil embodies the essence of Southern cooking. Plump shrimp, smoky sausages, corn on the cob, and boiled eggs simmer in a bold mix of spices, soaking up every savory note. It‚Äôs unfussy, flavorful, and delivers classic comfort in every bite.

name: Grass Fed Meatball Sliders
description: Delicious DYO sliders, we send the amazing brioche sliders and the meatballs, enjoy this American classic.

name: Chicken Dragon Bowl
description: If Chef Chris was forced to choose a favorite meal, he says this one might just be it. He just loves good, hearty simple meals and it don‚Äôt get much simpler than the combination of hand-diced grilled fresh chicken, roasted fresh vegetables, and fresh brown rice. What separates this bowl from the rest is Chef‚Äôs secret spicy tahini sauce that you‚Äôll want to drizzle on everything. Topped with nutty sesame seeds, there‚Äôs nothing not to like about this bowl‚Äî we could eat this meal almost every day and not get tired of it. Chef highly recommends heating this meal in the microwave.

name: Citrus Roast Salmon with Caramelized Leek
description: The salmon is seared and served with the most addictive combination of braised leeks, caramelized fennel, and mashed Yukon Gold potatoes. The sauce is bright and fresh lemon emulsified with extra virgin olive oil. The dish is served with Swiss chard which we saut√© in olive oil and add a little white wine.

name: Crab Shrimp Mac and Cheese
description: This dish is the definition of elevated comfort food. An elegant seafood-centric dish that is buttery, rich, and endlessly craveable. Cheesy mouthwatering macaroni is paired with not one but four cheeses: American, pepper jack, Swiss, and white cheddar. To take it from good to great, Chef Chris adds lump crabmeat, shrimp, and scallops into the decadent dish.

name: Beef and Veggie Stir Fry
description: A guilty pleasure you cannot resist. Made so tasty in every bite using coconut aminos and avocado oil. Served with carrots, corns, green cabbage and Snap peas for perfect combo.

name: Pollo Guisado
description: Caribbean stewed chicken, perfect comfort food with rice, black beans, and plantains.

name: Peanut Butter Breakfast Bars
description: These breakfast bars are a balanced blend of gluten-free rolled oats, raw sliced almonds, unsalted pumpkin seeds, and unsweetened coconut flakes. They're held together by smooth peanut butter and pure maple syrup, sweetened with dried Medjool dates, and drizzled with rich chocolate. Perfect for a quick and satisfying breakfast or an energizing snack.

name: Thai Bbq Chicken with Pickled Cucumbers
description: Chicken is marinated in a fragrant mix of coriander, lemongrass, garlic, and soy, then grilled until smoky and caramelized. Served with fluffy jasmine rice and tangy pickled cucumbers, it‚Äôs paired with a bold Jaew dipping sauce‚Äîlayered with toasted rice, tamarind, and chili flakes for a punch of heat and zest.

name: Mustard Crab Cake Sandwich
description: Chef John plates a perfectly cooked crab patty flavored with Dijon mustard, Worcestershire sauce, lemon, parsley leaves, and Tabasco, on a plush potato bun with gem lettuce, plum tomato, and red onion. Drizzle the Sriracha aioli for an extra kick. And of course, treat yourself to crispy tater tots!

name: Dill Marinated Steelhead Trout
description: Inspired by the Patagonian trouts that swim the waters between the great mountains of Southern Argentina, Chef Maia imbues that same special energy in this dish. Fresh steelhead trout is marinated in vodka, fresh dill, sea salt and ground pepper then roasted to perfection. On the side, you get a bright array of colorful veggies like broccoli, asparagus, carrots, mushrooms, and red onions, all cooked in a tangy, creamy coconut-lemon sauce.

name: Spinach Feta Stuffed Chicken Breast
description: A fresh new take on a weeknight staple, Chef Nahika spices up the same old chicken dinner by stuffing it with a creamy spinach and feta filling. The stuffed chicken breast is then seasoned with a spice rub of Cajun blackening seasonings and seared to perfection. Served with a side of roasted red potatoes and onions, this is an easy, approachable way to mix up your routine.

name: Chicken Gyro Quinoa Bowl
description: This delicious and perfectly portable Greek-inspired bowl is loaded with juicy, marinated-then-grilled chicken thighs piled high on a bed of fiber- and protein-rich quinoa with handmade herby tzatziki, plus fresh cherry tomatoes, Persian cucumbers, shredded cabbage, red onions, and a refreshing lemon vinaigrette. It‚Äôs guaranteed to satisfy your gyro cravings any day or night of the week.

name: Bbq Shrimp Boil
description: Indulge in a taste of Southern summers with this classic shrimp boil, featuring succulent shrimp, smoky Andouille sausage, tender red potatoes, and sweet corn, all seasoned to perfection with our signature blend of spices. Each element is cooked to perfection, infused with the rich and savory flavors of our special seasoning blend, which includes Old Bay, cayenne pepper, garlic, and lemon. Bubb's shrimp boil is a true crowd-pleaser, with a perfect blend of flavors and textures that will transport you straight to the heart of the South.

name: Teriyaki Chicken with Fried Rice
description: Chef Tracey is serving up two of her favorite takeout classics on one plate. Chef's fried rice is always a hit in her house, and adding tender, glazed chicken breasts in a sweet and savory teriyaki sauce just takes it up another notch. But it's the fluffy, golden, veggie-filled fried rice that will make this an instant favorite in your home, too.

name: Spicy Beef Birria Tacos
description: Texas meets Mexico in this unbelievably delicious dish! Beef brisket is seared off then braised low and slow with Mexican chiles and spices until absolutely melt-in-your-mouth-tender. Chef Akhtar's authentic Mexican barbacoa is served up with corn tortillas, fresh guacamole, rice and pickled red onions that are tinged a beautiful shade of pink with hibiscus flowers. Consider yourself warned: you might find yourself craving these tacos week after week!

name: Coconut Wasabi Cod
description: A light and flaky roasted cod fillet served with cabbage, bok choy, edamame and quinoa. And you've never had quinoa like this; it's stir fried until crispy for a fun pop of textural contrast. The delectable sauce is made by adding peanut butter to coconut milk and wasabi for a spicy, nutty, and slightly sweet sauce you've want to drizzle on everything.

name: Salmon Taco Bowl
description: One of my favorite way to eat fish is this Fish taco bowl. It's what my Mexican food dreams are made of; avocado, jalapeno, cashew and greens.

name: Lomo Saltado Burrito
description: Fusion has never tasted so good. Lomo Saltado-style steak is stir-fried in a soy-based sauce with onion and tomatoes, then wrapped up in a large flour tortilla alongside cilantro rice and French fries, a nod to the Peruvian dish. Paired with one of Chef Walther's most popular sauces, a green sauce made with jalape√±o peppers and cilantro, this burrito will have you ditching the fast casual chains for good.

name: Classic Chicken Marsala with Roasted Mushrooms
description: Marsala wine, a Sicilian fortified variety, forms the base of this sweet and savory, creamy pan sauce. The rich sauce marries perfectly with roasted oyster mushrooms and juicy chicken breast. Garlicky saut√©ed green beans and herb-roasted fingerling potatoes complete the comforting dish.

name: Spiced Sweet Potato Grain Salad
description: Combining Asian and Mediterranean influences and accentuating rich ancient grains, this dish offers an inviting fusion of tastes and textures. Roasted sweet potatoes and Brussels sprouts provide a hearty base for this salad, while tri-color quinoa and barley add a nutritious punch. Topped with crunchy almonds and drizzled with a tangy romesco sauce, this salad is a wholesome and satisfying meal that will leave your taste buds craving for more.

name: Chicken and Rainbow Quinoa Salad
description: This healthy chicken salad comes piled high with roasted butternut squash (baked with garam masala), dried cranberries, sliced toasted almonds, and fresh, peppery radishes, all on a bed of crunchy kale and nutty quinoa. A creamy honey-balsamic dressing ties the whole bowl together. It‚Äôs a super power salad that will boost your energy with every bite!

name: Herbed Lentil Stew
description: This immune-boosting bowl of soup is a go-to to make for my myself and my loved ones in the colder months at home. It is as hearty and cozy as it is nourishing and satiating, and is fiber-packed and high in plant protein. Made with fresh herbs, organic seasonal vegetables, and a clean homemade broth, it feels good to eat, and is a good choice for people with sensitivities. Serve it alone or with a piece of crusty baguette and a dash of olive oil.

name: Roasted Vegetable Cheese Tart
description: Chef Vincent‚Äôs savory vegetable tart is almost too pretty to eat! He fills the buttery pastry shell with a creamy base of Ricotta and Feta cheeses, then artistically arranges roasted sweet potato, butternut squash, beets, and carrots on top. This vibrant array is baked until golden brown, then finished with a luscious honey-balsamic glaze that adds a sweet and tangy contrast. Set it out as a party centerpiece or pair it with a fresh green salad for brunch or dinner. Any way you enjoy it, this stunning tart combines freshness and indulgence in every bite.

name: Low Carb Beef Stew
description: This delicious dish is rich and filling, despite being low in carbs. It's packed with all the comforting flavors you think of when you talk about beef stew with unmatched, slow-cooked flavor. Accompanied by a hearty bulgur salad made with broccoli and cauliflower, a side of tzatziki provides the perfect balance of cooling creaminess to the dish.

name: Mediterranean Shrimp Romanesco Sauce
description: The succulent shrimp are bathed in a marinade of zesty lime juice, garlic, chili powder, cumin, and a pinch of salt before being cooked. Nestled atop a bed of tender beans and quinoa mixed with delicate baby kale and cherry tomatoes, the dish is completed with a perfectly boiled egg and a dollop of verdant green romanesco sauce. Each bite bursts with healthful goodness and delightful flavors, promising a truly satisfying culinary experience.

name: Ground Beef Tostadas La Neta Tostada
description: Looking for a fun way to switch up your normal Taco Tuesday menu? You're in luck because these crispy beef tostadas pack a serious punch of flavor and texture. They start with crispy corn tostada shells, which are layered up with refried beans and savory, spiced ground beef. Then load up your tostadas to your heart's delight with fresh shredded lettuce, tomatoes, queso fresco, and Chef Fabiola's delicious green tomatillo salsa.

name: Zucchini Eggplant Parmigiana
description: Some recipes stay in the family, and this is one of them. Chef Jonny‚Äôs take on the Southern Italian classic is a closely guarded favorite, though our sources tell us it has something to do with zucchini layered between silky eggplant and creamy mozzarella. You just didn't hear it from us.

name: Climate Friendly Chickpea Quinoa Bowl
description: Chef Nelson's brings you this option of a Climate Friendly meal that combines low carbon impact, whole foods and high sustainability ingredients. This plant-based salad is packed full of nutrient-dense, fresh ingredients like cucumbers, corn, spinach, beets, chickpeas, and tricolor quinoa. Dress and toss in Chef's delectable chili-lime vinaigrette ‚Äî it's tangy, zesty, and packs a punch!

name: Lemon Garlic Salmon
description: Fresh salmon is baked with lots of garlic and parsley until flaky and perfectly cooked, then paired with tender asparagus, fresh tomatoes, and a lemon-butter sauce in this flavorful, gluten-free dish.

name: Zaatar Salmon with Pearl Couscous
description: This heavenly spiced salmon goes perfectly with a light and fresh couscous side and creamy garlic dressing.

name: Surf and Turf Burrito
description: A delicious combination of steak, shrimp, and chorizo-studded rice, this surf and turf burrito is sure to be a crowd-pleaser. This loaded burrito is packed full of grilled skirt steak, spiced shrimp, and Chef Angelia's signature Mexican chorizo rice. Served with a side of spicy, garlicky sour cream, it‚Äôs perfect for a quick and easy lunch or dinner and will satisfy even the biggest appetites.

name: Creole Braised Vegetables Over Haitian Black Rice
description: Enjoy a bowl full of vegetarian-friendly Caribbean comfort cooking! A delectable mix of vegetables including squash, eggplant, cabbage, and peppers, all braised until tender in a flavorful broth with Haitian spices and seasoning. Served with a side of sweet plantains, saut√©ed bell peppers, and Haitian black rice, a uniquely savory rice made with umami-rich black mushrooms.

name: Meatballs with Spring Vegetable Stew
description: A Middle Eastern stew with fava beans, peas, swiss chard, potato and herbed meatballs, served with jasmine rice.

name: Cheesy Corn with Black Bean Chilli
description: A warm bowl of cheesy corn with black bean served with rice.

name: Mexican Paella with Shrimp Chorizo
description: Chef Santiago and Chef Ruben combine their culinary expertises to create this gorgeous Mexican take on a quintessential Spanish dish. Inspired by the coastal towns of Mexico, the boldly seasoned rice is packed with fresh and succulent shrimp, as well as spicy Mexican chorizo. Chefs Santiago and Ruben designed a special seasoning with dried chilies that differentiates it from Spanish paella, adding layers of smoky, unique flavor you won't be able to resist.

name: Teriyaki Roasted Salmon
description: This is a delicious and healthy option for lunch or dinner! Tender roasted salmon is served up alongside of steamed brown rice and simply roasted Brussels sprouts and carrots. On the side, you'll find Chef Esther's sweet-and-tangy teriyaki sauce to drizzle over the top.

name: Birria Enchiladas Divorciadas
description: Tender beef birria is tucked into soft corn tortillas and rolled into tasty enchiladas with melty mozzarella and Oaxacan cheeses. The enchiladas are then bathed in red and green salsa in the 'Divorciadas' style that's typical in Mexico. Accompanied by delicious Jalisco-style red rice with carrot and tomato sauce, refried beans, and tangy pickled onions, these enchiladas are sure to become your new weeknight go-to.

name: Marry Me Chicken
description: Marry Me Chicken is the dish so good, you'll want to put a ring on it. It features an oven-baked chicken breast in a creamy sauce made with sweet cherry tomatoes, garlic, and a dash of white wine. With aromatic fresh basil and a generous sprinkle grated parmesan cheese, this dish is a comforting and satisfying experience you won't soon forget.

name: Grilled Chicken with Mango Salsa
description: Grilled chicken is always a win, but when you add Chef John's tangy mango salsa into the mix, it becomes irresistible. It takes the flavor of the sambal-marinated grilled chicken to a whole new level of flavor. Served over brown rice and broccoli rabe, this is one of Chef's absolute favorite dishes for CookUnity!

name: Spicy Pulled Chicken Tacos
description: This vibrant dish is poised to spice up your weeknight! Tender chicken thighs are seasoned with a classic taco seasoning blend, shredded, then served up in fresh corn tortillas. On the side you'll find a spicy salsa verde and sweet mango pico de gallo so you can customize your tacos and make them as spicy or mild as you like. Any way you plate it, these tacos are guaranteed to make you feel like you're on vacation in Mexico!

name: Creamy New England Clam Chowder
description: This hearty classic soup features tender clams, perfectly cooked potatoes, and a medley of onions and celery saut√©ed with smoky bacon in a luscious, velvety broth made from rich cream and aromatic fresh herbs. Each spoonful offers a beautiful balance of flavors and textures, all gently simmered together and topped off with crisp bacon bits and green onions to garnish. Perfect for lunch or dinner, and deliciously soul-satisfying either way.

name: Mediterranean Chicken Breast Bowl
description: Chef Fabio tops a bed of nutritious black rice and mixed greens with grilled chicken and a colorful assortment of veggies including crisp cucumber, tangy roasted red peppers, and juicy cherry tomatoes. Castelvetrano olives are tossed into the mix for bursts of briny goodness, while dried shallots add a delightful crunch. Chef‚Äôs simple lemon vinaigrette ties the whole bowl together in zesty harmony.

name: Slow Braised Short Rib
description: The beef short ribs are cured to bring out the most flavor, then slowly braised with vegetables, red wine and beef broth. When they are fork tender, we serve them with their cooking liquid and a puree made from poached cauliflower and a little brown butter. We also marinate the mushrooms with Argentine chimichurri and slowly grill them until crisp. Top with the gremolata, a crunchy mix of breadcrumbs and herbs and spices.

name: Carrot Walnut Muffins
description: Chef Miriam's delicious carrot muffins are moist, fluffy, and packed with the natural sweetness (and nutritiousness) of freshly grated carrots. Enhanced with warm spices like cinnamon and nutmeg, they feature crunchy walnuts and tart currants for a pop of texture in each bite. Topped with a bright and tangy lemon glaze, these muffins are perfect for breakfast or an afternoon treat.

name: Breaded Chicken Cutlet
description: So simple, yet so satisfying! Chef Vanessa coats thinly sliced chicken breast cutlets in Parmesan- and herb-accented breadcrumbs, then fries them to a perfectly crisp golden brown. She serves a hearty portion atop a bed of al dente fettuccine tossed with a bright and creamy lemon sauce‚Äîall garnished with even more savory Parmesan and fresh herbs. It‚Äôs everything you want in a weeknight meal‚Äîflavorful, satisfying, and elegant (but not fussy).

name: Aji De Shrimp Lobster
description: Hungry for something luxurious but not too fussy? Chef Walther‚Äôs got the dish for you‚Äîsucculent poached lobster tail; plump, juicy shrimp; and fingerling potatoes swathed in a rich, velvety aji Amarillo chile and Parmesan sauce. With their fruity, spicy flavor, aji Amarillo chiles provide just the right amount of heat to perfectly complement the sweet shellfish and tender potatoes. And for soaking it up... a bed of fragrant Jasmine rice. Chef Walther tops this dish with his signature garnish of briny Kalamata olives, hard-cooked egg, and sweet red bell pepper. It‚Äôs a sumptuous introduction to Peruvian cuisine you can enjoy anytime you want.

name: Seared Hanger Steak with Potato Gratin
description: Great steak dish for the spring.

name: Belgian Chicken with Rice Pilaf
description: A classic French dish with a Belgian twist- Seared Chicken Thighs served with a delicious sauce made with white wine, onions, garlic, mushrooms, and a hint of cloves, made luxurious with butter and creme fraiche. Paired with creamed kale, the perfect combination.

name: Garlic Butter Sriracha Shrimp
description: This one‚Äôs for all you dip lovers. So let‚Äôs start with that rich, creamy, butter-based sauce: It‚Äôs bright with lemony zing and Italian spices, like oregano and basil. Oh, and plenty of aromatic garlic, too. Use it as a dip for Chef Tony‚Äôs succulent, spicy Sriracha sauteed shrimp, fresh blanched broccoli, and tangy cherry tomatoes. It‚Äôs like an entire finger-food party in one convenient dish‚Äîgreat as a movie-night dinner on its own or with a salad.

name: Pats Sweet Italian Sausage and Peppers
description: Our sausages have been a family recipe for over 100 years. We use the best quality ingredients and take pride into making our sweet and hot Italian sausages. We cook our sausages and toss them with orecchiete pasta and sweet peppers.

name: Mushroom Ravioli with Sauteed Mushrooms
description: This is simple yet elegant vegetarian food at its finest. Fresh pasta sheets are stuffed with mushrooms and pressed into ravioli, then smothered in a rich cream sauce with saut√©ed cremini and button mushrooms. To add even more luscious umami flavor, Chef Dustin adds white truffle oil and truffle shavings to the sauce to take this dish over the top.

name: Lemon Ginger Lentil Borscht
description: Chef Lena‚Äôs twist on classic Eastern-European borscht nourishes body and soul. She starts with beets, which give the soup its gorgeous jewel-toned color‚Äîplus a host of antioxidants. They‚Äôre gently simmered with potatoes, cabbage, and protein- and fiber-packed green lentils in flavorful ginger-infused broth for even more plant-powered nutrition. Swirl in the accompanying creamy lemon coconut yogurt then top off your bowl with crunchy garlic-toasted sunflower and pumpkin seeds for tasty textural contrast. This soup may be calorie-conscious, but there‚Äôs absolutely no compromise on flavor.

name: Basil Crusted Salmon
description: Enjoy sunshine on a plate with this roasted salmon infused with the summery flavor of fresh basil. The tender fish is served with a sweet and tangy eggplant caponata, spinach, and fregola, a couscous-like pasta from Sardinia.

name: Bbq Chicken Burrito Bowl
description: Simple and satisfying, this burrito bowl is an easy crowd-pleaser. Saucy, sweet and tangy sliced BBQ chicken sits on a bed of nutty brown rice alongside a flavorful black bean and corn salsa that packs a little punch thanks to pickled jalape√±os. Topped with fresh pico de gallo and pepper jack cheese, this bowl is just like your favorite fast casual chain, but way better-tasting and better for you!

name: Tuscan Style Porchetta Herbed Pork Roulade
description: Chef Dustin cooks his pork in the Tuscan Porchetta style, laced with herbs, braised, pressed into a roulade shape, then sliced. The pork is super juicy and tender, and pairs perfectly with Tuscan style chickpeas which are braised in a tomato-based sauce with spinach.

name: Grilled Chicken with Rainbow Salad
description: Fresh, delicious and colorful! The dressing is used with walnuts to create a creamy dressing on top of grilled chicken and layers of colorful veggies.

name: Greek Style Chicken Gyro Pita Wrap
description: Chef Cedric's version of a Greek street food staple. This absolutely loaded pita wrap is packed full of juicy, marinated and grilled chicken thighs, handmade herby tzatziki, fresh red onions, grape tomatoes, and shredded cabbage. Satisfy your Greek gyro cravings any day or night of the week with this delicious wrap.

name: Creamy Chicken Korma
description: This mouthwatering dish from Chef Ruben is his take on a classic Indian curry, Korma. Tender pieces of chicken simmer in a rich, creamy curry featuring an aromatic blend of spices, as well as nuts and yogurt. Together all of the elements create a unique symphony of flavors that's bold enough to entice your senses, yet mild enough in spice levels to appease any palate. Served alongside coconut-infused jasmine rice, this dish is more than just a meal‚Äîit's a culinary experience that promises to leave a lasting impression.

name: White Bean Korma Curry
description: Chef Emily's take on a vegetarian Indian curry is an instant weeknight winner. This Korma-inspired dish offers delicious warming spices and a coconut-based broth packed with carrots, sweet potato, and spinach. The addition of cannellini beans adds a complete protein to bulk up the nutrition. With a side of fluffy basmati rice, it's hearty and satisfying yet light enough to be well-suited year round.

name: Cheesy Meatballs In Marinara Sauce
description: Meatballs are the definition of comfort food. Here, they‚Äôre hand-rolled with beef, panko breadcrumbs, and the decadent addition of blue cheese, giving them a tangy, molten center. Simmered in a tomato-rich marinara sauce, these flavor bombs are finished with shaved parmesan and fresh parsley.

name: Spicy Chicken Tenders
description: This is a delicious meal you can enjoy. Spicy chicken tenders with roasted potato truffle and a side of Maple mustard. This is your new favorite meal that you will love.

name: Massaman Chicken Curry
description: Massaman curry is a mild, savory and slightly sweet Thai curry. The rich coconut-based curry is full of fragrant spice undertones of cumin, cardamom, cinnamon, and more. The curry is accompanied by the traditional potato, onion, and peanuts, as well as tender chicken thighs. Chef serves the curry alongside fluffy, aromatic jasmine rice, so that you can savor every last bit of the flavorful sauce.

name: Mushroom Chicken Curry
description: This Korean-style curry is a beautiful blend of fresh chicken thighs, Chef Esther's favorite curry powder, crimini mushrooms, potatoes, and corn. The result is a slightly spicy, savory, and earthy lunch or dinner ‚Äî made complete with a side of fluffy rice, kimchi, and a toasted sesame seed garnish.

name: Crispy Tofu In Black Bean Sauce
description: A tantalizingly tangy vegan option that captures all the sweet and salty flavors of your favorite Chinese takeout. Crispy tofu and tender broccoli are stir-fried in rich, savory black bean sauce and served with a side of fluffy white rice. This dish is guaranteed to satisfy plant-based eaters and omnivores, alike!

name: Spicy Beef Pho
description: This is a classic noodle soup originating from Northern Vietnam. Mok Bar pays homage to this well-loved classic with their spicy beef broth and tender sliced flank steak. The soup also features fresh rice noodles, shiitake mushrooms, pickled red onions, sliced jalape√±os, a lime wedge, and fresh cilantro for the perfect balance of umami and tang, richness and acid.

name: Lafriedas Chicken Nuggets
description: Chef LaFrieda's chicken nuggets are about as perfect as chicken nuggets get, made with 100% real, juicy chicken on the inside and a crispy coating on the outside. Served with some simply steamed broccoli, sweet potato fries, and a side of delicious homemade marinara sauce to dip, this meal packs in a ton of veggies while still satisfying even the pickiest little ones.

name: Creamy Rasta Pasta with Jerk Shrimp
description: Creamy, spicy, fresh and flavorful‚Äîwhat's not to love in a dish like this? Shrimp are marinated in Chef Nahika's secret Jerk sauce, then seared and paired with al dente penne pasta in a creamy Alfredo sauce, all topped with fresh herbs. Meet your new go-to dish to satisfy all comfort food cravings!

name: Chicken Breast Alla Cacciatora
description: Savor this homestyle Italian favorite, kicked up a notch to restaurant quality by Chef John. Tender chicken breast is seared, then braised in a beautifully aromatic cherry tomato sauce flavored with white wine, rosemary, thyme. Cremini mushrooms, fingerling potatoes, and bell peppers add heartiness to the sauce, while fennel seed adds a touch of surprise and sophistication that ties the whole dish together. If you're looking for a new and exciting, yet still comforting weeknight entr√©e, look no further.

name: Pork Chop
description: Golden pork chops rest on a bed of pasta that's been tossed with delicious slow cooked caramelized cabbage and onions. A hearty comforting meal that benefits from loads of vitamin packed cabbage.

name: Chicken Dumplings with Junzi Dipping Sauce
description: Who doesn't love traditional, Chinese-style dumplings, packed full of juicy chicken and flavored with lemongrass, all wrapped up in thin, chewy dough? Chefs Wanting Zhang and Yong Zhao serve their dumplings with Junzi Kitchen's homemade dumpling sauce for dipping and scallions for garnish. Enjoy this classic Chinese appetizer made with traditional ingredients as a satisfying snack or light meal, especially when paired with your favorite veggies.

name: Matcha Tiramisu
description: This tea-ramisu is a softer, greener take on the classic coffee-laced dessert. Delicate ladyfingers soak up sweetened green tea before they‚Äôre layered with whisked mascarpone, infused with earthy matcha and a hint of vanilla. A generous swirl of strawberry coulis brings a fruity finish to every creamy spoonful.

name: Saffron Risotto with Crab
description: Chef Kristy Flores crafts a culinary masterpiece that will blow you away. This rich risotto features sweet peas and the delicate floral flavor of saffron, as well as savory Parmesan cheese and a splash of white wine. Crowned with buttery saut√©ed crab that's been infused with zesty lemon and garlic, the dish is finished with a sprinkle of chives. Instantly transform any night into a special occasion with this elegant dish.

name: Truffle Buffalo Pulled Chicken Sandwich
description: Get ready for a flavor explosion with Bubb's Truffalo Chicken Sandwich‚Äîa dish that's sure to satisfy your cravings for bold and spicy BBQ flavors. It starts with juicy chicken breasts, seasoned with a special blend of spices and smothered in our signature Truffalo sauce, a spicy, tangy blend of buffalo sauce and truffle oil that will tantalize your taste buds. Once the chicken is pull-apart tender, it gets topped with melted pepper jack cheese, and Bubb's homemade pickles, then piled into plush potato bun. To balance out all the heat, the sandwich is served with cool, creamy house-made Garden Ranch that's perfect for dunking, drizzling, and dipping. Come and experience the ultimate BBQ feast!

name: Garlic Shrimp Fettuccine
description: Get a taste of fine dining in your very own kitchen. This dish features a rich, creamy Parmesan sauce scented with white truffle and tossed with perfectly al dente fettuccine pasta. It‚Äôs then topped with garlicky shrimp seasoned with chili flakes, and fresh rosemary, and garnished with chiffonade parsley.

name: Cavatappi Chicken Fresco
description: Chef Fabio elevates hearty cavatappi and herb-roasted chicken with a rich parmesan cream sauce infused with garlic, white wine, chopped spinach, and sundried tomatoes. Topped with parsley and freshly grated parmesan!

name: Slow Roasted Duck
description: Crisp Jurgowitz Farm Duck with tangy pineapple-chile sauce.

name: Greek Chicken Power Bowl
description: Chef DeLucie's Mediterranean-inspired power bowl is a wholesome and nutritious dish that features perfectly grilled, sambal-marinated chicken as the protein-packed base. It is then accompanied by a variety of fresh and colorful ingredients inspired by Greek cuisine including cherry tomatoes, cucumbers, olives, and feta cheese. Whether enjoyed for lunch or dinner, this bowl offers a well-balanced mix of nutrients to keep you energized and satisfied for hours.

name: Slow Cooked Boneless Short Ribs
description: Another French-inspired classic! Chef Chris seasons, sears and slow cooks boneless short ribs in red wine and homemade beef stock with herbs and roasted vegetables until they are fall-apart tender. Served with spicy-sweet harissa carrots and the melt-in-your-mouth creamy buttermilk mashed potatoes, you may have a difficult time sharing this meal or even saving some for lunch. Chef highly recommends heating this meal in the microwave.

name: Adobo Chicken Quesadillas
description: Chef Santiago's take on a classic from Mexico: the chicken quesadilla. Juicy chunks of adobo-marinated chicken thighs are tucked into flour tortillas alongside refried beans, as well as Oaxaca and mozzarella cheeses. The golden brown crispy quesadillas are accompanied by grilled cabbage, pico de gallo made with roasted and grilled peppers, and a delicious, smoky Chile de Arbol sauce.

name: Haitian Legume Epis Marinated Beef Vegetables
description: A hearty dish with Haitian roots, this meal is full of tender beef chunks that have marinated in the traditional Haitian epis blend, plus savory braised vegetables including cabbage, chayote squash, eggplant, and spinach. The dish is accompanied by a side of coconut rice and simply saut√©ed sweet baby peppers, tying this deeply savory taste of the Caribbean together.

name: Tofu Quinoa Forest Bowl
description: Savor the essence of summer with this nourishing bowl that's chock full of vegetarian goodness. It features BBQ-spiced grilled tofu, impeccably cooked quinoa, vibrant lemony garlic broccoli, and garlicky roasted mushrooms, all generously drizzled with a delectable adobo sauce. Experience an enticing fusion of flavors that celebrates the season's bounty in every satisfying bite.

name: Creamy Lobster Risotto
description: Brace yourself for ultimate luxury with Chef Tracey‚Äôs totally indulgent Creamy Lobster Risotto. She starts with traditional Arborio rice, slowly swirled and simmered in a rich blend of butter, white wine, lemon, and broth to release all the starch that gives this dish its amazingly smooth texture. Then comes the Parmesan cheese, adding saltiness and umami. Succulent, sweet lobster tail meat and fresh English peas (plus a parsley garnish) provide the final touch. ‚ÄúThis dish is already so rich and delicious, the lobster just elevates it to insane levels and the peas bring you back to earth,‚Äù she says. And the best part is you can take this incredible culinary journey anytime you want.

name: Chicken Alfredo with Truffle Mashed Potatoes
description: Chef Silvio's take on Chicken Alfredo is one to be savored! Chef serves up this Italian classic with elevated truffle-infused mashed potatoes and earthy roasted broccoli with garlic and lemon.

name: Salmon with Pistachio Sauce
description: Pistachios and basil are perfectly blended to create a luscious and decadent sauce to enjoy with this salmon. The roasted veggies are perfectly dipole as well with this dish.

name: Orecchiette Napolitana with Italian Sausage
description: A classic Italian combination, this pasta dish pairs rich spicy Italian sausage with fresh broccoli rabe, all in a light tomato-basil sauce. Orecchiette is the perfect pasta shape to scoop up all that tangy, luscious sauce and a sprinkling of Grana Padano cheese on top seals the deal!

name: Spring Vegetable Platter
description: Savor the freshness of the season with a bounty full of spring's finest produce. Colorful rainbow carrots, tender asparagus, and spring onions are grilled to perfection, then finished with a zesty lemon, garlic, and herb compound butter to add a little richness.

name: Tropical Fish Pescado Tropical
