description: A coastal favorite in the state of Oaxaca, this garlic marinated tilapia filet is oven baked to a firm, flaky finish. Accompanied with fresh cucumber slices, seasonal fruit salad, and served over a bed of cilantro-lime rice with freshly diced pineapple.

name: Classic Honey Walnut Shrimp
description: Inspired by a Chinese-American classic, this dish features golden, crispy shrimp glazed in a creamy honey-mayo sauce that makes them absolutely irresistible. Paired with tender broccoli and crunchy candied walnuts and served over fragrant jasmine rice, the dish is finished with a garnish of sesame seeds and scallions for a delightful balance of sweetness, crunch, and savory richness.

name: Moroccan Chickpea Feta Bowl
description: Dive into Chef Dustin's Moroccan-inspired grain bowl, a culinary delight featuring spiced chickpeas and tender farro. The bowl starts with a base of farro and kale, all adorned with roasted zucchini, saut√©ed bell peppers and onions, and smoky chickpeas, then sprinkled with crumbled feta cheese for creamy contrast. A zesty balsamic dressing brings it all together.

name: Vegan Bali Bowls
description: A simple bowl that will make you feel active and energize for the day. Made with sweet potato, cabbage, carrots and radishes with avocado for extra heartiness.

name: Chorizo Grilled Shrimp Skewers
description: Indulge in a taste of Southern summers with these smoky skewers, featuring succulent shrimp, smoky, spicy chorizo sausage, peppers, and onions, all seasoned to perfection with a Memphis-style BBQ dry rub. Once grilled, the skewers are served with Bubb‚Äôs signature tangy, Grand Dad's BBQ sauce for dipping, drizzling, or slathering on them. The char-grilled shrimp and chorizo are paired with a side of slow-cooked baked beans and zesty cilantro-lime rice to complete the dish. Get a little bit of everything in each bite and the combination of textures and flavors will transport you right back to the family cookout.

name: Buffalo Chicken Dip
description: Elevate the game day experience with Chef's Special Buffalo Chicken Dip. This zesty delight boasts tender shredded chicken immersed in tangy buffalo sauce, creating a spicy and cheesy masterpiece. Whether scooped with crispy tortilla chips or enjoyed with crunchy celery sticks, this is a crowd-pleasing treat.

name: Acapulco Tilapia
description: Showcasing the flavors of the Mexican Pacific Coast, this dish features tender grilled tilapia infused with aromatic spices and herbs. The fish is served alongside vibrant vegetables and jasmine rice.

name: Grass Fed Skirt Steak Au Poivre
description: The absolute best ingredients speaks for themselves. Here that means a grass-fed skirt steak, seasoned simply with pepper, cooked to a perfect medium-medium-rare, thinly sliced, and served with a traditional horseradish cream sauce. This steak is accompanied by sweet potatoes baked rapidly in a hot oven to seal in their natural sweetness, as well as sweet Spanish onions.

name: Hanger Steak with Green Beans
description: This is a lean cut of meat with grilled veggies and a delicious parsnip puree. It's very healthy and light you will feel good after eating it.

name: Orecchiette with Broccoli Rabe and Vegan Beyond Sausage
description: A delicious vegan pasta option although you'd never know it's vegan. Al dente orecchiette are mixed with Beyond plant-based spicy Italian sausage, fresh broccoli rabe, and a tangy tomato-basil sauce with just a hint of kick from some red pepper flakes. A sprinkling of vegan parmesan seals the deal!

name: Bacon Wrapped Chicken
description: Dressed for perfection! It's chicken wrapped up with a bacon for a flavorful and luxury pairing it with cauliflower puree. 100% yummy, 100% keto!

name: Lemongrass Seafood Bun Cha
description: The star of Chef Phet‚Äôs vibrant, Vietnamese-inspired noodle bowl is a tender, succulent ground-pork patty, flavored with umami-rich oyster and fish sauces, garlic, and fragrant fresh lemongrass. But don‚Äôt overlook the supporting players: tangy pickled carrots and cucumbers, shredded kale, fresh cilantro and Thai basil, and crispy fried shallots‚Äîall served atop a swirl of rice vermicelli noodles. Pour on the Nuc Mam (sweet-sour carrot sauce) and dig in to a satisfying meal full of unforgettable flavors.

name: Adobo Chicken with Shiitake
description: Savor a tender braised, boneless, skinless chicken adobo infused with rich flavors, paired with hearty chickpeas and earthy shiitake mushrooms. The savory sauce perfectly coats every bite, blending the tangy adobo seasoning with the wholesome textures. Served with fragrant jasmine rice, it‚Äôs a comforting, flavorful meal.

name: Grilled Chicken
description: Tender hormone-free chicken thigh marinated and infused with aromatic spices like turmeric, paprika, garlic, cumin, coriander, parsley then grilled to lock the flavor and juices. Best eaten with your hands and dipped in homemade red pepper hummus. Healthy while so yummy, it's a bang for the buck.

name: Seared Ny Strip Steak
description: What's better than an all-natural, high quality 12-ounce New York strip steak cooked to perfection? Not much. Chef John seasons the steak simply, letting its rich beefy flavor shine, then sears it on high heat to lock in all its natural juices. A red wine reduction sauce brings a hint of acidic sweetness, perfectly complementing the steak. Enjoy this gorgeous steak for a date night, weeknight, or really any night‚Äîit's guaranteed to make any meal feel like a special occasion.

name: Sweet Citrus Juice
description: A crisp, refreshing mix of cooling mint, lemon, and ripe golden pineapple.

name: Grilled Flank Steak Grain Bowl
description: Chef Chris has his team marinate, grill and hand dice flank steak and serve it atop a lightly dressed farro and rainbow quinoa grain salad, mixed with roasted sweet potatoes, sugar snap peas, carrots, cherry tomatoes for freshness. The grain and steak bowl is topped with spicy pepitas and served with a smoky-sweet chipotle lime dressing. This is a hearty, flavorful, protein-loaded meal that's perfect for lunch or dinner, hot or cold, any time of year.

name: Chinese Style Chicken Salad
description: Chef Chase has curated a roster of meals that promise comforting satisfaction while being lower in calories. Here, oven roasted-then-shredded chicken accompanies crisp romaine lettuce, Napa cabbage, adorned with mandarin oranges, cilantro, green onions, salted cashews, and crunchy chow mein noodles. Dressed in a tangy sesame dressing, this is a restaurant-quality salad that tastes so much better in the comfort of your own home.

name: Beef Stroganoff with Truffle Pappardelle
description: Chef John gives stroganoff a first-class upgrade. Slow-cooked beef tenderloin melts into a creamy red wine sauce, layered with caramelized mushrooms and the luxe addition of earthy truffle peelings. It‚Äôs draped over thick ribbons of pappardelle, then finished with fresh chives and a decadent drizzle of white truffle oil.

name: Malabar Prawn Curry
description: Chef Guarav crafts this South Indian curry the traditional way‚Äîstarting by toasting spices like fenugreek and mustard seeds to release all their essential oils, then saut√©ing aromatic vegetables and adding creamy coconut milk, tangy tomatoes, and sweet tamarind paste. Once the flavors have melded, he gives succulent spice-rubbed shrimp a quick sear to lock in juiciness, then finishes them in the sauce. The accompanying rice is no second fiddle‚Äîstudded with raisins and cashews, it‚Äôs infused with the warmth of cinnamon and clove, plus ghee (aka clarified butter) for richness.

name: Chipotle Chicken Quesadilla
description: Satisfy your quesadilla craving with some smoky, zesty, cheesy goodness from Chef Dustin. Bite into the perfectly toasted folded tortilla to find a tasty blend of tender chipotle-marinated chicken, cilantro-lime rice, creamy cheese, black beans, and corn. Top it all off with salsa verde for a refreshing finishing touch.

name: Domino Arepa Sandwich
description: There are lots of variations of arepas‚ÄîLatin American corn cakes served whole or split and filled with different flavor combinations. Here, Chef Jose brings us his take, layering the golden-baked cakes with melty mozzarella, velvety black bean pur√©e, and smoky poblano rajas. A side of fried sweet plantains (maduros) adds a caramelized bite, with a drizzle of creamy avocado guasacaca to finish it off.

name: Creamy Chicken and Cauliflower Salad
description: This low carb chicken and cauliflower is rich with a creamy sauce with full of flavors. Served alongside a simple green salad.

name: Craft Cheeseburger with Fries
description: Now this a world class burger! Chef John serves up a truly restaurant-quality burger like you'd find in a fancy bistro, with a juicy, all-beef patty cooked to perfection and topped with melted cheese. Plated on a plush potato bun with lettuce, tomato, and Chef's special sauce‚Äîa creamy aioli‚Äîthe burger comes with a side of crisp curly fries to complete the dish. This is the ultimate American comfort food, kicked up a notch.

name: Blackened Salmon Bacon
description: The delightful combination of seared blackened salmon and crispy bacon is accompanied by a nutty farro salad. Meanwhile, dried cranberries add some delicious tartness and a zesty Italian cucumber dressing helps elevate all the flavors.

name: Tamarind Butternut Sweet Potato Stew
description: A bowl full of soul-soothing flavors. This nourishing stew softens sweet potato and butternut squash in a blend of creamy coconut milk, tangy tamarind, and warming spices like ginger, turmeric, and cumin. Cherry tomatoes bring a bit of sweetness, while chickpeas add texture. Hearty and comforting, it‚Äôs served over a fragrant jasmine rice tricked up with cilantro.

name: Prosciutto Margherita Pizza
description: Chef John turns the classic Margherita pizza on its head by replacing the typical crust with grilled Indian naan and adding prosciutto. The slightly charred flavor of the fluffy naan replicates the flavors you'd get in a traditional pizza oven. Chef layers on marinara sauce, fresh mozzarella, Grana-Padano cheese, fresh basil, thinly sliced prosciutto, and a drizzle of good olive oil for the perfect pizza night, any night!

name: Hot Vegan Italian Roll
description: Traditional style hot sausage sandwich.

name: Rainbow Grain Salad with Grilled Salmon
description: Simple grilled salmon is paired with chili-roasted sweet potatoes and served atop a lightly dressed farro and rainbow quinoa grain salad. The nutty grains are mixed with sugar snap peas, carrots, and cherry tomatoes for freshness, then topped with spicy pepitas and tossed in a smoky-sweet chipotle dressing. It's the simplicity of this meal that highlights the quality and flavors of the fresh ingredients, making this incredibly light yet filling dish perfect for lunch or dinner.

name: Sweet Indonesian Duck
description: Take your tastebuds on a trip to Bali with this sweet Indonesian-style duck. Rich duck leg is cooked confit-style, braised until nearly falling off the bone then fried to get a mouthwateringly crispy skin, and paired with sweet coconut sugar and soy sauce glaze with hints of cardamon and cinnamon. Served with sides of crispy fried broccoli and sweet corn, this unique dish is a must-try.

name: Citrus Grilled Chicken and Sorghum
description: Classic Grilled Chicken dish utilizing all these delicious flavors along with the grilled asparagus and roasted peppers. I have done this in the past with israeli Cous Cous But I am replacing it with Sorghum, which is even higher in both protein and fiber (one cup has 22 grams of protein and 12 grams of fiber!).

name: Pats Grilled Chicken Thighs
description: Chef Pat marinates all-natural chicken in a bold, flavorful Italian marinade before grilling it to perfection. On the side you'll find some peak summer zucchini saut√©ed with savory sun-dried tomatoes and a zesty basil pesto. This light dish is perfect for our more health-conscious friends. It's low-carb and packed with flavor!

name: Chili Lime Shrimp Tacos
description: These juicy tacos are filled with smoky chili marinated jumbo shrimps and creamy Mexican esquites. Even better with a drizzle of chipotle crema!

name: Chocolate Cake with Chocolate Buttercream
description: BCakeNY's chocolate cake is rich, moist, and full of decadent chocolate flavor. Each slice is perfectly baked to have the ideal light and fluffy cake texture, complemented by a smooth, buttery chocolate frosting. It's perfect for sharing‚Äîthough you probably won't want to‚Äîand ideal for any celebration (or to make any day feel like a special occasion!)

name: Salmon with Mango Salsa
description: This is one of our healthiest meals, grilled beautiful piece of salmon, with a mango salsa on top and more on the side, and basmati rice with seasonal veggies (squash and fresh corn).

name: Mediterranean Lamb Ragu Cavatelli
description: Tender boneless Vadouvan spiced lamb is expertly paired with delicate cavatelli pasta. The addition of carrots adds a touch of sweetness, while the creamy mascarpone cheese brings richness to every bite. Prepare to be transported to the sunny shores of the Mediterranean with this delectable and comforting meal.

name: Reign of Terroir Chenin Blanc
description: Hand-harvested and delicately pressed, this Chenin is full, rich, and creamy. Aromas of stone fruits and white blossoms are complemented by lingering notes of citrus, giving the wine a fresh, crisp character.

name: Pan Seared Cajun Salmon
description: This dish takes your favorite fish up a notch with a little bit of heat and a lot of flavor. Salmon is packed in healthy omega 3 fats and vitamin D and shines when pan seared to perfection. Chef Andres kicks it up a notch with zesty, zingy Cajun seasoning, which goes really well with crunchy green beans and peppers.

name: Bbq Daring Chickn Grain Bowl
description: Indulge in a flavor-packed grain bowl featuring tender, Daring plant chicken, black beans, sweet corn, fragrant jasmine rice, and cabbage slaw. Drizzled with a zesty BBQ sauce, this plant-based bowl will satisfy your taste buds and your appetite.

name: Beef Bourguignon with Buttered Egg Noodles
description: We love any excuse to eat buttery egg noodles, so why not hook ‚Äòem up with a savory French classic? Chef Chris‚Äô ‚ÄúBeef B‚Äù is loaded with a half-pound of deliciously marbled beef chuck that‚Äôs been hand-diced, seared, then slow-cooked with freshly diced veggies, mushrooms, tomatoes, red wine and herbs. That beef is braised for hours until perfectly tender and then finished with a touch of butter (the French way!) This is beef stew 2.0. Chef Chris highly recommends heating this meal in the microwave.

name: Coconut Matcha Chia Pudding
description: Experience the harmonious fusion of health and flavor with our Matcha Chia Pudding. Delicately crafted with premium matcha powder, this creamy pudding boasts a vibrant green hue and a subtle earthy taste, complemented by the delightful texture of chia seeds. Elevate your snack game with this nutrient-packed delight, perfect for those seeking a refreshing and nourishing treat.

name: Haitian Cashew Chicken
description: Originating in Northern Haiti, where cashews thrive, this dish reflects the region‚Äôs dynamic flavors and rich traditions. Chef Vanessa simmers lime-washed chicken thighs with epis‚Äîa fragrant blend of spices‚Äîalongside onions, peppers, tomatoes, and fiery Scotch bonnet. Mingled with buttery cashews, adding depth and texture, it‚Äôs served over steamed jasmine rice.

name: Pork Dumplings with Greens
description: Who doesn't love traditional Chinese-style boiled dumplings, especially when they're packed full of tender pork and chives, then wrapped in chewy, thin dough? Chef Wanting & Yong serve their dumplings with Junzi Kitchen's homemade dumpling sauce for dipping and scallions for garnish, plus a side of yu choy to round out the meal. These juicy dumplings will have you ditching takeout for good.

name: Coq Au Vin with Creamy Mashed Potatoes
description: Coq au vin may translate to ‚Äúrooster in wine‚Äù in French, but these days, it‚Äôs all about chicken thighs. They‚Äôre soaked in a red wine braise, which gets a smoky, salty kick from bacon, alongside mushrooms, and pearl onions. Slowly simmered until rich and glossy, it‚Äôs served next to buttery mashed potatoes.

name: Beef Sweet Potato Coconut Curry
description: If you're new to Indian food, this is a great introductory dish as it's fragrant, mellow, yet packed with flavor. Braised beef and white sweet potatoes are cooked in a mild coconut curry, this is a comforting dish Chef Aarthi cooks for herself for dinner all the time. Paired with mashed cauliflower, the meal is totally satisfying, yet low carb and healthy.

name: Spinach Mushroom Empanada
description: Enjoy a tasty pocket full of goodness! Chef Daniel's empanadas are made with flaky, puff pastry dough stuffed chock full of shiitake and button mushrooms as well as saut√©ed spinach. The delicately spiced vegetarian empanadas are paired with a creamy tahini dipping sauce. Each portion comes with two empanadas for the perfect snack or as a start to a delicious meal.

name: Apple Pie Bread Pudding
description: This dessert combines the nostalgic flavors of apple pie with the soft textures of bread pudding. Sweet-tart apples, spiced with cinnamon and nutmeg, provide a warming contrast to buttery brioche, soaked and baked in a rich, creamy custard. It‚Äôs topped with whipped cream for a dollop of indulgence.

name: Piri Piri Chicken Thighs
description: Chef Dustin's dish brings together everything you want in a good meal. Boneless chicken thighs get marinated in vibrant Piri Piri spices before being grilled to perfection and served alongside fragrant turmeric rice and roasted broccoli. The finishing touch? A spicy cilantro sauce.

name: Black Pepper Beef Pad Thai
description: Chef Stacy's fresh take on a Thai street food favorite will have you tossing the takeout menus for good. Tender rice noodles are stir-fried with bean sprouts, scrambled egg, and veggies in an irresistibly tangy sauce. The crave-worthy noodles are topped with stir-fried black pepper beef and finished with shredded carrots, chopped peanuts, and a lime wedge to squeeze on top.

name: Pesto Chicken Power Bowl
description: Clean protein, nourishing vegetables, and energizing grains‚Äîthis pesto-powered bowl has everything you need to keep you going throughout the day. Herb-seasoned grilled chicken breast takes center stage, paired with roasted asparagus, bell peppers, and squash over a bed of soft Basmati rice. A vibrant house-made pesto, made with fresh basil, Parmesan, toasted pine nuts, and rich olive oil, ties it all together with bold, aromatic flavor.

name: Salmon with Potato Gratin
description: This meal is just amazing. Grilled salmon with a side of classic French potato gratin, crunchy on top.

name: Maine Lobster Roll with Curly Fries
description: Chef John seasons butter-poached and chilled lobster with fresh herbs, lemon juice, and cr√®me fra√Æche- then serves it on a potato bun with romaine lettuce and a side of crispy curly fries. One bite will transport you to the New England coast!

name: Herb Garlic Roasted Surf Turf
description: Experience the exquisite flavors of 'Herb and Garlic Land & Sea Medley' curated by Chef Dustin. This delectable creation features succulent, pan-seared sirloin steak complemented by tender, garlic-infused shrimp, all enhanced with a delightful blend of aromatic herbs. The dish is a harmonious symphony of tastes, combining earthy, herbaceous notes with the savory richness of land and sea, ensuring a memorable dining experience.

name: Meatballs Stroganoff
description: We‚Äôre sure you‚Äôre whole family will love this dish. Chef Isaac dresses tender meatballs in a creamy sauce with mushrooms and fusilli noodles. Topped with a bit of fresh parsley, this dish will satisfy your cravings for a hearty and indulgent pasta.

name: Peruvian Chicken Estofado Pasta
description: For Chef Walther‚Äôs estofado, seared chicken thighs are simmered in a tomato and red wine braise brimming with carrots, peas, and the smoky heat of aji panca‚Äîa Peruvian chili pepper. It‚Äôs served over spaghetti, with a cheesy, creamy huanca√≠na sauce on the side. This is comfort food with serious flair.

name: Carrot Cake Cookie with Cheesecake Filling
description: This is a real dessert: cream cheese frosting is sandwiched between two lusciously moist carrot cake cookies. Carrot cake lovers: this one's for you. Your favorite spring dessert has been transformed into soft, tender cookie sandwiches, complete with a cream cheese-based frosting filling. The cookies themselves are cakey and moist, and chock full of carrots, oats and plump raisins. But let's be real‚Äîthose cookies are really just a delivery mechanism for the unbelievably delicious cinnamon-cheesecake filling. One bite and you may never go back to the same old carrot cake again.

name: Hidden Veggie Beef Bolognese
description: Your kids will love this rigatoni bolognese because it's delicious and comforting. You'll love this meal because it secretly packs in loads of veggies and protein. Chef DeLucie's beef bolognese contains 'invisible vegetables' like, carrots, onions, and celery, and pairs perfectly with al dente linguine and a sprinkle of cheese.

name: Seared Branzino with Panzanella Salad
description: This dish just tastes like summer. The perfectly seared filet of Branzino promises crispy skin and tender, buttery flesh. Chef John pairs the gorgeous piece of fish with a classic panzanella salad, full of big pieces of crunchy bread, cucumbers, juicy tomatoes, and red onion, all tossed in a punchy, tangy red wine vinaigrette.

name: Sweet Spicy Sour Cauliflower
description: Lasooni Gobhi is one of the most popular dishes at an Indian restaurant. Similar to Buffalo Cauliflower, it‚Äôs garlicky, gingery, sweet, spicy, tomatoey, crunchy, full of flavor, and so incredibly good.

name: Bbq Salmon Bento Bowl
description: Indulge in the refreshing flavors of summer with a succulent filet of Hungry House's signature Backyard BBQ-spiced grilled salmon filet. The perfectly cooked fish is accompanied by edamame and mushrooms and served on a bed of perfectly cooked jasmine rice. Drizzled with zesty tare sauce, a citrusy eel sauce, this bento-inspired bowl is endlessly crave-able.

name: Beni Duilio Sangiovese
description: Crafted using traditional methods, this red is robust and well-balanced, with silky tannins and flavors of dried strawberries, plums, and dark cherries. Hints of violet and wildflowers add complexity, creating a wine that is both structured and expressive.

name: Four Cheese Mac N Cheese
description: Chef Chris is known for elevated comfort cooking, and this ooey gooey creamy mac and cheese is the epitome of that. Ooey gooey mac is made with four kinds of cheese and finished with a Pepper Jack-Cheddar cheese crumb crust that just takes it over the top. Enjoy this mac on its own (warning: you're not going to want to eat anything else) or pair with grilled chicken or a pork chop for a weeknight winner!

name: Vegan Vanilla Cake
description: BCakeNY's vanilla cake is a delicious indulgence that's perfect for any occasion. Made from high-quality ingredients, the cake has a light and fluffy texture with a rich vanilla flavor and buttery vanilla frosting that will delight your taste buds. Whether you're celebrating something special or nothing in particular, this cake is sure to satisfy your sweet tooth!

name: Balsamic Glazed Hanger Steak
description: Chef Ruben is serving up another restaurant-quality dish that's endlessly craveable. Hanger steak is renowned for its tenderness, especially when marinated which makes this steak ever juicier and full of flavor. Finished with a sweet and tangy balsamic glaze, the steak is paired with cheesy macaroni au gratin, roasted zucchini and summer squash, and grilled portobello mushrooms. All of these elements combine to create a well-balanced culinary masterpiece that's a can't-miss for steak lovers.

name: Coconut Red Curry Roasted Salmon
description: Chef Esther presents a succulent roasted salmon, taking center stage and complemented by a rich peanut red curry sauce. It is served with steamed rice, crisp green beans, and elegantly garnished with toasted coconut and peanuts.

name: Chipotle Bbq Chicken Bowl
description: This can‚Äôt-go-wrong lunch or dinner option is a must-add for anyone craving a satisfying, healthy meal that doesn‚Äôt skimp on flavor. Chef Ruben layers a hearty portion of tender BBQ chicken seasoned with smoky chipotle, fluffy Jasmine rice packed with grated zucchini and yellow squash, hearty black beans, and fresh baby spinach, all topped with grated Chihuahua cheese. The accompanying fresh pico de gallo and rich avocado crema take everything over the top for a perfect balance of spice, freshness, and comfort in every bite.

name: Deli Style Pasta Salad with Fresh Mozzarella
description: This bright, deli-style bowl combines twirls of pasta with a jumble of sweet cherry tomatoes, zippy onions, briny olives, and slices of salami. Pepperoncini adds a tangy bite, balanced by the creaminess of fresh mozzarella. Tossed in a herby red wine vinaigrette, it‚Äôs the type of dish you‚Äôll want to eat on repeat.

name: Roasted Chicken with Green Mole
description: Slow roasted chicken breast, with a fresh take on a classic pipian (pumpkin seed) mole and a light a fresh quinoa salad.

name: Dessert Naan Pizza
description: Chef DeLucie's dessert pizza is not to be missed. A piece of grilled naan serves as the base, which gets topped with creamy ricotta, a drizzle of honey, cinnamon, and a mix of seasonal and tropical fruit. Tart blueberries, sweet pineapple, and dried figs create a symphony of fruity flavor that takes this dessert pizza from good to great.

name: Herb Crusted Salmon
description: This satisfying, healthy meal from Chef Vincent offers a balance of omega 3-rich salmon, fiber-packed quinoa, and nutrient-rich asparagus. The salmon‚Äôs vibrant herb crust‚Äîmade with a flavorful mix of fresh dill, parsley, and thyme and crisp Panko breadcrumbs‚Äîpairs wonderfully with the citrusy notes of the lemon-dressed tri-color quinoa and the smoky flavor of the grilled asparagus. It adds up to the kind of well-rounded meal that will keep you feeling energized all day. And at night, you can rest easy knowing you made a deliciously nutritious meal choice.

name: Red Wine Braised Chicken
description: Chef Michelle typically saves this beautiful recipe for special occasions, but you can enjoy it any day or night of the week. It‚Äôs filled with savory, sweet, tart and herbaceous flavors. The red wine-braised chicken features shallots, capers, green olives, and prunes, and gets served alongside toasted couscous and glazed carrots to make it even more hearty and comforting. Chef Michelle writes, "It‚Äôs really one of my favorites."

name: Miso Polenta with Spring Vegetables
description: Savory, rich, very satisfying with great combinations of flavor. The veggies will give you the perfect crunch and the miso adds the umami and richness we crave without dairy.

name: Quinoa Grilled Pineapple Salad
description: This grilled pineapple and quinoa salad is a hearty and nutritious side dish that pairs the smoky-sweet flavors of grilled pineapple with fluffy, nutty quinoa and a tangy cilantro-lime dressing. It's a satisfying option for those looking for a well-balanced salad, enhanced with shaved green cabbage, diced cucumber, and refreshing mint. Serve alongside grilled chicken, pork, fish, or seafood, or enjoy on its own for a light lunch.

name: Italian Sausage Broccoli Pasta
description: This is exactly the kind of hearty, comforting, home-style Italian meal everyone craves‚Äîbut no one has time to cook for themselves. Chef Tracey combines succulent browned Italian sausage with garlicky saut√©ed broccoli and perfectly al dente orecchiette pasta in a luxurious butter sauce, enlivened with just a touch of crushed red pepper for gentle heat. It‚Äôs garnished with fresh grated Parmesan for a umami richness. You might want to double up on this one... because you‚Äôre going to want a second helping!

name: Turkey Meatballs Over Rigatoni
description: This Greek version of pasta and meatballs is all about the tomato sauce, full of fragrance coming in the form of fresh herbs. The turkey meatballs are light and herbaceous, and pair perfectly with al dente rigatoni. Roasted eggplant and spinach add a burst of color and extra nutrition, making this a great weekday dinner on its own or accompanied by a glass of red wine.

name: Roasted Salmon In Ginger Cream Sauce
description: This is the ideal dinner to level up any weeknight. Perfectly cooked, crispy-skinned salmon fillet is paired with a creamy ginger sauce that adds a tangy kick and touch of richness to the buttery fish. The salmon is served alongside fluffy rice and grilled asparagus that adds a hint of smokiness to round out the dish.

name: Middle Eastern Vegan Chili
description: This plant-based chili is spicy, complex and totally crave-able. A mix of legumes are stewed with Mediterranean and Middle Eastern spices to create a comforting yet new take on everyone‚Äôs favorite chili. A drizzle of creamy tahini on top is refreshing, and a side green herby sabzi rice is the perfect complement to round out the meal.

name: Traditional Desi Butter Chicken
description: Chef Aarthi does this beloved Indian-cuisine staple like no one else. Extra-juicy chicken thighs and velvety smooth tomato sauce are fragrant with traditional spices. The raisin-studded pulao (rice pilaf) is inspired by her recent trip to Kashmir, where dried fruits are commonly added to the mix. Pickled shallots and toasted almonds give a pop of flavor and texture. ‚ÄúThis dish is one of my favorites,‚Äù says Chef. It‚Äôll be one of yours, too.

name: Gaucho Style Chimichurri Tofu
description: Chef Anthony presents his unique Gaucho-style tofu plate, meticulously crafted to celebrate the vibrant flavors of South America. Instead of the traditional steak, marinated tofu takes center stage, accompanied by tangy pickled red onions, fragrant yellow rice, hearty red beans, and a zesty chimichurri sauce to tie it all together. Each bite offers a peek into the essence of Gaucho cuisine, and a delicious one at that.

name: Curried Turkey Salad
description: Flavorful and delicious salad with roasted vegetables and extra protein with a creamy mango and mayo sauce offers a healthy lunch.

name: Mini Chocolate Pudding Cake
description: Chef Kristy brings you her take on the one of the most delicious, decadent desserts of all time: chocolate pudding cake. The velvety chocolate cake quite literally oozes richness, and a tangy raspberry coulis provides a tart, fruity balance that perfectly complements the chocolate. Adorned with toasted hazelnuts, this is everything you could want in a dessert and more.

name: Chicken Shawarma with Turmeric Rice
description: Chicken thighs that are marinated in a fragrant mixture of spices. The Chicken is broiled to perfection in the oven and can be enjoyed with aromatic yellow rice and a homemade white sauce made with Greek yogurt and lemon juice and lots of fresh minced garlic.

name: Spicy Rigatoni Alla Vodka
description: An Italian classic! Al dente rigatoni coated in a luscious, creamy vodka sauce that's gets a little kick from red pepper flakes. Topped with parmesan cheese and crispy breadcrumbs with fresh basil, this is the ideal dish for chilly evenings or comfort food cravings anytime.

name: Vegan Chorizo and Black Bean Chili
description: Vegan, plant-based chorizo and black beans come together in this hearty, crowd-pleasing chili. Served with a side of roasted sweet potatoes and topped with vegan cheddar and scallion sour cream, it ticks all the boxes for comforting, satisfying food that anyone can (and will!) enjoy.

name: Italian Beef Ragu with Zucchini Noodles
description: An Italian classic brought into the modern era. Hearty beef ragu is stewed for hours but arrives to your table in minutes. Chef Andres pairs it with zoodles for a lighter twist that's gluten-free and lower in calories.

name: The Cuban Sandwich
description: The grandaddy of all sandwiches! Pork, ham, Swiss, mustard and pickles. Chill that beer!!!

name: Thai Pineapple Chicken Fried Rice
description: Get your favorite Thai fried rice with tender seared chicken, peas, carrots, scrambled eggs, sweet pineapple chunks, and crunchy toasted cashews. Garnish it with a zesty lime wedge to add a refreshing kick to each bite.

name: Ziti al Forno
description: Perfect for a memorable Sunday feast, this irresistible dish features al dente pasta enveloped in a luxurious San Marzano tomato and basil sauce, covered in fresh Mozzarella and Parmigiano cheeses, and baked until bubbling and golden brown. Each bite is a sumptuous blend of flavors. Pair with a fresh green salad and crusty bread for a meal that‚Äôs not just delicious, but truly seductive.

name: Surf Turf with Ny Strip Steak Lobster Tail
description: Surf and turf is the end-all, be-all when it comes to elegant entr√©es, and Chef DeLucie's take doesn't disappoint. For the turf, enjoy a perfectly seared NY strip steak, and for the surf, dive into a butter lobster tail. A side of garlickly green beans and luscious whipped bearnaise butter ties the whole dish together in luxurious harmony. It doesn't get better than this.

name: Grilled Pork Loin with Grain Mustard Sauce
description: The tender and succulent Berkshire pork loin is perfectly grilled, complemented by the earthy flavors of braised kale and crispy pancetta. A velvety reduction of calvados and grain mustard adds a tangy sweetness to the dish. With the addition of black lentils, shallots, onions, celery, carrots, and mushrooms, this meal is a true feast for the senses.

name: Chicken Thighs with Potatoes
description: Charred flavor chicken thighs with zucchini and potatoes rich with flavors drizzled with a bright citrusy lemon-parsley sauce. You will surely get hooked to this!

name: Paprika Salmon
description: Healthy scrumptious straight out from the oven, enjoy this healthy paleo salmon like a champ. Definitely one of my fave healthy recipe.

name: Cajun Spiced Shrimp Scampi Linguine
description: In her take on scampi, Chef Angelia cranks up the Cajun heat, coating plump shrimp in butter, garlic, and a solid hit of spice. They‚Äôre tossed with al dente linguine and a white wine sauce that‚Äôs silky, lemony, and deeply savory‚Äîthanks to a heavy hand of parmesan.

name: Mushroom and Pepper Quesadillas
description: The fusion of Tex-Mex tradition and modern plant-forward cuisine with these vibrant quesadillas. Warm corn tortillas embrace a melty layer of queso fresco, generously filled with a medley of earthy mushrooms, sweet onions, and fire-roasted red and yellow bell peppers. The filling is enhanced with an aromatic blend of cumin, coriander, and smoky chili powder. Served alongside protein-packed black beans and accompanied by cool, tangy sour cream for dipping, this dish offers a satisfying balance of flavors and textures in every bite.

name: Chicken Marengo with Rice Pilaf
description: Chicken Marengo is a classic French dish consisting of chicken seared and then braised with garlic, white wine, and tomato. Chef Ludo's version features button mushrooms, served with classic rice pilaf, and garnished with fresh Italian Parsley.

name: Chicken Picatta
description: This classic take on the lovely Chicken Picatta will be a welcome addition to your dining room table. The zingy and tangy capers brighten up the rich luxurious white wine sauce drenched chicken breast. Dig In!

name: Jerk Chicken with Mango Sauce
description: Savor the vibrant flavors of the Caribbean with this chicken. Enjoy a double portion of Chef Akhtar's take on jerk chicken, with succulent boneless chicken thighs that have been marinated with jerk spices and grilled to perfection. A side of savory, Caribbean-style spiced mango sauce adds a hint of sweetness to balance out the heat.

name: Cala De Poeti Vermentino
description: This Vermentino from Tuscany is bright, fresh, and effortlessly elegant. Aromas of jasmine and peach blossoms lead into a savory, mineral-driven palate with vibrant acidity and a crisp, lingering finish. A true expression of the Mediterranean coast.

name: Grass Fed Chili Rubbed Flank Steak Grain Bowl
description: Juicy flank steak is rubbed with a tangy smoky chili spice mix, then seared to perfection and sliced. The steak is served over a bright farro salad with fresh spinach, saut√©ed corn, and roasted asparagus. A drizzle of sweet and zesty sun-dried tomato vinaigrette completes the dish.

name: Sous Locean Sustainable Sauvignon Blanc
description: Made from organic grapes grown in Bordeaux, this elegant Sauvignon Blanc is bright with acidity. Notes of fresh and exotic fruits bring balance, with a long finish on the palate. Produced by Ethic Drinks, it‚Äôs sustainably made, bottled in lightweight glass, and packed with recycled materials.

name: Grilled Thyme Chicken
description: You'll love the chargrilled taste of these juicy thyme chicken skewers. A classic Argentinian way to enjoy meat, the skewers are made with chicken thighs that have been marinated with garlic, herbs, and lemon, and paired with skewers of bell peppers and onions on the side. Rounding out the meal are smoked paprika potatoes and broccoli florets roasted with garlic and olive oil.

name: Creamy Hawaiian Spaghetti
description: Craving something fresh, tropical, and totally ingenious? Chef Santos takes everything great about sweet-savory Hawaiian pizza, and transforms it into an irresistible pasta dish. Luscious cream sauce, studded with tender shredded chicken breast and smoky chopped ham, coats every strand of perfectly al dente spaghetti, topped with melty Mozzarella cheese, sweet pineapple, and fresh chopped parsley. It‚Äôs an unforgettable combination of flavors!

name: Mediterranean Chicken Shawarma Bowl
description: Experience a taste of the Middle East with Chef Einat's Chicken Shawarma Bowl. Tender shawarma spice-marinated chicken is served over a bed of hearty farro and accompanied by tangy pickled cucumbers and turnips, juicy cherry tomatoes, and crispy chickpeas for added crunch. Drizzle the bowl with Chef's creamy tahini-yogurt-mint sauce and savor the harmonious balance of textures and flavors that satisfy with every bite.

name: Crispy Chickpea Bowls
description: Red quinoa tossed with cucumber, herbs and our very own blend of roasted tomato vinaigrette. This revamp of chickpea bowl is topped with crunchy roasted chickpeas, baked to warm through adding harissa puree and feta.

name: Mexican Quesabirria
description: Enjoy birria-style beef, roasted cremini mushrooms, and melted mozzarella in a crunchy golden tortilla served with a spicy beef stock dipping sauce.

name: Butter Chicken Empanadas
description: Love classic butter chicken? How about traditional empanadas? Chef Akhtar's genius snack or party-platter food combines the best of both into perfectly delicious packages. They're exactly what you think they are‚Äîbuttery pastry enveloping rich, flavorful, saucy butter chicken. Drizzle the creamy Indian-Spiced Buttermilk Ranch on top or use it as a dip. You‚Äôre going to want to add these to every order.

name: Tourlouk Aka Greek Ratatouille
description: Tourlouk (meaning 'all mixed up') is a delicious way of cooking garden vegetables, including sweet bell peppers, zucchini, eggplant, and onion, in a bright, zesty tomato and fresh herb sauce. Think of it as the Greek version of French ratatouille. Chef Jona pairs it with juicy seared Portabella mushrooms, infused with the flavors of garlic and oregano, plus a hearty serving of tender brown lentils and fluffy Basmati rice. It all adds up to a satisfying plant-powered meal you‚Äôll crave again and again. Bonus points for flexibility: 'You can enjoy it hot or at room temperature,' he says.

name: Mexican Chorizo Quesadilla
description: Chef Maribel is sharing her go-to quesadilla that she eats at least once a week at home. Tortillas are cooked on la plancha (a cast iron skillet), then filled with cheese, potatoes, and Mexican chorizo cooked with what Chef calls the Mexican trinity‚Äîonions, tomatoes, and jalape√±os. A tasty tomatillo salsa and a side serving of Mexican red rice with vegetables makes this the ideal meal any night of the week.

name: Impossible Burger with Mushrooms and Sweet Potato Wedges
description: This is everything you love about a burger, except it's made with vegan ImpossibleTM 'meat'. Flavorful and satisfying, top it with onion, tomato, arugula, and mushrooms, and savor it with a side of sweet potato wedges.

name: Creamy Leek Potato Soup
description: A classic combination for good reason. Sweet, fragrant leeks and creamy potatoes meld beautifully when cooked until tender in butter and rich chicken stock, then blended to velvet smoothness. Top your serving with crunchy herbed croutons for a delightful textural contrast. Enjoy it warmed, or take a tip from Chef James and try it the French way: 'Hold the croutons to use in another CookUnity dish, drink this soup cold from the fridge, and it‚Äôs vichyssoise!'

name: Whipped Feta Zaatar Pita Crisps
description: These lightly toasted pita crisps seasoned with a za‚Äôatar spice blend are extremely addictive, especially when you have them with Chef Emily's lemon-thyme whipped vegan feta dip and carrot sticks. This is a versatile healthy snack perfect for midday munchies. Or pair it with a big Greek salad and hummus for a full meal inspired by a Mediterranean mezze platter!

name: Creamy Egg Salad
description: Egg salad is a timeless classic that never disappoints. For her version, Chef Meena combines perfectly hard-boiled eggs, creamy mayonnaise, and a hint of mustard and paprika for added zest, then enhances the mix with crisp red onions, briny pickle relish, and fresh chives and parsley. Enjoy it on its own, spread it on slices of toasted bread for a satisfying sandwich, or pair it with fresh salad greens for light, refreshing, anytime meal.

name: Moilee Coconut Curry with Shrimp
description: Wholesome, creamy, fresh, and flavorful, this coconut-based shrimp curry is a crowd-pleasing South Indian dish. Plump shrimp are marinated in turmeric and spices, then gently cooked in a mild coconut milk broth flavored with curry leaves, ginger, mustard seeds, tamarind, and more aromatics. Enjoy a double portion of this comforting seafood dish alongside a side of rice or noodles and your favorite veggies.

name: Cornbread Apple Stuffing Sage Gravy
description: Cornbread and apples are a match made in culinary heaven, and this hearty stuffing brings out the best in both. The ideal accompaniment to any of your seasonal feasts, this stuffing marries the comforting flavors of cornbread with the sweetness of apples. A sage-infused gravy ties all of the flavors together in perfect harmony.

name: Chicken Veggie Fried Rice Bowl
description: Here's a healthy and well-rounded dish that's not just kid-friendly, but designed with kids in mind. Chef Esther's veggie fried rice features carrots, corn, and peas, plus fluffy scrambled eggs, and gets served with juicy roasted chicken thighs for added protein. A side of sweet & savory bibimbap sauce is the perfect finishing touch to drizzle on top.

name: Rigatoni with Mushroom Bolognese
description: This delicious pasta entr√©e is so hearty that you almost wouldn't believe that it's vegetarian. Fresh cremini mushrooms, porcini, onions, carrots, and bell peppers are cooked together in a fresh tomato sauce to make this rich mushroom Bolognese.

name: Braised Short Ribs with Red Wine Reduction
description: Another French-inspired classic! Chef Chris seasons, sears and slow cooks boneless short ribs in red wine and homemade beef stock with herbs and roasted vegetables until they are fall-apart tender. Served with spicy-sweet harissa carrots and the melt-in-your-mouth creamy buttermilk mashed potatoes, you may have a difficult time sharing this meal or even saving some for lunch. Chef highly recommends heating this meal in the microwave.

name: Beet Goat Cheese Arancini
description: Beets and goat cheese unite in Chef's creation, where cooked beets are pureed and blended into vibrant red risotto. The addition of goat cheese introduces a creamy, tangy element. The mixture is crafted into balls, coated in breadcrumbs, and crisped to perfection. The result is a harmonious medley of textures and flavors, with beet sweetness enhancing the richness of goat cheese, all encased in a satisfyingly crispy outer layer. Perfect as appetizers, snacks, or part of a larger meal.

name: Griddled Tofu Scallion Noodles
description: You've never tasted tofu like this! Chef Yong and Wanting marinate tofu in their secret blend of Chinese spices, then sear it on the griddle until caramelized and irresistible. Served alongside spring noodles in a fragrant oil infused with scallions and delicate summer squash medley of zucchini, squash, and carrots, this dish is guaranteed to satisfy vegetarians and meat-eaters alike!

name: Pork al Pastor Tacos
description: All the flavors of a taco truck in your very own kitchen! These tacos are made in the traditional Mexican style of slow-roasting an adobo-rubbed pork shoulder. Chef Akhtar serves the tender, smoky pork on soft corn tortillas and tops them with sweet cubed pineapple and zesty charred salsa verde.

name: Baileys Irish Cream Cake Jar
description: Indulge in decadence with our Baileys-infused vanilla cake jar. Layers of moist vanilla cake are infused with Bailey's Irish Cream and filled with an Irish cream mousse, creating a heavenly blend of flavors and textures in every spoonful. (contains alcohol)

name: Ranchero Chicken Pollo Ranchero
description: Chef Santo's recipe has perfectly baked chicken breast, marinated in a smokey, mild guajillo chili sauce. Served with authentic Mexican rice and oven roasted red onion, zucchini, carrots and yellow squash.

name: Vegan Beyond Burger
description: Beyond burger with a sophisticated addition of confit tomato and shallot, thyme aioli, and seeded Vegan bun.

name: Jamaican Callaloo
description: This flavorful veggie-rich meal features callaloo sauteed with onion, tomato, garlic, habanero peppers, and green and red peppers. Enjoy it with a side of bulgur and peas, lightly garnished with scallion and fresh thyme.

name: Green Curry Braised Chicken Thighs
description: In this dish, juicy boneless, skin-on chicken thighs are seared off then braised in a fragrant coconut curry broth. Aromatic and creamy, the Thai-style green curry has the perfect level of spice and heat to keep you coming back for bite after bite. Served with saut√©ed bok choy and carrots with a side jasmine rice to soak up every drop of the curry sauce, this dish will warm you up from the inside out!

name: Pepperoni Naan Pizza
description: Indulge in an irresistible, instantly crave-able naan pizza, a culinary creation that combines the best of Indian and Italian flavors. Soft and pillowy naan bread is the perfect base for a medley of mouthwatering toppings. A layer of tangy tomato sauce is spread over the naan, followed by a generous helping of fresh Mozzarella cheese and sliced pepperoni. The finishing touch is a drizzle of hot pepper-infused honey to add a delightful sweet-and-spicy kick that will keep you coming back bite after bite. This unique twist on pizza is sure to become an instant favorite.

name: Pakistani Short Rib Nihari
description: Indulge in Chef's special Short Rib Nihari, a traditional Pakistani slow-braised curry bursting with mouth-watering flavors and tender beef. Mellow, warm spices like cardamom, coriander, and fennel are a perfect match for rich short ribs, especially when they're topped with crispy fried shallots for a delightful crunch. Savor it alongside warm naan bread to soak up the sauce and peas pulao, a fragrant rice and green pea pilaf, for a truly comforting meal.

name: Grilled Garlic Butter Shrimp
description: Orzo is prepared Mediterranean style with ripe grape tomatoes, fresh parsley, Feta cheese and a drizzle of Olive Oil. Jumbo garlic butter seasoned shrimp is grilled to perfection to accompany the orzo.

name: Classic Chicken Cordon Bleu
description: Chef Ruben takes on the traditional French dish chicken cordon bleu, and the result is‚Äîof course‚Äîdelicious! Tender chicken breast is pounded thin, rolled around a ham and Swiss cheese filling, then the whole thing gets finished with a panko breadcrumb coating. Crispy on the outside, juicy and cheesy on the inside, Chef pairs the rich chicken with a simple side of saut√©ed green beans and cherry tomatoes. Pink peppercorns add a floral, zesty flavor to the rich cream sauce Chef serves up on the side. Enjoy a taste of the classic French bistro in your very own kitchen.

name: Zesty Garlic Baked Chicken Wrap
description: Chef Abe‚Äôs light but flavorful baked chicken wrap is seasoned with the Indonesian spice blend bumbu samawa, which includes garlic, coriander, lemongrass, turmeric, kaffir lime leaves, many more good for you fresh spices. Enjoy tender baby spinach and juicy cherry tomatoes in every bite plus two dipping sauces on the side, an Indonesian sweet soy sauce and creamy candlenut sauce.

name: Bbq Turkey Veggie Meatloaf
description: An amazing dish that is super healthy everyone will enjoy!

name: Adobo Spare Ribs with Garlic Rice
description: Rich bone-in pork spare ribs are braised with traditional Filipino flavors like soy, garlic, and brown sugar until fork tender. The irresistible pork spare ribs are finished with a finger-licking good Adobo sauce and served with blanched baby bok choy, macerated red onions, and garlicky steamed jasmine rice. Prepare to be transported to the Philippines with one taste of Chef Stacy's homestyle cooking.

name: South Indian Style Chicken Curry
description: A spicy and aromatic chicken curry inspired by the flavors of the southern regions of India. This chicken curry is for anyone who loves a spicy curry- the dish is made with an array of spices including turmeric, coriander, garam masala. Chunks of potatoes makes this curry very hearty, while the hint of cilantro adds a touch of freshness. This dish can be paired with some raita or plain yogurt to cool down the heat.

name: Kale Salad with Goat Cheese
description: Enjoy a mix of julienned kale with walnuts, tangy goat cheese, and sweet dried cranberries, all dressed in a luscious honey-mustard vinaigrette. This is the perfect side salad to accompany any entr√©e, or add your favorite protein and call it a meal.

name: French Onion Soup Burger
description: What's better than one comfort food classic? Two classics brought together in one over-the-top delicious dish. Chef Akhtar's French onion-soup inspired burger features a juicy beef patty topped with two kinds of cheese‚Äîparmesan and Gruy√®re‚Äîas well as saut√©ed mushrooms and spinach. When you're ready to enjoy, pour over the French onion soup sauce and dive in. Extra napkins not included.

name: Beef Stuffed Pepper
description: A Middle Eastern version of a classic stuffed pepper.

name: Cinnamon Apple Greek Yogurt Parfait
description: Start your day off on the right foot with this parfait and savor the layers of flavor and texture! Creamy honey-flavored Greek yogurt is layered with Chef Jose's signature saucy apples that have been braised with Mexican cinnamon (canela). A sprinkling of crunchy flax and pumpkin seed granola on top provides the perfect textural contrast to this fall-inspired parfait.

name: Mediterranean Pan Seared Cod
description: Chef Angelia gently seasons this cod with sweet paprika and cumin, then pan-sears it in olive oil until tender and flaky. She serves it on top of a light, refreshing salad of al dente orzo pasta tossed with fresh Italian parsley, baby spinach leaves, crisp cucumber, sweet red bell pepper, and both bright-green Castelvetrano and dark, super-briny Kalamata olives‚Äîall in a lemony olive oil vinaigrette. Tangy crumbled Feta provides the perfect finishing touch for a meal that helps you stay nourished with no sacrifices.

name: Brown Butter Trout Almondine
description: The subtly sweet, delicate Trout is gently enhanced by a sauce made with a caramelized butter sauce, studded with the nutty crunch of almonds and a bright hint of lemon - a French bistro classic.

name: Nikkei Chicken Soba Noodles
description: East meets West in this dish where a century of Japanese immigrants' influence on Peruvian cuisine is highlighted. A flavorful furikake-crusted chicken breast is paired with tender, nutty soba noodles and served alongside stir-fried peppers and cabbage. Pour an umami-rich shiitake mushroom broth over the noodles and chicken to transform the whole dish into a delectable, slurp-able soup.

name: Three Cheese Tortellini with Shrimp
description: Garlic Sauteed Shrimp, a creamy and cheesy roasted garlic sauce, folded in with three cheese tortellini & fresh spinach, perfect comfort food!

name: Roasted Salmon with Brussel Sprouts
description: This dish is healthy and beautifully balanced. Chef Andres has simply roasted salmon to perfection and topped it with a subtle lobster sauce. Grilled brussel sprouts and asparagus give you a healthy dose of veggies. You will love everything about this dish, and it will leave you feeling nourished!

name: Green Glow Detox Soup
description: This creamy soup is made with organic ingredients, including chickpeas, broccoli, celery, and spinach. It‚Äôs packed with essential vitamins, minerals, and nutrients to support the body's natural detox process and promote overall wellness. Treat yourself well with a nourishing meal that‚Äôs both nutritious and delicious!

name: Braised Pork Shank with Lemon Polenta
description: This dish is pure Italian comfort. Pork shank is slowly braised in a savory sauce made with tomato, herbs, and red wine, then plated atop a bed of citrusy, fluffy lemon polenta with a side of garlicky green beans. Hearty and warming, you can taste the love in every bite.

name: Roasted Aji Panca Miso Salmon
description: If you eat with your eyes, then you can already see how incredible this dish is going to be. Chef Walther bathes each salmon fillet in a marinade of spicy/smoky aji panca chiles and red miso paste for extra depth of savory flavor, then roasts to perfection and tops with a spoonful of bright, acidic chimichurri sauce. He plates it with nutty, protein-packed quinoa tossed with Peruvian-style pesto, which adds queso fresco and Parmesan (plus extra for garnish) to the traditional anise-flavored blend of fresh basil, spinach, and extra-virgin olive oil. On the side: tender-crisp roasted asparagus spears. With its blend of high protein, fiber, and good-for-you fats, this is a perfect post-workout meal that tastes as great as it looks.

name: Sun Dried Tomato Braised Chicken
description: Sun-dried tomatoes lend their tangy sweetness to this braised chicken dish, where tender golden-seared thighs soak up a fragrant white wine and herb-laced tomato sauce. It‚Äôs served over a creamy cannellini bean and spinach pur√©e, then finished with a sharp crumble of feta cheese. Consider your carb craving curbed, and full flavor in effect.

name: Thyme Roasted Chicken
description: Chef Vincent's tangy roasted chicken is a culinary delight, marinated in a zesty blend of fresh thyme, garlic, Dijon mustard, and lemon. The tender, juicy chicken is perfectly roasted and delivers a punch of herbaceous flavor with every bite, perfectly balanced by a touch of honey for sweetness. The chicken is a protein-packed, satisfying centerpiece for your meal, especially when paired with garlicky mashed potatoes and honey-glazed carrots. It's the ideal choice for a quick and healthy, yet gourmet feeling dinner.

name: Filipino Beef Kaldereta
description: Beef Kaldereta is a spicy Filipino tomato-based stew, where beef brisket is simmered until the meat is tender enough to melt in your mouth. Served alongside steamed jasmine rice, Chef Nora's Beef Kaldereta is a hearty and satisfying dish that promises rich flavors and comforting aromas.

name: Jollof Pasta Grilled Chicken Suya
description: Jollof is one of the most popular dishes in West Africa, and while it's typically made with rice, in this dish Chef Pierre takes the sauce and flavors of jollof and mixes them into al dente pasta instead. The sweet, slightly smoky, umami-filled sauce is the perfect complement to Chef's grilled chicken suya. Garnished with fresh Italian parsley, this dish is sophisticated yet ultra comforting.

name: Classic Meatloaf
description: Sometimes all you need is a serving of old school comfort food. Chef Michael‚Äôs tender, savory meatloaf is made with a blend of premium ground beef and pork, seasoned and baked to juicy perfection. The meatloaf is served alongside creamy mashed potatoes, whipped to a silky smooth texture and topped with savory homemade gravy. A side of caramelized Brussels sprouts add a delightful hint of sweetness that balances the hearty flavors of the meatloaf and potatoes. Together they make for a comforting classic dish that warms the soul with every bite.

name: Shrimp with Lobster Sauce
description: A classic Chinese takeout favorite, leveled up a notch. Tender shrimp are tossed in a light batter and fried until golden brown, then served alongside the rich, velvety lobster sauce, which you can use to drizzle atop the shrimp. Served with fragrant steamed white rice, corn, bell peppers, and peas, it's a bright and balanced dish you'll be craving week after week.

name: Sinigang Flip Bowl
description: Sinigang Beef Bowl - tamarind braised beef bowl with garlic coconut fried cauliflower rice with a medley of carrot, scallion, and roma tomatoes with seared baby bok choy and a tangy, tamarind au jus.

name: San Franciscostyle Garlic Noodles
description: Garlic lovers, this one‚Äôs for you. Inspired by the Vietnamese-American fusion dish born in the city by the bay, Chef Armando wok-fires fresh minced garlic in butter blended with just a touch of savory tamari, fish, and oyster sauces until its assertiveness is replaced with rich, caramelized sweetness, then tosses it with perfectly al dente spaghetti until every strand is coated. But wait, there‚Äôs more... Next, he saut√©s sweet, succulent shrimp in still more butter and garlic and piles them high on top of the noodles, garnished with fresh green onion. A side of tender-crisp steamed green beans complete this true San Francisco treat.

name: Cajun Shrimp with Andouille Sausage
description: Even though Chef Chris hails from Brooklyn, there is a lot of Southern influence in this meal and he would put his collard greens up against anyone‚Äôs! We love the interplay of the four components in this meal: the blackened Cajun shrimp, slices of oven-kissed Andouille sausage, roasted zucchini, squash, and red peppers, and those perfectly slow-cooked bacon-laced collards. Each individual bite is uniquely packed with flavor and together they make a complete meal bursting with Southern comfort. Oh, and it also happens to be completely gluten-free! Chef highly recommends heating this meal in the microwave.

name: Creamy Basil and Tomato Chicken
description: Tender chicken is covered in a creamy basil pesto and tomato sauce and paired with grilled asparagus for a flavor-packed, gluten-free dish.

name: Funfetti Vanilla Cake
description: BCakeNY's rainbow sprinkle vanilla cake is a colorful and fun dessert that is sure to make any day feel like a celebration. Made with a light and fluffy vanilla cake base, it is adorned with an array of rainbow sprinkles that add a playful crunch to every bite. Whether you're celebrating a birthday, graduation, or any special occasion, this rainbow sprinkle vanilla cake is the perfect way to add some festive flair to your table.

name: Pan Seared Salmon with Saffron Aioli
description: You'll swoon over this crisp pan-seared salmon fillet served with a creamy saffron sauce. Israeli couscous with fresh basil and parsley completes this healthy dish that will make any weeknight feel a little more sophisticated.

name: Smoky Tandoori Chicken
description: Chef Aarthi brings you a Delhi special featuring a comforting and addictive combo of smoky chicken with rajma chawal, a red kidney bean curry with rice. A bed of spinach balances out the meal. Chef highly recommends enjoying this meal with some sliced raw onions, cucumber, and a squeeze of lime.

name: Cuban Pork with Mojo De Ajo
description: Lechon, or Cuban pork, is heavily marinated with herbs, lime, and delicate spices. The pork is cooked over low heat until its fork tender. The mojo de ajo sauce is a staple of Cuban cooking and is bright and flavorful with onions, cilantro, cumin, and lots of lime. Chef Michelle serves her lechon with white rice, black beans (frijoles), and sweet plantains for a perfect balance of flavors and textures.

name: Steak Diane with Roasted Potatoes
description: This a classic French Staple - coarsely ground black peppercorns coat a tender piece of steak, seared until a golden brown crust is formed. Served with Roasted Potatoes and a sauce composed of shallots, butter, brandy, tomato, and mustard. A perfect Parisian meal.

name: Sundried Tomato Pesto Farro
description: Whole grain farro is rich in B vitamins, nutrients, and dietary fiber, and has a lovely nutty flavor and chewy texture. Chef Isaac dresses the farro with a sun dried tomato pesto filled with antioxidants, and serves it with roasted artichokes, tender grilled chicken, and fresh baby spinach.

name: Panko Crusted Salmon
description: We love how the delicate crisp crust of the salmon pairs nicely with creamy pur√©ed parsnips and a rich lemon-butter sauce. Classic garlic-roasted broccoli brings it all together with some flavorful crunch and freshness. This meal heats great in the microwave but if you really want to highlight the crispiness of the salmon‚Äôs crust, you can heat the salmon on some foil in a pre-heated 350-degree oven for 7-10 minutes.

name: Salmon Madras Curry
description: Savor the succulent roasted salmon marinated with salt and turmeric and served in a delicious curry sauce. Roasted garlicky broccoli and steamed Jasmine rice complete the meal.

name: Chicken Carnitas Burrito
description: The star of this dish is the chicken, which is prepared in the style of carnitas, slow roasted in a citrusy spiced marinade. The tender pulled chicken is tossed in a smoky and sweet chipotle BBQ sauce, then tucked into a whole wheat tortilla with melted Mexican cheeses. Served with herby rice and crunchy black bean salad with corn, peppers, and a tangy lime vinaigrette, this burrito ticks all the boxes.

name: Hot Honey Short Rib
description: Chef Cora‚Äôs creative short rib meal will satisfy your meat-and-potatoes cravings in a whole new way. Seared to lock in flavor, then slowly braised with red wine, the hearty beef is rich and meltingly tender. Traditional Greek Skordalia brings a garlicky element to the smooth, creamy whipped potatoes, while the sesame snap peas add contrasting crispness. Finally, Chef‚Äôs hot honey chili crunch brings an extra layer of spice to the party. It‚Äôs a captivating combination of flavors and textures that elevates any weeknight.

name: Chicken Scarpariello
description: Think of this dish like a power couple of two Italian classics. First up is Chicken Scarpariello, a delicious dish of pan-seared chicken breast paired with savory crumbled Italian sausage, roasted red peppers, and a light tomato sauce. The flavor-packed chicken is served alongside fusilli tossed in creamy, dreamy Alfredo sauce. What more could you want?!

name: Shrimp Cavatappi
description: A unique twist on shrimp and pasta, this dish combines the piquancy of roasted red peppers with the creamy richness of mascarpone cheese for a delicious result.

name: Harvest Farro Bowl
description: This harvest bowl is Chef Emily's favorite kind of meal, with texture galore and tons of nutrition. It's perfect for fall but also a delicious way to treat yourself to a healthy, hearty meal ‚Äî all year round. It's veggie-forward with macro and micro nutrients, plus flavor thanks to a sweet and savory pomegranate vinaigrette. A vegan's dream!

name: Tomatillo Cod Fish Bowl
description: Chef Maribel shares her favorite weeknight staple meal, starring flaky, tender cod (bacalao) cooked in a mild tomatillo sauce. The bowl also features Chef's creamy black beans, aromatic jasmine rice with peas and carrots, crispy roasted Brussels sprouts, and a garnish of roasted red bell peppers. A side of extra tomatillo sauce to bring the whole bowl together in a flavor-packed harmony.

name: Southern Soul Gumbo
description: Gumbo is perhaps the most literal melting pot of all dishes. Its influences range from African (okra) to French (roux) to Choctaw Indian (fil√© powder) to German, Spanish, Italian, and beyond. Chef Akhtar's take on Southern gumbo is true to tradition, packed with tender shrimp and spicy Andouille sausage, as well as veggies, rice, and spices. This is a hearty dish packed with flavors and textures that's sure to satisfy!

name: Pork Chop Sweet Potato Puree
description: Chef Santos serves up juicy grilled pork chop over a cozy base of sweet potato pur√©e. Get a burst of freshness from the apple and fennel salad, and just a little bit of heat from the chipotle crema.

name: Chicken Pad Krapow
description: Pad Kaprow is one of the most popular Thai street foods, with its crowd-pleasing balance of sweet, savory, and herbaceous flavor, with just a kick of heat. Stir-fried ground chicken is infused with fresh ginger, caramelized sugar, fish sauce, and oyster sauce until caramelized and crisped, creating that classic street fare flavor. Served with a side of kimchi on top of jasmine rice, Chef Phet serves his Kaprow a side of extra spicy chili sauce that can be added to your liking, depending on how spicy you want your Pad Krapow. We love that you can customize this dish to your preferred level of spice depending on how much of the chili sauce you use‚Äîjust be warned, it is quite hot, so start with a little!

name: Shrimp and Smoked Andouille Sausage Jambalaya
description: We love Chef Akhtar's eclectic spin on Jambalaya with layer-upon-layer of flavor. Made with juicy shrimp, smoky andouille sausage, charred zucchini, and a rich mushroom gravy, this is a classic Cajun dish.

name: Chipotle Lime Shrimp Bowl
description: Shrimp fried with coconut oil, breaded with almond flour and spices. Served with salad drizzled with chipotle mayo sauce.

name: Squash Blossoms and Pine Nut Ricotta
description: This uniquely summer salad is made with squash blossoms, zucchini, spinach and microgreens. To stuff these delicate blossoms, chef uses zesty, creamy ricotta filling. For a rich, earthy finish, use pine nuts, basil and parsley on top of the salad.

name: Aromatic Moroccan Shrimp Tagine
description: A traditional North African stew known for its richly spiced flavors, hearty Moroccan tagine is slow-cooked in a distinctive earthenware pot of the same name. This version combines the sweet flavors of dried fruits and tomato sauce with succulent shrimp and tender yellow squash, fragrant with warm spices like cinnamon, cumin, and ginger, served with fluffy couscous, topped with toasted sliced almonds and plump golden raisins.

name: Vegan Crab Cakes
description: This is a no seafood require vegan 'crab' cakes. Seasoned tempah cakes mixed with breadcrumbs and cooked golden brown with fennel and tomatoes. A dallop of basil-lemon aioli for a bright and creamy note on top. Add the carrots, cabbage, and arugula to complement the 'crab' cake.

name: Blueberry Banana Baked Oatmeal
description: A breakfast you‚Äôll be thinking about long before morning. Ripe bananas and juicy blueberries melt into baked oatmeal, infused with cinnamon, maple, and vanilla. A dollop of whipped honey ricotta adds just the right balance of creamy richness and subtle sweetness. A hearty and comforting way to start your day.

name: Chicken Tinga Quesadilla
description: Chef Ivy takes her incredible chicken tinga‚Äîpulled chicken that's been roasted with chipotle peppers and Mexican spices‚Äîand builds it into a hearty quesadilla packed with cotija and chihuahua cheese, two flavorful Mexican cheeses. All griddled between soft flour tortillas, the crave-worthy quesadilla is served with a side of fresh pico de gallo and Taj√≠n-infused chile-lime crema.

name: Dukkah Crusted Skirt Steak
description: It‚Äôs hard to beat the mouthwatering flavor of tender grilled skirt steak‚Äîespecially when it's crusted in Dukkah, a nutty Middle Eastern spice blend custom-made by Chef Anthony, and bathed in a luxurious, zesty green peppercorn sauce. On the side, there‚Äôs wholesome farro with melted leeks and crisp-tender green beans, tossed with mustard and sliced almonds. And on top, a garnish of pickled red onions adds bright, acidic contrast. Sophisticated, complex, and bursting with flavor, you'll fall in love with every component of this meal!

name: Pork Chops
description: This pork recipe is so versatile with how citrusy and sweet the sauce of this meal. Do yourself a favor and indulge to your pork chop meal.

name: Ethic Drinks Sustainable Cabernet Franc
description: This vibrant Cabernet Franc is all about elegance and layers of flavor. Juicy raspberry and red currant meet a touch of green pepper, fresh herbs, and delicate florals. Ethic Drinks keeps it clean‚Äîsustainably made, bottled in lightweight glass, and packed with recycled materials.

name: Turkey Chili
description: Chef Art Smith‚Äôs healthy take on a hearty chili is a favorite of Michelle Obama‚Äôs. Here, ground turkey is simmered in a tomato-based stock, and mixed with seasonal vegetables, pinto beans, and loads of herbs and spices. It‚Äôs served with a golden and buttery corn pudding.

name: Adobo Braised Pork Shoulder
description: Rich pork shoulder a.k.a. pork butt (the same cut used to make pulled pork) is braised with traditional Filipino flavors like soy, garlic, and brown sugar until fork tender. The irresistible shredded pork is finished with a finger-licking good Adobo sauce and served with blanched baby bok choy, macerated red onions, and garlicky steamed jasmine rice. Prepare to be transported to the Philippines with one taste of Chef Stacy's homestyle cooking.

name: Mexican Style Fettuccine Garlic Shrimp
description: A Mexican twist on spaghetti, like you've never tasted them before. Al dente fettuccine is tossed in a spectacular creamy Guajillo chili sauce, accompanied by some very, very delicious spiced shrimps. This is, without a doubt, a dish that you cannot miss!

name: Roasted Salmon In Caribbean Coconut Curry
description: Treat yourself to Chef Angelia's roasted salmon with creamy coconut curry, paired with tostones and red beans and rice. The salmon is simply cooked to tender perfection, while the Caribbean-inspired coconut curry adds a flavor-packed, aromatic element that perfectly complements the salmon. The tostones provide a crunchy pop of texture, while a side of red beans and rice complete the dish. Overall, this is a well-balanced and satisfying meal with bold, crave-worthy flavors.

name: Classic Chicken Salad
description: Chef Pat offers up his take on a traditional, crowd-pleasing chicken salad, a timeless classic. His version features diced juicy grilled chicken, Granny Smith apple, crunchy celery, red onion, fresh green grapes, and sliced almonds, all tossed in a mayonnaise-based dressing. Your favorite lunch just got even better.

name: Asian Pulled Pork Rice Bowl
description: Chef Esther slow-braises pork shoulder until it‚Äôs fall-apart tender, marinating it overnight in an umami-rich sauce, tricked up with lime and sesame. Served over hearty brown rice and topped with a crisp slaw of cabbage, carrot, and edamame, it‚Äôs tied together with a creamy sesame dressing.

name: Wellness Grilled Chicken
description: Chef Raymundo unveils a savory delight‚Äîa grilled chicken breast, thyme, and garlic medley served with wholesome farro and a melody of fresh, organic veggies‚Äîzucchini, corn, cauliflower, and cherry tomatoes. Ideal for the health-conscious palate.

name: Coriander Shrimp with Lemongrass Turmeric
description: Chef Abe presents his tantalizing creation: Coriander Shrimp with Turmeric & Lemongrass. This dish features perfectly saut√©ed shrimp bathed in a mouthwatering sauce crafted from coriander, turmeric, and lemongrass topped with fresh green onions.

name: Marry Me Beans
description: Meet Marry Me Beans, Chef Nahika's vegetarian take on the ever-popular Marry Me Chicken and a creamy, flavor-packed dish that‚Äôs sure to win hearts at the table. Tender butter beans are simmered in a luscious, savory tomato-cream sauce infused with garlic, onions, and aromatic herbs like thyme and basil. A touch of chili flake adds a subtle heat, while Parmesan cheese and a splash of heavy cream bring richness to the sauce. Served over fluffy white rice, this dish is comforting, indulgent, and irresistibly delicious‚Äîone bite, and you‚Äôll understand why it‚Äôs got Marry Me in the name.

name: White Truffle Mac and Cheese
description: Luxurious and elegant yet totally comforting, this pasta dish tastes like a warm hug. Al dente cavatappi pasta is folded with a creamy, stretchy white truffle-infused sauce made with three types of cheese: white cheddar, Swiss, and Parmesan. A crunchy Panko breadcrumb topping provides textural contrast for the perfect bite with every bite!

name: Barramundi In Mushroom Xo Sauce
description: In this Chinese-inspired dish, tender and flaky barramundi is seasoned simply and seared, then paired with a deeply savory, umami-filled mushroom XO sauce. The fish is served over a bed of saut√©ed bok choy and snow peas, accented with crispy fried shallots for a pop of texture and flavor. Fresh yet super satisfying, you'll savor every last bite of this unique dish.

name: Tenderloin Lomo Saltado Nikkei
description: Lomo Saltado is the best-known dish in Peruvian cuisine, and that's for a reason‚Äîit's undeniably delicious. It features Chinese and Japanese influences, Peruvian ingredients, and Chef Sergio's own spin based on his family's recipe. Cubes of tenderloin steak are stir-fried with snow peas and onions in a smoky soy-based sauce, then served atop Nikkei-style French fries in the traditional style of Lomo Saltado. Paired with buttered rice, it's the perfect example of Nikkei-style cooking and its seamless blending of Peruvian and Japanese cuisines.

name: Chicken Parmesan with Fresh Mozzarella
description: Ever wish you could try chicken parmesan made by a top chef? Now you can, in your very own kitchen. Lightly breaded chicken breast is topped with fresh sliced mozzarella for melty, creamy goodness, and finished with Chef Michelle's homemade tomato sauce, made with Italian tomatoes, fresh basil, and the slightest hint of good olive oil. Served with a simple side of broccoli topped with a garlic-fresh herb compound butter, this dish is as good as it gets!

name: Beet and Goat Cheese Arancini
description: Beets and goat cheese unite in Chef's creation, where cooked beets are pureed and blended into vibrant red risotto. The addition of goat cheese introduces a creamy, tangy element. The mixture is crafted into balls, coated in breadcrumbs, and crisped to perfection. The result is a harmonious medley of textures and flavors, with beet sweetness enhancing the richness of goat cheese, all encased in a satisfyingly crispy outer layer. Perfect as appetizers, snacks, or part of a larger meal.

name: Lomo Saltado Peruvian Flat Iron Steak and Fries
description: Lomo saltado is an iconic Peruvian dish, featuring tender flat iron steak marinated with soy sauce, garlic, and Aji Amarillo. The steak is stir-fried with tomatoes, red onions, and crispy french fries, served with a spicy jalape√±o sauce and a side of steamed rice.

name: Peruvian Chicken Stir Fry Pollo Saltado
description: Lomo Saltado is an extremely popular Peruvian dish of fusion cuisine that combines the Chinese technique of stir-frying with Peruvian flavors like aji amarillo chile, cilantro, garlic, and tomato. Chef Fabiola's version substitutes lean chicken for the traditional steak for a slightly lighter take. As always, this irresistible dish is accompanied by white rice and crispy fried potato wedges.

name: Southern Low Country Boil
description: Enjoy an authentic and comforting taste of the South. Cajun-spiced shrimp, clams, corn, potatoes, and the traditional hard-boiled eggs are all boiled low and slow in Cajun seasonings until each element is perfectly cooked. The seafood boil is served alongside buttery rice studded with tender pieces of lobster meat for even more richness. Chef Santiago captures the essence of the region and the seafood boil tradition in this comforting dish.

name: Chicken Spinach Pita
description: Chef Cedric‚Äôs perfectly portable stuffed sandwich is good to go anywhere you‚Äôre headed‚Äîwhether that‚Äôs the dinner table or the pool patio. He layers juicy, tender shredded chicken breast, creamy Mozzarella cheese, and a hearty fresh spinach salad inside a toasty grilled pita. Drizzle on the accompanying fresh basil pesto to add bright, herbal, nutty flavor‚Äîand there‚Äôs plenty extra if you‚Äôd like to use some as a dip for a side of crudit√©.

name: Savory Turkey Meatballs
description: Savor these succulent turkey meatballs, seasoned to perfection and pan-seared for a golden crust, then simmered in a rich marinara sauce. Each bite is paired with a creamy dollop of fresh burrata, creating a harmonious blend of flavors and textures. This protein-packed dish is both satisfying and indulgent, perfect for a wholesome and nourishing meal.

name: Masala Beef Kebab
description: Chef Aarthi transforms one of her favorite street foods into a full, balanced meal. The kebab, made of succulent, lightly spicy ground beef, is flavored with mint, ginger, and house-made garam masala and served over Indian-style rice (flavored with lime and spices). Meanwhile, a luscious mint-cucumber yogurt dip cools things down and a side of vegetables completes the meal.

name: Roasted Barramundi with Couscous
description: Roasted barramundi cooked to perfection. Served with sauteed green beans and fluffed couscous. Finished with a creamy mint/lemon yogurt to bring the light delicious and guilt-free meal together.

name: Grilled Grass Fed Skirt Steak Herbed Frites
description: Tender grass fed skirt steak gets lightly seasoned with smoked paprika, perfectly grilled and sliced to order, then topped with an herb compound butter. Chef Chris pairs this picture perfect steak with oven-roasted herbed frites, whole roasted tomatoes, and, of course, a tarragon-infused aioli for dipping. Bring the French steakhouse home with this delicious dish.

name: Shrimp Pad Thai with Crushed Peanuts
description: Chef Miguel recreates the magic of Bangkok‚Äôs bustling street stalls with this vibrant Pad Thai. Plump shrimp and tender rice noodles soak up a punchy tamarind sauce‚Äîsweet, sour, and deeply savory. A final toss of bean sprouts, scallions, and scrambled egg adds texture and freshness, while crushed peanuts and a squeeze of lime bring a nutty, zesty finish.

name: Stewed Epis Chicken Okra
description: Get ready for some comfort food, Caribbean-style.
