Chef Nahika Hillery marinates boneless chicken thighs in epis, the essential Haitian blend of peppers, garlic, and herbs, then stews them to tender perfection with okra, tomatoes, onions, and a medley of Caribbean peppers. On the side, another West Indian classic pairing: rice and beans, in this case, fluffy long-grain Jasmine rice and tender red kidney beans. The result is a soulful, satisfying meal that‚Äôs going to find a regular spot on your weekly rotation.

name: Yam Chickpea Cauliflower Curry
description: This vibrant, plant-based curry brings together soft sweet yams, earthy chickpeas, and the subtle bite of tender cauliflower. Simmered in a rich coconut milk sauce infused with fragrant Indian spices, it‚Äôs a deeply flavorful, satisfying dish. Served over aromatic basmati rice to soak up every last drop.

name: Vietnamese Chicken
description: This is a Vietnamese version of chicken breast with ginger, cilantro, and scallions, caramelized on top with brown sugar for a sweet kick. Served with roasted broccoli and basmati rice.

name: Chickpea and Mushroom Marsala
description: This mushroom Marsala is made with tender baby portobello mushrooms and chickpeas simmered in a garlicky Marsala wine sauce and served over a bed of creamy polenta.

name: American Style Greek Salad
description: Everyone's lunchtime go-to, served just the way you like it. Chef Chase packs his American-style Greek salad full of baby gem lettuce, red onion, tomato, Kalamata olives, cucumber, bell pepper, and feta cheese. To bring the whole salad together, drizzle in Chef Chase's Greek vinaigrette, toss, and dig in! Served with a side of creamy hummus and naan flatbread, this balanced, bright dish is as delicious as it is nutritious.

name: Vegan Nicoise Salad
description: Everything you love about the Mediterranean classic, except powered with plant-based protein. Chef Anne trades tuna for creamy chickpeas, then piles on tender fresh arugula leaves, crisp blanched green beans, briny Kalamata olives, strips of sweet roasted red bell pepper, and savory vegan Feta cheese. Drizzle on her French vinaigrette, a simple and simply delicious blend of extra-virgin olive oil, red wine vinegar, and Dijon mustard, and dig in to a hearty, healthy lunch or dinner.

name: Southwest Taco Lasagna
description: Just a fun, fresh twist on the Italian classic, with a Tex-Mex flair and flavor profile. I replace lasagna sheet noodles for flour tortillas, mozzarella with Monterey Jack cheese.

name: West Indian Coconut Chickpea Curry
description: Flavorful and filling, Chef Nahika's coconut chickpea curry is bursting with the vibrant flavors of the West Indies. Chock full of hearty, healthy ingredients like chickpeas, coconut milk, spices, and a medley of colorful vegetables, this curry is served alongside fragrant jasmine rice. Savor a symphony of flavors that will take your tastebuds on a culinary journey to the Caribbean.

name: Viet Beef Stew
description: This meal brings me back so much memories as my Vietnamese friend's b√≤ kho, a Vietnamese style beef stew. If you‚Äôve only had American or French style beef stew, you‚Äôre missing out. The broth has so many layers of flavor due to the lemongrass, star anise, ginger, garlic and other aromatics. This is best served with white rice.

name: Mediterranean Farro Bowl
description: This hearty and healthy bowl is a must-try for anyone who loves the flavors of the Mediterranean. Roasted red peppers, artichoke hearts, chickpeas, Kalamata olives, and feta cheese are served up on a bed of nutty farro. The bowl is finished with toasted pine nuts and Chef Adriana's tzatziki ranch, which brings a creamy, tangy richness to balance out all the fresh elements.

name: Baja Style Shrimp Bowl
description: Chef Andres puts his own spin on a traditional Mexican dish from the Baja region, where seafood is king. This healthy bowl is packed with grilled Cajun-spiced shrimp, served over a bed of seasoned black beans and tricolor quinoa. Paired with a tangy cabbage slaw and topped with sliced scallions and a drizzle of slightly spicy creamy chipotle-lime aioli, this is a bowl full of fresh flavor.

name: Entrana Steak with Smashed Potatoes
description: Prized for its rich, beefy flavor, Chef Cedric‚Äôs traditional grilled Entra√±a (skirt) steak will get you into Argentinian asado mode. He pairs a hearty portion with grilled broccolini and tender fingerling potatoes‚Äîroasted, smashed, and tossed with smoky paprika. Finally, there‚Äôs the herbaceous and slightly spicy chimichurri sauce that‚Äôs a must for any Argentinian steak dinner. Drizzle it on, and dig into a truly elevated meat-and-potatoes combination.

name: Tamarind Sweet Chili Tofu
description: Sweet, tangy, and crispy, vegan food has never tasted so good. Tofu is lightly fried until crispy, then glazed with Chef Hong's special tamarind and sweet chili sauce that's sweet, tangy, and finger-licking good. Served with a blend of quinoa and roasted broccolini, this dish is a modern Thai cooking at its best.

name: Shrimp Curry with Spicy Tomato Sauce
description: An aromatic shrimp curry made with a spicy tomato sauce with hints of tamarind. This curry is spicy yet mildly sweet from the coconut milk. Served with a bed of fluffy Basmati Rice.

name: Seared Salmon with Berry Glaze
description: This is a vibrant and simple dish made with crisp seared salmon topped with a berry glaze for a hint of sweetness. It's served with chives and spinach saut√©ed in olive oil.

name: Leche Flan Cheesecake
description: Chef Nora masterfully combines two beloved desserts into one irresistible creation. It has the unbelievably creamy texture of flan, the traditional Latin baked custard, and the signature cream cheese and lemony tanginess of a traditional cheesecake. The result is rich and velvet-smooth‚Äîand made even more tantalizing with a drizzle of caramel syrup. You deserve a treat‚Äîthis one!

name: Jerk Chicken Bowl
description: This bowl full of Caribbean-inspired favorites will delight your tastebuds and satisfy your hunger. Chef Nahika's Jerk Chicken Bowl features succulent grilled chicken seasoned to perfection with Jamaican jerk spices, plated on a base of bulgur and pigeon peas. To take the bowl from good to great, Chef adds a sweet-and-savory grilled pineapple and corn salad, saut√©ed onions and peppers, and a jerk dressing to tie it all together. A delightful harmony of spicy, tangy, and savory, this bowl promises a taste of the Caribbean in every bite.

name: Buffalo Chicken Enchilada Bake
description: Good, creamy and a kick of spicy. You will love this sensational chicken enchilada bake.

name: Tabbouleh Quinoa Salad
description: In this fresh take on a Middle Eastern staple, quinoa replaces the traditional bulgur to add even more protein to this satisfying dish. The tabbouleh-inspired salad is loaded with marinated cucumbers, baby kale, and tons of fresh herbs, all in a bright lemon vinaigrette. Enjoy this salad on its own for a light lunch, or pair with your favorite protein for a delicious, nutritious dinner.

name: Pulled Pork Barbecue Sandwich
description: Piled high with tender, smoky shredded pork, smothered in tangy barbecue sauce, topped with Creamy Coleslaw, and nestled between two toasted potato buns, Chef Pat‚Äôs Pulled Pork Barbecue Sandwich is the ultimate comfort-food experience. Pair it with potato chips, mac and cheese, or a simple green salad... and plenty of extra napkins.

name: Creamy Pumpkin Spice Oatmeal
description: Infused with aromatic cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves, swirled with naturally sweet roasted pumpkin, and topped with crunchy maple-roasted pepitas, this bowl of warm, creamy oatmeal starts your day with the cozy, comforting flavors of fall. You can also take comfort in the nutrition‚Äîit contains 17g protein and 8g fiber to keep you satisfied all morning.

name: Pan Seared Wild Caught Halibut with Cauliflower Two Ways
description: This delectable roasted wild-caught halibut is complemented by the sweet and savory addition of capers and golden raisins, a rich cauliflower puree, and the lovely texture of roasted cauliflower.

name: New Orleans Shrimp Grits
description: This dish was a huge success at my restaurant in New York City,‚Äù says Chef Anne. It‚Äôll become a favorite at your place, too. Inspired by the flavors and ingredients of New Orleans, she combines succulent saut√©ed shrimp and spicy Andouille sausage with luscious smoked paprika butter and serves a hearty portion atop a bed of creamy smoked Cheddar grits (AKA Southern-style polenta), garnished with fresh green onion for an extra pop of color and flavor. If you‚Äôre craving a soulful, satisfying meal that‚Äôs packed with flavor, you can‚Äôt go wrong with this one.

name: Fettuccine Alfredo with Rosemary Chicken Breast
description: Dive into this decadent pasta dish from Chef David that's rich and super satisfying! Classic, cheesy and creamy Fettuccine Alfredo meets its match in a gorgeous brown-butter basted chicken breast. The chicken is tender and juicy with an aroma that fills the room with wonderful notes of rosemary and thyme. Served with a side of parmesan-garlic roasted broccoli and topped with even more parmesan, this dish delivers serious comforting flavor.

name: Green Goddess Freekeh Salad
description: Elevate your palate with a wholesome salad that tastes as good as it is for you. This verdant salad features freekeh, a nutty grain similar to farro, as well as baby arugula, marinated cucumbers, and pickled onions. Topped with spiced roasted sweet potatoes wedges and grilled hearty halloumi cheese, a creamy pesto green goddess dressing ties the whole dish together in herby harmony.

name: Truffle Mashed Potatoes with Chives
description: Let the Forgione's take the stress out of your holiday meal, and thank us later. Silky mashed potatoes with cream, butter, and the perfect accent of truffle oil turn this classic Thanksgiving side into an elevated dish. Be warned: these potatoes are so good, they may just pull focus from the main dish ‚Äî sorry to your turkey!

name: Pumpkin Spice Risotto
description: The ultimate fall comfort food. Creamy pumpkin spice risotto, topped with crispy nutrient packed roasted pepitas. Served with a balsamic vinaigrette.

name: Cinnamon Braised Chicken
description: Chef Cora leans into bold Mediterranean flavors with this comforting yet vibrant dish. Chicken breast is rubbed with a fragrant cinnamon spice blend, then braised low and slow with onions, tomatoes, and oregano. It‚Äôs served alongside lemony orzo, garlicky grilled broccolini, and crumbled feta, with a final squeeze of lemon for extra zest. A nourishing, aromatic feast that‚Äôs both hearty and refreshing.

name: Beef Bourguignon with Tagliatelle
description: From Chef Ludo's kitchen to your table! This is a perfect version of one of the most classic French dishes, composed of melt-in-your-mouth tender braised short rib in a rich red wine sauce with mushrooms, bacon and pearl onions. Chef Ludo serves his Bourguignon over tagliatelle pasta just like he used to eat back in Burgundy.

name: Thai Quinoa Tofu Bowl
description: This Thai-inspired bowl is a flavor parade. Fluffy quinoa plays backdrop to crisp cabbage and carrot, while tofu‚Äîdusted in curry spices‚Äîbrings some heat to the party. Tossed with soft onions and fresh herbs, it‚Äôs drizzled in a velvety peanut dressing infused with tamari, lime, and chili. A final sprinkle of toasted peanuts ties everything together with crunch.

name: Vegan Southwest Style Breakfast Tacos
description: These breakfast tacos are packed with protein, veggies, and flavor! Stuff soft corn tortillas with vegan JUST Egg scrambled 'eggs', smoky black beans, saut√©ed peppers and onions, and roasted sweet potatoes, then drizzle with smoky vegan chipotle crema. These Southwest-inspired tacos are not only gluten-free, nut-free, and nutrient-dense, but also a delicious, filling way to start your day (or really any time of day) off on the right food.

name: Tofu Tikka Masala
description: This flavorful dish is Chef Cami's vegan twist on one of the most ubiquitous Indian dishes. Marinated tofu is cooked in a super creamy-yet-still-vegan tomato sauce with aromatic warming spices like cumin, coriander, and garam masala. Served alongside basmati rice and a bright mango chutney that adds fruity tang to each bite, you may just find yourself craving this dish week after week.

name: Cajun Blackened Shrimp Grits
description: Chef Chase's take on a Southern staple features succulent shrimp crusted in blackening spices then saut√©ed to perfection, paired with a side of oven-baked cheese grits. Finished with a decadent Cajun cream sauce, this dish is a modernized version of shrimp and grits that's just as comforting as the original.

name: Chopped Bbq Brisket Sandwich
description: Everyone loves low and slow smoked BBQ brisket. It is a classic BBQ combo right on time for the summer but beloved year-round. Chef Chris' version is pitch perfect, chopped, piled high on a potato bun, and topped with bread and butter pickles. Paired with Chef's creamy homestyle coleslaw, this dish is a little taste of Southern comfort.

name: Parmesan Roasted Cod
description: A rich seafood and flavorful dish to warm up your nights. Cod fillets are drizzled in a lemon-Dijon vinaigrette, broccoli, kale and walnuts tossed together on the side, drizzled with parmesan.

name: Sausage Peppers with Dirty Rice
description: This bowl from Chef Esther is a masterful mashup of global flavors. Smoky sausage, sweet red peppers, and fragrant basil come together in a tomato-rich sauce that seeps into the rice, giving it that ‚Äúdirty‚Äù color. A side of cucumber salad, tossed in soy and rice vinegar with a hint of chili, cuts through with a cool, crisp bite.

name: French Ham Cheese Croissant
description: Start your day on a high note with this classic French breakfast dish, featuring a buttery croissant stuffed with ham and Swiss cheese. Enjoy it with the baby mixed greens salad and light lemon vinaigrette on the side for a refreshing feel.

name: Cranberry Orange Sauce
description: Chef Nelson's cranberry sauce strikes the perfect balance between sweet and tart. Here a delightful blend of cranberries, orange marmalade, zesty ginger, and warm cinnamon create the perfect accompaniment for your Thanksgiving feast.

name: Hanger Steak with Tahini
description: Steak is seasoned with salt and pepper. Chef perfected the tahini mixture with red beets on the side drizzled with chili dressing topped with scallions and red pepper flakes.

name: Barramundi with Salsa Verde
description: A beautiful filet of Barramundi‚Äîa sustainable, mild white fish‚Äîis seasoned and cooked simply to let the quality of the fish speak for itself. Chef pairs the pan-seared fish with a bright, tangy salsa verde made with fresh herbs and salty capers, plus a side of baby spinach saut√©ed with shallots and a touch of olive oil. A squeeze of lemon over the top brings the whole dish together.

name: Chicken Patty
description: This low-carb chicken patty with tomato butter loaded with flavor combines them with decadent butter and cabbage. Makes for a satisfying weeknight treat for one.

name: Rigatoni with Chicken Ricotta Meatballs
description: For Chef Pino, this dish is pure comfort, and one he grew up eating at home in Florence. Thyme-laced chicken and ricotta meatballs melt into a herby tomato sauce, clinging to elegant tubes of rigatoni and filling every bite with nostalgic Italian flavors. It‚Äôs a recipe so cherished, he still makes it for his now-adult kids every Sunday.

name: Roasted Jalapeno Feta Egg Bites
description: Looking to spice up your breakfast routine? Try Livy's cilantro pesto egg bites! The roasted jalape√±o and charred onion add a smoky depth to the dish, while the feta cheese gives it a tangy kick. And, of course, the star of the show is the cilantro pesto sauce. Made with fresh cilantro, garlic, and olive oil, this sauce bursts with flavor and pairs perfectly with these protein-packed bites.

name: Jerk Spiced Chicken Bowl
description: Chef Nelson‚Äôs jerk chicken bowl brings sweet Caribbean heat, with spice-rubbed chicken thighs marinated in warming spices and fiery chiles, then grilled until smoky and charred. To cool it down, a scoop of juicy pineapple salsa is served alongside zesty cilantro-lime brown rice and garlicky spinach. Warning: May cause spontaneous island daydreaming.

name: Chicken with Sesame Snow Peas
description: Chef Ruben paired braised chicken with sesame snow peas to include in your diet that contains high Vitamin C and high in fiber. Enjoy it with a crunch of walnuts, almonds and sunflower seeds.

name: Harvest Chicken
description: Take a culinary journey with Chef Cora to Napa Valley, where she perfected this dish based on the wine country‚Äôs grape harvest. The succulent roasted chicken breast‚Äîstuffed with tangy, creamy goat cheese and served over a bed of fragrant brown rice pilaf‚Äîmay be the centerpiece of the meal, the salsa is the star. Juicy red grapes provide a hint of sweetness, while green ones burst with acidity; toasted pine nuts add savory crunch; and the balsamic vinegar elevates it all to a tangy crescendo. Healthy yet flavor-packed, this meal has it all!

name: Chicken Dumplings
description: This soothing, creamy soup combines a nutritious mix of carrots, onions, celery, and tender shredded chicken breast. It‚Äôs served with two biscuit-like dumplings that are golden, fluffy, and act as a cloud-like vessel to soak up the soup.

name: Orecchiette Bolognese
description: This is a hearty and satisfying beef and pork ragu brought to you by Chef Ludo Lefebvre. The Ragu is simmered low and slow until it reaches the perfect consistency that clings to the al dente cooked Orechiette pasta. Chef then tops with a generous dusting of grated parmesan cheese.

name: Four Cheese Ravioli with Pesto Primavera Sauce
description: Our Cheese Ravioli in Pesto Primavera Sauce is the perfect combination of classic Italian flavors and fresh, seasonal ingredients. The dish features plump and tender cheese-filled ravioli, coated in a rich and creamy pesto sauce made with freshly picked basil, garlic, and Parmesan cheese. The sauce is then brought to life with a medley of crisp and colorful vegetables, including sweet cherry tomatoes, zucchini, and bell peppers, all saut√©ed to perfection. Each bite is bursting with flavor, and the hearty pasta is balanced perfectly by the lightness of the sauce and vegetables.

name: Craft Cheeseburger with Special Sauce
description: Now this a world class burger! Chef John serves up a truly restaurant-quality burger like you'd find in a fancy bistro, with a juicy, all-beef patty cooked to perfection and topped with melted cheese. Plated on a plush potato bun with lettuce, tomato, and Chef's special sauce‚Äîa creamy aioli‚Äîthe burger comes with a side of crisp curly fries to complete the dish. This is the ultimate American comfort food, kicked up a notch.

name: Truffled Fettuccine Alfredo with Shrimp
description: Elegant and comforting, there's so much to love about this dish. Herb-seasoned, perfectly cooked jumbo shrimp are served with atop al dente fettuccine pasta coated in a luscious Alfredo sauce. To take it over the top, Chef Meena infuses the Alfredo sauce with high quality white truffle oil for a burst of umami and extra richness. This is a true restaurant-quality dish, served up on your table in minutes.

name: Fennel Mustard Tuna
description: You will love this tuna steak that is fresh, zesty, earthy and full of bright flavors. Topped with cremini mushrooms and shallot, they are served over a bed of chard salad with bits of bacon and radishes. Topping it with hard boiled egg to add rich and creamy notes.

name: Lemon Chicken Picatta with Potatoes and Broccolini
description: Boneless, skinless chicken breasts are pounded into tender cutlets for even cooking and quickly panfried. Then a flavorful sauce is prepared in the same pan. Enjoy this restaurant favorite at home with a glass of white wine! This Italian chicken piccata recipe is sure to please your entire family.

name: Ponzu Baked Swai Fish
description: In this Japanese-inspired dish, light and flaky swai‚Äîa mild white fish similar to tilapia‚Äîis baked to perfection and served with roasted shiitake mushrooms and stir-fried bok choy. A citrusy ponzu sauce brings this whole dish together in sweet and savory harmony. Enjoy another healthy yet satisfying offering from Chef Akhtar.

name: Braised Lamb Shawarma with Pearl Couscous
description: You will savor every bite of this decadent dish that is one of Chef Einat‚Äôs specialties. Lamb is infused with shawarma spice, a signature spice blend in Middle Eastern cuisine, and braised until falling off the bone tender and juicy. The lamb is served over Israeli couscous, red onion-sumac salad‚Äì an acidic side that often accompanies rich meat dishes‚Äì and topped with a creamy tahini sauce.

name: Creamy Spinach Mushroom Tacos
description: Put a fun DIY spin on taco night with Chef Vanessa‚Äôs irresistible vegetarian trio. The meal contains everything you‚Äôll need to layer creamy spinach and blistered poblano pepper fillings with a hearty helping of garlicky roasted cremini mushrooms inside tender white corn tortillas. Top them off with the accompaniments‚Äîzesty pickled red onions, sweet char-grilled corn kernels, and fresh cilantro‚Äîand dig into a meal you‚Äôre sure to savor.

name: Mediterranean Grilled Sea Bass Mango Amba Sauce
description: Drawing inspiration from one of the staple dishes at Chef Einat‚Äôs restaurant Balaboosta, this gluten-free meal is healthy and delicious. A juicy filet of sea bass is accompanied by seasonal saut√©ed greens including Swiss chard and bok choy, as well as nutty farro. A topping of crunchy toasted seeds and tangy Amba (a.k.a. pickled mango) add texture and extra brightness to this sophisticated fish dish.

name: Savory Pepper Steak Stew
description: If you love pepper in all its forms, then this is the dish for you. Chef Kevin generously seasons cubes of succulent steak with a zesty blend of black pepper and paprika, then saut√©s them with onions and sweet red bell peppers made meltingly tender, and tosses it all with a pan sauce built on bold flavors, including the subtle heat of chipotle peppers in adobo and the irresistible umami of Worcestershire and soy. This hearty combination is served atop a bed of fluffy Spanish rice, where each grain is infused with aromatic spices and peas and carrots up the vegetable quotient. A side of roasted Roma tomato completes the dish with a burst of smoky sweetness. Enjoy as-is or pair with a fresh green salad for a meal that‚Äôs truly unforgettable.

name: Texas Beef Frito Pie
description: This is Texas chili - no tomatoes and NO BEANS!!!! A mildly spicy stew with a hint of sweetness, served with a Southern jalapeno cornbread. Add fritos to make a Texas favorite, Frito Pie!!!

name: Pork Shrimp Dumplings with Chili Sauce
description: These handmade pork and shrimp steamed wontons are a must-try, especially when dipped in Chef Nora's signature chili sauce. With a juicy, flavorful filling and delicate wrapper, you may have a hard time just eating a few. You can‚Äôt go wrong having these as your snack, appetizer, or even as your main meal of the day.

name: Chicken Breast
description: Hormone free chicken breast meal that made better with the taste of basil that has a subtle peppery flavor then evolves into a slightly sweet, aromatic flavor that made basil one of the favorite herbs of many. Perfect combination over a bed of mushroom barley stew.

name: Lafriedas Black Angus Tacos
description: Charred Black Angus beef strips make for the perfect tacos. We serve ours with a side of corn tortillas, salsa verde and cabbage slaw.

name: Cacio E Pepe
description: Want to feel like you're eating at a Roman trattoria? This is the dish for you. Italian simplicity at its best. Pasta. Cheese. Freshly ground black peppercorns. Joy.

name: Grilled Adobo Salmon with Mojo Verde
description: A Garces family favorite. Chef Jose's adobo seasoning is his secret ingredient for imbuing flavor fast; the spice rub provides a depth of savory, spicy flavor that makes simply grilled salmon filets sing. An herbaceous mole verde made with cilantro, poblano pepper, and lime is just the thing to bring acidic tang and balance to the rich, buttery fish.

name: Kale Caesar with Grilled Shrimp
description: Chef Chase has curated a roster of meals that promise comforting satisfaction while being lower in calories. Here, his signature baby kale caesar salad is paired with plump grilled shrimp as well as hard boiled eggs and cherry tomatoes, all dressed in a lightened up Caesar dressing. Chef‚Äôs homemade parmesan bread crumbs provide the perfect finishing touch.

name: Blackened Catfish
description: You can‚Äôt do comfort food without talking about the Southern Creole influence, and nothing says Creole quite like blackened catfish. What we love about this meal is the classic combo of heavily seasoned seafood and potatoes. Here, Chef Chris takes blackening spice and some fresh fillet of catfish, sears it on the plancha with some butter, then plates it atop his homestyle caper-dill potato salad. Chef highly recommends heating this meal in the microwave.

name: Massaman Beef Curry
description: Massaman curry is a mild, savory and slightly sweet Thai curry. The rich coconut-based curry is full of fragrant spice undertones of cumin, cardamom, cinnamon, and more. The curry is accompanied by the traditional potato, onion, and peanuts, as well as tender skirt steak. Chef serves the curry alongside fluffy, aromatic jasmine rice, so that you can savor every last bit of the flavorful sauce.

name: Mascarpone and Ricotta Lasagna
description: A hearty portion of an Italian classic. Chef Marc's classic lasagna features layers of fresh pasta, pomodoro tomato sauce, and three cheese for next level creaminess: ricotta, mascarpone, and parmesan. Paired with lemony broccoli for a balanced and satisfying meal!

name: Kale Fritters with Beets
description: One of CookUnity‚Äôs favorite vegetarian dishes! Chef Irvin makes these fritters with eggs, parmesan, asiago, and goat cheese. Topped with a fresh herbal blend of thyme, parsley, and basil, and paired with a beautiful assortment of beets. This dish will satisfy your healthy cravings.

name: Almond Crusted Baked Cod
description: Fresh caught cod fish dipped in egg, flipped and coated with almond flour, salt and pepper. Added turmeric on the mix to make a bright yellow color and enhanced the flavor plus the added benefits of turmeric. Served with roasted broccoli drizzled with extra virgin olive oil.

name: Sauteed Shrimp Black Bean Rice Bowl
description: This Mexican-inspired bowl is a masterclass in balance‚Äîfresh yet hearty, sweet with just the right amount of heat. Juicy saut√©ed shrimp bring lean protein, black beans add fiber and staying power, and flavorful Basmati rice keeps it all grounded. Then there‚Äôs the salsa: ripe mango, fresh peppers, and a kick of jalape√±o to keep things interesting. Every forkful hits that magic spot between light and satisfying, comforting and nourishing.

name: Beef French Cottage Pie
description: Enjoy a classic Hachis Parmentier, a French beef and potato casserole similar to an English cottage pie. The ground brisket and beef blend adds a beautiful texture to the dish, and is complemented by a creamy potato pur√©e and a simple garnish of Italian parsley.

name: Short Ribs Rogan Josh
description: Experience the tantalizing flavors of Chef Raj's take on Rogan Josh, a traditional Kashmiri dish where meat is simmered in a curry sauce bursting with warming spices. Here, Chef uses tender, melt-in-your-mouth beef short ribs, adding another layer of richness to the dish. Slow-cooked to perfection, the succulent short ribs are enveloped in the fragrant curry sauce and served alongside Yakhni Pulao, Pakistani-style rice with a complex bouquet of spices and aromatics. This dish is a true celebration of the vibrant and diverse culinary heritage of India.

name: Italian Chicken Sausage Casserole
description: This wholesome casserole brings together golden-seared chicken thighs and juicy Italian sausages in a fragrant white wine jus infused with rosemary and thyme. Tender fingerling potatoes, sweet peppers, and softened onions soak up the flavorful broth, while a bright hint of lemon zest lifts each comforting bite. It‚Äôs rustic, hearty, and straight from the Italian countryside‚Äîno passport required.

name: Szechuan Chili Chicken Wings
description: Chef Aarthi's take on a classic Indo-Chinese chicken dish is so delicious you'll have to try it to believe it. Chicken wings get tossed in a warm spice rub, roasted to crispy perfection, and served with a sweet, spicy, and sour sauce with scallions and sesame seeds. Warning: these wings are so addictive, you won't be able to stop after just one.

name: Flank Steak Spinach
description: Any night can be a steak night with Chef John's juicy flank steak. It's grilled over an open fire and served alongside creamed spinach and a red wine reduction. Fresh Grana Padano cheese finishes all the goodness off.

name: Chipotle Short Ribs Glaze
description: Chipotle Short Ribs Glaze by Einat Admony features a rich and flavorful glaze that elevates tender short ribs, perfect for a hearty meal.

name: Bbq Baked Beans
description: Chef Kristy's BBQ baked beans are one of her favorite side dishes to eat during the summer, and now they're one of ours, too. Her version doesn't contain pork, so they're vegetarian-friendly, but still pack all the same smoky, sweet, and savory flavor you'd expect in baked beans. Pair with your favorite BBQ or grilled protein for a super satisfying lunch or dinner in minutes.

name: Miso Ginger Salmon
description: Herb-coated grilled salmon perfect together with smoky grilled scallions, potatoes, herb roasted turnips. This meal is finished by drizzling ginger-miso dressing over the fish.

name: Lobster Mac and Cheese
description: This dish is the definition of elevated comfort food. An elegant lobster-centric dish that is buttery, rich, and endlessly crave-able. Cheesy mouthwatering macaroni gets an extra kick of creaminess from mascarpone cheese, and a subtle hint of tarragon works to highlight the chunks of fresh lobster that you'll find throughout the dish.

name: Tofu Forbidden Rice Bowl
description: For Chef Emily, there's nothing better than a big, colorful bowl of fresh veggies and grains smothered in a delectable sauce! That's certainly the case with this bowl, which packs in antioxidant- and protein-rich forbidden rice, crunchy veggies, and miso tofu. The toppings are what make it though: a simple kale and cabbage slaw, fresh herbs like cilantro, and crunchy peanuts. One taste of the savory miso-peanut sauce and you'll want to pour it on everything. This wholesome bowl is sure to keep you feeling balanced and energized throughout your day.

name: Nopal Salad with Sauteed Shrimp
description: Nopal‚Äîor cactus‚Äîis the star of this healthy salad crowned with tender, simply saut√©ed shrimp. With its meaty texture and slight citrusy flavor, the cooked nopal pairs beautifully with Chef Santos' charred lemon vinaigrette. Tossed with shaved green cabbage, diced tomatoes, queso fresco and fresh cilantro, it's a refreshing, unique salad that's perfect for a hearty lunch or lighter dinner.

name: Spicy Sichuan Pork Belly
description: Irresistibly flavorful, sweet, and spicy, this pork belly stir fry ticks all the boxes. The tender pork belly is stir-fried with vibrant bell peppers and onions in a soy-ginger sauce with a hint of numbing heat from Sichuan peppercorns. Perfectly paired with aromatic yellow rice, this has everything you could want and more.

name: Pork al Pastor Grain Bowl
description: Nobody puts together a bowl full of flavor-packed goodness like Chef Ivy. This one draws inspiration from Mexico with tender, chile-roasted pork, cooked in the style of Al Pastor. Served atop a nutty ancient grain pilaf and seasoned black beans, the bowl is finished with a simple salad of little gem lettuce, watermelon radish, red onion, cucumber and sliced avocado. Drizzle or toss everything in Chef Ivy's pleasantly tangy agave-lime vinaigrette, and dig in!

name: Pork Carnitas Quesadillas
description: Chef Santiago brings you a satisfying quesadilla filled with crispy pork carnitas mingling with chewy sliced plantains, melted Chihuahua and Oaxaca cheeses, and tomatillo. On the side, a shredded grilled cabbage and pico de gallo on the side add a refreshing crunch.

name: Moms Meatballs In Marinara Sauce
description: You can practically taste the love and generations of tradition in this dish from Chef John. An authentic taste of Italian home cooking, this dish pairs incredibly tender, juicy meatballs with a handmade marinara sauce dotted with spicy Italian sausage. The secret of this dish is to let simmer everything together, so the flavors mingle and the meatballs get infused with rich tomato sauce. Whether you call it Sunday Sauce, Sunday Gravy, or something else, this is classic Italian comfort food, just like grandma used to make.

name: Flip Sigi Chicken Adobo Rito
description: Perfectly balanced soy braised chicken with tangy sauce and an aromatic jasmine rice seasoned with coconut milk and saut√©ed garlic. All wrapped in a fluffy flour tortilla served with a side of the braising liquid for dressing inside the burrito or to dip when eating.

name: Parisian Chicken Kebab
description: Each element of this Parisian-inspired creation is meticulously crafted to deliver a symphony of flavors and textures that harmonize in every bite. Whether you're savoring the tender chicken, indulging in the aromatic Basmati rice, enjoying the vibrant Tomato Salad, or relishing the creamy Green Sauce, Chef Ludo's culinary expertise shines through, making this a dining experience to remember. Bon app√©tit!

name: Bourbon Glazed Salmon
description: The ideal weeknight dinner, this dish has everything: sweet and savory flavors, comforting richness and pops of freshness. Buttery salmon is coated in a sweet, bourbon-infused glaze, which pairs perfectly with smooth, creamy mashed potatoes and a colorful corn salad with bell pepper, zucchini, and seasonings. All of these elements come together to create a vibrant and flavorful dish.

name: Beef and Lamb Moussaka
description: Comfort food at its best. Chef Jona‚Äôs Moussaka features a mix of ground beef and lamb, seasoned with warm allspice and layered with eggplant, new potatoes, and a creamy b√©chamel white sauce. The cozy casserole gets topped with a mixture of breadcrumbs and parmesan cheese and baked until golden brown. Each bite is melt-in-your-mouth perfection.

name: Bbq Glazed Chicken
description: All the flavors of authentic BBQ on one plate! This dish pairs a well-marinated, barbecue sauce-glazed chicken leg with tasty baked mac and cheese and collard greens. Bursting with Southern flavor, this meal will satisfy any and all comfort food cravings.

name: Jgs Signature Mac N Cheese
description: Enjoy your childhood comfort food, reimagined at the highest level of technique and ingredients. Chef Jose's macaroni and cheese is totally irresistible with al dente cavatappi pasta and a decadent four-cheese sauce. The unique curly pasta shape is ideal for holding onto the wildly delicious sauce. To take it from good to great, Chef tops it with a buttery Panko breadcrumb topping infused with fresh herbs, plus some Gruyere and Parmesan cheeses for extra nuttiness, then bakes the entire dish. This is a guaranteed crowd-pleaser that will have everyone fighting over the last bite!

name: Pesto Shrimp Quinoa Bowl
description: This fresh and vibrant bowl brings a symphony of flavors and textures on your palate. Perfectly cooked shrimp, cherry tomatoes, sweet corn sit on a bed of nutty quinoa and delicate baby arugula. Zesty pesto and salty roasted pumpkin seeds complete the dish, creating a feast for both the eyes and the taste buds.

name: Shrimp Chow Mein
description: Shrimp Chow Mein, one of the signature plates of Chef Fabiola. Ramen noodles, cabbage, carrots, onion and celery, protagonists of this flavorful and nutritious plate. Juicy shrimp and tangy hoisin sauce are the crowning touches on this delicious dish.

name: Carrot Cake Jar
description: This delightfully moist Carrot Cake with Walnuts is a scrumptious treat made with fresh carrots, chopped walnuts, and succulent currants. This cake offers a harmonious balance of moist carrot cake, nutty goodness, and bursts of sweetness from the currants. Treat yourself to a jar of carrot cake perfection!

name: Beef Stew with Carrots and Chilies
description: Chef Kluger's beef stew isn't your normal beef stew. It has sweet and sour notes with a touch of heat from the chilies. A delectably comforting dinner for any night of the week.

name: Salmon Cakes with Arak Braised Cabbage
description: These crispy salmon cakes are full of herbs. The cabbage is braised in Arak, a Middle Eastern spirit with the flavor of anis and is similar to Ouzo. Served with a tangy and refreshing dill yogurt.

name: Breakfast Bacon Egg Cheese Quesadillas
description: Picture this: a crisp quesadilla stuffed with all your favorite breakfast flavors. Chef Akhtar's serving up not one but two cheesy quesadillas stuffed full of Mexican spiced scrambled eggs, crispy bacon, and cheddar cheese, with sides of fresh salsa roja and crema to dip. This super satisfying breakfast is the perfect fuel to get your day started on the right foot and keep you full all morning long!

name: Smokey Mushroom Empanadas
description: Smoky mezcal-garlic mushrooms in a greeny spinach dough.

name: Chickpea Tikka Masala
description: For this tantalizing, slow-cooked Chickpea Tikka Masala, Chef Chase simmers chickpeas to tender perfection in a tangy tomato-based sauce made fragrant with aromatic spices and garnished with a sprinkle of fresh cilantro. He serves it on a bed of Basmati Rice. Use the accompanying lime wedge to deliver a burst of citrusy freshness, then enjoy a satisfying, wholesome, plant-powered, flavor-packed meal that still manages to clock in at less than 500 calories.

name: Grilled Mahi Mahi with Escabeche Sauce
description: Chef Fabiola's signature escabeche sauce is a flavor bomb of acidic punch with red onions, yellow and red peppers, garlic, and oregano, all cooked with vinegar and olive oil. It gives the simply grilled Mahi Mahi a magically zesty flavor that is perfectly complemented by the creaminess of the potato mash. Absolutely delicious!

name: Grilled Zaatar Spiced Organic Chicken
description: Za‚Äôatar, a Middle Eastern blend of sesame seeds and dried sumac, plus herbs and other spices, gives this meal its distinctive savory, piquant flavor. It‚Äôs the centerpiece of Chef Tony‚Äôs marinade for tender, juicy organic chicken breasts, grilled and chopped into cubes atop a bed of fluffy Basmati rice infused with the nutty essence of turmeric. The garnish of diced plum tomato, parsley, and cilantro adds freshness. Pour on the Creamy Tatziki sauce‚Äîa refreshing blend of Greek yogurt, lemon juice, garlic, and tahini‚Äîthen stir everything together and enjoy an elevated weeknight meal bursting with vibrant tastes and textures.

name: Madras Chicken Curry
description: This dish was inspired by Chef Aarthi's grandma's chicken curry. Delicious and fragrant, the traditional Tamil South Indian curry features a rich coconut base and tender chicken thighs. Served with a side of aromatic jasmine rice and garlicky broccoli, this curry brings a little taste of Chef Aarthi's home to your table.

name: Herby Skirt Steak Loaded Potato
description: This satisfying dish showcases grilled skirt steak flavored with an herb marinade and served with a half baked potato loaded with crispy bacon. The cilantro-lime sour cream adds a touch of tang.

name: Creamy Kahlua Tiramisu
description: Tiramisu is a delectable Italian dessert that consists of layers of ladyfingers soaked in coffee and liqueur, then topped with a light and creamy mascarpone cheese mixture. The top layer is dusted with cocoa powder, giving it a hint of bitterness and depth of flavour. As you take a bite, the soft and spongy ladyfingers blend into the creamy and velvety mascarpone, creating a perfect balance of textures. The coffee and liqueur add a subtle depth of flavour, while the cocoa powder adds a hint of bitterness and rounds off the sweetness of the dessert. Tiramisu is served chilled and makes for a perfect after-dinner treat or a special occasion dessert.

name: Sweet Italian Sausage Peppers
description: Chef LaFrieda's sausages have been a family recipe for over 100 years. They use the best quality ingredients and take pride in making the best sweet and hot Italian sausages. Here, Chef and his team toss sausages with sweet peppers and onions‚Äîthe perfect pairing. Enjoy these alongside a simple salad or rice, or serve in a toasted roll for a comforting lunch or dinner in minutes.

name: Skirt Steak with Herbed Mushrooms
description: This dish is all about the skirt steak, a cut prized for its robust flavor. Chef Tony keeps the steak seasonings simple to let its flavor shine, then sears it to perfection and drizzles with herbs and spices. Saut√©ed mushrooms and shallots make for a satisfying side along with an herbaceous, creamy cauliflower mash.

name: Scallion Butter Salmon
description: Oven Roasted Salmon baked with a delicious fresh scallion butter served on top of fluffy, aromatic brown rice.

name: Classic Shrimp Gumbo
description: Put some south in your mouth with Chef Kevin‚Äôs Classic Shrimp Gumbo, a soulful meal that celebrates the vibrant culinary heritage of Louisiana and the Gulf Coast. His gumbo starts the time-honored way with roux, a blend of fat and flour cooked and constantly whisked until it attains rich, savory, toasty flavor. Into that velvety smooth mix go onion, bell pepper, spicy Andouille sausage, plump shrimp and shrimp stock, and Cajun seasoning, a blend that includes cayenne, black pepper, and garlic. A dash of peppery, vinegary Tabasco sauce adds an extra touch of tradition. Chef Kevin ladles his gumbo over a fragrant and fluffy spiced Basmati rice pilaf. Warm corn muffins make for a perfect accompaniment. So would a fresh green salad. Either way, every bite of this meal is guaranteed to deliver a taste of pure southern comfort.

name: Grilled Chicken Fajita Tacos
description: Raised in San Antonio, fajitas were a weekend staple for Chef Maribel, with fresh-off-the-grill chicken, flour tortillas, and all the accouterments. Chef Maribel's version lets you build your own fajita-inspired tacos with flour tortillas, char-grilled marinated chicken, and traditional rajas (grilled portobello mushrooms and poblano peppers). Top your tacos with pepperjack cheese and Chef's handmade fire-roasted tomato salsa, and enjoy with a side of red rice for a super satisfying Taco Tuesday, any day of the week.

name: Lobster Mac N Cheese
description: You'll probably want to eat Chef Cedric's Lobster Mac n' Cheese every night of the week. Creamy and cheesy, it's got everything you love about classic mac n' cheese ‚Äî but it's elevated to even tastier heights with butter poached lobster meat, herbed bread crumbs, and fresh chives.

name: Grilled Portobello and Poblano Fajitas
description: Raised in San Antonio, fajitas were a weekend staple for Chef Maribel, and her version lets you build your own fajita-inspired tacos with flour tortillas, char-grilled veggies, and all the traditional toppings. Fill your tacos with fresh-off-the-grill portobello mushrooms, poblano and bell peppers, onions, which are made even more delicious when tucked into soft flour tortillas and topped with pepperjack cheese. Served with a side of steamed rice and Chef's handmade spicy fire-roasted tomato salsa, this veggie-forward meal makes for a super satisfying Taco Tuesday, any day of the week.

name: Rib Eye Beef Shawarma Plate
description: Chef Einat packs so much Middle Eastern flavor into her crave-worthy beef shawarma plate, you'll have to taste it to believe it. Juicy shawarma spice-marinated beef is braised with caramelized onions and chickpeas until super tender, then paired with green herbed sabzi rice. Accompanied by tangy pickled veggies, sumac-marinated red onions, and bright chermoula sauce, you'll savor every balanced bite of this modern Middle Eastern marvel.

name: Beef Creole Grillades and Grits
description: Braised beef over cheesy grits, humble delicious food cooked with love. This is a 'Classic Creole' dish usually served for brunch or special occasions.

name: Mission Style Breakfast Egg Burrito
description: No matter what time of day or night you choose to enjoy it, this Mission-style breakfast burrito will seriously satisfy. For one thing, it's absolutely jam packed with seasoned black beans, soft scrambled eggs, and an adobo-spiced blend of roasted sweet potato, mushrooms, and kale. Then, to take it over the top, Chef Jose adds a homemade sofrito mix and blend of three cheeses: Monterey jack, white cheddar and Oaxacan. All of this goodness is rolled up in a soft flour tortilla, pressed until crispy on the edges and served up with salsa verde and Mexican crema. Consider your breakfast burrito cravings crushed!

name: Lebanese Tilapia
description: Delicate tilapia lightly spiced with cumin is served alongside a lovely rice pilaf with tender lentils, caramelized onions and herbs, as well as a creamy green tahini sauce to make a high protein, gluten free meal.

name: Butternut Squash Mac Cheese
description: All the creamy comfort of mac and cheese, with a hidden boost of nutrition. Butternut squash‚Äîrich in vitamins, potassium, fiber, and antioxidants‚Äîblends into a cheese-packed sauce. Lush and glossy, it coats dainty tubes of macaroni pasta, making this dish feel like a treat, even as it quietly works in the good stuff.

name: Wild Caught Salmon
description: Got to have this freshest wild salmon over bed of Tuscan Kale that is full of nutritional goodness. This meal also contains fennel, artichoke and bits of almond ricotta for perfect tasting and hearty bowl.

name: Garlic Hanger Steak with Cilantro Avocado Sauce
description: This is Chef Andres' twist on a classic combination: tender grilled steak and a fresh sauce. The steak is garlicky with the perfect amount of char, and the avocado, cilantro, and lime sauce is creamy and cooling. To round out the dish, Chef adds a grilled vegetable medley of zucchini, squash, peppers, and onions. Prepare to be transported to a South American steakhouse with this delectable dish!

name: Chicken Ropa Vieja Arepa Sandwich
description: Introducing Chef Jose Garces‚Äô Chicken Ropa Vieja Arepa Sandwich‚Äîa delicious twist on the traditional arepa! Packed with flavor, this mouthwatering creation starts with two griddled corn cakes. Between them are layers of black bean pur√©e, braised chicken Ropa Vieja, and slices of fresh mozzarella. Served with a side of fried sweet plantains (maduros) and Chef's creamy Guasacaca sauce for dipping or drizzling, this unique and delectable sandwich is a must-try. Get ready to indulge in a culinary adventure like no other!

name: Crab Shrimp Mac N Cheese
description: This dish is the definition of elevated comfort food. An elegant seafood-centric dish that is buttery, rich, and endlessly craveable. Cheesy mouthwatering macaroni is paired with not one but four cheeses: American, pepper jack, Swiss, and white cheddar. To take it from good to great, Chef Chris adds lump crabmeat, shrimp, and scallops into the decadent dish.

name: Asian Style Pork Chop
description: This juicy pork chop is grilled to perfection and served alongside asparagus and spinach that have been saut√©ed in nutty sesame oil. With a sweet-and-savory Asian-inspired sauce, this dish is simply irresistible!

name: Vietnamese Shrimp Noodle Bowl
description: Prepare to be totally bowled over! Whether you enjoy it for lunch or dinner, this delightfully refreshing and healthy meal brings the essence of Vietnamese cuisine to your table. Tender rice vermicelli noodles provide the base for sweet, succulent shrimp and crispy, crunchy cabbage-and-peanut slaw. Chef Nelson‚Äôs flavor-packed Vietnamese sauce brings every element together with a perfect balance of flavors‚Äîit‚Äôs savory, citrusy, nutty, herbal, lightly sweet, and with just a hint of chili heat.

name: Tomato Braised Chicken
description: Chef Kevin's tomato-braised chicken is a delectable dish that combines tender chicken braised in rich tomato sauce with fragrant herbs. Served on a bed of al dente orecchiette pasta and topped with fresh parmesan, this meal is both comforting and new, making it an easy choice for any weeknight.

name: Un Skewered Grilled Shrimp Kebab
description: Everything you love about a kebab‚Äîwithout the messy skewer! Chef Ahmet serves a generous portion of succulent, garlic-basted grilled shrimp, lightly dusted with sumac‚Äîa tangy, earthy Middle Eastern spice‚Äîand sweet red bell pepper, onion, and zucchini. On the side: Hearty Turkish potato salad of tender red-skinned potatoes, red bell pepper, and onion, and lots of fresh dill and parsley. Drizzle the dressing‚Äîa flavor-packed blend of extra-virgin olive oil, fresh lemon juice, garlic, and even more fresh herbs‚Äîover everything and dig into a meal that‚Äôs as satisfying as it is wholesome.

name: Tuscan Kale Harvest Stew
description: Hearty, filling and satiating, this cozy harvest stew is a perfect lunch or light dinner with a hunk of crusty bread on the side. Cannellini beans, Tuscan kale, and harvest vegetables like carrots, potatoes, and shiitake mushrooms are all simmered in a rich tomato and herb broth. This soup is pure plant-based comfort food!

name: Lemongrass Pork Belly Banh Mi
description: The classic Vietnamese banh mi might just be the world‚Äôs best sandwich. We think you‚Äôll agree when you try Chef Adriana‚Äôs version. It‚Äôs got everything you need to build yours DIY style: rich slabs of unctuously tender, lemongrass-marinated pork belly; pickled daikon and carrots for tangy, briny crunch; cool cucumber for a different kind of crispness; sliced jalape√±o for heat; herbal cilantro for distinctive flavor; savory Kewpie mayonnaise for creaminess; and a crusty baguette to hold everything together.

name: Caprese Quiche
description: A slice of Chef DeLucie's Caprese Quiche strikes the perfect balance of comforting and satisfying. It's a dish that can be enjoyed any time of day ‚Äì whether as a hearty breakfast, a light lunch paired with a crisp green salad, or a comforting dinner alongside a glass of wine. Each slice offers a taste of Italy's sun-kissed tomato-basil flavors, wrapped in the comforting embrace of flaky pie crust. Paired with cherry tomato confit and a chive cream sauce, it's a culinary journey that celebrates simplicity, freshness, and the joy of good food shared with loved ones.

name: Tandoori Chicken Chickpea Daal
description: Tender grilled tandoori chicken is served atop a bed of fluffy turmeric and coconut-infused rice alongside spiced, stewed chickpea daal. A side of creamy yogurt raita is there to cool down your palate and balance out all the aromatic spices. This dish from Chef Akhtar packs all the same flavors from your favorite Indian restaurant, but way more wholesome and convenient.

name: Fried Chicken with Alabama White Sauce
description: Craving crispy, juicy fried chicken with a sweet and tangy kick? Look no further! This recipe delivers with golden, perfectly seasoned fried chicken and a lip-smacking Alabama white sauce and a side of fries! All that's missing is some napkins‚Äîthough you may not even need them with this finger-licking good chicken.

name: Caprese Ravioli In Tomato Brodo
description: Chef Marc puts a summer spin on the classic Italian dish, Tortellini in Brodo. This light dish is comprised of caprese ravioli in a flavorful tomato-based broth with mildly peppery wild arugula, freshly roasted cherry tomatoes, and a hint of fresh basil pesto. For that fresh caprese salad taste you know and love, but in a totally new package, give this dish a try!

name: Protein Grilled Chicken Plate
description: Indulge in what Chef Cami has dubbed her 'Chicken Strip Delight'‚Äîa plate of pure vegan comfort food. Seasoned vegan chicken strips are grilled and served alongside fluffy rice, garlicky edamame, a refreshing chickpea and veggie salad, and smoky grilled corn. Drizzled with a creamy vegan ranch sauce, this plate has everything you need to satisfy your cravings while keeping it plant-based.

name: Cheddar Crusted Mahi Mahi
description: For the centerpiece of this luxurious, elegant meal, Chef Jason and Corey bake mahi mahi fillets to firm, moist perfection in a mouthwatering Cheddar and herb crust, then top each one with decadent stewed leeks for a touch of sweetness. Paired with nutty Forbidden Rice and tangy caramelized balsamic roasted Brussels Sprouts, each bite is a symphony of rich flavors that meld beautifully together. Put this one in your order queue anytime you‚Äôre craving sophisticated seafood.

name: Islander Braised Cod Fish
description: This is a dish that screams summertime in the West Indies! Enjoy the aromatic spices steaming from the flaky cod fish, and hearty callaloo, Jamaican-style saut√©ed collard greens. Each element complements the other perfectly, making this a light and satisfying dish for warmer days.

name: Miso Marinated Salmon
description: In this dish, salmon is coated in an umami-packed marinade featuring the dynamic duo of miso and mustard. It‚Äôs served over velvety cauliflower mash, blended with confit garlic to create a flavorful low-carb side. A paprika-spiced medley of saut√©ed onions, zucchini, and yellow squash, adds a nutrient-rich kick.

name: Soy Glazed Turkey Meatballs
description: Enjoy this meal with the island vibe flavor by Chef Chris. Turkey meatballs studded with scallions baked tender drizzled with apricot glazed.

name: Chicken Piccata
description: Chef Silvia takes on an Italian American classic and brings you something extra delicious. Tender chicken breast is saut√©ed in a delicate pan sauce made with white wine, lemon, butter, capers, and fresh parsley. Served on a bed of al dente spaghetti, this deceptively simple dish tastes so much more decadent than the sum of its parts.

name: Rotini with Red Pepper Pesto
description: Fall in love with this high-protein pasta that cooks up just like the real thing. Pasta is toss with a roasted red pepper, pine nut, and sun-dried tomato pesto for a tangy, smoky twist on the classic basil version. It‚Äôs a new take on the usual saucy spaghetti, yet just as fast and family-friendly.

name: Moroccan Chicken Couscous Tagine
description: A fragrant and tangy chicken dish that will transport you to North Africa. Chicken is stewed with briny green olives, sweet currants, and toasted almonds and served over couscous for a faithful take on the comforting tagine dishes you find in Tunisia and Morocco. A side of harissa-infused butternut squash pur√©e brings a pop of spicy creaminess with just a hint of welcome sweetness.

name: Caribbean Snapper Stew
description: Chef Nahika serves up a plate of pure Caribbean comfort cooking! Succulent Gulf Coast snapper is stewed in tomato-based sauce with spices and an assortment of bell peppers and onions. The flavorful fish is paired with the classic Caribbean sides‚Äîred beans and rice and sweet plantains‚Äîplus pikliz, a spicy Haitian pickled slaw and the traditional tangy accompaniment to rich stews.

name: Vegan Spaghetti Alla Puttanesca
description: A lighter 'pasta' dish to satisfy your cravings. Using whole grain and zucchini pasta in tomato sauce with kalamata olives. Added with pepper flakes and capers for a little kick.

name: Grilled Beef Tenderloin with Chimichurri
description: A signature of Argentinian asado (wood-fired open grill) cooking, you cannot miss this perfectly grilled beef tenderloin with bright, herbaceous chimichurri sauce. On the side, you'll love the baked crushed potatoes spiced with smoked paprika, garlic, olive oil and sea salt, as well as sweet roasted tomatoes √† la Proven√ßal with fresh garlic and herbs. If you've been to Argentina, you'll recognize the staple flavors of the country's cuisine in every bite. If you haven't, prepared to be transported!

name: Pumpkin Spice Crepes
description: Whether you enjoy them as a dessert, snack, or even breakfast (we won't tell!), these pumpkin spice crepes perfectly capture the essence of fall. The crepes, infused with warm and aromatic pumpkin spice, offers a delicate and slightly sweet flavor that harmonizes with the rich freshly whipped cream. The addition of candied pepitas brings a delightful crunch and a hint of caramelized maple sweetness to each bite. Together, these elements create a wonderful balance that instantly evokes the cozy and comforting feelings of autumn.

name: Chili Crab Pasta Scallions
description: Chef Amy's take on what is perhaps Singapore's most iconic dish: Chili Crab. Deeply flavorful and mildly spiced, the creamy tomato and egg drop sauce, slightly sweet, is full of fresh lump crab meat, all tossed with perfectly al dente linguine. Topped with fresh scallions and crispy onions, this dish is totally unique and endlessly crave-able.

name: Catfish with Blackened Spice
description: Heat a splash of coconut oil and slightly pan fried the fresh catfish. Add the contents of asparagus with sweet potatoes and leek for healthier paleo twist of this meal.

name: Grilled Swordfish and Peperonata
description: Mediterranean flavors shine in this elevated dish, featuring golden-seared swordfish served atop a bed of creamy, fennel-infused polenta. It‚Äôs paired with smoky pancetta and a slowly cooked peperonata of sweet bell peppers, onions, and capers, all tied together with a drizzle of olive oil and balsamic glaze.

name: Chickpea Spinach Stuffed Sweet Potato
description: Super satisfying and packed with nutrients, Chef Meena‚Äôs hearty stuffed sweet potato hits every flavor and texture note, deliciously. A velvety smooth, perfectly roasted sweet potato provides the base for spiced, roasted chickpeas and savory saut√©ed spinach. Toasted sesame seeds and chili crisp add texture and a gentle warm spice. Drizzle on the creamy tahini, maple syrup, and lime sauce for tangy sweetness, and dig into a simple, flavorful, and wholesome meal.

name: Fabios Grandmas Lasagna
description: Who can resist a comforting, decadent lasagna? This one comes from Chef Fabio's grandmother's recipe book straight to your table! Her version has layers of fresh pasta, a traditional parmesan b√©chamel sauce, sugo (an Italian-style tomato sauce), and beef bolognese, all layered up with parmesan and mozzarella and topped with fresh basil. What more could you want?!

name: Texas Style Beef Short Ribs
description: Chef Chase Evans presents a hearty dish of braised short ribs with a savory demi-glace sauce. The rich beef is served on a bed of velvety smooth potato pur√©e with a side of lightly charred roasted carrots.

name: Greek Pasta Salad
description: This Greek-style pasta salad packs all your favorite ingredients from the Mediterranean into a bowl of goodness. Al dente penne pasta is dressed in a zesty basil pesto and served cold with feta cheese, sun-dried tomatoes, Kalamata olives, and fresh cucumber. Enjoy this pasta salad as a satisfying lunch or pair with your favorite protein at dinnertime.

name: Sweet and Sour Fish Fillet
description: This fish fillet is coated in freshly mixed batter and paired with saut√©ed onions and red and green bell peppers dressed in a sweet and sour sauce. Chinese sausage and fried rice round out the tender fillet and tangy vegetables.

name: Edamame Falafel
description: Introducing falafel patties inspired by Asian and Middle Eastern flavors unite in this hearty bowl made with edamame, cumin-spiced chickpea flour, mint and cilantro. Black rice pad thai noodles served over this meal with shredded endive, carrots, and scallions.

name: Middle Eastern Braised Beef Naan Pizza
description: Enjoy an elevated take on the classic Levantine street food dish, Lahmajun. Beef is braised in a flavorful base with mint, parsley and pine nuts, then served atop a fluffy Laffa flatbread and drizzled with bright yogurt-tahini-mint sauce. This is a favorite from Chef Einat‚Äôs cookbook, 'Shuk', and after one bite, you'll understand why.

name: Sweet Chili Glazed Stuffed Salmon
description: This stuffed salmon is a showstopper, and as Chef Nahika puts it, ‚Äúfantastic.‚Äù Butterflied fillets cradle a filling of tender shrimp, saut√©ed spinach, and tangy sun-dried tomatoes, brightened with garlic, herbs, and a hint of lemon zest. Marinated in a sweet chili glaze and baked to a golden crust, they‚Äôre served with buttery mashed potatoes providing a creamy contrast to the hearty seafood-forward flavors.

name: Short Rib Ragu with Pappardelle
description: Indulge in the hearty, homestyle flavor and upscale presentation of Chef John DeLucie's pappardelle with short rib ragu from his restaurant Ambra. This classic Italian dish features rich short rib, slow-cooked until falling apart-tender with tomatoes, carrots, onions, and celery, creating a rich and robust sauce. The addition of white wine adds depth and complexity to the flavors. Served over wide pappardelle noodles, this pasta dish is sure to satisfy your cravings for a warm and comforting dinner.

name: Braised Beef Quinoa Kale Enchiladas
description: Chef Jose have been serving enchiladas in his restaurants for almost 20 years, and now you can taste them at your very own dinner table! This is his take on a beef enchilada, featuring slow braised Cuban-style ground beef in the style of picadillo with golden raisins, green olives, capers and lots of spices. The beef is joined by quinoa, and kale, with Oaxaca and Monterey jack cheeses, rolled up into soft corn tortillas, and drizzled with a spicy, creamy chipotle sauce for a touch of smoky spice and additional richness. Served up with arroz moro, Cuban black beans and rice, salsa roja, and Cotija cheese, this dish is the whole package.

name: Purple Sweet Potato Pancakes
description: Made with Okinawa sweet potatoes‚Äîtreasured in Japan for their natural sweetness and rich antioxidants‚Äîthese fluffy stacks boast a nutty depth and striking purple hue. A sprinkle of toasted coconut flakes adds crunch, while a silky sweet potato coconut syrup takes each bite to the next level.

name: Banana Bbq Spare Ribs
description: Embark on a culinary journey led by Chef Armando as he presents one of his signature dishes: Filipino-style BBQ spare ribs. Succulent pork spare ribs are slow-cooked to perfection, then generously coated in a tantalizing banana BBQ sauce, infusing each bite with a delicious balance of sweet and savory flavors. Paired with velvety smooth sweet potato mash and saut√©ed green beans, this well-rounded dish is sure to be a fast favorite and weekly staple.

name: Rigatoni Amatriciana with Pancetta
description: A luxurious pork based ragu that will keep you coming back for more. Cooked with thick, rich and savory tomato sauce. Add up with chili flakes for a delicious sauce with powerful flavors. Serve with your favorite pinot noir.

name: Herb Roasted Chicken Farro Bowl
description: Farro brings a nutty flavor and chewy bite, forming the base of this wholesome bowl from Chef Ludo. Tender herb-roasted chicken breast meets generous hunks of feta cheese, flecked with sweet dates and toasted walnuts. Mixed with kale and green cabbage, it‚Äôs all splashed in a refreshing lemon vinaigrette to finish.

name: Garlic Lemongrass Shrimp Tacos
description: Enjoy a taste of Indonesia with these delectable shrimp tacos, seasoned with a bumbu samawa spice blend, then expertly grilled to perfection. Garnished with ripe cherry tomatoes and a hint of scallion, these tacos are served alongside zesty red pickled cabbage. And don‚Äôt forget the sambal mayo, lemon wedges, and dollop of sour cream for the full flavor experience!

name: Islander Tofu Spiced Tofu In Green Curry
description: Take your tastebuds on a vacation to a tropical island with grilled tofu that's been spiced with adobo spice, curry powder, and a Haitian Epis spice blend. The tofu is paired with a mild, creamy coconut green curry and served with adobo-spiced rice and saut√©ed peppers and onions. This dish is plant-based, yet bursting with aromatic flavor!

name: Chimichurri Pressed Pork
description: Braised and pressed pork laced with Chimichurri sauce accompanied with a high protein Mediterranean salad with multiple fresh herbs. Main dish and sauce can be served hot or cold.

name: Jambon Chablisienne Pork In Chablis Sauce
description: Jambon Chablisienne is a classic French dish featuring tender pork‚Äîhere a seared pork chop in place of the traditional ham‚Äîserved with a rich Chablis wine sauce. The sauce is made with a blend of tomatoes, shallots, garlic and cream, which is simmered with Chablis wine to create a savory, slightly tangy flavor and gorgeous pink color. Served with rice pilaf, cherry tomato salad, and crispy fried Brussels sprouts, this dish offers a little taste of Chef Ludo's hometown, Burgundy.

name: Herbed Cauliflower Rice
description: Rosemary, Italian parsley, and chives flavor this light and low carb side of herbed cauliflower 'rice'. Use it as a base for a healthy lunch bowl with grilled chicken and your favorite veggies, or pair with a nice fillet of steak or fish for a satisfying low-carb dinner option any night of the week.

name: Herb Marinated Chicken Breast with Texas Caviar
description: Chef Chase knows exactly what you crave on any given weeknight, and serves it up with ease and sophistication. Chicken breast that's been marinated in herbs and spices is grilled to perfection, sliced, and served atop classic Texas Caviar a.k.a. fresh corn, black bean, black eyed peas, and pepper salad. Chef pairs the dish with a creamy cilantro-lime dressing to drizzle atop everything along with fresh lime and more fresh cilantro. This fresh and satisfying meal can be enjoyed cold or warm, making it the ideal quick lunch or light dinner.

name: Mediterranean Quinoa Bowl with Chicken Thighs
description: Boneless, marinated chicken thighs sit atop a bed of quinoa and kale, alongside crumbled feta, cherry tomatoes, radishes, and toasted almonds. A caraway seed dressing finished this whole bowl of Mediterranean-inspired goodness.

name: Rosemary Chicken Thigh
description: Some crazy good chicken rubbed and marinated with lemon, rosemary, garlic finished pan-fried then roasted with creamy pasta linguini on the side for a fuss-free dinner.

name: Blackened Hanger Steak
description: You'll savor every bite of this perfectly seared, Cajun spiced blackened hanger steak. To complement the spice on the steak, Chef Ruben pairs it with a richly spiced, curry-infused creamy potato gratin and simply cooked broccolini. Chef's signature cilantro chimichurri rounds out this modern, innovative take on a classic steakhouse pairing.

name: Loaded Sweet Potato
description: Curry and sweet potato is one of the world‚Äôs great flavor combinations. Here, Chef Nahika Hillery roasts the sweet potato until it‚Äôs soft and gorgeously caramelized, then loads it with saut√©ed spinach and a hearty serving of creamy West Indian coconut curry chickpeas. The fact that something so flavorful is also so healthy is kinda hard to believe, but it‚Äôs true. With all that fiber and plant-based protein, this is a perfect post-workout meal. Pump up the nutrition even more with a fresh green salad.

name: Ground Beef Flaky Flatbread
description: Enjoy some delightfully flaky flatbread stuffed with a spiced ground beef and onion mixture along with melted cheddar cheese. The comforting and hearty meal comes with a homemade sambal aioli for an extra kick.

name: Split Pea Falafel Bowl
description: A healthy twist on a Middle Eastern classic-- made with yellow split peas and hemp seeds, and baked instead of fried, these falafels are full of flavor. Served with antioxidant black rice and anti-inflammatory golden turmeric tahini, and a generous portion of spicy Aleppo pepper cabbage slaw to balance it out.
ingredients: Vermont Pure Grade A Dark Amber Pure Maple Syrup

name: Honey Mustard Glazed Roasted Salmon
description: A sweet-and-savory glaze made with two kinds of mustard and honey is the perfect complement to tender roasted salmon. The delicate fish pairs perfectly with Moroccan couscous flavored with aromatic caramelized shallots, fine herbs, and tomatoes, alongside a simple side of blanched green beans.

name: Harvest Tuscan Kale Stew
description: Hearty, filling and satiating, this cozy harvest stew is a perfect lunch or light dinner with a hunk of crusty bread on the side. Cannellini beans, Tuscan kale, and harvest vegetables like carrots, potatoes, and shiitake mushrooms are all simmered in a rich tomato and herb broth. This soup is pure plant-based comfort food!

name: Egg Fried Rice with Pork Shrimp
description: You will absolutely love Chef Chase's "House Special" fried rice. Tender white rice is stir-fried with big pieces of fresh shrimp, ground pork, fluffy scrambled egg, as well as the classic peas and carrots. Just like your favorite takeout but better tasting, and better for you!

name: Poached Shrimp Melon
description: Do you know that shrimp are much flavorful when poached? Try this poached shrimp on a bed of frisse salad with a sweet taste of honeydew melon, cantaloupe with herbs and spices drizzled with special sauce by Chef Chris.

name: Spaghetti Squash
description: Chef Andres' delicious, healthier version of your favorite spaghetti and tomato sauce. Perfectly cooked spaghetti squash stands in for pasta, and his signature smoky tomato sauce has a kick of spice from chipotle in adobo without being spicy. Pair with your favorite protein and your dinner dilemma is solved in seconds!

name: Chimichurri Steak with Blistered Shishito Peppers
description: Chef Art adds herbaceous flair to tender-grilled flank steak, topping it with a zesty chimichurri sauce tricked up with capers and lemon. It‚Äôs paired with smoky, blistered shishito peppers and a side of golden oven-baked fries, creating a flavor-packed dish that hits all the right notes.

name: Baked Lamb Kofta
description: Ground lamb is seasoned with a blend of aromatic spices, red pepper, onions, and garlic, formed into kebab-like meatballs, and baked in the oven under tender and juicy. The delicious lamb kofta are served over a bed of turmeric rice with a refreshing Tzatziki sauce made with Greek Yogurt, dill and freshly grated cucumbers.

name: Cajun Chicken Penne Alfredo
description: Indulge in the comforting flavors of Chef Vincent's Cajun Penne Alfredo. This dish features al dente penne pasta tossed in a velvety Cajun-spiced Alfredo sauce that's absolutely irresistible, especially when paired with tender grilled chicken breast and a side of broccoli. Enjoy the simplicity and elegance of this wholesome, home-cooked delight, which pairs perfectly with a glass of your favorite white wine.

name: Quinoa Pomegranate Salad
description: Quinoa is the undercover superhero of grains‚Äîhumble yet powerful, packed with protein, and always ready to shake up your lunch routine. Here, it joins forces with crisp cucumber, chewy Medjool dates, tart dried cranberries, and toasty walnuts, while bursts of pomegranate and plenty of fresh herbs keep things lively. A creamy lemon-tahini dressing brings it home with a bright, tangy kick.

name: Moms Sunday Sauce Rigatoni
description: Authentic traditional Sunday sauce just like grandma used to make soft savory meatballs, tangy authentic marinara and spicy Italian pork sausage.

name: Kimchi Fried Rice with Shrimp
description: Your favorite comforting takeout dish gets a modern, Korean-inspired upgrade in Chef Chomsun's kimchi fried rice. Caramelized kimchi gets stir-fried with fluffy rice, plump shrimp, aromatic scallions, spinach, and bean sprouts all in a crunchy garlic and shallot-infused chili oil that will keep you coming back for bite after satisfying bite.

name: Gouda Burger with Jg Secret Sauce
description: Sink your teeth into the ultimate indulgence! Chef James‚Äôs burger features a juicy grilled beef patty topped with creamy, smoked Gouda cheese, crisp Romaine lettuce, and briny pickles‚Äîall on a toasted potato bun. Finished off with a generous drizzle of tangy Big Mac-style sauce, this burger delivers an unforgettable combination of flavors. Each bite is a perfect blend of savory beef, rich cheese, and creamy sauce. Keep this one in your order queue and you can crush a burger craving any time you want.

name: Roasted Salmon with Pink Mashed Potatoes
description: This colorful dish features perfectly roasted salmon served with beet-infused mashed potatoes and asparagus. You'll come for the color and stay for the delectable flavors!

name: Masala Beef Kebabs
description: Chef Aarthi transforms one of her favorite street foods into a full, balanced meal. The kebab, made of succulent, lightly spicy ground beef, is flavored with mint, ginger, and house-made garam masala and served over Indian-style rice (flavored with lime and spices). Meanwhile, a luscious mint-cucumber yogurt dip cools things down and a side of vegetables completes the meal.

name: Vadouvan Shrimp
description: Fresh shrimp seasoned with a flavorful vadouvan curry powder, served with a fresh lentil salad and a creamy squash soup.

name: Honey Walnut Shrimp
description: The crispy pan-fried shrimp here is tossed in a sweet honey sauce and accompanied by crunchy candied walnuts and tender steamed broccoli. But it's the addition of steamed black rice that truly elevates the meal, adding a nutty flavor to balance out the sweetness.

name: Chickpea Quinoa Salad
description: This salad is vegetarian, gluten-free, and packed with plant-based protein thanks to chickpeas and hearty tricolor quinoa. In addition to chickpeas and quinoa, the salad features grilled squash, arugula, cherry tomatoes, cucumbers, kalamata olives and radishes. Topped with fresh mint, goat cheese, and Chef Ruben's lemony house-made tahini dressing, it's a Mediterranean-inspired masterpiece.

name: Herbed Tilapia Over Vegetable Ragout
description: Considered the Ratatouille of Greece, Tourlouk (meaning all mixed up) is a delicious way of cooking fresh-from-the-garden vegetables in an herbed tomato sauce. Chef Jona pairs his version of Tourlouk with flaky tilapia that's been crusted in Mediterranean herbs. The accompanying lentils and rice make this an extra satisfying meal, which can be enjoyed either hot or at room temperature.

name: Salsa Verde Grilled Branzino
description: A simply seasoned grilled branzino filet lets the quality of the fish speak for itself. Chef DeLucie pairs the perfectly cooked fish with a bright, tangy salsa verde made with fresh herbs and salty capers, as well as a nutty farro salad, and herbed roasted carrots. A squeeze of lemon over the top brings the whole dish together.

name: Caramelized Apple Pancakes
description: When it comes to breakfast, brunch, or BFD (breakfast for dinner), there's nothing better than fluffy flapjacks. Chef John makes his restaurant-style stack with Ricotta, which transforms the pancakes from airy and plain to rich and creamy. Caramelized Granny Smith apples balance out the rich batter, and a scrumptious cinnamon-infused blend of maple syrup and creamy Mascarpone adds a layer of complexity to the dish.

name: Roasted Salmon and Couscous Bowl
description: This delicious bowl is jam-packed with couscous, pickled beets, goat cheese, arugula, and asparagus, but the star of the show is spectacular salmon chunks, cooked to absolute perfection. Finished with Chef Ruben's unique habanero-passionfruit sauce‚Äîwhich adds a citrusy touch of heat‚Äîit's a symphony of flavors and textures that come together in fresh harmony. You cannot miss it!

name: Chicken Yassa Tacos
description: Chef Pierre takes a culinary detour from tradition, turning Senegal‚Äôs beloved Chicken Yassa into a must-have taco night addition. Spice-grilled chicken thighs meet two different sauces: Chef‚Äôs signature caramelized onion Yassa, and Rof, a bright blend of parsley, garlic, and lemon. It‚Äôs all topped with a refreshing mango-cabbage slaw, and wrapped into soft tortillas.

name: Crispy Tofu Spicy Ranch Sauce
description: Heat-seekers: This one‚Äôs for you. First, Chef Tracey coats a generous portion of firm tofu cubes in a light corn starch batter and fries until perfectly crispy and golden, then she tosses them with a medley of vegetables, including Fresno and jalape√±o peppers, and drizzles it all in a tantalizing Spicy Ranch Sauce, which gets its cool from tangy buttermilk and its kick from Sriracha. A side of Grilled Broccoli adds smoky goodness while a finishing touch of sesame seeds lends a nutty aroma and a hint of crunch. This flavor-packed ensemble will elevate any weeknight.

name: Beef Birria Quesadillas
description: This dish may be known worldwide now, but it originally hails from Chef Santiago's hometown. Birria is a Mexican speciality made with meat that's braised for hours in a flavorful broth, then typically served at special events in the form of tacos. Chef wanted to mix things up and build his rich beef birria into decadent quesadillas packed full of creamy Oaxaca & mozzarella cheeses. To take things over the top, the quesadillas are accompanied by the flavorful broth that the beef cooked in. Served with a creamy avocado sauce and simple red cabbage slaw to cut through all that richness, this is a truly spectacular dish that you will‚Äîwithout a doubt‚Äîlove.

name: Chashu Pork Belly Rice Bowl
description: Chef Esther's classically prepared chashu‚ÄîJapanese-style braised pork‚Äîbelly is the star of this dish. The decadent, tender pork is served simply, over steamed rice with a soy-marinated, hard-boiled egg and steamed bok choy. Mix all the elements of the rice bowl together and dig in!

name: Chipotle Chicken Salad
description: Chef Maribel's chicken salad is inspired from Mexico's use of cooked and then chilled chicken, fish, or beef mixed with cold vegetables known as salpicon. The chicken is braised with a chipotle adobo with aromatics like garlic and onions to create a flavorful and juicy result. Once shredded the chicken is mixed with lime juice to be mixed with fresh vegetables such as romaine lettuce, green cabbage, carrots, radishes, pickled red onions, and charred corn on the cob. This mix of cold ingredients is recommended to be mixed with Chef Maribel's favorite dressing. ¬°Buen provecho!

name: Salmon Cobb Salad
description: Cobb Salad with Lemon Dill marinated baked Salmon Medallions

name: Grilled Pork Loin
description: Dominating the dish with grilled pork loin in maple pecan, harmonizes with mashed sweet potato and some herbs and spices for some crunch and substance.

name: Braised Short Ribs
description: This classic yet sophisticated short rib dish is all about the technique. Gorgeous, succulent ribs are braised until melt-in-your-mouth tender and served with earthy roasted root vegetables in natural jus.

name: Roasted Red Miso Cod
description: Simple, flavorful ingredients and impeccable cooking technique are the hallmarks of this elegant, indulgent meal from Chef Sergio.
