He marinates and roasts mild, tender cod loin in a super-savory and umami-rich red miso, sugar, and white wine sauce (with extra on the side for drizzling). On the side: a mound of steamed rice and tender-crisp bok choy sauteed with garlic and toasted sesame oil for warm, nutty richness. This is a dish that will not only satisfy your hunger but also your passion for bold flavors.

name: Gorgonzola Mac Cheese with Pancetta
description: The name says it all! Ooey gooey mac and cheese takes a little inspiration from Carbonara with some rendered pancetta, caramelized onions, and peas. Finished with creamy, sharp gorgonzola cheese sauce that makes this dish taste like a five-star sophisticated entr√©e. The ingredients speak for themselves in this amped up take on a comfort classic. This meal does well in both the microwave or the oven, it just depends on if you prefer the cheese on top more on the crispy side. A tip from Chef Chris: if you go the oven-route, microwaving it for two minutes first cuts down baking time significantly.

name: Curry Chicken Chickpeas
description: This flavorful and hearty dish combines tender pieces of chicken and protein-rich chickpeas in a fragrant curry sauce. The addition of saut√©ed kale brings a nutritious fresh element, while the potatoes provide a satisfying and comforting base. This dish offers a delightful blend of spices, textures, and wholesome ingredients, creating a delicious and well-balanced meal you'll find yourself craving time after time.

name: Eggplant Fritter Bowl
description: Delicately fried vegetable fritters crafted from eggplant, cheese, dill, and parsley are the star of this dish, served on a bed of fragrant jasmine rice alongside crispy fried cauliflower drizzled with tantalizing tahini and pomegranate syrup. Enjoy a burst of sweet flavor from blistered cherry tomatoes and pop of texture from seasoned chickpeas, while savoring the heat of blistered long peppers. Complete the feast with a drizzle of creamy cacik, a Turkish dill yogurt sauce similar to tzatziki, which adds a refreshing touch to this harmonious ensemble of flavors and textures.

name: Grilled Hanger Steak In Anticuchera Sauce
description: Treat yourself with Chef Walther‚Äôs indulgent, creative take on a steak-and-potatoes dinner. He starts with extra-flavorful hanger steak marinated in Peruvian anticuchera sauce (a spicy blend of aji panca chile paste, cumin, oregano, and red wine vinegar), then grills it to a perfectly juicy medium rare and tops it with herbal, garlicky chimichurri. He serves the steak with a hearty portion of tender roasted fingerling potatoes, cremini mushrooms, zucchini, sweet bell pepper, and onion, all tossed in a buttery truffle sauce for umami richness‚Äîand a meal you won‚Äôt soon forget.

name: Cajun Roasted Turkey Breast
description: Why wait for Thanksgiving when you can savor this tantalizing combination of fall flavors anytime you like? Seasoned with zesty Cajun spices, Chef Angelia‚Äôs roasted turkey breast is moist, juicy, and packed with flavor. She serves it with a homey, honey-glazed sweet potato and apple casserole and saut√©ed broccolini tossed with garlic and red pepper for a hint of heat. With its perfect balance of savory and sweet, this hearty, holiday-style meal satisfies craving.

name: Hot and Sour Shrimp Soup
description: Chef Nora's take on a traditional hot and sour soup is so tasty, it's just as good as your go-to restaurant's if not better. With chunks of sweet shrimp, tender tofu, and just a hint of chili to warm you up, it's a comfort soup you can turn to any time of year, no matter what the weather's like outside.

name: Balsamic Grilled Pork Chop
description: This well-loved grilled pork has a delicious sweet and spicy blend that you will enjoy.

name: Salmon Tandoori
description: Chef Einat marinates rich, buttery salmon in aromatic spices then grills it to perfection for mouthwateringly smoky flavor. Paired with a cooling raita, it beautifully balances heat and freshness. And when you dig into the accompanying blend of hearty brown lentils, quinoa, and peas, it all adds up to a nutritious, satisfying meal that elevates any weeknight with a delicious fusion of flavors!

name: Perfectly Grilled Rack of Lamb
description: This dish features pasture-raised Australian lamb grilled to perfection. It is served with a red wine reduction and a creamy potato gratin spiked with Parmigiano Reggiano and finished with a silky reduction of cabernet sauvignon. The lamb is humanely raised without antibiotics or added hormones for a clean, natural flavor and remarkable tenderness.

name: Stir Fried Coriander Lemongrass Shrimp
description: Perfectly saut√©ed shrimp are simmered in a mouthwatering coconut curry sauce infused with kaffir lime leaves and lemongrass, as well as a traditional Indonesian spice paste rich in turmeric. Served alongside aromatic coconut rice, this dish offers an authentic taste of coastal Indonesian cooking.

name: Chicken Tenders For Kids
description: Crisp on the outside and tender on the inside, these chicken tenders are built for little hands and big appetites. Grilled zucchini batons sneak in a daily dose of veggies, while a side of naturally sweet tomato marinara makes for a delightful dipper.

name: Spicy Peanut Noodles with Baked Tofu
description: These Thai-inspired peanut noodles are not only delicious, but also vegan and gluten-free using organic, whole-food ingredients. The creamy peanut sauce is perfect balance of tangy and sweet with a little kick from ginger and chili pepper. The sauce is tossed with gluten free sweet potato noodles, baked high protein organic tofu, and seasoned roasted broccoli, then the whole dish is topped with fresh cilantro, a squeeze of lime, and an addictive peanut-chili crunch for a little extra kick. Turn up the heat on any weeknight with this good and good-for-you dish!

name: Mushroom Swiss Beef Burger
description: Decadent and delicious, comfort food doesn't get better than this. Chef Ruben's fully-loaded burger features a juicy beef patty, saut√©ed mushrooms and onions, and Swiss cheese, all piled high on a plush potato bun. Accompanied by crispy sweet potato fries and a smoky chipotle aioli dipping sauce, it's worth savoring every last bite of this dish.

name: Mexican Style Steak Eggs
description: Chef Santiago's take on a classic, protein-packed breakfast. His version brings together seasoned flank steak and eggs, served along with Mexican home fries and saut√©ed spinach, a Chinese veggie in the same family as bok choy. Steak and eggs is famous everywhere, but the smoky Pasilla chile salsa and steak seasonings give it a special flavor that is distinctly Mexican and totally delicious.

name: Salmon with Red Pepper Sauce
description: Italian cuisine inspired seafood dish. Rustic red tomato sauce prepared with broccolini, grape tomatoes, kalamata olives, capers and garlic. Paired with pan-seared salmon seasoned with herbs and spices.

name: Lamb Kebab with Turmeric Hummus
description: Tender minced lamb kebabs are roasted until crisp on the outside and juicy on the inside, then served over Chef Akhtar's special turmeric-laced hummus with spiced-roasted sweet potato wedges and pickled cucumbers on the side.

name: Jerk Marinated Tofu Bowl
description: Embark on a voyage to the tropics with this flavor-packed jerk tofu bowl. Jerk spice-marinated tofu is nestled atop fluffy yellow rice and accompanied by turmeric-roasted cauliflower and scallions. Drizzled with a delicious dairy-free coconut-infused Fresno hot sauce, this vibrant dish offers a delightful fusion of Caribbean-inspired flavors and wholesome ingredients.

name: Sauteed Shrimp A La Diabla
description: Experience Chef Santos' exquisite Pacific Mexican creation, featuring succulent saut√©ed shrimp in a fiery chile de arbol sauce. Accompanied by fluffy white rice to balance out the heat, this dish is elevated with a burst of citrusy freshness thanks to a squeeze of zesty lemon and sprinkling of aromatic parsley.

name: Classic Duck Confit
description: Chef Dustin's duck leg confit is prepared with the traditional French technique, and the resulting meat is so tender it's practically falling off the bone. To give a contrast of texture, Chef pairs it with a bright succotash salad full of roasted corn, peas, Brussels sprouts, tomato, and spices, as well as a Yukon gold potato pur√©e to bring a creamy, rich element. A side of red pepper compound butter can be added atop any component of the dish to instantly elevate its flavor.

name: Chicken Tinga Empanadas
description: Chicken Tinga is a classic, comforting dish with Mexican roots, and here Chef Santiago tucks traditional tinga into crispy handmade empanadas. Each of the dish's elements complement each other, from the crunchy empanada shells to the tender chicken filling, paired with simple, creamy polenta and an exquisite chipotle mayo sauce. The harmonious combination not only brings together flavors and textures, but also traditions and cultures.

name: Penne Pasta with Mushroom Bolognese
description: This dish checks all the boxes, it's Vegetarian, Gluten-Free, and delicious. Chef Dan's spin on this Italian classic uses mushrooms to create a genuinely meaty flavor. This a hearty dish that will make you feel like you are at Nonna's. If you don‚Äôt finish with the parm, It‚Äôs Vegan as well!

name: Feta Tomato Spinach Frittata
description: In this nourishing, feel-good dish, eggs are whisked with a pinch of salt and black pepper, then folded with tender spinach, juicy cherry tomatoes, and tangy crumbled feta. Baked until golden, it‚Äôs rich in protein, full of color, and endlessly versatile‚Äîjust as good for a slow morning as it is for a light, wholesome lunch.

name: Grilled Salmon with Daikon Salad
description: Salmon contains a specific type of unsaturated fat called omega-3 fatty acids. Salmon is coated with olive oil, salt and pepper served with daikon salad.

name: Baked Herbed Cod
description: Buttery, flaky cod is baked with garlic and herbs, and served with roasted asparagus, yellow and red bell peppers, and topped with a light sauce in this simply delicious, gluten-free dish.

name: Garlic Parsley Cod
description: A super delicious and simple meal Basque-inspired paleo cod flavored with garlic, lemon, and fresh italian parsley.

name: Halibut with Coconut Sauce
description: Roasted halibut with a South Indian coconut curry and chickpea and lentil rice.

name: al Pastor Pork Burrito
description: One of the most popular street foods in Mexico, here irresistible Al Pastor-style pork is tucked into a tasty burrito! Chef Santiago's marinated pork butt is roasted until tender with the traditional pineapple for a tangy kick of sweetness. The tender pork is wrapped up in a soft flour tortilla with mozzarella cheese and traditional rice and refried beans, then served with a refreshing avocado crema to cool and balance everything.

name: Mexican Beef Short Ribs
description: Slow-cooked short ribs with a tangy olive salsa and sweet pea falafel.

name: Open Faced Chicken Parm Sandwich
description: This take on chicken parm features crusty ciabatta bread toasted golden then slicked with garlicky butter and mozzarella. On top: tender chicken breast generously soaked in sundried tomato sauce.

name: Avocado Green Smoothie
description: No time to blend? Grab and go with Pressed Juicery's signature Avocado Greens Smoothie! This clean and simple recipe is packed with power greens like spinach, kale, and spirulina, mixed with banana, avocado, and matcha for a creamy, smooth taste.

name: Spiced Roasted Branzino
description: Each bite of this perfectly roasted branzino filet reveals a satisfying blend of aromatic spices and tender, buttery fish. The delicate fish is paired with nutrient-rich quinoa and saut√©ed collard greens for a meal that will make you feel as good as it tastes.

name: Chipotle Grass Fed Meatballs
description: Mouthwatering baked meatballs are served with mild spicy chipotle sauce. Cabbage wedges are roasted to perfection and served with a delicious chimichurri to be poured on top. The outburst of flavors in this meal makes it perfect!

name: Prosciutto Grain Salad
description: Chef Dustin‚Äôs bright salad brings together the best of Italian flavors: nutty farro, crunchy fennel, shaved cotija cheese, and juicy Castelvetrano olives. It's all served on a bed of baby kale and topped off with fresh parsley and sliced almonds ‚Äî a healthy, balanced mix of flavor and fuel.

name: Creamy Truffle Fettuccine Alfredo
description: Chef Meena elevates this luxurious, creamy fettuccine Alfredo with the earthy richness of truffle and meaty, saut√©ed Portabella mushrooms. Each strand of pasta is coated in velvety, truffle-infused sauce, made with butter, heavy cream, and freshly grated Parmesan cheese. Freshly cracked black pepper enhances the earthy, umami flavors with a bold, peppery bite, while a shower of parsley adds a pop of freshness and color. Indulge in a true treat meal.

name: Chicken Peanut
description: Pan-roasted chicken with a smooth paste of ginger and garlic. Topped with peanuts, plus greens of kale, gem lettuce, snow peas blanched in aromatic and tangy flavors.

name: Beet Cakes with Quinoa Cashew Tabbouleh
description: Enjoy this Moroccan inspired dish packed with flavor. Beets are baked to perfection with a variety of vegetables to form falafel-like cakes, and topped with amazing aioli. They sit atop a quinoa cashew tabbouleh salad, topped with fresh mint and Italian parsley. This meal is incredibly satisfying, healthy, and did we mention, vegan-friendly?

name: Seared Salmon with Yogurt Dill Sauce
description: Salmon is seasoned simply with salt and pepper before getting seared to crisp perfection. It's then topped with a creamy yogurt sauce with lemon and dill and served alongside saut√©ed yellow squash and zucchini. Simple, filling, and full of summery flavor.

name: Vegan Bowl
description: The perfect Vegan bowl prepared by Chef Ruben! A bowl loaded with healthy ingredients from kale to sweet potatoes to avocado! It was love at first bite - super satisfying and it's flavorful.

name: Chocolate Cherry Cake Jar
description: Layered with a creamy mousse frosting, this lush dessert brings chocolatey depth in jar form. The cake‚Äôs rich flavor is enhanced by buttermilk and cocoa powder, with a hint of espresso adding roasted warmth. A glossy red spread of sour cherries keeps everything gorgeously gooey.

name: Slow Roasted Kalua Pulled Pork
description: For his take on this Hawaiian classic, Chef Armando slow-roasts tamarind-marinated pork shoulder inside fresh banana leaves until it‚Äôs meltingly fork-tender, then pairs a hearty portion with sweet, tangy pineapple salsa. It‚Äôs a perfectly refreshing contrast to the smoky meat. Saut√©ed string beans and fluffy Jasmine rice infused with savory tamari sauce and fried garlic complete a meal that‚Äôs like taking a tropical vacation any night of the week.

name: Greek Grilled Chicken Salad
description: Light and refreshing, yet packed with protein and flavor. A traditional Greek salad with all the components you love‚Äîtomato, cucumber, bell pepper, Kalamata olives, and feta‚Äîgets bulked up with some herb-marinated and grilled chicken breast. A zesty red wine vinaigrette completes the dish, which is perfect for a lighter dinner or more filling lunch, and certainly satiating enough to keep you energized on busy weekdays!

name: Tuscan Butter Shrimp
description: Warning-- this dish may have your family wondering if you hired an Italian chef. Inspired by the hills of Tuscany, this creamy shrimp dish features a rich, buttery white wine sauce enhanced by sweet cherry tomatoes and served with garlicky broccolini and spinach on the side. Mangia!

name: Deconstructed Shepherds Pie
description: For her deconstructed take on the British pub-food classic, Chef Fabiola combines tender, flavorful, and perfectly seasoned ground lamb in a rich, tangy tomato-based sauce; fresh diced carrots, peas, and corn kernels saut√©ed in rich butter with garlic and herbs; and fluffy, creamy mashed potatoes. Then she plates the dish so you can enjoy each bite separately or stir everything together for an explosion of flavor and texture. Homey, hearty, and comforting, this carefully crafted meal satisfies on every level.

name: Tonkotsu Ramen Chashu Pork Belly
description: Chef Esther's take on a classic Japanese noodle soup. Her version pairs a long-simmered, rich and creamy broth with fresh ramen noodles and sliced tender braised pork belly. Spinach and corn are the finishing touches on this show-stopping, deeply flavorful soup.

name: Garlic Ginger Chicken Breast
description: Garlic Ginger Chicken Breast by Kristy Flores is a flavorful and nutritious meal featuring tender chicken breast infused with garlic and ginger, served alongside a medley of fresh vegetables.

name: Mango Salsa Grilled Chicken Bowl
description: This vibrant and flavorful Mango Salsa Grilled Chicken Bowl is a fusion of fresh ingredients and bold flavors. This refreshing dish combines succulent grilled chicken breast with a vibrant, house-made mango salsa that's both sweet and zesty. Nestled on a bed of fluffy Basmati rice and protein-rich black beans, each bowl offers a perfect balance of flavors and textures. Our mango salsa brings together juicy mangoes, ripe tomatoes, crisp bell peppers, and tangy red onions for a burst of freshness in every bite. Not just delicious, this nutritious meal is packed with lean protein, fiber, and essential vitamins to keep you energized and satisfied. It's a celebration of simple, quality ingredients that come together in a colorful, appetite-appealing presentation.

name: Traditional Beef Birria Quesadillas
description: This dish may be known worldwide now, but it originally hails from Chef Santiago's hometown. Birria is a Mexican speciality made with meat that's braised for hours in a flavorful broth, then typically served at special events in the form of tacos. Chef wanted to mix things up and build his rich beef birria into decadent quesadillas packed full of creamy Oaxaca & mozzarella cheeses. To take things over the top, the quesadillas are accompanied by the flavorful broth that the beef cooked in. Served with a creamy avocado sauce and simple red cabbage slaw to cut through all that richness, this is a truly spectacular dish that you will‚Äîwithout a doubt‚Äîlove.

name: Spicy Stir Fried Chicken
description: Bring the heat on any weeknight with this spicy, flavor-packed, one-bowl meal. Tender, juicy pieces of diced chicken thigh get marinated in sweet and savory Korean teriyaki sauce, kicked up with extra chili heat, then wok-fired for flavorful caramelization. It‚Äôs paired with fiery, funky kimchi‚Äîthe signature Korean dish of napa cabbage, green onion, and garlic fermented with gochugaru (Korean red chili); a refreshingly crisp, sweet-and-sour daikon radish salad for crunch; and sticky rice. Stir it all together and dig in!

name: Hearty Turkey Chili
description: Craving a bowl full of warm comfort? For this robust, hearty chili, Chef Michael simmers lean ground turkey in a richly spiced tomato base. It's topped with shredded Cheddar cheese that melts into the warm chili, adding a creamy texture, and served with fresh tomato and lettuce for crisp contrast. A dollop of tangy sour cream offers cooling balance to the flavorful, spicy notes. Pair it with a corn muffin from your favorite bakery and savor a soul-satisfying meal.

name: Chipotle Shrimp
description: This meal will bring you to a tropical island mood. Shrimp is marinaded in a chipotle mustard blend served with a crisp salad of cabbage, cucumber, and avocado.

name: Pulled Pork with Esquites Salad
description: Chef Chris‚Äô pulled pork is no joke but in this meal, he decided to pair it up with a side dish that could easily be the star in its own right. Chef makes a grilled corn salad inspired by the Mexican street corn he used to eat in Sunset Park, Brooklyn, with grilled corn, mayo, lime, Cojita cheese, jalape√±o, and cilantro. Of course the pork also needs to be on point, and his pork shoulder is slow cooked for over 8 hours in apple juice and spices before being hand-pulled and mixed in with some of Chef‚Äôs house chipotle BBQ sauce. Chef highly recommends heating this meal in the microwave but notes the corn salad is equally delicious hot or cold!

name: Ahi Tuna Bowl
description: Savor the flavor of grilled ahi tuna served with a symphony of rice noodles, fresh veggies, and a creamy sweet and tangy avocado mango sauce. Enjoy the Tuna medium to medium rare for that fresh ocean flavor.

name: Chili Ginger Flat Iron Steak
description: This tantalizing flat iron steak comes marinated with chili and ginger, cooked to perfection, and served over fluffy coconut rice with a side of steamed bok choy and a zesty green onion relish. These flavors combine for a hearty and satisfying meal!

name: Vegetable Tagine with Spicy Coconut Sauce
description: Chef Daniel's fun, fusion take on a classic Middle Eastern dish! Colorful vegetables like sweet potatoes, carrots, cauliflower, and potatoes are slow braised to tender perfection in a richly spiced coconut sauce with just a kick of spice from harissa paste and touch of sweetness from dried apricots. The flavor-packed tagine is paired with a typical side: Maftoul, a Palestinian version of fluffy, spiced couscous.

name: Key Lime Pancakes with Lime Syrup
description: Chef DeLucie knows how to start the day off on the right foot. These unique pancakes take your favorite summertime pie to places its never been before, bringing together the tart freshness of key lime juice, the rich decadence of mascarpone cream, and the aromatic essence of kaffir limes in a sweet syrup. These pancakes redefine breakfast with their light and fluffy texture and irresistibly tangy flavor that will keep you coming back for more.

name: Enchilada Casserole
description: You will love this tasty spicy flavorful veggie casserole. It's your comfort food minus the guilt. Perfect blend of enchilada sauce made from the finest herbs and spices by Chef Andres.

name: Grandads Bbq Ribs
description: Treat yourself to a flavorful and hearty BBQ meal with Bubb's' signature dish featuring smoky ribs, slow-cooked baked beans, braised greens, and a tangy BBQ sauce made with root beer, inspired by Chef's grandfather's love of the classic soda. The star of the dish are the ribs, high-quality baby back ribs, slathered with Bubb's signature BBQ sauce that gives them a tangy and smoky flavor. The ribs are then slow-cooked in a smoker until they are fall-off-the-bone, melt-in-your-mouth tender and delicious. Paired with bacon-laden braised greens and smoky baked beans, this dish has everything you'd expect in an authentic BBQ plate. If you're looking for a mouth-watering, finger-licking dish, these ribs are the perfect choice.

name: Aarthis Spl Chicken Breast Tikka Masala
description: According to Chef Aarthi, this dish is always a crowd favorite. Pieces of chicken breast are simmered in a silky butter tomato sauce that's flavored with fenugreek and nigella seeds. On the side, she serves a special rice that brings together cumin and fresh peas.

name: Roasted Chicken Over Quinoa Black Bean Corn Salad
description: Looking for a healthy option that still promises bright, bold flavors? Look no further. Tender chicken breast roasted with garlic and herbs is cooked to juicy perfection, then served atop a Latin American-inspired tricolor quinoa salad with black beans, corn, cucumber, and plum tomato. To bring together all the elements in harmony, Chef Andres pairs the chicken and quinoa with a creamy, refreshing sauce made with cucumber, cilantro, lime juice, and olive oil. This colorful meal is just as delicious as it is nutritious, making it a perfect choice for any season.

name: Garlicky Shrimp Scampi
description: Buttery and garlicky with hints of lemon and parsley, Chef Dustin's shrimp scampi is all you could want in a seafood dish. Enjoy the sweet, succulent shrimp on their own or dip them in the delicate cream sauce that comes on the side. Serve with linguine and your go-to vegetable and you have dinner for two done in minutes.

name: Garlic Basil Chicken Over Fettuccine
description: Comforting and familiar, Chef Kendra's Garlic Basil Chicken is a soon-to-be favorite for the entire family. Juicy, perfectly seasoned chicken breast is bathed in a rich, creamy tomato butter sauce and served on a bed of al dente fettuccine pasta for a savory, aromatic meal you'll find yourself craving week in and week out.

name: Grilled Shrimp Over Marinara Risotto
description: Take a trip to Italy without even leaving your kitchen. Chef Santiago pairs a deliciously creamy tomato risotto with perfectly seasoned and seared shrimp. For a pop of color, texture, and nutrition, Chef adds in freshly saut√©ed zucchini and peas, plus a sprinkle of Parmesan cheese to complete the dish!

name: Chicken Soba Noodle Salad
description: A delicious Korean-inspired cold soba noodle salad. The nutty soba noodles are served chilled accompanied by Chef Esther's signature kimchi as well as shiitake mushrooms, cucumbers, grated carrots, shredded chicken, and a creamy sesame dressing. These noodles are refreshing yet super satisfying for lunch or a lighter dinner!

name: Portobello Mushroom Poblano
description: Dark green chili poblanos are used to make the deeply satisfying, rich sauce that pairs perfectly with the meaty mushrooms that are cooked to perfection.

name: Shrimp Ceviche Tostadas
description: This mango Shrimp Ceviche (par cooked) is such a hit! It has an amazing tropical feel to it with all that mango, avocado and citrus!

name: Comfort Chicken Roganjosh
description: Warm up any weeknight with Chef Aarthi‚Äôs delectable Kashmiri-style chicken curry. Tender boneless chicken thighs are braised in rich Roganjosh gravy, which features a savory blend of tomatoes, onion, ginger, garlic, chiles, fragrant spices, and a touch of creamy, tangy Greek yogurt. It‚Äôs accompanied by a side of spicy roasted cauliflower, basmati rice, and peas for a pretty pop of color and freshness. This is Chef Aarthi's comfort cooking at its finest!

name: Stir Fry Shrimp Broccoli
description: Experience the classic flavors of Chinese cuisine with succulent shrimp, crisp broccoli, and tender carrots wok-tossed to perfection, creating a delightful medley of textures and tastes. Served over steamed white Calrose rice and drizzled with a savory oyster sauce, this dish is a fan-favorite for good reason!

name: Ube Halaya Stuffed French Toast
description: Ube halaya is a custard-like Filipino dessert made from purple sweet potatoes, also known as ube. Here, it forms the creamy filling for Chef Stacy‚Äôs brioche French toast, soaked in a vanilla-laced batter and dunked in crushed cornflakes. Griddled until golden and finished with candied blueberry-maple syrup, this breakfast dish blends nostalgia with morning luxury.

name: Mediterranean Chicken Thighs
description: Pan-seared boneless chicken thighs are served over a bed of crisp tuscan kale, saut√©ed artichokes, tomatoes and roasted red peppers for a Mediterranean moment. Topped with briny crumbled feta and a flavorful green romesco sauce, this dish is absolutely bursting with flavor and color.

name: Fire Grilled Chicken
description: The colors of the Italian flag! Green, white, and Red. Delicious marinated and grilled chicken, buttery basily spaetzle, savory sauce mornay, and bright cherry tomatoes.

name: Salmon Veggie Bowl
description: Chef prepared a healthy delicious salmon meal flaked over a bed of healthy vegetable salad. Indulge into this healthy concoction for a bowl of goodness.

name: Truffle Buffalo Chicken Mac
description: Chef Dustin takes mac & cheese totally over the top in the best possible way with this incredible combination of flavors and textures. First, the pasta: He enrobes curly cavatappi in a creamy, rich sauce that blends Cheddar and Swiss cheeses for a perfect mix of sharpness and nuttiness. Umami-rich truffle takes it up another notch. Next, the chicken: He tosses pulled grilled breast meat with a buttery blend of Frank‚Äôs Hot Sauce, garlic, and brown sugar for sweet heat. The final touch: Crispy Fried Onions for contrasting crunch. Pair with a fresh green salad and indulge in classic comfort food with the kind of gourmet twist only a talented chef can provide.

name: Moroccan Chickpea Lentil Stew
description: This hearty stew is full of vibrant veggies and warming spices, offering a cozy and hearty meal for any occasion. A lentil and chickpea combo provides complete protein for plant-based eaters, butternut squash and Lacinato kale bring depth of flavor, and bright ingredients like ginger, lemon and cilantro round it all out. It's vegan, gluten-free, and super nutritious and delicious.

name: Mission Style Beef Burrito
description: Mission style burritos are a classic California style of burrito known for their big size and even bigger flavors. This one is absolutely jam packed with Cuban-style ground beef in the style of picadillo with golden raisins, green olives, capers and lots of spices. The beef is joined by seasoned black beans, white rice, and a three cheese blend with pepper jack, white cheddar, and Oaxacan cheeses. All of this goodness is rolled up in a soft flour tortilla, pressed until crispy on the edges and served up with salsa verde and Mexican crema. Consider your cravings crushed!

name: Seared Barramundi and Moroccan Couscous
description: A fillet of flaky, tender fish roasted to perfection sits on a bed of fluffy Moroccan couscous. Roasted broccolini and confit tomatoes are the perfect sophisticated side dishes, and a creamy tzatziki-style sauce brings the whole dish together. This is light and refreshing food for warm summer nights.

name: Salisbury Steak In Onion Gravy
description: Salisbury steaks were big in the 1970s, and Chef Anthony has fond memories of eating them in school. Chef developed this recipe to his liking, with more sauce and better ingredients. He tops a seasoned meatloaf with caramelized onion gravy, and serves it with sweet peas and roasted fingerling potatoes. It‚Äôs everything you want in nostalgic comfort food.

name: Roasted Chicken Chimichurri
description: Thoughtfully crafted with balance in mind, this wholesome meal will fill you up without weighing you down. Herb-roasted chicken breast is topped with a bright, garlicky chimichurri featuring parsley, and olive oil, with just enough heat to keep things interesting. Honey-glazed broccoli adds a lively crunch, while creamy mashed sweet potatoes bring a smooth, buttery contrast.

name: Fajita Bowl with Impossible Chorizo
description: Another delicious bowl full of vegan goodness from Chef Anne! This dish reaches South of the border for some fajita-inspired flavors, with smoky black beans, saut√©ed peppers and onions, and spicy Impossible plant-based chorizo. Add in some nutty brown rice, cabbage, corn, and a smoky vegan chipotle pepper crema and you've got an absolutely irresistible dish!

name: Short Rib Sliders
description: Delicious braised short rib for this amazing sliders full of veggies, it's an amazing bliss in a box!

name: Sriracha Rainbow Noodle Salad
description: Enjoy this rainbow gluten free salad made with rice noodles, topped with tofu and vibrant colors of carrots, avocado, cabbages and other herbs.

name: Sweet Savory Teriyaki Meatballs
description: Chef Esther is about to become your kid's new favorite person after they taste her take on a classic Japanese comfort food: tender meatballs glazed in homemade teriyaki sauce. These juicy beef and pork meatballs burst with bold, savory and sweet flavors, enhanced by rich umami undertones. Served alongside brown rice and stir-fried green beans, peas and carrots, this meal is the complete package. Garnished with toasted sesame seeds, your kids will look forward to dinner when this dish is on the table.

name: Macho Mexican Cheese Burger
description: Chef Santiago's version of a Mexican hamburger is packed with so many layers of flavor, it'll blow your usual burger away. A juicy beef patty sneaks a bit of heat thanks to three types of chili peppers‚Äîsome smoky, some hot‚Äîthen gets finished with melty pepperjack cheese for a little extra kick. To take it over the top, it's topped with roasted jalape√±os and caramelized onions and plated on a plush potato bun. The cheeseburger is paired with curly potatoes fries, plus a chipotle aioli to dip, dunk, and smear on everything. Indulge in this seriously delicious dish!

name: Grilled Salmon with Couscous Harissa
description: Grilled salmon, buttery and tender, meets its match with Chef Maribel‚Äôs harissa‚Äîa fiery blend of roasted peppers, chili, and warm spices. They‚Äôre served with fluffy couscous, made creamy and nutty from a hint of tahini, and a side of charred zucchini. Bright, balanced, and filling, this nourishing dish will make you feel as good as it tastes.

name: Panko Crusted Chicken Breast with Harissa Aioli
description: Meet Chef Einat's definition of comfort food. Crispy on the outside, juicy on the inside, the panko breadcrumb-coated chicken cutlets are everything you want them to be and more. Finish the chicken with a squeeze of fresh lemon and a dip into the side of spicy, smoky harissa aioli. Pair with a simple side salad, a side of rice or pasta, or roasted veggies for a balanced meal in a minute.

name: Chorizo Manchego Egg Bites
description: Made with authentic Spanish Chorizo de Bilbao and rich Manchego cheese, these savory egg bites will start your day with an irresistible combination of spice, smoke, and creaminess. The generous portion is paired with a side of tangy and refreshing Mojo Verde, a smooth blend of yogurt, cilantro, poblano peppers, smoky cumin, and zesty fresh lime. Every bite is absolutely packed with flavor.

name: Flank Steak Beef Suya
description: Beef Suya and Jollof Rice are two of the most well known West African dishes and absolutely packed with flavor. Chef Kendra's rendition pairs flank steak, marinated in a nutty, lightly spicy sauce, with savory, seasoned tomato-based jollof rice, offering a delicious blend of smoky, spicy, and rich flavors.

name: Jamaican Curry Chicken
description: This savory and spicy braised chicken stew is enriched with potatoes, carrots, peppers, and peas, served over coconut rice, and topped with toasted coconut flakes. The first chef Chef Michelle worked with was from Jamaica, teaching her the beauty of combining West Indian spices and Caribbean flavors.

name: Masala Tilapia Turmeric Rice
description: Marinated in a fragrant blend of spices, Chef Meena‚Äôs succulent tilapia is baked to perfection, resulting in a tender, flaky fillet bursting with flavor in every bite. She serves it over turmeric rice with a refreshing tomato and cucumber relish, which adds a cool, tangy contrast to the warm spices. And finally, her bright, zesty, and herbaceous mint-lime chutney ties everything together to complete a meal that‚Äôs a healthy as it is flavorful.

name: Cheesy Bean Burrito
description: Toasty, melty, and softly spiced, this burrito hits all the right notes. A trifecta of sauteed beans, tortilla chips, and cheddar cheese is layered into a soft flour tortilla, alongside a bright pico de gallo, then toasted until golden. It‚Äôs served alongside Chef Ludo‚Äôs take on Taco Bell‚Äôs cult-favorite sauce, featuring a vibrant mix of spices like cumin, paprika, and chili.

name: Coconut Lime Cod Grilled Red Peppers
description: A bowl that‚Äôs equal parts creamy, zesty, and fresh. Flaky, oven-baked cod fillets are paired with a soothing coconut-lime sauce, bright with citrus and a hint of warmth from paprika. Topped with smoky red peppers, it‚Äôs served with steamed brown rice and a refreshing side of mango salsa.

name: Mexican Cochinita Pibil Pork Bowl
description: A dish with deep roots in pre-Hispanic Mexican cuisine. Here, pork is marinated in achiote, a spice derived from annatto seeds, then slow-cooked until tender. It's served with herby green rice, creamy pinto beans, and tangy pickled red onions. A bright Mayan sauce‚Äîmade with tomatillos, habanero, garlic, lemon, and cilantro‚Äîadds a vibrant kick to every bite.

name: Truffle Cream Mushroom Burger
description: Indulge in Chef Dustin's out-of-this-world truffle cream mushroom burger. It features Bubb's signature juicy beef patty, saut√©ed mushrooms, Swiss cheese, and a decadent truffle-infused cream sauce, all nestled on a toasted bun. Paired with crispy roasted potatoes, it's a mouth-watering blend of savory flavor that will have you craving more.

name: Bbq Pulled Chicken
description: This is a dish for the BBQ lovers. Succulent chicken is braised in Chef Chris' BBQ sauce until pull-apart tender, then served atop a warm corn succotash consisting of fresh corn, black and pinto beans, tomatoes, onions, peppers, and cilantro. Topped with perfectly pickled onions, this dish is simple, sweet, spicy, and summery.

name: Vegetarian Lentil Stew
description: Chef Dustin's one-pot vegetarian lentil stew will warm you up from the inside out. A symphony of wholesome ingredients and comforting flavors, this stew combines tender lentils, a variety of fresh vegetables, and a rich, savory vegetarian broth. All of the elements are simmered together to create a comforting, nourishing meal that tastes like a warm hug in a bowl.

name: Miso Caesar Salad with Grilled Shrimp
description: Chef Anne gives the beloved Caesar a colorful, keto-friendly glow-up. Plump grilled shrimp rest on a bed of crisp cabbage and peppery radicchio, studded with toasted almonds. The creamy dressing stays true to its anchovy roots, with the addition of miso and tamari packing the umami. Finished with a generous dusting of Parmesan, this Caesar is brighter, bolder, and nutrient-packed.

name: K Bbq Spicy Pork with Caramelized Kimchi
description: A plate full of Korean BBQ-inspired goodness! Chef Esther pairs her signature spicy Gochujang-marinated pork shoulder with sweet-and-savory caramelized cabbage kimchi. A side of fluffy steamed rice topped with nutty Nori Komi Furikake seasoning rounds out the dish.

name: Mushroom Spinach
description: Healthy, delicious, paleo and whole 30 mushroom sausage patty with mushrooms, spinach, and spices blended into ground pork. The mushroom complement and enhanced the flavor of the meat while adding veggies on the side.

name: Grilled Chicken with Jalapeno
description: Grilled Chicken with Jalape√±o by Raymundo Agrazal is a delicious meal featuring tender chicken thighs marinated with spices and complemented by a spicy jalape√±o kick, served with a medley of flavorful ingredients.

name: Pork Stuffed Poblano Peppers
description: In this star dish from Chef Maribel, poblano peppers are stuffed with Yuc√°tan-style pork and served up with a guajillo-arbol chile sauce, and a side of red rice with peas and diced carrots. A good dollop of crema on the side cools down any spiciness from the poblano pepper.

name: Pork Loin with Mushroom Marsala Sauce
description: Juicy pork loin and creamy mushroom risotto are a match made in culinary heaven. Pork loin is paired with a rich pan sauce made with cremini mushrooms, fresh herbs, a splash of marsala wine and a touch of cream. To amp up the umami even more, Chef Ruben serves the pork on a bed of velvety, perfectly cooked mushroom risotto. A side of saut√©ed squash and roasted Brussels sprouts complete the dish.

name: Herb Grilled Chicken Caprese Salad
description: Warmer days often leave us craving lighter options and Chef Chase has the ideal solution. A juicy chicken breast marinated with classic Italian seasonings like garlic, herbs, and lemon, then grilled to perfection gets served atop a traditional Caprese salad. With sweet cherry tomatoes, fresh mozzarella, and fresh baby arugula, as well as delectable basil pesto, this dish is a crowd-pleaser, any day of the week.

name: Hanger Steak Fajitas
description: So good, tender, juicy slices of steak with bell peppers and onion marinated in special sauce. Serve with guacamole.

name: Peruvian Chicken Fried Rice Arroz Chaufa
description: Experience the bold flavors of Arroz Chaufa, a traditional Peruvian dish of savory fried rice. Tender chicken breast is stir-fried with aromatic ingredients like Aji Amarillo peppers, garlic, and onions, before fragrant basmati rice is added into the mix. Finished with a splash of tamari and garnished with vibrant green onions, this dish is a perfect example of the delicious fusion of Asian and South American flavors that defines Peruvian cuisine. Enjoy with a dollop of the spicy Aji Amarillo sauce that Chef Andres serves on the side, and prepare to be transported to the streets of Lima.

name: Sri Lankan Inspired Chicken
description: What makes these chicken thighs so delicious and addictive? Chef Aarthi's Sri Lankan-inspired marinade, with hints of aromatic spices like cardamom, cumin, and coriander. Served with a sweet and tangy mango chutney, jasmine rice, and a shredded carrot salad, it hits all the flavor notes you could ever want in a dish.

name: Loaded Cauliflower Casserole
description: Is Chef Tracey‚Äôs Loaded Cauliflower Casserole a side or an entr√©e? That‚Äôs your call. Either way, this indulgent, comforting dish is about to become one of your new favorites. She starts with tender cauliflower florets, stirs in crisp, smoky bacon lardons and fresh sliced green onion, then swaddles the mix in a rich cream sauce, tops it with melty shredded Cheddar, and bakes until golden and bubbling. Pair it with simple grilled chicken for a hearty meal. Or enjoy it as the main event with a fresh green salad and crusty bread on the side.

name: Brioche French Toast
description: Crafted with care, this delectable dish brings a taste of the best brunch to your home kitchen. Thick slices of brioche bread are soaked in a luscious vanilla- and cinnamon-infused custard, then perfectly caramelized on the griddle to golden perfection. Served with a generous dollop of butter, a drizzle of maple syrup, and a garnish of fresh strawberries, this may just be the most delicious way to start your day.

name: Shaky Shaky Beef
description: This classic Vietnamese dish gets its name from the vigorous shaking required to get a good sear on each tender cube of wok-fired beef. Chef Nora‚Äôs version starts with flavorful sirloin tips marinated in a dark, garlicky, umami-rich soy sauce blend, stir-fried with sweet peppers and onions, and served with a bright lime, tamarind, Thai chili, and cilantro sauce for drizzling. On the side: Fluffy tomato rice topped with crunchy fried shallots and more fresh cilantro. It‚Äôs a little bit sweet, a little bit salty, and all delicious.

name: Korean Bibimbap
description: A signature in the Korean culinary canon, Bibimbap is a multicolored mixture of flavors and textures. Rice is piled with sesame-seasoned vegetables, like shiitake mushrooms, carrots, and spinach, next to tender stir-fried shrimp. Topped with a soft-boiled egg, it‚Äôs served with scallion and gochujang butter‚Äîperfect for bibim, which means 'to mix' everything together.

name: Sweet Potato Tapioca Pudding
description: This classic Filipino dessert is made with Okinawa purple sweet potatoes and traditional orange ones that are steamed then simmered until perfectly tender with plantains and tapioca pearls in velvety, sweetened coconut cream. It‚Äôs a cool, refreshing treat on any hot LA day.

name: Sausage with Broccoli Rabe
description: Chris Ratel gives us simple but reimagined specialties that are satisfying. This one's promised to be hearty and healthy.

name: Cajun Blackened Salmon
description: Chef Chris learned this heavenly creamed leek and spinach recipe back in his steakhouse days. Here it‚Äôs paired with flavorful fresh salmon, seared with butter and Creole blackening spices. And we promise the creamed leeks and spinach you will be the best you ever have‚Äî leeks slow cooked with onions, garlic, shallots, white wine, chopped spinach and heavy cream. Consider yourself warned; this meal is addictive. Chef highly recommends heating this meal in the microwave.

name: Roasted Chicken
description: Chef Nelson marinates tender, juicy chicken breast in mustard, red wine vinegar, and extra-virgin olive oil, then roasts until golden. Served with Spicy Mexican Rice and creamy coleslaw for a lovely contrast of flavors and textures.

name: Pan Seared Cod with Couscous
description: Cod fish is simply seared in olive oil and paired with a spiced couscous with fresh basil and pomegranate seeds. Sweet peas and tender green beans round out the dish.

name: Spinach Fettuccine Alfredo with Shrimp
description: Chef Meena's take on classic Fettuccine Alfredo amps up the flavor in a major way. In it, al dente fettuccine noodles are coated in a rich creamy Alfredo sauce infused with baby spinach for a pop of color and freshness. Topped with garlicky grilled shrimp, meaty saut√©ed mushrooms, and shredded parmesan cheese, this is comfort cooking, perfected.

name: Due Mari Montepulciano Dabruzzo
description: A rich, satisfying sip, with aromas of ripe black fruit, and hints of wood smoke in its warm, full-bodied palate. Made using traditional methods, grapes undergo careful harvesting, skin maceration, and controlled fermentation, bringing out the wine‚Äôs bold character.

name: Sabzi Rubbed Chicken Over Pearl Couscous Risotto
description: Your favorite stuffed grape leaves (a.k.a. Dolmas) gone crazy. This risotto is made with pearl couscous in place of the traditional arborio rice. A little parmesan and Mexican crema make for a creamy umami-filled finish. The risotto is paired with chicken thighs that have been marinated with Chef Einat's homemade Persian spice mix, Sabzi, then seared to juicy perfection. A side of simply saut√©ed brussel sprouts and crispy shallots rounds out this unique, satisfying meal.

name: Camarones al Ajillo Garlic Shrimp
description: This one is for the garlic lovers! Tender shrimp are cooked in a buttery garlic sauce that's so irresistibly delicious you'll want to sop it up with the side of jasmine rice. Chef Santos pairs the shrimp with a saut√©ed mix of red and green peppers, mushrooms, and onions with just a kick of spice from some jalape√±o. What more could you want?!

name: Asian Roasted Salmon
description: Salmon filet roasted in a spicy ginger peach glaze served on a bed of white quinoa with chiffonade of kale and slivered almonds tossed with apple cider vinaigrette.

name: Mediterranean Chicken Souvlaki Pita
description: For her take on this Greek street food classic, Chef Einat marinates tender, juicy chicken thighs in a savory blend of herbs and spices then grills them for slightly smoky char. She serves a hearty portion with pita bread, smoky cumin- and paprika-marinated chickpeas, blistered tomatoes, and thin-sliced red onions seasoned with tangy sumac. The side of Greek Toum sauce‚Äîa bold blend of garlic, lemon juice, and olive oil‚Äîenlivens every bite of this balanced, nourishing meal.

name: Surf and Turf Steak and Garlic Shrimp
description: Chef David's take on surf and turf is ready to take your next meal up a few notches. He pairs tender flat iron steak‚Äîseared then rubbed with Dijon and blackening spice and roasted to perfection in the oven‚Äîwith garlicky, lemony saut√©ed shrimp. The protein-packed pairing is served alongside creamy, dreamy mashed potatoes, grilled asparagus, and classic sauce √âspagnole, a meaty, rich French sauce. Who needs a steakhouse when you have this culinary powerhouse on the menu?

name: Sambal Grilled Chicken
description: Eating wholesome, nutritious food can still taste great, and this dish proves it. Sambal chile-rubbed chicken breast is grilled to juicy perfection and paired with a bright, comforting basil pesto for a flavorful and herbaceous touch. Brown rice offers a good source of complex carbohydrates and herbed roasted carrots add essential vitamins and nutrients. Together, they make for a well-rounded meal that will leave you feeling satisfied and nourished.

name: Garlic Herb Chicken with Summer Squash
description: Gliuten-free and low carb! This pan-roasted chicken breast basted with garlic-herb flavors is finished crispy and moistured. It is drizzled with buttermilk ranch to make it creamy and tangy. It is sided with spinach, radish, and summer squash to balance to all the flavors.

name: Tofu Poke Bowl with Soba Noodles
description: Chef Kev's plant-based take on a poke bowl has everything you could want and more. The star of the show is the vibrant tofu 'poke,' which is marinated in a flavor-packed, Asian-inspired sauce and then roasted to perfection. Paired with nutty soba noodles and a tangy cucumber and carrot salad, the Chef's sesame dressing is the perfect finishing touch to ensure every bite is balanced and delicious.

name: Mount Rozier Reserve Firepit Cabernet Sauvignon
description: Mount Rozier Reserve 'Firepit' Cabernet Sauvignon by Journey's End is a premium wine that offers a rich and robust flavor profile, perfect for enjoying by the firepit.

name: Shrimp Green Curry
description: This Thai-Italian fusion meal brings together influences you never thought to combine but once you try it, you'll never go back. Plump shrimp and tender Japanese eggplants are roasted to perfection then served with an authentic Thai green curry sauce. To pair, Chef Hong swaps out the typical rice in favor of perfectly cooked penne, then adds crispy Thai basil chips and a sprinkling of parmesan cheese on top to finish off the dish.

name: Herb Roasted Flat Iron Steak
description: Chef Akhtar takes inspiration from his favorite dishes to create an elevated meal for the holidays and beyond! The star of the dish is the herb-roasted flat iron steak, tender and juicy and packed with herbaceous flavor throughout. The steak is sliced and served alongside a gingery sweet potato pur√©e and brown butter-laced green beans almondine. A rich red wine jus drizzled on top is the perfect finishing touch on this elegant restaurant-quality dish.

name: Herbed Buttered Rotisserie Cornish Hen
description: It seems like an odd pairing but trust me, this may be the best chicken dish you will ever have.

name: Papa Bernards Sweet Sour Pork Ribs
description: These LaFrieda-famous ribs are finger-licking good and absolutely irresistible. Dry rubbed and baked until super tender, the sweet and sour pork ribs are paired with a side of chili oil to add a little (optional) heat. The ribs are accompanied by a side of jasmine rice and kimchi to bring acidity and balance to the dish. Comfort food meets fresh flavors in this delectable dish.

name: Pistachio Energy Balls
description: These nourishing energy balls bring together the natural sweetness of pistachios and agave, bound with almond meal and cranberries. A roll through coconut flakes adds a light, delicate crunch, making each bite a mix of chewy, nutty, and subtly sweet. Vegan, gluten-free, and vitamin-rich, they‚Äôre an easy grab-and-go snack to keep you fueled throughout the day.

name: Grilled Grass Fed Ribeye Anticuchado
description: Chef Walther brings his signature Peruvian flair to this premium meal. He marinates grass-fed ribeye‚Äîthe king of beef cuts‚Äîin Anticucho and Chimichurri sauces for rich herbal, garlicky flavor with a hint of heat, then grills to a perfect medium rare. He serves a hearty portion with crisp-tender roasted asparagus and creamy spinach mashed potatoes. Drizzle the delectable garlic butter over everything and dig into a luxurious steak dinner that will satisfy your every craving.

name: Southern Fried Pork Chop
description: Savory pork and sweet apples rank right up there near the top of beloved culinary combinations. To complement his tender, flavorful Southern-style fried pork chop, Chef Chris gives you apples two ways: First, a crisp, refreshing red cabbage and sweet-tart Granny Smith apple salad tossed with a bright citrus vinaigrette; Second, luscious homemade apple sauce, fragrant with warm cinnamon. Buttery, creamy mashed Yukon Gold potatoes are the perfect accompaniment for this homey, hearty meal you‚Äôll put on repeat.

name: Pastel Azteca Mexican Lasagna with Chicken
description: Pastel Azteca is a traditional Mexican dish featuring layers of corn tortillas, shredded chicken breast, mozzarella cheese, slices of poblano pepper, onion, and corn, all smothered in a creamy poblano sauce. A Mexican spin on lasagna, the whole casserole is baked to perfection with layer upon layer of cheesy, creamy, mildly spiced comfort. Topped with a dollop of sour cream, this dish is perfect for those looking to enjoy a hearty and flavorful meal like they've never tasted before!

name: Chicken Piccata Mashed Potatoes
description: The delicious dish is Chef Ruben's take on an Italian-American classic. Chicken thighs are saut√©ed in a light butter sauce with garlic, white wine, lemon, and capers. Accompanied by creamy mashed potatoes and roasted Brussels sprouts, this comforting meal is everything you want it to be and more.

name: Chicken Rice Bowl
description: Bursting with flavor and freshness, this jasmine rice bowl combines juicy grilled chicken thighs, sweet pineapple, Chef Nelson‚Äôs signature honey and soy-based sauce, and a refreshing Mango-Cucumber Salad for an energizing, satisfying one-dish meal.

name: Duck Carnitas Over Creamy Fetuccine Pasta
description: Indulge in the exquisite blend of flavors in this decadent dish. It features tender carnitas-style duck leg confit served over fettuccine pasta in a rich cream sauce. Oyster mushrooms and sun-dried tomatoes add earthiness, while a sprinkling of fresh herbs on top helps cut through all the richness, creating a truly balanced, harmonious dining experience.

name: Chipotle Bbq Chicken Quesadilla
description: Chef Ruben‚Äôs irresistibly bold quesadilla is stuffed with ooey-gooey Oaxaca and Mozzarella cheeses and juicy BBQ chicken that gets a triple dose of smoky flavor‚Äîfrom the grill, from the spicy chipotle marinade, and from the drizzle of chipotle cream sauce. On the side: lightly seasoned grilled green cabbage for refreshing crunch and a zesty fresh pico de gallo to use as a topping. Perfect as a hearty lunch or an easy, flavor-packed dinner.

name: Pork Roasted Chili Verde
description: New Mexican-style Green Stew, bright flavor with traditional ingredients.

name: Pistachio Pesto Rotini with Shrimp
description: Chef Roberto's signature Genovese-style pistachio-basil pesto is the star of this dish. It's just like the pesto you know and love but with the added richness of pistachios, and works so well with a twisted pasta shape like rotini. The pesto pasta is tossed with succulent seared shrimp, cherry tomatoes, spinach, and finished with freshly grated Parmesan. It's an Italian-inspired delight that's sure to hit the spot, no matter your mood.

name: Valentines Cookie Decorating Kit
description: Make this Valentine‚Äôs Day memorable with our DIY Cookie Kit. It's a delightful activity for you and your loved ones. The kit includes 8 blank sugar cookies, 3 icing bags, and an assortment of colorful sprinkles. Skip the baking and dive straight into the joy of decorating!

name: Grilled Chicken Salad
description: Chef Nelson's salad is light and healthy ‚Äî without sacrificing any flavor. Freshly grilled chicken thighs are served over a bed of peppery arugula and garnished with dried cranberries, celery, crumbled feta, and toasted almonds. The finishing touch? A bright poppy-seed vinaigrette that brings it all together.

name: Carrot Cake Energy Balls
description: Everything you love about carrot cake, packed into a healthy bite-sized snack. These naturally sweet energy balls blend carrots, Medjool dates, and rolled oats, with a hint of vanilla and pumpkin spice for that classic cozy flavor. A final roll in shredded coconut adds a delicate crunch. Vegan, gluten-free, and rich in fiber, they‚Äôre a nourishing grab-and-go snack to keep you fueled throughout the day.

name: Pork Carnitas Burrito
description: Embark on a culinary journey with our Burrito Pork Carnitas, a tantalizing masterpiece that promises to delight your taste buds. The dish features tender, slow-cooked pork carnitas, boasting a perfect balance of succulence and smokiness. Nestled within a warm flour tortilla, this burrito is generously filled with juicy pork, Mexican rice, and hearty black beans‚Äîa celebration of authentic Mexican flavors that will transport you to the heart of Mexico.

name: Grilled Salmon with Shrimp Sauce
description: This grilled salmon is delicious and the texture is just perfect. It comes with a delicious lobster yellow sauce made of fresh yellow tomatoes, and on the side some truffle potato mash.

name: Lime Hanger Steak Chimichurri Sauce
description: This 'bangin'' dish from Chef Ruben is a must-try. Sweet and savory and tangy, tender hanger steak is packed with flavors of zesty lime, with just a kick of spice thanks to red pepper flakes. To pair with the steak, Chef adds his signature chimichurri sauce, plus a side of simply saut√©ed green beans and mushrooms.

name: A La Criolla Grilled Flank Steak
description: Busting with vibrant flavor and color, Chef Maia‚Äôs South American spin on a hearty meat-and-potatoes meal will satisfy your every craving. Tender slices of grilled flank steak are the star‚Äîthey‚Äôre perfectly grilled to a succulent medium-rare and boast a delightful smokiness. Nestled on top, soft, caramelized roasted onions and red bell peppers offer a juicy, slightly charred sweetness that balances the richness of the beef. On the side: Creamy gratin potatoes, rich and velvety with a golden-brown crust on top, add a comforting and indulgent touch to each bite.

name: Seared Steak
description: Steak is seared to medium rare, haricots verts sauteed in the pan drippings finished crish-tender. Spinach is stirred then for another hit of green, along with a little butter for richness. A creamy and slightly pungent mustard and horseradish sauce livens up the plate.

name: Roasted Spiced Branzino
description: Take your tastebuds on a trip to Indonesia‚Äîall from the comfort of home. Chef Abe seasons each fillet of delicate, mild Branzino with a blend of Indonesian spices, then garnishes with fresh dill, lemon, and a long pepper-infused butter that tastes like black pepper with notes of cardamom, cinnamon, and ginger, bathing the fish in robust flavor. Garlicky green beans and roasted sweet red bell peppers complete the meal with a harmonious medley of colors and flavors.

name: K Bbq Pork Bibimbap
description: Succulent pork, slow braised in a rich gochujang Korean BBQ sauce. A nutrient rich combination of multi grain rice, veggies that come together for a savory, earthy and toasty experience. Great texture and even better flavors coming together in a convenient and healthy one-bowl meal. A nutrient rich rainbow bowl of multigrain rice, crunchy seasonable veggies and tender, mouth-watering pork come together for an earthy, umami flavor experience, with a touch of spice and tang to bring it all together. Boasting both texture and flavor, bibimbap is the perfect hearty but guilt free, one-bowl meal.

name: Mediterranean Citrus Carrot Salad
description: Delight in Chef Ivy's Mediterranean citrus and carrot salad featuring vibrant flavors like castelvetrano olives, fresh herbs, and rose water. The carrots, red onions, fennel, olives, and radishes get seasoned to perfection and marinate for a few hours. Then the marinated mix is adorned with a garnish of lettuce, orange supremes, mint leaves, and cilantro. Mounded in the center of the plate and drizzled with rose water, this dish is finished with sliced almonds and citrus dressing for a refreshing burst of texture and acidity.

name: Cochinita Pibil Taco Bowl
description: Enjoy Chef Andres' modern take on a traditional Mexican dish from the Yucat√°n state. The star of the dish is the Cochinita Pibil, pork that's slow cooked with lots of spices for 12 hours of cooking in plantain leaves to create an indescribably delicious flavor. The pork is served up 'bowl' style, on a bed of cilantro farro with baby spinach and black beans. Topped off with queso fresco, pickled onions, and a creamy avocado crema, you'll be hooked after one bite.

name: Reunions Chicken Gumbo Rice
description: This nourishing gumbo is a soul-soothing dish that showcases the vibrant flavors of Creole and Cajun cooking. Tender, ancho-seasoned chicken is simmered in a rich broth packed with vegetables and aromatic spices, then served on a bed of fluffy white rice.

name: Pancit Palabok Rice Noodles In Ground Pork Sauce
description: Pancit Palabok is one of the staple noodle dishes in Filipino cuisine. This version of Pancit features rice noodles tossed in a savory, rich sauce made with ground pork, shrimp stock, and annatto powder. The noodles are topped off with an assortment of delicious garnishes including tender bay shrimp, and hard-boiled egg for protein, plus green onions and a lemon wedge to brighten up the meal.

name: Cavatappi Alla Norma
description: This traditional Sicilian dish is made by combining slow-roasted eggplant with cherry tomatoes that have been stewed with onion, garlic, and basil. The scrumptious sauce is served over a bed of cavatappi noodles -- their corkscrew-shape is ideal for scooping up every saucy bite. It's topped with whipped ricotta for an extra layer of richness.

name: Shrimp and Vegetable Chow Mein
description: This all-time Chinese-American favorite uses fresh egg noodles, tossed with stir-fried shrimps, crispy Chinese sausage, and vegetables, making for an incredibly tasty and satisfying meal.

name: Fettuccine Bolognese
description: A traditional Italian dish, fettuccine bolognese is also a classic meal on the Sunday table in many Argentinian homes, where families gather to enjoy great food and a good talk. Pasta lovers will delight in the rich flavor of the tomato sauce and stewed minced beef.

name: Linguine with Grilled Shrimp Creamy Tomato Sauce
description: Sometimes it's all about the sauce! This dish combines sweet onions and acidic tomatoes to create a delightfully summery tomato sauce with a little cream and just a hint of spice from red pepper flakes. It pairs perfectly with lightly charred grilled shrimp and linguine, along with some wilted kale to add color and texture.

name: Honey Garlic Noodles with Teriyaki Chicken
description: Sticky teriyaki chicken thighs are cooked to perfection, sliced, served alongside noodles that have been tossed in a sweet-and-spicy, umami-filled garlic sauce. Each element of this dish is more delicious than the last. Finished with a sprinkle of sesame seeds and green onions, it doesn't get better, and more delicious than this.

name: Lodalet Marsanne Roussanne
description: Two different grape varieties, Marsanne and Roussanne, come together in this golden-tinted drop. Aromas of apricot, ripe pear, peach, and orange blossom lead into a rich, smooth palate with vibrant citrus notes.

name: Creamy Leek Mushroom Pot Pie
description: There are not many things in this world that go better together than the combination of slow-cooked leeks, mushrooms, and white wine. The leeks serve as the base of a delicious creamy vegetarian pot pie filling, along with mushrooms that act as little flavor sponges soaking up everything delicious. The filling is bulked up with fresh veggies, spinach, potatoes, fresh parsley, tarragon, and cream, then topped with a fresh herb-roasted puff pastry for that perfect crunchy crust you know and love. Decadent and delicious, this vegetarian pot pie tastes like a warm hug in every bite. Chef highly recommends heating this meal in the oven, covering the top with foil or parchment paper for the first five mins, then baking uncovered for another five minutes to ensure the crust crisps but doesn‚Äôt burn.

name: Turmeric Salmon
description: Totally delicious combination of coconut crisp and greens. Salmon meal packed with flavor and makes the ginger as the real star of this dish.

name: Rotondo Frappato
description: Rotondo Frappato is bright and aromatic, with notes of wild raspberry, dried flowers, and bergamot. Hints of pink pepper and fresh herbs add depth, leading to a smooth, savory finish. This is a fresh, easy-drinking red that captures the flavors of Sicily.
ingredients: Rotondo Frappato wine made from Frappato grapes

name: Stuffed Chicken Breast
description: Juicy stuffed kale and parmesan cheese stuffed chicken breast served with a side of flavorful roasted red pepper quinoa.

name: Flank Steak Buddha Bowl
description: Enjoy a flavorful fusion with Chef Miguel's Thai-inspired Basil Beef Buddha Bowl. Tender marinated and grilled flank steak pairs perfectly with fluffy quinoa, nutty edamame, and fresh spinach. Topped with crunchy red cabbage, sweet carrots, refreshing cucumber, red bell peppers, it's all drizzled with a rich, tangy Thai basil dressing. Garnished with scallions, cilantro, mint, and lime wedges, this bowl offers a balanced and delicious meal, any day or night of the week.

name: The Greek Salad
description: Crispy, zesty, tangy greek salad with loads of texture from the fresh vegetables, sweet and pungent flavors from the green olives, and a zippy olive oil dressing. Topped off with crumbled feta and fresh dill and parsley, this is the perfect light and tangy accompaniment for your favorite protein!

name: Cheesy Mushroom Ravioli
description: As if ravioli filled with a mixture of mushrooms and cheeses isn't rich enough, Chef Fabio tosses them in a decadent truffle sauce that makes this dish truly come alive. Add in extra black truffle paste and parmesan cheese, and you've got an indulgent meal that will make any night feel special.

name: Arctic Char with Baby Kale and Spinach Salad
description: Seared Arctic Char glazed with caramel fish sauce both sweet and savory on top of a Baby kale & baby spinach salad that has a mix of carrots, broccoli, cucumbers, dried cherries and roasted peanuts served with a sesame ginger dressing. The Arctic char and greens with vegetables all mixed together creates flavors and textures that complement each other.

name: Fried Tofu Burrito
description: Embark on a flavorful journey with our Burrito Vegetariano‚Äîa delicious ode to plant-based goodness that will satisfy even the most discerning palates. Nestled within a soft flour tortilla, this burrito showcases the perfect harmony of wholesome ingredients, inviting vegetable enthusiasts to savor a variety of natural flavors.

name: Turkey Sausage Bolognese
description: This is Chef Marc's take on an Italian classic, lightened up for spring with a combination of ground turkey and sweet Italian pork sausage. The rich sauce fits brilliantly into the spiral-shaped al dente cavatappi pasta. A crispy Panko breadcrumb topping with fresh parsley and parmesan cheese is the crowning touch on this comforting dish!

name: Cheesy Spinach Artichoke Dip
description: Chef Pat presents a tantalizing creation, the Spinach Artichoke Dip Delight. A harmonious blend of creamy spinach, artichokes, and seasoned cheese, this savory dip promises a flavor journey. Paired with warm, lightly toasted pita bread, it delivers a delightful appetizer, marrying rich flavors with satisfying textures for an unforgettable culinary experience.

name: al Pastor Breakfast Burrito
description: All the flavors of a taco truck in your very own kitchen! This breakfast burrito is made in the traditional Mexican style of slow-roasting an adobo-rubbed pork shoulder. Chef Akhtar serves the tender, smoky pork alongside scrambled eggs, refried pinto beans, and melty Chihuahua cheese. All that goodness gets wrapped up in a spinach tortilla, griddled to perfection, and served with a cooling lime crema to dip or drizzle.

name: Korean Beef Quesadilla
description: Chef Esther braises boneless beef chuck with Mexican-Korean fusion flavors, then tucks the melt-in-your-mouth beef into a crisped flour tortilla filled with melty cheese and roasted red peppers. Served with a tangy lime-infused sour cream and fresh corn salsa, this takes comfort food to another level.

name: Beef Bulgogi
description: In Chef Chase's take on a classic Korean BBQ favorite, thinly slices of ribeye are marinated in a sweet-and-savory sauce then grilled to juicy and flavorful perfection. The umami-rich, caramelized beef bulgogi is served with steamed rice and kimchi for an instant weeknight winner.

name: Veracruz Style Salmon
description: This is a healthy and filling salmon dish inspired by the ports of Mexico. Creamy, slightly sweet mashed plantains are the perfect pairing for buttery, flaky salmon. Tomatillo salsa verde provides just the right amount of acid and ties the whole dish together.

name: Roasted Salmon Miso Panca
description: Take your tastebuds on a trip around the globe with this dish, which brings together influences from Peru, China, and Japan. Chef Walther bathes each salmon fillet in a marinade of spicy-smoky Aji Panca chiles and miso paste for extra depth of savory flavor, then sears it to crisp up the skin before roasting it to perfection. The fish is plated on a bed of nutty quinoa stir-fried in the style of Peruvian Chaufa, along with crisp roasted asparagus spears and Brussels sprouts on the side. Packed with protein, this dish is ideal for busy weekdays and nights or a post-workout feast.

name: Flank Steak with Brandy Peppercorn Sauce
description: Prepared to be delighted by this wonderful meal that brings the French bistro to your very own kitchen. A beautifully seared flank steak sits alongside French-style buttery, silky mashed potatoes and saut√©ed mushrooms, all enrobed in a creamy pan sauce flavored with fresh peppercorns and Brandy. Bon app√©tit!

name: Beef Picadillo Stuffed Poblano
description: If you love the flavor of poblano peppers, then this dish is for you! Chef Maribel‚Äôs charred poblano is stuffed with classic Mexican-style picadillo‚Äîa perfectly seasoned mixture of ground beef, potatoes, carrots, and peas that‚Äôs a staple in any Mexican household. She serves her pepper atop a vibrant tomato-chile sauce and drizzles it with refreshing crema for a cooling touch. It‚Äôs a flavor-packed and hearty centerpiece to the meal. On the side: Mexican Red Rice, which gets its gentle blush from an infusion of tomatoes.

name: Shrimp Scampi with Cream Sauce
description: Buttery and garlicky with hints of lemon and parsley, Chef Ruben's shrimp scampi is all you could want in a seafood dish. Enjoy the sweet, succulent shrimp on their own or dip them in the delicate cream sauce that comes on the side. Better yet‚Äîpair with a simple side of linguine for an easy, elegant dinner in mere minutes.

name: Salmon Beets Broccoli Avocado Salad
description: This salmon with veggie salad is one of chef's favorite new fish meals. Very simple to prepare, delicious and good for you. It is sweet and savory, gluten-free, soy-free and packed with protein and healthy fats.

name: Thai Peruvian Chicken Rice
description: This dish is a fragrant blend of Thai and Peruvian flavors. A juicy, seasoned chicken thigh is baked until tender, then served atop a golden bed of turmeric-infused rice. It‚Äôs paired with a side of green sauce, bringing a herby, zesty, and creamy final drizzle.

name: Nutella Mousse Parfait with Oreo Crumble
description: Behold, a delectable dessert that combines the lusciousness of Nutella and freshly whipped cream with the delightful crunch of Oreo cookies and toasted hazelnuts. The parfait features layers of light Nutella mousse and Oreo-hazelnut crumble with a Nutella drizzle to top it all off. Chocolate lovers‚Äîthis one is a can't miss.

name: Blueberry Ricotta Pancakes
description: When it comes to breakfast, brunch, or BFD (breakfast for dinner), there‚Äôs nothing better than fluffy flapjacks. And these aren‚Äôt your typical box-mix pancakes‚ÄîChef John makes his restaurant-style stack with ricotta, which transforms the pancakes from airy and plain to rich and creamy. Tart, juicy blueberries balance out the rich batter, and a drizzle of thyme-infused maple syrup adds a layer of complexity to the dish. After one bite, you just might find yourself cancelling brunch plans to stay in with a stack of these pancakes‚Äîdon‚Äôt say we didn't warn you!

name: Bbq Braised Pork with Cheesy Red Pepper Polenta Bloom
description: The rich, savory flavors of BBQ braised pork complement the creamy and cheesy polenta perfectly. It's a comforting and satisfying dish.

name: Udon Noodle Soup with Shrimp
description: Soup's up! This delicious udon noodle soup bowl will warm your belly and heart. Just add hot water to the concentrated dashi broth with thick wheat udon noodles. Topped with a healthy medley of saut√©ed vegetables such as zucchini, carrots and charred scallions, as well as garlic roasted shrimp and puffed tofu for that extra protein.

name: Pumpkin Spice Cake Jar
description: Experience the ultimate autumn dessert with the Pumpkin Spice Cake Jar. Indulge in layers of moist pumpkin cake infused with warm spices and topped with luscious cream cheese frosting. Order now and enjoy the convenience and deliciousness of fall in a jar!

name: Chermoula Shrimp Farro Bowl
description: Craving a flavorful, expertly crafted bowl that‚Äôs also packed with protein and antioxidants? You just found it. Chef Cora‚Äôs zesty Chermoula sauce recipe is loaded with fresh herbs and warm spices, and it‚Äôs a perfect match for plump, succulent shrimp served over garlicky, nutty, whole-grain farro. But wait, there‚Äôs more‚Äîtender roasted baby carrots, tangy pickled red onions, creamy Feta, and a lime wedge for a burst of refreshing acidity. It all adds up to a truly stellar combination that elevates any weeknight.

name: Butter Salmon
description: Salmon and broccoli are always a perfect pair, in both taste and color. Delicious, fresh and healthy dish.

name: Spicy Lobster Diablo Tacos
description: Chef Nelson's spicy lobster 'diablo' gets its well-balanced heat from a blend of dried New Mexican chilis, chili flakes, garlic, cumin and tomato. The spicy lobster is saut√©ed to tender perfection, then finished with fresh lemon juice and plated into soft corn tortillas. Finished with fresh cilantro and paired with homemade coleslaw, these will take your Taco Tuesday to another level.

name: Asian Style Pressed Pork
description: Bimbap inspired with bold Asian flavors.

name: Bbq Ribs with Baked Macaroni and Cheese
description: There's so much to adore about this dish, but we especially love the interplay of all the different textures. The flavorful ribs are saucy and sticky from the barbecue sauce, the baked macaroni & cheese is crispy and creamy, and then you get the cold, crunch from the cucumber salad‚Äî no matter what bite you get, you can't go wrong! This is the ultimate summer comfort food, Pat's way.

name: Tuscan Style Pressed Pork
description: Laced with herbs a braised and pressed Pork with Tuscan style chickpeas.

name: Vietnamese Steak Salad
description: Inspired by Vietnamese-dish perfect this spring. Sirloin steak marinated in nuoc cham made with coconut aminos, fish sauce and lime juice. Steak is cooked to tender finish served over pickled cucumber and crisp cabbage salad.

name: Choripan Chorizo Sandwich
description: Chorip√°n is a combination of the words ‚Äúchorizo‚Äù (sausage) and ‚Äúpan‚Äù (bread), and every bite of this unforgettable sandwich delivers warmth, comfort, and the taste of Latin America. Juicy, grilled chorizo sausage is topped with zesty chimichurri, bringing a burst of fresh herbs, garlic, and vinegar for that classic Argentine flair, then ticked inside fresh, fluffy Cuban bread. To elevate the flavor even more, we‚Äôve added a luscious aji amarillo aioli, giving you a hint of Peruvian heat balanced with creamy goodness. Accompanied by perfectly roasted red bell peppers and potatoes, this dish is the ideal combination of smoky, savory, and spicy.

name: Wild Mushroom Risotto with Truffle Oil
description: Rich vegetarian risotto is made by cooking down arborio rice with porcini mushroom-infused broth, white wine, and parmesan cheese until unbelievably cream. Saut√©ed mixed wild mushrooms and shallots are gently folded into the risotto, which gets finished with some peppery fresh watercress and a drizzle of white truffle oil for even more luxurious umami flavor.

name: Fettuccine with Lomo Saltado
description: A classic Peruvian dish, fettuccine pasta bathed with Peruvian huancaina sauce, topped with tenderloin steak and lomo saltado sauce made with vinegar, yamasa and hondashi.

name: Hyderabadi Chicken Biryani
description: Traditional Hyderabadi Biryani is a layered dish of basmati rice, marinated chicken, and spices and aromatics, all cooked in a sealed pot over low heat. Chef Raj's version has all those layers of complex, comforting flavor and gets garnished with fried onions, fresh cilantro, and mint. This dish is best served drizzled with raita, a refreshing cucumber-yogurt sauce which helps cool the palate and balance out the spice.

name: Hot Honey Mustard
description: Made with a blend of California grade A honey and spicy grainy mustard, this special sauce will make you want to pack up the cooler, head to the beach, and never come back.

name: Sweet and Tangy Beef Broccoli
description: This classic American Chinese dish features the most tender, flavorful beef and broccoli enriched with oyster sauce. Paired with steamed brown rice, the meal has that incredible sweet, tangy, garlicky, and gravy-like soy sauce flavor that will keep you coming back for more!

name: Quinoa Salad with Calamansi Vinaigrette
description: Tri color quinoa topped with fresh tomato, scallions, mango, cilantro and garnished with pickled onions and whipped avocado tossed in a calamansi vinaigrette.

name: Grilled Barramundi
description: This fresh fish fillet --barramundi in this dish-- is grilled and served with a rich Putanesca tomato sauce filled with herbs, capers, green olives, and spices. Chef Santiago loves to add a little extra oomph with his seasoned rice mixed with spinach and corn. Some simply seasoned zucchini and summer squash complete the dish, which happens to be one of Chef Santiago's favorites (and we can see why!).

name: Roasted Herbed Salmon
description: Make it healthy, but full of flavor. That‚Äôs exactly what Chef Kevin does with this dish that packs in beneficial omega-3s and antioxidant compounds from cruciferous vegetables in a truly delectable dinner. First, he artfully seasons a succulent salmon fillet with a medley of aromatic herbs, then roasts it to perfection, resulting in a crisp exterior that gives way to buttery tenderness. It‚Äôs served atop a bed of cauliflower rice, a wholesome and low-carb alternative to traditional rice or couscous, studded with grapes, raisins, and capers for a sweet-salty flavor contrast. Alongside, there‚Äôs an extra helping of simple steamed cauliflower, the chartreuse Romanesco kind. And instead of draping the meal in a heavy sauce, he supplies you with a charred lemon‚Äîsqueeze its juice over everything to heighten and brighten all the flavors. This is smart, healthy dining with zero compromises.

name: Paleo Chicken Cabbage Stir Fry
description: This vibrant stir fry really sizzles! Combining tender chicken with crisp Napa cabbage, vibrant broccolini, sweet carrots, and savory onions, it‚Äôs packed with nutrients and bold colors.
