Each ingredient stands out while complementing the others in perfect harmony. A light tamari sauce imparts subtle umami depth without overpowering the fresh, clean taste of the chicken and veggies. Perfect for a healthy dinner, it‚Äôs an explosion of color and flavor that the whole family will love.

name: Potsticker Noodle Bowl with Ground Pork
description: Chef Angelia's was inspired by the flavors and textures of Asian potstickers to create this bright noodle bowl! Pad Thai rice noodles are the base of this bowl, cooked to chewy perfection and paired with a savory meat sauce made with ground pork, garlic, ginger, tamari, sesame oil & chili flakes for the perfect hint of spice. Green onions add a lovely pop of crunch and color on top.

name: Peruvian Chicken Milanesa
description: This dish packs layer after layer of flavor. The Peruvian-style Chicken Milanesa cutlet is the star‚Äîfried golden brown served with Huancaina sauce, a traditional Peruvian cheese sauce made with Aji Amarillo peppers, Queso Fresco, and Cotija cheese. The chicken is served alongside linguine pasta tossed in a vibrant pesto sauce and garnished with grated Parmesan cheese. It's a new and exciting take on familiar flavors, and one you're sure to love.

name: Cookies Cream Cake
description: Indulge your inner child with BCakeNY's decadent cookies and cream cake! This layer cake is made with layers of both a rich chocolate and vanilla cake, generously studded with chunks of those cream-filled cookies you know and love. Topped with a creamy frosting and more cookie crumbles, this cake is a must-try for anyone who loves the classic combination of cookies and cream.

name: Mexican Pulled Chicken Bowl
description: A gluten-free, nourishing bowl in the traditional Mexican style. Braised chicken is the start of this dish, paired with a bed of rice and smoked black beans. Chef Dustin's dish comes with all the fixings from corn to Cotija cheese to a drizzle of smoky chipotle crema.

name: Classic Vanilla Cake
description: BCakeNY's classic vanilla cake is a delicious indulgence that's perfect for any occasion. Made from high-quality vanilla buttercream, it has a light and fluffy texture with a subtle vanilla flavor that will delight your taste buds. This rich cake is sure to satisfy your sweet tooth without compromising on taste or quality.

name: Steak Frites Au Poivre
description: A classic French dish just like you'd find in any bistro, reimagined for your very own kitchen. Chef Cedric's version of Steak Frites features a marinated-then-grilled flank steak, sliced and served with a classic peppery au poivre sauce. Accompanied by delightfully crispy thick-cut french fries and a side of aioli to dip them in, this French dish will win your heart with one bite.

name: Thai Chicken Laab Tacos
description: Northern Thai-style Laab especially from Chef Hong‚Äôs hometown, Chiang Mai, is a must-try for travelers and locals alike. Chef's laab is spicy, savory, and funky with a divine depth of flavor, thanks to 13 different spices. In this dish, Chef Hong brings together Thai and Mexican cuisines and cultures by serving chicken laab in the style of tacos, with corn tortillas, queso fresco, and fresh Thai chili salsa. A side of jasmine rice will help calm the palate between fiery, flavorful bites.

name: Penne with Spicy Pink Sauce
description: Pink-sauce‚Äîreally? Yep, it‚Äôs a thing‚Äîcooked penne tossed with equal parts red marinara sauce and white alfredo sauce, which combine to make‚Äîyou got it‚Äîa pink-hued sauce that blends tanginess and creaminess. ‚ÄúAs simple as the combination sounds, it is mind-blowingly delicious,‚Äù Chef DeLucie says. He ups the flavor factor even more with a dose of crushed red pepper heat, then adds a garnish of savory Grana Padano cheese and a shower of fresh basil.

name: Shrimp Moilee Coconut Curry
description: Wholesome, creamy, fresh and flavorful, this coconut based shrimp curry is a crowd-pleasing South Indian dish. Plump shrimp are marinated in turmeric and spices, then gently cooked in a mild coconut milk broth flavored with curry leaves, ginger, mustard seeds, tamarind and more. The shrimp are served with a side of sweet-tart chutney made of tomato and peppers that provides acidic balance for the rich curry, plus fragrant curry leaf rice to soak up all that delicious broth.

name: Hearty Penne Bolognese
description: Savor the soul-warming essence of Italian comfort cooking with Chef Silvia Arevalo‚Äôs Hearty Penne Bolognese. Al dente penne pasta is gently tossed in rich and savory Bolognese sauce, a slow-cooked masterpiece featuring a medley of ground beef and Italian sausage; aromatic saut√©ed carrots, celery, onions, and garlic; fresh basil and oregano; and a robust tomato base enriched with cream and the umami pop of Parmesan cheese. Every bite is a rich tapestry of flavors crafted with care. Pair this timeless favorite with a fresh green salad anytime you‚Äôre craving a meal that‚Äôs like a hug from Nonna.

name: Big Breakfast Bento
description: A bento built for breakfast lovers. Here, Okinawa sweet potatoes are whipped into fluffy pancakes, then paired with smoky kielbasa sausage for a savory punch. A velvety sweet potato coconut syrup, made with Okinawa puree, condensed milk, and coconut is served alongside for a buttery finish.

name: Smoky Black Bean Sweet Potato Chili
description: Chef Anne Thornton brings you this option of a Climate Friendly meal that combines low carbon impact, whole foods, and high sustainability ingredients. Chef Anne's chili recipe is beloved, and for good reason. The hearty, plant-based soup is packed with protein and flavored. Full of nutty quinoa, black beans, sweet potatoes, corn, peppers, onions, and seasoned with smoky spices like cumin, cayenne and chipotle peppers. This is the ideal pick for anyone looking for a delicious, nutritious meal that's sure to satisfy.

name: Grilled Strip Steak
description: What could be better than an expertly marinated strip steak, grilled to perfection? One topped with a red pepper compound butter and paired with creamy, buttery mashed potatoes and roasted brussel sprouts. This classic steakhouse pairing offers a comforting, satisfying meal that will make weeknight feel like a special occasion.

name: Cheese Stuffed Potato Patties
description: For her take on traditional Ecuadorian llapingachos, Chef Adriana makes fluffy, perfectly seasoned mashed potatoes, forms them into patties stuffed with Chihuahua cheese, then crisps them in oil until they‚Äôre golden brown on the outside and irresistibly creamy inside. Top each patty with cabbage salad for extra crunch and then drizzle with salsa verde. On the side: Simple steamed broccoli. It's a healthy, satisfying meal that hits all the right flavor and texture notes‚Äîcrisp, creamy, citrusy and spicy.

name: Kickalicious Shrimp
description: This shrimp dish will make you kick off your shoes - Chef's take on a southern shrimp boil with a tangy, Cajun garlic butter sauce paired with stewed fresh vegetables and Andouille sausage.

name: Pork Maple Patties Breakfast Muffin
description: For those hectic mornings, the Breakfast English Muffin is the ultimate grab-and-go choice. The delectable combination of a homemade maple-flavored breakfast patty, a perfectly cooked flat-top egg, and yellow cheddar cheese nestled within a warm English muffin. The secret behind this mouthwatering masterpiece lies in the carefully spiced ground pork patties, infused with maple syrup, red pepper flakes, and thyme. This breakfast delight is the ideal fuel for your busy day.

name: Steak Bulgogi Tacos
description: A fusion of Asian and Mexican taste couldn't be more delicious on the same plate. Chef Raymundo combines the Korean staple bulgogi steak marinated in soy, gochujang sauce, rice vinegar, and sugar with Mexican style tacos. Adding crisp texture of lettuce and spicy kimchi.

name: Pineapple Chicken
description: Succulent seared chicken breast is adorned with a fresh tomato and pineapple pan sauce in this bright, tropically-inspired dish. The juicy chicken is complemented by a silky, creamy coconut-infused sweet potato mash, creating a delightful blend of flavors and textures that will keep you coming back for bite after bite.

name: Vegan Kale Caesar Bowl
description: A healthy take on a classic salad! Balanced with grains, crunchy chickpea protein and a creamy delicious dressing that is actually good for you!

name: Sausage Kale and Mustard Rigatoni
description: This italian sausage pasta dish is simple comfort food. Using rigatoni with tuscan kale and sausage with a perfect blend of cream and chicken stock. What's not to love in this dish.

name: Quinoa Caramelized Onion Mujaddara
description: This is a modern, delectable twist on a traditional Middle Eastern dish, Mujaddara. Chef Lena replaces the traditional white rice with high-protein quinoa and tops it with the traditional caramelized onions. The flavorful grain mix is served with oven roasted-carrots tossed in lemon zest and sweet-tart pomegranate molasses, plus a side of Dukkah, a traditional Egyptian topping made with pistachios, perfectly toasted spices, and sesame seeds. The whole dish is finished with a fiery cilantro-jalape√±o sauce.

name: Bacon Caramelized Onion Naan
description: Chef Michael‚Äôs spin on traditional French tart flamb√©e promises a delightful harmony of savory and herbaceous notes. He combines smoky bacon lardons, tender sliced potatoes, sweet caramelized onions, and creamy goat cheese sauce atop a thin, crisp crust baked to bubbling perfection. Finish it with a drizzle of vibrant nut-free pesto‚Äîthe bright flavor is an ideal counterpoint to the tart‚Äôs richness. Pair with a fresh green salad and enjoy a French home-style indulgence.

name: Curried Vegetable Fritters and Coconut Lime Sauce
description: Made from whole food ingredients and loads of spices, these fritters are full of flavor and nutrition. Jam-packed with yam, potato, carrot, and onion, the crispy fritters are served with a creamy coconut-lime-cilantro sauce to cool your palate and complement the spices. Served alongside coconut rice and garlicky roasted broccoli, this is a plant-based meal that doesn't skimp on flavor or texture!

name: Grilled Orange Chicken
description: My favorite paleo chicken recipe with orange sauce that pulls everything together in this meal. Enjoy your orange chicken while still being a guilty pleasure.

name: Cashew Chicken Pad Thai
description: Chef Angelia gives the classic Pad Thai a healthy twist, combining the nutrients you need with the flavors you crave. Protein-powered chicken breast, vibrant vegetables, and roasted cashews are stacked atop a bed of tender noodles, garnished with fresh cilantro and green onion. Served with a punchy cashew-tamari sauce, this savory and spicy dish is a well-balanced way to refuel, without missing out.

name: Crispy Chicken Salad
description: This salad is the one Chef enjoyed eating as he grew up but made it now a paleo with a Whole30 option. Crispy grain-free chicken 'breaded' tossed with greens, bacon bits, eggs, tomatoes and avocado to make it basic and classic. Topped with perfectly sweet tangy mustard dressing.

name: Citrus Glazed Chicken
description: Escape to a tropical climate with Chef Chris' tangy-sweet glazed chicken thighs and sweet potato, pepper, and onion hash with fresh herbs. He has balanced the meal with salty, sweet, and citrusy flavors. Note that the poblano peppers in this dish give a little bit of heat.

name: Pesto Chicken Casserole
description: A Mediterranean-inspired casserole of tender chicken, collards, kalamata olives and feta cheese all mixed with a creamy pesto sauce. Garlicky, briny, creamy, and comforting, this casserole is a symphony of flavor.

name: Miso Sesame Salmon
description: Meet your new favorite weeknight dinner. The showstopper in this dish is undoubtedly the miso-sesame salmon: a fresh fillet of salmon soaked in a flavorful marinade with miso paste, sesame, soy, mirin, and a hint of sweetness, then broiled to perfection. The sweet and savory salmon is complemented by sides of Calrose rice, roasted carrots, and simply steamed green beans.

name: Squash and Chickpea Coconut Curry
description: Spice up your weeknight! Delicata squash and chickpeas are cooked in a warming, lightly spicy coconut curry and served with nutty quinoa. This vegan, gluten-free dish is chock full of flavor, veggies, and plant-based protein.

name: Middle Eastern Braised Beef Flatbread
description: Enjoy an elevated take on the classic Levantine street food dish, Lahmajun. Beef is braised in a flavorful base with mint, parsley and pine nuts, then served atop a fluffy Laffa flatbread and drizzled with bright yogurt-tahini-mint sauce. This is a favorite from Chef Einat‚Äôs cookbook, 'Shuk', and after one bite, you'll understand why.

name: Peruvian Shrimp Chow Mein
description: Chef Walther's Peruvian-style Chow Mein with shrimp is a flavorful stir-fry featuring succulent shrimp, crisp vegetables, and tender noodles, with spaghetti swapped in for the traditional chow mein noodles. This dish blends Peruvian ingredients and Chinese cooking techniques, creating a savory, slightly spicy meal with a touch of citrus from an herbaceous green sauce.

name: Chicken Soba Salad
description: A delicious Korean-inspired cold soba noodle salad. The nutty soba noodles are accompanied by Chef Esther's signature kimchi, plus cucumbers, grated carrots, shredded chicken, and classic tangy bibimbap sauce. These noodles are refreshing and endlessly satisfying for lunch or a lighter dinner!

name: Roasted Salmon with Tomato Olive Cacciatore Sauce
description: Cacciatore sauce is typically served with poultry, but here Chef Fabio pairs his secret recipe with a lighter seafood option with a healthy serving of vegetables.

name: Lamb Almond Meatballs Over Farro
description: Premium grade lamb and finely ground almonds are mixed with an array of herbs and spices, bringing rich flavors and a nutty crunch to every bite. The meatballs are paired with roasted carrots and feta over a bed of farro and leek, with tzatziki sauce on the side for a tangy touch.

name: Texas Sirloin Chili
description: Chef Chase's Texas sirloin steak chili is a hearty and flavorful stew with mild spiciness and just a touch of sweetness. Topped with cheddar cheese and sour cream, this dish is ideal for a cold winter night. And for an extra Texas touch, Chef Chase adds a handful of Fritos to build a classic Frito pie or crumble atop your chili. What more could you want?!

name: Smoky Bbq Salmon
description: Combining Chef David‚Äôs favorite BBQ spice blend with succulent salmon, this dish is a delightful fusion of sweet and charred. A side of tangy, maple-glazed roasted brussels sprouts rounds out the flavorful meal.

name: Grilled Branzino with Sage Sauce
description: This is a French classic meal for sure you'll love when you get this amazing dish! The sage is just a perfect combination for the fish. Delicious :)

name: Indonesian Beef Ropa Vieja
description: East meets West in this fabulous fusion dish. Chef Abe's mouthwatering masterpiece features Indonesian-inspired flavors with tender, Cuban-style beef ropa vieja. Served alongside crispy fried yucca and fragrant turmeric rice adorned with chopped green onions and crispy fried shallots, this vibrant meal is sure to satisfy even the most discerning palate.

name: Baked Swai Taco Bowl
description: This fish taco bowl is loaded with juicy baked swai, nutty brown rice, black beans, corn and greens. Topped with cheddar cheese, this is a simple and satisfying meal that makes for a fresh dinner.

name: Veggie Lasagna with Sweet Potato
description: This is a wonderful recipe by Chef Tony that is filling without expanding your waistline with just fresh veggies like broccoli, sweet potatoes, and mushrooms.

name: Blackened Shrimp
description: Meet Chef David‚Äôs umami masterpiece. Fresh shrimp are tossed in his special seasoning before being seared to blackened perfection. A side of creamy risotto with tangy preserved lemon and parmesan balances the shrimp‚Äôs bold flavors.

name: Sweet Spicy Pineapple Salmon
description: Are you looking for a sweet, spicy, and umami-filled meal? Look no further than this tropically inspired dish from Chef Garces. Salmon is perfectly cooked with a sweet and spicy glaze that complements the fish's natural richness, then paired perfectly with brown rice infused with jalape√±o, cilantro, pineapple, and coconut. A side of saut√©ed bok choy provides a healthy dose of greens, rounding out the meal and making it a well-balanced option. This dish is packed with flavor and nutrients, making it the perfect choice for those who want to eat well without sacrificing taste.

name: Shrimp Pancit Canton Noodles
description: Traditional Filipino stir-fry egg noodle dish containing saut√©ed garlic shrimp and vegetables. Recommended adding a little of chili flake to add some heat and flavor!

name: Caprese Balsamic Grilled Chicken
description: Prepare to take your taste buds on a culinary journey through Europe. It starts with a trip to Italy for Chef Angelia's savory Caprese chicken with layers of marinated grilled chicken, thick slices of tomato and rich mozzarella cheese, and fresh basil. Then venture to Greece for a simple yet satisfying Greek salad with lots of fresh veggies, feta cheese, and Kalamata olives. A tangy balsamic dressing brings all of the elements of the dish together perfectly.

name: Chicken In Poblano
description: Dark green chili poblanos are used to make the deeply satisfying, rich sauce that pairs perfectly with the meaty mushrooms that are cooked to perfection.

name: Roasted Teriyaki Salmon
description: This is a delicious and healthy option for lunch or dinner that you'll find yourself craving week after week! Perfectly roasted salmon is served up alongside of steamed brown rice and simply roasted Brussels sprouts and carrots. On the side, you'll find Chef Esther's sweet-and-tangy teriyaki sauce to drizzle over the top.

name: Dipped Walnut Chocolate Chip Cookies
description: Our chocolate walnut cookie, dipped in chocolate and adorned with heart sprinkles, is a decadent and indulgent treat perfect for Mother's Day. The cookie itself is rich and packed with chunks of delicious walnuts for added texture and flavor. We dip the cookie in smooth and velvety chocolate, creating a luscious outer layer that adds a delicious touch. This cookie is a true delight for chocolate lovers and a special treat to show your love and appreciation on Mother's Day.

name: Thai Panang Curry with Beef
description: Thai Panang curry strikes the perfect balance of comforting and fresh. Panang curry is a popular variation on Thai red curry, known for being a slightly thicker curry with a sweet and savory, slightly tangy flavor. It gets its signature flavor from familiar ingredients like coconut milk and fish sauce, but with the addition of aromatics like dried red chilies, shallot, garlic, lemongrass, galangal, cumin seed, coriander seed and kaffir lime leaves. This satisfying curry pairs perfectly with tender beef and sweet bell peppers and a side of steamed jasmine rice.

name: Peruvian Seafood Paella
description: For this summery seafood feast, Chef Maribel amplifies the traditional Spanish rice dish with the flavor of Peru‚Äôs most famous chile pepper, aji amarillo. Dots of solar-yellow pepper sauce‚Äîfruity, with a gentle heat‚Äîtop her combination of fragrant saffron-infused Jasmine rice; sweet bell peppers, carrots, and peas; and rich, spice-rubbed and roasted salmon and plump shrimp. It all adds up to a meal that manages to be indulgent yet light at the same time‚Äîperfect when you want to treat yourself without going overboard.

name: Quinoa Pilaf Feliz Bowl
description: Nobody does a flavor-packed bowl full of plant-based goodness like Chef Ivy. This one draws inspiration from Latin America with roasted sweet plantains, nutty red quinoa pilaf, shredded red cabbage, cherry tomatoes, and smashed avocado. Top your bowl with black bean pico de gallo, drizzle in tangy agave-lime vinaigrette, and dig in.

name: Chicken Schnitzel
description: Austrian origin. A schnitzel is a thin slice of meat fried in fat. This version of Chef Chris is served with Smashed Potatoes in Dijon sauce.

name: Butter Chicken Kale Cilantro Saag
description: Chef Akhtar brings together two traditional Indian dishes and puts his own unique spin on them. Classic butter chicken brings satisfying comfort, which tender pieces of chicken in a rich, creamy tomato curry, and is the perfect foil to kale-cilantro saag, saut√©ed greens with loads of aromatic herbs and spices. The two flavor-packed dishes are served over a bed of fluffy Jasmine rice with a side of soft, buttery naan to soak up all the wonderful sauces.

name: Kids Turkey Meatballs
description: Your kids will love the flavor of this comforting favorite, and you'll love that it sneakily has lots of wholesome nutrition. Chef LaFrieda's baked turkey meatballs are tender and juicy, and are best served alongside al dente bow tie farfalle pasta with homemade marinara sauce. Your kids will love sprinkling a side of Parmesan cheese on top and diving in.

name: Chicken Fricassee
description: Comforting and effortlessly elegant, this is weeknight dining, upgraded. Golden-baked chicken thighs are gently simmered in a silky garlic and white wine sauce, infused with tarragon and parsley, and studded with earthy mushrooms. Chef Chase pairs this dish with a creamy potato pur√©e, forming a lush side to soak up the sauce.

name: Creamy 4 Cheese Baked Rigatoni
description: Get set to indulge! Each bite of perfectly al dente rigatoni pasta is coated in Chef Tracey‚Äôs masterful sauce‚Äîan irresistible blend of aged Asiago and Parmesan with fresh, creamy Mozzarella and Ricotta, plus fresh basil, parsley, garlic, and bright, tangy tomato to balance out the cheeses‚Äô richness. Enjoy this decadent dish with a fresh green salad to lighten things up or go all in and pair with a juicy steak and a nice glass of red.

name: Grilled Flank Steak Bowl
description: Steak lovers, listen up‚Äîthis loaded bowl is a must-try. The ideal weeknight dinner, it features juicy slices of grilled flank steak, chickpeas, roasted Brussels sprouts, saut√©ed mushrooms, and caramelized onions, all on a bed of baby kale and farro. An exquisite chermoula sauce made from cilantro, lemon juice, garlic and spices ties the whole bowl together. Not only is this dish nutritious and satisfying, but every bite promises a unique combination of flavors and textures.

name: Chana Masala
description: This plant-based dish is bursting with bold flavors and nutritious ingredients. Organic chickpeas are seasoned with aromatic Indian spices and served alongside a generous portion of saut√©ed cabbage and kale for a dose of fiber and vitamins. Coconut Basmati rice adds a delicious taste to the meal while a creamy herbed raita (made with vegan yogurt and fresh herbs) adds a cooling contrast.

name: Charred Green Beans
description: This side is tantalizing, as the unique licorice flavor of charred green beans meets the rich and nutty notes of toasted pumpkin seeds and blistered tomatoes. It's a harmonious blend of flavors and textures that delights the palate.

name: Garlicky Butter Baked Tilapia Parmesan Zucchini
description: Tilapia is known for its flaky texture and mild, sweet flavor, making it an ideal fish fillet to soak up zesty marinades. Here, Chef Meena coats it in a mix of garlic, butter, and spices, before it's baked until tender, then drizzled with a creamy lemon sauce splashed with white wine. A side of parmesan-crusted zucchini and golden-roasted potatoes makes this meal as balanced as it is comforting.

name: Mediterranean Stuffed Chicken
description: Enjoy juicy oven-baked chicken breast stuffed with garlicky spinach and crumbled feta. Chef Anthony completes this Mediterranean-style plate with lemony fingerling potatoes, charred cherry tomatoes, and a side of tzatziki sauce to drizzle to your liking.

name: Barramundi Alla Puttanesca
description: This fresh fish fillet --barramundi in this dish-- is grilled and served with a rich Putanesca tomato sauce filled with herbs, capers, green olives, and spices. Chef Santiago loves to add a little extra oomph with his seasoned rice mixed with spinach and corn. Some simply seasoned zucchini and summer squash complete the dish, which happens to be one of Chef Santiago's favorites (and we can see why!).

name: Hungry Arrachera Meal
description: The ultimate meal to crush any hangry mood. Enjoy a veritable feast of tender grilled flank steak and one cheese enchilada with a beef and ancho chile sauce, plus sides of red rice and charro beans. Top with pico de gallo to complete this meal that's a hearty meal to satisfy even the hungriest Texas cowboy.

name: Chicken and Veggie Stir Fry
description: Delicious chicken stir fry pairing with zoodles made from zucchini instead of traditional noodles and coconut aminos instead of soy sauce making this dish paleo, gluten-free and grain-free.

name: Pan Roasted Miso Salmon
description: Chef Sergio's special homemade miso blend featuring both the red and white varieties, called tama miso, boasts a smooth, umami-filled creaminess. It's used as a marinade for tender salmon, which is then baked and paired with a side of charred cabbage tossed in koji, a nutty fermented rice powder. This is a simple weeknight meal when you want something healthy yet super savory and satisfying.

name: Bistro Steak with Mushroom Au Jus
description: This double portion of steak from Chef Akhtar brings the French bistro right to your table! Seared NY strip steak is served alongside a rich and creamy pan sauce with mushrooms and shallots. Enjoy alongside mashed or roasted potatoes and your favorite veggies to complete the restaurant experience.

name: Beet Hearty Veggie Bowl
description: Barley is cooked in beet juice to give it a beautiful purple color, and a sweet earthy flavor. Then it's tossed with roasted beets and tart dried cranberries for a punch of tart sweetness, and a lemony spinach pesto.

name: Penne with Grilled Shrimp
description: Jumbo Shrimp is seared and coated with a silky, rich, creamy roasted red pepper sauce with hints of lemon, fresh herbs and fresh garlic and topped off with parmesan cheese.

name: Mediterranean Chicken Grain Bowl
description: This bowl from chef Ruben brings a bright taste of the Greek isles to your table. Juicy chicken breast is served over a hearty bed of quinoa and creamy hummus and topped with cherry tomatoes and Kalamata olives, along with a smoky tomato vinaigrette. Fresh yet filling, this bowl will fuel you all day long, the Mediterranean way!

name: Thai Coconut Curry Salmon
description: Tender salmon fillets pair perfectly with the rich flavors of coconut milk and Thai red curry paste to create a dish that is not only comforting, but also elegant. The mild curry is also loaded with veggies like eggplant, mushrooms, zucchini, and peppers to complement the salmon. Served alongside jasmine rice with roasted cauliflower and green beans, this dish is not to be missed!

name: Almond Miso Soba Noodles
description: A balanced, delicious protein rich vegetarian meal packed with umami flavors, colorful veggies and a creamy nutty sauce with a bright kick of ginger and cayenne. Fair warning: you will want to put Chef Emily's crunchy, spicy tempeh chili crunch on everything.

name: Classic Tuna Macaroni Salad
description: Chef Chris was inspired by the corner delis and Kosher spots from his childhood in Brooklyn to create this classic cold salad. Those old spots may be gone but the flavor profile lives on in Chef's flavor DNA. Good mayonnaise, fresh veggies, fresh pasta, and good canned tuna‚Äîwhat more do you need? Chef likes to serve the tuna and macaroni salads separately‚Äîwith an irresistible candied jalape√±o relish on the side‚Äîbut feel free to mix them too, if that's your jam.

name: Beef Stroganoff
description: We‚Äôre sure you‚Äôre whole family will love this dish. Chef Raymundo dresses tender meatballs in a creamy sauce with mushrooms and fusilli noodles. Topped with a bit of fresh parsley, this dish will satisfy your cravings for a hearty and indulgent pasta.

name: Thai Steak Salad
description: Lots of veggies such as romaine, carrots top with cashews pack with flavorful steak.

name: Grilled Steak with Black Lentil
description: Flavorful hanger steak marinated with lime, cilantro paired with a good source dietary fiber and also have a low amount of calories black lentil. This is served on a bed of radish, pear and tomato.

name: Cuban Beef Picadillo
description: Transport yourself to the vibrant streets of Cuba with this classic Cuban picadillo dish. Tender ground beef is cooked with a medley of aromatic spices, including cumin, garlic, and oregano, creating a flavorful and comforting filling. Served alongside fragrant steamed jasmine rice, the dish is elevated with the addition of crispy plantains, perfectly caramelized in rich brown butter. Each bite is a delightful blend of savory and sweet, capturing the essence of Cuban cuisine in a single plate.

name: Walnut Miso Crusted Salmon
description: This dish is made with fresh salmon crusted with a toasted walnut and miso sauce and baked to perfection. It is served on a bed of grilled Napa cabbage, charred bok choy, and tatsoi with a ginger scallion sauce. Better yet, it's gluten-free and keto-friendly!

name: Honey Ginger Grilled Chicken
description: Fresh flavors practically burst off the plate in this delicious dish. Smoky grilled chicken thighs are complemented by a sweet-and-savory honey, ginger, and garlic sauce that evokes Asian flavors you know and love. Paired with garlicky broccoli and steamed jasmine rice, this dish is like a lighter, brighter version of takeout chicken and broccoli, but better tasting and better for you.

name: Sweet Long Pepper Marinated Lamb Chops
description: Lamb chops marinated in a delicious aromatic kencur, long pepper, thai chili, chile guajillo, sweet coconut sugar, and more good for you spices, seasoning paste, then served with creamy mashed potatoes and topped with Chef‚Äôs long pepper butter. Garnished with cherry tomatoes and fresh scallions for a refreshing crunch.

name: Crispy Tilapia Greek Salad
description: Chef Santiago's modern take on fish and chips is so full of flavor and texture, it's practically irresistible. A crispy battered tilapia fillet is paired with spice-coated roasted potatoes and a creamy, lightly spicy habanero-herb aioli to dip. For some acidity and brightness, Chef serves up a side of his classic Greek salad with feta, kalamata olives, cucumber, and tomatoes. This dish is not to be missed!

name: Caribbean Chicken Curry
description: This creamy coconutty chicken curry also features onions, carrots, and green bell peppers. Saut√©ed napa cabbage and jasmine rice on the side complete the meal.

name: Chicken Cordon Bleu
description: Elevate your dinners with this delicious Chicken Cordon Bleu. Inspired by classic European cuisine, this dish features tender chicken breast stuffed with flavorful prosciutto and melty Swiss cheese. The chicken is coated in a crispy gluten-free breadcrumb crust and baked until golden brown. Served alongside creamy mashed sweet potatoes, this elegant meal offers a perfect balance of flavors and textures. Easy to prepare yet impressive enough for special occasions, this Chicken Cordon Bleu will become a new favorite in our recipe collection.

name: Berbere Roasted Chicken
description: Berbere is a warm North African spice blend, fragrant with notes of cinnamon, ginger, and red pepper. Here, Chef Anthony uses it to season perfectly roasted chicken thighs‚Äîcrisp on the outside, and tender and juicy inside. He rounds out the meal with a fluffy, traditional North African-style couscous, tossed with almonds, golden raisins, and refreshing mint, plus sweet roasted carrots topped with salty, creamy Feta cheese. Pour the sweet and savory caramelized onion sauce over the entire dish to bring all these comforting flavors together.

name: Sweet and Spicy Beef Rice Bowl
description: Savor the perfect balance of flavors with Chef Tracey's sweet and spicy ground beef rice bowl. Tender ground beef is seasoned with aromatic spices and a hint of sweetness that will keep you coming back for bite after bite. A bed of fluffy Jasmine rice completes the dish.

name: My Moms Beef Brisket
description: This is Chef Chris‚Äô mom‚Äôs recipe and his homage to her home-cooked meals, even in the days when things were sparse and humble. True to his mom‚Äôs Jewish heritage, this is, in essence, a classic Kosher Passover brisket. Marbled beef brisket is oven roasted then slow-cooked with carrots, onions, a little tomato, and beef stock. Sliced and served with spicy and sweet harissa-maple rainbow carrots and crisp roasted Yukon potatoes, along with Chef‚Äôs house horseradish creme sauce to bring it all together. You can taste the love in every bite! Chef recommends heating this meal in the microwave.

name: Jerk Shrimp Bowl
description: Chef Michael dials up the heat with this colorful bowl. Juicy jerk-spiced shrimp lands on a bed of coconut-infused Jamaican rice, flecked with peas and laced with fragrant herbs. Charred peppers and onions add bite, caramelized plantains bring buttery richness, and a grilled pineapple salsa cuts through it all with a bright, tropical snap.

name: Thai Coconut Curry Turkey Meatballs
description: Smothered in a delicious cream red curry coconut cream, enjoy these turkey meatballs spiced with basil, ginger, and garlic. It's grain-free, gluten-free, and paleo.

name: Caribbean Hippie Bowl
description: This vegetarian meal from Chef Nahika is perfect for a hearty lunch or refreshing dinner. Her 'hippie bowl' features slow-cooked lentils that have been braised with tomatoes and Caribbean spices, along with yellow rice and a side salad of tomatoes, cucumbers, and lots of fresh herbs. An herbaceous yogurt sauce that packs just a little bit of heat ties the whole bowl together.

name: Dill Marinated Salmon with Vegetables
description: Enjoy a comforting salmon dish with a special touch of dill marinade and perfectly balanced with mixed garlicky vegetables. It's a uniquely colorful and healthy seafood meal!

name: Beer Braised Pork Bratwurst
description: All the flavors of fall in one plate of comforting goodness. Enjoy a taste of Oktoberfest any time of year with beer-braised bratwurst sausages served on a bed of creamy mashed potatoes with chives. Sides of saut√©ed cabbage, horseradish sour cream, and roasted apples complete the mouthwatering meal.

name: Grilled Skirt Steak with Herb Butter
description: A beautifully grilled skirt steak is served with crispy roasted potatoes and topped with a flavored butter that was originally made to serve with escargot from Chef Ludo's hometown in Burgundy, France.

name: Spanish Lentil Soup
description: This is a traditional Spanish lentil soup made with a vegan twist. Chef Miguel's comforting soup starts with his take on the classic sofrito, infused with spices like cumin and paprika for smoky spice. That gets stewed with lentils, herbs, and a flavorful soup base until the lentils are tender. It‚Äôs filling, warming, and perfect for winter.

name: Katsu Curry Udon with Swai Fish
description: A delicious and modern take on Japanese curry rice. Chef Mike's rich Kanagawa-style curry is paired with bouncy udon noodles and lightly fried swai, a light white fish. The curry udon is paired with thinly shaved cabbage and Fukujinzuke, Japanese-style pickled veggies, for a pop of freshness. All the elements play equal parts to create a balanced dish that is a delight in both taste and texture.

name: Steak Onion Rice Bowl
description: For this traditional, comforting Japanese donburi (rice bowl), Chef Mike stir-fries zesty onions and tender, flavorful slices of ribeye to get them deliciously caramelized, then simmers the combination in sweet and savory soy and dashi broth, infusing it with umami richness. He spoons a hearty serving over a bed of fluffy rice. On the side: crisp-tender blanched yu choy and another umami bomb‚Äîa jammy hard-cooked egg marinated overnight in soy sauce. Super-satisfying and rich in protein, this is a perfect post-workout meal.

name: Pan Seared Branzino with Ratatouille
description: This classic, comforting Southern French stew of vegetables features eggplant, zucchini, squash, and peppers cooked with tomato, vinegar, and a pinch of chili. Chef Ludo serves his ratatouille alongside a beautifully seared branzino fillet, garnished with fresh basil for a taste of summertime in France, anywhere, any time of year.

name: Singaporean Chicken Curry Rice Bowl
description: Mildly spiced, creamy and savory curry meets its match in tender chicken thighs. Marinated then simmered until tender alongside carrots and chunks of potato, the rich curry is served over aromatic garlic-ginger rice. Topped with cilantro for some added fragrance, this dish is like a little taste of Singaporean cuisine.

name: Blackened Chicken with Mango Habanero Salsa
description: Inspired by a myriad of Latin and Caribbean influences, Chef Garces' take on blackened chicken will transport you to the tropics. Served with sides of coconut rice and broccoli, plus a mango-habanero salsa that packs sweet heat, this dish is a party in your mouth!

name: Short Rib Green Curry
description: Short Ribs braised in green curry, coconut milk, Japanese eggplant, and Thai basil until tender. Then served with wild black forbidden rice and an extra Thai chili for those who love it more spicy. The nuttiness of the rice pairs very well with creamy and aromatic curry. It‚Äôs comforting in every bite!

name: Cashew Chicken with Bok Choy
description: A classic Chinese-American favorite, this dish is made with tender chicken and bok choy in soy sauce, ginger, and aromatic garlic oil, and topped with roasted cashews. It is served with basmati rice infused with fragrant garlic and red chili.

name: Spanish Omelet Chorizo
description: Prepare to savor a classic taste of Barcelona, with a vegan twist. Chef Cami‚Äôs expertly prepared vegan Spanish-style omelet has a golden crust that gives way to a fluffy and flavorful center, stuffed with hearty, perfectly seasoned potatoes. It‚Äôs paired with a heaping portion of crumbled plant-based chorizo for spicy, smoky flavor and a fresh side salad of peppery arugula, tangy cherry tomatoes, and sweet balsamic vinaigrette. This vibrant, bold meal makes a fantastic brunch, lunch, or dinner.

name: Tofu Banh Mi
description: Experience a taste of Vietnam with Chef Cami's tantalizing Tofu Banh Mi. Picture this: a crusty baguette, baked to perfection, stuffed with marinated, sizzling tofu that's been roasted to a golden crispness. The tofu is layered with an array of vibrant and crunchy vegetable including pickled carrots, crisp cucumber slices, and fresh cilantro leaves, adding a delightful burst of freshness to every bite. A drizzle of tangy and slightly spicy Sriracha vegan mayo is added to elevate the experience. This culinary delight is a perfect fusion of flavors and textures, showcasing the versatility of tofu in Vietnamese cuisine.

name: Grilled Salmon with Kale Quinoa Salad
description: Tender grilled salmon meets a powerhouse salad of kale, quinoa, arugula, and cherry tomatoes, all brought to life with a bright sherry-shallot vinaigrette. A parmesan and breadcrumb topping adds just the right amount of crunch to each bite.

name: Fanfetti Football Cake Jar
description: Layers of moist funfetti cake alternate with fluffy vanilla buttercream, creating a delightful treat. Crowned with a whimsical sugar football, this cake is the ultimate addition to your game day festivities, adding a touch of sweetness to every touchdown celebration.

name: Shrimp with Cauliflower Risotto
description: Using cauliflower as a substitute for risotto rice makes this meal a low carb and satisfying paleo meal. It is also gluten and dairy free with a crunch of walnut for that extra boost and nutrient.

name: Maple Sweet Potato Puree
description: Chef Delucie's sweet potato pur√©e is a smooth, velvety side dish that's perfect for Thanksgiving. The sweet potatoes are cooked until tender, then pur√©ed with maple syrup for natural sweetness and a hint of nutmeg for warmth. Butter and a touch of salt balance the flavors, creating a rich and comforting dish that pairs beautifully with savory holiday classics like turkey and stuffing. It's a simple yet flavorful side, adding a bit of sweetness and pop of color to the Thanksgiving table.

name: Grilled Chicken Suya with Roasted Green Beans
description: Enjoy our signature Grilled Chicken with a mild spicy suya seasoning over Jollof Rice with a side of Roasted Green Beans and our West African Red Sauce.

name: Chicken Torikara Bao Buns
description: Chef Sergio bathes juicy chicken thighs in bright, gingery Toriyaka sauce, reduced until it‚Äôs thick and syrupy, then stuffs the tender meat into a trio of fluffy steamed bao buns along with crisp, refreshing pickled carrots and cucumbers (with extra on the side). The result is a crazy-amazing combination of flavor and texture. Smear on some of that rich, spicy Sriracha mayonnaise to give these delectable little sandwiches a kick of gentle heat. Then pair them with simple steamed edamame and enjoy a crave-worthy meal anytime you like.

name: Central American Fried Chicken
description: Think of this dish like a classic Southern comfort meal, but with Central American influence. Chef Santos' fried chicken is wonderfully crunchy on the outside, but super moist and juicy on the inside, since Chef uses chicken thighs that have been marinated in typical Central American flavors. Served with tajadas‚Äîcrispy fired plantain slices‚Äîand a simple cabbage slaw in a homemade creamy dressing, this fried chicken plate has all the fixings you know and love, just with flavors you've never experienced before.

name: Truffled Fettuccine Alfredo with Grilled Chicken
description: Elegant and comforting, there's so much to love about this dish. Herb-seasoned, perfectly grilled chicken breasts are sliced and served atop al dente fettuccine pasta coated in a luscious Alfredo sauce. To take it over the top, Chef Meena infuses the Alfredo sauce with high quality white truffle oil for a burst of umami and extra richness. This is a true restaurant-quality dish, served up on your table in minutes.

name: Mediterranean Seared Salmon Cauliflower Lentil Mujadara
description: Lentil Mujadara is a staple rice dish in Levantine cuisine, but Chef Einat puts a healthier twist on it with cauliflower 'rice'. A sumac and Baharat spice-crusted salmon fillet brings protein and tangy flavor, especially when paired with the spicy zing of the za‚Äôatar chimichurri. This it‚Äôs a well-rounded, wholesome and delicious meal.

name: Shrimp and Spaghetti Beans Pasta
description: Spaghetti Bean Pasta is exactly what it is, spaghetti made from beans. No add-ins, preservatives, nothing. This pasta is tossed with roasted broccoli and peppers drenched in delicious sauce.

name: Grilled Chicken and Mushrooms
description: A truly comforting, satisfying and tasty meal. This is chef's delicious, creamy chicken made with lots of mushrooms over tender basmati rice.

name: Pappardelle with Beef Ragu
description: Chef Kristy learned this recipe while studying in Italy and living with an Italian family, and now she's ready to bring an authentic taste of her time there to your table. Comforting and rich beef rag√π pairs perfectly with al dente pappardelle pasta, especially when topped with herbed parmesan cheese and fresh basil. This is as comforting as Italian comfort food gets.

name: Glazed Meatloaf
description: Southern food at its finest, this brings me back to home growing up. Delicious meatloaf like my mama used to cook, buttery green beans, mushroom gravy, and silky potatoes.

name: Southwest Chicken Bowl
description: Chef Nelson loves to create delicious meals that are packed with flavor and fresh, nutritious ingredients! This bowl features grilled chicken served with a colorful array of veggies like romaine, sweet corn, radishes, and black beans. A BBQ Ranch Dressing offers the perfect balance of tangy creaminess while pico de gallo adds freshness.

name: Greek Style Chicken Power Bowl
description: Chef DeLucie's Mediterranean-inspired power bowl is a wholesome and nutritious dish that features perfectly grilled, sambal-marinated chicken as the protein-packed base. It is then accompanied by a variety of fresh and colorful ingredients inspired by Greek cuisine including cherry tomatoes, cucumbers, olives, and feta cheese. Whether enjoyed for lunch or dinner, this bowl offers a well-balanced mix of nutrients to keep you energized and satisfied for hours.

name: Grilled Salmon with Cherry Tomato Sauce
description: Savor a tender Atlantic salmon filet, accompanied by a sweet cherry tomato sauce with a hint of chili, fragrant basil, plus briny capers and olives. A side of garlicky spinach completes this delicious low-carb meal.

name: Mediterranean Roasted Chicken
description: Inspired by the Mediterranean, this dish is light and healthy, yet totally satisfying and full of flavor. Herb-marinated chicken thighs are roasted to crispy, juicy perfection, then sliced and served over an herb and olive Israeli couscous salad. Blistered tomatoes add sweetness, pickled onions bring acidity, and crispy fried chickpeas add a pop of salty crunchy texture.

name: Cold Glass Noodle Salad with Crab
description: Chilled glass noodles are paired with crab, edamame, carrots, sweet summer cherry tomatoes and tossed in a tangy, sweet-and-savory Chengdu-style dressing. Topped with fresh cilantro, scallions, and sesame seeds, as well as some crushed peanuts for texture, this refreshing dish is perfect any day of the week!

name: Mexican Philly Cheesesteak Bowl
description: Chef Nelson takes a Philly crowd favorite to Mexico. Thinly sliced ribeye, marinated and seared until caramelized, gets tossed with sweet, blistered bell peppers. Instead of a hoagie, it‚Äôs served over fragrant cilantro jasmine rice, with a smoky, chipotle-laced Baja sauce adding a creamy layer. Bright green onions, fiery pepperoncini, and melty provolone cheese bring the final trifecta of flavor.

name: Warming Falafel Bowl
description: Enjoy a flavor-packed, plant-based falafel bowl that really highlights the veggies. It features Chef Lena's popular and highly-rated baked falafel, made from sprouted chickpeas for extra nutrition. The crisp falafel are served on a bed of yellow spiced rice alongside roasted carrot hummus, zesty Aleppo pepper coleslaw, and a creamy tahini drizzle. This dish is everything you love about a falafel wrap, but in a warm, satiating bowl.

name: Andouille Kielbasa Smoked Sausages
description: Indulge in a smoky and savory BBQ feast featuring juicy Kielbasa and spicy Andouille sausages, served with a generous, comforting sides that will leave your taste buds singing with delight. Our expert chefs carefully grill the sausages to perfection, infusing them with the rich flavors of the BBQ, and serve them hot and juicy with a side of Grandad's BBQ sauce, ready to be devoured. On the side, dig into velvety smooth mashed potatoes and traditional corn pudding, a classic Southern recipe that's like cornbread, but even more luscious and decadent. Between the snappy sausages, the silky potatoes, creamy corn pudding, and cool coleslaw, this dish has the perfect blend of flavors and textures that will have you coming back for bite after bite.

name: Grilled Chicken Tuscan Fettuccine
description: You'll love everything about this dish, from the perfectly seasoned grilled chicken to the fettuccine tossed in a Tuscan parmesan cream sauce. The sauce is what makes it, with notes of garlic, fresh basil, parsley and sun-dried tomatoes, all mixed with tender baby spinach and sweet cherry tomatoes. Rich yet balanced, this is one combination you'll never get tired of.

name: Farro Beets Greens Salad with Roasted Chicken
description: Here's a fresh grain and greens salad to keep you satisfied and energized throughout the day. This bowl of goodness starts with a bed of arugula and nutty farro, then Chef Dustin adds in oven-roasted red beets and Brussels sprouts and roasted chicken. Topped with crumbled feta, walnuts, and fresh herbs like mint, chives, and parsley, this salad is sure to brighten your day!

name: Cheesy Chicken Chipotle Enchiladas
description: Everyone has their ideal enchilada and for Chef Maribel, it's the union of chipotle, tomato, and corn tortillas‚Äîhand dipped in sizzling oil and filled with shredded chicken and melty pepper jack cheese‚Äîthat makes the perfect one. Stacked corn tortillas are filled with tender, tomato-braised chicken and smothered in Chef's smoky chipotle-tomato sauce, then baked to perfection. Topped with a cooling crema fresca and served alongside jasmine rice and black beans, this dish delivers comfort in each bite.

name: Creamy Mushroom Risotto with Herbed Chicken
description: Tender herb-roasted chicken thigh sits on a bed of velvety mushroom risotto packed with cremini mushrooms and fresh spring asparagus. A creamy herb-and-white-wine pan sauce ties the whole dish together for an umami-packed, comforting yet sophisticated dish.

name: Asian Sesame Beef Salad
description: Asian inspired salad made with beef, sesame oil and sesame seeds and tons of flavors, colorful and healthy, Beef cubes, zucchini, carrots, green onions tossed together for this paleo and low carb meal you will enjoy.

name: Grilled Grass Fed Skirt Steak Celery Root Mash
description: The title says it all. Simple yet totally delicious, this dish features perfectly seasoned and grilled grass fed skirt steak, sliced and served on a bed of a silky pur√©ed celery root. Accompanied by a medley of roasted winter vegetables and topped with an amazing blue cheese compound butter, pour a glass of pinot noir and enjoy a decadent night in.

name: Korean Bbq Flank Steak Salad
description: Chef Esther's Korean version of a perfect steak salad. This dish is made with flank steak marinated in a Korean BBQ marinade for 24 hours, then flash seared. It is served on a bed of greens, pickled beets, chickpeas, tomato and radishes with a lemon-soy vinaigrette that compliments the steak very well.

name: Blackened Dijon Chicken
description: We all know how chicken meals always hits the spot. A nice and tasty hearty blackened chicken with Dijon is a must try on our menu.

name: Creamy Potato Leek Soup
description: Soup season is here! Chef Chris famously loves making and eating the stuff, and in this soup he combines potatoes, leeks, and cream for a warming bowl of pure comfort. Potatoes and leeks are simmered in a combination vegetable stock and heavy cream infused with marjoram and bay leaves, then pur√©ed until silky smooth and finished with fresh thyme. This soup is the ideal light-yet-satisfying lunch or starter for a sophisticated dinner.

name: Tangy Alleppey Branzino Curry
description: Craving a meal that packs a serious flavor punch? Add Chef Guarav‚Äôs wonderfully aromatic fish curry‚Äînamed for Alleppey (Alappuzha), a city in coastal Kerala, India‚Äîto your order queue. Mild, white-fleshed Branzino provides the centerpiece‚Äîseared first for a lightly smoky char, then simmered in the tangy, creamy, and richly spiced sauce, which is flavored with fresh raw mangoes and coconut milk. It‚Äôs plated with steamed Basmati rice and finished with fresh cilantro for a pop of bright green color. Pair this dish with a fresh green salad and take your tastebuds on a round-the-world trip‚Äîfrom the comfort of home.

name: Keto Sambal Chicken with Pancetta
description: Savor a delightfully comforting keto option featuring tender chicken breast, crispy pancetta, and roasted Brussels sprouts, all bathed in savory chicken gravy. The chicken breast is carefully trimmed and marinated with a zesty sambal chile blend before being expertly grilled to perfection. The smoky, rich pops of pancetta take this dish from good to gotta-have-it.

name: Korean Fried Chicken
description: Chef Chomsun's signature KFC gets brined in spicy seasonings before getting dusted and fried to crispy-on-the-outside, juicy-on-the-inside perfection. Drizzled with hot honey and accompanied by tangy sweet and sour radish as well as fluffy white rice, this dish is a delightful fusion of Korean flavors and American comfort food!

name: Sriracha Honey Glazed Salmon Bites
description: After one taste of Chef Tracey's glazed salmon bites, you'll never want to eat the fish any other way. Succulent salmon is marinated and cooked in a mouthwatering blend of honey and sriracha, creating a perfect balance of sweet and heat. The sticky-sweet bites are served alongside Chef's refreshing kale crunch salad, which features kale and shredded cabbage dressed in a tangy apple cider vinaigrette. A sprinkle of sliced almonds on top add a delightful pop of texture, finishing off the wholesome and delicious meal.

name: Vegan Penne Alla Vodka
description: A modern take on the Italian classic, a creamy tomato sauce packed with plant based proteins. Silken tofu with a touch of coconut cream provide a richness to the sauce that will not weigh you down, but will lift you up into healthy tomato sauce heaven. With red lentil pasta, a nutritious powerhouse gluten free grain, and a spicy chile crunch topping, this is a meal that is full of protein, fiber and flavor, that the whole family will love! Win win.

name: Spicy Jerk Flank Steak
description: Chef Abe is bringing the flavors of the Caribbean to your table with some Indonesian flare. Tender and juicy flank steak is marinated then smothered in vibrant, spicy jerk seasoning to give it an irresistibly aromatic flavor. The green peas are cooked to perfection, with a slightly crunchy texture, and a side of garlicky fried yucca is crispy on the outside and soft on the inside. Tie all the elements together with an Indonesian-inspired sambal green goddess dressing and you get a dish that will make your taste buds dance.

name: Hoisin Glazed Salmon
description: Chef Phet serves up a perfectly roasted skin-on salmon fillet glazed with a sweet and tangy hoisin sauce, accompanied by crispy roasted Brussels sprouts drizzled in caramel fish sauce, all over a bed of ginger-scallion jasmine rice. Mix in the Lao-style chili sauce on the side for some extra heat!

name: Chicken Shawarma Taco
description: If there's one thing Chef Einat knows, it's how to remix Middle Eastern flavors. Here, juicy spice-marinated chicken is wrapped in soft tortillas, and paired with sabzi Persian herb rice and hearty black beans. A side of pickled carrots adds a tangy crunch, while a drizzle of amba aioli‚Äîa rich, tangy mango sauce‚Äîties everything together with a vibrant twist.

name: Grilled Lamb Patties
description: Bring a taste of Middle Eastern street food to your table with these juicy grilled lamb patties! Flavorful ground lamb is mixed with a variety of spices and herbs, then formed into patties and expertly grilled in the Turkish style. The lamb is served on a bed of saffron-infused Basmati rice with a side of sumac pickled onions and za'atar roasted cherry tomatoes, plus a garlic-yogurt sauce to drizzle.

name: Fresh Fruit Cup
description: A weekly rotation of seasonal delights awaits you with our ever-changing menu, curated to showcase the freshest produce available in the market. Treat yourself to a refreshing finale with a serving of freshly cut fruit, perfect for a guilt-free dessert option.

name: Parmesan Roasted Eggplant
description: Chef Chris wanted to come up with a healthier alternative to the deep-fried eggplant you typically see on Italian menus, but without sacrificing any of the flavor. He decided on simply roasted thin slices of seasoned eggplant, layered Napoleon-style with hand-sliced fresh mozzarella, and served with fresh roasted tomato sauce.

name: Vegetable Chickpea Tagine
description: You'll savor every bite of Chef Chase's modern take on a traditional North African tagine. The vegetable-centric, Moroccan-inspired version features red potatoes and carrots cooked alongside roasted onions and spiced with garam masala and paprika. Lemon, Castelvetrano olives, and golden raisins round out this tagine, which gets served alongside lemony couscous‚Äîthe ideal zesty accompaniment.

name: Shrimp Etouffee
description: Chef Akhtar serves up his take on a classic and comforting Cajun dish famous in New Orleans. √âtouff√©e is a French word meaning ‚Äúsmothered‚Äù and here it describes the technique of smothering seafood in rich tomato-based stew. Chef Akhtar adds succulent shrimp to the gravy base that's made with a traditional roux and the 'Holy Trinity' of onions, celery, and green bell peppers. It's a complex blend of Cajun, Creole, and French influences and you'll savor every last bite of it.

name: Cold Sesame Noodle Bowl
description: This dish ticks all the boxes for a fresh, flavor-packed meal. It features creamy miso-tahini sauced gluten-free noodles, which are complemented by the zing of blistered sweet chili green beans, refreshing cucumbers, and tangy pickled daikon and carrots. With even more of the nutty, savory sauce to drizzle on top, you may just find yourself licking the bowl clean.

name: Pad Kra Pao with Pork
description: Pad Kra Pao is a delicious and flavorful Thai dish made with ground pork and aromatics that includes shallots, garlic, and basil. Served with jasmine rice and steamed broccoli.

name: West Indian Lamb Bowl
description: This comforting bowl of goodness from Chef Nahika packs some serious flavor into a small package. The bowl features ground lamb that's been braised with tomatoes, peppers, West Indian spices, and fresh herbs like mint and parsley. The lamb is plated on a bed of yellow turmeric-infused rice with peas and carrots, as well as a refreshing side salad of tomatoes, cucumbers, and even more fresh herbs. An herbaceous yogurt sauce that packs just a little bit of heat ties the whole bowl together.

name: Chicken Mushroom Marsala Penne
description: Simply seasoned chicken breast and plump penne pasta are generously coated in a luxurious cream sauce infused with Marsala wine. The flavors are enriched even more with saut√©ed cremini mushrooms and shredded parmesan.

name: Oven Roasted Salmon
description: What's better than a gorgeous, succulent fillet of salmon? For Chef Santos, the answer is not much, especially when that fish is roasted to buttery, flaky perfection and paired with a touch of Mexican flair. Chef has reimagined one of his favorite Mexican appetizers as a delicious side dish, a creamy corn salad that's reminiscent of Mexican street corn, but with epazote, an herb that adds unique depth of flavor. A side of brown rice and squeeze of fresh lemon completes this delightful dish.

name: Lemon Grilled Chicken Grain Bowl
description: Fill up with this hearty Mediterranean bowl featuring lemon and herb marinated grilled chicken and a zesty Greek salad, all over a bed of farro, tri-color quinoa, and leafy baby spinach. Garlic toasted chickpeas add a flavorful crunch while a avocado-based green goddess dressing ties the whole thing together.

name: Pulled Pork Bbq Sliders
description: Slow-smoked pork shoulder is the star of this dish. Served alongside a tangy BBQ sauce and crunchy, refreshing cabbage and carrot slaw. Perfect for a warm-weather meal when you don't feel like pulling out the grill.

name: Rustic Wine Braised Pot Roast
description: Elegant and sophisticated, hearty and comforting... this autumnal feast features fall-apart-tender beef chuck pot roast gently braised with aromatic vegetables and herbs in red wine. It‚Äôs complemented by delectably sweet butternut squash ravioli and diced roasted butternut squash tossed in a nutty brown butter and pecan sauce. A finishing shower of grated Parmesan cheese adds a touch of umami richness, while parsley provides a pop of color.

name: Baked Ricotta and Spinach Cannelloni
description: These classic cannelloni are stuffed with a creamy ricotta and spinach filling and smothered in a traditional ‚Äúsugo" sauce with vodka. Sugo sauce is a classic Italian tomato sauce flavored with extra-virgin olive oil, garlic, and basil, with a little cream and vodka added here for extra decadence. Finished with a drizzle of parmigiano cream, this dish is ultra comforting.

name: Fajita Steak Cheese Tacos
description: These tacos take Chef Santiago back to Mexico City, where his favorite street food was always steak alambres tacos. Lucky for us, he's recreated this beloved dish for CookUnity. These comforting tacos feature marinated and grilled steak with fajita-style saut√©ed veggies, all topped with melted mozzarella cheese and a creamy habanero salsa on top and a good spicy sauce. Paired with rice and beans, it has just enough spice and heat to keep you coming back for bite after flavorful bite.

name: Broccoli Cheddar Breakfast Frittata
description: Getting your day started off on the right foot is easy when you know you have this tasty frittata to look forward to! This frittata features a rich egg mixture, white cheddar cheese, and roasted broccoli. Served alongside seasoned, roasted potatoes, this is the ideal meal for all the savory-breakfast lovers out there!

name: Chicken Fajitas with Corn Tortillas
description: Tender chicken thigh strips are expertly seasoned and saut√©ed to perfection, the chicken offers a juicy and succulent texture. Accompanied by sliced onions and bell peppers, each bite presents a delightful fusion of savory and tangy notes. The combination of corn tortillas, sour cream, and Chile de Arbol sauce adds a satisfying element to the dish, while the vibrant colors and zesty taste are enhanced by the refreshing garnish of a fresh lime wedge.

name: Savory Caribbean Pork Stew
description: The hearty centerpiece of this unforgettable meal is Chef Ivy‚Äôs take on the famous ribs found on nearly every menu in St. Maarten, except in soul-satisfying stew form. The tender slow-braised pork and aromatic vegetables are seasoned with typical Caribbean spices, like allspice and cardamom, plus a mild cayenne kick. On the side, there‚Äôs fragrant Creole rice studded with Pigeon Peas and sweet corn kernels, plus caramelized plantains. It all adds up to an irresistible blend of savory and sweet that you‚Äôll crave again and again.

name: Tandoori Spiced Skirt Steak
description: This delicious dish consists of a double portion of tender skirt steak seasoned with warming tandoori spices. The steak is cooked to a perfect medium, sliced, and served with a side of cilantro-mint chutney, which adds a zesty punch of freshness that perfectly complements the steak. Pair this steak with a side of rice, potatoes, or grilled veggies or serve atop a green salad for a satisfying meal in minutes.

name: Mediterranean Beef Stuffed Eggplant
description: Enjoy a taste of the Mediterranean with Lebanese influences in this comforting dish. Tender roasted eggplant is topped with a flavorful ground beef filling that's seasoned with warm spices and mixed with pine nuts and parsley. To complete the dish, the stuffed eggplant is drizzled with a creamy tahini-yogurt sauce and served alongside fluffy basmati rice.

name: Roasted Chicken Tikka with Broccolini
description: Roasted chicken rubbed over tikka curry paste getting into all the nooks and crannies. Chicken is drained with coriander over bed of broccolini and potatoes.

name: Red Wine Short Ribs with Maple Whipped Sweet Potatoes
description: In this decadent dish, red-wine-braised short ribs mingle with whipped sweet potatoes and Brussels sprouts with bacon. It is one of Chef Larry and Marc's best-selling dishes from their famed New York restaurant, An American Place.

name: Sweet Potatoes Fries with Lemon Aioli
description: Crispy on the outside, creamy on the inside, these sweet potato fries will quash any childhood comfort food cravings. Served with a tangy lemon aioli on the side for dipping, pair these fries up with a simply grilled chicken breast or steak for the easiest satisfying-yet-healthy dinner ever.

name: Miso Glazed Salmon
description: A simple and delicious meal for the health conscious. Omega 3 rich salmon gets marinated with a sweet, salty, and savory miso glaze, and oven roasted until tender and flaky. Paired with garlicky broccoli, you'll get tons of vitamins and antioxidants, you'll feel great about what you eat without sacrificing on flavor!

name: Sweet Soy Caramelized Shrimp
description: Enjoy a little taste of Indonesia with this dish. Succulent shrimp are tossed in with Bumbu Samawa‚Äîa zesty, slightly spicy Indonesian spice blend made with garlic and coriander‚Äîand sweet soy sauce that helps the shrimp caramelize as they saut√©. The shrimp are served alongside aromatic jasmine rice and pickled cucumbers, and finished with a sambal tomato sauce that's served on the side so you can add as much as you like and spice things up a bit.

name: Chicken Nicoise Salad
description: It versatile, easy to eat and healthy for you! Chicken, eggs and tuna combined in a bed of green salad for a keto friendly meal.

name: Red Wine Braised Short Rib
description: Craving something sophisticated and indulgent? Chef Miriam‚Äôs exquisite short rib is braised low and slow until it's meltingly tender and rich in flavor, infused with aromatic herbs and the deep, soul-satisfying essence of red wine. She pairs it with a side of scrumptious, creamy Mac & Cheese, made with a blend of Cheddar, Gouda, and Mozzarella (and a hint of adobo spice to keep things interesting) enveloping perfectly cooked elbow pasta. This hearty, satisfying meal will dress up any weeknight‚Äîit‚Äôs an experience you‚Äôll want to savor again and again.

name: Buddha Bowl
description: A Buddha bowl is a vegetarian meal served on a single bowl which consists of little of veggies of this kind and everything nice. A combination of broccoli, sweet potato, avocado, and carrots to make this meal with whole grains such as quinoa, lentils, and hemp seeds are also added to the bowl.

name: Chicken Fajita Casserole
description: This creamy chicken casserole is a delicious meal full of familiar flavors, just served in a way you've never tried before. Tender pieces of chicken are spiced with all the seasonings and flavors you'd expect in sizzling fajitas, then cooked to perfection and tossed with fresh avocado, peppers and onions. The mixture is combined with a creamy avocado-lime crema sauce, then baked casserole-style with gooey cheddar cheese melted on top. Dig in and enjoy with a side of Chef Andres' Mexican rice, but be warned‚Äîthe whole family may just be fighting for a taste of this delicious dish.

name: Dragon Bowl with Grilled Chicken
description: If Chef Chris was forced to choose a favorite meal, he says this one might just be it. He just loves good, hearty simple meals and it don‚Äôt get much simpler than the combination of hand-diced grilled fresh chicken, roasted fresh vegetables, and fresh brown rice. What separates this bowl from the rest is Chef‚Äôs secret spicy tahini sauce that you‚Äôll want to drizzle on everything. Topped with nutty sesame seeds, there‚Äôs nothing not to like about this bowl‚Äî we could eat this meal almost every day and not get tired of it. Chef highly recommends heating this meal in the microwave.

name: Vanilla Bean Panna Cotta
description: Panna cotta, or 'cooked cream,' is a simple Italian dessert of sweetened cream that‚Äôs set to a delicate wobble. Here, Chef Akhtar gives it a gentle lift, adding labneh for tang and vanilla bean for warmth. Beneath it lies a layer of cinnamon-laced peach preserves, slow-simmered until jammy. After an overnight chill, it sets just enough to hold its shape while staying soft enough to shimmy on the spoon.

name: Chicken Normandy with Roasted Apples
description: Chicken Normandy, also known as 'Poulet √° l√° Normande,' is a super delicious, French Chicken dish. In this case, chicken thighs are braised in apple cider and brandy; then cooked with onions, garlic, and herbs, and finished with cream & dijon mustard. A velvety celery root puree acts as the base & complemented with Roasted Fennel & Apples. Bon Appetit!

name: Panang Chicken Curry
description: Chef Pimnapat's Thai Panang curry strikes the perfect balance of comforting and fresh. Panang curry is a popular variation on Thai red curry, known for being a slightly thicker curry with a sweet and savory, slightly tangy flavor. It gets its signature flavor from familiar ingredients like coconut milk and fish sauce, but with the addition of aromatics like dried red chilies, shallot, garlic, lemongrass, galangal, cumin seed, coriander seed, and kaffir lime leaves. This satisfying curry pairs perfectly with tender chicken breast and sweet bell peppers, plus a side of naan to soak up every last drop of the flavorful sauce.

name: Beef Empanadas with Chimichurri Sauce
description: Enjoy a taste of Chef Santiago's specialty with these absolutely delicious ground beef empanadas paired with a spectacular chimichurri sauce. Bright and spicy, the chimichurri is an acidic and herbaceous complement to the rich empanadas and cheesy jalape√±o-tinged mashed potatoes. A favorite of Chef Santiago's, we just know you'll love this dish as much as we do.

name: Grilled Ny Strip Steak
description: Savor a simple yet exquisite steakhouse-style dinner curated by Chef Tony. A perfectly cooked, garlic-herb infused New York strip steak is the crown jewel of this plate. Accompanied by a medley of roasted veggies including sweet potatoes, bell peppers, red onion, and zucchini, the dish is crowned with a zesty chimichurri sauce, ensuring each bite has a burst of bold, balanced flavors.

name: Classic Pork Red Chile Pozole
description: Rich hominy and pork stew, on a bed of shaved cabbage garnished with radishes, cilantro and a lime cheeks.

name: Thai Yellow Curry Beef
description: Delight all the year-round of Yellow Curry, a culinary masterpiece that transcends seasons. This savory dish features tender beef chuck simmered with wholesome ingredients, potato, carrots and onions, creating a hearty and satisfying meal. The aromatic curry powder adds a touch of passion, infusing the dish with its rich and enticing flavors. Served with fragrant jasmine rice, every spoonful of this thick, salty, and subtly sweet curry will transport your taste buds to a world of culinary bliss.

name: Climate Friendly Farro Greens Salad
description: Chef Dustin Taylor brings you this option of a Climate Friendly meal that combines low carbon impact, whole foods and high sustainability ingredients. Here's a fresh grain and greens salad to keep you satisfied and energized throughout the day. This bowl of goodness starts with a bed of arugula and nutty farro, then Chef Dustin adds in oven-roasted beets and Brussels sprouts. Topped with crumbled feta, walnuts, and fresh herbs like mint, chives, and parsley, this salad is sure to brighten your day!

name: Chicken with Almond Sauce
description: Central Mexican style dish with savoury pan seared chicken breast. Simmered in tomato almond sauce lime juice, chipotle and paprika.

name: Dan Dan Noodles Noodles with Spicy Meat Sauce
description: A staple of Szechuan cuisine, this dish is sweet, spicy, and super savory. Ground beef is saut√©ed until caramelized and incorporated into a spicy and tangy sauce deeply flavored with Szechuan peppercorns, chili paste, soy, and sesame paste. The sauce is mixed into fresh noodles and topped with tender bok choy and pine nuts for an extra hit of nuttiness and texture.

name: California Style Chicken Enchiladas
description: Give weeknight Mexican a serious upgrade with Chef Kevin‚Äôs tantalizing (and generously portioned) Chicken Enchiladas, featuring juicy, tender shredded chicken folded into a creamy blend of sour cream and Monterey Jack, then wrapped in warm corn tortillas, smothered in tangy salsa verde, and topped with crumbled Cotija cheese and fresh cilantro. It‚Äôs a beautiful balance of gentle spice and creaminess in every perfectly seasoned bite. Served alongside traditional Spanish rice cooked to aromatic perfection and hearty black beans, this flavor-packed meal is about to become your new go-to.

name: Puerto Rican Plantain Lasagna Pastelon
description: This flavorful plantain lasagna (Pastel√≥n) is a must-try Puerto Rican dish, and Chef Fabiola's version is no exception. Make with layers of sweet plantain, a tomato-based, seasoned ground beef picadillo, and a blend of white and yellow cheddar cheeses, this dish has everything a comfort food should have. Chef's is served with her signature yellow rice and some sliced avocado for some freshness. If you've never tried Pastel√≥n, we just know you will fall in love after one sweet and savory, cheesy bite.

name: Mushroom Chicken Marsala
description: Chef Miguel's take on Italian-American Chicken Marsala is an instant classic. His version features thin pieces of chicken thighs in a rich pan sauce with mushrooms, shallots, and a splash of the dish's namesake, Marsala wine. The wine gives this dish its characteristic deep and slightly sweet flavor. Chef pairs the saucy chicken with broccoli and a side of herbed penne pasta for even more Italian-inspired deliciousness.

name: Japchae Bap Stir Fried Glass Noodles Beef
description: Chef Esther's take on one of the most popular Korean dishes features perfectly chewy glass noodles made of sweet potatoes and savory bulgogi beef. They're stir-fried together in a sweet-and-savory sauce with assorted vegetables including caramelized onions, peppers, and mushrooms. Chef serves it all up on a bed of steamed white rice for a savory, sweet and nutty flavor bomb, Korean BBQ-style.

name: Cumin Beef Rice Bowl
description: What's better than a bowl full of everything delicious? Cumin spiced ground beef, sweet caramelized onions, and tender carrots are served over fragrant garlic-ginger rice. Topped with a perfectly hard boiled egg and fresh scallions, this bowl is comforting, cozy, and endlessly satisfying.

name: Chicken Parmesan Pasta
description: Satisfy your chicken parm craving with this delicious version made with provolone cheese and served over spaghetti with a vibrant marinara sauce.

name: Saffron Poached Cod
description: The delicate, mild flavor and firm flesh of Cod are a perfect match for the intoxicating infusion of precious Saffron. This healthy meal is packed with strong bold, flavors and the Saffron broth will perfume your kitchen.

name: Baked Greek Meatballs
description: These delicious meatballs are low-carb, Keto, low-glycemic, and gluten free! You know what I love about this meal? It's so tasty and addicting, you won't mind eating them every day.

name: Ny Seared Strip Steak
description: What's better than an all-natural, high quality 12-ounce New York strip steak cooked to perfection? Not much. Chef John seasons the steak simply, letting its rich beefy flavor shine, then sears it on high heat to lock in all its natural juices. A red wine reduction sauce brings a hint of acidic sweetness, perfectly complementing the steak. Enjoy this gorgeous steak for a date night, weeknight, or really any night‚Äîit's guaranteed to make any meal feel like a special occasion.

name: Herb Grilled Chicken Over Basil Pesto Pasta
description: Inspired by colors of the Italian flag‚Äîgreen, white, and red‚ÄîChef Chase packs a lot of flavor into this dish. Slices of juicy and delicious herb-marinated, grilled chicken sits on a bed of buttery shell pasta tossed in bright, verdant green basil pesto. A drizzle of creamy mornay sauce brings the 'white' element of the flag, and roasted cherry tomatoes bring that perfect pop of 'red' color, as well as acidic sweetness.

name: Chilean Empanadas
description: These savory empanadas are filled with a mixture of vegan ground beef, onions and different spices to ensure they're full of flavor. Chef Cami serves the empanadas with pebre sauce, a traditional Chilean condiment made with cilantro, onion, tomato, and chilies. Whether for a light lunch, snack, or paired with a side salad or rice at dinnertime, these empanadas are perfect to enjoy at any moment of the day.

name: Roasted Salmon with Dijon Honey Sauce
description: A vibrant meal with layers of warmth, where salmon is roasted in a garlicky olive oil marinade until tender, allowing its natural richness to shine. Roasted carrots, parsnips, brussels sprouts, cauliflower, and red onion round out the plate, their deep, earthy flavors intensified in the oven. On the side, a Dijon-honey sauce brings just the right touch of tang and sweetness.

name: Rainbow Falafel Bowl
description: Enjoy a flavor-packed, plant-based bowl that really highlights the veggies. It features Chef Lena‚Äôs popular and highly-rated baked falafel, made from sprouted chickpeas for extra nutrition. The savory falafel are served on a bed of yellow spiced rice alongside roasted carrot hummus, zesty Aleppo pepper coleslaw, and a creamy tahini drizzle. This dish is everything you love about a falafel wrap, but in a warm, satiating bowl.

name: Roasted Herbed Salmon Potatoes
description: Simple ingredients impeccably prepared. You‚Äôll savor each bite of Chef Kevin‚Äôs wholesome meal. With its subtle sweetness, fresh dill is the perfect complement to rich, buttery, well-seasoned salmon. He serves each generously sized fillet with two hearty sides: golden-roasted fingerling potatoes, brightened with fresh rosemary; and luxurious creamed spinach, enriched with zesty garlic and umami-rich Parmesan cheese. The meal feels indulgent, but with only 600 calories, it will fill you up without weighing you down.

name: Bacon Corn Chowder
description: This decadent corn chowder is creamy, comforting, and chock full of flavor! Made with an abundance of sweet yellow corn, tender potatoes, and hearty bacon lardons, along with some fresh thyme for aromatics. If you have, top with some fresh chives and cheddar cheese for another level of deliciousness.

name: Nutella Hot Oats
description: A wholesome, feel-good start to the day with just the right touch of indulgence. Nourishing oats are swirled with layers of Nutella for a rich, nutty boost, while a topping of dark chocolate and toasted hazelnuts adds an elevated crunch. Warming, energizing, and guaranteed to keep you going.

name: Caesar Salad
description: This vibrant vegan twist on the classic Caesar salad features crisp romaine lettuce wedges topped with a flavorful plant-based dressing and Chef Cami‚Äôs signature pine nut parmesan. Naan bread croutons add even more delicious crunch!

name: Fettuccine Chipotle Alfredo with Chicken
description: What happens when you bring Latin influences to an Italian classic? Something seriously delicious. This dish centers on Chef Roberto's signature smoky chipotle-infused Alfredo sauce, which pairs perfect with al dente fettuccine and juicy grilled chicken. The smoky, lightly spicy kick of chipotle peppers in the rich, cheesy sauce takes this dish to the next level, and will have you coming back for bite after bite.

name: Grilled Flank Steak
description: It's a classic French bistro staple - great ingredients and simple preparation.

name: Spaghetti Chipotle Meatballs
description: Enjoy a tasty fusion of Italian and Mexican flavors with this pasta dish combining al dente spaghetti paired with jumbo chipotle meatballs, all smothered in a housemade marinara sauce.
