name: Gluten Free Penne Pomodoro Meatballs
description: This comforting pasta pomodoro stays true to tradition while embracing a balanced approach. A slow-simmered sauce of tangy tomatoes, olive oil, and fragrant Italian herbs coats al dente gluten-free penne. Hearty beef and pork meatballs bring rich, satisfying protein, while a side of saut√©ed broccoli that‚Äôs lightly sweetened with honey adds a delicate contrast.

name: Chicken Brown Rice Burrito Bowl
description: What do you get when you take the tortilla out of the burrito equation? A super satisfying, secretly gluten-free bowl with tons of flavor. The base of this bowl is nutty brown rice, which gets topped with diced, fajita-style marinated chicken, black beans, and a spiced blend of poblano peppers and corn. Chef Chase's chipotle sauce is the smoky, creamy element that ties it all together.

name: Fettuccini Crema Di Tartrufo
description: Chef Cami presents a luxurious dish featuring fettuccini noodles cooked to perfection and lovingly enveloped in a velvety plant-based cream sauce infused with the exquisite essence of truffles. Soft mushrooms are delicately placed on top, adding an extra layer of richness and flavor. Indulge in this exquisite creation for a taste of true culinary elegance.

name: Roasted Turkey Sausage Dinner
description: This is a holiday themed meal composed of Chef Nelson's favorite things during the holiday season! Roasted turkey sausage links are paired with Chef's favorite sides: herbed stuffing, saut√©ed spinach with lots of garlic, and cranberry sauce for that magical touch! Chef Nelson's stuffing is a step above the stuff from the bag, and may just ruin your for all other stuffing. Packed full of cubed country-style bread, it's infused with hardy herbs like sage and thyme, along with the typical mirepoix and garlic. Altogether these sides achieve the perfect balance of traditional Thanksgiving flavors, especially when served alongside fresh cranberry sauce that's tart and sweet with hints of cinnamon and orange.

name: Adobo Hanger Steak
description: Einat‚Äôs special adobo spice blend is spicy, sweet, and a little smoky, and makes this super tender hanger steak absolutely irresistible. An herbaceous chermoula sauce made with fresh cilantro and parsley is the perfect accompaniment to cut through rich steak. A spicy harissa-infused potato and butternut squash mash completes this Middle Eastern take on steak and potatoes.

name: Crispy Pan Fried Cajun Salmon
description: Salmon is pan-fried at high heat to ensure a nice, crispy finish on the outside but a moist and tender inside. Chef Andres cooks the salmon with a Cajun seasoning that's full of flavor and packs a spicy punch. The medium level of heat goes perfectly with fresh avocado sauce and a refreshing cucumber salsa to cool everything off.

name: Grilled Chicken Bulgur Bowl
description: For the centerpiece of this healthy, wholesome meal, Chef Ahmet marinates chicken thighs overnight in richly spiced yogurt to make them even more tender and juicy, then grills them for deliciously smoky char. He serves a generous portion atop nutty, fiber-rich bulgur (AKA cracked wheat grains) with tangy blistered cherry tomatoes, cumin- and paprika-spiced chickpeas, and crisp baby kale‚Äîall drizzled with savory tahini and sweet pomegranate syrup. The crowning touch: A dollop of cicik‚Äîthick, creamy yogurt swirled with fresh dill, garlic, cucumber, Feta cheese, and lemon juice. It‚Äôs hard to imagine that a meal with only 530 calories can contain this much flavor!

name: Parmesan Steak Fries
description: These steak fries are served hot and crispy, accompanied by a generous side of truffle aioli for dipping. The creamy, garlicky aioli complements the potatoes perfectly, while parmesan and truffle add a touch of luxury to the dish. It's a decadent indulgence that's sure to satisfy any cravings for crispy fries without needing to visit a fancy bistro.

name: Tagliatelle with Birria Bolognese
description: Treat yourself to something special with Chef Ivy‚Äôs mouthwatering Birria Bolognese! Italy meets Mexico in this aromatic, slow-cooked beef ragu, which combines the flavors of Birria and Bolognese. Served atop tender tagliatelle pasta and finished with a dollop of cracked black pepper ricotta, this dish packs a punch of flavor in every bite. It‚Äôs perfect for a cozy night in or impressing your guests!

name: Matcha Mousse Cake Jar
description: Go green in the most delicious way with Chef Miriam‚Äôs matcha cake jar, which features layers of fluffy, vibrant green cake infused with the rich, earthy flavor of premium matcha. Even more matcha is nestled between the cake layers in the form of a decadent, creamy mousse. Topped with a sprinkle of white chocolate chips, this irresistible dessert offers a delightful blend of textures and flavors.

name: Rice Noodle Salad Bowl
description: Fantastic food, so fragrant and just happens to be healthy! This Vietnamese Rice noodle salad bowl is just perfect on top of it is grilled chicken with lemongrass. An incredible marinated lemongrass chicken drizzled with nuat chuam sauce, with more veggies on the side. What a pleaser!

name: Crispy Tofu Bowl
description: Sliced extra firm tofu finished fried and crisp. Add up crunchy cucumber and cashew for a delicious healthy filled vegan bowl with chili sauce.

name: The Mezza Middle Eastern Dip Platter
description: A platter full of deliciousness! Chef Daniel's take on mezza‚Äìa typical Middle Eastern assortment of dips, spreads, and condiments‚Äîincludes a variety of homemade, delectable dips. Creamy hummus, muhammara (red pepper and walnut dip), spiced black bean dip, and nutty tahini sauce are paired with Jasmine rice and crunchy pita crisps on the side. You'll love every bite and flavor combination in this light and healthy offering.

name: Thai Basil Baked Red Snapper
description: Skin-on red snapper is marinated in Chef Abe‚Äôs Thai basil seasoning paste then baked until flaky and flavorful. The dish comes topped with Thai basil butter and is served with saut√©ed red bell pepper and red onions, basmati rice, and Indonesian sweet soy sauce on the side.

name: Loaded Fiesta Nachos
description: We guarantee you‚Äôve never had nachos as loaded as these. Indulge in a vibrant plate of leveled up nachos, where crispy tortilla chips are layered with a melty medley of cheeses, savory taco-seasoned ground beef, black beans, corn, and fresh toppings like olives and zesty pickled jalape√±os. Baked to perfection and finished with a drizzle of tangy homemade tomatillo salsa verde, this dish is the ultimate cozy dinner or movie night treat.

name: Lamb Chops with Pesto Sauce
description: Flavorful lamb for your low carb keto diet paired with paleo pesto sauce made from fresh basil leaves with pine nuts.

name: Miso Ramen with Chicken Katsu
description: Slices of golden-crumbed chicken katsu steal the show here, sitting alongside bouncy ramen noodles ready to soak up a rich, umami-filled miso broth. Chef Esther adds shiitake mushrooms for earthy depth, crisp bok choy for crunch, and juicy corn kernels for a touch of veggie-powered sweetness.

name: Pan Seared Halibut
description: Sweet delectable roasted halibut, complimented with the sweet & savory addition of capers and golden raisins, a rich cauliflower puree and the lovely texture of roasted cauliflower rounds out this delicious entr√©e.

name: Vegetarian Lasagna with Fresh Pasta
description: This is an Italian classic made right. It has the four basic components of perfect lasagna: creamy fresh mozzarella cheese, a garlicky pesto and ricotta filling, slow oven-roasted tomatoes, and fresh lasagne noodles. No meat, no problem!

name: Southern Chicken Pot Pie
description: Warm, comforting, and packed with flavor, this chicken pot pie is an instant classic! Tender chicken, vibrant veggies, and a creamy white sauce are nestled under a flaky, golden pie crust, creating the perfect meal to satisfy cravings and warm the soul. Each bite is a cozy, savory delight, making it perfect for family dinners or chilly nights in!

name: Bucatini Cacio E Pepe
description: Want to feel like you're eating at a Roman trattoria? Then this is the dish for you. It's Italian simplicity at its best: al dente pasta, Parmesan cheese, and freshly ground black peppercorns. That's all that goes in, and what comes out is creamy, cheesy pasta perfection.

name: Blueberry Balsamic Salmon
description: Your new staple meal every week. Grilled salmon with plump, juicy blueberries mixed in with a delectable balsamic salmon marinade with cauliflower rice on the side.

name: Tampiquena Skirt Steak Goat Cheese Enchilada
description: This is Chef Ivy's spin on carne a la tampique√±a, a popular Mexican dish pairing grilled steak with enchiladas and refried beans. Here, skirt steak is marinated for 24 hours in a chili spice rub, then grilled until tender. It‚Äôs served with a goat cheese-stuffed enchilada, refried pinto beans, and smashed avocado. A modern yet endlessly comforting take on classic Mexican cuisine.

name: Southwest Turkey and Black Bean Chili
description: A hearty Southwestern chili with a little Indian flare. The base of this chili is an incredibly flavorful broth seasoned with tomatoes, garlic, cumin, and smoky chipotle in adobo. Turkey breast is seasoned with blackening spices and roasted until falling-apart tender, then shredded and simmered into the soup base along with tender black beans. A dollop of tangy sour cream on top completes the meal. This is the perfect soup to warm up any day of the week!

name: Dukkah Spiced Roast Chicken
description: ‚ÄúChicken, but make it really interesting.‚Äù Chef Michael brings us a roast with Middle-Eastern flair, marinating chicken breast in yogurt (which makes it extra juicy), before coating it in dukkah‚Äîa blend of toasted nuts, sesame, and warming spices. Cooked until golden, it‚Äôs paired with fluffy couscous studded with sweet currants and pumpkin seeds, and a side of lightly charred broccoli for balance. Bold, aromatic, and full of texture.

name: Pulled Bbq Chicken
description: I love this pulled chicken in sweet BBQ sauce with collard greens for a side.

name: K Bbq Skirt Steak
description: A mouth-watering skirt steak dish awaits with the perfect blend of flavors. Savor the tenderness of the steak paired with the delightful taste of kimchi rice. The dish is elevated with a smoky roasted garlic mayo adding a creamy twist to the mix.

name: French Onion Chicken Breast
description: Take everything you love about French onion soup‚Äîthe rich depth of slow-cooked flavor, the caramelized sweetness, and‚Äîof course‚Äîthe ooey-gooey cheese. But instead of soup, make it a topping for tender, juicy saut√©ed chicken breast. That‚Äôs exactly what this irresistible dish delivers. Plus, there‚Äôs a bed of fluffy Jasmine rice and a side of crisp-tender saut√©ed green beans and naturally sweet cherry tomatoes. Bold and comforting, this is a meal you‚Äôll want savor again and again.

name: Traditional Steak Tampiquena Plate
description: Chefs Santiago and Ruben bring the best of both of their worlds to this plate full of Mexican goodness. Traditional Tampique√±a-style steak gets well-seasoned, grilled to a perfect medium, and sliced thin. Served alongside savory Mexican yellow rice, alongside a decadent, satisfying cheese enchilada. The plate is completed with a side of rajas‚Äîcreamy, cheesy saut√©ed corn and poblano peppers‚Äîand fresh, tangy guacamole, this is without a doubt one of Santiago and Ruben's favorite dishes they've made for CookUnity (and ours too!).

name: Cinnamon Tres Leches Cake Jar
description: Coconut Cinnamon Tres Leches Cake Jar - a heavenly delight that whisks you away. It's a delectable experience with layers of moist sponge cake infused with irresistible coconut and a delicate hint of cinnamon. Each jar soaks in a trio of creamy milk for an extra luscious texture. Perfect for satisfying sweet cravings and complementing holiday desserts or enjoying as a sweet snack in chilly weather.

name: Sweet Italian Sausage Patty
description: Chefs Larry and Marc bring us sweet Italian sausages in the form of a juicy patty, brushed with mustard, seared until golden, and crowned with onions. It‚Äôs served on a bed of red wine and apple cider-braised cabbage, next to creamy potato pur√©e. A Dijon sauce finishes this dish with a sharp hit.

name: Spaghetti A La Mexicana
description: Chef Santos serves a fun twist on classic spaghetti and tomato sauce. This spaghetti is served with a Mexican-style meat sauce. The tomato-based sauce features a hearty combination of beef, chorizo, and mushrooms, with just a kick of heat from jalape√±o. A sprinkle of Cotija cheese on top seals the deal.

name: Hoisin Glazed Mushrooms
description: Try a plant-based version of Chef Phet‚Äôs flavor-packed hoisin-glazed series, made with chunky button mushrooms. Served with crispy roasted Brussels sprouts and over a bed of ginger-scallion jasmine rice, the dish also comes with a side of sweet chili tamari sauce for some extra umami.

name: Comforting Peruvian Causa Pie
description: If you love lasagna, moussaka, or cottage pie, discover another delicious layered meat-and-veg dish to add to your regular rotation. Chef Walther starts with a rich base of fluffy mashed potatoes, then gently folds in aji Amarillo chile paste, giving the dish its signature sunny color and heat. Next comes a luscious layer of guacamole for richness, then all-breast-meat Chicken Salad swirled with creamy mayonnaise and studded with crisp celery. The crowning touch: briny Kalamata olives, hard-cooked egg, and a garnish of sweet roasted red pepper. Bring it all together with the accompanying Huancaina Sauce‚Äîa traditional Peruvian blend of queso fresco, onions, and aji Amarillo‚Äîand enjoy classic Peruvian comfort food at its finest.

name: Duck Leg Confit Orange Coconut Sauce
description: When the East meets the West, you get the best of both worlds. Confited duck leg is rubbed with a warm Baharat spice mix, then grilled to yield irresistibly crispy skin and tender, juicy meat. With a creamy pan sauce of coconut, orange, and date molasses, the sweet, fruity sauce perfectly complements the duck. Served with oven-roasted caramelized sweet potatoes, broccoli for brightness, and fried shallots to add crispy texture, this is a tour around the world on a plate.

name: Roasted Eggplant Parmesan
description: Chef Chris wanted to come up with a healthier alternative to the deep-fried eggplant you typically see on Italian menus, but without sacrificing any of the flavor. He decided on simply roasted thin slices of seasoned eggplant, layered Napoleon-style with hand-sliced fresh mozzarella, and served with fresh roasted tomato sauce. Garlicky broccolini and roasted peppers round out this filling and delicious meal, which also turned out to be low-carb and gluten-free in the process!

name: Ribeye Bulgogi Kimchi Bowl
description: Craving a meal that‚Äôs hearty and packed with flavor? Here it is! The tender ribeye bulgogi is marinated in a blend of garlic, ginger, and umami-rich teriyaki then wok-fired, piled high, and served with teriyaki sweet potatoes. On the side, two Korean classics: Spicy, funky kimchi and nutty sesame spinach. Enjoy each component individually or stir it all together for a delicious explosion of flavor and texture.

name: Miso Cod
description: Cod in a sweet and savory marinade, served with heart healthy brown rice, delicious mushrooms and wilted spinach, and an incredibly craveable carrot ginger sauce. Everything pairs so well together.

name: Tomato Ginger Braised Chicken
description: Chef Dan Kluger pairs tomato, ginger and miso to perfectly braise succulent chunks of chicken breast for a harmony of flavors that is truly unique. The dish is rounded out with brown rice, almonds and roasted broccoli that compliment this flavorsome meal.

name: Fried Chicken Sandwich Tater Tots
description: Every element here stands on its own, but it‚Äôs the way they come together that makes this sandwich a knockout. Chicken thighs are coated in a spiced buttermilk marinade, then fried to a golden crisp. They‚Äôre stacked on a soft potato bun with briny pickled cucumbers, tangy cabbage slaw, and a generous swipe of fiery habanero aioli.

name: Mexican Steak
description: Featuring hormone free skirt steak with steamed basmati rice. This meal is accented with a satisfying mix of avocado, jalapeno, tomato and herbs and spices.

name: Thanksgiving Glazed Ham
description: Enjoy a traditional-style ham that's been smoked, roasted, and glazed to perfection in a brown sugar glaze with a hint of pineapple juice for tang. A creamy sage-mustard sauce compliments the ham, which can be paired with your favorite side dishes for a perfect holiday meal, mastered in minutes!

name: Cajun Blackened Swai
description: You can‚Äôt do comfort food without talking about the Southern Creole influence, and nothing says Creole quite like blackened swai. What we love about this meal is the classic combo of heavily seasoned seafood and potatoes. Here, Chef Chris takes blackening spice and some fresh fillet of swai, sears it on the plancha with some butter, then plates it atop his homestyle caper-dill potato salad. Chef highly recommends heating this meal in the microwave.

name: Jackfruit Kebabs In Makhani Sauce
description: In this innovative rendition of kebabs, Chef Raj makes a completely vegetarian version here made from meaty jackfruit. The seasoned patties pair perfectly with rich Makhani sauce (which you may recognize from Butter Chicken), which is made with ripe tomatoes, fresh cream, cashew nuts, and aromatic spices. As a bonus, buttery naan bread is served alongside for dipping into all that saucy goodness.

name: Vegan Mediterranean Quinoa Salad
description: Full of flavor and incredibly satisfying salad with quinoa tossed with cabbage and other vegetables. Finish the salad with drizzle of tangy dressing that is completely addictive perfect for any vegan diet.

name: Lafrieda Meatballs Penne
description: Our LaFrieda meatballs are slow braised in tomato sauce and served over penne pasta. This Italian-American classic hits the spot any night of the week!

name: Mango Habanero Jerk Chicken Wings
description: Presenting Chef Nahika Hillery's twist on everyone's favorite chicken wings: Caribbean jerk-style spiced up with a kick! These tender wings are coated in a sweet and spicy mango-habanero sauce and served with a light side of purple cabbage salad and sweet plantains. Take your tastebuds on a tropical vacation.

name: Turkey Taco Rice Bowl
description: Indulge in a guilt-free feast with this low-carb, gluten-free turkey taco skillet! Made with ground turkey, flavorful spices, and served over a bed of fragrant basmati rice, this dish is the perfect balance of comfort and health. Enjoy the delicious flavors of Mexican cuisine without compromising on your dietary restrictions.

name: Vegan Bucatini Alla Carbonara
description: Everything you love about the classic Italian dish, made with all vegan ingredients. Chef Anne crafts the creamy sauce that coats each strand of hearty bucatini with a blend of cashews, garlic, vegan Parmesan cheese, and nutritional yeast for savory depth of flavor. Next comes smoky, savory cremini mushrooms saut√©ed with umami-rich soy sauce, plus peas for a pop of color. And finally, there‚Äôs a crowning touch of more grated vegan Parmesan and fresh parsley to garnish. This meal is hearty, satisfying, and a testament to culinary creativity.

name: Full Harvest Buddha Bowl
description: Here is a warming type of meal inspired by dosha kind of eating where you only eat what's best for your body. Toss of red quinoa, sweet potato, beets. This Buddha bowl is a feast! Adding more avocado kale, radish chickpeas just to name a few.

name: Beef Birria Cheese Arepa
description: Arepas are an extremely popular type of filled, griddled corn cake in South America. Here Chef Daniel pairs a succulent cheese-filled arepa with tender slow-braised beef in a Mexican Birria-style chile sauce. The arepas and beef can be topped with pickled red onions, pico de gallo, and fresh cilantro, and come with a side of fragrant Jasmine rice to complete the meal.

name: Kung Pao Tofu
description: Chef Chase's Kung Pao Tofu features all the same spicy, savory flavors you love in a plant-forward package. Pan-fried tofu and stir-fried veggies are tossed with crunchy peanuts in Chef's boldly flavored Kung Pao sauce, then served alongside fluffy basmati rice with fresh green onions. It's a tasty, plant-based alternative that will satisfy any night of the week.

name: Ghanaian Chicken Peanut Soup
description: In this soulful West African soup, known as groundnut soup, Chef Miriam combines ground peanuts and tomatoes with a warming blend of ginger, garlic, and spices. Savory and subtly sweet, this nutty broth is bolstered by tender-baked chicken thighs and roasted sweet potatoes for a hearty touch. Rosemary crackers are served alongside, adding crunch to this culinary experience.

name: Jerked Chicken Thighs
description: CookUnity is located in the heart of Brooklyn. One day while I was walking towards the kitchen, I noticed a lot of stores selling this Jerked Chicken and then I thought, why not make a 'Brooklyn Street food' inspired dish that I could share with people! You will love it!

name: Chicken Salad Snack Box
description: Here‚Äôs a go-to snack that truly satisfies! Chef LaFrieda makes his chicken salad with succulent, flavorful thigh meat, swaddled in creamy mayonnaise and tossed with toasty almonds and crisp chopped celery and tangy Granny Smith apples. It‚Äôs paired with fresh sweet grapes, crunchy baby carrots, and pita bread. With 19 grams of protein and 5 grams fiber, this hearty snack will keep you feeling full and energized for whatever the rest of the day may bring.

name: Climate Friendly Harvest Lentil Salad
description: Chef Anne Thornton brings you this option of a Climate Friendly meal that combines low carbon impact, whole foods and high sustainability ingredients. A hearty seasonal salad showcasing some of California's most delicious and nutrient dense produce. Savory and sweet, this salad is packed with protein from lentils and quinoa to keep you satisfied for hours.

name: Caramelized Miso Eggplant
description: Deliciously roasted eggplant, halved to perfection, and dressed in a delectable miso sauce that strikes a harmonious balance between sweet and savory notes. Finished with a sprinkle of toasted sesame seeds and fresh scallions, this side dish boasts rich, caramel-like flavors. An inviting addition to any meal, it offers perfect nutty, savory, and caramel flavors.

name: Branzino Primavera
description: Meet Chef Jonny's Branzino Primavera, an elegant dish that brings the flavors of springtime to your table. Light, flaky branzino (a Mediterranean sea bass) is lightly seasoned, and topped with a medley of saut√©ed spring vegetables including zucchini, asparagus, leeks, and rainbow carrots. Accompanied by lemony roasted fingerling potatoes, this dish brings back cherished family memories for Chef of Mediterranean feasts, where the aroma of fresh fish and roasted potatoes filled the air, creating moments of togetherness and joy.

name: Shrimp Scampi Spaghetti
description: Six beautifully seared shrimp are finished with a touch of white wine, shrimp broth and a bright green butter filled with parsley, garlic and lemon zest. The spaghetti is tossed with the shrimp and butter for a perfect and satisfying dish.

name: Roast Duck In Thai Red Curry
description: This dish is inspired by 'Kheng Phed Ped Yang' or roast duck in Thai red curry with lychee. Chef Hong and her team slow roast duck leg to fall-off-the-bone tender perfection to pair with Japanese eggplant, sweet lychees, and Thai basil all in a creamy red curry sauce. The curry is served on a bed of jasmine rice and quinoa rice. The nutty quinoa complements the sweet, juicy lychees, rich duck, and aromatic, basil-infused red curry to create an explosion of flavors.

name: Chicken Thighs In Lemon Cream Sauce
description: Savor the flavors of chicken thighs simmered in a luscious lemon cream sauce that will make any weekday or night feel that much more special. Paired perfectly with rich and buttery orzo pasta with parmesan and peas, this dish offers a delightful balance of bright flavors and richness. Altogether it's a satisfying meal that‚Äôs ideal for any occasion.

name: Thai Butternut Red Curry
description: In this delightful creation, Chef adds a Thai twist to the beloved butternut squash. With a blend of red curry, coconut milk, ginger, and shallots, this Thai Butternut Red Curry is a creamy dream. Served alongside fragrant basmati rice and fresh spinach, it's a veggie-packed masterpiece that promises to tantalize the taste buds.

name: Carne Asada Burrito Bowl
description: Your favorite burrito in bowl form! Chef Nelson seasons skirt steak with a rich blend of spices, then sears it to a perfect medium-rare on the plancha. Enjoy it with fragrant cilantro-lime rice, buttery-garlic corn, and charred Jalape√±o Sour Cream.

name: Grilled Mahi Mahi with Oyster Mushrooms Steamed Rice
description: Chef Nelson expertly seasons this tender and flaky fish with a blend of chili, ginger, paprika, and sesame oil then grills it. Served with saut√©ed oyster mushrooms, steamed rice, a creamy & spicy bang bang sauce & a lemon wedge for that perfect citrus note to finish. This will surely add to your favorite fish dishes!

name: Braised Cajun Chicken
description: Forget bland chicken dinners ‚Äì embark on a flavor journey to the Bayou with this dish! Succulent chicken thighs are perfectly browned and braised in a soulful Cajun gravy with the holy trinity. Each bite promises an explosion of savory goodness, where spice dances with richness and tenderness reigns supreme.

name: Kimchi Chimichurri Skirt Steak
description: Indulge in a vibrant fusion of flavors with Chef Esther‚Äôs tantalizing Chimichurri Kimchi Skirt Steak and fragrant tomato risotto. She pairs a hearty portion of perfectly grilled skirt steak with a flavor-packed sauce that combines the spicy kick of Korean kimchi and zesty, herbal Argentinian chimichurri. It‚Äôs accompanied by aromatic tomato-infused risotto, rich tangy and umami flavors. This meal is a true culinary adventure‚ÄîAsia, South America, and Europe, all in one unforgettable meal.

name: Wasabi Butter Basted Steak
description: Your favorite steak twisted with a fusion of Japanese American version. With its classic combination of sweet potatoes, bok choy and scallions on the side. Wasabi paste (usually served with sushi) lends pungent heat to softened butter that melts over seared steaks. Miso paste gives saut√©ed bok choy an added savoriness. Instead of regular spuds, we‚Äôre serving this over garlic mashed sweet potatoes.

name: Roasted Tomatillo Chicken Bowl
description: Whether you‚Äôre planning for lunch or dinner, Chef Maribel has your macros in check with lean chicken breast roasted with her signature sauce‚Äîa vibrant, handcrafted blend of tangy roasted tomatillos, garlic, onion, and serrano chiles. She pairs a hearty portion of the chicken with fresh baby spinach leaves, nutty brown rice, and hearty black beans. A side of zesty Escabeche‚Äîquick-pickled jalape√±os, carrots, onions, and garlic with oregano‚Äîbrightens all the flavors and adds mild spice.

name: Asian Style Bbq Pork Loin
description: In this Asian-inspired meal, Chef Nelson slathers juicy grilled boneless pork loin in a Japanese-inspired BBQ sauce with the perfect balance of sweet, spicy, and smoky flavors. Sliced and served over a bed of steamed Calrose rice, along with various pickled veggies to cut through all that richness: pickled shallots, cauliflower, and cucumbers.

name: Apple Cinnamon Brown Sugar Oatmeal
description: A bowl full of fall-inspired flavors will surely start your morning off right, no matter the season. Slow-cooked brown sugar-infused oats are taken over the top thanks to Chef Jose's signature saucy apples, which are braised with Mexican cinnamon (canela) until irresistibly tender.

name: Tilapia and Puttanesca
description: Taste the flavors of Naples, Italy with this lovely and light pan seared tilapia. Served with delicious sauteed rainbow chard, roasted garlic and a side of farro. Finished with a bright and tangy well-balanced puttanesca sauce.

name: Pan Seared Barramundi with Sweet Corn Puree
description: An ideal dish for the warmer months! A sweet summer corn pur√©e compliments the tender Barramundi fillet, which is pan-seared to flaky perfection. A fresh fennel and roasted red pepper salad provides the perfect acidic, punchy balance this dish needs.

name: Jamdown Jerk Chicken Roasted Plantains
description: This dish starts with Chef Aarthi‚Äôs addictive Jerk spice marinade. Then, the marinated chicken thighs are grilled over an open fire then served with a side roasted plantains and kidney bean rice. Think: salty, sweet, and totally transportive‚Äîlike a tasty trip to the Caribbean in every bite.

name: Short Rib with Herb Mashed Potato
description: This juicy melt-in-your-mouth short rib is made with a red wine base and served with light and fluffy herbed mashed potatoes.

name: Spiced Lamb Meatballs
description: Chef Chase serves up a generous portion of succulent, perfectly seasoned roasted lamb meatballs and plates them atop a bed of tender stewed chickpeas, slowly simmered in a rich tomato sauce infused with warm Moroccan spices like garlic, ginger, coriander, cinnamon, and cayenne pepper. Scoop up all that deliciousness with the side of pita triangles. A dollop of cooling yogurt sauce adds creamy contrast to the fiery spices, and a garnish of minced mint and cilantro provides an extra pop of freshness. The only thing this flavor-packed meal will leave you wanting is more.

name: Pork Pad Krapow Minced Pork with Thai Basil
description: Pad Kaprow is one of the most popular Thai street foods, with its crowd-pleasing balance of sweet, savory, and herbaceous flavor, with just a kick of heat. Stir-fried minced pork is infused with fresh ginger, caramelized sugar, fish sauce and oyster sauce until caramelized and crisped, creating that classic street fare flavor. Served with a side of kimchi on top of jasmine rice, Chef Phet serves his Kaprow a side of extra spicy chili sauce that can be added to your liking, depending on how spicy you want your Pad Krapow. We love that you can customize this dish to your preferred level of spice depending on how much of the chili sauce you use‚Äîjust be warned, it is quite hot, so start with a little!

name: Roasted Beef Tenderloin
description: Indulge yourself with Chef Kevin‚Äôs Roasted Beef Tenderloin, a culinary masterpiece that showcases the exceptional tenderness and robust flavor of premium beef. He carefully designed the dish so that the tenderloin will still be perfectly medium-rare once you reheat it at home. It‚Äôs paired with luscious Whipped Blue Cheese Potatoes that balance creamy and tangy notes, and a luscious pepper cream sauce that enhances the beef‚Äôs savory flavor profile with a hint of warmth. Simple roasted cremini mushrooms and pearl onions bring earthiness and sweetness to the side. Add a fresh green salad if you like, or just dig in and enjoy this incredible blend of decadence and refinement.

name: Peanut Butter Granola Bar
description: These chewy peanut butter bars make breakfast on the go a breeze! A step above your standard granola bar, these are made with Medjool dates, oats, coconut flakes, chia and flax seeds, and nuts, plus maple syrup, cinnamon, and creamy peanut butter to make them taste amazing. These bars pack some serious protein and nutrition to keep you fueled throughout the mornings, afternoons, or any time in between. A favorite of Chef Emily's among adults and kids alike, this side comes with two breakfast bars meaning you can share (but you might not want to!).

name: Chicken Parmesan with Marinara
description: What's not to love about this Italian-American classic?! Chef John takes crispy breaded chicken breast and tops them with his homemade marinara sauce, rich with the flavors of basil and garlic. Topped with two kinds of cheese‚Äîgrana padano and creamy mozzarella‚Äîthen broiled to perfection, these chicken parm cutlets build the foundation for an ultra-comforting meal in minutes.

name: Roasted Salmon Brown Rice
description: That rich, creamy, flavor-packed sauce is the star here. Chef Angelia takes sweet, tangy sun-dried tomatoes, then blends them with cream, white wine, and shallots. Perfectly seasoned roasted salmon and simple, hearty steamed brown rice give you a healthy‚Äîand tasty‚Äîdose of fiber and heart-healthy omega-3 fatty acids. This is the kind of gluten-free meal you can feel good about eating anytime‚Äîsimple, wholesome, nutritious dressed up with just the right amount of luxury.

name: Gnocchi Ai Quattro Formaggi
description: Chef Jonny's Gnocchi ai Quattro Formaggi (with four cheeses) is a rich, full-bodied dish, perfect for a family meal or impressing unexpected guests. His comforting rendition combines gnocchi with Emmental, Fontina, Gorgonzola, and grated Parmesan for a perfectly balanced, creamy delight.

name: Fish Casserole
description: If you are looking for a hearty and satisfying meal, this fish casserole will completely satisfy you. If you love fish, mushrooms and creamy, rich sauces, be prepared to fall head over heels in love with this amazing keto casserole.

name: Harvest Farro Delight
description: Celebrate a symphony of autumnal flavors no matter what season it is with Hungry House's Harvest Farro Delight. Tender roasted sweet red peppers mingle with nutty farro, which is complemented by the caramelized sweetness of roasted butternut squash and carrots. Saut√©ed onions and garlic add depth, while a sprinkle of grated Parmesan and freshly chopped herbs offer a finishing touch of savory delight.

name: Grilled Marinated Flank Steak
description: Steak lovers rejoice! Not many cuts of beef take on a marinade better than flank steak, and in this dish that‚Äôs Chef Chris‚Äô top secret marinade. After an overnight marinade, the steak is grilled and hand-sliced by a real carving chef, then plated on a bed of caramelized onions with an herb-baked potato. Of course we have to add a chive sour cream for that potato for the perfect steakhouse feel. Chef highly recommends heating this meal in the microwave.

name: Chicken Pad See Ew with Spaghetti
description: Pad See Ew is beloved Thai noodle dish, and after one taste, you'll see why. Here, Chef Hong swaps the traditional rice noodles for spaghetti to maintain a nice chew, even after reheating. The rest of the stir fry is true to the original‚Äîseasoned with Chef's special sauce, eggs, and broccoli, and paired with marinated chicken. It's perfect for lunch or dinner.

name: Spicy Green Curry with Chicken
description: Thai green curry is ready to satisfy any and all cravings for spicy food! You'll savor every spoonful of coconut milk-based green curry infused with lots of aromatic herbs and even more fresh Thai basil. This nourishing curry is the perfect blank canvas for any protein, but this version features tender chicken, eggplant, onions, bell pepper, and bamboo shoots. This dish is sure to spice up your routine!

name: Baked Rigatoni Mezzi with Pomodoro and Whipped Ricotta
description: If a classic Italian meal is what you're seeking, look no further! Al dente rigatoni mezzi are mixed with classic Pomodoro tomato sauce whipped ricotta then baked for crunchy edges and a creamy center. Topped with basil pesto and toasted Panko bread crumbs mixed with Italian herbs, you can share this dish with even the pickiest eaters in your family, but warning, you just may not want to!

name: Salmon and Spinach Lasagna
description: Chef Cedric's lightened up take on a classic Italian lasagna packs layers upon layers of flavor. Fresh pasta sheets are layered with ricotta, mozzarella, spinach, and pieces of fresh seared salmon that add richness without overpowering. To complement the salmon, Chef adds two kinds of sauce; a garlicky basil pesto and a flavorful sweet cherry tomato sauce with hints of fennel seed and a touch of spice from chili flakes.

name: Creole Chicken Andouille Sausage Jambalaya
description: Take your tastebuds on a trip to the Big Easy with Chef Chase's Jambalaya. This bold dish combines tender jasmine rice, succulent sliced chicken thighs, and spicy, smoky Andouille sausage. The 'Holy Trinity' of onions, celery, and green pepper adds depth of flavor to the base of the dish alongside roasted tomatoes. Get ready to savor the vibrant and harmonious flavors of this authentic Creole comfort food.

name: Soy Marinated Pulled Pork
description: To give this hearty dish its savory quality, Chef Esther marinated tender flavorful pork shoulder in an umami-rich blend of light soy sauce, garlic, sugar, and plum. She braised the juicy pork with the decadent sauce and placed the combo atop a bed of tri-color quinoa and fluffy white rice. On the side: fresh spinach lightly whited in fragrant, nutty toasted sesame oil and crispy, refreshing bean sprouts for crunch without the calories. Wholesome and super satisfying, this meal will find a spot in your regular rotation.

name: Beef Bourguignon with Potatoes
description: This is not Grandmas beef stew, this is the fancy French version 2.0- and you are going to love it.

name: Classic Chicken Chow Mein
description: This dish has that comforting Chinese takeout flavor you know and love, but taken up a notch. Chow mein noodles are stir-fried with tender chicken, and crisp vegetables including green beans, carrots, button mushrooms, and onions. It's all tossed in a savory soy, garlic, and ginger sauce with a touch of sesame oil to add nutty umami flavor.

name: Chicken Saag
description: Chef Meena's chicken saag is made with boneless chicken thighs that have marinated and simmered in a luscious sauce made from pur√©ed spinach, tomatoes, onions, and an array of spices and finished with a dash of cream. The comforting chicken curry is served with tangy lemon rice topped with roasted chilies and peanuts, making for the perfect Indian-inspired feast.

name: Seared Flank Steak with Ratatouille
description: All the same flavors of the traditional French dish, ratatouille, but served in a new way for a simple yet elegant eating experience. Seared Dijon and herb-crusted flank steak complements the rustic flavors of the seasoned roasted vegetables. Smother the entire dish in Chef David's velvety tomato, cream, and demi-glace sauce for an unrivaled, unbelievably delicious experience.

name: Roasted Salmon with Creamy Leek Sauce
description: You'll savor every last bite of these crispy roasted skin-on salmon fillets. It's flaky and delicious, especially when accompanied by buttery leeks in a rich cream sauce. Altogether they make for an easy, elegant start to any well-balanced meal.

name: Slow Roast Coconut Milk Flank Steak
description: I make these slow-roasted flank steak with coconut milk ‚Äî one of my favorite pantry staples. Coconut milk not only adds richness and luxury to everything it touches, but it's also wildly versatile. Enjoy this meal with a squeeze of fresh lime, cilantro, and lemongrass for added flavor and aroma.

name: Farro Bowl
description: This satisfying and healthy dish is part salad, part bowl. Chef Isaac combines grilled chicken with farro, mushrooms, and baby spinach. Tossed with balsamic dressing, and topped with feta cheese, thyme and rosemary. You‚Äôll feel great about eating this clean and protein-filled dish!

name: Italian Sausage Beef Lasagna
description: Ready for a hearty, indulgent meal that satisfies on every level? Chef Dustin‚Äôs lasagna is here for you. He begins with a rich ragu that blends ground beef and flavorful Italian sausage with aromatic vegetables, bright, acidic tomatoes, basil, and oregano. While that simmers and concentrates its flavors, he prepares a creamy bechamel sauce, accented with the gentle, nutty warmth of nutmeg. Then the two come together between layers of al dente pasta, melty Mozzarella, and umami-rich Parmesan cheese. For freshness, he adds a garnish of sweet, anise-flavored basil leaves. Add a crisp green salad and transform your place into Italy on any night of the week.

name: Ginger Soy Chicken
description: Chicken is rubbed with tamari soy sauce and sesame oil, roasted and shredded for an extra tender result. Served with mizuna lettuce, tossed in crunchy cabbage, carrots, edamame, and scallions. Drizzled in soy and rice wine vinaigrette.

name: Smoky Shrimp Superfood Bowl
description: Chef Silvio's Shrimp Bowl is packed with protein & an abundant array of nutritious ingredients. A quinoa salad laced with roasted corn and kale- an amazing source of Vitamin C, K, A to name a few. Roasted Sweet Potatoes are high in antioxidants, fiber as well as many other health benefits. Cucumbers provide hydration and support digestion. Briny feta, a vibrant citrus dressing, and toasted sunflower seeds finish this dish.

name: Twice Baked Potatoes with Bacon
description: A comforting culinary delight, these gourmet twice-baked potatoes are the ideal side. From our beloved Bubb's BBQ lineup, these potatoes mix rich herb-infused butter and tangy sour cream into fluffy potato with crispy bacon, then tuck it all into a perfectly baked potato shell. Pair them with your favorite BBQ meal, simply grilled chicken or steak, or a side salad for a light lunch.

name: Mexican Tortilla Casserole
description: This dish is like an enchilada stacked instead of rolled and topped with sauce. Roasted vegetables covered with guajillo-tomato sauce layered Monterrey Jack cheese melds all the flavors together with corn tortillas absorbing all the flavor.

name: Thai Green Curry with Tofu
description: Chef Pimnapat's flavor-packed Thai green curry is ready to satisfy any and all cravings for spicy food! You'll savor every spoonful of coconut milk-based green curry infused with lots of aromatic herbs and even more fresh Thai Basil. This nourishing curry is the perfect blank canvas for any protein, but this vegetarian version features crispy fried tofu, eggplant, green beans, bell pepper, and bamboo shoots. This dish is sure to spice up your routine!

name: Beef Stuffed Poblano Pepper Chile En Nogada
description: Mexican Independence Day is September 16th and is traditionally celebrated with this special dish. Poblano pepper is stuffed with a unique filling similar to picadillo that's made with ground beef and pork, plantains, raisins, apple, sliced almonds, and spices. The pepper is then topped with a walnut cream sauce and sprinkled with pomegranate seeds for a pop of color and flavor. This dish has all the colors of the Mexican flag and is emblematic of the country's pride!

name: Roasted Salmon In Lobster Sauce
description: It‚Äôs time to indulge. Chef Andres presents an expertly roasted salmon fillet complemented by a creamy lobster white wine sauce. Savor it with parmesan truffle mashed potatoes and a sprinkle of sliced mixed cherry tomatoes.

name: Nikkei Style Steak Fajita Tacos
description: Tangy, tender sirloin steak is the centerpiece of this dish‚Äîa fusion of Japanese-American flavors that riffs on classic fajitas. The savory marinated and seared steak is mixed with fajita-style peppers and onions and served over a bed of Japanese rice. The tacos are paired with a creamy cilantro sauce to add another layer of bright flavor and tie the whole dish together. Build your tacos and dig in!

name: Soba Noodle Bowl
description: Shiitake mushroom, asparagus, arugula are tossed in a tangy chili sauce for a light and satisfying meal that‚Äôs packed full of Thai-inspired flavor with brown rice vinegar, white miso, tamari and sriracha for a little kick of spice.

name: Hidden Veggies Beef Bolognese
description: Your kids will love this rigatoni bolognese because it's delicious and comforting. You'll love this meal because it secretly packs in loads of veggies and protein. Chef DeLucie's beef bolognese contains "invisible vegetables" like carrots, onions, and celery, and pairs perfectly with al dente rigatoni and a sprinkle of cheese.

name: Truffle Wild Mushroom Naan Pizza
description: Packed with rich and deeply savory flavors, this pizza is ideal for those seeking a refined and indulgent dish. Soft and pillowy naan bread is the perfect base for a medley of mouthwatering toppings, especially when grilled to create a nice crust. With cremini mushrooms that create a rich and savory base, a drizzle of exquisite white truffle oil elevates the mushrooms even more, infusing each bite with its distinct earthy aroma. The finishing touch is a generous dollop of creamy fresh ricotta, adding a velvety texture and subtle sweetness for balance. Each slice is a celebration of umami, making this pizza a true standout.

name: Tellicherry Peppercorn Filet Mignon
description: Savor Chef Aarthi's inventive take on a traditional French steak au poivre. Enjoy a double portion of the most delicious filet mignon that's been rubbed with a special spice blend then chargrilled to perfection. An Indian-inflected pan sauce made with Kerala Tellicherry peppercorns‚Äîwhich are more fragrant and sweet than the typical‚Äîgives the dish a citrusy punch that makes it irresistible.

name: Cajun Honey Butter Chicken Wings
description: Chef Meena‚Äôs chicken wings are layered in a rich honey butter glaze, punched up with fiery Cajun spices. The heat of the wings is balanced by a side of creamy, house-made ranch dressing, with crunchy celery and carrots serving as ideal dipping companions to scoop up every bit of sauce.

name: Grilled Picanha Steak
description: Ready for a culinary ride across South America? With this vibrant dish, Chef Cedric takes a traditional Brazilian cut of meat and serves it grilled alongside crispy potato wedges and the best sauces of your life. Think: French red onion jam and a zesty Argentinian chimichurri.

name: Crispy Chicken Cutlet
description: The ultimate comfort food, with a balance of sweetness, spice and crunch.

name: Grilled Ribeye Steak
description: It doesn't get better than Chef Dustin's perfectly grilled ribeye steak, especially once it's topped with homemade garlic butter. The exquisite steak could stand out all on its own, but a side of tender roasted asparagus and garlicky saut√©ed mushrooms certainly don't hurt.

name: Quinoa and Caramelized Onion Mujaddara
description: This is a modern, delectable twist on a traditional Middle Eastern dish, Mujaddara. Chef Lena replaces the traditional white rice with high-protein quinoa and tops it with the traditional caramelized onions. The flavorful grain mix is served with oven roasted-carrots tossed in lemon zest and sweet-tart pomegranate molasses, plus a side of Dukkah, a traditional Egyptian topping made with pistachios, perfectly toasted spices, and sesame seeds. The whole dish is finished with a cool and tangy vegan lemon-cilantro yogurt sauce to tie it all together.

name: Crab Fried Rice
description: Crab fried rice is an enduring Thai classic. Here, jasmine rice is stir-fried in an aromatic mix of ginger, garlic, and onion, with luxe flecks of crab adding tender texture. A rich mix of fish sauce, soy sauce, and sesame oil gives this dish its signature flavor, with a flourish of fresh scallions and cilantro to top it all off.

name: Honey Cilantro Lime Roasted Salmon
description: Honey, cilantro, and lime come together to make a deliciously zesty marinade for salmon, which gets roasted until perfectly tender. Served alongside Chef Angelia's signature quinoa tabbouleh salad, this dish proves that eating good and feeling good can go hand-in-hand.

name: Thai Green Curry with Beef
description: Chef Pimnapat's flavor-packed Thai green curry is ready to satisfy any and all cravings for spicy food! You'll savor every spoonful of coconut milk-based green curry infused with lots of aromatic herbs and even more fresh Thai Basil. This nourishing curry is the perfect blank canvas for any protein, but this version features tender sliced beef, eggplant, green beans, bell pepper, and bamboo shoots. This dish is sure to spice up your routine!

name: Spinach Fettuccine Alfredo
description: Chef Meena's take on classic Fettuccine Alfredo amps up the flavor in a major way. In it, al dente fettuccine noodles are coated in a rich creamy Alfredo sauce infused with baby spinach for a pop of color and freshness. Topped with meaty, garlicky saut√©ed mushrooms and shredded parmesan cheese, this is comfort cooking, perfected.

name: Vitality Shot
description: Proudly serving Pressed Juicery's Vitality Shots. These shots are milder with an earthy aftertaste. Turmeric takes the spotlight here containing a compound called curcumin. Our vitality shots provide benefits from the anti-inflammatory & antioxidant properties of curcumin to relieve joint pain & muscle aches.

name: Vegetarian Bbq Plate
description: A vegetarian plate that boasts all the flavors of an outdoor BBQ, featuring the usual suspects: corn, beans, slaw, with pulled braised jackfruit.

name: Vietnamese Style Lemongrass Pork Chops
description: Sweet, savory, and a little funky, these Vietnamese-style pork chops are absolutely irresistible. The juicy grilled pork is glazed with a lemongrass-soy sauce and served over white rice with a side of pickled veggies a pop of acidity to cut through all the richness.

name: Bang Bang Tofu
description: Spicy, sweet, and creamy all at the same time, Chef Jason and Corey‚Äôs Bang Bang Tofu is an incredible explosion of flavors. First, they marinate and stir-fry cubes of mild tofu in toasted sesame oil and ginger to infuse them with warm, nutty flavor, then toss them with that irresistible signature sauce and pile a hearty serving high on a bed of fluffy Jasmine rice. On the side: tender-crisp perfectly steamed broccoli florets. Take your tastebuds on an unforgettable culinary journey any night of the week.

name: Tortilla Espanola Breakfast Sandwich
description: Ready to upgrade your breakfast sandwich game? Chef Jose's Tortilla Espa√±ola Breakfast Sandwich will make it happen. This sandwich is packed with flavor thanks to a perfectly cooked Spanish tortilla, slices of spicy chorizo, a velvety saffron aioli and bright, herbaceous piquillo pepper escabeche. It's the perfect way to transport yourself to the bustling mercados of Madrid and add some variety to your morning routine.

name: Three Cheese Stuffed Shells
description: Chef Raymundo redefines family pasta night with a fresh take on stuffed shells. In his version of this Southern Italian favorite, he filled jumbo shells with a homemade ricotta, spinach (a clever way to sneak in veggies for the kids!), nutmeg, and garlic mixture. His homemade tomato sauce on top ties the dish together.

name: Creamy Polenta with Mushroom Ragu
description: Cozy up to a warm bowl of this comforting vegetarian dish that puts mushrooms in the spotlight. Creamy, dreamy polenta is made with porcini mushroom broth for umami and Grana Padano cheese for salty richness. The polenta is paired with mixed mushrooms like cremini and shiitake that are saut√©ed and cooked down until they resemble an Italian ragu. A dollop of porcini mushroom-infused cream on top is the finishing touch on this rich, deeply savory meal.

name: Thai Crab Shrimp Fried Rice
description: Book your tastebuds a one way ticket to Thailand with the tantalizing flavors of Chef Angelia's Thai-style crab and shrimp fried rice. This harmonious dish features fragrant rice stir-fried with seasonings and fluffy scrambled eggs, crowned with succulent saut√©ed shrimp and butter-poached crab meat. Paired with a side of garlicky Thai chili sauce to drizzle on top, this dish has just enough heat to leave you wanting more.

name: Seared Salmon
description: Chef Isaac marinates the salmon in Za'atar, an ancient Mediterranean spice mix, then sears it to give you salmon that is incredibly juicy and flavorful.

name: Pork Belly Sweet Potatoes
description: Crispy pork belly with a delicious peanut BBQ sauce served with slow cooked collard greens and smooth maple whipped sweet potatoes.

name: Chicken Noodle Salad
description: Chilled fresh noodles with abundance of fresh seasonal vegetables topped with chilled ginger braised chicken that comes together for a healthy and bright taste. Great texture and even better flavors coming together in a convenient and healthy one-bowl meal. A nutrient rich rainbow bowl of crunchy seasonal veggies and savory chicken come together for a refreshing flavor experience, with a touch of spice and tang to bring it all together.

name: Honey Mayo Walnut Shrimp
description: Chef Amy transforms a takeout classic into a modern, elegant dish. Succulent shrimp are saut√©ed and tossed in a honey aioli creating the perfect balance of sweet and savory notes, while the crunchy walnuts add a delightful nuttiness. Served alongside vibrant steamed broccoli and fluffy quinoa, this bowl offers a harmonious blend of flavors with a tantalizing sauce that will leave you craving more.

name: Redland Ranch Reserve Pinot Noir
description: Redland Ranch Reserve Pinot Noir by Oneill is a premium wine that captures the essence of California's rich terroir. This exquisite Pinot Noir offers a harmonious blend of fruit-forward flavors, subtle earthiness, and a smooth finish, making it perfect for pairing with a variety of dishes or enjoying on its own.

name: Ndambe Black Eyed Pea Stew
description: Chef Pierre shines a light on native ingredients in this nourishing West African stew, known as 'ndambe' in Senegal. Black-eyed peas, sweet potatoes, and okra simmer in a rich tomato base, teeming with spices like cumin and smoked paprika. A traditional parsley and garlic sauce is served on the side, adding an herbaceous drizzle to this hearty dish.

name: Bean Corn Stuffed Sweet Potato
description: There‚Äôs so much good stuff to enjoy in this healthy, plant-powered meal from Chef Angelia. Let‚Äôs start with that hearty sweet potato‚Äîit‚Äôs roasted to perfection, then packed with crisp corn kernels, protein- and fiber-rich black beans, green onions, vegan Cheddar cheese, and sprinkle of cilantro. Top it with Guacamole for richness and bright, acidic Tomatillo Salsa for freshness and a bit of heat. With its appealing combination of flavors and textures, this meal makes a fantastic lunch or dinner‚Äîand at only 430 calories, it‚Äôll keep you energized without weighing you down.

name: Fluffy Banana Pancakes
description: Chef John DeLucie presents his Banana Pancakes, a delectable breakfast or dessert option that combines the creamy sweetness of caramel sauce with the natural sweetness of ripe bananas and crunchy pecans, all nestled within fluffy pancakes.

name: Lobster Tail Steak Surf Turf
description: Savor the best of both worlds with this decadent, upscale take on surf and turf. Indulge in succulent lobster tail and juicy beef tenderloin, expertly prepared and served alongside herb-butter and chimichurri. Paired with saut√©ed green beans and creamy mashed, this dish promises a can't-miss culinary experience.

name: Chicken Tzatziki Bowl
description: Street cart-inspired chicken is marinated in yogurt and spices and oven-roasted, then served bowl-style over lemon couscous with pepperoncini, pickled onions, and feta. With a side of creamy Yogurt Cucumber Dressing, you‚Äôve got a Mediterranean-inspired bowl that‚Äôs great for any night of the week.

name: Chili Lime Baked Tilapia
description: Craving a protein-packed meal that‚Äôs practically exploding with bright, zesty flavor? Chef Tony‚Äôs Chili-Lime Baked Tilapia is here for you. He marinates then bakes delicate tilapia fillets in a spicy, tangy, rich blend of butter, chili powder, cumin, garlic, honey, and lime juice. He serves it with a hearty side of lightly charred Roasted Broccoli and tender cubes of sweet potato, garnished with fresh cilantro.

name: Romanesco Stir Fry Bowl
description: One of my favorite good looking, good tasting vegetable is romanesco. Love the nutty, crunchy taste this time prepared by stir frying in a bowl.

name: Mission Style Vegetable Burrito
description: Mission style burritos are a classic California style of burrito known for their big size and even bigger flavors. This one is absolutely jam packed with veggies, black beans, rice, and spices. Tofu, mushrooms, kale, and butternut squash are seasoned with Chef Jose's white adobo spice blend and roasted. They're paired with sofrito, seasoned black beans, white rice, and a three cheese blend with pepper jack, white cheddar and Oaxacan cheeses. All of this goodness is rolled up in a soft flour tortilla, pressed until crispy on the edges and served up with salsa verde and Mexican crema. Consider your cravings crushed!

name: Salmon Cakes
description: The only filler in these Salmon Cakes is love and flavor. Formed with a medley of corn, bell pepper, and scallions, Chef pairs the cakes with an herbaceous sauce made with capers - all served alongside creamy mashed potatoes.

name: Bengali Curry Shrimp
description: Chef Aarthi's Bengali Curry gets its delicious flavor from cardamom, bay leaf, cinnamon, and mustard. She serves it alongside jasmine rice and roasted eggplant, the perfect sides for this classic dish from eastern India.

name: Vegan Chorizo Chili Mac and Cheese
description: You've never tasted vegan comfort food like this. Chef Ivy brings together decadent mac and cheese‚Äîmade with fusilli pasta in a creamy vegan cheese sauce‚Äîand her beloved, spicy vegan chorizo chili. To take it over the top, the chili mac is finished with a crunchy bread crumb topping laced with plant-based parmesan cheese, plus a side of pico de gallo for a pop of freshness.

name: Country Style Pork Ribs
description: The short ribs are slowly braised with white wine, onion, and garlic until they turn into a triumph of fork-tender goodness. I love these pork ribs over peppers and tomatoes, but the rich sauce is fantastic over soft polenta as well.

name: Italian White Bean Sausage Stew
description: Savor a taste of true Italian home cooking in Chef Dustin's Italian sausage and white bean stew. Spicy Italian sausage pairs perfectly with creamy white beans, especially when both are stewed alongside fresh spinach in a robust tomato base infused with a hint of smoky bacon. Topped with grated parmesan, this stew is endlessly comforting.

name: Herb Crusted Roasted Lamb Chops
description: Craving an indulgent meal that blends rustic charm with gourmet elegance? Add this one to your next order. Chef Dustin encrusts Frenched racks of tender lamb with earthy coriander and smoky cumin, roasts to a perfect medium-rare, and then plates a generous portion of sliced chops atop creamy Truffled Yukon Gold Mashed Potatoes. As incredible as those elements are, the Brussels sprouts might be the true star of this meal. They‚Äôre saut√©ed in extra-virgin olive oil with sweet red onion, tangy cherry tomatoes, a touch of jalape√±o, and fresh thyme, cilantro, and Italian parsley, then dusted with Aleppo pepper, which delivers gentle, slow-building warmth and fruity flavor. Enjoy anytime you want something truly special.

name: Loco Moco with Steamed Rice
description: Chef Nelson's take on a contemporary Hawaiian dish called 'Loco Moco' is absolutely delicious! This one consists of steamed white rice, topped with a juicy seared hamburger patty, saut√©ed mushrooms, umami rich brown gravy and a simple garnish of Italian parsley.

name: Pasta Primavera
description: The sauce is a delicious savory creamy sauce with a touch of lemon which always goes well together. Adding more veggies of asparagus, yellow squash and zucchini to satisfy your veggie meal.

name: Peruvian Chaufa Aka Fried Rice
description: For Peru‚Äôs take on traditional Chinese fried rice, Chef Walther starts with fragrant long-grain Jasmine rice, then tosses it with nutty toasted sesame oil, savory soy sauce, garlic, and ginger, then folds in egg and fresh green onions, peas, corn kernels, and strips of sweet red bell pepper. Then he tops it with a slices of juicy grilled chicken thigh garnished with black sesame seeds. The accompanying Chijaukay-Style Sauce opens a window into Peru‚Äôs multi-cultural past: The blend of garlic, soy sauce, oyster sauce, and chicken broth arrived with 19th-century Cantonese immigrants, and has become a mainstay of the country‚Äôs cuisine. Pour it over the whole dish to add sweet-savory flavor, and enjoy a familiar favorite in a whole new light.

name: Roasted Garlic Herb Beef Tenderloin
description: What could be better than seared-then-roasted beef tenderloin, sliced and served up with a bright herb and roasted garlic sauce?! In our opinion, not much. Chef Vanessa pairs her decadent beef tenderloin with roasted sweet potato wedges and saut√©ed haricots verts to create her perfect plate.

name: Four Cheese Ravioli with Arrabbiata Sauce
description: If a classic Italian meal with a little hit of spice is what you're seeking, look no further! Four-cheese ravioli are tossed in a spicy arrabbiata sauce that's kicked up a notch with a hint of Calabrian chili paste. Topped with crispy basil breadcrumbs, this dish is a crowd-pleaser, although we can't promise that you'll want to share.

name: Herbed Grilled Skirt Steak with Chimichurri
description: What's better than a nice cut of steak, marinated with tons of flavor and cooked to perfection on the grill? This tender skirt steak is marinated with fresh herbs and garlic, then grilled to get that perfect smoky, charred flavor. Finished with a classic chimichurri sauce made with fresh parsley, garlic, and just a touch of heat from some Fresno chile, this steak will have you coming back for bite after bite.

name: Pistachio Crusted Mahi Mahi
description: For the centerpiece of this luxurious, elegant meal, Chef Jason and Corey bake mahi mahi fillets to firm, moist perfection in a mouthwatering pistachio and sweet chili crust. Paired with nutty tricolor quinoa and tender roasted yellow squash and zucchini seasoned with savory, herbal za‚Äôatar, each bite is a symphony of rich flavors that meld beautifully together. Put this one in your order queue anytime you‚Äôre craving sophisticated seafood.

name: Stir Fried Ramen with Bulgogi Beef
description: Chef Esther's world famous bulgogi‚Äîsmoky, tender beef marinated in sweet and savory Korean BBQ sauce‚Äîmeets chewy ramen noodles. The springy, slurp-able noodles have been stir-fried in the bulgogi sauce and are served with two kinds of kimchi: spicy, tangy Napa cabbage kimchi and mild cucumber kimchi. The kimchi is the perfect tangy, acidic element to balance out to the rich beef and noodles, so be sure to get a little kimchi in each bite. This dish is Korean BBQ in ramen form!

name: Peruvian Rotisserie Chicken
description: Warning: Chef Walther's Peruvian-style roasted chicken may ruin you for all other chicken. Juicy and tender on the inside with a delicious blend of spices on the outside, it's the two sauces the chicken comes with that take it over the top: an herby green sauce and a bright, creamy aji amarillo aioli. Served with herb-roasted fingerling potatoes and coleslaw on the side, this dish ticks all the comfort food boxes.

name: Chipotle Brisket Salad
description: Chef Maribel's brisket salad is inspired from Mexico's use of cooked and then chilled chicken, fish, or beef mixed with cold vegetables known as salpicon. The beef is braised with a chipotle adobo with aromatics like garlic and onions to create a flavorful and juicy result. Once shredded the beef is mixed with lime juice to be mixed with fresh vegetables such as romaine lettuce, green cabbage, carrots, radishes, pickled red onions, and charred corn on the cob. This mix of cold ingredients is recommended to be mixed with Chef Maribel's favorite dressing. ¬°Buen provecho!

name: Chicken Breast with Spinach Cream Sauce
description: Tender, lean chicken breast meets its culinary match in a velvety cream sauce featuring saut√©ed spinach and vibrant cherry tomatoes. Served over fluffy rice, it's a delightful balance of creamy, fresh, and zesty notes that will leave you craving more.

name: Lemon Orzo Pasta Salad
description: Celebrate the best the season has to offer with Chef Raymundo's lemon orzo salad featuring a delightful array of spring vegetables. Picture a symphony of colors and flavors as orzo pasta intertwines with tender broccoli, crisp asparagus, earthy cremini mushrooms, and the sweet crunch of red bell peppers, plus fresh basil and a lemon aioli dressing to seal the deal. Each bite is a journey through a garden of flavor.

name: Zaatar Tofu Quinoa Bowl
description: Tofu blocks roasted until golden brown and spiced with za'atar are the highlight of this Mediterranean-inspired bowl. The well-balanced meal also features fluffy quinoa with roasted broccoli, golden raisins, and toasted almonds mixed in. A side of rich romesco sauce livens up the whole plate.

name: Chicken Biryani with Caramelized Onions
description: In this classic dish, tender chicken is marinated in a blend of aromatic spices and then layered with fragrant basmati rice, and caramelized onions. Everything is then slow-cooked, allowing the flavors to meld together and infusing the rice with the delicious juices of the chicken. Accompanied with a coconut yogurt sauce that has a touch of heat from habanero peppers & freshness from mint and cilantro, It‚Äôs perfect for a special occasion or as a comforting meal on a chilly day!

name: Greek Salad with Grilled Chicken Breast
description: Beautifully marinated and grilled chicken breast serves as the star of this classic dish. This hearty salad also features fresh tomato, cucumbers, chickpeas, and feta cheese, and is finished with a tangy Greek vinaigrette. The perfect meal for lunch on-the-go or a light dinner!

name: Hoppin John Braised Black Eyed Peas
description: A traditional Southern dish that has roots in African, Caribbean, and European cuisines, and is typically served on New Year's Day for good luck. Black eyed peas are braised with the holy trinity of onions, bell pepper, and celery, plus spices. Served with steamed rice ‚Äî plus chopped scallions and parsley for a pop of freshness.

name: Lafrieda Butchers Reserve Steak Sauce
description: The signature Lafrieda steak sauce works perfectly as an accompaniment to both grilled and seared steaks, of course. Tangy, savory, and just the right amount of sweet, it's also a great finishing glaze to chicken, fish, and ribs. Using herbs to finish your steak? Don't waste them! Toss them into the steak sauce immediately prior to serving to add an additional dimension to this great sauce!

name: Steak Morita Chilaquiles
description: The marriage of rich, hearty steak with zesty, spicy chilaquiles creates a culinary experience that transcends borders. A perfectly cooked New York strip steak is served alongside soft-baked chilaquiles made with corn tortilla chips smothered in smoky salsa Morita, cotija cheese, and sour cream and garnished with scallions and radishes. This dish is a true celebration of both Mexican and American culinary traditions, giving you the best of both worlds in every delicious forkful.

name: Wedge Salad with Gorgonzola Dressing
description: Chef John gives the classic wedge a subtle refresh. Iceberg lettuce holds its cool, draped in a creamy gorgonzola dressing that brings the funk. Crumbled pancetta adds a salty layer of texture, while cherry tomatoes and fresh herbs brighten things up. It‚Äôs a little indulgent, a little refined, and exactly how a wedge should be.

name: Plant Based Mixed Empanadas
description: Can't decide on one flavor? Taste all of them!

name: Rigatoni Alla Vodka
description: Savory, umami-rich, creamy, tangy... with its combination of crushed tomatoes, earthy fresh oregano, Parmesan cheese, heavy cream, and, yes, vodka, Chef Silvia‚Äôs take on this traditional dish satisfies almost every flavor craving‚Äîin one hearty meal. The luscious, just-thick-enough sauce clings to every ridge of the rigatoni. About that vodka: Just like a squeeze of fresh lemon juice, the alcohol‚Äôs sharpness intensifies and brightens all the other flavors in the dish. Pair it with a light, refreshing green salad and crusty bread, and you‚Äôve got an Italian feast, any night of the week.

name: Redland Ranch Reserve Chardonnay
description: Redland Ranch Reserve Chardonnay is a refreshing white wine with a balanced flavor profile, perfect for pairing with a variety of dishes or enjoying on its own.

name: Chili Rubbed Flank Steak Grain Bowl
description: Juicy flank steak is rubbed with a tangy smoky chili spice mix, then seared to perfection and sliced. The steak is served over a bright farro salad with fresh spinach, saut√©ed corn, and roasted asparagus. A drizzle of sweet and zesty sun-dried tomato vinaigrette completes the dish.

name: Fetuccine In Creamy Chorizo Corn Sauce
description: Chef Santos introduces a palate-pleasing delight to our menus. Al dente fettuccini pasta is tossed in a lusciously creamy chorizo and corn sauce. Topped with queso fresco and cilantro for a unique burst of freshness, Italian techniques meet Mexican flavors in this decadent, crave-worthy pasta.

name: Asian Style Surf Turf
description: Chef Dustin combines succulent shrimp marinated in soy sauce, ginger, and garlic, with juicy sirloin steak seasoned with five spice. This treat of a meal is balanced out with vibrant stir-fried vegetables, including broccoli and red bell pepper, plus jasmine rice.

name: Tofu Mushroom Sisig
description: This is a hearty vegetarian take on the Filipino popular dish. Chef Stacey's veg-forward version has crispy tofu and mushroom cooked with an aromatic blend of onions, garlic, peppers, and chilis. It's savory and spicy and strikes the perfect balance of sour and sweet. Served with a side of steamed jasmine rice, here's an exciting new vegetarian meal to add to your rotation.

name: Les Chartrons Bordeaux Rouge
description: Fresh fruity notes are met with warm spice in this richly colored red. A vivid blend of Merlot, Cabernet Sauvignon, and Cabernet Franc, it‚Äôs made from the ripest grapes, and showcases the richness, quality, and diversity of the region‚Äôs terroir.

name: Pork and Shrimp Wonton Soup
description: In this traditional recipe, each delicate wonton wrap is filled with a blend of ground pork, shrimp, shallots, and ginger. A flavorful, umami-rich chicken broth laced with steamed bok choy and shiitake mushrooms complements effortlessly. As you savor each bite, you'll understand why the Cantonese call it wonton, which translates to 'eating clouds.'

name: Orange Infused Cranberry Sauce
description: Chef Marc's cranberry relish is complemented by the vibrant flavor of oranges, striking the perfect balance of tartness and zesty freshness. Crafted from cranberries, sugar, orange juice, mint, orange zest, and a dash of secret seasoning, no holiday table will be complete without this side.

name: Sweet Potato Pancakes
description: These light and fluffy pancakes are the perfect breakfast inspired by the flavors of fall. Sweet potato adds depth of flavor, moisture, and a subtle sweetness to the pancakes, which are perfectly balanced by a deliciously sweet and tangy hibiscus syrup. It's a stack of flapjacks like you've never tasted before.

name: Korean Honey Bbq Ribs
description: Korean BBQ meets American-style BBQ in this meal! It‚Äôs all about the juicy, flavorful ribs, which are marinated with Chef Chris‚Äô secret rub and slow-roasted in the oven until they are fall-off-the-bone tender. They come with a killer Korean-inspired honey BBQ sauce on the side, so you can use it as a dip or be adventurous and bake it right on the ribs. Alongside the delectable meat, you‚Äôll find some cilantro-lime Basmati rice and kimchi to round out the meal.

name: Shrimp and Coconut Fritters
description: Who can resist a hand-held fried food that holds together beautifully. Shrimp and fritters goes well together with brussel sprouts on the side. Instead of using the usual flour, this is made with shredded coconut, eggs and green onions.

name: Pan Fried Salmon Cakes
description: Get ready to indulge with Chef Ruben‚Äôs upscale take on a down-home American classic. Lots of salmon cakes are made with the canned stuff, but not these. Chef Ruben folds delicate, premium smoked salmon into a mix of panko breadcrumbs, briny capers, and fresh herbs, then pan fries each patty to crispy golden brown perfection. Served with luxurious remoulade (tartar sauce‚Äôs upscale French cousin), crispy curly fries, and creamy coleslaw, this is the ideal seaside summer feast, served up in the comfort of your own kitchen, any time of year.

name: Pork Tenderloin
description: Pork loin sliced and wrapped in bacon with a side of mashed potatoes with sour cream. The orange habanero sauce is not too spicy, the perfect kick.

name: Orange Turmeric Juice
description: Proudly serving Pressed Juicery's Orange Turmeric. Think classic OJ, but kicked up about 1,000 notches. Turmeric is a dream superfood, delivering a smooth & robust flavor that pairs perfectly with citrus.

name: Asian Garlic Noodles
description: So simple, yet so flavorful! Chef Stacy tosses al dente noodles in a luscious, clingy sauce made with butter, umami-rich soy, fish, and oyster sauces, and lots of garlic. They form the base for a mountain of sweet crab meat and plump, juicy shrimp, stir-fried with more butter. Garnished with grated Parmesan cheese for more umami and sliced green onion for freshness and color, this indulgent, flavor-packed meal elevates any weeknight.

name: Bola Bola Meatballs In Citrus Soy Gravy
description: Turn the taste up to an 11 with this flavor-packed dish. Picture this: succulent baked beef meatballs, generously smothered in a zesty citrus-soy gravy and served on a bed of jasmine rice. A side of roasted cauliflower drizzled with tangy tamarind sauce rounds out the dish is the best way.

name: Crustless Spinach Cheese Pie
description: A perfect choice for those who wants to start their low carb diet. It's a crustless pie made with spinach and mozzarella cheese. So addicting and satisfying.

name: Mexican Garlic Chili Beef Salsa Verde
description: Big, bold flavors straight out of Puebla. Chef Andres dials up the heat with a fragrant garlic-chili rub, searing and roasting beef tenderloin until it‚Äôs smoky, tender, and juicy. Roasted sweet potatoes are served next to a zippy salsa verde loaded with tomatillos and cilantro, with a side of garlicky green beans for a fresh finish.

name: Seared Flank Steak Arugula Pesto
description: This juicy flank steak is seasoned simply then seared to perfection and topped with Chef Chris' peppery homemade arugula pesto. Served with a roasted sweet potato topped with walnuts for a crunch, this dish is light and wholesome, yet super satisfying!

name: Tex Mex Chicken Breast
description: Chef Chase knows exactly what you crave on any given weeknight, and serves it up with ease and sophistication. Chicken breast that's been marinated in taco-inspired seasonings is grilled to perfection, sliced, and served atop classic Texas Caviar a.k.a. a black eyed peas, bell peppers, celery, and herb salad. Chef adds in a side of creamy cilantro-lime vinaigrette to drizzle atop everything, along with fresh lime and more fresh cilantro for garnish. This fresh and satisfying meal can be enjoyed cold or warm, making it the ideal quick lunch or light dinner.

name: Arctic Char Citrus Cucumber Pico
description: Perfectly seared Arctic char fillet is rich and buttery on the inside with crispy skin, which pairs perfectly with Chef Vanessa's zesty citrus-cucumber pico de gallo. Subtle hints of orange zest and Calabrian chili in the pico brighten up the entire dish. Accompanied by sweet plantains (maduros), this well-balanced dish offers an irresistible blend of vibrant flavors and satisfying textures.

name: Mustard Crusted Salmon
description: Chef Ludo Lefebvre presents a succulent piece of salmon with a crispy mustard crust as the star of this dish, served alongside a bed of tender lentils and fresh green beans. Sweet garlic jus adds extra depth of flavor and richness while a sprinkle of fresh Italian parsley brings a touch of brightness. This flavor-layered meal is perfect for a special occasion or an elevated weeknight dinner.

name: Cheese Filled Chicken Breast
description: Chicken never tasted this good, a perfect definition of decadence. It is oozing with cheese in every bite. Chef Ruben added sweet bell pepper for a healthy kick with cilantro and guacamole on the side.

name: Nikkei Style Shrimp
description: Enjoy this Nikkei-style shrimp dish inspired by Chef Maribel's cooking travels in Peru. This meal is fresh and perfect all year round with ginger and garlic-seasoned shrimp, a pur√©ed red bell pepper sauce, jasmine rice, and a tangy, ponzu vinaigrette-dressed cabbage slaw. Buen provecho!

name: California Cobb with Tempeh Bacon
description: This vibrant and nutritious salad combines a medley of crisp greens, creamy avocado, juicy tomatoes, and savory vegan bacon bits made from tempeh. Chef Cami's irresistible homemade blue cheese dressing (minus the cheese) offers a perfect balance of tangy and creamy notes. Whether you're looking for a light lunch or a satisfying dinner, this salad is sure to satisfy your cravings while keeping you nourished.

name: Zaatar Tofu Bowl
description: Seasoned with earth, herbaceous za'atar seasoning, the seared tofu is the star of this vegetarian dish. Served over aromatic Jasmine rice with sides of chickpeas and zesty pico de gallo, this dish is fresh, flavorful perfection!

name: Vegan Sweet Potato Eggplant Red Curry
description: This dish is inspired by 'Kheng Phed' or Thai red curry with lychee. Chef Hong and her team pair tender sweet potato and Japanese eggplant with sweet lychees and fragrant Thai basil, all in a creamy, mild red curry sauce. The curry is served alongside a mix of jasmine rice and quinoa. The nutty quinoa complements the sweet, juicy lychees, earthy vegetables, and aromatic, basil-infused red curry to create an explosion of flavors.

name: Creamy Shrimp Scampi Cavatelli
description: Succulent shrimp are served with a creamy lemon sauce on top of cavatelli, small pasta shells with rolled edges.

name: Puerto Rican Stewed Beef
description: Craving the ultimate comfort food on a cold, wintery day? Then this warm, flavorful beef stew is the dish for you. Chef Fabiola gently simmers tender cubes beef chuck roast with carrots, celery, and potatoes in a rich beef stock and tangy tomato mixture, expertly seasoned with garlic and fresh cilantro and oregano. Served with a side of fluffy Jasmine rice, this meal is unbelievably hearty and healthy‚Äîand only 540 calories, which makes it perfect for a super-satisfying lunch or dinner!

name: Beef Meatballs with Rosa Sauce
description: Creamy Stuffed Meatballs with cheesy mash cauliflower full of flavor and nutrients. This delicious meal is a combination of herb and flavorsome meatballs atop of a delicious cheesy cauliflower mash.

name: Desi Butter Chicken Breast
description: Chef Aarthi puts a spin on this beloved Indian-cuisine staple. The tender, juicy chicken breast and velvety smooth tomato sauce are fragrant with traditional spices. Pickled shallots give a pop of flavor and texture.
