And trading rice for a savory Cauliflower Mash keeps the carbs down without any compromise to flavor. ‚ÄúThis dish is one of my favorites,‚Äù chef says. It‚Äôll be one of yours, too.

name: Spaghetti Allamatriciana
description: Let Chef Ruben transport you to a Roman trattoria. One of the classic four Roman pasta dishes, Amatriciana is perhaps the least well known, but the most delicious. Made with al dente spaghetti tossed in a fresh tomato sauce with crispy, smoky pancetta and topped with pecorino romano cheese, this is sure to be a new favorite. Buon appetito!

name: Harvest Lentils Shepherds Pie
description: Chef Lena's delicious and satisfying whole food plant based take on a classic Shepherd's Pie... Loaded with tasty fresh vegetables and sprouted lentils and served with a hearty side of garlicky green beans, this meal will leave you feeling satiated and healthy.

name: Zucchini Pasta
description: Spiralized zucchini tossed in creamy avocado and basil pesto for a delicious vegan, low-carb, keto friendly, paleo and gluten-free dinner. What a treat!

name: Flank Steak
description: Chef Chris reimagines the classic steak-and-salad combo into a fun and family-friendly meal that‚Äôs so perfect. He‚Äôs whipped up a flank steak and paired it with brightly-flavored edamame beans, corn, mango and black bean salad. Did you know that a flank steak has fewer calories and more protein than a ribeye or porterhouse?

name: Chicken Tonnato
description: Fall in love with Keto-tastic chicken dish. Get ready for this amazing and simple healthy meal with briny capers, tuna, and fresh basil enveloping chicken.

name: Tellicherry Pepper Filet Mignon
description: Savor Chef Aarthi's inventive take on a traditional French steak au poivre. The most delicious filet mignon gets rubbed with a special spice blend then chargrilled to perfection and served with rice and an Indian-style sauce made with Kerala Tellicherry peppercorns. These peppercorns are more fragrant and sweet than the typical, giving the rich sauce a citrusy punch that makes it irresistible.

name: Coq Au Vin Over Fettuccine
description: This rustic dish is guaranteed to satisfy any cravings for French food. Chicken is braised low and slow in a red wine sauce with bacon, cremini mushrooms, sweet pearl onions, and fresh herbs. Served over buttery fettuccine pasta and topped with fresh chives and crispy onions, this dish is guaranteed to make any night feel like a special occasion.

name: Caramel Glazed Arctic Char with Green Curry Sauce
description: Fresh Arctic char is seared to perfection, then glazed in a flavorful ginger-lime caramel and served with a side of green coconut curry sauce. The aromatic sauce is made with green curry paste, curry powder, and coconut milk, bringing depth and complexity to the dish. The tender fish is accompanied by a bed of steamed Jasmine rice with a side of baby bok choy that adds freshness and crunchy texture. The more you mix all the components of this dish together, the better each bite will taste!

name: Filet Mignon with Red Wine Sauce
description: Filet Mignon is one of the most popular cuts of beef at LaFrieda Meats, and for good reason; it‚Äôs tender, lean and full of flavor! We serve our Black Angus filet with a classic red wine sauce, roasted fingerling potatoes and grilled asparagus. This meal is a taste of classic, American steak house dining in your very own kitchen!

name: Filipino Adobo Pork Ribs
description: Braised fork-tender pork ribs with traditional Filipino flavors including soy, garlic, bay leaves, and peppercorn. Ribs are finished with an Asian honey glaze and served with blanched baby bok choy and steamed garlic jasmine rice.

name: Chicken Breast Tikka Masala
description: According to Chef Aarthi, this dish is always a crowd favorite. Pieces of chicken breast are simmered in a silky butter tomato sauce that's flavored with fenugreek and nigella seeds. On the side, she serves a special rice that brings together cumin and fresh peas.

name: Gochujang Spiked Spaghetti
description: Korean and Italian flavors come together in this gochujang-spiked spaghetti. A spicy, creamy sauce is packed with umami from tomato and parmesan, and made even more fragrant with ginger and garlic. Layered with crisp pancetta and roasted broccolini, it‚Äôs then topped with panko breadcrumbs and fresh chives for an indulgent finish.

name: Caramelized Cinnamon Apple Pancakes
description: When it comes to breakfast, brunch, or BFD (breakfast for dinner), there's nothing better than fluffy flapjacks. Chef John makes his restaurant-style stack with ricotta, which transforms the pancakes from airy and plain to rich and creamy. Caramelized granny apples balance out the rich batter, and a scrumptious mascarpone maple syrup cream adds a layer of complexity to the dish.

name: Chicken Pearl Couscous
description: Irresistibly good, hearty and nutritious, this is one of Chef Andres' signature dishes. Boneless chicken thigh and Pearl couscous is paired with basil, juicy cherry tomatoes and peppery arugula for a well-rounded satisfying meal.

name: Roasted Chicken Breast
description: Enjoy your roasted chicken tossed with Kale Farro Salad with Honey Balsamic Dressing. This salad has a ton of flavor, tender and nutty farro that is good for you too!

name: Classic Pasta Bolognese
description: Bolognese sauce - a classic Italian meat rag√π from the city of Bologna - is traditionally made with a variety of cuts and served with perfectly cooked pasta. Chef uses campanelle pasta here and finishes with Parmesan cheese.

name: Thai Red Curry with Shrimp
description: Chef Pimnapat's Thai red curry strikes the perfect balance of comforting and fresh. The coconut milk-based curry is full of aromatics like garlic, galangal, shallots, lemongrass, kaffir lime leaves and chilies. This fragrant curry is the perfect vessel for any protein, but this version features succulent shrimp, green beans, sweet bell peppers, and bamboo shoots. With the perfect medium level of spice, this dish will warm your belly but won't leave you in tears.

name: Pancetta Swiss Cheeseburger
description: Start with perfectly seasoned ground beef, grilled to juicy, flavorful perfection. Top it with luscious, crispy pancetta (AKA Italian bacon); creamy, melty Swiss cheese; and fresh lettuce, tomato, and onion. Sandwich it into a pillow-soft toasted potato bun. Then serve it with hearty steak fries and a scrumptious truffle-infused aioli. You don‚Äôt have to do any of that, because Chef DeLucie already has‚Äîall you have to do is enjoy!

name: Sweet Corn and Burrata Risotto
description: Bursting with flavors as they use the corn cobs broth to cook the Arborio rice. It's creamy, rich with a crunch by hazelnuts and a pop of sweetness by kernel corns. To finish the light dish, drizzle the tarragon olive oil sauce and cheesy burrata on top.

name: Achiote Chicken Couscous Bowl
description: With Chef Andres‚Äôs flavor-packed meal, more is definitely m√°s. First, he marinates juicy, tender chicken breast in spicy, sweet, and slightly smoky achiote paste, sweet orange juice, and zesty garlic, then grills it for light char. Instead of the usual rice, he piles a hearty portion of the chicken atop a bed of tender Israeli couscous, along with cumin-scented black beans, tangy cauliflower escabeche, and a side of creamy Ranch dressing blended with the gentle kick of poblano peppers. This is the kind of expertly balanced dish you‚Äôll come back to again and again.

name: Creamy Chicken Bacon Pasta Mia
description: Satisfy your pasta craving with this decadent pasta from Chef Cedric. The dish features al dente penne tossed in a creamy velout√© sauce and topped with pulled chicken breast, crispy bacon, shredded mozzarella cheese, and fresh chives. What more could you want in a dish?

name: Maryland Style Crab Cakes
description: BK Prime's Maryland-style crab cakes use minimal filler and let the crab be the star. Lump crab meat is delicately tossed with lemon juice, as well as a touch of mayonnaise, Dijon mustard, Worcestershire sauce, Old Bay seasoning, and buttery Ritz cracker crumbs instead of breadcrumbs. The plump crab cakes are brushed with butter and baked until golden brown. They're delicious on their own, but made even better with a side of remoulade sauce and green rice pilaf, which gets its color from a little spinach.

name: Crab Cake Creamy Remoulade
description: Immerse yourself in coastal charm any day of the week with this elevated treat meal. Chef Kevin‚Äôs Crab Cake starts with succulent lump crab meat gently folded into a mix of tangy mayonnaise, Dijon mustard, fresh herbs, and aromatic Old Bay seasoning, the traditional Chesapeake blend of celery seed, garlic, red and black pepper. Then, it‚Äôs coated in Panko breadcrumbs and baked until golden and crisp. He serves it with Creamy Remoulade, the elegant French cousin of American tartar sauce, and a vibrant Zesty Corn and Pepper Salad, where sweet corn kernels and mild piquillo peppers unite in a refreshing medley that perfectly balances the richness of the crab. Enjoy just as it is or pair it with a green salad.

name: Blackened Red Snapper
description: This French inspired red snapper is healthy and simple, very ingredient forward!

name: Mediterranean Grilled Salmon
description: Chef Maribel transports us to the Mediterranean coast with this herby tender-grilled salmon, paired with delicately braised cannellini beans, and a refreshing hit of zucchini. A sweet and tangy red pepper relish ties everything together, with a mustard vinaigrette on the side.

name: Mediterranean Grilled Shrimp Grain Bowl
description: Chef Chris goes big and bold with fresh flavors in this hearty Mediterranean grain bowl. Shrimp that have marinated in lemon and fresh herbs are grilled to perfection then served atop a zesty Greek salad with feta, kalamata olives, and baby spinach, as well as farro and tricolor quinoa. A fresh and creamy avocado herb green goddess dressing brings it all together.

name: Chimichurri Chicken with Guiso De Lentejas
description: Chicken Breasts are marinated in a punchy Chimichurri Sauce and then grilled to juicy & tender perfection. Served over a low and slow braised lentil stew, served with blistered bell peppers and a luscious garlicky aioli. This meal is packed with high-protein, fiber-rich ingredients and nutrition, we hope you enjoy!

name: Roast Chicken with Spiced Cauliflower
description: Paleo and gluten-free. This chicken is perfectly roasted and rubbed in paprika with its oven-roasted cauliflower florets.

name: Creamy Tiramisu
description: Tiramisu is a delectable Italian dessert that consists of layers of ladyfingers soaked in coffee, then topped with a light and creamy mascarpone cheese mixture. The top layer is dusted with cocoa powder, giving it a hint of bitterness and depth of flavour. As you take a bite, the soft and spongy ladyfingers blend into the creamy and velvety mascarpone, creating a perfect balance of textures. The coffee adds a subtle depth of flavour, while the cocoa powder adds a hint of bitterness and rounds off the sweetness of the dessert. Tiramisu is served chilled and makes for a perfect after-dinner treat or a special occasion dessert.

name: Honey Roasted Pork Rice Bowl Char Siu Rice
description: Chef Amy assembles a bowl packed with comforting, Asian-inspired flavors. Pork shoulder is slow-roasted with a Cantonese honey BBQ (Char Siu) marinade, sliced, and served over fluffy garlic-ginger rice. This protein-rich and balanced bowl comes with bok choy and soy egg, and is garnished with scallions and crispy onions for a pop of texture that will have you coming back for bite after bite.

name: Maple Grilled Pork Chop
description: Char-grilled pork chop drizzled with maple glaze is a perfect pairing for our home baked apple and mashed potato sides. Amazingly tender & flavorful.

name: Mangalorean Chicken Curry
description: With its coconut and chili-based sauce, this dish is a little bit spicy, a little bit sour, and all flavorful. Chef Gaurav browns pieces of juicy, tender chicken thighs in ghee (aka clarified butter), then slow-simmers them in the rich, aromatic sauce. It‚Äôs built the traditional way, starting with toasted spices‚Äîchiles, cumin, and coriander‚Äîthen enriched with coconut. The accompanying rice is another South Indian staple‚Äîstudded with crunchy fried peanuts and fragrant with toasted spices and fresh lemon juice.

name: Chicken Pad Krapow Thai Basil Chicken
description: Chef Stacy's serving up authentic, irresistible Thai chicken pad krapow‚Äîminced chicken stir-fried with Thai basil. The sweet and savory sauce for the chicken is what makes it truly crave-worthy, with just a little kick of heat to keep you coming back for more. Accompanied by a side of steamed jasmine rice, this dish will have you tossing the takeout menus for good.

name: Matcha Banana Smoothie Bowl
description: Indulge in a vibrant green smoothie bowl, meticulously crafted with a medley of wholesome ingredients. Nutty richness, tangy greek yogurt, paired with the natural sweetness of bananas and blueberries. Infused with matcha, and topped with a sprinkling of coconut and nutrient-packed hemp seeds, this green smoothie bowl is a delightful, nourishing masterpiece that promises a refreshing start to any day.

name: Lemon Herb Tofu Organic Chickpea Salad
description: A nutritionally balanced plant-based dish crafted to nourish and energize. Protein-rich tofu is served alongside an organic chickpea salad that‚Äôs packed with herbs, like dill and parsley, and sweet sun-dried tomatoes. Dressed in a lemony oregano and black pepper vinaigrette for a final tangy flourish.

name: Red Winebraised Short Ribs
description: Elevate any ordinary weeknight with this elegant, indulgent combination. Chef Tracey sears the boneless short ribs to lock in juiciness, then slowly braises them in a robust blend of red wine, flavorful beef stock, aromatic vegetables, and fresh herbs until they‚Äôre meltingly tender. Mashed potatoes, enriched with plenty of butter and heavy cream, are the perfect accompaniment. This meal is a testament to meticulous culinary craftsmanship and premium ingredients‚Äîyou‚Äôll savor every luxurious bite.

name: Hanger Steak with Seasonal Veggies
description: A new addition to the steak recipes of Chef Ruben. He made sure to use spring veggies as side to this awesome Hanger Steak.

name: Short Rib Birria Bowl
description: East meets West in this Middle Eastern-Mexican mashup. Here Chef Daniel's puts the spotlight on succulent slow-braised beef in a Mexican Birria-style adobo sauce. On the side you'll find a refreshing Palestinian tomato-cucumber salad in a tangy pomegranate vinaigrette that provides a nice acidic balance to the beef. The saucy beef can be topped with pickled red onions and fresh cilantro, and comes with a side of fragrant Jasmine rice to soak up all delicious Birria broth.

name: Marinated Grilled Shrimp Salad
description: Juicy grilled shrimp marinated in a ginger and candlenut sauce comes served with a boiled egg, over fresh mixed greens topped with cherry tomatoes, pickled green cabbage, and red onion. Dial up the flavor with a squeeze of the lime wedge and some creamy turmeric dressing.

name: Spinach Stuffed Artichoke Chicken Breast
description: This healthy and satisfying baked chicken absolutely nails the busy-weeknight dinner for everyone. Spinach Artichoke Chicken combines the best version of classic flavors and rolls it into a healthy, creamy, stuffed Spinach Artichoke Chicken meal with cauliflower on the side.

name: Vietnamese Chicken Wings with Pickled Radish
description: Marinated in a fragrant blend of lemongrass, garlic, and chili, these Vietnamese-style chicken wings are pan-fried until golden. Served alongside sweet potato fries, and tangy pickled radish for a refreshing crunch.

name: Chicago Style Bratwurst
description: Inspired by summers in Chicago, enjoying a bratwurst at a baseball game or grilling in your backyard, this dish is Chef Adriana's ode to those long days and good vibes. Her Chicago-style grilled bratwurst is topped with mustard, relish, chopped onions, and sport peppers and served alongside a creamy potato salad to complete the meal. Enjoy a taste of summer in the Windy City, no matter where you are and what time of year it happens to be.

name: Portobello Egg Breakfast Burrito
description: Saut√©ed portobello mushrooms mingle with a colorful blend of red, green, and yellow peppers, along with onions and a hint of taco seasoning. These flavorful components are joined by creamy scrambled eggs, canned black beans, and white cheddar cheese, creating a mouthwatering feast. On the side, a luscious guacamole awaits, crafted with onions, tomatoes, jalapenos, mashed avocado, and a dash of zesty lemon juice, providing the perfect balance to this delectable culinary experience.

name: Grilled Asparagus with Citrus Garlic Butter
description: Simple and delicious, these grilled asparagus are the ideal side. The tender asparagus are complimented by a house-made compound butter made with fresh lemon, orange, and lime zest and juice, as well as a hint of roasted garlic. This side dish is the perfect pairing for any steak or seafood entr√©e, though it's pretty darn good just enjoyed on its own, too.

name: Vegan Pumpkin Pie In A Jar
description: Chef's Anne's plant-based pie in a jar has all the things you know and love about pumpkin pie, in a portable package! Velvety pumpkin puree is laced with coconut milk, agave syrup, and pumpkin pie spice (of course), then topped with crunchy graham cracker crumble, and whipped coconut cream for the finishing touch.

name: Caramelized Mushroom Quesadilla
description: A satisfying, umami-loaded version of your favorite quesadilla. A variety of mushrooms including cremini and oyster mushrooms are seared until caramelized and tender. For the perfect cheesy layer, Chef Akhtar adds a mix of Cheddar and Oaxaca cheeses, then pairs the golden, toasted quesadilla with the perfect accompaniments: pickled red onions, Mexican crema, and Chef's special chipotle sauce.

name: Cuban Lechon Asado Roasted Pork
description: Chef Jose Garces' classic Christmas Lech√≥n takes its inspiration from a traditional Cuban holiday meal. With a rich blend of earthy spices, marinated for 24 hours, and slow roasted until irresistibly crispy, this dish will transport you to Chef Jose's holiday dinner table. All served with a Mojo Criollo sauce made with shallot, orange juices, cumin, and garlic. On the side, enjoy arroz morro, made with basmati rice, black beans, and fresh cilantro, along with steamed yucca and sweet fried plantains. It's a culinary journey that captures the essence of warm December nights in the Caribbean.

name: Rigatoni Shrimp Diavola
description: A spicy seafood delight! Shrimp and rigatoni pasta are tossed in a spicy Arabbiata sauce and topped with parmigiano cheese.

name: Classic Fettuccine Alfredo
description: As you bring each forkful of delicate pasta to your mouth, your senses are greeted with a symphony of aromas and flavors. Chef DeLucie‚Äôs velvety sauce, a masterpiece of butter, cream, and umami-rich Parmesan cheese, coats each strand of al dente fettuccine. A shower of minced parsley adds a pop of freshness and color, while the grated Grana Padano cheese adds even more savory depth of flavor. This dish is not just about taste; it‚Äôs about the sensation of comfort and satisfaction that envelops you as you savor each bite.

name: Spicy Drunken Noodles with Chicken
description: Did you know that you don‚Äôt have to use rice noodles for Pad Kee Mao a.k.a. Drunken Noodles? Here, Chef Hong brilliantly substitutes in linguine pasta to the same effect. The scent of garlic and Thai chili will hit your nose immediately, accompanied by a sweet aroma from Thai basil and Chef‚Äôs signature Thaimee Love Pad Kee Mao sauce. This modern version of Pad Kee Mao will transport you, and have you ditching takeout for good.

name: Seared Beef Tenderloin with Mashed Potatoes
description: This sophisticated, elegant meal from Chef Angelia will transport you to the tables at a fancy steakhouse. The star of the dish is undoubtedly the gorgeous beef tenderloin steak, seared to perfection and served over loaded mashed potatoes with crispy bacon, cheddar, and fresh chives. Paired with lightly roasted, parmesan-laced shaved Brussels sprouts, the dish is finished with a luscious steakhouse-style sauce you'll want to pour on everything: a creamy bourbon-peppercorn sauce laced with sweet cipollini onions and cherry peppers. Turn any given weeknight into a special occasion in an instant.

name: Gochujang Grilled Salmon Bowl
description: After one bite, you‚Äôre gonna be all about that glaze‚Äîspicy-sweet Korean gochujang generously basted onto the buttery roasted salmon fillet, then given a quick broil to create delicious caramelization. But don‚Äôt sleep on the side dish either‚Äîthe broccoli is tossed with umami-rich teriyaki sauce, then roasted to intensify the flavor and garnished with sesame seeds for nutty crunch. Both are served on a bed of fluffy white rice, making this meal perfect for lunch of dinner.

name: Grilled Chicken Paillard
description: Thin slices of chicken breast wrapped and pounded until its tender. Seasoned with salt and pepper and grilled in a pan. Top if off with flavorful rosemary, arugula, bell peppers, cherry tomatoes, cucumber and a drizzle of extra virgin olive oil and homemade balsamic dressing. Best served cold and with a glass of white wine or Chardonnay.

name: Coconut and Mango Shrimp
description: Inspired by Southern African dish, this is a vibrant edition of shrimp piri-piri finished pan-seared. Served over a bed of cauliflower mash as 'rice'. Broiled zucchini on the side with mango and mint relish.

name: Quinoa Quinotto
description: This dish takes quinoa - a staple grain used in Peruvian cuisine - as a the rice for a healthier version of risotto. Slow roasted tomatoes add an acidic punch to pair with a delightfully creamy sauce using another stand-out ingredient from Peru, Aji Amarillo peppers.

name: Chow Mein with Black Pepper Beef
description: Tender black pepper flank steak and savory Chinese sausage are the perfect complement to chewy Chow Mein noodles seasoned with oyster sauce, Shaoxing wine, and sesame oil. Each element is stir-fried to perfection alongside peppers and onions, ensuring layers of flavor in every perfect bite.

name: Jerk Flank Steak
description: Marinated in smoky, spicy jerk seasoning, tender flank steak is grilled and finished in the oven. Allowed to rest then sliced to perfection, the steak is served with boiled cassava topped with a creamy coconut milk sauce and garnished with pickled onions, and lastly, a side of simply steamed cabbage. Each bite sings with a harmony of balanced flavors.

name: Lightened Up Cobb Salad with Chicken
description: This is a perfect option for those on-the-go and looking for a protein-packed meal that won't weigh them down. Perfectly grilled chicken breast is sliced and served atop a classic Cobb salad with baby kale, cherry tomato, blue cheese and hard-boiled egg. Chef Chase swaps in smoky vegan bacon bits and adds a lightened up creamy avocado dressing to drizzle atop the whole salad. Toss, toss, toss, and enjoy!

name: Chicken Tandoori
description: For the centerpiece of this nutritious, satisfying meal, Chef Einat marinates tender boneless, skinless chicken thighs in a rich blend of aromatic spices then roasts them to lock in flavor and juiciness. They‚Äôre served on a blend of hearty brown lentils, nutty quinoa, and green peas, topped with fried shallots for crunch, and paired with a creamy raita to balance the heat with cooling freshness. Elevate any ordinary weeknight with this delicious fusion of flavors and textures.

name: Grilled Chicken Teriyaki
description: This meal is the complete package: Juicy marinated and grilled chicken thighs, lightly charred broccolini, fluffy rice, and fried onions for delicious crunch. Plus, Chef Esther serves extra teriyaki sauce‚Äîa sweet, savory, and umami-rich blend of light soy sauce, sake (rice wine), garlic, ginger, and brown sugar‚Äîfor drizzling. Pour it on, stir it up, and enjoy chef-crafted classic Japanese comfort food anytime you like in the comfort of your own home.

name: Chicken Eggroll Bowl
description: This deconstructed version of the beloved Chinese take-out classic features tender, flavorful ground chicken with shredded cabbage and carrots, all seasoned with ginger, garlic, umami-rich soy sauce, and nutty sesame oil for a savory and slightly sweet profile. Drizzle on the side of aptly named Yum Yum sauce to up the flavor ante even more. Perfect for a hearty, satisfying lunch or dinner.

name: Napa Cabbage Kimchi
description: Calling all kimchi lovers! Esther Choi's signature Napa cabbage kimchi is perfectly tangy and funky. This kimchi can do anything; use it to top bowls of rice or noodles, serve alongside your favorite grilled protein, chop it up and add to stir-fries, or just snack on it throughout the day.

name: Thyme Pork Chops
description: Pork chops seasoned with fresh thyme harmonize in this hearty dinner. Pork served with baked sweet potato fries pairs perfectly with a tasty sweet honey mustard sauce and an ancho-paprika spice blend finished in the oven. Pair with turnip slaw drizzled with citrus-herb vinaigrette for a fresh crunch.

name: Pesto Chicken Bowl
description: Chef Andres' Pesto Chicken Bowl will have you skipping the fast casual lunch chain‚Äîand its lines‚Äîfor good. A nutty and wholesome mix of farro and quinoa provides the base for the bowl alongside parmesan and crunchy almonds. Pesto-marinated grilled chicken, zucchini, and summer squash are the crowning touches on this comforting yet healthy dish.

name: Sauteed Garlicky String Beans
description: In this side dish, tender haricot verts ‚Äî a.k.a. thin string beans ‚Äî are saut√©ed with lots of garlic and shallots and seasoned to perfection. Serve alongside a juicy steak, crispy seared salmon, or roasted chicken for French bistro-worthy fare in a matter of minutes!

name: Pork Chop with Caperberries
description: The juicy briny caperberries added flavor to our paleo pork chop served with velvety braised leeks.

name: Thai Fried Rice with Beef
description: This Thai takeout favorite is absolutely bursting with flavor. The Thai-style fried rice features tender black pepper beef, peas, carrots, scrambled eggs, sweet pineapple chunks, and crunchy toasted cashews. Garnish it with a squeeze of fresh lime to add a zesty kick to every bite.

name: Adobo Chicken Thigh Quesadillas
description: Chef Santiago's take on a classic from Mexico: the chicken quesadilla. Juicy chunks of adobo-marinated chicken thighs are tucked into flour tortillas alongside refried beans, as well as Oaxaca and mozzarella cheeses. The golden brown crispy quesadillas are accompanied by grilled cabbage, pico de gallo made with roasted and grilled peppers, and a delicious, smoky Chile de Arbol sauce.

name: Pork Skewers
description: Pork Skewers by Andres Mendez is a delicious, protein-packed dish featuring succulent pork skewers served with a flavorful blend of herbs and spices. Perfect for those following a low-carb or keto diet, this meal is both satisfying and nutritious.

name: Moms Sunday Meatloaf
description: Savor the flavors of home with Chef Dustin‚Äôs heart-warming tribute to classic family dinners. His meatloaf is a perfectly seasoned blend of juicy ground beef, aromatic vegetables, herbs, and spices, topped with a sweet and tangy homemade ketchup and brown sugar glaze (plus, there‚Äôs extra on the side for dipping). He pairs the hearty serving with creamy Yukon Gold mashed potatoes and Southern-style collard greens braised with smoky bacon. It‚Äôs the perfect meal anytime you‚Äôre craving comfort.

name: Butternut Squash and Pesto Lasagna
description: It‚Äôs lasagna with a twist! Chef Raymundo's hearty butternut squash lasagna is a beautiful mixture of a classic recipe featuring an unexpected ingredient that takes it to a whole new level. Pesto sauce substitutes for typical red sauce, and the outcome is fresh, rich, and bright. This is one of our favorite comfort food dishes and we know the whole family will love it!

name: Mushroom Ragu Crispy Polenta Cakes
description: Chef John DeLucie brings you this option of a Climate Friendly meal, that combines low carbon impact, whole foods, and high sustainability ingredients. Cozy up to a warm bowl of this comforting vegetarian dish that puts mushrooms in the spotlight. Crispy polenta cakes are made with porcini mushroom broth for umami and Grana Padano cheese for salty richness. The polenta is paired with mixed mushrooms like cremini and shiitake that are saut√©ed and cooked down until they resemble an Italian ragu. A dollop of porcini mushroom-infused cream on top is the finishing touch on this rich, deeply savory meal.

name: Chicken Egg Rice Bowl
description: Discover a taste of classic Japanese home cooking with Chef Esther‚Äôs Oyakodon‚Äîchicken, egg, and rice. First, she simmers juicy, tender strips of skinless chicken thigh, egg, napa cabbage, onion, and carrots in a rich, flavorful broth made with dried kelp, soy, and shiitake mushrooms. Then, she spoons it over rice seasoned with Furikake, a sweet and savory blend of sesame seeds, dried seaweed, garlic, sugar, and salt. Drizzle on the accompanying Mentsuyu sauce for a blast of umami richness, and curl up with a flavor-packed bowl of comfort.

name: Seafood Enchiladas Suizas
description: These enchiladas are served in coastal towns throughout Mexico, and now they're served right at your kitchen table, too. They combine the catch of the day‚Äîhere shrimp, crab, and lobster‚Äîwith spiced black beans and roll it into warm corn tortillas with melted Mexican cheeses, then bake the enchiladas in tangy, creamy salsa verde. Served alongside lime-cilantro rice, you'll savor every last bite of this fresh new take on a comforting favorite.

name: Herbs De Provence Roasted Chicken
description: Every chef needs a good roasted chicken recipe. This one is seasoned with herbs de provence to give it a unique twist. Served with a salad of toasted bread, leafy greens and sweet currants.

name: Cauliflower Couscous
description: Couscous is full of nutrients that your body needs, while cauliflower is a good source of vitamin K, protein, thiamin, riboflavin, niacin, magnesium, phosphorus, fiber, vitamin B6, folate, pantothenic acid, potassium, and manganese. What's not to like in this healthy dish? It even made tastier and healthier with avocado, mushroom and spices.

name: Power Breakfast Plate
description: Chef Akhtar‚Äôs breakfast combo delivers everything you need to fuel up‚Äîdeliciously‚Äîfor the day ahead: Protein-packed scrambled egg whites topped with melty Oaxaca cheese and a spicy adobo seasoning; griddled turkey sausage links for even more lean protein; and garam masala‚Äìspiced roasted sweet potato wedges for filling fiber (and a surprising source of vitamin C). A side of zesty pico de gallo adds freshness and just a hint of heat.

name: Immunity Shot
description: Keep your defenses strong with this quick and tasty immune boost, featuring a delicious blend of strawberry, ginger, lemon, and a hint of agave.

name: Fideos with Chipotle Shrimp
description: Smoky and succulent, creamy and crunchy, this dish has a balance of flavors and textures that will keep you coming back for more. Fideos are toasted for extra depth of flavor, then cooked in a chipotle cream sauce alongside chickpeas and marinated shrimp until the noodles are al dente and the shrimp are tender and plump. Topped with sliced almonds for a pop of texture, this dish is a must-try for lovers of all things toasty, crunchy, and nutty.

name: Spicy Kung Pao Sesame Tofu Rice Bowl
description: For this vegan take on Kung Pao chicken, Chef Mike batters and fries soft, tender tofu in a sesame crust for nutty crunch, then tosses it in a savory, sweet, fragrant, sour, spicy, and numbing sauce for a burst of traditional Chinese flavors. (And don‚Äôt worry, there‚Äôs extra on the side for drizzling.) He serves the tofu over a bed of fluffy rice and showers it with fresh green onions. On the side: crisp-tender blanched yu choy. This flavor-packed bowl will become your new go-to.

name: Teriyaki Chicken
description: Teriyaki is derived from the Japanese root words teri, to shine, and yaki, to broil. This meal prepared by Chef Ruben will surely shine your day with its tasty marinated chicken breast topped with its mildly sweet flavor and crisp texture of Bok Choy.

name: Chili Lime Grilled Chicken with Cilantro Rice
description: This flavorful and hearty meal is straightforward but packs layer after layer of flavor. Succulent chicken breast is marinated in a smoky, zesty chili-lime marinade, and then cooked to juicy perfection. Served alongside cilantro rice and black beans, as well as a flavorful warm salad mix of corn, zucchini, red onion, and jalape√±o, this combination of flavors and textures is a match made in heaven. Prepare to be captivated by the fresh flavors and comforting familiarity of this delightful dish.

name: Spicy Gumbo Fried Rice
description: The bold flavors of Louisiana meet Asian techniques in this delicious fusion dish. Chef Angelia's Spicy Gumbo Fried Rice combines the classic elements of gumbo‚Äîsmoky Andouille sausage, tender shrimp, and vibrant vegetables‚Äîwith perfectly stir-fried rice. A generous sprinkle of spicy Creole seasoning ensures each bite packs a punch!

name: Chicken Schnitzel with Mashed Potatoes
description: This is Chef Ludo's take on the classic schnitzel, with chicken. Paired with roasted brussel sprouts, mashed potatoes, and classic Chablisienne sauce. Served with a rich Chablis wine sauce, made with a blend of tomatoes, shallots, garlic, and cream, which is simmered with Chablis wine to create a savory, slightly tangy flavor and gorgeous pink color. Let this classic meal be an addition to your weekly selection.

name: Purple Grain Hearty Bowl
description: Barley is cooked in beet juice to give it a beautiful purple color, and a sweet earthy flavor. Then it's tossed with roasted beets and tart dried cranberries for a punch of tart sweetness, balanced out by savory grilled chicken, tangy goat cheese, and a lemony spinach pesto.

name: Maple Balsamic Glazed Cod
description: This dish is perfect when you‚Äôre craving a meal that is richly satisfying and healthy. Chef Chris‚Äôs light and flaky cod is slightly sweetened with a Maple Balsamic Glaze and topped with sprigs of thyme. The earthiness of the brussel sprouts and the creamy butternut squash create a balanced and comforting plate. We promise this meal will leave you in a food-filled state of bliss.

name: Salmon Burger with Chive Aioli
description: Fish burger topped with creamy chive aioli and mayo for a winning recipe. Salmon blended with horseradish, scallions and capers making it tangy and complement the richness flavors of the fish.

name: Slow Roasted Grilled Short Ribs
description: This indulgent meal will elevate any ordinary weeknight. Chef Michael‚Äôs melt-in-your-mouth boneless short ribs are slow-cooked to perfection, finished on the grill for a hint of smoky char, and paired with roasted pepper sauce to add subtle sweetness and depth of flavor. It‚Äôs served with nutty and slightly sweet forbidden rice and tender asparagus.

name: Lamb Thiou
description: Chef Pierre Thiam's lamb thiou (pronounced tchiou) is a mouthwatering, hearty Senegalese stew featuring tender lamb and an array of vegetables, including carrots, green bell peppers, potatoes, and onions, all simmered to perfection in a savory broth infused with aromatic herbs and spices. The dish is served over fluffy couscous for a satisfying and cozy meal.

name: Honey Garlic Shrimp with Stir Fry Vegetables
description: Succulent shrimp is saut√©ed with a medley of fresh vegetables including crunchy green beans, vibrant bell peppers, and tender zucchini. The shrimp is coated in a delectable honey garlic sauce, creating a perfect balance of flavors. Served over fragrant jasmine rice infused with aromatic cilantro, this dish is a true feast for the senses. Prepare to be captivated by the mouthwatering combination of textures and tastes in this satisfying and wholesome meal.

name: Beef Barbacoa Tacos
description: Savor the flavors of a traditional Mexican delight with Chef Santos' Barbacoa. Succulent beef chuck is cooked low and slow with a blend of aromatic spices and peppers like guajillo and ancho chiles until it's falling apart-tender. Tuck the succulent beef into warm corn tortillas and top with the traditional accoutrements: cilantro, onion, and a squeeze of lime for the perfect taco. Served with a side of hearty black beans, this satisfying meal captures the essence of Mexican cuisine in every bite.

name: Plantain Lasagna with Picadillo
description: Picture a tantalizing Plantain Lasagna featuring layers of savory plantain crumble, beef picadillo, and sharp cheddar b√©chamel sauce. The ripe plantains are transformed into a flavorful crumble, adding a unique twist to this classic dish. The creamy and rich sharp cheddar b√©chamel sauce together with beef picadillo perfectly complement the sweetness of the plantains. Each layer offers a delightful contrast of textures and flavors, creating a harmonious blend of savory and sweet notes. This premium dish showcases innovative culinary techniques and unexpected flavor combinations, making it a standout choice for those seeking a gourmet dining experience. Pair this indulgent plantain lasagna with a side of mixed greens dressed in a light vinaigrette and a glass of full-bodied red wine to enhance the dining experience. Perfect for those looking to elevate their palate with a creative and luxurious meal.

name: Rustic Style French Beef Ragu
description: This is a riff on a French classic inspired by the flavors of Beef Bourguignon but prepared in the style of a slow simmered ragu sauce. Chef Cedric's hearty ragu is made with ground beef and pancetta, stewed in a red wine and tomato sauce with cremini mushrooms, onion, and carrots. The rich sauce is accompanied by delicate pasta shells and finished with a sprinkle of parmesan cheese.

name: Spiced Chicken Meatballs
description: The cumin and sweet spices make these chicken meatballs stand apart in both flavor and texture. They are moist and tender, with bold flavors that are perfectly complemented by a cooling cucumber and dill tzatziki yogurt sauce. Served over mushroom-infused rice pilaf, this is a Mediterranean-inspired meal that will level up any weeknight.

name: Grilled Ribeye with Chimichurri
description: Savor each bite of tender ribeye with Chef Santos‚Äôs carefully crafted accompaniments: a velvety cauliflower pur√©e infused with truffle oil and a vibrant chimichurri sauce for delicious freshness.

name: Gochujang Pork Ribs
description: These succulent, fall-off-the-bone, ribs are slow roasted and finished with a tangy, spicy Gochujang glaze. The sweetness of the ribs pairs perfectly with garlic fried rice and Korean corn cheese-- a cheesy Korean twist on classic American creamed corn. You will love this decadent and completely delicious dish!

name: Apricot Seared Salmon
description: The tender salmon fillet here is seared to perfection then coated with an apricot and basil dressing. On the side, roasted broccoli and pearl couscous mixed in with Moroccan spices, chickpeas, and dried cherries round out a deliciously balanced meal.

name: Chicken and Barley Pesto Bowl
description: Pearled barley with a protein double whammy of grilled chicken breast and tender chickpeas, a classic basil pesto, sweet cherry tomatoes, and plenty of spinach for a healthy and delicious meal.

name: Venezuelan Style Pabellon Criollo
description: Enjoy tender, Venezuelan-style beef that's been simmered in rich spices until pull-apart tender. Served with fried sweet plantains, hearty black beans, and nutty farro and finished with a creamy avocado sauce, this dish offers the perfect blend of flavors and textures. Experience a delicious taste of Venezuelan tradition in every bite!

name: Cod with Miso Glaze
description: Miso Cod - miso, honey, and sriracha marinated black cod, lemon and parmesan crusted mix of cauliflower and broccoli florets with blistered cherry tomatoes and scallions.

name: Spicy Pork Buns
description: Succulent thin-sliced pork marinated in sweet and spicy gochujang sauce for 48 hours then char-cooked for a smoky flavor. Served with fluffy steamed buns, baby gem lettuce, cucumber kimchi, and a special house-made creamy gochujang hoisin sauce. Build your own buns or lettuce wraps, or mix and match for a delightful, delicious and fun meal.

name: Grilled Lamb Loin Chop
description: Chef Pierre seasons a tender lamb loin chop simply to let its natural flavor shine, then grills it to a perfect medium. The lamb is served on a bed of colorful couscous salad with golden raisins, bell pepper and carrots, alongside tangy tamarind-roasted sweet potatoes. A creamy coconut-habanero yogurt sauce is the finishing touch on this sophisticated dish.

name: Short Rib Tacos with Tomatillo Salsa
description: These fresh tacos are made with short rib, plenty of veggies, and a tomatillo chipotle sauce you will love until the last drop.

name: Soho Cheesesteak Peppers
description: The art of cheesesteak preparation lies in the balance of flavors, textures and what is often referred to as the 'drip' factor. Other toppings may include fried onions, saut√©ed mushrooms, ketchup and hot sauce.

name: Viral Dubai Pistachio Kunafa Double Chocolate Cookie
description: Indulge in the ultimate fusion of luxury and decadence! This irresistible treat combines the rich, nutty flavor of pistachio kunafa with the gooey delight of double chocolate. Each bite offers a perfect blend of crispy edges and soft, melty centers, creating a taste sensation like no other. Perfect for satisfying your sweet tooth or impressing your guests, this cookie is a must-try. Elevate your dessert experience and taste the magic!

name: Thai Green Curry with Shrimp
description: Chef Pimnapat's flavor-packed Thai green curry is ready to satisfy any and all cravings for spicy food! You'll savor every spoonful of coconut milk-based green curry infused with lots of aromatic herbs and even more fresh Thai Basil. This nourishing curry is the perfect blank canvas for any protein, but this version features succulent shrimp, eggplant, green beans, bell pepper, and bamboo shoots. This dish is sure to spice up your routine!

name: Grilled Grass Fed Ribeye Steak
description: Chef Chris brings together some of his favorite steakhouse classics in this hearty dish. A gorgeous grass-fed rib eye steak is rubbed in Chef's house spice blend and grilled to a perfect medium rare. Served alongside decadent homemade creamed spinach and topped with a slab of Maitre d‚ÄôHotel butter‚Äîa compound butter infused with silky saut√©ed leeks‚Äîthis dish is a must-try for steak lovers.

name: Cinnamon Apple Almond Oatmeal
description: Craving a comforting, healthy, and easy way to start your day? This creamy oatmeal is simmered to perfection and infused with warm, aromatic cinnamon and vanilla. Sweet and tart Honeycrisp apples add a burst of fruity flavor and texture, while toasted almonds provide a satisfying crunch. Plus, 9 grams of fiber and 14 grams of protein make this oatmeal a truly nourishing choice.

name: Argentine Sausage Sandwich
description: Chorip√°n is a combination of the words ‚Äúchorizo‚Äù (sausage) and ‚Äúpan‚Äù (bread), and every bite of this unforgettable sandwich delivers warmth, comfort, and the taste of Latin America. Juicy, grilled chorizo sausage is topped with zesty chimichurri, bringing a burst of fresh herbs, garlic, and vinegar for that classic Argentine flair, then ticked inside fresh, fluffy Cuban bread. To elevate the flavor even more, we‚Äôve added a luscious aji amarillo aioli, giving you a hint of Peruvian heat balanced with creamy goodness. Accompanied by perfectly roasted red bell peppers and potatoes, this dish is the ideal combination of smoky, savory, and spicy.

name: Teriyaki Grilled Shrimp
description: Chef Esther‚Äôs take on Teriyaki Grilled Shrimp is a perfect contrast of flavors and packs an umami punch, thanks to the traditional Japanese sauce‚Äôs blend of soy and mirin. Served with Vegetable Fried Rice, plus crispy fried onions as a topping.

name: Blackened Rib Eye
description: Chef Chris brings the best steakhouse classics to your table, no reservation required. Chef rubs a gorgeous, high quality rib eye steak in his house spice blend, then grills it to a perfect medium rare. The steak is topped with a pat of Maitre d‚ÄôHotel Butter, a compound butter infused with saut√©ed leeks, and served alongside homemade creamed spinach that's so good, it nearly outshines the steak. Elevate any weeknight to a special occasion with this traditional steakhouse delight, executed by one of the best chefs to do it.

name: Beef Bolognese Rigatoni
description: This dish is all about the long simmer of the bolognese sauce, which comes finished with white wine. Very comforting!

name: Spaghetti Squash with Beef Meatballs
description: A delicious healthy version of your favorite spaghetti and meatballs. Italian-seasoned meatballs made from high quality beef are served over some roasted spaghetti squash 'noodles'. This dish has a perfect kick of spice without being spicy.

name: Blue Cheese Dates Chicken Salad
description: This bold combination of sweet and savory flavors will shake up any recipe rut. Rosemary and citrus-marinated roasted chicken is served atop a bed of mixed greens with blue cheese, walnuts, and dates. Dress the salad in a tangy honey and Dijon mustard vinaigrette for a balanced lunch or dinner that's sure to satisfy.

name: Sesame Salmon Barley Bowl
description: Cool and creamy, spicy and crisp... Chef Nelson's meal is a study in delicious contrasts. He coats a hearty portion of salmon in spices and sesame oil, sears each fillet to get the skin nice and crispy, then roasts to buttery tenderness and garnishes with toasty sesame seeds and fresh green onion. He plates it atop a bed of nutty, fiber-rich barley with a medley of vegetables‚Äîtangy pickled carrots and Persian cucumbers; subtly sweet steamed edamame, and slices of raw jalape√±o. If that‚Äôs not hot enough, his spicy mayo gets a double dose of heat from sriracha and sambal.

name: Chocolate Croissant Bread Pudding
description: Savor our Chocolate Croissant Bread Pudding, where buttery toasted croissants meet a luscious chocolate custard, creating a decadent dessert experience. Topped with fluffy marshmallows, this delightful twist on traditional bread pudding will satisfy both your inner child and your chocolate cravings. Each spoonful is a warm, indulgent treat that brings joy with every bite. Perfect for sharing or enjoying all to yourself!

name: Beef Brisket Quesadillas
description: Chef Ruben's decadent take on a traditional quesadilla perfectly combines the great flavors of its Mexican roots with restaurant-quality touches. Made with soft corn tortillas, griddled Oaxaca and mozzarella cheeses, and delicious braised beef brisket, the rich quesadillas are paired with pico de gallo, lime crema, and Chef's homemade red salsa to brighten things up and add refreshing balance.

name: Smoky Roasted Beef Brisket
description: Chef Nora seasons this irresistible beef brisket with a smoky dry rub, covers it with sweet onions, and roasts it low and slow to until it‚Äôs fall-apart tender. Then comes the chef‚Äôs magic touch: She combines the roasted onions with the brisket‚Äôs natural drippings to make a luscious sauce packed with powerfully rich beefy flavor. Enjoy hearty and moist slices or shreds just as they are, on a sandwich, smothered in barbecue sauce, or paired with a classic side like mac and cheese.

name: Orange Turkey Meatballs
description: Your favorite orange chicken now comes in a meatball version and made with turkey. It's under 300 calories for your guilt-free dinner that your family will surely love. Paired with brussels sprouts finished roasted for that veggie side you need.

name: Mexican Chicken Tortilla Lasagna
description: This dish is like a cross between Mexican enchiladas and cheesy American casseroles. Corn tortillas are rolled around a comforting filling of juicy marinated chicken and roasted vegetables including mushrooms, zucchini, and corn. The tortillas are then stacked and layered, smothered in a smoky guajillo chili-tomato sauce, and topped with lots of Pepperjack cheese. Once baked, the corn tortillas absorb all the flavors in the sauce and meld together with the filling, making this dish a symphony of flavors and textures.

name: Caribbean Stewed Okra
description: Chef Nahika serves up a plate of vegetarian-friendly Caribbean comfort cooking! Tender okra is stewed in tomato-based sauce with spices and an assortment of bell peppers and onions. The flavorful vegetables are paired with the classic Caribbean sides‚Äîred beans and rice and sweet plantains‚Äîplus pikliz, a spicy Haitian pickled slaw and the traditional tangy accompaniment to rich stews.

name: Ginger Garlic Baked Salmon
description: Get ready for a vibrant Indonesian spin on a classic baked salmon. Chef Abe serves the fish with saut√©ed asparagus and a creamy candlenut and garlic sauce. All together, the dish is packed with color, flavor, and vitamins ‚Äî the ideal fuel for any afternoon or night.

name: Caribbean Coconut Curry Chicken
description: One of Chef Anthony‚Äôs favorite things to eat on a cold day, this Caribbean-inspired stew is made with a rich blend of spices, tender chunks of chicken thigh, and a hint of coconut milk. Enjoy it with turmeric-butter rice and pineapple & jalape√±o topping.

name: Kale Salad with Herb Marinated Chicken
description: How does Chef Fabio take on the classic kale salad? Well first off, he tops it with perfectly roasted, herb-marinated chicken. Then he pairs that with creamy pesto dressing, sweet blistered tomatoes, freshly pickled red onions, and crumbly, salty feta cheese. Fresh, filling and perfectly balanced, this salad makes the ideal energizing lunch or light weeknight dinner.

name: Forest Mushroom Bolognese with Rigatoni
description: This delicious pasta entr√©e is so hearty that you almost wouldn't believe that it's vegetarian. Fresh cremini, porcini, and shiitake mushrooms are cooked down in a white wine and cream sauce bolstered by creamy ricotta cheese, parmesan, and herbs. Chef combines that mushroom cream sauce with his signature kicked up tomato sauce to create a rich meatless bolognese-style sauce. Al dente rigatoni is the perfect vessel to cling to the rich sauce, and the whole dish is finished with roasted mushrooms for even more umami.

name: Seared Pork Loin with Roasted Apples
description: Juicy, pork loin is pan-seared until crispy before getting finished in the oven. The pork loin is served with roasted honeycrisp apples for a sophisticated take on the classic pairing of pork loin and applesauce. A side of garlicky parmesan-chive mashed potatoes and tangy cider reduction put the finishing touches on this comforting yet elegant dish.

name: Spicy Peanut Tofu
description: A balanced, nutrient-conscious dish featuring organic tofu roasted in a punchy marinade of tamari, garlic, and ginger. It‚Äôs paired with tamari-tossed broccoli and sprinkled in a textured peanut topping that‚Äôs seasoned with Himalayan salt and chili. A side of spicy peanut sauce brings an extra nutty kick.

name: Grilled Skirt Steak with Herbed Frites
description: Tender skirt steak gets lightly seasoned with smoked paprika, perfectly grilled and sliced to order, then topped with an herb compound butter. Chef Chris pairs this picture perfect steak with oven-roasted herbed frites, whole roasted tomatoes, and, of course, a tarragon-infused aioli for dipping. Bring the French steakhouse home with this delicious dish.

name: Herb Salmon
description: Skip the flight to France, and just let Chef Isaac take you on a trip to Provence with this dish! Herb roasted salmon rests atop a delectable stew of white beans, tomatoes, and vegetables. To tie everything together is a bright flavor.

name: Vegetarian Sweet Corn Cachapas
description: These sweet corn cachapas‚Äîsavory Venezuelan pancakes made from freshly ground corn kernels‚Äîwill take your taste buds on a culinary adventure. Here, they're filled with black bean pur√©e, adobo-spiced and saut√©ed veggies, and roasted poblano peppers. Fresh mozzarella adds a cheesy layer, while a creamy guasacaca sauce, made from avocado and cilantro, ties everything together.

name: Hawaiian Fried Rice
description: Your favorite fried rice with a touch of Island flavor. Tender jasmine rice is stir fried with peppers, onions, lots of garlic, scrambled egg, peas and carrots. A splash of tamari and sriracha add umami and heat, and bits of pineapple and crispy, smoky ham give it that perfect Polynesian flair. A sprinkle of fresh green onion and sesame seeds on top complete the dish!

name: Garlic Butter Chicken Breast
description: If you‚Äôre a garlic lover, this is the meal for you. Chef Tracey seasons chunks of tender chicken breast with Italian herbs and lots of garlic, then sears them to lock in juiciness and flavor. She serves a hearty portion atop a bed of al dente orzo tossed wilted spinach, then bathes it all in a luscious sauce crafted with butter, white wine, fresh parsley, and‚Äîyes‚Äîeven more garlic. The pasta mixture soaks up every drop. So simple, yet so satisfying!

name: Roasted Chicken Ratatouille
description: Ratatouille is a classic summer dish that Chef Dan put his touch on by adding chilies, herbs and a sweet and sour notes. Topping it off with a beautiful roasted chicken breast makes this a great Dish!

name: Grilled Mojo Pork Chop
description: Grilled mojo marinated pork chop with a creamy garlicky smashed plantain and with tangy red onions.

name: Chicken Tinga Tacos
description: Made with classic Mexican spices and the freshest ingredients, these zesty chicken tinga tacos are served with soft corn tortillas, fresh guacamole, onions, and cilantro. They're saucy, spicy perfection.

name: Grilled Chicken Caesar Salad
description: A family favorite and guaranteed crowd-pleaser. Chef Cedric's version of classic caesar salad is all about the handmade creamy dressing, which blows the store-bought stuff out of the water. Crisp romaine lettuce, juicy grilled chicken, shavings of salty parmesan cheese, and crunchy croutons complete the dish.

name: Braised Short Ribs Galbi Jjim
description: Craving a perfect blend of culinary authenticity and modern convenience? Dig into Chef Esther‚Äôs take on one of Korea‚Äôs most popular dishes‚ÄîGalbi Jjim (braised beef short ribs). After a long, slow simmer in apple juice, savory soy sauce, and garlic, the boneless ribs emerge meltingly tender, succulent, and bursting with umami richness. Roasted Brussels sprouts and sweet potatoes add delicious caramelization, while the combination of fluffy rice and tri-color quinoa bring starchy texture to this vibrant, balanced, and flavor-packed meal.

name: Honey Garlic Noodles with Teriyaki Shrimp
description: Sticky teriyaki shrimp are cooked to perfection, sliced, and served alongside noodles that have been tossed in a sweet-and-spicy, umami-filled garlic sauce. Each element of this dish is more delicious than the last. Finished with saut√©ed bell peppers and a sprinkle of sesame seeds and green onions, it doesn't get better, and more flavorful than this.

name: Braised Duck Leg with Stir Fried Noodles
description: Rich duck leg is cooked confit-style, infused with five spice until falling-off-the-bone tender, then served on a bed of stir-fried fresh thin egg noodles with a hint of toasted sesame oil. Paired with colorful stir-fried vegetables like snap peas, carrots, and peppers, the whole dish is finished in a rich and flavorful stir fry sauce and garnished with toasted sesame seeds. This super simple, yet somewhat decadent meal will have you coming back for bite after bite.

name: Bbq Pulled Pork with Esquites Corn Salad
description: Chef Chris‚Äô pulled pork is no joke but in this meal, he decided to pair it up with a side dish that could easily be the star in its own right. Chef makes a grilled corn salad inspired by the Mexican street corn he used to eat in Sunset Park, Brooklyn, with grilled corn, mayo, lime, Cojita cheese, jalape√±o, and cilantro. Of course the pork also needs to be on point, and his pork shoulder is slow cooked for over 8 hours in apple juice and spices before being hand-pulled and mixed in with some of Chef‚Äôs house chipotle BBQ sauce. Chef highly recommends heating this meal in the microwave but notes the corn salad is equally delicious hot or cold!

name: Spicy Basil Beef Stir Fry
description: Tender minced beef stir-fried is to perfection with fresh zucchini, red bell pepper garlic, and spicy chile peppers in this Thai-inspired dish. Tossed in a umami rich blend of sauces with just a hint of sweetness, and finished with fragrant basil leaves. Served with a side of steamed jasmine rice, this dish offers a lovely balance of heat, aromatic herbs, and umami goodness, making it perfect for those who crave a spicy and satisfying meal.

name: Pork Carnitas Tamales
description: There are few things more satisfying than Chef Garces' signature tamales, and these braised pork carnitas tamales are especially comforting. Pork shoulder is braised in a citrus sauce until falling-apart tender, then tucked into a soft masa dough. The tamales are wrapped in corn husks and steamed in the traditional method, then served up with salsa verde and Mexican crema to complement the smoky filling. One bite and you'll see why tamales are considered one of Chef's specialties.

name: Crispy Chicken Breast Schnitzel
description: There‚Äôs not much better than a freshly fried, crispy chicken cutlet. A childhood favorite of Chef Chris, he decided to mash up the Italian-style cutlet he grew up with and a German classic, schnitzel. He pairs thin, crispy chicken cutlets with the traditional accompaniments: a zesty red cabbage salad and homemade applesauce, as well as Dijon mustard-infused mashed potatoes. This meal is truly awesome and guaranteed to satisfy the whole family!

name: Chicago Style Chicken
description: For this comforting Windy City classic, Chef Adriana pairs crispy breaded chicken cutlets with thick ribbons of al dente pappardelle swirled in a luscious Pecorino cheese‚Äìinfused cream sauce. And the crowning glory is her deliciously vinegary housemade giardiniera (AKA traditional Italian pickled vegetable relish), a combination of carrot, cauliflower, celery, fennel, and pepperoncini, jalape√±o, and sweet bell peppers. ‚ÄúThe vegetables still have a bite, and they‚Äôre a little zesty and spicy to round out the dish,‚Äù she says.

name: Creamy Salmon Alla Toscana
description: You‚Äôll love this perfectly cooked salmon fillet in a cheesy, creamy sauce, seasoned with garlic, fresh basil, parsley, and sun-dried tomatoes, and mixed with juicy baby spinach leaves and cherry tomatoes. A side of mushroom and pea rice makes for a thoroughly satisfying and well-balanced meal.

name: Roasted Chicken In Creamy Mushroom Sauce
description: This is classic French countryside comfort food, reimagined in a modern, lightened up way. Juicy chicken thighs are grilled to perfection and served in a rich mushroom sauce with cream and white wine sauce. Plated atop a bed of silky, comforting mashed potatoes infused with French grain mustard, it doesn't get more comforting than this meal!

name: Grilled Chicken with Farro Sun Dried Tomato
description: This bowl of honest to goodness sun-dried tomato chicken bowl is a hit. Prepared with a tangy sauce butter, parmesan, tomato paste and garlic that is coated all over roasted chicken. Chef tossed it with farro, fresh spinach, and more salty parmesan on the side.

name: Oyster Mushroom Ceviche
description: A fresh, crunchy slaw forms the base of this creative take on ceviche, a dish traditionally composed of marinated fish or seafood. Jicama, mango, and chayote squash lend the perfect balance for the marinated mushrooms, all dressed in a savory ponzu sauce.

name: Blueberry Chia Vegan Overnight Oats
description: This plant-based, gluten-free breakfast is a nutritional powerhouse! Full of superfoods with antioxidants, protein, and fiber, these oats will fuel you all day long. Chef Emily uses a blend of oats and chia for a balanced texture in her overnight oats mix, then adds almond milk to make it creamy and rich. Layered with blueberry compote then topped with fresh berries and toasted coconut, this breakfast tastes so good, you wouldn't even know it was good for you.

name: Greek Yogurt Parfait Triple Berry Compote
description: Start your day off on the right foot with this parfait and savor the layers of flavor and texture! Creamy honey Greek yogurt is layered with Chef Jose's signature berry compote, a sweet and tart mix of strawberries, blueberries, and blackberries with just a hint of lemon. A sprinkling of crunchy flax and pumpkin seed granola on top provides the perfect textural contrast to this berry satisfying parfait.

name: Sun Dried Tomato Almond Pesto Rigatoni with Grilled Asparagus
description: Chef Lena's very popular Sun-Dried Tomato Pesto-- Bright, satisfying, and totally vegan, there's a lot to love about this pasta dish! The pesto is made with sun-dried tomatoes, almonds, fresh basil, garlic, and extra virgin olive oil, then tossed with al dente rigatoni, the ideal shape to hold and cling to all that lovely pesto. Served with a side of lovely grilled spring asparagus, plant-based eaters and omnivores will love this meal the same.

name: Mexican Shrimp Quesadilla
description: Chef Raymundo skillfully crafts this loaded quesadilla to have the perfect balance of flavors and textures. This one features succulent seared shrimp, tomatoes, jalape√±o, and gooey mozzarella cheese, all perfectly complemented by a side of fresh guacamole and tangy sour cream. Every bite will leave you wanting more.

name: Seafood Scampi Orzo
description: Lemon, butter, garlic‚Äîwhat more could you want? Add in big, succulent shrimp and cod and now you have the ultimate comfort food. Often served with linguini, Chef Anthony opts for orzo, which is easier to eat on the go and complements the garlic butter sauce perfectly. A side of charred tomato and roasted fennel, plus a sprinkle of crispy shallots, complete this elegant yet satisfying dish.

name: Tuscan Shrimp White Beans
description: Meet Tuscan Beans & Shrimp, a creamy delight that blends tender cannellini beans, succulent shrimp, and a rich sun-dried tomato and spinach sauce. A riff on creamy Tuscan chicken, Chef Tracey's version lightens things up a little, yet still tastes hearty and wholesome. This dish is comforting enough for a busy weeknight, but elegant enough for any occasion.

name: Tuna Nicoise Salad
description: Chef Kristy's take on a traditional French Ni√ßoise delivers on all the same bold flavors you'd come to expect, with her own fresh twists. The composed salad has all the classic elements: baby romaine, cherry tomatoes, haricots verts, and red potatoes, hard boiled egg, and high quality tuna, all enrobed in a zesty lemon-caper vinaigrette. Loaded with satisfying crunch from the fresh veggies as well as protein from the egg and tuna, this is the epitome of an elegant yet hearty salad that will keep you full for hours.

name: Rack of Lamb with Red Wine Sauce
description: A beautifully seared rack of lamb, adorned with rosemary and rich red wine reduction. Serve as the centerpiece and add your favorite side dishes to round out a memorable holiday feast.

name: Kreyol Spaghetti with Andouille Sausage
description: Savor the unique deliciousness that is Chef Nahika's famous Kreyol Spaghetti. The recipe takes inspiration from Caribbean flavors and Italian culinary classics to meld them into an addictive new spin on spaghetti. With smoky Andouille sausage, Haitian epis seasoning, and Creole-inspired tomato sauce, you'll be craving this unique, comforting dish week after week.

name: Nashville Hot Chicken Sliders
description: These Nashville hot minis are the perfect bite. Tender fried chicken bites are bathed in a fiery Nashville hot sauce that will tantalize your taste buds. This ain't your grandma's chicken sandwich ‚Äì it's a flavor bomb disguised as a mini masterpiece with tangy pickles.

name: Maggies Braised Short Rib
description: The most special ingredient is the slow braised beef and delicate spices. It's a classic comfort food my mom, Magdalena's famous pot roast that she served to me when I was growing up. Slow cooked, sliced, beef short ribs, slow cooked with red wine and spices, mushrooms, served over fingerling potatoes and asparagus.

name: Central Park Picnic Box
description: Incorporating the essence of the term "delicatessen," this dish embodies an exquisite selection of flavors and textures, offering a diverse culinary experience perfect for sharing with loved ones. The assortment boasts a rich variety of ingredients, including savory pork salami, thinly sliced pepperoni, crunchy walnuts, almonds, and cashews, along with sweet dried cranberries and golden raisins. To complement the savory elements, there's velvety prosciutto, luscious pearl ball mozzarella cheese, and tangy Grana Padano cheese. Adding a touch of sweetness and acidity, there's zesty orange marmalade and refreshing seedless green grapes. Together, these components create a harmonious blend of flavors, aromas, and textures that are sure to captivate and delight the senses of all who partake in this culinary masterpiece.

name: Homestyle Turkey Green Chili
description: An excellent low-carb option for cooler seasons, this homestyle chili features ground turkey, poblano and jalapeno peppers and zucchini, seasoned to perfection with chili powder, cumin, black pepper, and garlic. The abundance of garnishes ‚Äî shredded cheddar, fresh cilantro and sour cream ‚Äî make it even tastier!

name: Kashmiri Chicken Curry with Naan Bread
description: North Indian Chicken Curry with Spiced Roasted Potatoes and Cucumber Salad.

name: Spicy Roasted Red Snapper
description: Don‚Äôt be deceived by the smart calorie count (only 470!)‚Äîthis vibrant, satisfying meal is absolutely packed with flavor. Chef Santos rubs succulent snapper with a blend of spicy cayenne and floral Espelette peppers, sweet paprika, and garlic and onion powders, then roasts to delicate, flaky perfection. Each fillet is served with a hearty portion of nutty brown rice and tender-crisp steamed broccoli. The accompanying mango, cucumber, and mint salsa provides a sweet, refreshing counterpoint to the richly spiced fish.

name: Thai Red Curry with Tofu
description: Chef Pimnapat's Thai red curry strikes the perfect balance of comforting and fresh. The coconut milk-based curry is full of aromatics like garlic, galangal, shallots, lemongrass, kaffir lime leaves and chilies. This fragrant curry is the perfect vessel for any protein, but this vegetarian version features crispy fried tofu, green beans, sweet bell peppers, and bamboo shoots. With the perfect medium level of spice, this dish will warm your belly but won't leave you in tears.

name: Uncle Ts Beef Barbacoa Tacos
description: Take your taco night up a level. For her version of this hearty classic, Chef Maribel draws inspiration from her family heritage and her culinary training throughout South America. Traditional beef barbacoa is the star of the show‚Äîrich, flavorful chuck marinated in a combination of chiles, along with lime, onion, cumin and other spices, then braised to fork-tender perfection. It‚Äôs stuffed into three flour tortillas, garnished with fresh cilantro and onions, and paired with a bright Salsa Verde‚Äîa blend of tangy roasted tomatillos and chiles. On the side: Mexican Red Rice, which gets its gentle blush from an infusion of tomatoes.

name: Cajun Blackened Fish
description: Experience the bold flavors of the South with our Cajun Blackened Fish, perfectly seasoned and served with hearty Dirty Rice. This traditional dish features a flavorful blend of spices, saut√©ed vegetables, and ground pork. Drizzled with our rich Cajun Cream Sauce, it offers a luxurious finish that elevates every bite. Ideal for seafood lovers and family gatherings, this dish promises an unforgettable culinary journey. Treat yourself today with Chef Chase's ode to all things New Orleans.

name: Candied Yam Cake with Marshmallow Frosting
description: A delightful flavor pairing that's reminiscent of your favorite Thanksgiving dishes. The cakes are made with mashed candied yams, which makes for a super moist crumb and flavor that's rich and sweet, but never cloying. The cake layers are topped with a fluffy whipped Italian meringue frosting that's lightly torched for that perfect toasted marshmallow taste.

name: Pesto Roasted Salmon
description: Fresh salmon gets marinated in an aromatic herb pesto, then roasted until tender and flaky. Served atop a hearty ratatouille chock full of veggies, it makes for a meal that's as satisfying as it is nutritious!

name: Chicken Shawarma Rice Bowl
description: Chef Chase‚Äôs take on the ubiquitous NYC street food features tender, marinated grilled chicken served over rice, along with refreshing red onions and cherry tomatoes. Dress it up with an option of creamy tahini or a bright and spicy hot sauce.

name: Grilled Skirt Steak with Fregola Salad
description: What's better than marinated and grilled skirt steak on a bed of summer grain salad? Not much! Fregola is an Italian rolled pasta, and is pleasantly toothsome in this salad. The salad is accompanied by charred red onions, cherry tomatoes, baby arugula, and balsamic for acidity. Finished with a classic chimichurri sauce, we love this bright summery dish from Chef Stacy!

name: Garlic Shrimp Filet Mignon
description: Craving a premium surf-and-turf combination? Chef DeLucie‚Äôs shrimp and filet mignon steak are pan-seared to tender and juicy perfection then slathered in succulent garlic-herb sauce. On the side, there‚Äôs garlicky Yukon Gold mashed potatoes and creamy Hollandaise sauce for an extra touch of luxuriousness. This will be the best steak and shrimp meal you‚Äôve ever had.

name: Sweet Potato Coconut Curry
description: This vegetarian sweet potato curry is absolutely packed with flavor. Chef Marc teamed up with spice master Lior of La Boite to create the curry blend for this dish. Roasted sweet potatoes and farm vegetables in a vibrant coconut curry are served over lemongrass-garlic Jasmine rice with a burst of fresh herbs on top.

name: Prosciutto Charcuterie Board
description: When you‚Äôre hungry but not in the mood for a full meal, you‚Äôll love nibbling through this expertly curated charcuterie board from Chef Chase. Enjoy prosciutto and Genoa salami paired with brie, Manchego, and aged cheddar. Grapes, honey, dried figs, Marcona almonds, and citrus-marinated olives complete the board. Just add your favorite bottle of wine, and you've got a happy hour spread in minutes.

name: Marry Me Chicken with Penne Pasta
description: This viral dish has a reputation for putting a ring on it. Golden-seared chicken breasts nestle into a creamy sauce, laced with parmesan, sun-dried tomatoes, and spinach that melts into the mix. Chef Chase serves it over penne pasta to soak up the glossy base. One bite and you‚Äôll be ready to walk down the aisle.

name: Thai Style Beef In Oyster Sauce
description: Chef Pimnapat shares one of her favorite dishes growing up: a simple stir fry made with slow-cooked beef, onions, mushrooms, scallion, and oyster sauce. Simple, balanced, and super satisfying with steamed rice!

name: Tandoori Grilled Chicken
description: Tender grilled tandoori chicken is served on top of fluffy turmeric-coconut rice, with creamy yogurt raita and a tangy tomato salad. All the same flavors from your favorite Indian restaurant, but way more convenient.

name: Creamy Fideos with Chipotle Shrimp
description: Smoky and succulent, creamy and crunchy, this dish has a balance of flavors and textures that will keep you coming back for more. Fideos are toasted for extra depth of flavor, then cooked in a chipotle cream sauce alongside chickpeas and marinated shrimp until the noodles are al dente and the shrimp are tender and plump. Topped with sliced almonds for a pop of texture, this dish is a must-try for lovers of all things toasty, crunchy, and nutty.

name: Mediterranean Salmon
description: Chef Fabio's vibrant couscous salad captures the essence of Mediterranean flavors in every bite. It's bursting with flavorful veggies like Kalamata olives, pepperoncini, roasted red peppers, artichoke hearts, and spinach, as well as aromatic fresh basil. Paired with grilled salmon as well as charred lemon, this dish is perfectly balanced and ready to be enjoyed as a light dinner or satisfying midday meal.

name: Laksa Fried Rice Marinated Shrimp
description: Jasmine rice gets fried with garlic, ginger, and a mild, aromatic spice blend inspired by Laksa, a rich coconut soup that's a Southeast Asian staple. Chef Amy mixes in egg, fresh herbs, and marinated seared shrimp for an extra boost of fusion flavor and delicious texture. This dish will have you breaking the takeout habit for good!

name: Pats Perfect Pot Roast
description: Savor the epitome of comfort cooking in Chef Pat's 'perfect' pot roast‚Äîit really is perfect. Tender beef gets slow cooked with red wine, aromatic herbs, Chef's special seasonings, and hearty winter vegetables like mushrooms, carrots, and fingerling potatoes. That gets simmered until the beef is practically melting in your mouth tender, so be prepared for every bite to feel like a warm hug. This is a home-cooked classic, the LaFrieda way.

name: Rosemary Roasted Pork
description: A dish that delivers all the comfort of a hearty roast, without tipping into heavy territory. Pork loin gets a generous rub of garlic and rosemary, before it's roasted until caramelized at the edges and juicy in the center. On the side, florets of cauliflower are oven-baked, then pureed to create a smooth, buttery mash that softly plays against the meat with each forkful.

name: Cauliflower and Chickpea Coconut Curry
description: If you‚Äôre not normally a fan of curry, Chef Michelle suggests you give this dish a try! With tender cauliflower and chickpeas simmered in a mild coconut curry on a bed of fluffy Jasmine rice, this is an extremely approachable introduction into curry. We love this vegan dish because it‚Äôs so easy to eat, totally satisfying, bright and tasty.

name: Spicy Chorizo Black Bean Toast
description: Whether you enjoy it for breakfast, lunch, or a light dinner, this flavor-packed combination will delight and satisfy your every sense. Chef Maribel starts with a toasted French roll, then tops it with creamy black bean pur√©e, spicy crumbled Mexican chorizo, and a blend of ooey-gooey Oaxacan and Pepper Jack cheeses. A side of zesty Escabeche‚Äîquick-pickled jalape√±os, carrots, onions, and garlic with oregano‚Äîbrings even more flavor to the party.

name: Creamy Coconut Soup
description: Delightfully flavorful, satisfying, comforting, and nourishing... what more could you ask for from a meal? This plant-based soup features a coconut cream base that provides a luscious and indulgent texture. Cauliflower contributes a subtle sweetness and a hearty bite, while the mushrooms add a savory note. It all adds up to a harmonious blend that‚Äôs perfect for lunch or dinner.

name: Tamarind Sweet Chili Glazed Ribs
description: Sweet, tangy, and finger-licking good, you'll savor every last bite of these ribs. Pork spare ribs are baked gently in the oven until they're practically falling off the bone, then glazed with chef Hong's special tamarind and sweet chili sauce. Served with a blend of quinoa and roasted broccolini, this dish is modern Thai cooking at its best.

name: Four Cheese Mac Cheese
description: Chef Chris is known for elevated comfort cooking, and this ooey gooey creamy mac and cheese is the epitome of that. Ooey gooey mac is made with four kinds of cheese and finished with a Pepper Jack-Cheddar cheese crumb crust that just takes it over the top. Enjoy this mac on its own (warning: you're not going to want to eat anything else) or pair with grilled chicken or a pork chop for a weeknight winner!

name: Butter Chicken
description: Classic. Simple. Hormone-free chicken marinated in butter combined with herbs and spices.

name: Penne A La Vodka
description: If you love a good penne a la vodka, you're going to absolutely adore Chef John's. His creamy tomato sauce is simmered before being mixed together with freshly cooked penne. The dish gets topped with bright basil and Grana Padano, a Northern Italian cheese that always pairs well with pasta.

name: Penne Bolognese
description: Meat-sauced pasta... with extra meatball? Yes, please! This indulgent meal proves the adage that too much of a good thing really can be wonderful. Al dente penne pasta gets generously coated in Chef Silvia Arevalo‚Äôs slow-simmered Bolognese sauce, a savory blend of rich ground beef and pork with tangy tomatoes and aromatic herbs and vegetables. And then, the crowning glory: One of Chef Arevalo‚Äôs polpetta (meatball), a combination of ground beef and flavorful Italian sausage‚Äîno filler‚Äîbaked to tender, succulent perfection. Garnished with a sprinkle of Parmesan cheese, this meal is a celebration of Italian comfort cuisine at its finest.

name: Beef Tenderloin Fajitas
description: Carne asada meets fajitas in this delicious premium steak dish. Strips of marinated beef tenderloin that have been grilled to perfection mingle with caramelized onions, saut√©ed peppers and zucchini. Tuck the tender beef into tortillas, top with Chef Ivy's chunky homemade salsa verde, and dive in.

name: Protein Tofu Salad
description: Whether you're plant-based or just looking to eat a healthy, balanced diet, Chef Cami's Protein Tofu Salad is a no-brainer. Brimming with wholesome ingredients, this vibrant bowl features perfectly baked tofu cubes, golden and crispy on the outside, and nestled on a bed of crisp spring mix. Sweet corn, hearty garbanzo beans, baked sweet potato, and crunchy shredded carrots all add delightful texture and flavor. Topped with a sprinkle of nutty pumpkin seeds and drizzled with a creamy vegan ranch dressing, this salad is as nourishing as it is delicious.

name: Classic Beef Stroganoff
description: This is just a great Eastern European dish, and known as a comfort food classic for a reason. Decadent and filling, it features hand-sliced strips of juicy sirloin strip loin saut√©ed with mushrooms and onions in a savory, creamy stroganoff sauce. Served atop delicious buttered noodles, each bite tastes like a warm hug.

name: Seared Sea Bass with Tamari Chili Sauce
description: Simply seared sea bass filet skin on is served with a simple, tangy tamari-chili vinaigrette and side of green beans tossed with toasted slivered almonds and steamed Jasmine rice. All of the flavors and textures come together to create perfectly balanced bites of deliciousness, all while still being healthy and hearty.

name: Parmesan Herb Salmon
