description: Chef Meena whips up a perfectly baked salmon fillet seasoned with garlic, herbs, and Parmesan, then served with a side of crispy lemon roasted potatoes and asparagus. Enjoy it with a drizzle of lemon dill sauce.

name: Slow and Low Maple Glazed Short Rib
description: This dish is all about the main event: a tender, buttery short rib that's been glazed with maple syrup and lots of herbs, then braised slow and low until incredibly tender. Served with creamy mash potatoes, tender carrots and charred Brussels sprouts, this is sure to be a new family favorite in your house!

name: Spicy Beef Vindaloo
description: Rich beef is slow-cooked until fall-apart tender in a spicy, traditional Indian vindaloo curry that's infused with bold flavors of cumin, coriander, ginger, and chili peppers. This fragrant, fiery beef curry is served alongside aromatic Jasmine rice, fluffy naan bread, and a refreshing raita yogurt sauce to cool down your palate. Perfect for a cozy night in or to make any night feel like a special occasion, this satisfying and memorable meal will transport your taste buds straight to the vibrant streets of India.

name: Sweet Chili Glazed Salmon
description: Elevate your dining experience with Chef Amy's culinary masterpiece. Tender roasted salmon, perfectly complemented by her exclusive sweet chili sambal sauce, takes your taste buds on a journey. Served alongside a vibrant stir-fry of bok choy, garlic, and ginger, this dish offers both light, nutritious, and incredibly flavorful dining.

name: Flat Iron Steak Au Poivre
description: A classic French bistro steak that will elevate any weekday. Peppercorn-crusted flat iron steak is grilled to perfection, then paired with a mild yet flavorful creamy pan sauce that's laced with aromatic peppercorns. A side of crispy rosemary-roasted potatoes finished this steakhouse-style meal. Rich and delicious, this steak will take any night up a notch.

name: Taco Bowl with Black Beans and Quinoa
description: Taco Tuesday gets a little remix with this dish from Chef Andres! This nourishing, colorful meal combines black beans, tri-color quinoa, mango, veggies and crispy corn tortillas in a harmony of savory and sweet flavors and contrasting textures.

name: Mexican Chicken and Chorizo Paella
description: This seafood rice was created in the ports of Mexico accompanied with shrimp and Mexican chorizo, Chicken with a special seasoning of dried chilies when making the rice, even though it is very similar to paella, the dried and hydrated chilies give it a unique and delicious touch.

name: Impossible Kebabs with Cannellini Bean Hummus
description: Kebabs and hummus make this dish an instant Middle Eastern classic, albeit with modern touches. Here you get the same good authentic flavors of kebabs, but with plant-based Impossible Meat. A special, extra creamy white bean hummus not only tastes amazing, but also stays fresh longer in your fridge. Blistered tomatoes and jalape√±os complete your trip to the Levant.

name: Salisbury Steak with Mushroom Gravy
description: Sink your fork into this reimagined Salisbury steak‚Äîa juicy, tender seasoned beef patty smothered in a rich, savory onion and mushroom gravy that‚Äôs packed with flavor. This comfort classic is served alongside Chef's 'dirty mash', creamy, rustic mashed potatoes made with the skins on. Each bite is a hearty, satisfying mix of savory goodness and home-cooked warmth‚Äîperfect for a meal that feels like a cozy escape.

name: Orange Pepper Duck Leg Confit
description: Treat yourself to something truly special with this indulgent meal that showcases the classic French technique of confit. Chef Kevin patiently renders the flavorful fat from each duck leg, then roasts them low and slow in that rendered fat until the meat is unbelievably succulent and melt-in-your-mouth tender. It‚Äôs sauced with a glaze that combines the tangy sweetness of orange with a gentle kick of freshly ground black pepper‚Äîa perfect contrast to the richness of the duck. And speaking of contrast: The Yukon Gold Herbed Potato Salad might seem unexpected, but its cool, refreshing creaminess provides a just-right accompaniment to the luxurious centerpiece. Enjoy this impeccably crafted meal with a simply dressed arugula salad for crisp freshness.

name: Smoky Chorizo Fettuccine
description: Spiced chorizo is stewed into a smoky, rich tomato sauce and plated over fettuccine pasta for an Argentinian spin on a classic Italian dish. Chef Maia learned to cook stews like this when she lived in the countryside of Argentina, where there was always an iron pot on the stove, cooking down meat and vegetables over a flame until all the flavors had melded and the stew became tender, then serving it over pasta or rice. This twist, prepared with the well-known, beloved chorizo will enlighten your senses and connect you to a long-standing Argentinian tradition.

name: Grilled Pork Chop Pear Chutney
description: Chili Rubbed Pork Chops with Spiced Pears are going to definitely be a recurring dinner during this winter season. It is the perfect combination of savory, sweet, and spice. This dish makes use of all the flavors of fall- cinnamon, pears, brown sugar combined with a juicy piece of pork chop. This dish is perfectly paired with a butter mushroom pilaf.

name: Caprese Chicken Salad
description: One of my favorite salad because of its incredible balsamic marinated chicken. This salad is fresh, savory, tangy and comforting all wrapped up in each crunchy, creamy bite.

name: Short Rib Ragu Over Pappardelle
description: Classic flavors come together in this elegant Italian dish. Melt-in-your-mouth tender short rib ragu is simmered all day then served over al dente pappardelle pasta. The wide noodle shape is ideal for twirling up every last drop of the robust ragu. Paired with fresh asparagus on the side and topped with a dollop of velvety fresh ricotta cheese for the crowning touch.

name: Grilled Barbeque Spareribs
description: A perfect dish! Grilled pork, barbeque, sweet smokey tangy deliciousness.

name: Slow Braised Short Ribs with Carrot Puree
description: These super tender short ribs are slow braised in red wine and served with a light carrot puree and garlic roasted haricot verts.

name: Mediterranean Quinoa Crusted Salmon
description: Chef Einat's take on French ratatouille has modern Mediterranean flare with the traditional peppers, tomatoes, and onions, plus the addition of capers and a veritable bouquet of fresh herbs. Atop the savory braised vegetables, Chef plates a gorgeous filet of salmon, crusted in quinoa for an extra crispy crust. A velvety roasted red pepper tahini sauce brings the whole dish together for a balanced, elegant eating experience.

name: Butternut Squash Risotto
description: A satisfying veggie meal that uses a simple risotto with squash and gives it an autumnal twist.

name: Hearty Zucchini Beef Moussaka
description: Chef Ahmet puts a healthier spin on this Greek classic, layering tender slices of zucchini and tangy plum tomato with the traditional seasoned ground beef base. It‚Äôs topped with luscious, creamy bechamel sauce, made with Gouda and Parmesan cheeses, then baked to bubbly, golden perfection. On the side: simple green beans, lightly blanched so they remain crisp-tender. A shower of minced parsley adds a pop of color and freshness to this hearty, satisfying meal.

name: Hanger Steak with Aioli
description: The star of this dish is a juicy hanger steak, simply seasoned and perfectly seared to enhance its savory flavor. A side of velvety aioli is an amazing accompaniment, adding even more richness to this elegant dish. A zesty lemon orzo pasta salad adds bright citrus notes to complement the deeply savory flavor of the steak. It's an elegant, steakhouse-worthy dish, served up in the comfort of your own kitchen.

name: Creamy Lobster Bisque
description: Indulge in the luxurious flavor and silky texture of Chef Kristy's creamy lobster bisque. This rich soup builds layer upon layer of flavor with white wine, herbs, a touch of cream, and a medley of finely chopped mirepoix with onions, carrots, and celery‚Äîplus the rich, oceanic flavor of real lobster, of course. Finished with generous chunks of lobster meat that have been tossed in garlic butter, each spoonful promises a harmonious blend of textures. This elegant-yet-irresistible option is a must-try for seafood lovers seeking a decadent dining experience.

name: Traditional Chicken Souvlaki
description: Souvlaki may be the most universally beloved street food hailing from Greece, and in this dish Chef Chase showcases why! Meat‚Äî in this case tender chicken‚Äî is skewered and cooked over fire to imbue it with that charred grill taste. Chef keeps the marinade simple with a little olive oil, lemon, garlic, and oregano, to really let that smokiness from the fire come through. The skewers are served over a refreshing traditional Greek Salad along with some soft pita bread to complete the dish. This meal proves that when the ingredients and techniques are high quality, not much else is needed.

name: Guajillo Pork Chop Rosemary Cream
description: The flavorful Cajun pork chop is accompanied by blanched green beans and creamy sweet potato puree. These succulent pan-fried pork chops are generously seasoned with Cajun spices, creating a deliciously bold and satisfying dish. This meal is a delightful option for those who crave a taste of culinary excellence.

name: Crab Louie Plate
description: Inspired by classic Crab Louie, this fresh and delicious dish from Chef Santos is sure to please. Lump crabmeat is the star of the show, complemented by tender asparagus, cherry tomatoes, avocado, and hard-boiled egg, as well as a side of tartar sauce to tie all the elements together. A base of nutty brown rice makes the dish even more hearty and satisfying.

name: Grilled Jerk Shrimp Rasta Pasta
description: Chef Chris presents a vibrant pasta rasta made with grilled jerk shrimp and penne. The creamy pasta comes mixed with saut√©ed yellow, red, and green bell peppers, onions, garlic, parmesan, and coconut milk.

name: Roasted Salmon with Honey Mustard Glaze
description: A sweet-and-savory glaze made with two kinds of mustard and honey is the perfect complement to tender roasted salmon. The salmon's buttery texture and mild flavor pairs perfectly with the robust glaze, making this fish the ideal starting point for an easy dinner in minutes, or the crowning touch atop a hearty salad at lunchtime.

name: Jamdown Jerk Chicken Thighs
description: This dish starts with Chef Aarthi‚Äôs addictive Jerk spice marinade. Then, the marinated chicken thighs are grilled over an open fire then served with a side roasted plantains and kidney bean rice. Think: salty, sweet, and totally transportive‚Äîlike a tasty trip to the Caribbean in every bite.

name: Mushroom Spinach Goat Cheese Crepe
description: Chef Miriam is serving up French bistro fare at its finest. Here, the crepe is light and thin, providing the perfect canvas for a flavor-packed filling. Inside the crepe, you'll find saut√©ed mushrooms, fresh spinach, and creamy goat cheese. The earthy and savory flavors of the mushrooms are beautifully balanced by the tanginess of the goat cheese, while the spinach adds a vibrant and nutritious element to the dish. Whether you're a vegetarian or simply looking for a tasty, French-inspired meal, this is a must-try.

name: Crepes with Blueberry Compote
description: These delicious crepes with fresh blueberry compote are a sweet, delightful treat for breakfast, dessert, or an anytime snack. The crepes are light, thin, and fluffy‚Äîjust like they should be. The compote, made with the season‚Äôs best berries, is tangy and sweet. And the generous dollop of whipped cream topping adds a touch of richness and indulgence.

name: Baked Shrimp Chile Relleno
description: A fresh take on a classic Chile Relleno (without the cheese!) stuffed with quinoa, shrimp a la plancha, and topped with a traditional tomato sauce.

name: Martins Ecuadorian Chicken with Rice
description: Chef Aarthi got this recipe from her head chef Martin; He made it for a team lunch once and it was so good that Chef Aarthi knew she wanted to share it with her CookUnity family. The chicken is juicy marinated with coriander, cumin, and cilantro, in a tomato-based sauce with tons of umami. It's the perfect compliment to sweet plantains and aromatic steamed jasmine rice.

name: Kung Pao Fish
description: Chef Esther's take on the classic Chinese dish, Kung Pao, features fish for a lighter twist. Crispy fried fillets of Swai, a delicate white fish, are served with a side of that signature spicy and sweet sauce to drizzle on at home so the fish stays nice and crunchy. Brown rice and stir-fried veggies like zucchini, carrots, and onion are served alongside the fish, with toasted cashews to add a pop of texture on top.

name: Classic Beef Bibimbap
description: A nutrient-rich combination of rice, veggies and Korean bbq beef that come together for a savory, earthy and toasty experience with hints of spice and tang. Great texture and even better flavors coming together in a convenient and healthy one-bowl meal.

name: Orecchiette with Middle Eastern Beef Ragu
description: What happens when Chef Einat brings an Italian classic to the Middle East? This delicious dish! Beef is braised with Tunisian harissa for a tangy, slightly spicy twist on traditional Italian ragu. The remarkably flavorful sauce is tossed with orecchiette pasta and topped with crispy garlic-and-herb breadcrumbs as well as a dollop of smoky & spicy harissa crema for a symphony of flavors and textures.

name: Chipotle Lime Salmon
description: Savor the bold flavors of chipotle lime salmon paired with roasted Brussels sprouts. Fresh salmon fillets are marinated in lime juice and maple syrup, then seared to perfection. Tender Brussels sprouts are roasted, adding a nutty crunch. This smoky, tangy, and slightly sweet dish is perfect for a wholesome, flavorful meal that delights every bite.

name: Savory Chicken Marsala
description: Chef James‚Äôs delightful blend of Italian tradition and modern comfort features tender, perfectly seasoned saut√©ed chicken breast simmered with earthy mushrooms and fresh herbs in a luscious Marsala wine sauce. Served atop al dente penne pasta and fresh baby spinach, this savory, satisfying meal is perfect for any occasion... or no occasion at all! Pair it with crusty bread from your favorite bakery to sop up every last drop of that wonderfully rich sauce.

name: Thai Yellow Chicken Curry
description: Chef Pimnapat's Thai yellow curry brings comforting warmth any time of year. The mild coconut milk-based curry features a special yellow curry paste made with aromatics like coriander, cumin, lemongrass ginger, garlic, and turmeric. This lightly sweet and super satisfying curry is the perfect vessel for any protein, but this version features juicy chicken breast, as well as potato, carrots, and onions. If you're new to the world of Thai curries, this is the perfect entry curry, and will have you hooked on the sweet-and-savory stews in no time.

name: Guanciale Bee Sprout Pizza
description: Chef Marc has perfected his sourdough pizza dough recipe to create the perfect chewy pizza with a crisp crust. The Bee Sprout pizza is topped with fresh shaved brussels sprouts, crispy guanciale (cured pork) and an herby boursin cheese. Finish it off with fresh pecorino and a drizzle of chile honey for a truly delicious restaurant-quality pizza night at home!

name: Rigatoni In Vodka Sauce
description: Rich, velvety, and utterly delicious, there's nothing not to love about Chef Dustin's elevated take on classic rigatoni vodka. Al dente rigatoni pasta is tossed in a homemade vodka tomato sauce, then topped with a dollop of herbed ricotta cheese to make it even more decadent. A sprinkle of golden toasted breadcrumbs adds a delightful crunch that will keep you coming back for bite after bite.

name: Ginger Soy Grilled Sirloin
description: This Asian-inspired ginger and garlic-infused sweet-and-savory marinade is delicious over just about anything. But pair it with juicy sirloin steak‚Äîchar-grilled to perfection‚Äîand you have a thing of beauty. The irresistible steak is served with spicy, Szechuan-style green beans making this dish a soon-to-be weeknight staple.

name: Pesto Shrimp
description: Bursting with color and nutrition, Chef James‚Äôs meal is a feast for your eyes and your palate. He lightly saut√©s succulent shrimp and tosses them in fresh homemade pesto for a burst of fresh, vibrant basil flavor. Velvety creamed leeks and sweet, earthy roasted beets are the perfect accompaniments. Sprinkle on the toasted Panko breadcrumbs for added crunch. It all adds up to a beautifully vibrant balance of flavors and textures‚Äîand just 520 calories!

name: Cajun Catfish
description: You will love this special showcase of catfish coated with special cajun sauce. Enjoy this terrific recipe from down South that's given with a hearty healthy twist.

name: Five Spice Chicken Quinoa Fried Rice
description: Chef Angelia brings a wholesome variation on a takeout staple, swapping rice for nutty tri-color quinoa. Tender chicken breast, rubbed with fragrant and tingly Chinese five-spice, joins wok-fired egg, bell peppers, onions, carrots, and peas. A savory-sweet tamari, ginger, and garlic sauce ties it all together, while fresh scallions and sesame seeds add the finishing touch to this nutritious, gluten-free dish.

name: Entrana Steak with Chimichurri
description: Get into Argentinian asado mode with Chef Cedric‚Äôs traditional grilled Entra√±a (skirt) steak, prized for its rich, beefy flavor. It‚Äôs paired with his herbaceous and slightly spicy chimichurri sauce‚Äîa must for any Argentinian steak dinner. Add a fresh green salad and you‚Äôve got a complete protein-packed meal to truly savor.

name: Thai Red Curry with Tofu and Mixed Vegetables
description: Chef Chase combines the zippy tang of a Thai-inspired red curry with protein-packed tofu and a variety of colorful and healthy vegetables including broccoli, onion, celery, carrots, green and red bell peppers. Topped with fresh herbs like Thai basil and cilantro and served over nutty brown rice, this hearty curry is sure to please any palate.

name: Spiced Lamb Kofte
description: These little lamb meatballs are filled with fresh herbs, delicate spices, and a touch of ginger, which make them truly irresistible. They are great anytime of day, especially when paired with creamy tzatziki sauce. The smoky baba ghanoush takes on a whole new flavor profile, swapping out the traditional eggplant for zucchini. It has a little bit of yogurt and a lot of mint, and as far as Chef Michelle is concerned, zucchini can be used for almost anything‚Äîso be prepared to become zucchini's biggest fan after trying this dish.

name: Melon Jicama Fruit Salad
description: This refreshing melon and jicama salad is a vibrant and summery dish that takes the concept of fruit salad to another level. The side combines the sweet cantaloupe and honeydew melons, crunchy jicama, and a light mint, chile, & lime dressing, creating a delightful blend of flavors that will tantalize your taste buds. Serve alongside grilled fish or seafood or enjoy it on its own as an energizing snack.

name: Mushroom and Avocado Tacos
description: Rich, earthy mushrooms replace meat in these all-organic veggie tacos. Chef Francesco combines shiitake, baby bella, and cremini mushrooms with mango and bell pepper to make vegetarian tacos that are bursting with flavor.

name: Sun Dried Tomato Almond Pesto Rigatoni
description: Bright, satisfying, and totally vegan, there's a lot to love about this pasta dish! Chef Lena's pesto is made with sun-dried tomatoes, almonds, fresh basil, garlic, and extra virgin olive oil, then tossed with al dente rigatoni, the ideal shape to hold and cling to all that lovely sauce. Served with a side of deeply roasted Brussels sprouts, plant-based eaters and omnivores will love this meal the same.

name: Blackened Shrimp and Grits
description: Chef Chris loves shrimp and grits because they 'just make you feel at home.' His take features juicy roasted shrimp that are seasoned with Cajun blackening spices and served atop thick, creamy grits, infused with pepper jack cheese to add a subtle kick of heat. The shrimp and grits are complimented by Chef's decadent cider-braised collards with smoky bacon. This is Southern comfort at its best.

name: Blackened Chicken Tenders
description: Blackened tasty chicken with savory avocado salad undoubtedly the best thing you will have for today. Chicken is coated with herbs and spices pair with its sweet basil dressing.

name: Panang Curry with Chicken
description: Chef Pimnapat's Thai Panang curry strikes the perfect balance of comforting and fresh. Panang curry is a popular variation on Thai red curry, known for being a slightly thicker curry with a sweet and savory, slightly tangy flavor. It gets its signature flavor from familiar ingredients like coconut milk and fish sauce, but with the addition of aromatics like dried red chilies, shallot, garlic, lemongrass, galangal, cumin seed, coriander seed and kaffir lime leaves. This satisfying curry pairs perfectly with tender chicken breast and sweet bell peppers. Try this nuanced curry, and we guarantee your tastebuds will thank you!

name: Pork Chops with Roasted Parsley Potatoes
description: Mouth watering smoky pork chop paired with roasted potatoes infused with the aromatic flavors of parsley ginger and arugula. The sherry wine gives it a little tart flavor and helps tenderize the meat.

name: Crispy Chicken Schnitzel
description: There‚Äôs not much better than a freshly fried, crispy chicken cutlet. A childhood favorite of Chef Chris‚Äô, he decided to mash up the Italian-style cutlet with a German classic, schnitzel. He pairs his crispy fried, thin cutlets with mustardy mashed potatoes and a fresh-cut tomato, parsley, and scallion salad with lemon. This meal is truly awesome and guaranteed to satisfy the whole family! Microwaving is fine but if you do have a little extra time, Chef recommends heating the chicken in preheated 350 degree oven for 7 minutes to keep it extra crisp.

name: Soy Glazed Chicken
description: This chicken has a wonderful authentic, pleasant taste with the power of marinated chicken in milk, sour cream, herbs and spices. With soy glazed drizzled, enjoy this with potato, horseradish, and cucumber.

name: Sweet Savory Grilled Steak
description: Chef Stacey marinates tender hanger steak with sweet-and-savory Asian flavors then grills it to perfection, allowing the sugars in the marinade to caramelize and slightly char the exterior while the interior remains perfectly medium-rare. She serves a hearty portion on a bed of fragrant steamed coconut rice made with a blend of Jasmine and Forbidden rice and a side of saut√©ed bok choy with garlic sauce for balance. The finishing touch: A bright and robust green onion relish that brings together all the flavors in perfect harmony.

name: Adobo Pulled Pork Tacos
description: The Philippines meet Mexico in this uniquely delicious dish. Filipino braised pork adobo is tucked into soft corn tortillas and topped with a refreshing cabbage slaw and homemade macerated red onions. Finish your tacos with a little drizzle of sriracha aioli and taste the best of both worlds with Asian and Spanish influences.

name: Grilled Chicken Succotash
description: A classic French dish with a twist! Chef Andres makes this chicken dish shine with loads of veggies. Squash, zucchini, carrots, asparagus, and bacon make up this bright succotash. Topped off with lemon and parsley, you‚Äôll love these fresh and zesty flavors at your table.

name: Grilled Anticucho Style Pork
description: Here‚Äôs a hearty, satisfying way to discover Peruvian cuisine‚Äîand a totally captivating take on a meat-and-potatoes meal. Traditionally, anticuchos are marinated, skewered, and grilled meats, with roots dating back to ancient Andean cultures. Chef Walther substitutes a whole boneless pork loin chop for a more substantial portion, and bathes it in a marinade of spicy aji chile, cumin, oregano, and garlic. When it‚Äôs grilled to perfection, he tosses it in chimichurri sauce, packed with the bright flavors of vinegar, garlic, and oregano. If ever a side dish could steal centerstage, Chef Walther‚Äôs Potato and Beet Salad is it. The combination of tender potatoes, earthy beets, sweet Granny Smith apple and red bell pepper, crisp chopped green beans, and fresh corn kernels is swathed in a tangy, creamy blend of lime-spiked mayonnaise.

name: Spicy Citrus Punch
description: Get ready to turn up the heat! This daring blend of pineapple, ghost pepper, and turmeric is your fiery go-to for a metabolism boost.

name: Steak Marinated Fajita Cheese Tacos
description: This Taco is to the taste of your palate, it takes me back to Mexico City when normally tacos are sold in different ways on the streets. I always ordered the steak alambres taco that had melted cheese on top and a good spicy sauce that is super delicious.

name: Cochinita Pibil
description: Indulge in the world's best dish, the Cochinita Pibil, as crowned by the Taste Atlas Awards 2021. This culinary delight traces its origins back to the Mayan culture along the Mexican Caribbean Sea. The dish involves marinating pork with achiote paste and orange for 12 hours, slow-cooking it to a perfect tenderness, and gently shredding it. It's artfully garnished with banana leaves and orange wedges. Accompanied by red Mexican rice, black beans, and pickled onions. A taste of history and excellence on your plate.

name: Grilled Eggplant Parmigiana
description: Layers of grilled eggplant, rich tomato sauce, and oozy cheese come together in this beloved Italian classic. Peppered with fresh basil leaves, it‚Äôs generously topped with parmesan and baked until golden.

name: Michelles Meatballs and Spaghetti
description: Chef Michelle's light and fluffy pork-and-beef meatballs are served in a delicate tomato sauce straight from her nonna's recipe book. With a hint of good olive oil and fresh basil, it's a simple taste of Italian comfort cooking. Chef's favorite way to enjoy these meatballs is to serve them over al dente spaghetti and top with some fresh whipped ricotta for that extra hit of creamy richness. Grab a fork and dive in!

name: Blackened Hanger Steak Curry Gratin Potato
description: Perfectly seared hanger steak with a richly spiced curry sauce on top. Goes Perfectly with the creamy layers of this innovative take on gratin that‚Äôs perfumed with curry powder.

name: Kale Red Pepper Frittata
description: Searching for a tasty and versatile addition to your breakfast (or brunch or lunch) routine? Look no further! Packed with seasonal veggies, Chef Jose Garces‚Äôs frittata is a protein-rich dish that can be enjoyed on its own or paired with a simple salad. He combines creamy eggs with tender kale, zesty garlic, and sweet/smoky roasted red bell peppers‚Äîthe flavor is as vibrant as it is colorful. Turn it up even more with the side of fresh Salsa Roja for gentle heat and savor a healthy, satisfying addition to your weekly meal plan.

name: Lobster Fra Diavolo
description: Imported Italian spaghetti cooked 'al dente' in a seafood-infused tomato sauce with just a little kick of heat from red peppers flakes. But, of course, the real star of this dish is lobster! Plump chunks of real lobster tail and claw meat are pan-seared to seal in all their natural juices. Top with a little fresh basil and mangia!

name: Lemongrass Grilled Chicken
description: Chicken thighs are marinated with citrusy, gingery lemongrass, then grilled and served over steamed jasmine rice. The juicy chicken is garnished with cucumber, shredded carrots, and cilantro. Drizzle some nuoc cham, the traditional Vietnamese dipping sauce, for a complex umami punch.

name: Broccoli and Cheddar Soup
description: I love soups and this one in particular, a classic. Kids love it too :)

name: Seared Duck Breast with Orange Coconut Sauce
description: When the East meets the West, you get the best of both worlds. Duck breast is rubbed with an aromatic Baharat spice mix then seared for crispy skin and tender, juicy meat. With a creamy pan sauce of coconut, orange and date molasses, the sweet, fruity sauce perfectly complements the duck. Served with oven roasted caramelized sweet potatoes, broccoli for brightness, and fried shallots that adds crispy texture, this is a tour around the world on a plate.

name: Lobster Risotto
description: Decadent. Savory. Sweet. Succulent. You get it all in this indulgent Italian classic. Chef John DeLucie builds a flavor base of saut√©ed garlic, then slowly stirs traditional arborio rice in tomato-based lobster stock and white wine until it releases the starch that gives this dish its velvety magic. The lobster is cooked separately and gently folded in, along with fresh English peas, then it's all topped with a dollop of luxurious anise-flavored Tarragon Butter for even more richness. The result is a true treat. Enjoy with a crisp salad and crusty bread.

name: Guajillo Braised Beef Tamale
description: There are few things more satisfying than Chef Garces' signature tamales, and these braised beef-filled tamales are especially comforting. Rich short ribs are braised in a guajillo chile-infused sauce until pull-apart tender, then tucked into a soft masa dough. The tamales are wrapped in corn husks and steamed in the traditional method, then served up with salsa verde and Mexican crema to complement the smoky filling. One bite and you'll see why tamales are considered one of Chef's specialties.

name: Sausage Pepper Dirty Rice
description: This bowl from Chef Esther is a masterful mashup of global flavors. Smoky sausage, sweet red peppers, and fragrant basil come together in a tomato-rich sauce that seeps into the rice, giving it that ‚Äúdirty‚Äù color. A side of cucumber salad, tossed in soy and rice vinegar with a hint of chili, cuts through with a cool, crisp bite.

name: Chicken Teriyaki with Charred Broccolini
description: A classic Japanese comfort food, chicken teriyaki has bold, savory, and sweet flavors with lots of umami undertones. Served with furikake white rice and lightly charred broccolini, this dish is the complete package.

name: Lamb Ossobuco Over Saffron Mashed Potatoes
description: Indulge in a true taste of culinary excellence and elegance. Chef Santiago pairs lamb shank‚Äîbraised until falling off the bone-tender in the style of ossobuco‚Äîwith creamy saffron-infused mashed potatoes. Served alongside roasted broccolini and an herby gremolata, the lamb and mashed potatoes promise an unforgettable dining experience. This dish stands as a testament to the rich flavors and traditions of Italian cuisine.

name: Southwest Turkey Rice Bowl
description: Chef Jason and Corey pack incredible flavor and nutrition into this hearty, healthy meal. Starting with a foundation of fluffy brown rice, they pile on tender, mildly spicy taco-seasoned ground turkey, a zesty and colorful zucchini, corn, and black bean bursting with freshness, and finally, pickled jalape√±os for extra kick. Great for lunch or dinner, this protein- and fiber-filled meal will keep you fueled for whatever comes next.

name: Bacon Truffle Chicken Salad
description: Chef Tracey says, ‚ÄúI put this Bacon-Truffle Chicken Salad on every menu I've ever written. It‚Äôs hands-down the best.‚Äù Enjoy the juicy, tender chicken breast, crisp, smoky bacon, savory mayonnaise, and umami-rich white truffle all in creamy harmony, either straight from the container or in a fresh hoagie roll.

name: Tri Colored Rotini
description: Equally beautiful and delicious rotini pasta with sweet Italian sausage, perfectly blended with broccoli rabe and roasted red pepper.

name: Coconut Matcha Energy Balls
description: In today's fast-paced world, finding a healthy and nutritious snack to keep up with our busy lifestyles can be challenging. Luckily, Livy‚Äôs has the perfect solution for you ‚Äì their signature Matcha Energy Balls! These bite-sized treats are packed with wholesome ingredients to fuel your body and satisfy your taste buds. Made with cashews, oats, coconut, agave, dates, and the star ingredient ‚Äì matcha ‚Äî these energy balls are gluten-free, egg-free, dairy-free, and have no refined sugar added, making them suitable for various dietary preferences. Leave the coffee jitters behind and get energized with Livy‚Äôs Energy Balls!

name: Tuscan Butter Chicken
description: Warning‚Äîthis dish may have your family wondering if you hired an Italian chef. Inspired by the hills of Tuscany, this creamy, dreamy chicken dish features a rich, buttery white wine sauce enhanced by sweet cherry tomatoes and served with garlicky broccolini and spinach on the side. Mangia!

name: Japanese Style Chicken Katsu Curry
description: Chef Esther's take on a classic chicken katsu with curry is every bit as comforting as what you'd get in Japan. Enjoy a crispy fried chicken cutlet with the rich, Japanese-style vegetable curry and a side of steamed Calrose rice. Don't be surprised if you find yourself craving this dish week after week.

name: Roasted Pork Chili Verde
description: Chef Dustin's take on a classic New Mexican stew. His chile verde is full of bright flavor and traditional ingredients like tomatillos, jalape√±os, and tender roasted pork. The stew is hearty, comforting, and totally crave-worthy, especially when paired with cilantro rice and a sprinkling of salty Cotija cheese.

name: Lions Head Meatballs Grilled Cabbage
description: Now these are not the kind of meatballs you'll find on top of spaghetti. These pork meatballs have been slow-braised to maximize flavor and tenderness in every bite, then are topped with the delectable braising sauce to soak into the nutty brown rice. You have never had meatballs like these, and you will absolutely love them!

name: Chicken In Adobo
description: Savor Chef Stacey's tender braised, boneless, skinless chicken adobo is infused with rich Filipino-inspired flavors, and paired with hearty chickpeas and earthy shiitake mushrooms. The savory sauce perfectly coats every bite, blending the tangy adobo seasoning with wholesome ingredients. Served with fragrant jasmine rice, it‚Äôs a comforting, flavorful meal.

name: Tandoori Spiced Grilled Lamb
description: Succulent and full of warm, aromatic flavors, these tandoori-spiced grilled lamb chops are a treat. Paired with garlicky broccoli and fluffy white rice, this dish offers a perfect balance of smoky, bold flavors and fresh, vibrant textures.

name: Creamy Saag Paneer
description: In Hindi, saag quite literally means ‚Äúgreens.‚Äù Fitting, as the base for this Indian staple comprises of spinach and fenugreek, along with soft pillows of fresh cheese curd known as paneer. Chef Meena brings in a bold kadai sauce made with crushed tomatoes, garam masala, and cream for a velvety finish. Complemented by cumin-spiced basmati rice, it‚Äôs a comforting balance of spice, richness, and warmth.

name: Seared Cod with Quinoa
description: Inspired by one of the favorite fish meal, this version is from fresh cod paired with quinoa, spinach and peas on the side. Cod is seared in vegetable stock with garlic and lemon.

name: al Pastor Chicken Bowl
description: So much good stuff, all in one vibrant Mexican-inspired meal! Atop a hearty base of yellow rice and black beans, Chef Andres plates tender, juicy slices of grilled chicken breast, marinated with chiles, spices, citrus, and pineapple for a touch of sweetness. He pairs it with a tangle of crisp, tangy red-onion encurtidas, a pickled condiment common throughout Mexico and Central America. Stir all the elements of the dish together so you‚Äôll get a bit of each in every bite, then pour on the creamy Avocado-Zucchini sauce and enjoy a delightful fusion of flavor and nutrition.

name: Sichuan Kung Pao Chicken
description: All the same flavor you'd come to expect from Sichuan-style Kung Pao Chicken. Diced chicken thigh is marinated then stir-fried in a spicy, savory sauce alongside zucchini, bell pepper, and toasted peanuts. Served with a side of steamed rice, this fresh take on a take-out favorite makes for a substantial, satisfying meal any night of the week.

name: Dijon Creamy Chicken
description: Chicken breast in a super creamy Dijon mustard pan sauce scented with fresh thyme. Alongside is a yummy and buttery mashed cauliflower and garlicky swiss chard, a hearty leafy green.

name: Zaatar Fish and Chips
description: Roasted cod with pickled onions and kalamata olives to balance out this creamy fish and potato chip.

name: Moroccan Spice Meatballs
description: This is warming, earthy and aromatic Moroccan inspired meal. Ground beef blended with ras el hanout which is a combination of cumin, cinnamon and ginger. Formed into meatballs and served with smoky tomato sauce with couscous.

name: Red Velvet Cake
description: A classic for a reason! Rich red velvet cake‚Äîmade with deep, dark cocoa and a super moist batter‚Äîpairs perfectly with tangy cream cheese buttercream frosting. Anyone who loves this classic Southern sweet will appreciate BCake's version and savor every bite of this cake.

name: Chicken Grain Bowl
description: The LaFrieda Mixed Grain Bowl is a delightful and wholesome meal that combines the goodness of various grains, sweet dried cherries, tender grilled chicken, and a delectable thousand island aioli dressing. This bowl offers a perfect blend of textures and flavors, with a base of nutrient-rich grains like quinoa and farro, providing a satisfying and hearty foundation. On top of the grains, you'll find succulent pieces of seasoned grilled chicken, caramelized onions, edamame, and a colorful bounty of roasted veggies to add flavor and nutrition.

name: Adobo Flank Steak with Broccoli
description: Einat‚Äôs special adobo spice blend is spicy, sweet, and a little smoky. It makes this tender flank steak absolutely irresistible. A cherry tomato vinaigrette with hints of fresh thyme is the perfect tangy accompaniment to cut through rich steak. Paprika-roasted potatoes and broccoli complete this Middle Eastern take on steak and potatoes.

name: My Moms Brisket
description: The only way this tender, oniony brisket could get any better? Pair it with carrots and special sauce. This meal will bring all back mom's dish passed on to many generations.

name: Impossible Meat Burrito Bowl
description: Dive into this vibrant vegan burrito bowl, inspired by the bold flavors of a fast casual chain we won't name, but with a unique twist. Enjoy a base of fluffy cilantro-lime rice paired with savory saut√©ed Impossible meat and hearty Mexican-spiced black beans. The bowl is loaded with colorful fajita veggies, sizzling with the flavors of saut√©ed onions and crisp bell peppers, enhanced with fresh oregano. Topped with a novel green pea salsa that stays bright and fresh, this wholesome, flavorful bowl is a feast for the senses that keeps you coming back for more.

name: Creamy Garlic Spinach Steak
description: Hearty and indulgent, Chef Tracey‚Äôs steak dinner satisfies on every level. She sears flavorful New York strip, then finishes it in a rich, robust cream sauce infused with garlic, umami-rich Parmesan cheese, and spinach. On the side: Tender Israeli couscous tossed with fresh Italian parsley. Add a fresh green salad for crispness, if you like. Or not‚Äîthat‚Äôs okay. Either way, this is the kind of expertly crafted meal you‚Äôll want to order again and again.

name: Classic Kung Pao Fish
description: Chef Esther's take on the classic Chinese dish, Kung Pao, features fish for a lighter twist. Crispy fried fillets of Swai, a delicate white fish, are served with a side of that signature spicy and sweet sauce to drizzle on at home so the fish stays nice and crunchy. Brown rice and stir-fried veggies like zucchini, carrots, and onion are served alongside the fish, with toasted cashews to add a pop of texture on top.

name: Grilled Chicken with Zucchini
description: Grilled chicken with thymed infused veggies such as corn, red bell pepper, onions and zucchini, with a pesto sauce on top. A Perfect mix of flavours, textures and healthiness.

name: Filipino Style Spaghetti Bolognese
description: This Filipino-style spaghetti is a playful new take on classic Italian bolognese. Chef Stacey's version starts with a traditional Italian bolognese recipe but adapts it with staple Filipino ingredients like banana catsup and hot dogs. It‚Äôs meaty, perfectly sweet and savory, and cheesy for the ultimate comfort dish.

name: Rainbow Chicken Pasta Salad
description: Enjoy a balanced, vibrant meal with this pasta salad featuring shredded grilled chicken, tri-color rotini, and an array of vegetables like cucumber, tomato, and celery. Kalamata olives and crumbled feta add more textures and flavors while a lemon dressing brings it all together.

name: Montreal Spice Rubbed Flank Steak
description: If you are looking for savory and earthy flavors in one hearty dish, you got to have this Montreal Spice rub steak. Dusted in Montreal steak seasoning and seared to a juicy finish. Add red Swiss chard, spinach, and peppers saut√©ed with garlic and herbs for a veggie boost on the side.

name: Italian Style Frittata
description: Whether enjoyed for breakfast, brunch, or a light lunch, an Italian frittata with market vegetables is a testament to the beauty of seasonal ingredients and the joy of savoring a wholesome meal. Here, a blend of eggs, creamy Ricotta, and savory Grana Padano cradle fresh asparagus and zucchini, accented with tangy sun-dried tomatoes, zesty onions, and sweet basil. A side of tender, golden-roasted rosemary potatoes completes the meal.

name: Sesame Crusted Fried Chicken
description: There are ordinary fried chicken tenders. Then there are Chef Ahmet‚Äôs‚Äîthey‚Äôre packed with flavor at every stage of the process. First, they take a bath in zesty garlic marinade; then they‚Äôre breaded with richly spiced blend of crunchy Panko and sesame seeds; finally, they‚Äôre deep-fried til gorgeously golden. Use the accompanying cicik‚Äîa Turkish sauce that blends thick, creamy yogurt with fresh dill, garlic, cucumber, Feta cheese, and lemon juice‚Äîas a refreshingly contrasting dip. A side of hearty Turkish potato salad‚Äîtender red-skinned potatoes, red bell pepper, and onion, and lots of fresh dill and parsley‚Äîcompletes this indulgent treat.

name: Herbed Balsamic Chicken
description: Grill chicken to perfection, covered, over medium heat then drizzle with balsamic vinegar. Served with spinach and tomatoes.

name: Lemon Rosemary Grilled Chicken Thighs
description: Nutritious meets delicious. Chef Chase gives juicy chicken thighs the flavors of the Mediterranean thanks to a lemon, rosemary, and balsamic vinegar marinade. The chicken is grilled to perfection and served alongside a delicious summertime salad of nutty farro, delicate zucchini, and sweet cherry tomatoes. Served with a side of sweet, rich white balsamic vinaigrette to drizzle atop the whole dish, this is the definition of healthy yet satisfying food.

name: Mexican Style Beef Stew
description: This flavorful Mexican-style beef stew is made with traditional spices and chiles, along with an array of seasonal vegetables that add freshness and texture to every spoonful.

name: Mexican Tofu Burrito Bowl
description: Inspired by all the flavors of a Mexican burrito, this tofu bowl features seasoned baked tofu and veggies like corn and roasted peppers, all on a bed of rice and black beans. A creamy, dreamy avocado sauce rounds out this delicious and healthy plant-based meal.

name: Dilled Salmon Barley Bowl
description: Aromatic dill and rich salmon are a match made and in culinary heaven. In this Hawaiian poke-inspired bowl, dill-marinated roasted salmon is plated atop a bed of mixed greens and nutty pearled barley, which gets cooked in the style of sushi rice to create a perfect base for the bowl. The bowl is garnished with radish, roasted peanuts and sesame seeds, along with a tangy soy-sesame dressing to tie all the elements together in harmony.

name: Pesto Chicken Breast
description: This dish is a forever favorite for a reason‚Äîgarlicky basil pesto and seared chicken breast belong together. The pesto chicken is paired with crispy roasted potatoes, as well as a simple baby kale side salad with cherry tomatoes and parmesan to round out this wholesome meal.

name: Seared Soy Butter Barramundi
description: For this exquisitely balanced and nutritious meal, Chef Esther sears the mild, white-fleshed fish, then glazes it in a savory, umami-rich sauce of butter and light soy sauce (there‚Äôs extra on the side for drizzling). Bonus: Barramundi is sustainably farmed and rich in heart-healthy omega-3s. She serves each fillet atop a bed of tri-color quinoa and fluffy white rice, with tender-crisp saut√©ed napa cabbage and bok choi on the side. High in protein and good-for-you fats, this meal will keep you energized without weighing you down.

name: Classic Shrimp Caesar Salad
description: A family favorite and guaranteed crowd-pleaser. Chef Cedric's version of classic caesar salad is all about the handmade creamy dressing, which blows the store-bought stuff out of the water. Crisp romaine lettuce, succulent shrimp, shavings of salty parmesan cheese, and crunchy croutons complete the dish.

name: Chicken Corn Korma
description: White chicken tikka gets marinated in cream and cardamom before being finished in a slightly spiced corn curry. Served alongside green peas pulao, a fluffy and fragrant rice pilaf, Chef Aarthi‚Äôs chicken curry makes quite the mighty meal.

name: Cannery Row Rose
description: Cannery Row Rose is a refreshing wine from Scheid Vineyards, perfect for warm days and casual gatherings. It's a delightful option for those looking for a lighter beverage with vibrant flavors.

name: Caprese Ravioli
description: Indulge in the perfect blend of Italian flavors with this delightful dish. Caprese ravioli, filled with creamy ricotta cheese, takes center stage, paired with the signature Vodka sauce. Topped with a luscious balsamic onion marmalade, the dish is elevated to new heights. The addition of grated Parmesan cheese adds a satisfying savory finish. Enjoy a taste of Italy with every bite of this Caprese ravioli masterpiece.

name: Potato Peas Samosa
description: Chef Aarthi presents her take on the beloved potato and peas samosa, now served alongside with a fresh arugula and cherry tomatoes' salad. The crispy and aromatic pastry is also complemented by the tangy sweetness of mango chutney and the creamy kick of masala yogurt sauce. This meal brings a burst of flavors that will leave your taste buds craving for more.

name: Mojo De Ajo Steak with Chimichurri
description: Chef Akhtar has perfected his flank steak on the grill, and the secret is a zesty, garlicky mojo de ajo marinade that really makes the dish. A classic cilantro chimichurri sauce is the perfect pairing for this double portion of steak that will make busy days that much easier.

name: Filet Mignon and Creamed Leeks
description: Indulge in Chef Dustin's carefully crafted dish, which is worthy of a fancy restaurant but served to you in the comfort of your very own kitchen. It features a perfectly cooked petite filet mignon, tender and juicy, paired with silky truffled mashed potatoes and delicately creamed leeks. This dish is a testament to refined simplicity, offering a symphony of flavors that elevate the dining experience.

name: Malabar Shrimp Biryani
description: A layered rice dish with jumbo shrimp is flavored with saffron, turmeric and an array of Indian spices. This dish is for those who loves the exotic spices of India. To tone down the heat a side of cool tomato raita will be provided.

name: Creamy Browned Butter Pasta
description: Craving something new and exciting? Chef Vanessa‚Äôs inventive vegetarian pasta dish is a meal like you‚Äôve never had before. She tosses curly campanelle pasta, charred fresh corn, grilled cauliflower, and peppery arugula in a creamy sauce made with sweet pureed parsnip, rich browned butter, and fresh lemon juice. It‚Äôs smooth, rich, creamy, and nutty‚Äîwithout cream or nuts. Finished with shaved Parmesan for umami, this creative pasta dish is hearty, satisfying, and totally addictive.

name: Chicken Pretzel Sliders
description: Gooey white cheddar cheese piled on to pretzel burger. Ground chicken is blended with worcestershire sauce and garlic. Crunchy slaw with cabbage, carrots and dill for a perfect side.

name: Eggplant Involtini
description: In Italian, Involtini means 'little bundles'. And this dish is exactly that. The flavors of lemon and thyme in the ricotta cheese pervade the eggplant shells, all of which melt together with the fresh tomato and cream sauce base, a perfect combination in this vegetarian dish.

name: Tahini Short Rib Tacos
description: These are amazing tacos prepared by Tony! Try them out with his twist, you won't regret it.

name: Mothers Day Flower Cookies
description: Our Mother's Day sugar cookie set is a wonderful treat to celebrate and appreciate all the amazing moms out there. Each delicious, buttery cookie is cut out in a flower shape‚Äîperfect for your mom, grandmother, or any special mother figure in your life. It's a thoughtful and delicious way to show your love and appreciation.

name: Cajun Salmon Fettuccine Alfredo
description: Cajun blackened salmon filet with creamy fettuccine alfredo and fresh tomato bruschetta, served with a half grilled lemon.

name: Sesame Salmon
description: Amazing meal of salmon with combinations of sesame oil, honey and tamari sauce to make a punchy sweet sauce for this healthy fish meal.

name: Brazilian Style Fish Stew
description: Indulge in a South American culinary delight with Chef's special fish stew, a symphony of flavors featuring cumin, coriander, and creamy coconut milk. Served elegantly on a bed of fragrant coconut basmati rice, this dish promises a journey of exotic tastes that will transport you to the heart of South America.

name: Arroz Chaufa Peruvian Fried Rice
description: Arroz Chaufa is a popular dish in the Chinese-Peruvian fusion cuisine called Chifa. This dish is a perfect illustration of Chifa cooking, which originated when Chinese immigrants came to Peru in the late 19th and early 20th centuries. The fusion fried rice is protein-packed featuring chicken, shrimp, pork belly, and egg, all stir fried alongside veggies in a sweet-and-savory sauce. Experience a perfect marriage of cultures, cuisines, and ingredients, all in one delicious package.

name: Beetroot Feta and Fennel Risotto
description: Roast beets, traditional risotto, glazed fennel, deep sage, lumps of feta.

name: Traditional Slow Roasted Lamb Vegetables
description: Maqluba literally translates to 'upside-down', since the layered Middle Eastern rice dish is traditionally served upside down at the table. Chef Daniel recreates it for you to enjoy at home with layers of deeply spiced, slowed-cooked lamb shoulder and flavorful rice pilaf packed with vegetables like eggplant, cauliflower, and potatoes, as well as Middle Eastern spices like cumin, cinnamon, and allspice.

name: Caribbean Vegetable Curry
description: Take your taste buds on a dish to the Caribbean with this vibrant and nutritious meal. The star of the dish is the Caribbean-inspired curry sauce, carefully crafted from a blend of herbs and spices, to infuse vegetables like sweet potatoes, broccoli, zucchini, and corn with a rich and aromatic flavor. But the real showstopper here is the Jerk spiced roasted cauliflower. The cauliflower is coated in a flavorful blend of spices, including allspice, thyme, and scotch bonnet peppers and roasted to crispy perfection. To complete this wholesome vegetarian meal, the curry is served with nutty and aromatic tricolor quinoa.

name: Thai Tri Color Quinoa and Veggie Bowl
description: This vegan bowl is so many things: colorful, healthy, and flavorful, putting Chef Andres' favorite 'super grain', quinoa, in the spotlight. With its addictive Thai peanut dressing, an assortment of veggies including kale, snap peas, and carrots, and a perfect crunch from cashews, this quinoa salad is filling and fresh all at the same time.

name: Sweet Chili Chicken Bowl
description: This is a harmonious mash up of Chef Esther's classic Korean flavors and a Mexican burrito bowl. Steamed Calrose rice enhanced with butter, cilantro, and lime form the foundation for irresistible sweet chili marinated-then-grilled chicken thighs. The burrito-inspired rice bowl gets topped with tender edamame, sweet corn, shredded mozzarella, fresh sliced avocado, and a zesty lime sour cream. Mix, mix, mix and enjoy!

name: Nigerian Efo Stew
description: A staple across southern Nigeria, efo stew is known for its vibrant use of greens. Here, Chef Kendra starts with red bell peppers, fiery habaneros, and sweet tomatoes, simmered into a rich, savory sauce. Slow-cooked turkey brings smoky depth, while fresh spinach wilts into the mix, adding the bright contrast that defines this beloved dish.

name: Garlic Mashed Potatoes
description: The velvety richness of Chef John DeLucie's creamy, garlicky mashed potatoes makes them the ideal companion for any meal. Crafted from Yukon Gold potatoes, whole milk, heavy cream, butter, and garlic, they are meticulously prepared then finished with a drizzle of olive oil for a fresh finish. Elevate any dining experience with this delectable side.

name: Mediterranean Chicken Thighs with Artichokes
description: Pan-seared boneless chicken thighs are served on a bed of crispy Tuscan kale, saut√©ed artichokes, tomatoes, and roasted red peppers. Topped with tangy crumbled feta cheese and a flavorful green romesco sauce, this dish is packed with all the flavors of the Mediterranean.

name: Steak and Black Bean Quesadillas
description: Baked quesadillas instead of pan fried, layered with seared steak, black beans and cheesy cheddar for extra melt. Tomatillos added that is roasted, firm and green for a tangy salsa.

name: Grilled Chicken with Truffle Mashed Potatoes
description: Delicious and gourmet! A perfectly grilled chicken breast with truffle-infused savory, creamy mashed potatoes and saut√©ed mushrooms is simple enough to satisfy yet nuanced enough to impress.

name: Italian Sausage Naan Pizza
description: Italian Sausage Naan Pizza is a fusion dish combining the rich flavors of Italian sausage with the soft, chewy texture of naan bread. Topped with marinara sauce, melted mozzarella, and a sprinkle of herbs, it's a quick and flavorful twist on traditional pizza, offering a satisfying blend of savory, spicy, and cheesy goodness.

name: Salmon Buddha Bowl
description: This Thai-inspired Buddha Bowl features marinated and baked salmon on a bed of fluffy quinoa and spinach. The delicate salmon is surrounded by edamame, shredded red cabbage, julienned carrots, thinly sliced cucumbers, and red bell peppers. Drizzled with a creamy coconut lime dressing and garnished with cilantro, scallions, and mint, this vibrant and nutritious bowl is perfect for a healthy, flavorful meal any day or night of the week.

name: French Toast with Berry Compote
description: Brioche is a classic French bread known for its rich, tender crumb and slightly sweet flavor, thanks to its high butter and egg content. To make his decadent French toast, Chef John DeLucie starts with thick slices soaked in a mixture of eggs, whole milk, heavy cream, vanilla extract, and a touch of cinnamon. This process ensures that the bread becomes infused with flavor and wonderfully custardy when griddled. He serves a hearty portion with sweet mixed-berry compote and tangy, creamy mascarpone cheese (cream cheese‚Äôs Italian cousin), whipped with maple syrup and cinnamon. It all adds up to the perfect treat-yourself weekend breakfast. Mimosas optional, but strongly encouraged.

name: Grilled Chicken Quinoa Bowl
description: Savor the flavors of Mexico with this vibrant quinoa bowl. Tender, garlicky grilled chicken breast is paired with a zesty blend of tri-color quinoa, tomato, red onion, jalape√±o peppers, and fresh arugula. Drizzled with a tangy romesco sauce and topped with cilantro and green onion, this wholesome and delicious meal is the perfect choice for those seeking a healthy and satisfying Mexican-inspired dish.

name: Griddled Sesame Tofu
description: Junzi Kitchen's griddled sesame tofu is an all-time favorite of their customers‚Äîand we're talking vegans, meat lovers, and everyone in between. This dish is all about the sauce; an umami-packed sesame sauce packs sweet and savory flavors just a little kick of spice. The sauce helps give tender tofu a delicious crust when griddled, and sides of simply saut√©ed bok choy and nutty brown rice make the dish complete.

name: Grilled Yuzu Honey Pork
description: For a healthier grilled variation of traditional panko-breaded and fried pork katsu don, Chef Mike grills juicy pork tenderloin and slathers it in a tangy yuzu, honey, and umami-rich soy sauce glaze. The sweet and savory sauce is a perfect complement to the pork's smoky grilled char (and there‚Äôs extra for drizzling). He serves it over a bed of fluffy rice with refreshingly crisp baby Bibb lettuce. This meal is a light yet totally satisfying combination you‚Äôll crave again and again.

name: Southern Low Country Boil with Shrimp
description: Enjoy an authentic and comforting taste of the South. Cajun-spiced shrimp, clams, corn, potatoes, and the traditional hard-boiled eggs are all boiled low and slow in Cajun seasonings until each element is perfectly cooked. The seafood boil is served alongside buttery rice studded with tender pieces of lobster meat for even more richness. Chef Santiago captures the essence of the region and the seafood boil tradition in this comforting dish.

name: Jamdown Jerk Shrimp and Rice
description: Inspired by a favorite meal from a trip to the Caribbean, Chef Aarthi‚Äôs spicy jerk shrimp is served with coconuty rice and red kidney beans, along with sweet roasted plantains and a side of cabbage. It‚Äôs simply full of flavor and oh so satisfying.

name: Salmon with Herb Potatoes
description: Salmon covered with lobster sauce with herbed potatoes on the side. This combination is totally amazing healthy meal for you.

name: Blackened Mahi Mahi Sandwich
description: This Blackened Mahi Mahi Sandwich is a collaboration between Bravo‚Äôs Summer House star Lindsay Hubbard and CookUnity Chef Kristy Flores and is inspired by Lindsay‚Äôs hometown of Hobe Sound, Florida where she grew up eating many seafood-based meals, especially Mahi.
chef: Lindsay Hubbard x Chef Kristy Flores

name: Keto Philly Cheesesteak Bowl
description: All the things you love about a Philly cheesesteak, packed into a keto-friendly bowl of goodness! Thinly sliced ribeye is seared with a mix of bell peppers and onions, then served up with a creamy provolone sauce and garnished with fresh Italian parsley.

name: Persian Frittata
description: Perfect for brunch, a hearty lunch, or even breakfast for dinner, Chef Einat‚Äôs savory blend of spiced eggs, fresh herbs, and vibrant vegetables is both satisfying and unique. She pairs it with a refreshing labneh dill sauce to elevate each bite with rich, creamy contrast. Treat yourself to a culinary adventure and enjoy a taste of Yemen in every forkful!

name: Crispy Sesame Crusted Chicken Tenders
description: A nostalgic childhood favorite, all grown up. Crispy chicken tenders get a boost of flavor from a savory panko breadcrumb coating flecked with sesame seeds and parmesan cheese. Fried to golden brown perfection, then served with a zesty ginger-garlic soy dipping sauce, the chicken tenders are accompanied by a cauliflower mash that's creamy and rich, but a little lighter than the usual potatoes. This dish has all the same comforting flavors and textures from your childhood, just kicked up a notch.

name: Spicy Coconut Shrimp
description: A flavorfull dish from Southeast Brazil as known as 'Moqueca'. Shrimp and various spices simmered in creamy tomato coconut sauce to be poured over rice. A family staple recipe not to be missed!

name: Comforting Chicken Roganjosh
description: Warm up any weeknight with Chef Aarthi‚Äôs delectable Kashmiri-style chicken curry. Tender boneless chicken thighs are braised in rich Roganjosh gravy, which features a savory blend of tomatoes, onion, ginger, garlic, chiles, fragrant spices, and a touch of creamy, tangy Greek yogurt. It‚Äôs accompanied by a side of spicy roasted cauliflower, basmati rice, and peas for a pretty pop of color and freshness. This is Chef Aarthi's comfort cooking at its finest!

name: Roasted Salmon and Sauteed Haricot Verts
description: You'll savor every last bite of this crisp roasted skin-on salmon fillet. The perfectly cooked fish is flaky, buttery, and delicious, especially when paired with delicious sides. Saut√©ed haricots verts, golden-roasted pee wee potatoes, and buttery leeks in a cream sauce make this elegant dish a well-balanced meal.

name: Lasagna Bolognese
description: As a chef, Chris really loves making lasagnas. He says, ‚ÄúThey truly are an expression of love‚Äù, and this one is will make meat lovers rejoice. He makes his bolognese in the classic style by slow cooking beef, sausage, and ground pork along with onion, carrots, celery, garlic, tomato, white wine, and stock. Once simmered to perfection, the bolognese is layered up with fresh pasta, house-made roasted tomato sauce, b√©chamel, and fresh basil to complete this masterpiece of chef love. This meal does well in both the microwave or the oven, just depends on if you prefer the cheese on top more on the crispy side. A tip from Chef Chris: if you go the oven-route, microwaving it for two minutes first cuts down baking time significantly.

name: Turmeric Tamarind Glazed Salmon
description: Inspired by a dish Chef Aarthi had while traveling in Thailand, this meal is an ode to those flavors but mixed in with Indian influence. Salmon is glazed with a sweet-tart tamarind and turmeric glaze then roasted to tender perfection. Served with roasted zucchini and steamed sushi rice, this dish is light enough for warmer weather but still hearty enough to fill you up and leave you satisfied.

name: Traditional Beef Bourguignon
description: We love any excuse to eat buttery egg noodles, so why not hook ‚Äòem up with a savory French classic? Chef Chris‚Äô ‚ÄúBeef B‚Äù is loaded with a half-pound of deliciously marbled beef chuck that‚Äôs been hand-diced, seared, then slow-cooked with freshly diced veggies, mushrooms, tomatoes, red wine and herbs. That beef is braised for hours until perfectly tender and then finished with a touch of butter (the French way!) This is beef stew 2.0. Chef Chris highly recommends heating this meal in the microwave.

name: Vegan Chorizo Chili Quesadilla
description: Savor an explosion of flavors that will leave you asking, 'Wait, is this really vegan?' Chef Ivy takes her beloved vegan chorizo and black chili and builds it into a hearty quesadilla, packed with vegan cheddar cheese and griddled in a gluten-free flour tortilla. A vibrant pico de gallo adds a burst of freshness, while the tangy vegan chile-lime crema enhances the whole meal.

name: Chicken Enchiladas with Tomatillo Sauce
description: Charred tomatillos, garlic, and serranos are the stars of the enchilada sauce in this dish. The acidity from these Mexican green tomatoes makes for a garden fresh flavor balanced by some heat from serrano peppers. The enchiladas are made by rolling corn tortillas around a flavorful filling of braised chicken thighs and pepperjack cheese, then dousing them in that tasty tomatillo sauce. Sides of red rice and charro beans make the meal complete alongside crema fresh to cool down any heat from the enchiladas.

name: Chicken Paillard
description: Introducing the perfect summer dish ‚Äî for any time of year. Chef Cedric grills a seasoned, juicy chicken breast and serves it alongside a Mediterranean orzo pasta salad and baby arugula for a bright, fresh meal. Grilled lemon brings all the verdant brightness together.

name: Spaghetti Aglio E Olio with Shrimp
description: Chef Cedric's Southern Italian-inspired pasta dish will delight your senses. Traditional spaghetti aglio e olio is as simple as pasta gets‚Äîwith just garlic, olive oil, and a pinch of red pepper‚Äîbut it really lets the high quality ingredients shine. Chef levels the dish up with shrimp, plus a squeeze of lemon, fresh parsley, and parmesan on top. Take your tastebuds on a trip to the Italian coast!

name: Honey Mustard Chicken with Sliced Almonds
description: Sweet, savory, and a little nutty, this almond chicken is bursting with flavor and a will be welcome addition to your recipe rotation. The honey mustard adds a zippy, slightly sweet spin you will love!

name: Chicken Parmesan Burger
description: An Italian-American classic burger made with chicken patties. Get a boost from our tasty flavorful marinara and a mozzarella-provolone cheese blend.

name: Filet Mignon with Gorgonzola Cream Sauce
description: Chef DeLucie's filet mignon with gorgonzola sauce is a luxurious dish featuring a tender, melt-in-your-mouth steak, grilled to perfection. The filet is served with a rich and creamy gorgonzola sauce made from the Italian cheese, which adds a tangy and sharp contrast to the mild flavor of the beef. On the side, Chef served up simply roasted asparagus and garlicky mashed potatoes to complete this steakhouse-inspired feast.

name: Chicken Tikka Masala and Roasted Chickpea Daal
description: Chef Akhtar puts his own modern spin on traditional Indian cooking. Roasted chicken thighs are paired with a rich creamy masala sauce and Jasmine rice. What separates this dish from the rest (and puts it several notches above your average takeout) is the side of deeply savory, roasted chickpea daal made with Indian spices, cilantro, and fresh lime juice.

name: Ribeye Bulgogi Bibimbap
description: Korean Bibimbap is the ultimate choose-your-own-adventure rice bowl, where every bite yields new flavors and textures. Thin slices of tender ribeye bulgogi are marinated in sweet and savory Korean teriyaki sauce, then wok-fired for flavorful caramelization and hint of smoky char. It‚Äôs piled high on a bed of sticky rice, along with a host of accompaniments: nutty marinated sesame spinach; crisp, sweet-and-sour daikon radish salad; refreshing mung bean sprouts; and soft boiled marinated egg. Homemade gochujang‚ÄîKorea‚Äôs signature red chili paste condiment‚Äîadds a fiery, funky finishing touch. Mix it up and enjoy!

name: Cajun Spiced Fried Turkey Breast
description: Deep-fried turkey is already more delectably moist than its oven-roasted counterpart. Chef Kendra ups the richness and flavor factor even more by injecting a buttery blend of garlic, onion, and Cajun spices into the breasts and letting them marinate overnight before frying. The results are truly chef‚Äôs kiss. She pairs a hearty portion with tender country-style green beans and creamy mashed potatoes. With its delicious holiday vibes, this meal is perfect for a special occasion‚Äîor for savoring some Southern comfort on an ordinary weeknight.

name: Mothers Day Cookie Decorating Kit
description: Our Mother's Day cookie decorating kit is a delightful and creative gift for moms everywhere. It includes a variety of freshly baked cookies in different shapes, such as hearts, flowers, and butterflies. The kit also comes with an assortment of colorful icing and sprinkles. It's a fun activity that can be enjoyed by the whole family, and the finished cookies make for a sweet and heartfelt treat to celebrate Mother's Day. Order one today and make this Mother's Day extra special for your mom!

name: Summer Salmon and Shrimp Pasta
description: Indulge in a delightful dish of fettuccine pasta with grilled salmon and marinated-then-saut√©ed shrimp, tricolor bell peppers, garlic, and basil. Topped with fresh parmesan, this summery meal offers a bright blend of flavors and textures that will transport your tastebuds to the beach, no matter where you are.

name: Lobster Ravioli with Garlic Cream Sauce
description: You'll savor every last bite of this luxuriously rich, restaurant-ready dish! Ravioli filled with tender lobster and creamy ricotta are cooked to a perfect al dente and tossed in a luscious garlic cream sauce with baby spinach for color and freshness.

name: Mushroom Crusted Turkey Cutlets
description: This pasta dish is all about fresh ingredients. The zucchini should be firm and the mushroom is sweet and perfect. There‚Äôs fresh zucchini, mushroom, and basil.

name: Galbi Jjim Korean Short Ribs
description: Galbi-jjim, or braised beef short ribs, is one of the most popular Korean dishes‚Äîand after one bite, you'll understand why. Chef Esther's signature short ribs are fall of the bone-tender in a sweet and savory sauce, topped with crunchy pine nuts and served on a bed of rice alongside roasted Brussels sprouts and sweet potatoes. While this dish is traditionally reserved for special occasions, you get to enjoy it any night of the week.

name: Mushroom Rice In Butternut Squash
description: This is a classic American inspired dish that warming and comforting, perfect for the harvest season and colder months, and deliciously guilt-free! Butternut squash halves are caramelized in the oven with ginger and cinnamon, and served with a wild rice and mushroom stuffing with sage, cranberries and walnuts and a side of garlicky green beans.

name: Rodriguez Grand Slam Breakfast
description: Introducing the "Grand Slam Breakfast" by Chef Fabiola, perfectly crispy bacon, creamy scrambled eggs, and turkey sausages cooked to perfection with a touch of butter. All this served alongside fluffy pancakes and drizzled with pure maple syrup, this breakfast masterpiece is a symphony of flavors that will start your day on a delectable note.

name: Roasted Halibut Lobster Sauce
description: This refined, delectable dish highlights the natural richness of incredible seafood; A luscious lobster, cherry tomato, and white wine sauce pairs beautifully with light, perfectly cooked halibut. Served alongside spiced, roasted sweet potatoes and Brussels sprouts, the dish strikes a harmonious balance between land and sea. Finished with sweet and tangy drop peppers, every bite is an explosion of taste and texture.

name: Thai Basil Chicken Fried Rice
description: This dish is everything you want in fried rice-- aromatic, full of texture and flavor, and just a little spicy. This Thai-inspired dish is colorful thanks to an array of bell peppers and sweet onions, stir-fried with pieces of juicy chicken breast and a sweet, savory, and herbaceous sauce. Just like your favorite takeout dish, but amped up in flavor and freshness!

name: Chicken Breasts with Salsa Verde
description: Jampacked flavors in one meal! It has salty capers, herbs and spices for aroma, and sweet potato fries with salsa verde around for a perfect paleo and gluten-free chicken dinner, a colorful treat for you.

name: Crispy Tofu
description: The flavor and texture of the tofu and the sweet-spicy-salty sauce were a great match. A delicious, simple and solid meal to enjoy tofu.

name: Roasted Ginger Chicken
description: Gently roasted chicken with fragrant brown rice brings Singapore inspired fare to your table.

name: Smoked Salmon Brandade
description: Traditional Portuguese street food with a touch of smoked salmon.

name: Chocolate Hazelnut Overnight Oats
description: A wholesome and balanced breakfast that feels like a treat. Creamy overnight oats are blended with rich cacao, toasted hazelnuts, and flakes of coconut. This bowl is finished with a swirl of raspberry marmalade bringing a bright, tangy finish.

name: Sauteed Lamb and Vegetables
description: Sliced lamb saut√©ed in a creamy coconut milk, candlenut and kaffir lime sauce served with coconut rice.

name: Almond Butter Energy Bites
description: These bites of goodness are made with nuts, seeds, oats, almond butter and chocolate chips. They are nutty, delicious and nutritious and are sure to keep you satiated throughout your fall hiking adventures! Perfect for a New Yorker on the go, busy family or just a snack lover like Chef Emily.

name: Bbq Chicken Bowl
description: This wholesome bowl features marinated-then-grilled BBQ chicken breast, roasted sweet potatoes, and grilled peppers and onions, all on a bed of baby spinach and jasmine rice. Just like your favorite fast casual, but way tastier and better for you, it's ideal for an easy, energizing lunch or dinner. Oh, and it just so happens to be gluten-free, too.

name: Creamy Chicken Bacon Pasta
description: Satisfy your pasta craving with this decadent pasta from Chef Cedric. The dish features al dente penne tossed in a creamy velout√© sauce and topped with pulled chicken breast, crispy bacon, shredded mozzarella cheese, and fresh chives. What more could you want in a dish?

name: Tom Kha Goong Coconut Soup with Shrimp
description: Tom Kha is a traditional Thai soup made with fragrant herbs, spices, and coconut milk. It's one of the most popular Thai soups and bears similarities to hot and sour soup, with just a hint of acid from lime juice. Chef Pimnapat packs the aromatic broth full of tender mushrooms and plump shrimp, then pairs it with a side of steamed jasmine rice to soak up the soup. A sprinkle of fresh cilantro completes the dish.

name: Herb Marinated Hanger Steak
description: It doesn't get much better than hanger steak, one of the most tender cuts of beef, especially when it's marinated with fine herbs and seared to perfection. The steak is accompanied by a classic rice pilaf and French ratatouille, made with layers of thinly-sliced veggies in a light tomato sauce. This is sure to be a new favorite!

name: Green Curried Spring Vegetables
description: This Thai inspired dish features some of my favorite spring vegetables, green beans, snow peas, carrots and spinach in a super herby coconut green sauce. Served with jasmine rice with flax, this is a well balanced, superfood centric seasonal delicious meal!

name: Banana Leaf Pulled Pork Sliders
description: Savor the slow-roasted goodness of Chef Nahika's pulled pork sliders in grilled Hawaiian rolls and set on top of an aromatic banana leaf. Crispy yucca fries and a refreshing side of jicama slaw complete this tropical-inspired meal.

name: Chicken Korma
description: This is one of Chef Raj's favorite dish, and after one taste you'll see why. Savor his take a traditional Mughlai Indian dish where chicken is slowly braised in a creamy sauce flavored with a paste made of onions, spices and yogurt. Once the chicken is super tender and the sauce is rich and creamy, you're ready to enjoy it alongside a side of cumin-scented basmati rice.

name: Flank Steak with 3 Cheese
description: Garlic cooked in olive oil finished crispy brown with additional spices to top over steak. Oil is infused over the meal with a splash of vinegar sprinkled with salt and pepper.

name: Moroccan Beef Couscous Bowl
description: Craving something bold and adventurous? For this flavor-packed meal, Chef Chase serves up succulent, perfectly seasoned roasted beef meatballs spiced with the heat of harissa‚Äîa Moroccan chili pepper paste‚Äîand plates them atop a bed of fragrant turmeric-infused couscous studded with sweet dried cherries. Shredded pickled carrots provide contrasting crispness and briny flavor. Drizzle on the accompanying zhoug‚Äîa spicy Middle Eastern herb sauce that blends fresh cilantro, parsley, and red pepper flakes with extra-virgin olive oil‚Äîfor a bright, pungent kick.

name: American Style Greek Salad with Herbed Chicken Breast
description: Everyone's lunchtime go-to, served just the way you like it. Chef Chase packs his American-style Greek salad full of baby gem lettuce, red onion, tomato, Kalamata olives, cucumber, bell pepper, and pepperoncini. Atop the salad, savor a gorgeous, sliced garlic-and-herb marinated chicken breast and crumbled briny feta cheese. To bring the whole salad together, drizzle in Chef's Greek oregano vinaigrette, toss, and dig in!

name: Chipotle Spicy Curry Tikka with Rice
description: The delicious Indian dish Chicken Tikka Masala gets a new twist with a spicy Chipotle twist. It's like enjoying two favourite dishes in one bite: Chicken Tikka and Chipotle Chicken! This is one of the recipes that unites and showcases Indian culture with a glimpse of Mexican flavors. The smoky flavor of the chipotle meets the Tikka Masala and gives it that smoky flavors, a delicious dish that is definitely not to be missed.

name: Creamy Miso Udon Noodles with Salmon
description: This is a Japanese-inspired dish utilized udon noodles with a Korean twist. Simply roasted salmon is flaked and tossed in with tender, chewy udon noodles, baby spinach, and cremini mushrooms in a creamy miso sauce. It's everything you love about creamy pasta dishes, but with a Japanese twist and deeply imbued with umami flavor thanks to miso and parmesan cheese.

name: Cornflake Crusted Chicken Cutlet
description: Meet Chef Einat‚Äôs version of comfort food. Her take on an Italian-American chicken cutlet is super crispy thanks to a coating of cornflakes, yet tender and juicy on the inside. The chicken is served with a silk smooth sweet potato mash and a drizzle of smoky, slightly spicy harissa aioli. This dish is sure to be a new family favorite!

name: Mixed Veggie Yaki Udon
description: The springy fresh udon noodles get coated in savory soy koji ‚Äî a magical and all natural salt substitute ‚Äî then stir-fried with loads of fresh veggies. Mushrooms, baby corn, carrots, cabbage, and shishito peppers add fresh and crunchy goodness. Topped with green onions and sesame seeds, this special dish is deeply infused with umami flavor in every bite.

name: Harissa Miso Butternut Squash
description: Chef Einat's Signature Harissa Paste, jazzed up with umami-rich miso, orange juice, and a hint of sweetness from date syrup, beautifully glazes tender roasted butternut squash. Garnished with a crunchy nut and seed topping, let this seasonal side dish sing at your table!

name: Shrimp Scampi Linguine
description: Simply made pasta with white wine, garlic, and grilled lemon is good for any day of the week. Add in succulent seared shrimp and garlicky cream sauce, top with parmesan cheese and fresh parsley, and you've a truly special dish. This is quintessential Italian cooking‚Äîsimple yet elegant, and oh so satisfying!

name: Balsamic Chicken and Veggies
description: This wholesome and colorful meal features tender chicken breast, roasted cherry tomatoes, broccolini, and tricolor quinoa. A zesty Italian herb seasoning enhances the dish, while a tangy balsamic glaze and fresh lemon zest add vibrant flavor and a touch of sweetness. Nutritious, satisfying, and irresistibly delicious this is everything you want in a meal and more!

name: Three Bean Crispy Rice
description: In this dish from Chef Nahika, rice gets the best of both worlds, steamed until fluffy, then grilled until golden and crackly. It‚Äôs studded with a hearty, protein-rich trio of beans, including chickpeas, pintos, and red beans, then drizzled with a tangy soy and lime dressing. Eat it on its own, pile it next to something meaty, or pretend it‚Äôs a side when really, it‚Äôs the main event.

name: Creamy Poblano Chicken
description: You'll love this creamy, dreamy, ultra comforting dish from Chef Garces.
