Adobo spice-rubbed chicken is saut√©ed and tossed in a roasted poblano pepper cream sauce, then served atop toasted fideos ‚Äî a.k.a. crunchy spaghetti noodles ‚Äî and English peas. Paired with roasted butternut squash and buttered broccoli, this unique dish is instantly and endlessly crave-able!

name: Korean Brisket Tacos
description: Chef Esther takes tacos to a whole new level with this dish! Tender brisket is braised to perfection with a hint of spiciness that will keep you coming back for bite after bite, especially once it's tucked into corn tortillas and topped with queso fresco and pickled onions and jalape√±os. Served with a side of cilantro-lime rice and a velvety smooth avocado crema, this dish is simply irresistible.

name: Seared Salmon Rice Bowl
description: Packed with protein, this healthy rice bowl is ideal for any time you‚Äôre craving something fresh. Seared salmon gets served over a bed of steamed jasmine rice with grated carrots, diced cucumbers, pickled onion and radish, edamame, cilantro, and an out-of-this-world toasted black sesame seasoning.

name: Grilled Flank Steak Rice Bowl
description: This hearty, nutritious dish tastes as good as it looks. Featuring tender slices of grilled flank steak on a base of steamed rice infused with cilantro, lime, and butter, it‚Äôs accompanied by a refreshing green cabbage slaw with red onions, sweet corn, and fresh cherry tomatoes. Chef DeLucie‚Äôs creamy avocado dressing ties all the elements together with a little hint of jalape√±o to keep you coming back for more.

name: Classic Croque Monsieur
description: French bistro-style Croque Monsieur sandwiches are Chef Cedric's ideal comfort food. This classic French staple features layers of cured, smoked ham, Swiss cheese, Dijon mustard, and creamy b√©chamel, all piled between two slices of buttery toasted brioche bread. To keep it balanced, Chef serves up the rich sandwich alongside a bright, crunchy fris√©e salad with cherry tomatoes and a simple vinaigrette. Bon app√©tit!

name: Korean Beef Japchae
description: Japchae was once a dish reserved for royalty. Now, this celebratory stir-fry is a beloved Korean staple. Chewy, sweet potato noodles are combined with a colorful mix of stir-fried vegetables, like mushrooms, carrots, and spinach, alongside delicate slices of marinated beef. Tossed in a savory-sweet soy sauce, it‚Äôs finished with a toasty topping of sesame seeds.

name: Hanger Steak
description: A classic, made as healthy as possible. Hanger steak cooked to perfection with a red wine and balsamic sauce made out of delicious onions and on top of roasted potatoes.

name: Mango Grilled Pineapple Sticky Rice
description: Indulge in a tropical delight with Chef Dustin's grilled pineapple and mango sticky rice. This luscious dessert combines the smoky sweetness of grilled pineapple with the succulent richness of traditional Thai mango sticky rice. The creamy coconut-infused rice is perfectly balanced by the caramelized pineapple and the tender mango, creating a harmonious balance of flavors and textures that will transport you to the tropics.

name: Mediterranean Spiced Shrimp with Romesco Sauce
description: This dish has it all: plancha-grilled shrimp flavored with Spanish spices, fresh shaved vegetables, and a saffron-infused farro and chickpea salad, all topped with toasted hazelnut-and-sweet pepper Romesco sauce. A balanced and deeply savory dish with layers of texture.

name: Middle Eastern Empanada Sambusac
description: Savor the flavors of the Middle East with our Sambusac, a baked pastry similar to an empanada stuffed with spiced chickpeas and caramelized onions. Paired with our unique Zhugichurri Sauce, a bold fusion of zesty chimichurri and spicy, herby zhug, it‚Äôs a flavor-packed experience like no other. This dish combines authentic culinary tradition with modern innovation for a delightful twist in a comforting snack. Perfect for sharing or indulging, let the fusion of flavors transport your taste buds!

name: Baked Rigatoni Pomodoro with Whipped Ricotta
description: If a classic Italian meal is what you're seeking, look no further! Al dente rigatoni mezzi are tossed in Chef Forgione's classic Pomodoro tomato sauce, studded with dollops of whipped ricotta, then baked for crunchy edges and a creamy center. Topped with basil pesto and toasted Panko breadcrumbs mixed with Italian herbs, you can share this dish with even the pickiest eaters in your family, but fair warning, you just may not want to.

name: Vegan Mapo Tofu
description: A hearty plant-based twist on one of the most popular Sichuan dishes. Silky tofu cubes are simmered in a rich, spicy sauce made with miso and fermented black beans, along with hot red and Sichuan peppers. This meatless version features oyster mushrooms mixed with garlic and ginger. It‚Äôs served with tender broccoli and rice to balance the intensity.

name: Shrimp In Creamy Poblano Sauce
description: A typical Mexican meal made just for you by Chef Santos. Succulent shrimp are bathed in a rich cream sauce featuring poblano and jalape√±o peppers. A little cream cheese makes the sauce extra rich and delicious. This delightful dish is served alongside fragrant jasmine rice, fresh cherry tomatoes, and a squeeze of lemon on top for zesty balance.

name: Greek Beef Eggplant Moussaka
description: A traditionally inspired Moussaka with Chef Einat‚Äôs Middle Eastern influence. Her signature harissa-infused tomato sauce is balanced by the creaminess of mashed potatoes and a silky b√©chamel that‚Äôs elevated with cinnamon. Sumac-macerated red onions brighten the dish‚Äôs rich flavors.

name: Crumbed Thai Fish Cakes with Vermicelli Noodles
description: Chef Stacy serves up Thai-style fish cakes, infused with kaffir lime and ginger, and crusted in a golden panko crumb. They‚Äôre served alongside vermicelli noodles, tangy pickled daikon and carrots, and little gem lettuce. Served with zesty nuoc cham dipping sauce, this dish provides all the right elements to build a lettuce wrap or enjoy in salad form.

name: Grilled Chicken with Truffle Risotto
description: This protein-packed meal is a standout at CookUnity. Chef Ruben created a flavor-packed risotto, with cremini mushrooms, truffle oil, peas, and parmesan cheese. Topped with fresh thyme, this is a comforting dish that we know you‚Äôll love!

name: Southern Blackened Tofu
description: Tofu marinated in tamari with paprika, red pepper, thyme and oregano as blackening season. Best served over Cajun rice top with kidney beans and corn plus veggies on the side.

name: Mushroom Ravioli with Harvest Roasted Veggies
description: Chef Akhtar's serving up a lovely and elegant vegetarian entr√©e to celebrate the best of fall's bounty. Savory mushroom ravioli are served alongside a harvest medley of vegetables including butternut squash, celery root, parsnips, and sweet potatoes, all roasted with cinnamon and brown sugar and topped with a drizzle of balsamic reduction and candied walnuts. Finished with a nutty brown butter-balsamic sauce and sprinkle of pecorino cheese, this dish will delight vegetarians and omnivores alike.

name: Pork Chop In Caramelized Onion Sauce
description: Savor the rich, savory flavors of perfectly seared pork chops topped with a luscious caramelized onion cream sauce. This dish features tender, juicy pork paired with sweet, golden onions and a touch of cream for a luxurious finish. Served with your favorite sides‚Äîcrispy roasted potatoes and Southern-style green beans‚Äîthis is a truly memorable meal that's perfect for weeknights or special occasions.

name: Kale Quinoa Salad
description: Fresh curly kale tossed in quinoa with bits of goat cheese, roasted sweet potatoes and beets, sprinkled with caramelized pecans for that extra crunch. Red onions and a simple dressing give the final touch to this healthy and complete Salad.

name: Spicy Dan Dan Noodles
description: A classic Sichuan dish with heat, creaminess, and texture in every bite. Silky wheat noodles are coated in a spicy sauce made from tahini, soy sauce, chili oil, and pepper. Ground pork adds a rich savory layer, while fresh scallions and bok choy provide a refreshing crunch.

name: Poached Shrimp Salad with Marinated Artichokes
description: Chef Maribel bids farewell to the sad side salad, transforming it into a refreshing, protein-packed main. Here, delicately poached shrimp are added to a vibrant mix of greens, alongside tangy marinated artichokes, crunchy cucumbers, and sweet cherry tomatoes that burst with each bite. It‚Äôs served with a creamy, refreshing, and herby green goddess dressing.

name: Spinach Artichoke Campanelle
description: Chef Lena is raising the bar for vegan comfort cooking with this complex and sophisticated dish. Al dente campanelle pasta is tossed in a rich truffle cream sauce made with cashews and white wine, as well as truffle oil for added umami. Served on a bed of baby spinach and topped with roasted artichoke hearts, meaty king oyster mushrooms and truffle oil-infused bread crumbs, plant-based eats don't get better or more decadent than this.

name: Italian Chicken Rollatini
description: Chef Ruben presents an exciting new take on the same old weeknight chicken dinner. A finely pounded breaded chicken is rolled with ham, cheese, and spinach to give it a gorgeous look and even better taste. Cooked to perfection and paired with familiar favorites like roasted garlic mashed potatoes and simply steamed broccolini, this meal is as good as comfort food gets.

name: Korean Flank Steak Rice Bowl Steak Doep Bap
description: Chef Esther takes on one of the trendiest dishes in Korea ‚Äî steak doep bap ‚Äî which literally translates to 'steak on rice'. The dish consists of a well-seasoned rice bowl topped with thinly sliced strips of teriyaki-marinated flank steak, asparagus, and onion. Drizzle with even more teriyaki sauce and a cool, creamy sesame dressing to enjoy the best possible flavor and texture.

name: Mexican Chicken and Rice Bowl
description: A nutritious, Mexican-inspired bowl, with a touch of family history. Here, Chef Andres pairs tender chicken breast with a spiced mix of black beans and corn, along with fresh spinach and soft rice. It‚Äôs topped with pepperjack cheese, and served alongside his grandmother‚Äôs special salsa macha.

name: Baharat Spiced Beef Pasta
description: A creative fusion of Italian influences and Turkish flavors, there's so much to love about this comforting pasta dish. Ground beef is expertly seasoned with aromatic Baharat spices and generously topped with a flavorful tomato sauce, garlicky brown butter, fresh mint, and creamy yogurt, then served atop al dente cavatappi pasta. A hint of mild spice is enough to tantalize the taste buds and keep you coming back for bite after bite.

name: Steak A La Parrilla with Salsa Criolla
description: Meet the dish Chef Michelle could eat every single week. It‚Äôs uncomplicated with simple ingredients, yet when eaten together, complex and soulful. A very savory dish, it has tender hanger steak with salsa criolla (which is even better than chimichurri in Michelle's opinion), sweet cipollini onions, and roasted mushrooms and butternut squash. The flavors hit all the buttons on your palate.

name: Creamy Poblano Shrimp Enchiladas
description: Perfectly seared shrimp and seasoned peppers and onions are tucked into soft corn tortillas, rolled, and smothered in creamy poblano salsa. The rich enchiladas are then topped with Monterey Jack cheese and broiled to bubbly, melty perfection. It's Mexican-inspired feast of flavors and deliciously unique!

name: Chifa Fried Rice Hanger Steak
description: Peruvian cuisine meets Chinese in this crave-worthy stir fry. Chef Michelle‚Äôs favorite cut of steak, hanger, is stir-fried to perfection alongside seasoned fried rice with fluffy eggs, green onions, and a savory sauce. With just a hint of spice to keep you coming back for more, this dish is sure to become a fast family favorite.

name: Chicken In Korma Style Curry
description: It doesn't get more comforting than this. Chef Akhtar's pairs tender, slow-cooked chicken with a creamy Korma-style curry and ginger and lemon-scented jasmine rice that's tossed with chickpeas and spinach for a pop of color and texture. Get a little bit of both in each bite for total culinary bliss.

name: Sunny Southwest Salad
description: This fully loaded salad is Chef Fabiola's love letter to summer produce. Featuring a colorful menagerie of seasonal gems‚Äî black beans, tomatoes, corn, cucumbers, red onions, and more‚Äî all dressed in a tangy avocado ranch dressing and finished with crispy tortilla strips and shredded pepper jack cheese. This salad is as gorgeous as it is delicious!

name: Sweet Corn Chorizo Cachapas
description: These sweet corn cachapas‚Äîsavory Venezuelan pancakes made from freshly ground corn kernels‚Äîwill take your taste buds on a culinary adventure. Here, they provide the backdrop for black bean pur√©e, adobo-spiced chorizo, and roasted poblano pepper rajas. Fresh mozzarella adds a cheesy layer, while a creamy guasacaca sauce, made from avocado and cilantro, ties everything together.

name: Dijon Mustard Chicken Thighs
description: Everything has just a little extra flavor and flair in this dish, from the succulent boneless chicken thighs seasoned with Dijon mustard and Worcestershire sauce to the creamy mashed potatoes infused with fresh basil to the charred, honey-roasted carrots. Spice it up even more with a grainy mustard sauce.

name: Creamy Cajun Chicken Pasta
description: Hungry for comfort food at its finest? With its irresistible combination of flavors and textures, Chef Tracey‚Äôs indulgent, hearty pasta dish totally delivers. The kick of tender, Cajun-seasoned chicken breast is perfectly contrasted by a rich, creamy garlic-Parmesan sauce. They‚Äôre both tossed together with al dente bowtie pasta then showered with parsley for a pop of freshness and color. This is the kind of crave-worthy meal you‚Äôll order again and again.

name: French Burrito
description: Chef Cedric's version of a popular Mexican street food, this burrito is made of inspired French bistro classic ingredients. A large flour tortilla is loaded with seasoned ground beef, French fries, grilled onions, white pepperjack cheese, and an authentic 'au poivre' sauce. Enjoy a little taste of Paris-meet-Mexico‚Äîit's bound to be a delicious one.

name: Crepes with Cherry Filling
description: These delicious crepes with fresh cherry spread are a delightful treat for breakfast, dessert, or an anytime snack. The crepes are light, thin, and fluffy‚Äîjust like they should be. The spread, made with the season‚Äôs best sour cherries, is tangy, tart, and sweet. And the fluffy Chantilly cream adds a touch of richness and indulgence.

name: Award Winning Chicken Biryani
description: Chef Aarthi‚Äôs version of the iconic chicken biryani brings delicate notes of caramelized onions, fragrant mint, rose water, and saffron. Refresh your palate between bites with dried cranberries and a side of cucumber-mint raita. This is the famous version that won a food competition on a national television network!

name: Strawberry Rose Pistachios Hand Pies
description: Perfect for Valentine‚Äôs Day or any romantic occasion, this delicious vegan pastry is inspired by the flavors of traditional Persian Love Cake.

name: Spice Roasted Cauliflower
description: This dish is firing on all cylinders. The cauliflower is coated in a spice rub inspired by Chef Dan‚Äôs days working with Indian cuisine and it is paired with roasted apples, fennel and celery root. The maple-tahini dressing compliments the whole dish with its sweet, sour and savory notes. A healthy vegetarian dish with a lot of complexity that is vegan as well.

name: Teriyaki Organic Chicken Breast
description: Meet your new weeknight favorite meal! This dish is composed of crispy seared chicken breast and a beautiful, bright rainbow medley of broccoli, asparagus, and bell peppers, all cooked together in a one-pan wonder. A tangy teriyaki sauce ties the entire dish together in sweet-and-savory harmony. Eating well has never been so simple or tasted so good!

name: Zaatar Chicken Rice Bowl
description: This tantalizing addition to Chef Jose Garces‚Äôs line-up features succulent grilled chicken thighs seasoned with za‚Äôatar and Aleppo chili on a bed of fragrant yellow rice infused with turmeric and black pepper. Complimenting this flavorful duo are chickpeas stewed in richly spiced vegetable stock and a refreshing marinated cucumber salad with tomatoes and Kalamata olives, all drizzled with a zesty, creamy white sauce that blends sour cream, tahini, lemon, garlic, and tangy sumac. This dish is a celebration of vibrant Middle Eastern flavors‚Äîgo ahead, treat your taste buds!

name: Soba Noodle Salad with Chicken
description: A delicious Korean-inspired cold soba noodle salad. The nutty soba noodles are served chilled accompanied by Chef Esther's signature kimchi as well as cucumbers, grated carrots, shredded chicken, and a tangy bibimbap sauce. These noodles are refreshing yet super satisfying for lunch or a lighter dinner!

name: Seared Heritage Pork Chop
description: Indulge in a deluxe dining experience with this seared heritage pork chop, cooked to perfection with a caramelized crust and tender, juicy meat. The pork chop is served alongside creamy mashed potatoes, a rich charcuterie sauce, and fresh peas.

name: Lentil Bolognese Bucatini
description: Classic comfort, with a plant-based twist‚ÄîChef Art Smith takes the hearty Italian pasta dish and reimagines it with savory lentils, gently simmered with aromatic vegetables in a rich, zesty, basil-accented tomato sauce to develop deep flavor. He serves it over al dente bucatini‚Äîthick, hollow strands that capture the sauce perfectly. It‚Äôs a crave-worthy addition to any week-night meal routine‚Äîand, with two-thirds your daily protein and fiber, one you can feel great about enjoying.

name: Spicy Mexican Chorizo Burrito
description: Ditch the fast-casual chain in favor of this absolutely flavor-packed burrito from Chef Akhtar. His burrito is chock full of crumbled spicy Mexican-style chorizo cooked with poblano peppers, saut√©ed onions and bell peppers, black beans, and pepperjack cheese. All of this goodness is piled into a soft flour tortilla and served up with sides of sour cream and guacamole. What more could you want?!

name: Jamdown Jerk Chicken
description: It all starts with Chef Aarthi‚Äôs addictive, spiced marinade. Then the marinated chicken legs are grilled over an open fire before being finished with a side of coconut rice, beans, and roasted plantains. Think: salty, sweet, transportive ‚Äî like a tasty trip to the Caribbean on a plate.

name: Sweet Tea Brined Fried Chicken
description: Warning: Chef Michelle's fried chicken may ruin you for all other fried chicken. First, she brines the chicken in sweet tea overnight, which adds moisture and just a touch of sweetness. When it's ready to go, the chicken gets dipped in buttermilk, flour and spices, and fried until golden for flavor in every bite. It's served up in the classic style with mashed potatoes and luscious homemade gravy. What more could you want?

name: Chili Ginger Prawns
description: Fresh prawns are seared and glazed in a spicy chili sauce made with ginger, butter, lime juice, and Sambal, an Indonesian chili paste. The sticky, saucy shrimp are served with Chinese broccoli, aromatic garlic Jasmine rice, and a side of flavorful sweet chili-peanut sauce. This dish brings the heat and is guaranteed to spice up any weeknight!

name: Pork Milanese with Onions and Peppers Agrodolce
description: Crispy on the outside, and juicy on the inside, Chef John puts his own irresistible spin on classic Pork Milanese. A tender pork chop cutlet is pounded until thin, breaded, and fried until crispy and golden brown, then topped with saut√©ed onions and peppers that have been cooked down in a sweet-and-sour champagne vinegar gastrique sauce. Served alongside creamy mashed Yukon gold potatoes, cider sauce, and a bed of peppery baby arugula, this is homestyle Italian cooking in your very own kitchen.

name: Chicken Cobb Salad
description: Hearty and filling, instant classic chicken cobb salad. A combination of greens, corn, black beans and guacamole with chicken breast on top paired with green goddess dressing.

name: Yemenite Shrimp Curry
description: Sit down to a bowl of this flavor-packed shrimp curry. Chef Einat‚Äôs coconut milk-based curry is flavored with spicy chilis, tangy lemon confit, and Hawaij, a Yemenite spice blend. Succulent shrimp, fresh snap peas and blistered jalape√±os adorn the curry, which sits atop a bed of fluffy Jasmine rice.

name: Roasted Bone In Pork Chop
description: Craving a creative take on a classic meat-and-potatoes combination? Done! Indulge in the hearty flavors of Chef Kevin‚Äôs juicy bone-in pork chop, impeccably grilled to tender, succulent perfection. It‚Äôs sauced with a tantalizing blend of cinnamon-infused apple sauce, tangy cider vinegar, and honey, complemented with a side of roasted Rainbow Fingerling Potatoes tossed in a light vinaigrette of extra virgin olive oil, rosemary, and thyme. A sprinkling of fresh chives brings it all together. Add steamed green beans or asparagus if you‚Äôd like an extra side of vegetables.

name: Spiced Chicken with Roasted Broccoli
description: This meal is inspired by Mediterranean flavors. Chef Ruben's version of spiced chicken is so comforting. Chicken breasts are coated in poppy and sesame seeds then pan-seared and finished in the oven. They‚Äôre served over a rich and creamy pan sauce ‚Äî made with sun-dried tomatoes, capers, and cream cheese. Parmesan-roasted broccoli with olives completes the meal.

name: Rustic Humita with Butternut Squash
description: From the Andes all the way to New York, Chef Maia has brought the South American tradition of humitas‚Äîa creamy corn dish‚Äîand mashed it up with everyone's fall favorite: roasted squash. The humita-inspired corn is topped with mozzarella and parmesan cheese, adding richness that seamlessly balances the sweetness of the butternut squash. Served with curried roasted vegetables, this hearty vegetarian meal promises a perfect blend of flavors in every bite.

name: Low Carb Sweet and Sour Pork
description: A great asian meal you will enjoy that is both Keto and Paleo. Pork loin cut into pieces fried with olive oil cooked until tender. Sweet and sour sauce made with tomato sauce, coconut aminos, vinegar with stevia sugar and chicken stock to coat the tender pork.

name: Seared Citrus Garlic Herb Salmon
description: The bold, zesty flavors of lemon, orange, garlic, and oregano in Chef Cora‚Äôs marinade are a perfectly complement for rich, buttery seared salmon. A hearty portion is plated atop couscous, which she toasts with fragrant turmeric to add depth and sophistication to a very humble ingredient, then tosses with dried currants for sweetness and toasted almonds for nutty crunch. On the side: soft, silky, garlicky spinach and a lemon wedge for that perfect finishing touch. This versatile meal is positively packed with good-for-you nutrients!
